Leviticus27:8 Uka jaqitix t'aqhin jakani ukatsti janirak ukkha qullqi churañatak utjarapkani ukasti, sacerdoten ukar sarañapawa, sacerdotew qawqtix uka jaqix churkaspa ukhamarjam alap sani." 
Leviticus27:9 “Uywanak tuqitsti kawkïrinakatix Tatitur luqtatäkani ukanakax Tatitutakipunïniwa," 
Leviticus27:10 janirakiw yaqha uywampix turkakipatäkaspati, uka uywax juk'ampi sumäskpasa jan ukax jan walïskpasa. Turkakipatapunïni ukkhasti, luqtat uywasa, turkat uywäki ukas paypachaw Tatitutak satäni." 
Leviticus27:11 “Mä q'añu uywatix Tatitur luqtañatak yaqhachatächi ukasti, uka uywax sacerdoten ukar irpatäñapawa," 
Leviticus27:12 ukhamat sacerdotex qawqhänis uka uywan alapax uk sañapataki. Qawqtix sacerdotex churam siskani ukax jaysatäñapapuniwa," 
Leviticus27:13 jaqipatix uka uywa kutsuyasiñ munani ukkhasti, qawqtix sacerdotex churam siskäna ukat chikatan chikatapamp yapxatat churañapäniwa." 
Leviticus27:14 “Maynitix Tatitur utap luqtani ukasti, sacerdotew uka utan alap tantiyt'ani. Sacerdotex qawqhaw siskanitix ukax jaysatäñapapuniwa." 
Leviticus27:15 Ukampis khititix utap Tatitur luqtkäna uk kutsuyasxañ munani ukasti, qawqhatix churam satäkän ukxarux chikatan chikatapamp yapxatat churatäxaniwa, ukhamat uka utax wasitat jupankxani." 
Leviticus27:16 “Maynitix uraqipat mä chikata Tatitur luqtani ukasti, uka uraqin alapax qawqhatix uka uraqin achkaspa ukhamar alapax tantiyt'atäniwa, sapa pä patak pä tunkan kilo cebada granonakatxa, phisqa tunka qullqi churasini." 
Leviticus27:17 Uka jaqitix qhispiyasiñ maran uraqip churani ukasti, alapax qawqha satäkitix ukax phuqhasiñapapunïniwa," 
Leviticus27:18 ukampis qhispiyasiñ mara qhipattix Tatitur luqtani ukkhasti, sacerdotew qawqha qullqitix uka uraqit churañäki uk amuyt'ani, qawqha maratix qhispiyasiñ maratak utjaski ukarjamaw alapax iraqasini." 
Leviticus27:19 “Maynitix luqtat uraqip kutsuyasxañ munani ukasti, qawqhatix alapäki ukxarux chikatan chikatapamp yapxatat churani, ukat uka uraqix wasitat jupankxarakini;" 
Leviticus27:20 ukampis janitix uka uraqi kutsuyaskani, ukat uka uraqix yaqhar aljatäxarakini ukkhasti, janiw wasitat uka uraq kutsuyaskxaspati." 
Leviticus27:21 Kunapachatix uka uraqix qhispiyasiñ maran qhispit uñjasxani ukkhasti, Tatitutaki sata yaqhachatäxaniwa, sacerdotew uka uraq katusxarakini." 
Leviticus27:22 “Maynitix wila masipan jan uraqipäkasin mä alat uraqi Tatitur churani ukkhasti," 
Leviticus27:23 qhispiyasiñ mara puriniñapkamax qawqha maräskis ukhamarjamaw sacerdotex uka uraqin alap sani, ukatsti uka jaqix uka urpachaw qawqhäkitix uka uraqin alapax ukarjam churxani, ukatsti uka uraq Tatituruw luqtxani." 
Leviticus27:24 Qhispiyasiñ maransti, khititix chiqpach uraqinïkasin uraqip aljkatayna uka pachpa jaqir churatäxaniwa." 
Leviticus27:25 “Taqi alanakax kawkïr qullqitix qullan utan apnaqatäki ukhamarjam amuyt'atäniwa, uka qullqix tunka mayan gramoniwa." 
Leviticus27:26 “Uywanakan nayrïr qallunakapasti, vaca qallüpasa, jan ukax mä oveja qallüpasa, taqi ukanakax Tatitunkxiwa, janiw wakiskxiti yaqhachañaxa." 
Leviticus27:27 Mä q'añu uywatix Tatitur luqtañatak yaqhachatächi ukasti, uka uywax kutsuyatäspawa qawqhäkitix alapax ukar chikatan chikatapat mä juk'amp yapxatasa. Ukampis janitix uka uywax kutsuyatäkani ukkhasti, nayra alapar aljatäxaniwa." 
Leviticus27:28 “Maynitix Tatitur yänakapat luqtxani, jaqinakäpasa, uywanakäpasa, jan ukax tuti uraqinakäpasa, taqi ukanakax janipuniw aljatäkaspati, janirakiw kutsuyatäkaspasa; taqi kunanakatix Tatitur churatäki ukanakax qullan yänakapuniwa." 
Leviticus27:29 Kawkïr jaqitix jiwayatäñatak juchañchatäkän ukas janipuniw qhispiyatäkaspati, jan ukasti jiwañapapuniwa." 
Leviticus27:30 “Taqi achunakata, jathanakata, quqanakan achuri achunakatsa sapa tunkat mayax Tatitunkapuniwa, jupar katuyatarakiwa." 
Leviticus27:31 Maynitix uka tunkat maya churatäkän uk kutsuyasiñ munani ukkhasti, qawqhäkitix alapaxa, ukxarux chikatan chikatapat mä juk'ampi yapxatat churañapawa." 
Leviticus27:32 “Uywanakatsti sapa tunkat mayax Tatitur luqtatapunïniwa," 
Leviticus27:33 kawkïritix sumäki, jan sumäki ukanaksa janiw ajllitäñapäkiti, janirakiw yaqhampis turkakipatäkaspati. Turkakipatäni ukasti, suma uywasa, jan sumäki ukas paypachaw nayankani, janirakiw kutsuyatäkaspati.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Aka kamachi arunak Tatitux Moisesar Sinaí qullun israelitanakatak churäna. 
Numbers1:1 Israelitanakax Sinaí wasarankasipkänwa, ukapachaw Tatitux Moisesar parläna, Diosampi Jikisiñ Carpana. Jupanakan Egipto markat mistunitapax, tunka kimsan phaxsïxänwa. Tatitusti Moisesar akham säna:" 
Numbers1:2 “Israelitanakar taqpachanir jakthapipxam, ayllutkama, wila masitkama, taqi chachanakan sutip qillqantapxam, qawqhanïtaynas uk yatiñataki," 
Numbers1:3 pä tunka maranit amstaru, nuwasïwir sarirjamäpki ukanaka. Tamankiritjam qillqantapxäta, Aarón chachan yanapt'apampi," 
Numbers1:4 sapaqat ayllut ajllita wila masinakan jilïripan yanapt'apampi. 
Numbers1:5 Jumanakar yanapt'ir jilïrinakan sutinakapax akanakawa: “Rubén ayllutxa: Elisur sat Sedeúr chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers1:6 “Simeón ayllutxa: Salumiel sat Surisadai chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers1:7 “Judá ayllutxa: Nahasón sat Aminadab chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers1:8 “Isacar ayllutxa: Natanael sat Suar chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers1:9 “Zabulón ayllutxa: Eliab sat Helón chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers1:10 “Efraín ayllutxa, Elisamá sat Amihud chachan yuqapa. “Manasés ayllutxa, Gamaliel sat Pedasur chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers1:11 “Benjamín ayllutxa: Abidán sat Guidoní chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers1:12 “Dan ayllutxa: Ahiézer sat Amisadai chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers1:13 “Aser ayllutxa: Paguiel sat Ocrán chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers1:14 “Gad ayllutxa: Eliasaf sat Reuel chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers1:15 “Neftalí ayllutxa: Ahirá sat Enán chachan yuqapa.” 
Numbers1:16 Jupanakaw israelita marka taypita, ayllunakan jilïrinakapat ajllitäpxäna, sapaqat wila masi tamat sayt'añataki." 
Numbers1:17 Ukhamaw Moisesampi, Aaronampix uka jaqinakar jawsayapxäna, yanapt'iritak sutitkam ajllitäpkatayna jupanakaru," 
Numbers1:18 ukatsti payïr phaxsina mä uru saraqataruw taqpach markar tantachthapipxäna. Uka urunsti jaqix mayat mayat jakthapitäpxänwa, wila masitkama, tunu awkit saraqiritkama. Ukhamat taqpach chachanakan sutinakapax qillqantasïna pä tunka maranit amstaru," 
Numbers1:19 kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar iwxkatayna ukhamarjamaw Sinaí wasaran jaqix jakthapisïna. 
Numbers1:20 Kunapachatix jaqinakax ayllutkama, tunu awkit saraqiritkama, wila masitkam jakthapitäxäna, sapa maynin sutinakapas qillqantatäxäna, pä tunka maranit amstaru chachanakas qillqantatäxarakïna ukapachax, taqpachani jakthapitasti akkhanïpxänwa: Rubén ayllunkirita, Israelan tayna yuqapa: pusi tunka suxtan waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakänwa, nuwasïwir sarañatak wakicht'atanakaxa." 
Numbers1:21  
Numbers1:22 Simeón ayllunkiritxa: phisqa tunka llätunkan waranqa kimsa patakani. 
Numbers1:23  
Numbers1:24 Gad ayllunkiritxa: pusi tunka phisqan waranqa suxta patak phisqa tunkani. 
Numbers1:25  
Numbers1:26 Judá ayllunkiritxa: paqallq tunka pusin waranqa suxta patakani. 
Numbers1:27  
Numbers1:28 Isacar ayllunkiritxa: phisqa tunka pusin waranqa pusi patakani. 
Numbers1:29  
Numbers1:30 Zabulón ayllunkiritxa: phisqa tunka paqallqun waranqa pusi patakani. 
Numbers1:31  
Numbers1:32 José chachan wawanakapa, Efraín ayllunkirita: pusi tunkan waranqa phisqa patakani. Manasés ayllunkiritxa: kimsa tunka payan waranqa pä patakani." 
Numbers1:33  
Numbers1:34  
Numbers1:35  
Numbers1:36 Benjamín ayllunkiritxa: kimsa tunka phisqan waranqa pusi patakani. 
Numbers1:37  
Numbers1:38 Dan ayllunkiritxa: suxta tunka payan waranqa paqallq patakani. 
Numbers1:39  
Numbers1:40 Aser ayllunkiritxa: pusi tunka mayan waranqa phisqa patakani. 
Numbers1:41  
Numbers1:42 Neftalí ayllunkiritsti, phisqa tunka kimsan waranqa pusi patakan chachanakaw jakt'atarakïna." 
Numbers1:43  
Numbers1:44 Taqi ukanakaw Israelan wawanakapan ayllutkama, wila masitkam jakthapitäpxäna, uksti Moisesampi, Aaronampiw jakthapïna, israelitanakan ayllunakapata, wila masi tamanakapat sayt'iri uka tunka payan jilïrinakapamp yanapt'ayasisa." 
Numbers1:45 Israelitanakat khitinakatix pä tunka maranit amstar jakhutäkäna, ukhamarak, nuwasïwirus sarirjamäpxarakïna ukanakax," 
Numbers1:46 taqpachanix suxta patak kimsani waranqa phisqa pataka phisqa tunkan chachanakänwa. 
Numbers1:47 Leví chachat saraqirinakax janiw mayni ayllunkirinakjamax nayra awkinakapan ayllunakap taypin jakhutäpkänti," 
Numbers1:48 Tatituw Moisesar satayna: 
Numbers1:49 “Israelitanakar jakthapkäta ukkhaxa, janiw jupanak taypir Leví chachat saraqirinakarux jakhütati." 
Numbers1:50 Jupanakarux Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpan luqtapxañapatakiw uchäta, taqi kunanakatix uka qullan chiqawja manqhan utjki ukanak uñjapxañapataki. Jupanakaw arust'äwi qullan carpampi, uka manqhan utjir yänakamp apapxani, ukhamarakiw jupanakax qullan chiqawjar muyuntas utjnuqtapxani." 
Numbers1:51 Markax sarantkani ukapachasti, Leví ayllunkirinakaw arust'äwi qullan carpa apthapipxani; utjnuqtapkani ukkhasti, jupanakarakiw wasitat sayt'ayapxani. Khiti jaqitix jan Leví ayllunkirïkasin uka qullan chiqawjar jak'achasini ukaxa, jiwaniwa." 
Numbers1:52 Israelan maynïr ayllunakapasti, militaranakan saraparjamaw sapaqat maynis pachpa tamapana, wiphalap jak'an utjnuqtapxani." 
Numbers1:53 Leví ayllunkirinakasti Tatitun arust'äwi qullan carpar muyuntasaw utjnuqtapxani, uk uñjapxarakini, Tatitux israelitanakatak jan q'apisiñapataki.”" 
Numbers1:54 Israelitanakasti kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjamaw lurapxäna. 
Numbers2:1 Tatitux Moisesampiru, Aaronampiruw säna:" 
Numbers2:2 “Israelitanakax Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpäkis ukkhat jaya chiqat muyuntasaw utjnuqtapxani, sapaqat maynisa wiphalapampi, wila masitkam mä chimpun uchata." 
Numbers2:3 “Inti jalsu tuqirux Judá ayllun wiphalapanïki uka tamanakaw utjnuqtapxani. Judá ayllun ejercitopan jilïripasti Nahasón chachawa, Aminadab chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:4 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax paqallq tunka pusin waranqa suxta patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:5 Judá ayllunkirinakat kupi tuqirusti Isacar ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtani, jilïripasti Natanael chachawa, Suar chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:6 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax phisqa tunka pusin waranqa pusi patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:7 Ch'iqa tuqirusti, Zabulón ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtarakini, jilïripasti Eliab sat chachawa, Helón chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:8 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax phisqa tunka paqallqun waranqa pusi patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:9 Ukhamat uka ayllunakan tamanakapax Judá ayllunkir wiphalapar arkapxani. Taqpachanisti pataka kimsaqallq tunka suxtan waranqa pusi patakan chachanakawa. Taqpachaniw israelita ejerciton nayraqatap sarantapxani. 
Numbers2:10 “Aynach tuqirusti Rubén ayllun wiphalapanïki uka ejercitow utjnuqtani. Rubén ayllun ejercitopan jilïripax Elisur chachawa, Sedeúr chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:11 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax pusi tunk suxtan waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:12 Rubén ayllunkirinakat kupi tuqirusti Simeón ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtani, jilïripasti Selumiel chachawa, Surisadai chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:13 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax phisqa tunk llätunkan waranqa kimsa patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:14 Ch'iqa tuqirusti Gad ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtani, jilïripasti Eliasaf chachawa, Reuel chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:15 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax pusi tunka phisqan waranqa suxta patak phisqa tunkan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:16 Ukhamat uka ayllunakan tamanakapax Rubén ayllunkir wiphalapar arkapxani. Taqpachasti pataka phisqa tunka mayan waranqa pusi patak phisqa tunkan chachanakawa; jupanakasti nayrïr tamar arktasaw taqpachan sarantapxani. 
Numbers2:17 “Leví chachat saraqirinakax jupanak qhipat Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa apt'at sarantapxani. Uka pusi tamanakax mayat mayat sarantapxani, utjnuqtatanakaparjamaw wiphalapamp sarantapxani." 
Numbers2:18 “Inti jalanta tuqirusti Efraín ayllunkirinakan wiphalapanïki uka ejercitonakaw utjnuqtapxani. Efraín ayllun ejercitopan jilïripax Elisamá chachawa, Amihud chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:19 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax pusi tunka waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:20 Efraín ayllunkirit kupi tuqirusti Manasés ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtarakini, jilïripasti Gamaliel sat chachawa, Pedasur chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:21 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax kimsa tunka payan waranqa pä patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:22 Ch'iqa tuqirusti Benjamín ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtani, jilïripasti Guidoní chachan Abidán sat yuqapawa," 
Numbers2:23 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax kimsa tunk phisqan waranqa pusi patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:24 Ukhamat uka ayllunakan tamanakapax Efraín ayllunkir wiphalapanïki ukar arkapxani. Taqpachanisti pataka kimsaqallqun waranqa patakan chachanakawa; jupanakasti kimsïr t'aqa tamxaruw sarantapxani. 
Numbers2:25 “Amsta tuqirusti Dan ayllun wiphalapanïki uka ejercitonakaw utjnuqtani. Dan ayllun ejercitopan jilïripax Ahiézer sat chachawa, Amisadai chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:26 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax suxta tunka payan waranqa paqallqu patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:27 Dan ayllunkirit kupirusti, Aser ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtarakini, jilïripasti Paguiel sat chachawa, Ocrán chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:28 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax pusi tunka mayan waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:29 Ch'iqa tuqirusti Neftalí ayllun ejercitopaw utjnuqtani, jilïripasti Ahirá sat chachawa, Enán chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers2:30 jupanakasti jakthapitarjamax phisqa tunka kimsan waranqa pusi patakan chachanakawa. 
Numbers2:31 Ukhamat uka ayllunakan tamanakapax Dan ayllun wiphalap arkapxani. Taqpachanisti pataka phisqa tunka paqallqun waranqa suxta patakan chachanakawa; jupanakaw taqi tamanakan qhipap wiphalapamp sarantapxani.” 
Numbers2:32 Taqi israelita wila masinakat jakthapitax, taqpachanix suxta patak kimsan waranqa phisqa patak phisqa tunkan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers2:33 Ukampis Leví chachat saraqirinakax janiw jakthapitäpkänti, kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar iwxkatayna ukhamarjama." 
Numbers2:34 Israelit jaqinakasti kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjamaw taqpach lurapxäna: Sapaqat tamaw wiphalanakapamp utjnuqtapxäna, ukatsti wila masitkama, ayllutkam sarantapxarakïna." 
Numbers3:1 Tatitux Sinaí qullun Moisesar parlkän ukapachaxa, Aarón chachax pusi wawanïnwa:" 
Numbers3:2 Nadab, Abihú, Eleazar, Itamar jupanakänwa. Nadabasti tayna wawapänwa." 
Numbers3:3 Pusinpachaw sacerdotëñatak ajllitäpxäna, utt'ayatäpxarakïna," 
Numbers3:4 ukampis Nadab, Abiú chachanakax Tatitu nayräxan jiwapxäna, jupanakan mä jan uñt'ata nina Sinaí qullun luqtapxatap layku. Jupanak paninisti janirakiw wawanïpkänti, ukatwa Eleazarampi, Itamar chachampix sacerdote kankañ phuqhapxäna." 
Numbers3:5 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: 
Numbers3:6 “Leví ayllunkirinakar jawsayam, Aarón sacerdoten arsutaparjam jupar yanapapxañapataki." 
Numbers3:7 Jupanakaw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan, Aaronan lurañanakap jupataki, taqpach markachirinakampitak lurapxani, qullan chiqawjan luqtäwinak phuqhasa." 
Numbers3:8 Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan yänakap uñjapxarakini, ukatsti israelitanakan lurañanakap lurapxani, qullan chiqawjan luqtäwinak phuqhasa." 
Numbers3:9 Taqpach Israel markankirinak taypitxa, Aaronampi, wawanakapampikiw sacerdote kankañ katuqapxani. Ukat ukxar utjir levitanakarux yaqhachätawa, Aaronampiru, jupat saraqirinakampir luqtapxañapataki. Yaqha jaqitix, jan Aaronan yuqapäkasin sacerdoten lurañap lurani ukasti, jiwaniwa.”" 
Numbers3:10  
Numbers3:11 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa: 
Numbers3:12 “Nayaw israelitanak taypit levitanakarux ajllista, sapa utankirin jilïr wawap lanti. Jupanakax nayankiwa," 
Numbers3:13 taqi jilïr wawanakan nayankatap layku. Egipcionakan jilïr wawanakap jiwaraykäyät ukapachaw nayax, israelitanakan jilïr yuqall wawanakap nayatak yaqhachasta, uywanakapan nayrïr wawachat qallunakapsa yaqhachasirakta. Ukhamasti nayankituwa. Nayätwa Tatituxa.”" 
Numbers3:14 Tatitux Sinaí wasaran Moisesar parläna, akham sasa:" 
Numbers3:15 “Leví chachat saraqirinakar jakthapim, wila masitkama, tunu awkit saraqiritkama, ukatsti taqi yuqall wawanakar mä phaxsinit amstar qillqantam.”" 
Numbers3:16 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw jakthapïna. 
Numbers3:17 Leví chachan wawanakapax: Guersón, Quehat, Merarí ukanakänwa." 
Numbers3:18 Guersón chachan wawanakapax: Libní, Simí ukanakänwa." 
Numbers3:19 Quehat chachan wawanakapax: Amram, Ishar, Hebrón, Uziel ukanakänwa." 
Numbers3:20 Merarí chachan wawanakapax: Mahli, Musí ukanakänwa. Leví chachan tamapankir wila masitkam jakhutanakax taqi ukanakänwa." 
Numbers3:21 Guersón chachan wila masinakapax Libní, Simí ukanakänwa." 
Numbers3:22 Taqpach yuqall wawanakapat mä phaxsinit amstaru qillqantatanakax, paqallq waranqa phisqa patakanïnwa." 
Numbers3:23 Uka tamanakasti, inti jalanta tuqin utjnuqtapxäna, qullan chiqawja qhipäxana." 
Numbers3:24 Guersón chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan jilïr irpiripax Eliasaf chachänwa, Lael sat chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers3:25 Jupanakaw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan qullan chiqawja uñjapxäna, uka carpan janxata lip'ichinakapa, mantañar uchatäkis uka cortina," 
Numbers3:26 anqäxan utjir cortinanakapa, mantañapan utjir cortinapa, qullan chiqawjampiru, altarampir muyuntki uka cortinanaka, ukhamarus cortinanak chinuña wiskanak uñjapxarakïna." 
Numbers3:27 Quehat chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakax Amram, Ishar, Hebrón, Uziel ukanakänwa," 
Numbers3:28 taqpach yuqall wawanakapat mä phaxsinit amstar qillqantatanakax, kimsaqallq waranqa kimsa patakanïnwa. Uka tamanakaw qullan chiqawja uñjapxäna," 
Numbers3:29 jupanakasti qullan chiqawjat aynach tuqin utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers3:30 Uka tamanakan jilïr irpiripax Elisafán sat chachänwa, Uziel chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers3:31 Uka tamanakaw Tatitun arust'äwi arcap uñjapxäna, ukhamarak Tatitutak yaqhachat t'ant'a uchañ mesa, candelero, altaranaka, velo, Tatitur yupaychañatak wakiski uka qullan yänakampi, taqi yaqha yänakampi." 
Numbers3:32 Levitanakan jilïr irpiripax Aarón sacerdoten yuqapa Eleazar chachänwa, jupasti qullan chiqawja uñjirinakar uñch'ukiyañatak uchatänwa." 
Numbers3:33 Merarí chachan wila masinakapax Mahli, Musí ukanakänwa." 
Numbers3:34 Taqpach yuqall wawanakapa mä phaxsinit amstar qillqantatanakasti, suxta waranqa pä patakanïnwa." 
Numbers3:35 Jupanakan jilïr irpiripax Suriel sat chachänwa, Abihail chachan yuqapa, jupanakasti qullan chiqawjat amsta tuqin utjnuqtapxäna." 
Numbers3:36 Merarí chachan saraqirinakapax qullan chiqawjan utjir tablanak uñjapxäna, ukhamarak uka tablanakan lawanakapa, kawkïri lawatix mä thiyat mä thiyaru sarki uka lawanakapa, sayir lawanakampi, katxäsirinakapampi, taqi yänakapampi," 
Numbers3:37 uka kipkaraki uta anqäxar muyuntki uka sayir lawanaka, katxäsirinakapampi, ch'akurunakapampi, wiskanakapampi." 
Numbers3:38 Moisesampi, Aaronampi, wawanakapampix, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa nayräxaparu, inti jalsu tuqiruw utjnuqtapxäna. Jupanakaw israelitanakan sutipar qullan utjäwi uñjapxäna. Mayni jaqitix jan sacerdotëkasin, sacerdoten lurañap lurkän ukapachaxa, jiwayatäñatak juchañchatänwa." 
Numbers3:39 Moisesampi, Aaronampix Tatitun arsutaparjamaw Leví ayllunkirinakar, wila masitkam jakthapipxäna, jupanakar qillqantapxarakïna, mä phaxsinit amstaru yuqall wawanakasti, taqpachanix pä tunka payan waranqanïnwa." 
Numbers3:40 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: “Israelitanakan wawanakap taypin jilïr wawanak mä phaxsinit amstar jakthapim, sutinakap qillqantarakim." 
Numbers3:41 Ukatsti Leví chachat saraqirinakar nayatak yaqhacharapita, taqi israelitanakan tayna yuqall wawanakap lanti. Uka kipkaraki, Leví ayllunkirinakan uywanakap nayatak yaqhacharapita, taqi israelitanakan uywanakapat nayrïr wawachat qallunakap lanti. Nayätwa Israelan Tatitupaxa.”" 
Numbers3:42 Moisesasti kunjämtix Tatitux siskatayna, ukhamarjamaw taqi israelitanakan tayna yuqall wawanakap jakthapïna," 
Numbers3:43 taqpachanisti mä phaxsinit amstaru qillqantat yuqall wawanakax, pä tunka payan waranqa pä patak paqallq tunka kimsanïnwa." 
Numbers3:44 Uka qhipatsti Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa: 
Numbers3:45 “Leví chachat saraqirinakax nayankituwa, jupanakasti taqpach israelitanakan tayna yuqall wawanakap lantïniwa. Jupanakan uywanakapas israelitanakan uywanakap lantiw nayankarakitu." 
Numbers3:46 Ukampis israelitanakan jilïr yuqall wawanakapax, Leví chachan saraqirinakapat sipan jilawa; ukhamasti, jiläki uka pä patak paqallq tunka kimsan jilïr wawanak kutsuyasiñatakixa," 
Numbers3:47 sapaqat jaqita phisqa qullqi mayïta, qullan utjäwin tupuparjama, sapa qullqisti tunka mayan gramonakaniwa," 
Numbers3:48 uka qullqsti Aaronampiru, wawanakapampiruw churäta, jupanakat kutsuyatäkaspas ukhama. Nayätwa Israelan Tatitupaxa.”" 
Numbers3:49 Moisesasti israelitanak taypin jilarir tayna yuqall wawanak kutsuyañatakix qullqi apthapïna," 
Numbers3:50 waranqa kimsa patak suxta tunka phisqan qullqi apthapirakïna, qullan utjäwin tupuparjama." 
Numbers3:51 Uka qullqinaksti Aaronampiru, wawanakapampiruw churxäna, kunjämtix Tatitux siskatayna ukhamarjama." 
Numbers4:1 Tatitux Moisesampiru, Aaronampiruw parläna, akham sasa:" 
Numbers4:2 “Quehat chachan wawanakapäki uka levitanakat wila masitkam jakthapim," 
Numbers4:3 kimsa tunka maranita, phisqa tunka marankama, jupanakasti Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan lurañatakis walirakïpxpan." 
Numbers4:4 “Quehat chachan wawanakapan lurañanakapax wali qullanawa, ukanakasti akanakawa:" 
Numbers4:5 Kunapachatix markax yaqha chiqar sarañatak sarxarkani ukkhax, Aaronampi, wawanakapampiw jutasin Qullanansa Qullanapa chiqawjat velo apaqapxani, ukatsti ukampiw arust'äwi arcar janxatapxani." 
Numbers4:6 Uka patxarusti suma lip'ichinakampiw imxatapxani, ukxarusti jan ch'ukuni morado telampiw janxatapxarakini, ukat lawanakampi apañatak uchapxani." 
Numbers4:7 Ukatsti Tatitutak yaqhachat t'ant'anak uchañ patxarux, morado telampiw janxatapxani, uka patxaruw chuwanaka, wisllanaka, qirunaka, vino luqtañ chatunaka, sapür luqtañ t'ant'anak uchapxani." 
Numbers4:8 Taqi uka patxarusti wila telampiw janxatapxani, ukxarusti suma lip'ichinakampiw imxatapxani, ukat lawanakampi apañatak uchapxani." 
Numbers4:9 Ukatsti morado tela aptasin ukampiw candelero imxatapxani, ukhamarak lamparanaka, nina jawriñanaka, jisk'a chuwanaka, aceitetak apnaqaski taqi uka qirunaksa." 
Numbers4:10 Taqi ukanaksti suma lip'ichinakampiw llawuntapxani, ukatsti lawanak patxaruw kallañatak uchapxani." 
Numbers4:11 “Qurit lurat altar patxarusti morado isi janatatapxani, suma lip'ichinakampiw ukar llawuntapxani, altar aptañatakisti lawanakampiw uskupxani." 
Numbers4:12 Ukxarusti qullan utjäwin apnaqaski taqi uka yänak apthapisin, morado telaruw uchapxani, ukanaksti suma lip'ichinakampiw llawuntapxani, ukatsti lawanakxaruw kallapxani." 
Numbers4:13 Ukatsti altarat qhillanak picharapxani, ukxarusti ch'iyar wila telampiw imxatapxani." 
Numbers4:14 Uka patxarusti taqi kunanakatix altaran yupaychañatak wakiski ukanak uchapxani: nina sank'a nakhayañanaka, nina jawriñanaka, lampanaka, jach'a qirunaka; taqi kunanakatix altaran apnaqaski ukanaka. Taqi ukanakaruw suma lip'ichinakamp imxatapxani, kallañatakisti lawanak uskupxarakini." 
Numbers4:15 Aaronampi, wawanakapampix taqi uka qullan yänak llawthapiñ tukuyxapxani, sarantañatakis niya jank'akïpxarakini ukapachasti, Quehat chachan wawanakapaw jutapxani, taqi uka yänak apañataki. Ukampis kunatix qullanäki ukxa janiw llamkt'apxañapäkiti, jupanakan jan jiwapxañapataki. Quehat chachan wawanakapax, taqi aka qullan yänak Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpat apapxañapa." 
Numbers4:16 Aarón sacerdoten Eleazar yuqapax lamparanak qhanayir aceite imañapa, ukatsti suma q'apkir incienso, sapür nayar luqtañ juyra waxt'anaka, luqtañ aceite imañaparaki. Ukatsti qullan utjäwi uñjañaparaki, taqi kunanakatix ukan utjki ukanaksa, ukan apnaqañatak wakiski taqi uka qullan yänakampi.”" 
Numbers4:17 Tatitusti Moisesampiru, Aaronampirux sänwa:" 
Numbers4:18 “Jan jumanakax munapxamti, levitanak taypit Quehat chachan wila masinakapan chhaqtapxañapa." 
Numbers4:19 Jan jupanakan qullan yänak llamkt'apxatap layku mutuyat uñjasis jiwasipkañapatakix, akanak lurapxañapa: Aaronampi, wawanakapampiw sapa maynir unañchani, kunanaktix lurapxañapäki, kunanaktix apapxañapäki ukanaka." 
Numbers4:20 Ukhamat jupanakax kunatix qullanäki ukanak uñjir jan mantapkaniti, janirakiw jiwapkanisa.”" 
Numbers4:21 Tatitux Moisesar saskakïnwa: 
Numbers4:22 “Guersón chachan wawanakapar jakthapirakim, saraqiripatkama, wila masipatkama," 
Numbers4:23 kimsa tunka maranit amstaru phisqa tunka marankam jakthapisa, jupanakasti Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan lurañanakatakis walïpxarakpan." 
Numbers4:24 “Guersón chachan wawanakapax akanak lurapxani: 
Numbers4:25 Qullan utjäwin cortinanakap apapxani, Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpa, suma lip'ichinakamp patxar janxatatäkis uka, Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpar mantañankki uka cortina," 
Numbers4:26 uta anqäxan cortinanakapa, qullan utjäwimpiru, altarampir muyuntki uka mantañapan uchat cortina, chinuñanaka, luqtañatak wakiski taqpach yänakampi." 
Numbers4:27 Aaronampi, wawanakapampiw Guersón chachan wawanakapar kuntix lurañanakapäki, apapxañapäki ukanaksa uñachayapxani. Jumanakaw jupanakar lurañap katuyapxäta." 
Numbers4:28 Taqi ukanak Guersón chachan wawanakapax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan lurapxani, jupanakarusti Aarón sacerdoten Itamar yuqapaw sarayani." 
Numbers4:29 “Ukatsti Merarí chachan wawanakapar uka kipkarak jakthapim, saraqiripatkama, wila masipatkama." 
Numbers4:30 Taqinin sutinakap qillqantam, kimsa tunka maranit amstaru, phisqa tunka marankama, Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpan irnaqañatakis walïpxarakpan." 
Numbers4:31 Jupanakan lurañanakapasti Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpanxa, akanakawa: tablanakampi, sayt'u lawanakampi, sayir lawanakampi, katxäsirinakapamp apapxani." 
Numbers4:32 Ukatsti qullan utjäwir muyuntki uka sayir lawanakap apapxarakini, lawanak katxäsirinakapampi, ch'akurunakapampi, chinuñanakapampi, kunanakatix yupaychañatak munaski taqi ukanakampi. Jumaw sapa maynir kuntix apañapäki ukanak sarakïta." 
Numbers4:33 Taqi ukanakaw Merarí chachat saraqir wawanakapan lurañanakapaxa, jupanakarusti Itamar chachaw sarayani.”" 
Numbers4:34 Ukatsti Moisesampi, Aaronampi, markan jilïrinakapampiw Quehat chachan wawanakapar jakthapipxäna, saraqiripatkama, wila masipatkama," 
Numbers4:35 kimsa tunka maranit amstaru phisqa tunka marankam yuqall wawanakaru, Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpan irnaqañatakis walïpkarakïn ukanakaru," 
Numbers4:36 taqpachani qillqantatasti pä waranqa paqallqu patak phisqa tunkan yuqall wawanakänwa. 
Numbers4:37 Quehat chachan saraqirinakapax taqi ukanakänwa, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan irnaqañatakis walïpkarakïn ukanaka. Moisesampi, Aaronampiw taqi jupanakar jakthapipxäna, kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar arskatayna ukhamarjama." 
Numbers4:38 Guersón chachan wawanakapax saraqiripatkama, wila masipatkam jakthapitanakax," 
Numbers4:39 khitinakatix kimsa tunka maranit amstar phisqa tunka marankamäpkäna, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan lurañatakis walïpkarakïn" 
Numbers4:40 ukanakasti, pä waranqa suxta patak kimsa tunkan jaqinakänwa." 
Numbers4:41 Guersón chachan saraqiripatkam jakthapit yuqall wawanakax taqi ukanakänwa, khitinakatix Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan irnaqañatakis walïpkarakïn ukanaka; Moisesampi, Aaronampiw jakthapipxäna, kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar arskatayna ukhamarjama." 
Numbers4:42 Merarí chachan wawanakapax saraqiripatkama, wila masipatkama," 
Numbers4:43 khitinakatix kimsa tunka maranit amstar phisqa tunka marankamäpkäna, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan irnaqañatakis walïpkarakïn" 
Numbers4:44 ukanakax, kimsa waranqa pä patakanïnwa." 
Numbers4:45 Merarí chachan saraqiripatkam jakthapit yuqall wawanakax taqi ukanakänwa, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan irnaqañatakis walïpkarakïn ukanaka, Moisesampi, Aaronampiw jupanakar jakthapipxäna, kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar arskatayna ukhamarjama." 
Numbers4:46 Moisesampi, Aaronampi, Israelan jilïrinakapampix taqpach levitanak jakthapipxäna, saraqiripatkama, wila masipatkama," 
Numbers4:47 kimsa tunka maranit amstaru phisqa tunka marankama, Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpan irnaqañatakis walïpkaraki ukanaka," 
Numbers4:48 taqpachanisti kimsaqallq waranqa phisqa patak kimsaqallq tunkan yuqall wawanakänwa. 
Numbers4:49 Uka jakthapïwisti kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar arskatayna ukhamarjamaw lurasïna. Ukhamaw Moisesax sapa maynir kuntix lurañapäki, kuntix apañapäki ukanaksa uñachayäna, Tatitux jupar arskatayna ukhamarjama." 
Numbers5:1 Tatitux Moisesarux sänwa: 
Numbers5:2 “Israelitanakar parlam, jupanak taypit lepra usun jaqinakar jaqunukupxpan, wila apa usuninakaru, jan ukax, amayar llamkt'apxatap layku q'añuchat uñjaski ukanakaru." 
Numbers5:3 Chachäpasa, warmïpasa campamento anqar jaqunukupxpan. Ukham lurasax janiw campamentor q'añu tukuyapkaniti, nayan jupanak taypin jakatax layku.”" 
Numbers5:4 Israelitanakasti Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjamaw jaysapxäna, ukatsti taqi uka jaqinakaruw campamentot jaqunukupxäna." 
Numbers5:5 Tatitux Moisesarux sänwa: 
Numbers5:6 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Kunapachatix khiti jaqisa, mä warmisa, Tatitur jan suma arkkani, ukhamarak kuna jan walinaksa jaqi masipar lurani mä jach'a jucha lurasa," 
Numbers5:7 uka jaqisti juchanakap arsusiñapawa, ukhamarus jan walt'ayatapat jaqi masiparux taqpach kuttayxañapa, chikatan chikatapampi yapxatasa." 
Numbers5:8 Ñanqhachat jaqitix jiwaspa, ukat janirak khiti wila masipar ukanak kuttayañas utjkaspa ukapachasti, ukax Tatitutakïniwa, sacerdoten katuqañapataki. Ukhamarus, ñanqhachir jaqix mä urqu oveja sacerdoten ukar apañapa, wilañcha luqtañapataki, ukhamat juchapat pampachäwi jikxatañapataki." 
Numbers5:9 “Taqi churäwinakampi, waxt'anakampi, kawkïrinaktix israelitanakax Tatitur luqtapkani, ukatsti sacerdoten ukar apapkani taqi ukanakax, sacerdotetakïniwa." 
Numbers5:10 Taqi kunanakatix Tatitutak yaqhachatäki, ukatsti sacerdoten ukar apatäki ukanakax, sacerdotetakïniwa.”" 
Numbers5:11 Tatitux Moisesar yaqha kamachi churäna, sarakïnwa:" 
Numbers5:12 “Israelitanakar parlam, akham sarakim: Mä warmitix chachanïkasin jan wal sarnaqas chachapar sallqjaspa," 
Numbers5:13 ukatsti chachapan jan yatkasin yaqha chachampi wachuq jucha luraspa, ukham luratapamp q'añuchjasispa, ukat janirak khitis yatkaspa ukham luratapxa." 
Numbers5:14 Inas chachapax warmin jan wal luratap amuyasin mayjt'aschispa, jan ukax, warmin jan kuna jucha luratapat mayjt'asispa ukaxa." 
Numbers5:15 Ukhamäni ukapachasti, chachax sacerdoten nayraqataparuw warmipar irpani, ukatsti Tatiturux pä kilo cebada jak'u waxt'a warmipat churani. Ukampis janiw jak'u patxar aceitempi warxatkaniti, janirakiw incienso uchkaniti, uka waxt'an chuyma mayjt'at chachan waxt'apätap layku, warmipan juchap qhanstayañ munatap laykuraki." 
Numbers5:16 “Sacerdotex warmiru jak'apar irpkatasinxa, Tatitun nayraqataparuw uñstayani." 
Numbers5:17 Ukxarusti Tatitur luqtat uma ñiq'i chatur aptanini, ukarusti qullan utjäwit mä juk'a laq'a aptasin jach'intani." 
Numbers5:18 Ukatsti, sacerdotex Tatitun nayraqatapar warmir irpkatasax, ñik'utap jararani, ukatsti warmin amparaparux ch'uxña lurasiñ tuqit jucha qhanar uñstayañatak waxt'äwïki uk uchani; ukchañkamasti jupax amparapan katuni, jucha luririnakar jan walt'ayir uka k'allk'u uma." 
Numbers5:19 Ukapachaw sacerdotex warmir mä juramento lurayani, juparusti sarakiniwa: ‘Janitix yaqha chachamp sarnaqksta, chachamarus ch'uxña lurksta, janirak q'añu lurañamp atipayasksta ukapachax, aka ñanqha apanir k'allk'u uma umantkäta ukkhaxa, janiw kunas kamachkätamti." 
Numbers5:20 Ukampis jumatix chachamar yaqha chachamp ikintas sallqjsta, ukham lurasin q'añu tukuraksta" 
Numbers5:21 ukapachasti, Tatitux marka nayraqatan jumar ñanqhachpan, purakamas ch'itkatpan, janirak wawanïkamsa." 
Numbers5:22 Ñanqhachäwi apanir uma umt'kät ukapachaw uka mutuyäwi katuqäta’ sasa. Warmisti saniwa: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa. 
Numbers5:23 “Ukat sacerdotex uka ñanqhachäwi arunakxa mä papelaruw qillqantani, ukatsti uka k'allk'u umampiw phiskhurarakini." 
Numbers5:24 Uka qhipatsti uka k'allk'u uma warmir umantayani," 
Numbers5:25 warmisti amparapankki uka waxt'a sacerdoter churarakini, altarxar uchañapataki, Tatitun nayraqatapar uñstayasa," 
Numbers5:26 ukxarusti waña juyranak waxt'at mä jach'i aptasinxa, altarxaruw nakt'ayani, ukhamat khitin waxt'apäki uk Tatitun amtasiñapataki. “Ukat warmix uka k'allk'u uma umantani," 
Numbers5:27 uka warmitix chachapar sallqjchïn ukapachaxa, uka k'allk'u umax wali k'allk'uw tukurapini, ukatsti purakap ch'itkatayani, janirakiw wawanïkanisa, markap taypinsti ñanqhachataw uñjasini." 
Numbers5:28 Ukampis uka warmitix jan juchanïkchi ukkhaxa, janiw kunas jupar kamachkaniti, ukatsti wawanïskarakiniwa." 
Numbers5:29 “Aka kamachinakax kunapachatix mä warmix chachanïkasin yaqha chachanakamp sarnaqas sallqjkani ukatakiwa, warmin chachapas ch'uxña luratat chuyma mayjt'ayaskani ukataki," 
Numbers5:30 jan ukax, warmipan yaqha chachampi sarnaqatap amuyaskani uka chachatakiwa. Chachax Tatitun nayraqataparuw warmipar uñstayani, ukatsti sacerdotex aka kamachinakarjamaw lurani." 
Numbers5:31 Chachax janiw juchañchat uñjaskaniti, ukampis warmitix juchanïchi ukasti, mutuyataw uñjasini.”" 
Numbers6:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw parläna akham sasa: 
Numbers6:2 “Israelitanakar parlam jupanakarusti sarakim: Maynitix chachäpasa, jan ukax warmïpasa nazireöñatak Tatitur katuyasiñ munchi ukaxa," 
Numbers6:3 janiw kuna vinonaksa, machjayir umañanaksa umañapäkiti, janirakiw p'usqtat umañanakat lurat vinagre umañapäkiti, uvanakat ch'iwrsut umapsa umañapäkiti; janirakiw uvanak manq'añapäkiti, chhuyüpasa, wañäpasa." 
Numbers6:4 Tatitur katuyasiñ arsüwip phuqhasiñapkamasti janiw uva achunakapat kunsa manq'añapäkiti. 
Numbers6:5 Janirakiw ñik'utapsa mururaskaniti, jan ukasti arsüwip phuqhasiñapkamaw ñik'utap jilantayasini, Tatitur katuyataw sayt'asiñapa." 
Numbers6:6 Taqi uka urunakansti janirakiw kuna jiwatarus jak'achasiñapäkiti," 
Numbers6:7 jupan awkipasa, taykapasa, jan ukax, khiti jilapasa, kullakapas jiwaspa ukkhasa, q'añuchat jan tukuñapataki, Tatitur katuyasiñatak arsutap layku." 
Numbers6:8 Arsutapan phuqhasiñapkamasti q'uma sayt'añapawa. 
Numbers6:9 “Maynitix akatjamat jupa thiyar jiwani, ukhamat ñik'utap q'añu tukuyarakini, Tatitur katuyatäkchi ukasa, jupax ukat paqallq ururuw ñik'utap mururasini, q'umachasiñap uru purinkan ukapacha." 
Numbers6:10 Kimsaqallqür ururusti, sacerdoten ukaruw apani pä qhurukutu, jan ukax, pä paloma chhiwchhinaka, uksti sacerdoteruw katuyani qullan utjäwir mantañana." 
Numbers6:11 Ukatsti sacerdotex ukanak luqtani; mayax jucha luratat wilañcha luqtäniwa, mayasti nakt'at luqtarakïniwa, ukampiw mä jiwatar llamkt'ata jucha luratapat pampachayasiñ jikxatani. Ukürpachaw Tatitur katuyasit jaqix ñik'utap wasitat qullanañchasxani," 
Numbers6:12 ukatsti Tatitur katuyasiñatak arsüwi urunakap machaqat jakhuñ qalltani. Nayra pacha katuyasit urunakax janiw jakhutäkxaniti, qullanañchkatayna uka ñik'utan q'añur tukutap layku. Tatitun nayraqataparux mä maran urqu oveja aparakini, jucha luratat wilañcha luqtañataki." 
Numbers6:13 “Tatitur katuyasiñ urunak phuqhasxipansti, nazireo jaqix Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa mantañaruw sarani," 
Numbers6:14 ukatsti Tatiturux jan kuna kamacht'at mä maran urqu oveja taqpach nakt'ayas luqtani; uka kipkaraki, jan kuna kamacht'at mä maran urqu oveja jucha luratat pampachäwi jikxatañatak wilañcha luqtani, ukatsti jan kuna kamacht'at urqu oveja sumankxañatak wilañcha luqtarakini." 
Numbers6:15 Ukhamarus uka nazireo jaqix qullan utjäwir apañaparakiwa, jan levaduran t'ant'anakan walaya; ukasti suma jak'uta, aceitemp chapuntata luratäñapawa, ukatsti grano achunakampita, vinompit waxt'anak apañaparaki." 
Numbers6:16 Tatit nayraqatan sacerdotex jucha luratat wilañcha luqtani, nakt'ayat luqta katuyarakini," 
Numbers6:17 ukatsti urqu oveja luqtarakini sumankthapiñ wilañcha luqtäwi, jan levaduran t'ant'anakan walayamp chika, ukatsti grano achunakampita, vinompit waxt'a luqtani." 
Numbers6:18 Uka nazireo jaqisti ñik'utap mururasini Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa mantañana, ukat sacerdotex uka ñik'uta aptasin, sumankthapiñ wilañchamp chika nakhantayani." 
Numbers6:19 Uka qhipatsti, sacerdotex urqu ovejan qhathita jikhanip aptasin nazireo jaqir churani, jan levaduran mä t'ant'ampi, mä tortillampi, kunapachatix jupax p'iqipan ñik'utap khuchuraskani ukapacha." 
Numbers6:20 Ukatsti sacerdotew uka uywan jaraphipa, lankhu charapa Tatit nayraqatan luqtani, ukanakasti qullanawa, sacerdotenakar churañatakikiwa. Taqi ukanak phuqhasasti, nazireo jaqix vino umxarakispawa." 
Numbers6:21 “Tatitur katuyasiñatak arsuri nazireo jaqix, aka kamachirjamaw phuqhani, ukatsti aka waxt'anak Tatitun nayraqatapar luqtarakini, ukhamarus munaspa ukax utjataparjamaw yaqha yänakamp luqtani. Jupasti Tatitur katuyasitapat arsutap phuqhañapawa, nazireo kankañ kamachirjama.”" 
Numbers6:22 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa: 
Numbers6:23 “Aaronampiru, wawanakapampir parlam, jupanakax israelitanakar aka aski arunak sapxpan:" 
Numbers6:24 ‘Tatituy jumarux aski waxt'äwip churpan, imarakpan." 
Numbers6:25 Tatituy kusisiñamp jumar uñtanpan, khuyapayasiñap jumar uñacht'ayarakpan;" 
Numbers6:26 Tatituy jumarux munasiñamp uñtanpan, sumankañsa churarakpan.’" 
Numbers6:27 “Ukham jupanakax israelitanak taypin sutix aytapxani, nayasti jupanakarux askinak churarakï.”" 
Numbers7:1 Kunürutix Moisesax qullan chiqawja sayt'ayañ tukuykän ukürux, aceitemp jawintasaw qullan chiqawjan yänakapampi, altaran yänakapamp qullanañchäna." 
Numbers7:2 Ukatsti ayllunakan jilïrinakapax, khitinakatix jaqinak jakthapiñ yanapt'apkatayna jupanakax, sarasin," 
Numbers7:3 Tatituruw waxt'a luqtapxäna, sapaqat pä jilïrinakat mä carreta, taqpachax suxta carretanaka, ukatsti sapaqat maynit mä urqu vaca, taqpachax tunka payan urqu vacanaka. Taqi ukanaksti qullan chiqawjaruw uchapxäna." 
Numbers7:4 Ukatsti Tatitux Moisesar akham sarakïna: 
Numbers7:5 “Uka carretanakampi, uka urqu vacanakamp katuqam, ukatsti levitanakar churxam, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan kuna lurañatix sapa maynir wakt'ki ukhamarjam apnaqapxañapataki” sasa." 
Numbers7:6 Moisesasti carretanakampi, urqu vacanakamp katuqasin, levitanakaruw lakintäna." 
Numbers7:7 Guersón chachan wawanakaparux pä carretampi, pusi urqu vacampi churäna, jupanakan ukanakamp irnaqapxañapataki." 
Numbers7:8 Merarí chachan wawanakaparusti pusi carretampi, kimsaqallq urqu vacampi churäna, jupanakan ukanakamp irnaqapxañapataki, jupanakarux Aarón sacerdoten Itamar yuqapaw ukham sarayäna." 
Numbers7:9 Ukampis Quehat chachan wawanakaparux janiw kuna carretanaksa, urqu vacanaksa churkänti, jupanakan luräwinakapasti qullan yänaka kallachipxar apapxañapänwa uka layku." 
Numbers7:10 Kunürutix altarax qullanañchatäxän ukürusti, ayllunakan jilïr irpirinakapax waxt'anak apanipxäna, ukatsti altar nayräxaruw uskupxäna." 
Numbers7:11 Ukat Tatitux Moisesar säna: “Sapaqat ayllut mä jilïrix, altar katuyañatak waxt'ap sapür apanpan” sasa." 
Numbers7:12 Nayrïr urux, Judá ayllunkir Aminadab chachan Nahasón yuqapaw waxt'ap apäna." 
Numbers7:13 Jupan waxt'apasti akänwa: qullqit lurat mä llataku, ukasti waranqa pusi patak kimsa tunkan gramonïnwa, ukatsti qullqit lurat qiru, ukasti paqallq patak paqallq tunkan gramonirakïnwa qullan utjäwin tupuparjama, paypach churäwisti suma jak'ump phuqhantatänwa, aceitemp chaputa, grano achunak waxt'ataki;" 
Numbers7:14 ukxarusti qurit lurat mä wislla, ukasti patak tunkan gramonïnwa, inciensompi phuqt'ata," 
Numbers7:15 nakt'ayat waxt'a luqtañatakisti, mä vaca qallu, mä urqu oveja, mä maran urqu oveja," 
Numbers7:16 jucha luratat wilañcha luqtañatakix, mä chivo," 
Numbers7:17 sumankañ luqta wilañchatakisti, pä urqu vacanaka, phisqa urqu ovejanaka, phisqa chivonaka, mä maran phisqa ovejanaka. Ukanak Aminadab chachan Nahasón yuqapax waxt'atak apäna." 
Numbers7:18 Payïr urusti, Isacar ayllunkir Suar chachan Natanael chachaw waxt'ap apäna, Suar chachan yuqapa," 
Numbers7:19 jupasti Nahasón chachan waxt'ap kipkak pachpa waxt'anak luqtarakïna.

Numbers7:25 jupasti mayninakjamaw pachpa waxt'anak luqtarakïna.

Numbers7:79 jupasti maynïr jilïrinakjamaw pachpa waxt'anak luqtäna.

Numbers7:83  
Numbers7:84 Ukhamaw kunapachatix altarax katuyatäxän ukkhax, israelitanakan ayllunakapan jilïrinakapax tunka payan qullqi llatakunak churapxäna, tunka payan qullqi qirunaka, tunka payan quri wisllanaka." 
Numbers7:85 Sapa qullqi llatakusti pusi patak kimsa tunkan gramonïnwa, sapa qirusti paqallqu patak paqallqu tunkan gramonirakïnwa. Taqpachasti, llatakunakana, qirunakan qullqipax pä tunka suxtan waranqa pusi patakan gramonakanïnwa, qullan utjäwin tupuparjama." 
Numbers7:86 Tunka payan quri wisllanakaw incienson phuqt'at utjarakïna, sapa mayax patak tunkan gramonïnwa, qullan utjäwin tupuparjama. Taqpach wisllanakan quripax waranqa kimsa patak pä tunkan gramonakaw tupt'asïna." 
Numbers7:87 Nakt'ayat luqtäwitak uywanakax, tunka payan urqu vacanaka, tunka payan urqu ovejanaka, tunka payan mä maran urqu ovejanaka, ukanakänwa, sapaqat maynis grano waxt'ampi, jucha luratat wilañcha luqtañatakisti tunka payan chivonakampi." 
Numbers7:88 Sumankxañ wilañcha luqtañataki uywanakax, taqpachasti pä tunk pusin vaca qallunaka, suxta tunk urqu ovejanaka, suxta tunk chivonaka, suxta tunka mä maran ovejanaka, ukanakänwa. Taqi uka waxt'anakaw altar katuyxañatak luqtasïna, kunapachatix katuyatäkän ukapacha." 
Numbers7:89 Moisesax Tatitump parlañatak Jikisiñ Carpar mantkän ukapachasti, Tatitun jupar parlaskatap ist'äna, arust'äwi arcan qhuphiñ patapankir pä querubines sat chhiqhaninak taypita." 
Numbers8:1 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa: 
Numbers8:2 “Aaronamp parlam, juparusti sarakim: kunapachatix paqallqu lamparanak aqtaykani ukapachax, nayräxar qhant'kir candelero patxar apxatpan” sasa." 
Numbers8:3 Aaronasti kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjamaw phuqhäna, lamparanak nayräxar qhant'kir candelero patxar ucht'äna." 
Numbers8:4 Candelerox qurit luratänwa, kayut p'iqikam panqarar uñtat martillompkam liq'sutänwa. Tatitux uñacht'aykatayna ukhamarjamaw Moisesax luräna." 
Numbers8:5 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: 
Numbers8:6 “Israelitanak taypit Leví chachat saraqirinakar yaqhacham, ukatsti jupanakar q'umacharakim." 
Numbers8:7 Jupanakar q'umachañatakisti, q'umachasiñ umampiw jupanakar ch'allakipäta, ukatsti janchipan utjir ñik'utanakap q'al khuchhurasiyäta, isinakapsa t'axsurayarakïta, ukhamat q'uma tukupxani." 
Numbers8:8 Ukatsti mä vaca qallu katusin apapxpan, aceitemp chaputa suma jak'u waxt'ampi. Jumasti, yaqha vaca qallu katurakïta, jucha luratat pampachäwi jikxatañ wilañcha luqtañataki." 
Numbers8:9 Jumarakiw levitanakar Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar jak'achayäta, ukatsti taqpach israelitanakar tantachthapirakïta." 
Numbers8:10 Ukatsti levitanakar nayan nayraqataxaruw uñstayitäta, israelitanakasti amparanakapampiw levitanakan p'iqinakapxar luqxatapxani." 
Numbers8:11 Aaronasti nayan nayraqataxaruw levitanakar uñstayani israelitanakan waxt'apjama, ukhamat levitanakax nayan luqtirixat katuyatäni." 
Numbers8:12 Ukatsti levitanakax vaca qallunakan p'iqipxaruw amparanakapamp luqxatapxani, jumasti jucha luratat mä vaca qallu wilañcha luqtäta, mayïr vaca qallsti Tatitutak nakt'ayat luqtäwi churarakïta." 
Numbers8:13 Ukatsti levitanakarux Aaronampina, wawanakapampin nayraqataparuw sayarayäta, jupanakarusti luqta katuyañäki ukarjamaw nayar katuyitäta;" 
Numbers8:14 ukham lurasaw levitanakarux mayni israelitanak taypit nayankxañapatak yaqhachäta. 
Numbers8:15 Ukatsti jupanakax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan yanapiriw sarapxani. Jupanakarux q'umachata, mä suma waxt'äwïkaspas ukham nayar katuyitäta," 
Numbers8:16 taqi israelitanak taypit jupanakan nayar katuyatäpxatap layku. Nayaw jupanakar taqi israelitanakan jilïr tayna yuqall wawanakap lanti katuqta," 
Numbers8:17 israelitanakan jilïr tayna yuqall wawanakapax nayankituwa, kunjämatix uywanakapan nayrïr qallunakapax nayankki ukhama. Egipcionakan jilïr tayna yuqall wawanakap jiwaraykäyät ukapachaxa, israelitanakan jilïr tayna yuqall wawanakap nayatakiw yaqhachasïyäta." 
Numbers8:18 Ukat nayax levitanakar jupanak lanti katusta. 
Numbers8:19 Nayaw levitanakarux mayni israelitanak taypit ajllista, jupanaksti Aaronampiru, wawanakapampiruw katuyta, Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpan israelitanakan sutipxar yanapapxañapataki, ukat Tatitun pampachäwip israelitanakatak katuqapxañapataki. Ukhamat israelitanakan qullan utjäwir jan jak'achasiñapäkaniti, janirakiw kunas jupanakar kamachkaniti.”" 
Numbers8:20 Ukatsti Moisesasa, Aaronasa, Israel marka markachirinakas phuqhapxänwa, kuntix Tatitux Moisesar levitanakxat siskatayna taqi ukanaka." 
Numbers8:21 Levitanakax q'umachasipxänwa, isinakapsa t'axsurasipxänwa, Aaronasti jupanakar Tatit nayraqatan mä suma waxt'äwïkaspas ukham katuyxäna, q'umachäwi luräwi jupanakat lurasina." 
Numbers8:22 Taqi ukanak qhipatsti, levitanakax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carparuw lurañanakap phuqhir sarapxäna, jupanakax Aaronampina, wawanakapampin sarayataw lurañanakap phuqhapxäna. Kunjämtix Tatitux levitanakxat Moisesar arskatayna ukhamarjamaw phuqhasïna." 
Numbers8:23 Tatitux Moisesar akham sarakïna: 
Numbers8:24 “Levitanakax pä tunka phisqan maranit Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan luräwinakap qalltapxañapa," 
Numbers8:25 phisqa tunka maranirusti, janiw jupanakan juk'amp lurañapax wakiskxaniti." 
Numbers8:26 Uka maranak phuqhatatsti, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa uñjañak jilanakapar yanapapxaspa, ukampis janiw juk'amp lurañanak lurkxapxaniti. Ukham jumax levitanakan luräwinakap apnaqäta.”" 
Numbers9:1 Israelitanakan Egipto markat mistunipxatapatsti, pä mara saraqataru, nayrïr phaxsina Sinaí wasaran Tatitux Moisesar parläna, akham sasa:" 
Numbers9:2 “Israelitanakax Pascua uruyañxa, kuna urutakitix amtatäki ukhamarjamaw uruyapxañapa," 
Numbers9:3 nayrïr phaxsina, tunka pusin uru saraqat jayp'thapiru, kawkïr yatichäwinaktix churapksma ukhamarjamaw uruyapxäta” sasa." 
Numbers9:4 Ukat Moisesax israelitanakar Pascua uruyapxañapatak säna," 
Numbers9:5 jupanakasti uka phaxsina, tunka pusin uru saraqat jayp'thapiruw Sinaí wasaran uruyapxäna, kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjam sum phuqhasa." 
Numbers9:6 Ukampisa, mä qawqha jan q'umachat jaqinakaw utjäna, jupanakan jiwat jaqir llamkt'apxatap layku; ukat ukürux Pascua jan uruyapkänti. Jupanakasti Moisesampiru, Aaronampir parliriw sarapxäna," 
Numbers9:7 Moisesarusti akham sapxäna: —Nanakax mä jiwat jaqin amayap llamkt'apxta, uka laykuw q'añuchat uñjasipxta. Ukhamasti, ¿janit nanakasti mayni israelitanakamp chika amtatäki uka urun Tatitur waxt'a luqtapkiriststi? —sasa." 
Numbers9:8 Moisesasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Suyt'apxita, Tatituruw kuntix lurapxañamäki uk jiskt'ä, —sasa." 
Numbers9:9 Tatitusti Moisesar akham sarakïna: “Israelitanakar akham säta: 
Numbers9:10 Taqi jumanakawa, wawanakamamp kuna nayar jach'añchas Pascua uruyapxäta. Khitinakatix mä jiwatar llamkt'atap layku jan q'umäpki, jan ukax, khitinakatix jayan jikxatasipki, saräwinkasipki," 
Numbers9:11 ukanakasti, payïr phaxsina, tunka pusin uru saraqat jayp'thapiruw uruyapxani. Jupanakasti ovejxa, jaru quranakampi, jan levaduran t'ant'amp manq'apxani," 
Numbers9:12 janiw qhipärmanthitak kunas jilt'ayatäñapäkiti, janirakiw uywan ch'akhanakapas p'akjatäñapäkiti. Yatichäwinak churapksma ukhamarjamaw Pascua uruyapxäta." 
Numbers9:13 Ukampis khititix q'uma jikxataskasina, jan saräwinkkasina Pascua jan uruykani uka jaqix, markap taypit apanukutaw uñjasini. Uka urun Tatitur waxt'a jan luqtatap laykusti, uka juchapat mutuyataw uñjasini." 
Numbers9:14 “Jumanak taypin jakasir jaya markat jutir jaqinakax, Pascua uruyapxarakiniwa, nayar jach'añchasa, kawkïr yatichäwinaktix churkta ukhamarjama. Uka yatichäwinakax yaqha markat jutir jaqinakatakisa, pachpa markan yurir jaqinakatakis pachpakïniwa.”" 
Numbers9:15 Kunürutix Arust'äwi Carpa sayt'ayapkän uküruxa, mä qinayaw imxatäna. Jayp'untxän ukapachasti, Arust'äwi Carpa patxan mä ninaw uñstäna, ukampis willjtarux chhaqtawayxänwa." 
Numbers9:16 Ukhamaw sapa kuti lurasïna: Urux qinayaw carpar imxattäna, arumasti ninar uñtataw ukar qhant'äna." 
Numbers9:17 Qinayax carpa patxat unxtkän ukkhasti, israelitanakax sarxarupxänwa, ukatsti kawkharutix qinayax sayt'kän ukkharuw israelitanakax utjnuqtapxäna." 
Numbers9:18 Tatitun aruparjamaw israelitanakax sarxarupxäna, jan ukax utjnuqtapxänsa; kunapachkamatix qinayax Arust'äwi Carpa patxar imxatkän ukkhakamaw uka chiqan qhiparapxäna." 
Numbers9:19 Qinayatix walja urunak Arust'äwi Carpa patxan qhiparkän ukkhaxa, israelitanakax pachparuw Tatitur yupaychañatak qhiparapxarakïna." 
Numbers9:20 Qinayatix mä qawqha urunakak Arust'äwi Carpa patxan qhiparkän ukkhaxa, israelitanakax Tatitun arsutaparjamaw jank'ak sarxarupxäna, sayt'apxarakïna." 
Numbers9:21 Yaqhip urun qinayax arumakiw qhiparäna, qhipärmanthisti uka chiqat unxtäna; ukapachasti jupanakax sarxarupxänwa. Arumäpasa, urüpasa, qinayax unxtkän ukkhaxa, jupanakax sartawayapxarakïnwa." 
Numbers9:22 Qinayatix Arust'äwi Carpa patxan pä uru, mä phaxsi, jan ukax, mä maras sayt'kän ukapachaxa, israelitanakax sayt'apxarakïnwa, janiw juk'amp sarkxapxänti, pachpan utjnuqtapxäna. Qinayatix unxtkän ukkhasti, jupanakax sartawayapxänwa." 
Numbers9:23 Tatitun arsutaparjamaw utjnuqtapxäna, arsutaparjamarakiw sarxarupxäna. Tatitun arsutap phuqhasa, kunjämtix Tatitux Moisés tuqi jupanakar siskatayna ukhamarjam jaysasa." 
Numbers10:1 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa: 
Numbers10:2 “Qullqit pä trompetanak luram, martillomp liq'suta, ukampiw jaqinakar tantachthapïta, ukampiw sarxaruñatakis yatiyäta." 
Numbers10:3 Paypach trompeta phust'askan ukapachasti, taqpach markaw juma nayraqatan tantachasini, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa mantañana." 
Numbers10:4 Ukampis mä sapa trompetak phust'askani ukapachax, ayllunakan jilïr irpirinakapakiw tantacht'asini." 
Numbers10:5 Trompetanak phust'atxaru, jach'at arnaqasiñanakampïni ukkhasti, inti jalsu tuqin utjnuqtatäpki ukanakaw sarxarupxani," 
Numbers10:6 payïr phust'atxarusti, aynach tuqin utjnuqtatäpki ukanakaw sarxarupxarakini. Ukhamasti, trompetanak phust'atxar jach'at arnaqasiñanakampix sarxaruñatakïniwa." 
Numbers10:7 Jaqinakan tantachasiñapatakisti, trompetak phust'apxani, ukasti mä chimpüniwa." 
Numbers10:8 Aarón chachat saraqir sacerdotenakakiw trompetanak phust'apxani. Aka kamachinakax jumanakatak wiñayatakïniwa. 
Numbers10:9 “Nuwasïwi utjipantix, jumanakan nuwasir mistupxañam wakiskan ukapachasti, uka trompetanak phust'apxäta, ukatsti taqi ch'amamampiw art'asipxäta. Ukhamat naya, Tatit Diosamax jumanakat amtasï, ukatsti uñisirinakamat jumanakarux qhispiyapxäma." 
Numbers10:10 Kusisiñ urunakansa trompetanak phust'apxarakïta, uruyañ urunakansa, machaq phaxsi urunakansa, kunapachatix nakt'ayat luqtäwinaka, sumankañ wilañchanak luqtasipkäta ukapachasa. Ukhamat nayax jumanakat amtasipxäma. Nayaw jumanakan Tatit Diosamätxa.”" 
Numbers10:11 Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa patxankkän uka qinayanakax, pä mara, payïr phaxsina, pä tunka uru saraqataruw unxtxäna." 
Numbers10:12 Ukürusti, israelitanakax kunjämtix Tatitux jupanakar Moisés tuqi arsuwaykatayna ukhamarjamaw sartasin uka qinayar arkapxäna, Sinaí wasarata, Parán wasarkama." 
Numbers10:13  
Numbers10:14 Nayraqat sarantirinakax Judá ayllun wiphalapanïkän uka ejercitow sarantäna, jupanakan jilïripax Nahasón chachänwa, Aminadab chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers10:15 Isacar ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarusti Natanael sat Suar chachan yuqapaw sarantäna," 
Numbers10:16 Zabulón ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarux Eliab sat Helón chachan yuqapaw sarantäna. 
Numbers10:17 Ukapachasti, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa jararapxäna, ukatsti Guersón chachat saraqirinakampi, Merarí chachat saraqirinakampiw, uk apapxäna." 
Numbers10:18 Ukxarusti Rubén ayllun wiphalapanïki uka ejercitow sarantäna; jilïr irpiripax Elisur chachänwa, Sedeúr chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers10:19 Simeón ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarusti Selumiel jilïr irpiripaw sarantäna, Surisadai chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers10:20 Gad ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarusti, Eliasaf sat Reuel chachan yuqapaw sarantäna." 
Numbers10:21 Ukxarusti Quehat chachan saraqirinakapaw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan yänak apt'asit sarantapxäna. Utjnuqäwir puripxän ukkhasti, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpax niyaw sayt'ayatäxäna." 
Numbers10:22 Ukxarusti Efraín ayllun wiphalapanïki uka ejercitow sarantäna, jilïr irpiripax Elisamá chachänwa, Amihud chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers10:23 Manasés ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarux Gamaliel sat Pedasur chachan yuqapaw sarantäna. 
Numbers10:24 Benjamín ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarux Abidán sat Guidoní chachan yuqapaw sarantäna. 
Numbers10:25 Tukuyarusti, mayni ejercitonakan qhipapatxa, Dan ayllun wiphalapanïki uka ejercitow sarantäna, jilïr irpiripasti Ahiézer chachänwa, Amisadai chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers10:26 Aser ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarusti Paguiel sat Ocrán chachan yuqapaw sarantäna. 
Numbers10:27 Neftalí ayllun ejercitop nayraqatarusti Ahirá sat Enán chachan yuqapaw sarantarakïna. 
Numbers10:28 Ukhamaw israelitanakan ejercitonakapax thakhinjam tam tama sarantapxäna. 
Numbers10:29 Mä urusti, Moisesax warmipan jilaparuw jawsäna, ukasti Hobab satänwa, Reuel sat madianita chachan wawaparakïnwa, juparusti akham säna: —Tatitux churapkitani uka uraqiruw nanakax sarasipkta. Jutam, nanakamp chik saram, nanakax sum uñjapxäma, Tatitux arupampiw arsu Israel markar munasiñamp uñjañataki —sasa." 
Numbers10:30 Ukampis Hobab chachax jupar sänwa: —Janiw sarkiristti, nayax uraqixarukiw kuttxä, wila masinakax jak'aru —sasa." 
Numbers10:31 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: —Jan jaytanukupxistati, jumax sum uñjtaxa kawkharutix wasaran utjnuqtapkirista ukxa, jumaw nanakar irpapxitasma." 
Numbers10:32 Nanakamp chikatix sarätaxa, kuna suma yänaktix Tatitux churapkitani ukanakat jaljt'asiñäni —sasa." 
Numbers10:33 Ukhamaw jupanakax Tatitun qullupat sartawayxapxäna, ukatsti kimsüruw sarapxäna. Tatitun arust'äwi arcapax jupanakan nayrap saräna, kawkharutix samart'apkaspa ukawja thaqhasa." 
Numbers10:34 Sarxarupkän ukapachasti, Tatitun qinayapax urun jupanakxankänwa." 
Numbers10:35 Arca apxarupkän ukkhasti, Moisesax sänwa: “¡Tatituxay, sartasim! ¡Uñisirinakamax aywitatapxpan! ¡Jumar uñjasax uñisirinakamax jaltxapxpan!” sasa." 
Numbers10:36 Arcax sayt'kän ukkhasti, Moisesax sänwa: “¡Tatay, Israel markar jan apanukumti, wali mirantat markamar jan apanukumti!” sasa." 
Numbers11:1 Mä urusti, israelitanakax Tatitutakiw arusipxäna, jupanakan jan walt'añanakan jikxatasipxatap layku. Tatitusti ukanak ist'asax walpun q'apisïna, ukat jupanakar mä nina apayanisax utjnuqäwin thiyanakap phichhantäna." 
Numbers11:2 Jaqinakax jach'at wararisaw Moisesar yanap mayipxäna, Moisesasti Tatituruw jupanakatak mayïna, ukat ninax jiwarxäna." 
Numbers11:3 Ukat uka chiqarux Taberá sas sutichapxäna, uka arusti “phichhantata” sañ muni. Uka chiqan Tatitun ninapan jupanakatak nakhatap layku." 
Numbers11:4 Israelitanak taypin yaqha markankir jaqinakaw utjatayna, jupanakasti manq'añatak llakisisipkäna. Israelitanakasti jupanak uñjasax jachapxarakïnwa, akham sasa: “¡Aychakis manq'añatak utjaspa!" 
Numbers11:5 ¡Egipto uraqin chawlla inak manq'atasasti kawkinkaraki! Ukatsti, pepinonaka, melonanaka, puerronaka, cebollanaka, ajonak khayan manq'ayätan." 
Numbers11:6 Jichhasti manq'atjamaw jiwarasktan, janirakiw kunas utjkiti, aka maná manq'akiw utjaski” sasa." 
Numbers11:7 Maná manq'asti cilantro quqan jathapar uñtatänwa; samipasti niyas q'illur uñtatarakïnwa, resina aceitjama," 
Numbers11:8 mallt'atasti aceitemp chaputa jak'ut lurat t'ant'jamänwa. Jaqinakax ukanak apthapiriw mistüna, ukatsti ukanak k'iyapxäna, ukatsti ch'axt'asisaw phayasipxäna, jan ukax, t'ant'anak lurasipxarakïna." 
Numbers11:9 Arumthapirusti, sullax utjnuqtapkän ukxaruw sullantäna, maná manq'ax sullampi chikaw purirakïna." 
Numbers11:10 Moisesax israelitanakampi wila masinakapampi chhujlla mantañanakapan jachasipkatap ist'äna. Tatitusti wali q'apisitapunïnwa. Moisesax mayjt'asirakïnwa," 
Numbers11:11 ukat Tatitur akham jiskt'äna: —Nayax juman luqtirimätwa. ¿Kunatarak ukham jan wal luristasti? ¿Kunarak juchäxi nayan aka markamp akataq ch'am tukuñaxatakisti? 
Numbers11:12 ¿Nayasti jupanakan awkipätti, taykapätcha, nayra awkinakapar churañatak arsut uraqir puriyañkam ñuñur wawanakarjam amparaxar ichuskañatak nayar mayiñamatakisti?" 
Numbers11:13 Jupanakax jacht'asisaw nayan ukar jutapxitu: ‘Aycha manq'añatak churapxita’ sasa. ¿Kawkitarak akataq jaqinakar manq'ayañatak aycha apsüsti? 
Numbers11:14 Janiw naya sapaki taqi aka jaqinakar irpirjamäkti; nayatakix wali ch'am tukuñawa. 
Numbers11:15 Jumatix nayar ukham luraskakitätaxa, jakañaxak apaqxita chiqpachan munaschista ukaxa. Ukataq jan walt'añan uñjasiñaxax tukusxaspawa —sasa." 
Numbers11:16 Tatitusti Moisesar sänwa: —Israelitanak taypit paqallq tunka jilïr chachanak tantacham, jupanakasti juman uñt'at marka sarayir jaqinakäñapawa, jupanakarusti Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar irpanim, ukan jumamp chik suyapxpan." 
Numbers11:17 Nayax saraqanisin jumar parläma, ukatsti juman ajayumat apaqasaw uka jilïr jaqinakar churä, jumar aka marka apnaqañ yanapt'añapataki; jan juma sapak taqi kun luraskañamataki." 
Numbers11:18 Ukatsti jaqinakarux arumanthitak q'umachasir khitham, ukat aycha manq'apxani. Nayax jupanakan jachatanakapampi, parlatanakapamp ist'xtwa: “¡Aychakis manq'añatak utjistaspa! ¡Egipton walikipuniw sarnaqaskäyätan!” sasa. Walikiwa, nayaw manq'apxañapatak aycha churä," 
Numbers11:19 janiw mä urukiti, pä urukicha, phisqa urukicha, tunka urukicha, pä tunka urukicha aycha manq'apkani," 
Numbers11:20 jan ukasti phaxspachaw aycha manq'apxani, axtasiñkama, nasanakapat mistuyañkama, jupanak taypin jikxataskasasa, naya, Tatitur jisk'achapxatapata, naya nayräxan jachapxatapata: ‘¿Kunatakirak Egiptot mistunpachätansti?’ sapxatap layku." 
Numbers11:21 Moisesasti sänwa: —Tatay, ¿kawkitarak phaxspach manq'ayañamatak ukataq aycha apsütasti? Niya suxta patak waranqa chachanakawa, warminakar jan jakhusa." 
Numbers11:22 Nanakax apasinipkta uka vacanakampi, ovejanakampi taqpach kharirapkirista ukasa, jan ukax, qutan utjir taqpach chawllanak churksna ukasa, janiw taqinitak utjkaspati —sasa." 
Numbers11:23 Ukampis Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: —¿Janis nayax ch'amanïkirista ukhamti amuyista? Jichhaw uñjäta, arsutaxax phuqhasiniti, janich phuqhaskani uka —sasa." 
Numbers11:24 Ukatsti Moisesax kuntix Tatitux jupar siskatayna ukanak markar yatiyir saräna, paqallq tunka israelitanakan jilïrinakaparuw tantachäna, jupanakarusti qullan utjäwi muytaruw uchäna." 
Numbers11:25 Ukapachasti Tatitux qinayanjam saraqanisinxa, Moisesampiw parläna; ukatsti Moisesan utjkän uka ajayut apaqäna, ukatsti uka paqallq tunka jilïr jaqinakaruw churäna, ajayux jupanakxar purkän ukkhasti, jupanakax Tatitut katuqat arunak yatiyañ qalltapxäna; ukasti mä kutikiw ukham lurasïna." 
Numbers11:26 Uka paqallq tunk ajllitanak taypin pä chachaw utjäna, maynix Eldad sutinïnwa, maynisti Medad sutinirakïnwa, jupanakasti janiw qullan carpar sarapkataynati, jan ukasti, campamenton qhiparapxatayna. Ukampisa, ajayux jupanakxar purirakïnwa, ukatsti jutir urunakat parlañ qalltapxarakïna." 
Numbers11:27 Ukapachaw mä waynax jalasin Moisesar yatiyäna, akham sasa: —¡Eldad, Medad chachanakax profetanakjamaw campamenton parlasipki! —sasa." 
Numbers11:28 Ukat Josué sat Nun chachan yuqapa, khititix Moisesar waynatpach yanapkän ukax säna: —¡Moisés, tatay, uka arunak jan parlayamti! —sasa." 
Numbers11:29 Moisesasti jupar sänwa: —¿Kunatarak jumasti naya sapan parlañaxak muntasti? ¡Nayax Tatitun taqpach markapar ajayup churañapa, ukatsti taqinis profetäpxañap munirista! —sasa." 
Numbers11:30 Uka qhipatsti, Moisesampi, Israelan jilïrinakapampix campamentoruw kuttxapxäna." 
Numbers11:31 Tatitux jach'a quta tuqit wali ch'aman thaya thayt'ayanïna. Uka thayasti walja khullunak apanïna, ukatsti israelitanakan campamento jak'aruw puriyäna. Khullunakasti waljapunïnwa, mä uru sararjamaruw phuqhantäna, niya mä metrokam amsta tuqirux phuqhantarakïna." 
Numbers11:32 Jaqinakasti uka uru, uka aruma, qhipärmanthi urumppachaw khullunak apthapïna. Juk'a apthapirix, tunka qutu khullunak apthapïna, uksti campamento thiyanakaruw wañachapxäna." 
Numbers11:33 Ukampis israelitanakax khullun aychap manq'antapkän ukapachaw Tatitux jupanakatak q'apisïna, jupanakar walpun mutuyäna, waljaniw jiwararakïna." 
Numbers11:34 Ukat uka chiqawjarux Quibrot-hataavá sas sutichapxäna, uka chiqan manq'añak munaskir jaqinakan amayap imantapxatap layku." 
Numbers11:35 Markasti Quibrot-hataavá chiqat sartasin, Haserot chiqar puriñkamaw sarasipkakïna, ukatsti ukan qhiparxapxäna." 
Numbers12:1 Mariampi, Aaronampix Moisés jilapat jan wal parlapxäna, jupan mä etiope warmimpi jaqichasitap layku." 
Numbers12:2 Ukhamarus sapxänwa: “Tatitux janiw Moisesampik parlkiti; jiwasampix parlarakiwa” sasa. Tatitusti uka parlatanakap ist'änwa. 
Numbers12:3 Chiqpachansa, Moisesax taqi akapachan wali llamp'u chuyman jaqïnwa." 
Numbers12:4 Ukat Tatitux Moisesampiru, Aaronampiru, Mariampirux säna: “Jumanak kimsanix Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar sarapxam” sasa. Ukatsti kimsanpachaw ukar sarapxäna." 
Numbers12:5 Ukapachaw Tatitux qinay taypinjam saraqanïna, ukatsti Jikisiñ Carpa mantañawjaruw sayt'asïna; ukatsti Aaronampiru, Mariampiruw jawsäna, jupanakax uñstapkän ukkhasti," 
Numbers12:6 Tatitux jupanakaruw säna: “Ist'apxam kuntix sapkäm uka arunaka: Jumanak taypin mä profetax nayan arunakax yatiyir utjki ukapachax, nayaw jupampix unañchäwinak tuqi parlta, samkanak tuqi parlarakta;" 
Numbers12:7 ukampis Moisés luqtirixampix janiw ukham lurkti. Jupax taqpach luqtirinakaxat sipan aski jaqipuniwa," 
Numbers12:8 jupampisti ajanuy ajanuw parlta, qhana arunakampiraki. Jupatix ajanuy ajanu uñjchitu ukasti, ¿kunatarak jumanakasti jupar k'umipxtasti?” sasa." 
Numbers12:9 Diosasti jupanakatak walpun q'apisïna, ukatsti sarxarakïnwa." 
Numbers12:10 Qinayax qullan utjäwit jithiqtawayxän ukapachasti, Mariax lepra usuniw uñstäna, janchipax khunjam janq'uw tuküna. Aaronax Mariar uñtañatakiw kutikipstäna, lepra usun jupar uñkatasinsti," 
Numbers12:11 Moisesarux sänwa: —Tata, janikiy jan amuyunjam jucha luratanakaxat mutuyapxistati." 
Numbers12:12 Marian janchipax q'ala tukjatawa, janïr yurkasa jiwir wawanakan janchipar uñtatawa. Diosar achikt'amaya jupar k'umarachañapataki —sasa." 
Numbers12:13 Moisesasti Tatituruw achikt'asïna, akham sasa: “Dios Tatay, Mariar k'umarachakimaya” sasa." 
Numbers12:14 Tatit Diosasti ukxarux sänwa: “Awkipatix ajanut thuskataspa ukkhax, paqallq uruw jupax p'inqachat uñjasispa. Ukhamasti juparux paqallq uru campamentot anqar jaqunukupxpan, uka qhipat kutt'asinkaniwa” sasa." 
Numbers12:15 Ukhamaw Mariax paqallq uru campamentot jaqunukut uñjasïna. Ukchañkamasti, markax janiw ukawjat sartkänti." 
Numbers12:16 Mariax jupanakamp chikäxän ukapachaw, Haserot chiqat sartawayapxäna, ukatsti Parán wasarar puriñkamax janiw sayt'apkänti." 
Numbers13:1 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: 
Numbers13:2 “Mä qawqha jaqinak Canaán uraqir khitham, kawkïr uraqtix nayax israelitanakar churkä uka uraq uñaqanipxañapataki. Sapa ayllut mayni jilïripar khitham” sasa." 
Numbers13:3 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw Parán wasarat jupanakar khithäna. Uka jaqinakasti israelitanak taypin jilïr chachanakkamakïnwa. 
Numbers13:4 Khithat jilïrinakasti akanakänwa: Rubén ayllutxa, Samúa sat Zacur chachan wawapa;" 
Numbers13:5 Simeón ayllutxa, Safat sat Horí chachan yuqapa;" 
Numbers13:6 Judá ayllutxa, Caleb sat Jefuné chachan yuqapa;" 
Numbers13:7 Isacar ayllutxa, Igal sat José chachan yuqapa;" 
Numbers13:8 Efraín ayllutxa, Oseas sat Nun chachan yuqapa;" 
Numbers13:9 Benjamín ayllutxa, Paltí sat Rafú chachan yuqapa;" 
Numbers13:10 Zabulón ayllutxa, Gadiel sat Sodí chachan yuqapa;" 
Numbers13:11 Manasés ayllutxa, Gadí sat Susí chachan yuqapa;" 
Numbers13:12 Dan ayllutxa, Amiel sat Guemalí chachan yuqapa;" 
Numbers13:13 Aser ayllutxa, Setur sat Micael chachan yuqapa;" 
Numbers13:14 Neftalí ayllutxa, Nahbí sat Vapsí chachan yuqapa;" 
Numbers13:15 Gad ayllutxa, Gueuel sat Maquí chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers13:16 Ukanakaw Moisesan khithat jilïr jaqinakan sutinakapaxa, jupanakarusti Canaán uraqi uñakipiriw khithäna. Oseas sat Nun chachan yuqaparux Josué sutimpiw Moisesax sutichäna." 
Numbers13:17 Moisesax Canaán uraqir jupanak khitkän ukapachasti, akham sänwa: —Négueb wasar chiqanjam sarapxam, ukatsti qullu tuqinakaruw makhatapxäta." 
Numbers13:18 Uka markax kunjämätaynas uk sum uñjanipxäta, ukan jakir jaqinakax ch'aman jaqinakati, jan ukax t'ukha jaqinakakicha; juk'anikiti jan ukax waljanïtaynacha taqi ukanak uñjanipxäta." 
Numbers13:19 Markanakapax chhujllanakat luratakiti, jan ukax, suma pirqanakampi sayt'ayatacha, kawkha uraqintix jakapki ukax suma laq'ati, jan ukax janicha," 
Numbers13:20 uraqix suma achur uraqiti, jan ukax, janich suma achurïki, quqanakaniti, jan ukax, janicha, taqi ukanak uñjanipxam. Jan axsarapxamti; ukatsti uka uraqin achunakap apanipxäta —sasa. Ukapachasti uvanakan nayrïr achunakap apthapiñ urunakänwa." 
Numbers13:21 Uka chachanakasti sarasin uka uraq uñakipapxäna, aynach tuqit qalltapxäna, Sin sat wasarata, ukawjatsti Rehob chiqakamaw sarapxäna, ukasti Hamat jak'ankiwa." 
Numbers13:22 Négueb wasaranjam mantasin Hebrón chiqakamaw puripxäna. Hebrón markax Soan sat egipcio marka utt'ayaskän ukat paqallq mara nayraw utt'ayasitayna. Uka markan Ahimán, Sesai, Talmai chachanakax jakapxäna, jupanakasti Anac sat jach'a tansa jaqin wawanakapänwa." 
Numbers13:23 Ukatsti mä jisk'a jawiraruw puripxäna; ukawjan jupanakax uva wayun alip khuchhuqapxäna, uksti paniniw mä lawar warkuntat kallanipxäna, ukatsti granadanaka, higonaka apthapipxarakïna." 
Numbers13:24 Uka jisk'a jawirarusti Escol sutimpiw sutichapxäna, ukawjan israelitanakax uva wayun alip khuchhuqapxatap layku." 
Numbers13:25 Ukxarusti, pusi tunka urunak uka uraqi uñakipasinsti," 
Numbers13:26 Parán wasaran Cadés sat chiqaruw kuttanxapxäna. Ukan Moisesampi, Aaronampi, taqpach israelitanakampix jikxatasipxäna. Ukatsti kuntix yatxatanipkatayna taqi ukanak jupanakar yatiyapxäna, uka uraqit apanipkatayna uka achunaksa uñacht'ayapxarakïnwa." 
Numbers13:27 Moisesarusti sapxänwa: —Khithapkista uka uraqiruw nanakax sarapxta. Chiqpachapuniw uka uraqin lechesa, misk'isa umjam jalsuski, uñjam, aka achunakaw uka uraqin achuraki." 
Numbers13:28 Ukampis ukan jakir jaqinakax wali ch'amaninakawa, markanakasti wali jach'anakawa, suma uyuchrantatarakiwa. Anac sat jach'a tansa jaqin wawanakaparus uñjanipxtwa." 
Numbers13:29 Négueb wasar tuqinxa amalecita jaqinakaw jakapxi, qullu tuqinakansti hitita jaqinaka, jebuseo jaqinaka, amorreo jaqinakaw jakapxi, ukatsti quta irananakana, Jordán jawir jak'anxa, cananeo jaqinakaw jakapxaraki —sasa." 
Numbers13:30 Jaqinakax Moisesatakiw arusipxäna, ukampis Caleb chachaw uka jaqinakar amukt'ayäna, akham sasa: —¡Uka uraq katuntir sarapxañäni! ¡Jiwasax katuntañäniwa!" 
Numbers13:31 Ukampis jupamp chik saririnakax sapxänwa: —¡Janiw uka jaqinakampix nuwasksnati! Jupanakax jiwasat sipan juk'amp ch'amaniwa —sasa. 
Numbers13:32 Ukatsti israelitanakarux uñaqanipkatayna uka uraqin jan walïtap sapxäna: —Uñakipir sarapkta uka uraqix, ukan jakir jaqinakarux jiwarayiwa, ukan uñjanipkta taqi uka chachanakax wali jach'anakawa." 
Numbers13:33 Jach'a tansa jaqinak uñjanipxarakta, Anac chachan wawanakaparu. Nanakasti jupanak thiyanxa, t'iju t'ijunakar uñtatakiw uñjasipxta, jupanakas ukham uñjapxarakitu —sasa." 
Numbers14:1 Ukatsti israelitanakax warariñ qalltapxäna, uka arumasti jacht'asisaw qhantatipxarakïna." 
Numbers14:2 Jupanakax taqpachaniw Moisesampitaki, Aaronampitakix jan wal parlapxäna, akham sasa: “¡Egipto uraqinsa jiwaraskasäna, jan ukax, aka wasaransa jiwaraskasäna!" 
Numbers14:3 ¿Kunatakirak Tatitusti aka uraqir irpanpachïstusti? ¿Jiwasan nuwasïwin jiwarañasataki, warminakasasa, wawanakasas uñisirisan amparapar katuntat uñjasiñasatakit irpanpachïstusti? ¡Egiptor kuttxañasakiw walïspa!” sasa." 
Numbers14:4 Ukatsti maynit maynikamaw parlarasipxäna: “Egiptor kuttxañatakix mä jilïr utt'ayasiñäni” sasa. 
Numbers14:5 Ukapachasti Moisesampi, Aaronampix israelitanak nayräxan ajanunakap uraqir puriyañkamaw alt'apxäna," 
Numbers14:6 ukatsti Josué chachampi, Caleb chachampix, llakisiñat isinakap ch'iyanuqasipxäna, jupanakax mayninak chikaw uka uraqinak uñakipanipxatayna," 
Numbers14:7 jupanakasti israelitanakarux akham sapxarakïnwa: —¡Nanakax uñakipir sarapkta uka uraqix, wali suma uraqipuniwa!" 
Numbers14:8 Tatitutix khuyapayasistanixa, uka uraqir mantañ yanapt'istaniwa, jiwasanakaruw churarakistani. Uka uraqin leches, misk'is umjamaw jalsuski." 
Numbers14:9 Janiy Tatitur qallasipxamti, janirak uka markankir jaqinakar axsarapxamti, jupanakar atipjañax jiwasatak janiw kuna ch'amakänisa; jupanakar arxatirix janiw khitis utjkiti, ukatsipana, Tatituw jiwasampïski. ¡Jan jumanakax axsarapxamti! sasa." 
Numbers14:10 Ukhamäkipansa, jaqinakax qalampiw jupanakar k'upjañ munapxäna. Ukapachaw Tatitun qhapaq kankañapax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpana uñstäna, taqpach israelitanakan uñjkata," 
Numbers14:11 Tatitusti Moisesarux sänwa: —¿Kunapachkamarak aka markasti nayar jisk'achaskakitanisti? ¿Kunapachkamarak nayat pächasisipkakini, jupanak taypin walja muspharkañanak lurkipansa?" 
Numbers14:12 Nayaw jupanakar jiwarayir usu apayanï, uka uraq jan katupxañapataki; ukampis jumarux taqit sipan mä jach'a markaruw tukuyäma, jupanakat sipan juk'amp ch'amani —sasa." 
Numbers14:13 Ukampis Moisesax Tatitur sänwa: —Jumaw aka markarux jach'a ch'amamampi Egipto markat irpsuntaxa. Kunapachatix egipcionakax kuntix lurkäta uk yatipxani ukkhasti," 
Numbers14:14 Canaán uraqinkir jaqinakaruw yatiyapxani. Jupanakax ist'apxarakiw juma, Tatitun aka marka taypinkaskatama, ajanuy ajanu uñjayasitama, qinayamas jupanak patxankaskatapa; urunsti jupanakan nayraqatap mä qinay tuqi saraskatama, arumansti mä nina tuqirak saraskatama." 
Numbers14:15 Jumatix aka markar may jawq'antasin jiwayäta ukkhax, juman jach'a kankañamat yatir markanakax sapxaniwa:" 
Numbers14:16 “Diosasti kawkïri uraqtix churä siskatayna uka markarux janiw irpantkiti, ukat wasaran jiwarayi” sasa." 
Numbers14:17 Ukat jichhax Tatay, jach'a ch'amam uñacht'ayañamatak mayt'asinsma. Juma pachpaw sistaxa:" 
Numbers14:18 “Janiw jank'ak phiñasirïkti, khuyapayasiñaxax jan tukuskiriwa, ñanqha luratsa, nayatak sayt'asiñanaksa pampachtwa, juchanirux mutuyapuntwa, awkimpina taykampin jucha luratanakapatxa, wawanakaparu, allchhinakaparu, allchhinakan allchhinakaparuw mutuyarakta” sasa." 
Numbers14:19 Tatay, munasiñamax sinti jach'awa, aka markan juchanakap pampachakimaya, kamisatix Egiptot akakam khuyapt'ayaskta ukhama." 
Numbers14:20 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa: —Walikiwa, nayax juman mayitamarjamaw jupanakan juchap pampachä." 
Numbers14:21 Ukampis naya layku, taqpach uraqi phuqhantir jach'a kankañax laykuw juramento lurta," 
Numbers14:22 khitinakatix jach'a kankañax uñjkasinsa, Egiptompina, wasarampin muspharkañanak luratax uñjkasinsa, nayar wasaran mayampi mayamp yant'apxitu, arunakaxar jan jaysañ munirinakax," 
Numbers14:23 janipuniw jupanakat maynis arsut uraqi uñjkaniti, awkipar taykapar churañatak arskta uka uraqi. Janirakiw nayar jisk'achirinakat maynis uka uraq uñjapkaniti." 
Numbers14:24 Caleb luqtirixakiw jan mayninakjamäkiti, jupasti taqi chuymampiw iyawsitu. Ukat juparux kawkïr uraqtix uñakipir sarki uka uraqirux mantayä, wawanakapasti ukan utjantasipxani." 
Numbers14:25 Amalecitanakampi, cananeonakampiw qhirwa tuqin jakapxi, ukhamasti jumanakax qharürpacha wasar tuqir kuttapxam, ukatsti Mar Rojo quta thakhinjam sarapxam." 
Numbers14:26 Tatitusti Moisesampiru, Aaronampirux saskakïnwa:" 
Numbers14:27 —¿Kunapachkamarak aka ñanqhar jichuntat israelitanakan parlatanakap isch'ukïsti? Niyaw ist'ta nayxat jan wali parlatanakapa. 
Numbers14:28 Niyakixay ‘mutuyapxituw’ sasa sarnaqapxchixa, jichhaw jupanakar mutuyä. Nayaw Israelan Diosapätxa, juramentompiw arsta, parlatanakaparjamaw lurä." 
Numbers14:29 Jaqinak jakthapïwin pä tunka maranit amstar qillqantatäpki jupanakata, nayatak jan wali parlirinakax, jiwapxaniwa; amayanakapasti aka wasaran jaqurpayataw uñjasini." 
Numbers14:30 Jumanakat janiw maynis jumanakar churañatak arskta uka uraqir mantkaniti, Caleb chachampi, Josué chachampikiw uka uraqirux mantapxani." 
Numbers14:31 Ukatsipana, wawanakamarux mantayäwa, jumanakax sapxtawa: wawanakasax uñisirinakasan amparaparuw jalt'ani, sasa. Uka wawanakaruw jumanakan jisk'achat uraqir irpä, uka uraqin achunakapamp kusisit sarnaqapxañapataki." 
Numbers14:32 Jumanakan amayanakamasti, aka wasaran jaqunukutaw uñjasini," 
Numbers14:33 wawanakamasti pusi tunka maraw aka wasaran ovejanak awatis sarnaqapxani. Ukhamat jupanakax jumanakan jan iyawsatanakam phuqhapxani, jumanakan taqpachan aka wasaran jiwarapxañamkamaw suyt'apxani." 
Numbers14:34 Jumanakax pusi tunka uruw uraqinak uñakipasax sarnaqanipxtaxa; ukhamarakiw jichhax pusi tunka mara mutuyäwi phuqhapxäta, sapa uruta mä mara. Ukhamat jumanakax yatipxäta, kunjämäkitix nayar qallkatasiñax uka." 
Numbers14:35 Naya, Tatituw uk arsta, ukham lurä, aka ñanqhar jichuntat nayatak mayachasisin qallkatasir markaruxa. Aka wasaran tukusipxani; akan jiwarapxarakini —sasa." 
Numbers14:36 Moisesax uraq uñakipir khitkatayna uka chachanakax, kuttanisin uka uraqi jisk'achasaw jan walinak yatiyapxäna, ukat jaqinakax jan walinak Tatitutak arusipxäna; uka chachanakarusti Tatitux akatjamat jiwarayäna." 
Numbers14:37  
Numbers14:38 Uraqi uñakipir khithat taqpachani chachanakatxa, Josué chachampi, Caleb chachampikiw jan jiwapkänti." 
Numbers14:39 Moisesax kuntix Tatitux israelitanakar siskatayna taqi ukanak yatiykän ukapachasti, taqpachaniw walpun llakt'asipxäna." 
Numbers14:40 Qhipärmanthisti willjtat sartasin, qullunak tuqiruw sarapxäna, alay qullu chiqar makhatasinsti, sapxänwa: —¡Niyaw akkhanktan! Tatitux churañatak arskistu uka chiqar sarapxañäni, jiwasax jucha luratanakas uñt'astanwa —sasa." 
Numbers14:41 Ukampis Moisesax jupanakar sänwa: —¿Kunatarak Tatitun arunakapar jan jaysapxtasti? ¡Uka amtäwix inaruw tukuni! 
Numbers14:42 Jan sarasipkakimti, Tatitux janiw jumanakampïkxiti, uñisirinakamax atipjapxätamwa." 
Numbers14:43 Jumanakax Tatitut saraqtapxtaxa, ukat jupax jumanakar apanukupxtam. Uka uraqirutix sarapxätaxa, amalecita jaqinakampi, cananeo jaqinakampiw jumanakamp nuwasir mistsunini, jumanakarusti jiwarayapxätamwa —sasa." 
Numbers14:44 Ukham siskatpachasa, israelitanakax qullu patar makhatañ munasipkakïnwa; ukampis arust'äwi arcampi, Moisesampix, janiw campamentot unxtapkänti." 
Numbers14:45 Ukapachaw uka chiqan jakir amalecita jaqinakampi, cananeo jaqinakampix mistunipxäna, israelitanakar Hormá sat chiqakam arktanisa, jupanakar q'al atipjañkama." 
Numbers15:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw parlän akham sasa: 
Numbers15:2 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Nayax jumanakan jakapxañamatak churapkäma uka uraqir mantapkäta," 
Numbers15:3 ukatsti nayar jach'añchas mä urqu vaca, jan ukax, mä ovejsa luqtapxitäta suma q'apkir wilañcha nakt'ayañataki, kuntix arsupkta ukanak phuqhasa, jan ukax, chuymanakamatjam waxt'a churasa, jan ukax, mä uruyäwi uruyasasa ukapachaxa," 
Numbers15:4 khititix waxt'a churkani ukax, mä litro aceitemp chaputa suma jak'ut pä kilo yapt'ani." 
Numbers15:5 Uka wilañchanakarusti mä litro vino waxt'ampi yapt'añapa, sapaqat ovejata." 
Numbers15:6 Wilañchatix mä urqu ovejächi ukax, pusi kilo suma jak'ump yapxatani, mä litrot jilpacha aceitemp chapuntata," 
Numbers15:7 mä litrot jilpacha vinompi, nayatak suma q'apkir luqtäñapataki." 
Numbers15:8 Wilañchatix mä vaca qallüchi, nakt'ayat luqtäwi luqtañataki, jan ukax, sumankayir wilañchataki, jan ukax, arsüwi phuqhasin luqtächi ukapachasti," 
Numbers15:9 suxta kilo suma jak'ump yapt'ani, pä litro aceitemp chapuntata," 
Numbers15:10 pä litro vinompi, nayatak suma q'apkir nakt'ayat luqtäñapataki." 
Numbers15:11 Ukham lurani, sapa urqu vaca luqtampi, sapa urqu oveja luqtampi, sapa mä marani urqu oveja luqtampi, sapa cabrito luqtampi." 
Numbers15:12 Sapaqat uywa luqtaskan ukatxa, wakiski uka waxt'ap churasini, qawqha uywanakatix utjki ukhamarjama." 
Numbers15:13 Taqi israelitanakaw aka kamachinakarjam phuqhañapa, suma q'apkir nakt'ayat waxt'a luqtkitan ukapacha." 
Numbers15:14 “Yaqha markat jutir jaqitix jumanak taypin jakaspa, ukat suma q'apkir nakt'ayat waxt'a nayar luqtañ munitaspa ukaxa, jupax jumanakjamarakiw pachpa kamachinak phuqhañapa." 
Numbers15:15 Uka pachpa kamachinakaw jumanakatakisa, yaqha markat jutir jaqinakatakisa, wawanakamatakisa; uka kamachix wiñayatakïniwa." 
Numbers15:16 Mä pachpa kamachikiw utji, jumanakatakisa, yaqha markat jutir jaqinakatakisa” sasa." 
Numbers15:17 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: 
Numbers15:18 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Nayax irpapkäm uka uraqir puripkäta," 
Numbers15:19 ukatsti ukan achur trigo apthapisin manq'añ qalltapkät ukapachasti, uka achunakat mä qawqha nayar luqtañatak yaqhachapxäta." 
Numbers15:20 Kunjämatix nayrïr jawq'at trigot mä juk'a luqtapkistaxa, ukhamarakiw nayrïr jak'u chaputatxa, t'ant'a waxt'a luqtapxitäta." 
Numbers15:21 Uka waxt'a lurapxapunïtawa. 
Numbers15:22 “Jumanakatix jan amuyasis nayrïr urutpach Moisesar arsut arunakarjam jan phuqhapkätaxa, akanak lurapxäta:" 
Numbers15:23  
Numbers15:24 “Markpachatix jan amuyasis pantjasinixa, taqpach markaw mä urqu vaca qallu luqtitani, nakt'ayat suma q'apkir luqta, wakiski uka grano achunakampi, vino waxt'apampi, Diosan arsutaparjama; ukxarusti, jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxitäta." 
Numbers15:25 Ukatsti sacerdotew Israel markpachatak luqta katuyani, juchat pampachäwi jikxatañataki, nayasti jupanakarux juchapat pampachäwa, jan amuyasisin pantjasipxatap layku; jupanakan uka jucha luratat waxt'apa, wilañchapa nayar luqtapxatap layku." 
Numbers15:26 Nayaw taqpach Israel markaru, jumanak taypin jakir yaqha markat jutir jaqinakan juchap pampachä, markatix jan amuyasis pantjaskan ukapachaxa." 
Numbers15:27 “Mä sapa jaqitix jan amuyasis jucha lurkani ukapachasti, uka jaqix jucha luratat mä marani qachu cabra wilañcha luqtani." 
Numbers15:28 Ukatsti sacerdotew nayan nayraqataxan uka jaqitak luqtäwi katuyani, jan amuyasis jucha luratapat pampachäwi jikxatañataki, nayasti uka jaqirux juchap pampachäwa." 
Numbers15:29 Mä pachpa kamachikiw utji, israelitanakatakisa, jumanak taypin jakir yaqha markat jutir jaqitakisa, mä jaqitix jan amuyaskasin pantjaskan ukapacha." 
Numbers15:30 “Ukampis mä jaqitix sum yatkasin juch lurani, israelit jaqïpansa, yaqha markat jutir jaqïpansa, ukasti nayaruw ñanqhachitu. Ukhamïpansti, uka jaqix markap taypit jaqunukutaw uñjasini," 
Numbers15:31 nayan arunakax jisk'achatap layku, arsutanakax jan phuqhatap layku; uka jaqix jaqunukutaw uñjasini, juchap uñt'asirakini.”" 
Numbers15:32 Israelitanakax wasaran jikxatasipkän ukapachax, mä jaqiruw sábado urun phayañ lawanak apthapiskir jikxatapxäna." 
Numbers15:33 Ukat uka jaqir Moisesampina, Aaronampin nayraqatapar irpapxäna, taqpach markachirinak nayräxaru." 
Numbers15:34 Jupanakasti uka jaqir katuntasin jak'atak uñch'ukipxäna, uka jaqir janïra kuna lurañ yatisitap layku." 
Numbers15:35 Ukapachaw Tatitux Moisesar säna: “Uka jaqix jiwañapawa. Taqpach marka jupar qalamp k'upjapxpan campamentot anqäxana” sasa. 
Numbers15:36 Israelitanakasti uka jaqir campamentot anqäxar irpsusinxa, jiwayañkamaw qalamp k'upjapxäna, Tatitux Moisesar arskatayna ukhamarjama." 
Numbers15:37 Uka qhipatsti, Tatitux Moisesar sänwa:" 
Numbers15:38 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Jumanakampi, wawanakamampix isinakar t'ikhachanakamp muytat isinakampiw uchasipxäta. Uka t'ikhachatanakasti morado ch'ankhat luratäñapawa." 
Numbers15:39 Uka t'ikhachatanak uñjasin jumanakax nayan churat taqpach kamachi arunakat amtasipxäta, ukat phuqhapxarakïta; janirakiw jumanakan pachpa amtäwinakamampi, munañanakamampi apayasipxätati, ukanak laykuw jumanakax nayar iyawsañ apanukupxtaxa." 
Numbers15:40 Ukhamat jumanakax taqi kamachinakaxat amtasipxäta, phuqhapxarakïta, ukatsti naya, Diosamar katuyatäpxätawa." 
Numbers15:41 Nayätwa jumanakan Tatit Diosamaxa, nayaw jumanakan Diosamäñatak Egipto uraqit irpsunipxsma. Nayätwa jumanakan Tatit Diosamaxa” sasa." 
Numbers16:1 Mä levita chachaw utjäna Quehat chachan saraqiripata, Coré sutini, Ishar chachan yuqapa. Coré chachax kimsa masinakanïnwa, uka masinakapasti Rubén ayllunkirinakänwa: Datán, Abiram sutinakanix Eliab chachan yuqanakapänwa, On sat masipasti Pélet chachan yuqapänwa." 
Numbers16:2 Uka chachanakasti Moisesatakiw sayt'asipxäna, jupanakarusti pä patak phisqa tunkan israelitanakaw jaqkattapxäna, uka jaqinakasti markanxa taqininsa wali uñt'at jilïr chachanakänwa, amuyt'ayir jaqinak taypinkirinakänwa." 
Numbers16:3 Taqpachaniw jupanakax tantachasisin Moisesampiru, Aaronampir saykatapxäna, akham sasa: —¡Jumanakakiw taqi kunsa munasipktaxa!
