Taqpach markaw Diosar katuyata, Tatitusti taqi jiwasanakampïskiwa. ¿Kunatarak jumanakasti Tatitun markapxar mä jach'a munañanïpkasmas ukham sartapxtasti? —sasa." 
Numbers16:4 Moisesasti uk ist'asinxa uraqir ajanup puriyañkamaw alt'äna," 
Numbers16:5 ukatsti Coré jaqimpiru, arkirinakapampirux sänwa: —Arumanthiw Tatitux yatiyani khitis jupanki, khitis jupar katuyata, khitirakis jupar waxt'anak luqtaspa ukanaka. Jupax khitirutix ajlliskan ukakiw waxt'anak luqtani." 
Numbers16:6 Akham lurapxam: Coré chachampina, arkirinakapampin incienso q'aphichañanakap apanipxam," 
Numbers16:7 ukarusti nina sank'anak uchapxam, incienso willxatapxarakim, ukatsti arumanthix Tatitun nayraqataparuw uk uchanipxäta. Khitinakarutix Tatitux qullan carpapan luqtañapatak ajlliskani, jupanakakiw uk lurapxani. ¡Levitanaka, jichhax jan juk'amp arusipxamti!" 
Numbers16:8 Ukatsti Moisesax Coré chacharuw säna: —Levita jaqinaka, ist'apxita:" 
Numbers16:9 ¿Amuyatanakamat juk'akiti Diosan jumanakar israelitanak taypit Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan jupar luqtapxañamatak ajllitapasti? 
Numbers16:10 Tatitux jupa jak'ankapxañamatakiw jumanakar ajllisipxtam. Jichhasti, ¿kunatarak sacerdotëñ munapxaraktasti?" 
Numbers16:11 Chiqpachansa janiw jumanakax Aaronatak arusipktati, jan ukasti, Tatituruw jumasa, masinakamas saykatapxtaxa —sasa." 
Numbers16:12 Ukatsti Moisesax Datán, Abiram uka chachanakaruw jawsayanïna, ukampis jupanakax sapxänwa: —Janiw sarapkiristti." 
Numbers16:13 ¿Amuyatamatsti juk'akiti kawkha uraqintix lechesa, misk'is umjam jalaski uka uraqit nanakar irpsunitamasti, ukat wasaran nanakar jiwarayiri, ukhamarus munañamar nanakar apnaqañ munatamasti?" 
Numbers16:14 Janiw jumax lechempi, misk'impi jalaski uka uraqir irpapkistati, janirakiw jumax mä uraqsa churapkistati, uva yapunaksa churapkistati. ¿Juykhur uñtatti, taqinin irpayasiñap muntasti? Janiw jumar uñjañsa, jumamp parlañsa munapkti —sasa." 
Numbers16:15 Moisesasti wali q'apisitaw Tatitur säna: —¡Jupanakan waxt'anakap jan katuqamti! Janiw nayax jupanakan mä asnopaksa mayirïkti, janirakiw jupanakat maynirusa jan walinak lurkti —sasa." 
Numbers16:16 Ukatsti Moisesax Coré chacharuw säna: —Jumampi, jaqinakamampix Tatit nayraqatan qharür uñstapxam. Aaronasti ukankarakiniwa." 
Numbers16:17 Sapa mayni incienso q'aphichañap apaspan, incienso ucharakpan. Jumampi, Aaronampix, incienso q'aphichañanakam apasipxarakïta, ukatsti Tatitu nayraqatan uk uchapxäta, yaqha pä patak phisqa tunka incienso q'aphichañanakamp chika." 
Numbers16:18 Qhipärmanthisti, sapa mayniw incienso q'aphichañap apxarusïna, aqaskir k'illimampi, inciensompi ucharakïna, ukatsti Moisesampi, Aaronampi chikaw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa nayraqatan sayt'asipxäna." 
Numbers16:19 Coré chachasti niyaw Jikisiñ Carpa uñkatasin taqpach jaqinakapar tantachatayna, Moisesampiru, Aaronampir saykatañataki. Ukapachasti Tatitux jach'a qhapaq kankañapampiw jupanakar uñstäna," 
Numbers16:20 ukatsti Moisesampiru, Aaronampiruw säna:" 
Numbers16:21 —¡Aka jaqinakat jithiqtapxam, nayaw taqpachanir tukjä! —sasa." 
Numbers16:22 Moisesampi, Aaronampisti ajanup uraqir puriñkamaw alt'apxäna, Tatiturux sapxarakïnwa: —Tatit Diosay, jumaw taqi jaqinakarus jakañ churtaxa, ¿mä sapa jaqin juchap laykukiti taqpach markatak q'apisïtasti? —sasa." 
Numbers16:23 Tatitusti Moisesarux akham sarakïna: 
Numbers16:24 —Taqpach israelitanakar sanim, Coré, Datán, Abiram, chachanakan chhujllanakapat jithiqtapxpan —sasa." 
Numbers16:25 Moisesasti sayt'asisin Datán, Abiram jaqinakan ukaruw saräna, jupamp chikasti Israelan jilïrinakapaw sararakïna." 
Numbers16:26 Ukapachaw markar säna: —Uka ñanqha jaqinakan chhujllanakapat jithiqtapxam, kunatix jupanakankki ukanak janiw llamkt'apxätati, jumanakax juchanakap layku jan jiwasipkañamataki —sasa." 
Numbers16:27 Ukatsti taqpach jaqiw Coré, Datán, Abiram jaqinakan chhujllanakapat jithiqtxapxäna. Datán, Abiram uka chachanakasti chhujllanakap mantañaruw mistsunipxatayna, ukawjan jupanakax warminakapampi, taqpach wawanakapamp chika sayt'atäsipkäna." 
Numbers16:28 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: —Tatituw taqi akanak lurañaxatak nayar khithanitu, janiw nayax chuymaxatjam kuns lurkti, jichhaw jumanakax uk uñjapxäta." 
Numbers16:29 Aka jaqinakatix mayni jaqinakjam jiwañap jiwaskani ukaxa, Tatitun nayar jan khithanitap yatiyani;" 
Numbers16:30 ukampis Tatitutix mä jach'a muspharkañ lurani, ukatsti uraqis jist'artasin jupanakar taqi yänakapamp chika manq'antani, jakaskirpach p'amp'antat uñjasipxani ukkhasti, jumanakax aka chachanakan Tatitur saykatapxatap yatipxäta —sasa." 
Numbers16:31 Moisesax parlañ tukuyxän ukapachaw uraqix jist'artäna," 
Numbers16:32 ukatsti Coré chachar jaqkattapkatayna taqi uka chachanakaruw manq'antäna, wila masinakapampiru, yänakapampiru." 
Numbers16:33 Jupanakax jakaskirpachaw manqha pachar jalantapxäna, taqi yänakapamppacha, ukatsti uraqix jist'antasxänwa. Ukhamaw taqi uka jaqinakax israelitanak taypit chhaqtayatäxäna." 
Numbers16:34 Uka jaqinakar wararir ist'asasti, uka thiyanakan jikxatasir israelitanakax, taqpachaniw jaltxapxäna akham sasa: “¡Jaltxañäni, jiwasamppacharurak uraqisti manq'antistaspa!” sasa." 
Numbers16:35 Ukxarusti, Tatitux mä nina apayanïna, uka ninasti incienso luqtapkatayna uka pä patak phisqa tunkan levita jaqinakaruw nakhantas jiwarayäna." 
Numbers16:36 Tatitusti Moisesarux sänwa: 
Numbers16:37 “Aarón chachan Eleazar yuqapar khitham, uka nina nakhantat taypinakat incienso q'aphichañanak apsunpan, nina sank'anak utjaskchi uksti jayar jaqtanpan." 
Numbers16:38 Jucha luratapat uka jaqinakax jiwaraski, jupanakan incienso q'aphichañanakapax, qullanañchatäxiwa, naya nayraqataxan incienso luqtañatak apnaqasitap layku. Altarar apakipañatak uka metalanak sillp'ar tukuyapxam, ukanakasti israelitanakan amtasiñapatak uchatäpan” sasa." 
Numbers16:39 Ukatsti Eleazar sacerdotex uka jaqinakan broncet lurat incienso q'aphichañanakap apthapisin altarar muyuntayañatakiw sillp'ar tukuyayxäna. 
Numbers16:40 Ukasti israelitanakan amtasiñapatakïnwa, uka qhipat Aarón sacerdoten saraqirinakapat jan khiti jaqis altarar incienso luqtir jak'achasiskañapataki; kamisatix Coré chachampi, masinakapampix jiwarapki ukham jan jiwarasipkañapataki. Ukhamaw taqi ukanakax phuqhasïna, kunjämtix Tatitux Moisés tuqi Eleazarar siskatayna ukhamarjama." 
Numbers16:41 Qhipärmanthisti Israel markpachaw Moisesampitaki, Aaronampitak parlañ qalltapxäna akham sasa: —¡Jumanakax Tatitun markaparuw jiwayasipktaxa! —sasa." 
Numbers16:42 Taqpachaniw Moisesampiru, Aaronampir muyuntapxäna; ukampis jupanakax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpäkis uksaruw sartawayxapxäna. Ukapachaw qinayax ukar imxattäna, Tatitun qhapaq kankañapas uñstarakïnwa." 
Numbers16:43 Ukhamasti Moisesampi, Aaronampix Jikisiñ Carpan uñkatasiparuw sayt'apxäna," 
Numbers16:44 Tatitusti Moisesarux sänwa: 
Numbers16:45 —Uka jaqinakat jithiqtapxam, jichhpachaw jupanakar t'unjä —sasa. Moisesampi, Aaronampisti p'iqinakap uraqir puriyañkamaw alt'asipxäna," 
Numbers16:46 Moisesasti Aaronar sänwa: —Incienso q'aphichañam aptanim, ukarusti altarat apaqasin nina sank'a uchäta, inciensompiw ukar warxatarakïta; ukatsti jank'akiw israelitanak thiyar saräta, Tatitut jupanakatak pampachäwi mayirapïta, Tatitux wali q'apisitawa, jaqinakaruw mutuyaski —sasa." 
Numbers16:47 Aaronasti Moisesan arsutaparjamaw luräna, ukatsti markax tantachatäkän ukkharux jalakamaw saräna. Tatitun apayanit mutuyäwix jaqinakarux markan q'al tukjaskäna, ukat Aaronax incienso uskusin luqtäna, markpachatakiw Tatitut pampachäwi mayirakïna." 
Numbers16:48 Ukxarusti Aaronax jaqi jiwatanak taypina, jakaskirinak taypin sayt'asïna, ukat Tatitun mutuyäwipax t'akurxäna." 
Numbers16:49 Ukürusti tunka pusin waranqa paqallqu patakan jaqinakaw jiwaräna, Coré chachamp chika jiwarapkatayna uka jaqinakar jan jakhusa." 
Numbers16:50 Jaqi jiwarañ sayt'xipansti, Aaronax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carparuw Moisesamp jikisiñatak kuttawayxäna." 
Numbers17:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw parläna, akham sasa:" 
Numbers17:2 “Taqpach israelitanakar parlam, sapa maya ayllun jilïripax mä thujru ayanpan, taqpachasti tunka payan thujrüniwa. Ukatsti jumaw sapa maynin thujrupar sutip qillqantäta," 
Numbers17:3 Leví ayllun thujruparusti Aaronan sutip qillqantäta, sapa maya ayllun jilïripat mä thujruw utjañapa." 
Numbers17:4 Uka thujrunaksti Tatitump Jikisiñ Carparuw uchanïta, arust'äwi arca nayräxaru, nayax jumanakamp jikiskta ukkharu." 
Numbers17:5 Nayaw ajllitaxan thujrup panqarayä, ukhamat israelitanakax jumanakatak jan juk'amp naya nayraqatan jan walinak parlaskañapataki” sasa." 
Numbers17:6 Moisesasti israelitanakarux pachpa arunak säna, ukatsti sapa ayllun jilïripaw Moisesar thujrup churäna; taqpachasti tunka payan thujrunakänwa, Aaronan thujrupasti ukanak taypinkarakïnwa." 
Numbers17:7 Ukatsti Moisesax Tatitun nayraqataparuw thujrunak uchäna, arust'äwi arca nayräxaru." 
Numbers17:8 Qhipärmanthisti, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar Moisesax mantkän ukapachaw Aaronan thujrup ch'uxñatatat uñjäna, panqaranakani, puqurat almendra achunakan kuna." 
Numbers17:9 Ukatsti Moisesax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpat taqpach thujrunak apsunïna, ukatsti israelitanakaruw uñachayarakïna; uñjasinsti sapa mayniw thujrup aytasxäna." 
Numbers17:10 Tatitusti Moisesar sänwa: “Aaronan thujrup arust'äwi arca nayräxar kutintayam, ukawjan ukax imatäpan, aka saykatasir markan uk amtasiñapataki. Naya nayraqataxan jan arusisipkañapataki. Jaysapxitani ukasti, janiw jiwapkaniti” sasa." 
Numbers17:11 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw taqpach luräna," 
Numbers17:12 ukampis israelitanakax Moisesar sapxänwa: —¡Aynacht'atätanwa! ¡Taqpachaniw jichhax jiwarañäni! 
Numbers17:13 Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar jak'achasirix taqiniw jiwarapxi. ¿Taqinit jiwarapxañänisti? —sasa. 
Numbers18:1 Tatitux Aaronaruw säna: “Kunapachatix israelitanakax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar ñanqhachañatak kuna juchsa lurapkani ukkhaxa, jumampi, wawanakamampi, Leví ayllunkir mayni jilanakamampikiw jupanakan jucha luratapat pampachäwi mayipxäta; ukampis kunapachatix jumampi, wawanakamampi sacerdote kankañ phuqkasin jucha lurapxäta ukkhaxa, janiw khitis jumanakan jucha luratanakamat pampachäwi maykaniti, jan ukasti, jumanakpachaw mayisipxäta." 
Numbers18:2 Ukampis Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan lurañanakanxa, Leví ayllunkir mayni jilanakamampix jumarusa, wawanakamarus yanapt'añapawa." 
Numbers18:3 Jupanakax juman yanapirinakamäniwa, carpan kuna lurañatix utjki ukanakansa yanapasirakiniwa, ukampis Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan yänakapampiru, altarampirux jan jak'achasipxpati; jan ukasti, jupanakax jiwapxaniwa, jumanakas jiwapxarakïtawa." 
Numbers18:4 Jupanakax Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa luräwinakan, taqi luqtäwinakan juma chikäpxañapawa. Ukampis janiw khiti jan uñt'at jaqis jumanakar jak'achasiñapäkiti;" 
Numbers18:5 jumanakaw qullan utjäwimpina, altarampin luräwinak phuqhañatak utt'ayatäpxtaxa. Ukhamat israelitanakatakix wasitat jan phiñaskxäti." 
Numbers18:6 Nayaw levita jilanakamarux israelitanak taypit yaqhachta, jumanakar churañataki, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan luräwinakan yanapasipxañapataki;" 
Numbers18:7 ukampis jumampi, wawanakamampikiw sacerdote luräwinak phuqhapxäta, altarana, velo qhipäxansa. Uka lurañasti jumanakaruw wakt'apxtam, nayaw jumanakar sacerdote luräwinak churapxsma. Maynitix jan sacerdotëkasin sacerdoten luräwip luranixa, jiwañapatak juchañchatäniwa” sasa." 
Numbers18:8 Tatitusti Aaronarux sänwa: “Nayar luqtat waxt'anak uñjañamatakiw katuysma. Israelitanakax qullan waxt'anak churapkitu ukanaksti, jumampiru, wawanakamampiruw churapxsma, wakt'apktam ukhamarjama; ukasti wiñayatak arsut kamachïniwa." 
Numbers18:9 Nakt'at wilañchanakatxa, grano juyra waxt'anakaw jumar wakt'ätam, ukhamarak jucha luratat israelitanakax luqtapkitu uka wilañchanakampi; taqi uka qullan waxt'anakax jumampitaki, wawanakamampitakïniwa." 
Numbers18:10 Jumanak taypin utjir chachanakax aka waxt'anakat manq'asipkaspawa, ukanaksti pachpa qullan chiqan manq'apxañapa, uka waxt'anakan qullanätap layku." 
Numbers18:11 “Ukatsti, israelitanakax luqtapkitan uka suma waxt'anaksti jumampitaki, jumamp jakasir yuqall wawamampitaki, imill wawamampitakiw churaraksma. Ukasti wiñayatak arsut kamachïniwa. Utamankir jaqinakat q'umachat jikxatasirix manq'askarakispawa." 
Numbers18:12 Israelitanakax nayrïr achunak sapa mara apanirapipkitu ukanakat churarakïmawa: sumïr aceite, sumïr vino, sumïr trigo." 
Numbers18:13 Taqi kuntix uraqix achuyki, taqi uka achunakat nayrïr achunakap jupanakax apanipxani, nayasti jumaruw ukanak katuyäma. Q'umachat jikxatasir jaqix, ukanak manq'askaspawa." 
Numbers18:14 Kuna waxt'anaktix israelitanakax nayar luqtapkitan ukanakax jumatakïniwa. 
Numbers18:15 “Taqi israelitanakan jilïr wawanakapampi, uywanakan nayrïr wawachat qallunakapa nayar luqtapkitan ukanakax jumatakïniwa. Ukampis jaqinakan jilïr wawanakapampita, q'añu uywanakan nayrïr wawachat qallunakapampitxa alap mayïta kutsuyasxañapataki." 
Numbers18:16 Uka kutsuyasiñasti wawax mä phaxsinïxani ukapachaw alapax churatäxañapa, kutsuyañ alasti phisqa qullqïñapawa, qullan utjäwin tupuparjama, tunka mayan gramo qullqi." 
Numbers18:17 Ukampis janiw vacanakan nayrïr qallunakap yaqha waxt'amp kutsuyätati, janirakiw cabritonakan nayrïr qallupsa kutsuyätati, janirakiw ovejanakan nayrïr wawachat qallunakapsa kutsuyätati. Ukanakasti nayatak yaqhachatawa, nayatakiw jiwarayäta; ukatsti altarxaruw wilap warxatäta, lik'ipsti nayatak mä suma q'apkir waxt'äñapatakiw nakt'ayäta." 
Numbers18:18 Uka uywanakan aychapasa, jaraphipasa, kawkïritix suma waxt'a churatäki uka, ukhamarak kupi charapas jumatakïniwa." 
Numbers18:19 Israelitanakax nayatak yaqhachapkani taqi uka churäwinaksti, jumaruw churäma, ukhamarak jumamp chika jakkani uka yuqall wawamampiru, imill wawamampiru. Uka arsutax wiñayatak arsut kamachiwa. Jan p'akintkaya, wiñay arust'äwiwa, nayaw jumampi, juman saraqirinakamamp uka arust'äwi lurta.”" 
Numbers18:20 Tatitusti Aaronarux sänwa: “Janiw jumanxa Israel jaqinak taypin uraqimasa, tuti katuqäwimas utjkaniti. Nayaw Israel markan juman uraqimäyäxa, tutimäyäsa." 
Numbers18:21 Leví chachat saraqirinakarux, mä tutïkaspas ukham uk churta, kuntix israelitanakax achunakapat sapa tunkat maya churañapäki ukanaka, qullan utjäwin irnaqapxatap layku." 
Numbers18:22 Mayni israelitanakax janiw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar jak'achasipxañapäkiti, ukham lurasax jucha lurapxaspa, ukatsti jiwataw uñjasipxaspa." 
Numbers18:23 Levitanakakiw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan luräwinakap phuqhapxani, jupanakarakiw kuna pantjasitanakatsa juchañchat uñjasipxani. Ukasti, jumanakatakisa, wawanakamatakis wiñayatak arsut kamachïniwa. Leví chachat saraqirinakax janiw Israelan uraqinïpkaniti." 
Numbers18:24 Jupanakarux kuntix israelitanakax achunakapat sapa tunkat maya churapkitani ukanakxa, mä tutïkaspas ukham churta. Ukat nayax jupanakar sista: janiw israelitanak taypin uraqi katuqapkätati” sasa." 
Numbers18:25 Tatitux Moisesar sarakïnwa: 
Numbers18:26 “Levitanakarux akham sätawa: Israelitanakan achunakapata, sapa tunkat maya katuqapkan ukapachaxa, ukanakat sapa tunkat maya yaqhachapxpan nayar luqtañataki." 
Numbers18:27 Ukaw jupanakan waxt'apäni, kunjämtix israelitanakax trigonakapatsa, vinonakapatsa sapa tunkat maya churapki ukhama." 
Numbers18:28 Ukhamat israelitanakat sapa tunkat maya katuqapkani ukatxa, levitanakax Tatitur churañatak yaqhachapxani, uka waxt'anaksti Aarón sacerdoteruw churapxani." 
Numbers18:29 Taqi kunanaktix katuqapkan ukanakatxa, sumäki ukpun yaqhachapxani, nayar waxt'a churañataki." 
Numbers18:30 “Ukxarusti sarakim: Nayatak sumäki ukanak yaqhachxasinsti, ukat jilt'anakxa jupanakan trigopäkaspasa, vinopäkaspas ukham uñt'asxapxani," 
Numbers18:31 ukanaksti kawkhantix munapkani ukawjan wila masinakapamp chik manq'asipkani. Churäwipax ukäniwa, Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpan irnaqatap layku." 
Numbers18:32 Nayatak sumäki uk yaqhachxasinsti, jan kuna jucha lurasaw jilt'anakat manq'asax janiw juchañchatäpkaniti; ukhamat israelitanakan q'uma waxt'anakap jan q'añuchaskañataki, janirakiw jiwayatäñatak juchañchatäpkaniti” sasa." 
Numbers19:1 Tatitux Moisesampiru, Aaronampirux sänwa:" 
Numbers19:2 “Naya Tatituw akanak arsta: Israelitanakar parlam mä wila vaca juman ukar irpanipxpan, uka vacasti janirak usuchjatäkpansa, janirak kunapachas kunkapar yuku ayxatatäkpanti." 
Numbers19:3 Jumanakax Eleazar sacerdoteruw uka vaca churapxäta, campamentot anqäxar irpsuwayañapataki, ukatsti jupan uñjkataw kharinukuyani." 
Numbers19:4 Eleazar sacerdotex luk'anapar mä juk'a wilar aytasin, paqallqu kutiw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar ch'allakipani." 
Numbers19:5 Ukatsti uka vacxa jupan uñjkataw taqpach nakhantayapxani, lip'ichipsa, aychapsa, wilapsa, ukhamarak phurupsa." 
Numbers19:6 Ukxarusti sacerdotex cedro lawampi, hisopo alin laymipampi, wila isimpi aptasin, vacax nakhantaski uka ninar jaquntani;" 
Numbers19:7 ukatsti sacerdotex isip t'axsusxani, janchipsa umampiw jariqasxani, ukat campamentorux mantxani, ukampis jayp'ukamaw q'añuchat uñjasini." 
Numbers19:8 Vaca nakhantayki uka jaqisti, isip t'axsusxani, janchipsa umampi jariqasxarakini, ukampis jayp'ukamaw q'añuchat uñjasini." 
Numbers19:9 Uka qhipatsti, mayni jan q'añuchat jaqiw nakhantayat vacan qhillanakap apthapini, uksti campamentot anqäxan mä q'uma chiqaruw uchxani. Uka qhillampiw Israel markax q'umachasir uma wakichani, taqi ukanakasti juchanakat wilañcha luqtäwïniwa." 
Numbers19:10 Qhillanak apthapir jaqisti isip t'axsusxani, jupasti jayp'ukamaw jan q'umat uñt'atäni. Ukasti wiñayatak arsut kamachiwa, jumanak israelitanakataki, jumanak taypin jakir jaya markat jutir jaqinakatakisa.”" 
Numbers19:11 “Maynitix jiwat jaqin amayap llamkt'anixa, paqallqu uruw q'añut uñt'asini." 
Numbers19:12 Ukat kimsa ururu, jan ukax, paqallqu ururusa q'umachasiñ umampiw q'umachasiñapa, ukat q'umachat uñjasxani. Janitix kimsïr ururusa, paqallqür ururusa q'umachaskan ukaxa, janiw q'umachat uñjaskaniti." 
Numbers19:13 Maynitix jiwat jaqin amayap llamkt'asin jan q'umachaskanixa, Tatitun qullan utjäwip q'añuchi, ukhamäni ukasti, uka jaqix Israel marka taypit jaqunukutäñapawa, q'umachasir umampi jan q'umachasitap laykux, q'añut uñt'atäniwa." 
Numbers19:14 “Kamachix akawa: Maynitix carpan jiwanixa, ukan jikxatasirinakampi, ukar mantirinakampix, paqallqu uruw q'añut uñt'atäni." 
Numbers19:15 Uka carpan utjir jan qhuphintat phukhunakasa, jan ukax, jan wali qhupxatat phukhunakas, q'añut uñt'atäniwa." 
Numbers19:16 “Maynitix mä pampan espadampi jiwayat jaqin amayap llamkt'ani, jan ukax, jiwañap jiwir jaqin amayapsa, jaqi ch'akhanaksa, amay imäwsa llamkt'ani, uka jaqix paqallqu uruw q'añut uñt'atäni." 
Numbers19:17 “Ukham q'añut uñt'at jaqir q'umachañatakix, jucha luratat wilañcha luqtaski uka vacan qhillap mä chuwar aptasini, ukatsti jalsur umampiw ukxar warxatasini." 
Numbers19:18 Ukatsti mayni q'umat uñt'at jaqiw hisopo laymi aptasin umar juricht'ani, ukampiw carpar ch'allakipani, ukatsti phukhunakaru, uka manqhan jikxatasipkän uka jaqinakaru, uka kipkarak khititix jaqi ch'akhanaksa, pampan jiwayat jaqin amayapsa llamkt'katayna, jan ukax, jiwañap jiwir jaqin amayapsa, amay imäwi llamkt'katayna ukanakar ch'allakiparakini." 
Numbers19:19 Q'umat uñt'at jaqix kimsïr uruna, jan ukax, paqallqür uka urunakan, q'añuchat jaqirux ch'allakipani. Paqallqür urutakisti q'umachatäxaniwa. Ukatsti q'añuchat jaqix isip t'axsusiñapa, umampi jariqasiñaparaki, ukampis jayp'ukamax q'añut uñt'atakïskaniwa." 
Numbers19:20 Q'añuchat jaqitix jan q'umachaskanixa, markap taypit apanukutaw uñjasini, Tatitun qullan utjäwip jupan q'añuchatap layku. Q'umachasir umampi jan ch'allakipasitap laykusti, jupax q'añukïskaniwa." 
Numbers19:21 Uka kamachisti wiñayatakïniwa. Q'umachasir umampi yaqha jaqir ch'allakipirixa, isip t'axsusiñapawa. Q'umachasir uma llamkt'iristi, jayp'ukamaw q'añuchat uñjasini." 
Numbers19:22 Taqi kunarutix q'añuchat jaqix llamkt'kan ukasti, q'añuchataw tukuni, q'añuchat jaqir llamkt'iristi, jayp'ukamaw q'añuchat uñjasini.”" 
Numbers20:1 Israelitanakax marat nayrïr phaxsi saraqataruw Sin sat wasarar puripxäna; ukatsti Cadés chiqan mä qawqha pacha qamarapxäna. Ukan Mariax jiwxäna, ukanarak p'amp'atäxäna." 
Numbers20:2 Uka chiqansti janiw jaqinakatak umax utjkänti, ukat taqpachan tantachasisin, Moisesampitaki, Aaronampitak arusiñatakiw sartasipxäna," 
Numbers20:3 ukatsti Moisesaruw sapxäna: —¡Tatitux mayni israelitanakar jiwarayki ukanakamp chik jiwarapxiriskäyäta! 
Numbers20:4 ¿Kunatakirak aka wasarar Tatitun markapar irpanipxtasti? ¿Nanakampi uywanakaxampi jiwarañapti munapxtasti? 
Numbers20:5 ¿Kunatakis Egiptot irpsunipxista aka axsarkañ wasarar puriyaniñkamasti? Akan janiw kunas yapuchañjamäkiti; janiw higo quqanakasa, uva yapunakasa, granado quqanakas utjkiti; ¡umas janirakiw umt'añatak utjkiti! —sasa." 
Numbers20:6 Moisesampi Aaronampisti jaqinakat jithiqtawayxapxänwa, ukatsti Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpa mantañaruw sarxapxäna; ukkhansti p'iqinakap uraqir puriyañkamaw alt'apxäna. Tatitusti jach'a kankañapampiw jupanakar uñstäna," 
Numbers20:7 Tatitux Moisesar akham säna: 
Numbers20:8 —Thujrum ayxarum, ukatsti Aarón jilamamp yanapt'ayasisin taqpach markar tantachthapim. Ukatsti taqpach jaqinak nayraqatan qarqar parlam jupanakar uma churañapataki, ukat qarqat uma jalsunir uñjäta, jupanakana, ukhamarak uywanakapan umt'apxañapataki." 
Numbers20:9 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw luräna, Tatit nayraqatankkäna uka thujru aytanïna;" 
Numbers20:10 ukxarusti Moisesampi Aaronampix taqpach jaqinakaruw qarqa nayräxar tantachthapipxäna, Moisesasti jupanakarux sänwa: —Qallasir chuyman jaqinaka, ist'apxam: ¿aka qarqatti umt'apxañamatak uma apsupxästi? —sasa." 
Numbers20:11 Uka arunak arsusasti, Moisesax amparap aytäna, ukatsti pä kutiw qarqar thujrump jisktäna, ukatsti walja umaw jalsüna. Ukat jaqinakampi, uywanakampix umarapxäna." 
Numbers20:12 Ukampis Tatitux Moisesampiru, Aaronampirux sänwa: —Janiw jumanakax nayar iyawsapkistati, janirakiw israelitanakan nayraqatapansa jach'añchapkistati, ukat aka jaqinakamp chikax, churkä uka uraqirux janiw mantapkätati —sasa." 
Numbers20:13 Ukasti Meribá chiqan lurasïna, uka chiqan israelitanakax Tatitutak arusipxäna, ukampis jupax qullan kankañap uñacht'ayäna." 
Numbers20:14 Moisesax Cadés chiqatpach jaqinakar khithäna Edom markan reyipar akham sañapataki: “Israelit jilanakamax akham siriw khithanipxitu: ‘Jumax sum yatta nanakan wali ch'ama tukutanakaxa. 
Numbers20:15 Nanakan nayra awkinakaxax Egiptoruw jakir sarxapxäna, ukatsti walja maranakaw ukan jakapxäna, ukampis egipcionakax nanakar jan wal uñjapxitu, nayra awkinakaxarjamaw uñjapxarakitu;" 
Numbers20:16 ukat nanakax Tatitur yanap mayisipxta, jupasti arnaqasitanakaxar ist'apxituwa, angelap khithanipxitu, jupaw Egipto uraqit irpsunipxitu; jichhasti Cadés markan jikxatasipxta, markamampi qurpa uraqina." 
Numbers20:17 Jichhasti uraqim chiqay sarakipt'ayapxita, janiw nanakax yapuchat uraqinjam sarapkäti, uva yapunjamsa sarakipapkäti, janirakiw phuch'unakamatsa umt'apkäti. Thakhinjamak sarapxä, uraqinakam sarakipañkamax janiw uka thakhit kawksarus saraqapkäti’ ” sasa." 
Numbers20:18 Ukampis Edom markankir reyix sänwa: —¡Janiw uraqixanjam sarakipapkasmati, mantanipxäta ukasti, ejercitoxampiw jumanakar nuwantir mistunï! —sasa." 
Numbers20:19 Israelitanakasti ukxaruw sapxäna: —Thakhim chiqak sarakipt'ayapxita, nanakampi uywanakaxampitix phuch'unakamat uma umt'apkä ukax, qullqi churapxäma. Uraqim sarakipt'añak munapxta —sasa." 
Numbers20:20 Ukampis Edom markankir reyix saskakïnwa: —¡Janiw uraqixanjam sarakipapkasmati! —sasa. Ukatsti reyix wali wakichrantat ejercitompiw mistsuwayäna, ukatsti israelitanak nayraqatan sayantäna," 
Numbers20:21 uraqipanjam jan sarakipayañataki. Israel markasti jan kamacht'irjamäsax, yaqha thakhi thaqhapxäna." 
Numbers20:22 Israelitanakax Cadés chiqat sartawayasax, Hor sat qullu tuqiruw sarxapxäna," 
Numbers20:23 Edom uraqimpi qurpaski uka chiqan Tatitux Moisesampiru, Aaronampir parläna, akham sasa:" 
Numbers20:24 —“Aaronax jiwxaniwa, janiw jupax Israelan wawanakapar churkta uka uraqir mantkaniti, jumanakan Meribá chiqan arunakaxar jan jaysapxatam layku." 
Numbers20:25 Jumasti Moisés, Aaronampiru, Eleazar yuqapampir Hor sat qullu patar irpam;" 
Numbers20:26 Aaronax ukan jiwxani. Jiwxipansti, sacerdote isip apsüta, ukatsti Eleazar yuqaparuw ukamp isthapiyäta” —sasa." 
Numbers20:27 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw luräna. Taqpach israelitanakan uñjkataw Hor sat qullur makhatapxäna. 
Numbers20:28 Aaronax jiwxän ukkhasti, Moisesax sacerdote isip issuyxäna, ukatsti Eleazar yuqaparuw ukamp isthapiyäna. Uka qhipatsti, Moisesampi, Eleazarampix qullut saraqanxapxäna." 
Numbers20:29 Israelitanakasti Aaronan jiwatap yatisinxa, kimsa tunka uruw jupat jachapxäna." 
Numbers21:1 Négueb wasarankir Arad markan cananeo reyix jakäna, jupasti israelitanakan Atarim thakhinjam jutasipkatapat ist'asinxa, jupanakamp nuwasiriw mistüna, ukatsti jupanakar nuwantasin yaqhipanakar katuntawayäna." 
Numbers21:2 Ukat israelitanakax Tatitur mayisipxäna, arsutap phuqhañatakiw jupar arsupxarakïna akham sasa: “Jumatix uka reyimpiru, markapampir atipjañ yanapapxitätaxa, nanakax taqpach markanakap q'alpun tukjapxä” sasa." 
Numbers21:3 Tatitusti kuntix israelitanakax mayipkatayna ukarux ist'änwa, ukatsti uñisirinakapar atipjañ yanapt'äna. Israelitanakasti cananeonakarux taqinirupuniw jiwarayapxäna, markanakapsa taqpach t'unjapxäna. Ukat uka chiqarux Hormá sas sutichapxäna." 
Numbers21:4 Israelitanakax Hor sat qullut mistuwayasax, Mar Rojo tuqiruw sarapxäna, Edom reyin uraqip muyt'asa, uka chiqa jan sarakipaskañataki. Thakhinsti jaqinakax ch'am thayjtayasipxäna," 
Numbers21:5 ukat jupanakax Tatitutak arusiñ qalltapxäna, Moisesarusti sapxänwa: —¿Kunatakirak Egiptot irpsunipxistasti? ¿Wasaran jiwarayañatakit irpsunipxistasti? Janiw umasa, manq'as utjapkituti. ¡Aka jan sist'ayasir manq'ampix amjatäxapxtwa! —sasa." 
Numbers21:6 Ukat Tatitux mich'isir katarinak apayanïna, ukanakasti jupanakarux mich'intänwa; walja israelitanakaw jiwararakïna." 
Numbers21:7 Ukat jaqinakax Moisesan ukar sarasin jupar sapxäna: —¡Tatitumpitaki jumampitak arusisax jucha lurapxta! ¡Jumay Tatitur mayim aka katarinak apanukuñapataki! —sasa. Moisesasti israelitanakar juchapat pampachañapatakiw Tatitur mayïna," 
Numbers21:8 Tatitusti jupar sänwa: —Uka katarinak kipka mä katari lurasim, ukatsti mä wiphalan lawapar uk warkkatam. Maynitix katarin mich'intat uñjasinixa, uka warkkatat katarir uñtpan, ukatsti janiw jiwkaniti —sasa." 
Numbers21:9 Ukatsti Moisesax broncet mä katari luräna, ukatsti mä wiphalan lawaparuw warkkatäna, katarimpi mich'intayasiristi, broncet lurat katariruw uñtäna, ukat jan jiwkänti." 
Numbers21:10 Israelitanakax thakhinjam sarasipkakïnwa, ukatsti Obot sat chiqaruw puripxäna." 
Numbers21:11 Obot chiqat sartawayasinxa, Moab uraqit inti jalsu tuqiruw sarapxäna, ukatsti wasarankir Iié-abarim chiqan utjnuqtapxarakïna." 
Numbers21:12 Uka chiqat sartawayasinsti, Zéred sat uma jalsuruw utjnuqtapxäna." 
Numbers21:13 Uka chiqat sartawayasin Arnón jawir khurkataruw utjnuqtapxarakïna. Uka jawirax, wasarankiwa, Moab uraqimpi amorreonakan uraqipampi jaljaraki." 
Numbers21:14 Tatitun nuwasïwinakapa sat qillqatan ukxat saraki: “Vaheb chiqaw sarakipapxta, Sufá uraqi chiqa, Arnón jawiran jisk'a jawiranakapanjam sarapxta." 
Numbers21:15 Ar sat uraqir purki uka jisk'a jawiranak muytawayapxta, kawkïritix Moab uraqin qurpapkam purki ukakama” sasa." 
Numbers21:16 Arnón jawiratsti, israelitanakax kawkhankäntix phuch'ux ukkharuw puripxäna, kawkhantix Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna: “Markar tantachthapim, ukatsti nayaw uma churä” sasa." 
Numbers21:17 Ukürun israelitanakax akham jayllipxäna: “¡Phuch'ut umax jalspan! ¡Phuch'ur jayllipxam! 
Numbers21:18 ¡Jilïrinakan allit phuch'u, markan yäqat jilïrinakan thujrunakapamp jist'arat phuch'u!” sasa. Wasarat sartawayxasasti, israelitanakax Mataná chiqaw sarakipawayapxäna," 
Numbers21:19 Mataná chiqatxa, Nahaliel chiqaruw puripxäna, Nahaliel chiqatsti Bamot chiqaruw puripxäna," 
Numbers21:20 Bamot chiqatsti, Moab uraqinkir qhirwa chiqa sarakipapxäna, Pisgá sat qullu patar puriñkama, kawkhattix wasarax uñstki ukkharu." 
Numbers21:21 Israelitanakax jaqinak khithäna amorreonakan Sehón reyipar akham sañapataki: 
Numbers21:22 “Uraqim chiqa sarakipt'ayapxita. Janiw yapuchat yapunakamar mantapkäti, uva yapunakamsa taksupkäti, janirakiw umsa phuch'unakamat umt'apkäti. Thakhinjamak uraqim sarakipawayapxä” sasa." 
Numbers21:23 Ukampis Sehón reyix janiw israelitanakarux uraqipanjam sarakipayañ munkänti, jan ukasti, taqpach jaqinakapar tantacht'asin, wasararuw israelitanakar jikxatir mistunïna, Jahas chiqar purisinsti jupanakaruw nuwantäna." 
Numbers21:24 Ukampis israelitanakax sayt'asipxänwa, jupanakarux atipjapxarakïnwa, ukatsti uraqinakap katuntasipxäna, Arnón jawirata Jaboc sat jawirkama, amonitanakan uraqipampi qurpaski uka chiqkama, uka uraqisti suma uyuchrantatänwa." 
Numbers21:25 Ukhamaw israelitanakax amorreonakan taqi uka markanakap katuntasipxäna, uka markanakan utjantasipxarakïna, Hesbón markampina ukankir jisk'a markanakapampina." 
Numbers21:26 Amorreonakan Sihón sat reyipax Hesbón markan jakäna. Sihón reyix Moab uraqinkir nayrïr reyipampix nuwasiñankataynawa; ukatsti taqpach uka uraqi aparatayna, Arnón sat jawirkama." 
Numbers21:27 Ukat jayllirinakax sapxi: “¡Hesbón markar jutapxam, Sihón reyin markaparu! ¡Wasitat sayt'ayapxam, sum uyuchrantapxam!" 
Numbers21:28 Hesbón markatpacha, Sihón reyin markapatpacha, nakhantir ninax lawrsunïna, Moab uraqinkir Ar markar t'unjasa, Arnón jawiran qullunakap t'unjasa." 
Numbers21:29 ¡Moab marka, jachkañätawa! ¡Quemós diosan markapa, aynacht'atätawa! Jupax jaqinakamsa jaltayakiwa, warminakamsa Sihón reyin amparaparuw jalt'ayi." 
Numbers21:30 Hesbón markan ch'amapax t'unjatawa; Dibón uraqit Nófah uraqkamax laqayar tukutawa, Medebá chiqakamaw ninax purïna.”" 
Numbers21:31 Ukhamat israelitanakax amorreonakan uraqinakap katuntasipxäna. 
Numbers21:32 Moisesax Jazer marka uñaqayir khitharakïnwa. Israelitanakasti uka marka katuntasipxäna, uka jak'anakankir markanakampi, ukatsti ukan jakir amorreo jaqinakarux jaqunukupxänwa." 
Numbers21:33 Uka qhipatsti Basán uraqiruw sarxapxäna, ukampis Basán markan Og reyipax taqpach ejercitopampiw Edrei chiqar saräna jupanakamp nuwasiri." 
Numbers21:34 Ukapachaw Tatitux Moisesar säna: “Og reyir jan axsaramti, nayaw amparamar jupar katuyäma, taqpach ejercitoparu, markapamppacharu, jumasti kunjämtix Hesbón markan jakir amorreo Sihón reyir lurktaxa, uka pachparak luräta” sasa." 
Numbers21:35 Israelitanakax ukham Og reyimpiru, wawanakapampiru, ejercitopampiru, taqpach jaqinakapampiruw jiwarayäna. Janiw maynirus jakayapkänti, ukatsti uraqinakap katuntasipxäna." 
Numbers22:1 Israelitanakax thakhinjam sarasipkakïnwa, ukatsti Moab pampanakaruw purintapxäna, Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tuqiru, Jericó marka uñkatasiru." 
Numbers22:2 Sipor chachan Balac sat yuqapax Moab markan reyipänwa. Balac reyix kunjämtix israelitanakax amorreonakar lurkatayna ukanak yatïna. 
Numbers22:3 Israelitanakan waljanïpxatap uñjasax, Moab markankir jaqinakax axsarapxarakïnwa." 
Numbers22:4 Ukat Moab markankir jaqinakax, Madián markan jilïrinakapar jawsayasin sapxäna: “Israelitanakax kunatix utjkistu taqi ukanak tukjapxani, kunjämtix vacanakax pampanakan utjir ch'uxñanak tukuntki ukhama” sasa." 
Numbers22:5 Ukapachasti, Beor chachan Balaam sat yuqapax wila masinakapampiw Petor markan jakäna, uka markasti Éufrates jawir thiyankänwa. Balac reyisti markapan jilïrinakaparuw khithäna Balaamar akham sapxañapataki: “Egiptot jaltanxasin mä jach'a markax, nanakan uraqix jak'aruw purinti." 
Numbers22:6 Jichhpachay jutam, aka markar ñanqhachañataki, nanakat sipan juk'amp ch'amaniwa. Inampis ukhamat nayax jupanakar atipjirista, aka uraqitsa jupanakar alisnukurista. Nayax yattwa juman askinak arsutanakamasa, ñanqhachatamasa, phuqhasirïtapa” sasa." 
Numbers22:7 Ukatsti Moab, Madián markanakan jilïrinakapax qullqi apt'ataw sarapxäna, israelitanakar ñanqhachatat churañataki, Balaam jak'ar purisasti, Balac reyin arunakap yatiyapxäna." 
Numbers22:8 Balaamasti jupanakar sänwa: —Jichha arumax akar qhiparapxam, nayasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw yatiyxapxäma. Moab markankir jilïrinakasti jupampiw qhiparapxäna." 
Numbers22:9 Uka arumasti Tatitux Balaam chachar uñstasin, jupar jiskt'äna: —¿Khitinakarak jumamp chikäki uka jaqinakasti? —sasa." 
Numbers22:10 Balaamasti sänwa: —Moab markat jutapxi; Balac reyin khithanakapawa. 
Numbers22:11 Reyiw jupanakarux akar khithanitayna, reyisti nayan sarañax muni, Egiptot jaltanir mä markxar nayan ñanqhachañaxataki. Uka markasti Moab marka jak'aruw purintatayna, reyisti uraqipat jupanakar jaqunukuñ muni —sasa." 
Numbers22:12 Tatitusti Balaamarux sänwa: —Jan jupanakamp chik saramti, janirak uka markar ñanqhachamsa, uka markarusti nayaw askinakamp phuqt'ta —sasa." 
Numbers22:13 Qhipärmanthisti Balaamax sartasisin, Balac reyin khithanit jilïrinakaparuw yatiyxäna: —Markamar kuttxapxam. Janiw Tatitux jumanakampi chika sarañax munkiti —sasa." 
Numbers22:14 Moab uraqit jutir jilïrinakasti Balac reyin ukaruw kuttawayxapxäna, juparusti sapxänwa: —Balaamax janiw nanakamp chik jutañ munkiti —sasa." 
Numbers22:15 Ukampis Balac reyix mayamp yaqha jilïrinak khithaskakïnwa, jichhasti waljaniru, nayrïrinakat sipan juk'amp yäqat jilïrinakaru." 
Numbers22:16 Jupanakasti Balaam thiyar purisinxa sapxänwa: —Sipor chachan Balac yuqapax jumar sistamwa: “Jutakimaya, janikiy ‘janiw’ sistati." 
Numbers22:17 Nayaw wali jach'añchäwinak churäma, maykität uksa nayax phuqhäwa; aka markar ñanqhachañatak jutakimaya” sasa." 
Numbers22:18 Ukampis, Balaamax jupanakar sänwa: —Balac reyix qullqini, qurini phuqhantat reyi utapsa churaskitaspa ukkhas nayax janiw jupan mayitap lurkiristti. Janiw nayax Diosaxan arsutapar ch'urkhiskiristti." 
Numbers22:19 Ukampis jumanakax akan jichhärmax qhiparapxam, kunxay Tatitux luram sischitani —sasa." 
Numbers22:20 Uka arumasti, Tatitux Balaamar uñstasin akham sarakïna: —Uka jaqinakatix jumar irptir jutapxchi ukaxa, jupanakamp chik saram, ukampis kuntix nayax siskäma ukak luräta —sasa." 
Numbers22:21 Qhipürusti, Balaamax willjtat sartasïna, ukatsti sarañatak qachu asnop karunt'asinxa moabita jilïrinakamp chikaw saräna." 
Numbers22:22 Balaamax qachu asnopar lat'xatataw saräna, pani uywatapaw jupamp chik sarapxarakïna. Ukampis Tatitux wal jupatakix q'apisïna, uka jilïrinakamp chik saratapata. Ukat Tatitun angelapax jupa nayraqatan thakhin sayantasïna jan saraskakiñapataki." 
Numbers22:23 Qachu asnosti Tatitun angelapar espadas ayt'asit chika thakhin sayt'at uñjasaxa, thakhit maysaruw saranuküna, yaqha tuqinjam sarasa; ukampis Balaamax wal asnorux jawq'jäna, thakhir kuttayaniñataki." 
Numbers22:24 Ukxarusti Tatitun angelapax mä k'ullk'u chiqaruw sayt'asïna, thakhix uva yapu taypinjam saräna, ukasti purap tuqit qalamp pirqantatänwa." 
Numbers22:25 Asnox Tatitun angelapar uñjasax, maysa pirqa tuqiruw liwkattäna, Balaaman kayup usuchjasa. Ukat Balaamax wasitat asnor jawq'jäna." 
Numbers22:26 Ukatsti Tatitun angelapax jupanakat nayrst'asinxa, mä k'ullk'u chiqaruw sayt'asïna, ukawjat janiw kawksarus saranukuñjamäkänti." 
Numbers22:27 Qachu asnosti Tatitun angelapar uñjasax, uraqiruw liwitattäna. Ukat Balaamax q'apisisin, asnorux mä lawampiw jawq'jäna." 
Numbers22:28 Ukapachaw Tatitux qachu asnor parlayäna, asnosti Balaamarux sänwa: —¿Kunarak jumar kamächsmasti? Akampix kimsa kutiw nayar jawq'jista —sasa." 
Numbers22:29 Balaamasti sänwa: —Jumax nayat phiskasiskistaxa, mä cuchillotix amparaxan utjitaspaxa, anchhitpachaw jiwayirisma —sasa." 
Numbers22:30 Ukampis asnox sänwa: —¡Taqi jakäwiman nayax jumar khumunaqsma, uksti sum yattaxa, janiw nayax kunapachas qallkatirïksmati! —sasa. Balaamax sarakïnwa. —Ukax chiqawa —sasa." 
Numbers22:31 Ukapachaw Tatitux Balaaman nayrap jist'ari, Balaamasti Tatitun angelapar espadas ayt'at thakhin uñjäna. Ukat jupax ajanup uraqir puriyañkam alt'äna." 
Numbers22:32 Tatitun angelapasti juparux sänwa: —¿Kunatarak qachu asnomar kimsa kuti jawq'jtasti? Nayaw jumar thakhit jark'antsma, Moab markar saratamax janiw nayatak walïkiti." 
Numbers22:33 Asnox nayar uñjituwa, ukat kimsa kuti thakhit saranuku. Janitix ukham maysar saranukkasapänxa, nayax niyaw jumarux jiwayiriskasamäna, ukampis asnorux janiw jiwaykiriskäyätti —sasa." 
Numbers22:34 Balaamasti Tatitun angelaparux sänwa: —Nayax juch lurta, janiw yatkäyätti juman uka chiqan thakhi jist'antaskatama. Jumatix Moab markar sarañax jan munkstaxa, jichhpachaw utaxar kuttawayxä —sasa." 
Numbers22:35 Tatitun angelapasti sänwa: —Uka jaqinakamp chik saraskakim, ukampis kuntix nayax siskäma ukak parlarakïta —sasa. Ukatsti Balaamax Balac reyin khithanit jilïrinakamp chikaw saräna," 
Numbers22:36 Balac reyisti Balaaman jutaskatap yatisinxa, Moab uraqinkir mä markaruw katuqir mistuwayäna, Arnón jawir thiyaru, marka qurpäkis uka chiqaru," 
Numbers22:37 Balac reyisti Balaamarux sänwa: —Nayax walja kutiw jutañamatak jawsaysma; ¿kunatarak jan juttasti? ¿Janit nayasti jumar wali yäqañampi uñjkirismasti? —sasa. 
Numbers22:38 Balaamasti sarakïnwa: —Akaxay, nayax akanktwa. Ukampis nayax kuntix Diosax siskitani ukak arsü —sasa." 
Numbers22:39 Ukatsti Balaamax Quiriat-husot tuqiruw Balac reyimp chik saräna. 
Numbers22:40 Ukansti Balac reyix urqu vacanakampi, ovejanakampi wilañcha luqtäna, ukatsti Balaamampitaki, uka jilïrinakampitakiw jach'a manq'äwi luräna." 
Numbers22:41 Qhipärmanthisti, Balac reyix Balaamaruw Bamot-baal sat qullur irpkatäna, ukawjat israelitanakan campamentopax maysa thiypachaw uñstäna." 
Numbers23:1 Ukapachaw Balaamax Balac reyir säna: —Aka chiqar paqallqu altaranak sayt'ayarapita, ukatsti paqallqu vaca qallumpi, paqallqu urqu ovejampi wakicharapita —sasa." 
Numbers23:2 Balac reyisti Balaaman aruparjamaw luräna, ukatsti panpachaniw sapaqat altarxar mä vaca qallumpi, mä urqu ovejampi wilañcha luqtapxäna." 
Numbers23:3 Ukxarusti Balaamax Balac reyir sänwa: —Jumax wilañcha luqtat jak'an qhiparam. Nayasti Tatitun jutañap suyañaxawa, kuntix lurañaxäki uk sarakitani —sasa. Ukapachasti Balaamax mä ch'usawja pata chiqaruw saräna." 
Numbers23:4 Jupan uka chiqankañapkamasti, Diosaw jupar uñstäna. Ukat Balaamax Tatitur säna: —Jumar jach'añchasaw paqallqu altaranak sayt'ayta, ukatsti sapa altarxan mä vaca qallumpi, mä urqu ovejampi waxt'a luqtta —sasa." 
Numbers23:5 Tatitusti uka pachax, Balaaman lakapar kuntix parlañapäki uka arunak uchäna, jupar sarakïnwa: —Balac reyin ukar kutt'am, juparusti kuntix sisksma uka pachpa arunak yatiyam —sasa." 
Numbers23:6 Balaamasti kutt'xasina, Balac reyir wilañcha luqta jak'an sayt'at jikxatäna, moabita jilïr jaqinakamp chika." 
Numbers23:7 Ukapachaw Balaamax aka arunak arsüna: “Inti jalsu tuqi qullunakata, Aram chiqatpach Balac sat Moab markan reyipax jutayitu. ‘Jutam, Israelar ñanqhacharapita’ situwa, ‘Jacobun markapatak jan walinak mayirakim’ sasa." 
Numbers23:8 ¿Kamisarak nayasti, Diosax jan ñanqhachki ukar ñanqhachästi? ¿Kamisarak jan walir puriñapatak mayïsti, Tatitux jan lurki uksti?" 
Numbers23:9 Aka jach'a qarqanak patat uñjta, aka quntu patanakat uñtarakta; yaqhachat markaw jakasi, janiw yaqha markanakjamäkisa." 
Numbers23:10 Jupanakax laq'ar uñtatawa; ¿khitirak jupanakar jakt'aspasti? ¿Khitirak qawqhätapsa yatirakispasti? ¡Nayax uka aski jaqinakjam jiwañ munirista, tukuy urunakaxas jupanakan tukuyapjamarakïspa!” sasa." 
Numbers23:11 Uk ist'asasti, Balac reyix Balaamar sänwa: —¿Kunarak lurasktasti? Nayax uñisirinakaxar ñanqhachiriw irpansma, jumasti jichhax aski arunak jupanakatak arsuraptaxa —sasa." 
Numbers23:12 Balaamasti sänwa: —Tatitux nayan arsuñax munki uka arunakak saskta —sasa. 
Numbers23:13 Ukampis Balac reyix saskakïnwa: —Jutam, yaqha chiqar sarañäni, ukawjat inas jupanakat mä juk'aniruk uñjasin ñanqhachañ munchisma —sasa." 
Numbers23:14 Ukatsti Balac reyix Sofim chiqaruw Balaamar irpäna, Pisgá sat qullu pataru. Uka patansti paqallqu altaranak sayt'ayäna, sapaqat altarxan mä vaca qallumpi, mä urqu ovejampi wilañcha luqtäna." 
Numbers23:15 Ukatsti Balaamax Balac reyir sänwa: —Jumax akan suyt'ita, altaranak jak'ana, ukchañkamasti nayax Tatitump jikisiriw sarä —sasa." 
Numbers23:16 Tatitusti Balaamar uñstasin, kuntix arsuñapäkän uka arunak yatiyäna, juparusti sarakïnwa: —Balac reyin ukar kutt'am, juparusti kuntix sisksma uka pachpa arunak säta —sasa." 
Numbers23:17 Balaamasti kutt'xasina, Balac reyir wilañcha luqta jak'an sayt'at jikxatäna, moabita jilïr jaqinakamp chika. Ukapachaw Balac reyix Balaamar jiskt'äna: —¿Tatitux kamstamsa? —sasa." 
Numbers23:18 Balaamasti aka arunak arsüna: “Balac, Sipor chachan yuqapa, sum ist'ita." 
Numbers23:19 Tatitux janiw jiwir jaqinakjamäkiti: janiw k'ariskiti, janirakiw amuyt'äwip mayjt'aykisa. Jupax arsutaparjam lurapuniwa. Jupax arsutap phuqhapuniwa." 
Numbers23:20 Tatituw markapatak aski arunak arsuyitu; Tatituw ukham arsu, janiw nayax jupar jark'kiristti." 
Numbers23:21 Tatitux Israel markan reyipawa. Jupax markap taypin jakaski. Tatitux janiw jupanakan jan walt'añap munkiti, janiw jupanakar ñanqhsa lurañ munkiti." 
Numbers23:22 Tatituw markaparux Egiptot qhispiyani, búfalo animalan ch'amapat sipan wali ch'amampi." 
Numbers23:23 Tatitun markapar ñanqhachañatakix janiw layqasiñanakax kunäkisa. ¡Uñtapxam qawqha muspharkañ luräwinaksa Tatitux markap layku luri! 
Numbers23:24 Aka markax axsarkañ leonar uñtataw sartasi, katjatapar manq'antañkamax janiw samarkaniti, uñisirinakapar atipjat uñjañkamax janiw samarkaniti” sasa." 
Numbers23:25 Ukapachaw Balac reyix Balaamar sarakïna: —¡Janitix aka markar ñanqhachirjamäkstaxa, janirakiy aski arunak jupanakatak arsumtixa! —sasa." 
Numbers23:26 Ukxaruw Balaamax sarakïna: —¿Janit nayasti sisksma, kuntix Tatitux siskitani ukak lurä sasasti? —sasa." 
Numbers23:27 Ukat Balac reyix jupar säna: —Jutam, yaqha chiqawjaruw irpäma. Inas Tatitux uka chiqawjatpach israelitanakar ñanqhachayiristam —sasa." 
Numbers23:28 Ukhamaw Balac reyix Balaamar irpäna, Peor sat qullu pataru, kawkhattix wasarax taqpach uñstki ukawjaru." 
Numbers23:29 Ukan Balaamax Balac reyir säna: —Aka chiqan paqallqu altaranak sayt'ayarapita, ukatsti paqallqu vaca qallumpi, paqallqu urqu ovejamp wakicht'arapita —sasa." 
Numbers23:30 Balac reyisti Balaaman aruparjamaw luräna, ukatsti sapa altaran mä vaca qallumpi, mä urqu ovejampi wilañcha luqtäna." 
Numbers24:1 Israel markar jach'añchañax Tatitur kusisiyatap Balaamax uñjäna, ukat jupax jan kuns lurkxänti Tatitun jupar uñstañapataki, kunjämtix walja kutinak lurkatayna ukhama, jan ukasti, jupax wasar tuqirukiw uñtäna." 
Numbers24:2 Balaamax Israel markarux ayllunakapatkam utjnuqtat uñjäna, ukhamaruw Tatitun ajayupax jupxar jutäna," 
Numbers24:3 ukapachasti Balaamax aka arunak arsüna: “Balaaman arunakapawa, Beor chachan yuqapa; qhan arsur chachan arunakapawa." 
Numbers24:4 Tatitun arunakap ist'irin arunakapawa, Taqi ch'amanin unañchäwinakap yatirin arunakapawa, ajayunkki ukapacha unañchäwinak uñjirin arunakapawa." 
Numbers24:5 ¡Jacob, chhujllanakamax wali sumanakawa! ¡Israel, utjnuqäwimax sumapuniwa!" 
Numbers24:6 Walja siqintat palmeranakar uñtatawa, jawir lakanakan utjir panqaranakar uñtatawa, Tatitun ayruntat áloe panqaranakar uñtatawa, ¡uma thiyanakan alir cedro quqanakar uñtatawa!" 
Numbers24:7 Israel markax jilarkir umanïniwa, yapunakap qarpañataki, umt'añataki. Reyipax Agag reyiruw atipjani; marka apnaqäwipax jach'aptaniwa." 
Numbers24:8 Tatituw jupanakar Egipto markat irpsunïna, búfalo animalan ch'amapar uñtat ch'amampi. Israel markax uñisir markanakaruw t'unjani; mich'inakapampiw usuchjani ch'akhanakap p'akirarakini." 
Numbers24:9 Samarañatak winkt'aski uka leonar uñtata ukhamätaw jumax, Israel. ¡Janiw khitis sartayañ yant'kaspati! ¡Jumar jach'añchirix, jach'añchataw uñjasini, jumar ñanqhachirix, ñanqhachataw uñjasini!” sasa." 
Numbers24:10 Uk ist'asinsti, Balac reyix walpun Balaamatak phiñasïna, amparanakap t'axllisisaw jupar säna: —Nayax uñisirinakaxar ñanqhachayiriw jumar jawsaysma, jumasti kimsa kutiw jupanakar jach'añchtaxa." 
Numbers24:11 ¡Jichhpach utamar sarxam! Nayax jumar walja churäwinak churañ arsüyäta, ukampis Tatituw jan ukham lurasiñap munkiti —sasa." 
Numbers24:12 Balaamasti ukxaruw sarakïna: —Nayax khithanit jaqinakamar sistwa: 
Numbers24:13 “Balac reyix qullqini, qurini phuqhantat reyi utap churkitaspa ukkhas nayax janiw jupan mayitap lurkiristti. ¡Janiw nayax Tatitun arsutapar ch'urkhiskiristti! Kuntix Tatitux nayar siskitani ukakpun arsuskä” sasa." 
Numbers24:14 Jichhax markaxar kuttawayxä, ukampis janïr sarkasin, kuntix akat qhipar Israel markax markamar lurkan uk arsuwayä —sasa." 
Numbers24:15 Ukapachaw Balaamax aka arunak arsüna: “Balaaman arunakapawa, Beor chachan yuqapa, qhan uñjir chachan arunakapa." 
Numbers24:16 Tatitun arunakap ist'irin arunakapawa, Alaxpachankirin amtäwip uñt'irin arunakapawa; Taqi ch'amanin unañchäwinakap uñjirin arunakapawa, ajayunkkasin unañchäwinak uñjirin arunakapawa." 
Numbers24:17 Tatitux uñacht'aykitu ukax janïräkiwa; ukax akat qhiparüskaniwa. Israelan mä reyiw sartani, jupasti mä warawarar uñtataw k'ajani. Jupaw Moab markarux p'iqit takxatani, Set chachan saraqirinakapar taqpachanir pampachjani." 
Numbers24:18 Edom markaruw katuntani, Seír uñisiripax atipjataw uñjasini. Israel markax jach'a luräwinak lurani." 
Numbers24:19 Jacobun markapat mä atipjiriw sayt'ani, jupaw markan qhiparirinakar t'unjani” sasa." 
Numbers24:20 Uka arunak sasinsti, Balaamax Amalec uraqi tuqir uñtasaw aka arunak arsüna: “Amalec markax wali ch'aman markawa; taqpach markanakat sipan wali ch'amaniwa, ukampis q'ala t'unjataw uñjasini” sasa." 
Numbers24:21 Ukhamarakiw Balaamax quenitanakar uñtasax aka arunak arsüna: “Caín chachan saraqirinakapa: utjäwinakamax suma chiqar sayt'atäskpansa, utanakamax qarqanak taypir utachatäskpansa, uka utanakamax ninampi t'unjataw uñjasini, Asiria markax katuntapkätam ukapachaxa” sasa." 
Numbers24:22  
Numbers24:23 Tukuyañatakisti, Balaamax wasitat arsüna: “¡Ay, kunakïkan jakir jaqinakatxa, Tatitux taqi akanak lurkan ukapachaxa!" 
Numbers24:24 Chipre quta thiyanakatpach barconakax jutani, Asiria, Éber markanakaruw tukjani, Éber markas t'unjatarakïniwa” sasa." 
Numbers24:25 Uka qhipat Balaamax utapar kuttawayxäna, Balac reyisti thakhipanjam sarxarakïna." 
Numbers25:1 Israelitanakax Sitim chiqan utjantasipkän ukapachasti, chachanakax moabita warminakampiw wachuq jucha lurañ qalltapxäna," 
Numbers25:2 uka warminakasti diosanakapar wilañchanak luqtäwiruw jupanakarux jawsapxäna. Israelitanakax uka manq'äwinakapat manq'apxäna, moabitanakan diosanakapatakiw killt'asipxäna," 
Numbers25:3 ukhamat jupanakax Baal-peor sat diosar yupaychañatak arkapxäna. Ukat Tatitux Israel markatak q'apisïna," 
Numbers25:4 Moisesarusti sarakïnwa: —Markan taqpach jilïrinakapar tantachthapim, ukatsti nayraqataxan urpach jiwarayam. Ukhamat q'apisiñaxax Israel markatak t'akurani —sasa." 
Numbers25:5 Ukspachaw Moisesax Israelan taripirinakap thiya saräna, jupanakarusti sänwa: —Sapa mayniw jumanakax ayllunakamankirinakar, khitinakatix Baal-peor diosatak killt'asipki uka chachanakar jiwarayapxañama —sasa. Ukatsti ukhampun lurapxäna." 
Numbers25:6 Ukampis Moisesampi israelitanakampix qullan utjäwir mantañan jacht'asisa jikxatasipkän ukchañkamasti, mä israelita jaqix chujllaparuw mä madianita warmir jupanakan uñjkat irpantasiskäna." 
Numbers25:7 Uk uñjasinsti, Finees chachax, Eleazaran yuqapa, Aarón sacerdoten allchhipax, maysar jithiqtawayasaw, mä lanza aptasin," 
Numbers25:8 uka israelitan chhujllapar saräna, ukat lanzapamp uka israelit jaqimpiru, madianita warmimpirux purakat jununtasin jiwayäna. Ukhamat Tatitun mutuyäwipax Israel markatak tukusïna." 
Numbers25:9 Ukkhakamasti jiwaratanakax pä tunka pusin waranqa jaqinakänwa. 
Numbers25:10 Ukatsti Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: 
Numbers25:11 —Finees chachaw israelitanakatak q'apisitax apaqitu, jupax nayan aytat kankañax waqaychi, ukat nayax israelitanakar q'apisiñaxan atipat jan taqpach jiwaraykti." 
Numbers25:12 Jichhasti juparux samaya, nayax jupamp sumankañ arust'äwi lurta," 
Numbers25:13 ukat jupampiru, wawanakapampirux sacerdote luräwi wiñayatak katuyta, nayan aytat kankañax waqaychatap layku, ukhamarak israelitanakatak jucha luratat pampachäwi jikxatatap layku —sasa." 
Numbers25:14 Khiti israelita jaqitix madianita warmimpi chik jiwayat uñjaskän jupax Zimrí sutinïnwa, jupasti Salú chachan yuqapänwa, Simeón ayllunkir wila masi taman jilïriparakïnwa." 
Numbers25:15 Madianita warmisti Cozbí satänwa, jupasti Sur chachan phuchhapänwa, Madián markankir aytat wila masipan jilïripa." 
Numbers25:16 Uka qhipatsti, Tatitux Moisesar sänwa:" 
Numbers25:17 —Madianita jaqinakar nuwantapxam, jupanakar atipjapxam," 
Numbers25:18 kunjämtix jupanakax jumanakar nuwantapktam k'ari luräwinakamp Baal-peor diosar yupaychayasa, ukhamarak madianita jilïrin Cozbí phuchhapan lanzamp jununtas jiwayatätapatsa, ukasti Baal-peor diosar yupaychapxatam layku mutuyäwi apayankta ukapachaw ukham lurasïna." 
Numbers25:19 Uka jaqinak jiwarat qhipatsti," 
Numbers26:1 Tatitux Moisesampiru, Aarón sacerdoten Eleazar yuqapampiruw parläna, akham sasa:" 
Numbers26:2 —Jaqinak jakthapipxam, wila masitkama, pä tunk maranit amstaru, nuwasïwirus sarirjamäpki taqi uka israelitanakaru —sasa." 
Numbers26:3 Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempisti Moab pampanakana, Jordán jawir jak'ana, Jericó marka uñkatasin jikxatasipkän ukapachaw israelitanakar sapxäna," 
Numbers26:4 taqinin qillqayasipxañapataki, pä tunka maranit amstaru, Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjama. Egiptot mistunipkatayna, ukatsti qillqantatäpkän taqi uka israelita jaqinakax akanakänwa:" 
Numbers26:5 Rubén chachan wawanakapa, Jacobun tayna yuqapana, Henoc, Falú," 
Numbers26:6 Hesrón, Carmí jupanakänwa;" 
Numbers26:7 jakthapitarjamasti, Rubén chachan saraqirinakapax pusi tunka kimsan waranqa paqallq pataka kimsa tunkan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:8 Falú chachax mä wawanikïnwa, Eliab sutini," 
Numbers26:9 Eliab chachasti kimsa wawanïnwa: Nemuel, Datán, Abiram sutininaka. Datán, Abiram jupanakax, Coré chachan tamapar jaqkattirinakänwa, jupanakasti Tatitumpitaki, Moisesampitaki, Aaronampitakiw sayt'asipxäna." 
Numbers26:10 Ukampis uraqiw jist'artasin jupanak paniniru, Coré chachampir manq'antäna, tamapankirinakasti taqpachaniw jiwaräna, pä patak phisqa tunka jaqinakaw ninan jiwarapxäna. Ukasti markan waniñapatakiw ukham lurasïna." 
Numbers26:11 Coré chachan wawanakapakiw jan jiwapkänti. 
Numbers26:12 Simeón chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan wawanakapax Nemuel, Jamín, Jaquín," 
Numbers26:13 Zérah, Saúl, jupanakänwa;" 
Numbers26:14 jakthapitarjamasti, Simeón chachan saraqirinakapax pä tunka payan waranqa pä patakan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:15 Gad chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan wawanakapax Sefón, Haguí, Suní," 
Numbers26:16 Ozní, Erí," 
Numbers26:17 Arod, Arelí jupanakänwa;" 
Numbers26:18 jakthapitarjamasti, Gad chachan saraqirinakapax pusi tunk waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:19 Judá chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan wawanakapax Er, Onán, Selá, Fares, Zérah jupanakänwa. Er, Onán jupanakax Canaán uraqin jiwarapxäna, ukat jupanakax jan jakhutäpkänti." 
Numbers26:20  
Numbers26:21 Fares chachax pä wawanïnwa: Hesrón, Hamul jupanaka;" 
Numbers26:22 jakthapitarjamasti, Judá chachan saraqir wawanakapax paqallq tunka suxtan waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:23 Isacar chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan wawanakapax Tolá, Puvá," 
Numbers26:24 Jasub, Simrón jupanakänwa;" 
Numbers26:25 jakthapitarjamasti, Isacar chachan saraqirinakapax suxta tunka pusin waranqa kimsa patakan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:26 Zabulón chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan wawanakapax Séred, Elón, Jahleel jupanakänwa;" 
Numbers26:27 jakthapitarjamasti, Zabulón chachan saraqirinakapax suxta tunka waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:28 José chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan wawanakapax Manasés, Efraín jupanakänwa." 
Numbers26:29 Manasés chachax mä wawanikïnwa: Maquir sutini. Maquir chachasti mä wawanikirakïnwa: Galaad sutini; 
Numbers26:30 Galaad chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan wawanakapax Iéser, Hélec," 
Numbers26:31 Asriel, Siquem," 
Numbers26:32 Semidá, Héfer, jupanakänwa." 
Numbers26:33 Héfer chachax mä wawanikïnwa Selofhad sutini. Selofhad chachax janiw yuqall wawanïkänti, jan ukasti imill wawanakapakiw utjäna, sutinakapasti: Mahlá, Noá, Hoglá, Milcá, Tirsá jupanakänwa." 
Numbers26:34 Jakthapitarjamasti, Manasés chachan saraqirinakapax phisqa tunka payan waranqa paqallq patakan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:35 Efraín chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan wawanakapax Sutélah, Béquer, Tahán jupanakänwa." 
Numbers26:36 Sutélah sat chachan saraqirinakapax Erán sat wila masi tamankirïnwa. 
Numbers26:37 Jakthapitarjamasti, Efraín chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan wawanakapax kimsa tunka payan waranqa phisqa patakan chachanakänwa. Taqi jupanakampi, Manasés ayllunkirinakampix José chachat saraqirinakapänwa." 
Numbers26:38 Benjamín chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakax Bela, Asbel, Ahiram," 
Numbers26:39 Sufam, Hufam jupanakänwa." 
Numbers26:40 Bela chachax pä wawanïnwa: Ard, Naamán jupanaka." 
Numbers26:41 Jakthapitarjamasti, Benjamín chachan saraqirinakapax pusi tunka phisqan waranqa suxta patakan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:42 Dan chachat saraqirinakax Suham sat wila masi tamankirïnwa. 
Numbers26:43 Jakthapitarjamasti, Suham chachan saraqirinakapax suxta tunka pusin waranqa pusi patakan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:44 Aser chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakax Imná, Isví, Beriá jupanakänwa." 
Numbers26:45 Beriá chachax pä wawanïnwa: Heber, Malquiel jupanaka." 
Numbers26:46 Aser chachax mä imill wawanirakïnwa, Sérah sutini." 
Numbers26:47 Jakthapitarjamasti, Aser chachan saraqirinakapax phisqa tunka kimsan waranqa pusi patakan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:48 Neftalí chachat saraqir wila masi tamanakan wawanakapax Jahseel, Guní," 
Numbers26:49 Jezer, Silem jupanakänwa." 
Numbers26:50 Jakthapitarjamasti, Neftalí chachan saraqirinakapax pusi tunka phisqan waranqa pusi patakan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:51 Jakthapitarjamasti, israelitanakax suxta patak mayan waranqa paqallqu patak kimsa tunkan chachanakänwa." 
Numbers26:52 Tatitux Moisesar wasitat parlxayäna, juparusti sarakïnwa:" 
Numbers26:53 “Taqi aka jaqinakaruw uraqinak lakintäta, qawqha jaqinakatix qillqantatäki ukhamarjama." 
Numbers26:54 Waljanïki uka tamanakarux jilpach uraqi churäta; juk'anïki uka tamanakarusti jisk'a uraqik churarakïta. Sapaqat tamaruw jakthapitarjam uraqix churasini. 
Numbers26:55 Uraqinak lakiñasti suertet wakt'atarjamäniwa. Sapaqat mayniw tunu awkit saraqir ayllunkiritjam uraqip katuqani. 
Numbers26:56 Uraqinak lakintañax suertetjamaw wakt'ani, ayllunkiritjama, wila masi tamankiritjama” sasa." 
Numbers26:57 Leví chachat saraqir wila masinakarux jakthapipxarakïnwa, Leví chachax kimsa wawanïnwa: Guersón, Quehat, Merarí jupanaka. Ukhamat kimsa wila masi tamanak utjayapxäna; uka tamanakatsti, yaqha phisqa wila masi tamanakaw uñstäna: Libní, Hebrón, Quehat, Mahlí, Musí jupanaka. Quehat chachax mä wawanikïnwa, Amram sutini." 
Numbers26:58  
Numbers26:59 Amram chachax Leví chachan mä phuchhapampiw jaqichasïna, jupasti Jocabed satänwa. Uka phuchhapasti kunapachatix Leví chachax Egiptonkaskän ukapachaw yuritayna. Amram chachampi, Jocabed warmimpix pä yuqall wawani, mä imill wawanïpxänwa: Aarón, Moisés, María jupanaka." 
Numbers26:60 Aarón chachax pusi wawanïnwa: Nadab, Abihú, Itamar, Eleazar jupanaka." 
Numbers26:61 Ukampis Nadab chachampi, Abihú chachampix, Tatitun iwxt'apar jan ist'as incienso luqtapxatap laykuw jiwarapxäna." 
Numbers26:62 Leví chachat saraqir taqpach yuqall wawanakapax mä phaxsinit amstarux, pä tunka kimsan waranqanïnwa. Jupanakasti janiw israelitanak taypin jakhutäkänti, uraqix jupanakar jan churatätap layku." 
Numbers26:63 Taqi ukanakänwa Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempi jakthapipkän uka israelita jaqinakat jakthapitanakaxa, kunapachatix Moab pampanakana, Jordán jawir jak'ana, Jericó marka uñkatasin jikxatasipkän ukapacha." 
Numbers26:64 Uka jakthapitanak taypinsti, janiw maynis utjkänti, Moisesampi, Aaronampix jaqinak nayrïr kutin Sinaí wasaran jakthapipkän uka jaqinakatxa." 
Numbers26:65 Jupanakax taqpachaniw wasaran Tatitun mutuyäwip katuqas jiwarxapxatayna. Caleb chachampi, Josué chachampikiw qhiparäna." 
Numbers27:1 Manasés ayllun phisqa imill wawanakaw utjäna, sutinakapasti Mahlá, Noá, Hoglá, Milcá, Tirsá jupanakänwa. Jupanakasti Selofhad sat chachan imill wawanakapänwa, Héfer, Galaad, Maquir, Manasés, José uka chachanakat saraqirinakarakïnwa." 
Numbers27:2 Mä urusti, uka phisqa kullakanakax qullan utjäwi mantañaruw sarapxäna, Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempi, markan jilïrinakapampi, taqpach israelitanakamp parlañataki. Ukat jupanakar sapxäna:" 
Numbers27:3 —Nanakan awkixax wasaran jiwxi, jupasti janiw Tatitutak sayt'asir Coré chachan tamapankirïkänti. Jupax pachpa juchap laykuw jiwaski, janirakiw yuqall wawanak jaytawaykiti." 
Numbers27:4 Janiw askïkiti awkixan jan yuqall wawanïtap layku sutipan wila masi tamapat chhaqtañapaxa. Ukhamax awkixan jilanakap taypir mä uraq nanakar churapxita —sasa. 
Numbers27:5 Moisesasti uka warminakan mayitanakap Tatituruw yatiyäna," 
Numbers27:6 Tatitusti jupar sänwa: 
Numbers27:7 “Selofhad chachan phuchhanakapax walik arsusipki. Awkipan jilanakap taypin utjir uraq churam, awkipan tutip jupanak katuqpan." 
Numbers27:8 Israelitanakar sarakim: maynitix jan yuqall wawani jiwxani ukkhax, uka jaqin tutipax imill wawaparuw churatäxani;" 
Numbers27:9 janitix kuna imill wawapas utjkani ukkhasti, jilanakaparuw tutip jaytawayxani;" 
Numbers27:10 janitix jilanakapas utjkan ukkhax, awkipan jilanakaparuw tutip jaytxani." 
Numbers27:11 Awkipantix jan kuna jilapas utjkan ukkhasti, jak'a wila masiparuw tutip jaytxani. Aka kamachisti taqpach israelitanakatakiwa, kunjämtix nayax jumar sisksma ukhamarjama.”" 
Numbers27:12 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: —Abarim qullur makhatam, israelitanakar nayax churkta uka uraqi ukawjatpach uñatatam." 
Numbers27:13 Uka uraq uñatatasinsti, jiwxätawa, ukatsti nayra awkinakamampiw tantachasxäta, Aarón jilamjama," 
Numbers27:14 jumanak paninix Sin sat wasaran nayar jan jaysapkistati, markax nayatak sartkän ukapacha, janirakiw jumanakax uma mayipkän ukkhax jupanak nayraqatan jach'añchapkistati, —sasa. (Akasti Cadés chiqankir Meribá uma jalsut parli, Sin wasarana)." 
Numbers27:15 Moisesasti Tatitur sänwa: 
Numbers27:16 —Tatitu Diosay, jumaw taqi jaqinakarus jakañ churtaxa, markaman nayraqatap sarañapatak mä jilïr utt'ayam, jupasti taqi chiqanjam irparakpan, jupanakan jan awatirin tamar uñtat jan sarnaqasipkañapataki —sasa." 
Numbers27:17  
Numbers27:18 Tatitusti Moisesarux sarakïnwa: —Josué sat Nun chachan yuqapar irpanim, jupax suma chuyman jaqiwa. Jupar amparamamp luqxatam," 
Numbers27:19 ukat Eleazar sacerdoten nayraqatapar irpam, taqpach markan nayraqataparu, ukatsti taqi jupanak nayraqatan lurañap katuyäta;" 
Numbers27:20 jumasti jilïr kankañamat jupar churäta, taqpach Israel markan jupar jaysañapataki." 
Numbers27:21 Josué chachax Eleazar sacerdoten nayraqataparuw uñstañapa, Eleazarasti Urim tuqiw sutipxar nayar jiskt'itani. Josué chachaw israelitanakar apnaqani taqi kuna lurañanakapansa —sasa." 
Numbers27:22 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw luräna. Josué chachar irptawayasinxa, Eleazar sacerdoten nayraqataparuw irpkatäna, taqpach marka nayraqatampiru." 
Numbers27:23 Ukatsti, Tatitun arsutaparjamaw amparapamp p'iqipxar luqxatasin lurañap churxäna." 
Numbers28:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw säna: 
Numbers28:2 “Israelitanakar parlam, jupanakar sarakim: wakisit uruyañanakan, jan armt'asis nayar luqtapxitpan, t'ant'ampi, nakt'ayat waxt'anakampi, nayatak suma q'apkir waxt'a luqtanaka." 
Numbers28:3 “Jupanakar sarakim: nayar jach'añchasaw nakt'ayapxañapa aka waxt'anaka: Sapüruw mä maran pä urqu oveja nakt'ayat wilañcha luqtapxani, uka uywasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers28:4 Willjta tuqirux maya luqtapxani, mayïrsti jayp'thapiruw luqtapxarakini." 
Numbers28:5 Grano juyranakat waxt'ax mä litro oliva aceitempi chapuntata pä kilo suma jak'utäñapawa 
Numbers28:6 (Sinaí qullunxa, sapüruw aka waxt'a nakt'ayasïna, Tatitur mä suma q'apkir waxt'a luqtasina)." 
Numbers28:7 Vino waxt'atsti sapa ovejat mä litro vino luqtapxani. Uka vinompiw Tatitur jach'añchasa qullan utjäwir warakipapxani. 
Numbers28:8 Maynïr urqu ovejasti jayp'u tuqiruw wilañcha luqtatäni, ukarusti grano juyra waxt'ampi, vino waxt'ampiw yapt'asini, kamisatix willjtan luqtatäki ukhama. Ukasti Tatitur jach'añchas nakt'ayat mä suma q'apkir luqtawa." 
Numbers28:9 “Sábado urunakanxa, jumanakax mä maran pä urqu ovejanak luqtapxäta, uka ovejanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa, pusi kilo suma jak'u aceitemp chaputa, grano juyranak waxt'ata, vino waxt'apamp kuna." 
Numbers28:10 Aka nakt'ayat waxt'ax sábado urunakan luqtatäni, vino waxt'apamp kuna, sapüru nakt'ayat waxt'a luqtanakax yaqhäskaniwa." 
Numbers28:11 “Sapa phaxsit qallta uru saraqkipan Tatiturux nakt'ayat waxt'a luqtapxäta, pä vaca qallumpi, mä urqu ovejampi, mä maran paqallqu urqu ovejampi, uka uywanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers28:12 Sapaqat vaca qallut suxta kilo suma jak'u aceitemp chaput luqtapxäta; sapaqat urqu ovejatsti, pusi kilo jak'u aceitemp chaputa," 
Numbers28:13 uka pachparaki mä marani oveja qallutxa, pä kilo jak'u aceitemp chaputa. Ukasti Tatitur jach'añchasa nakt'ayat mä suma q'apkir luqtäniwa." 
Numbers28:14 Vino waxt'asti, pä litro vino sapaqat vaca qalluta, mä litro chikatan sapaqat urqu ovejata, mä litro sapaqat mä maran oveja qalluta. Taqi aka nakt'ayat waxt'anak luqtapxäta, marpacha, sapa phaxsina." 
Numbers28:15 Sapüru nakt'ayat waxt'a luqtatat sipansa, Tatiturux jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxäta, vino waxt'amp kuna." 
Numbers28:16 “Sapa mara qallta phaxsina, tunka pusin uru saraqatarusti, Pascua uruyapxäta, Tatitun jach'a kankañapat amtasisa," 
Numbers28:17 tunka phisqan uru saraqatasti, jach'a urüniwa. Paqallq uruw jan levaduran t'ant'a manq'apxäta." 
Numbers28:18 Uka paqallqu urunakat nayrïr urunxa, mä qullan tantachäwiwa utjani. Ukürusti janiw jumanakax kuna irnaqañanaksa lurapxätati." 
Numbers28:19 Tatituruw nakt'ayat waxt'a luqtapxäta, pä urqu vaca qallu, mä urqu oveja, mä maran paqallqu urqu oveja, uka uywanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers28:20 Uka wilañchanakamp chikax, suma jak'u aceitempi chapuntat waxt'xa, akham lurapxäta: sapaqat vaca qallutxa, suxta kilo jak'u, sapaqat urqu ovejatxa, pusi kilo jak'u," 
Numbers28:21 ukatsti sapaqat maran oveja qallutxa, pä kilo jak'u." 
Numbers28:22 Juchanakamat pampachayasiñ jikxatañatakisti mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxarakïta. 
Numbers28:23 Taqi akanak luqtapxäta, willjtanak nakt'ayat waxt'a sapür luqtaski ukanakat sipana." 
Numbers28:24 Ukham lurapxäta, sapüru, uka paqallqu uruyañ urunakana, Tatitur jach'añchasa nakt'ayat suma q'apkir waxt'a luqta. Ukasti vino waxt'apampiw luqtasini, sapa urun nakt'ayat waxt'a luqtat sipana." 
Numbers28:25 Paqallqüri ururusti qullan tantachäwi lurapxäta. Uka urusti janiw kuna irnaqañanaksa lurapxätati. 
Numbers28:26 “Nayrïr achunak luqtañ urunxa, Tatitur yapunakamat machaq achunakap apthapisin luqtapkäta ukapachax, Semananaka sat uruyañ urunxa, qullan tantachäwi lurapxarakïta. Uka urusti janiw kunsa irnaqapxätati." 
Numbers28:27 Tatituruw luqtapxäta, nakt'ayat mä suma q'apkir waxt'a, pä urqu vaca qallu, mä urqu oveja, maran paqallqu urqu oveja; uka uywanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers28:28 Sapaqat vaca qallutxa, suxta kilo suma jak'u aceitempi chaput luqtäta; urqu ovejatxa pusi kilo suma jak'u;" 
Numbers28:29 sapaqat urqu oveja qallutxa, pä kilo suma jak'u." 
Numbers28:30 Jucha luratanakamat pampachayasiñ jikxatañatakix, mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxarakïta." 
Numbers28:31 Uka luqtasti sapüru nakt'ayat waxt'at sipana, grano juyranakat waxt'ampi, vino waxt'amp chika luqtapxäta. Uywanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:1 “Paqallqür phaxsina, nayrïr uru saraqataruw jumanakax mä qullan tantachasïwi lurapxäta. Uka urusti janiw kuna irnaqañanaksa lurapxätati, trompetanak phust'asaw uka uru yatiyapxäta." 
Numbers29:2 Tatitur jach'añchas nakt'at mä suma q'apkir waxt'a luqtapxäta, mä urqu vaca qallu, mä urqu oveja, maran paqallqu urqu ovejanaka, uka uywanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:3 Urqu vaca qallump chikax, suxta kilo suma jak'u aceitempi chapuntat waxt'a luqtapxäta; urqu ovejamp chikasti pusi kilo suma jak'u," 
Numbers29:4 sapa maya urqu oveja qallump chikasti pä kilo jak'u. 
Numbers29:5 Ukxarux jumanakan jucha luratanakamat pampachayasiñ jikxatañatakix, mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxäta," 
Numbers29:6 sapa phaxsi nakt'ayat luqtata, sapür nakt'ayat luqtat sipana, grano juyra waxt'apampi, vino waxt'apampi, Tatitun arsutaparjama. Aka luqtax Tatitutak nakt'ayat mä suma q'apkir waxt'äniwa." 
Numbers29:7 “Pachpa paqallqür phaxsina, tunka uru saraqkipana, jumanakax qullan tantachasïwi lurapxarakïta. Ukürusti ayuno lurapxäta, janirakiw kuna irnaqañanaksa lurapxätati." 
Numbers29:8 Tatitur jach'añchas nakt'at suma q'apkir waxt'a luqtapxäta, mä urqu vaca qallumpi, mä urqu ovejampi, marani paqallqu urqu ovejampi, uka uywanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:9 Urqu vaca qallump chikax, suxta kilo suma jak'u aceitemp chaput luqtapxäta; urqu ovejamp chikasti pusi kilo jak'u," 
Numbers29:10 sapa oveja qallump chikasti pä kilo jak'u. 
Numbers29:11 Ukxarusti jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxarakïta, juchanakat pampachasiñ urun wilañchax luqtatäki, sapür nakt'ayat waxt'ax grano juyra waxt'apampi, vino waxt'anakapamp chik luqtatäki ukanakat sipana." 
Numbers29:12 “Paqallqür phaxsina, tunka phisqan uru saraqatarusti, jumanakax qullan tantachasïwi lurapxäta. Uka urux janiw kunanaksa irnaqapxätati. Paqallqu uruw Tatitun jach'a kankañapar jach'añchasa uruyapxäta." 
Numbers29:13 Nayrïr urux Tatitur jach'añchasa nakt'ayat mä suma q'apkir waxt'a luqtapxäta, tunka kimsani urqu vaca qallunaka, pä urqu oveja, marani tunka pusin urqu oveja qallunaka, ukanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:14 Sapaqat urqu vaca qallutxa suxta kilo suma jak'u, aceitemp chaputa luqtapxäta; sapaqat urqu ovejatxa, pusi kilo jak'u," 
Numbers29:15 sapaqat urqu oveja qallutsti pä kilo jak'u. 
Numbers29:16 Jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxarakïta, ukasti sapür nakt'ayat waxt'at sipan yaqhäskaniwa, grano juyra waxt'ampi, vino waxt'amp chika." 
Numbers29:17 “Payïr urusti tunka payan urqu vaca qallumpi, pä urqu ovejampi, tunka pusin mä marani urqu oveja qallumpi luqtapxäta, ukanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:18 Uka luqtanakamp chikasti grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp lurapxäta, qawqhäkitix urqu vaca qallunakasa, urqu ovejanakasa, mä marani urqu oveja qallunakasa, kunjämtix Diosax siski ukhamarjama." 
Numbers29:19 Jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtasirakini, ukasti sapüru nakt'ayat waxt'anakat sipan yaqhäskaniwa, grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp chika." 
Numbers29:20 “Kimsïr urusti tunka mayan urqu vaca qallunak luqtapxarakïta, pä urqu ovejampi, tunka pusin mä marani urqu oveja qallumpi, ukanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:21 Uka luqtanakamp chikasti grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp lurapxäta, qawqhäkitix urqu vaca qallunakasa, urqu ovejanakasa, mä marani urqu oveja qallunakas ukhamarjama, kunjämtix Diosax siski ukhama." 
Numbers29:22 Jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxarakïta, ukasti sapüru nakt'ayat waxt'anakat sipan yaqhäskaniwa, grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp chika." 
Numbers29:23 “Pusïri urusti tunka urqu vaca qallunak luqtapxäta, pä urqu ovejampi, tunka pusin mä maran urqu oveja qallunakampi, ukanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:24 Uka luqtanakamp chikasti grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp lurapxäta, qawqhäkitix urqu vaca qallunakasa, urqu ovejanakasa, mä marani urqu oveja qallunakas ukhamarjama, kunjämtix Diosax siski ukhama." 
Numbers29:25 Jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxarakïta, ukasti sapüru nakt'ayat waxt'anakat sipan yaqhaskaniwa, grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp chika." 
Numbers29:26 “Phisqïr urusti llätunk urqu vaca qallunak luqtapxäta, pä urqu ovejampi, tunka pusin mä marani oveja qallunakampi, uka uywanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:27 Uka luqtanakamp chikasti grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp luqtapxäta, qawqhäkitix urqu vaca qallunakasa, urqu ovejanakasa, mä marani urqu oveja qallunakas ukhamarjama, kunjämtix Diosax siski ukhama." 
Numbers29:28 Jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxarakïta, ukasti sapüru nakt'ayat waxt'anakat sipan yaqhaskaniwa, grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp chika." 
Numbers29:29 “Suxtïr urusti kimsaqallqu urqu vaca qallunakampi, pä urqu ovejampi, tunka pusin mä maran urqu oveja qallunakampi luqtapxäta, ukanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:30 Uka luqtanakamp chikasti grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp luqtapxäta, qawqhäkitix urqu vaca qallunakasa, urqu ovejanakasa, mä marani urqu oveja qallunakas ukhamarjama, kunjämtix Diosax siski ukhama." 
Numbers29:31 Jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxarakïta, ukasti sapüru nakt'ayat waxt'anakat sipan yaqhäskaniwa, grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp chika." 
Numbers29:32 “Paqallqür urusti paqallqu urqu vaca qallunak luqtapxäta, pä urqu ovejampi, tunka pusin mä marani urqu oveja qallunakampi, ukanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:33 Uka luqtanakamp chikasti grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp luqtapxäta, qawqhäkitix urqu vaca qallunakasa, urqu ovejanakasa, mä maran urqu oveja qallunakas ukhamarjama, kunjämtix Diosax siski ukhama." 
Numbers29:34 Jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxarakïta, ukasti sapüru nakt'ayat waxt'anakat sipan yaqhäskaniwa, grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp chika." 
Numbers29:35 “Kimsaqallqür urusti mä jach'a tantachasïwi lurasaw uruyapxäta, uka urusti janirakiw kuna irnaqañanaksa lurapxätati." 
Numbers29:36 Tatituruw mä suma q'apkir nakt'ayat waxt'a luqtapxäta, mä urqu vaca qallumpi, mä urqu ovejampi, mä maran paqallq urqu oveja qallumpi, ukanakasti jan kuna kamacht'atäñapawa." 
Numbers29:37 Uka luqtanakamp chikasti grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp luqtapxäta, qawqhäkitix urqu vaca qallunakasa, urqu ovejanakasa, mä maran urqu oveja qallunakas ukhamarjama, kunjämtix Diosax siski ukhama." 
Numbers29:38 Jucha luratat mä chivo wilañcha luqtapxarakïta, ukasti sapür nakt'ayat waxt'anakat sipan yaqhäskaniwa, grano juyra waxt'anakampi, vino waxt'anakamp chika." 
Numbers29:39 “Uka wilañchanak jumanakax uruyañ urunakan Tatitur luqtapxäta, chuymanakamatjam waxt'a luqtapkäta, arsuta phuqhasin waxt'a luqtapkäta ukax yaqhäskaniwa, nakt'ayat waxt'äpansa, grano juyra waxt'äpansa, vino waxt'äpansa, jan ukax, sumankthapiñ wilañchäpansa.”" 
Numbers29:40 Ukatsti Moisesax taqi kunanaktix Tatitux jupar siskatayna ukanak israelitanakar yatiyäna. 
Numbers30:1 Moisesax israelitanakan ayllunakapan jilïrinakaparuw säna: “Tatitux akham siwa: 
Numbers30:2 maynitix mä kun lurañatak Tatitur arsuni, jan ukax, phuqhañatak juramentompi arsuni ukapachasti, uka jaqix arsutap phuqhañapawa, kuntix arski taqi ukanak lurañaparaki." 
Numbers30:3 “Mä tawaqutix mä kun lurañatak Tatitur arsuni," 
Numbers30:4 awkipasti uka arsutap yatisin jan kamskan ukkhaxa, tawaqux uka arsutap phuqhañapawa." 
Numbers30:5 Ukampis awkipatix uka arsutap yatisin jan munkaspa ukaxa, Tatitux janiw tawaqur arsutap phuqhañapatak wayt'kaniti." 
Numbers30:6 “Mä tawaqutix jan sum amuyt'asisa kun lurañatakis Tatitur arsuni, ukat jaqichasxarakini," 
Numbers30:7 chachapatix yatisin jan kamskani ukapachasti, tawaqux lurañatak arski ukarux phuqhañapawa." 
Numbers30:8 Ukampis chachapatix yatisin jan phuqhañap munkaspa ukapachasti, janiw warmipax arsutap phuqhañatak wayt'atäkaniti. Tatitux janiw phuqhañapatak wayt'kaniti." 
Numbers30:9 “Mä ijma warmitix, jan ukax, chachampi jaljtat warmis kuna lurañatak Diosar arsuni ukaxa, taqi kuntix lurañatak arski ukar phuqhañapawa." 
Numbers30:10 “Chachan warmitix kuna lurañatakis arsuni," 
Numbers30:11 ukat chachapatix warmipan arsutaparux walikiw sanixa, ukapachasti warmix lurañatak arsutaparux phuqhañapawa." 
Numbers30:12 Ukampis chachapatix warmipan arsutap jan phuqhañap munkanixa, warmix janiw uka arsutap phuqhañapäkiti. Diosasti warmirux pampacharakiniwa." 
Numbers30:13 “Warmipan Diosar phuqhañatak arsutapatsti, chachapapuniw ‘walikiw’ sañapaxa, jan ukax ‘janiw’ sañapasa." 
Numbers30:14 Chachapatix warmipan arsutap yatini, ukat warmipan arsutaparux walikiw sanixa, ukapachasti warmix lurañatak arsutaparux phuqhañapawa." 
Numbers30:15 Ukampis chachapatix walikiw sasin ukat warmipan uka arsutapar jan phuqhayañ munkani ukasti, jupaw Diosan nayraqatapan juchañchatäni.”" 
Numbers30:16 Tatitux taqi uka kamachinak Moisesar churäna, chachax warmipampi, awkix phuchhapampi, kunapachatix phuchhax tawaqüxasin awkipan utapan jakkani ukapachan suman jakapxañapataki." 
Numbers31:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw säna: 
Numbers31:2 “Israelitanakan sutipxar madianita jaqinakat phuqsusim, uka qhipat jiwxäta” sasa." 
Numbers31:3 Ukat Moisesax markar parläna, akham sasa: —Jumanakat mä qawqhanix nuwasiñatak wakichrantasipxam, ukatsti Madián markar katuntapxam, jupanakat Tatitun sutipxar phuqsusiñataki, jiwasar jan yanapt'añ munapxatap layku." 
Numbers31:4 Sapaqat ayllut waranqa jaqinak uka nuwasïwir khithañapa —sasa. 
Numbers31:5 Ukat Israelan utjir ayllunakapat waranqa chachanak sapa ayllut khithapxäna, taqpachanisti tunka payan waranqa chachanakaw sarthapipxäna, nuwasiñatak wakichrantatanaka." 
Numbers31:6 Moisesasti jupanakar nuwasïwiruw khithäna, Finees chachamp chika, Eleazar sacerdoten yuqapa. Finees chachax qullan yänak apäna, nuwasïwi qallantañ yatiyañatakisti trompetanak aparakïna." 
Numbers31:7 Ukatsti kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjamaw israelitanakax nuwasiñ qallantapxäna, ukatsti taqpacha madianita jaqinakaruw jiwarayapxäna." 
Numbers31:8 Jiwarayat chachanak taypinsti madianita phisqa reyinakaw ukankäna: Eví, Réquem, Sur, Hur, Reba jupanaka. Beor chachan Balaam sat yuqapas ukankarakïnwa." 
Numbers31:9 Israelitanakax madianita warminakampiru, jisk'a wawanakapampiruw katuntasin apapxäna, ukatsti uywanakapampi, jila alani yänakapamp jupanakat aparapxäna;" 
Numbers31:10 ukhamarusa, taqpach markanakapampi, campamentonakapamp phichhantapxarakïna." 
Numbers31:11 Ukatsti taqi kunanaktix aparanipkäna, jaqinaksa, uywanaksa," 
Numbers31:12 ukanak Moisesan ukaruw apapxäna, Eleazar sacerdoten ukampiru, Israel marka nayraqatampiru, jupanakasti ukapachax Moab uraqi pampan jikxatasipxäna, Jordán jawira thiyana, Jericó marka uñkatasina." 
Numbers31:13 Israelit ejercitor kuttanir uñjasasti, Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempi, markan taqpach jilïrinakapampix, campamentot anqäxaruw katuqir mistuwayapxäna." 
Numbers31:14 Moisesasti ejerciton jilïrinakapatak wal q'apisïna," 
Numbers31:15 ukat jupanakar säna: —¿Kunatarak warminakarusti jan jiwarayapxtasti? 
Numbers31:16 Uka warminakaw Balaaman jan wali amuyt'ayatax, israelitanakar iyawsayasin Tatitut saraqayapxäna, Baal-peor diosar yupaychayasa. Ukat Tatitux mä jan wali usumpi markapar mutuyäna." 
Numbers31:17 Jichhpach taqpach yuqall wawanakar jiwarayapxam, ukhamarak chachamp sarnaqir taqpach warminakaru," 
Numbers31:18 chacha jan uñt'ir tawaqunakarusti jan jiwarayapxamti, jumanakatak qhiparayasipxam." 
Numbers31:19 Jumanakat khitinakatix jaqi masipar jiwayki, jan ukax, jiwat jaqin amayap llamkt'ki ukax, paqallqu uruw campamento anqäxan qhiparapxäta. Jumanakasa, katuntanipkta uka jaqinakasa, Tatit nayraqatan kimsïr urumpina, paqallqür urumpin q'umachasipxäta." 
Numbers31:20 Taqpach isinakam t'axsurasipxäta, ukatsti lip'ichit lurat yänaka, cabriton t'arwapat lurat yänaka, lawat lurat yänak q'umachapxarakïta —sasa." 
Numbers31:21 Ukatsti Eleazar sacerdotex nuwasïwit kuttanirinakar taqpachaniruw sarakïna: —Tatitux Moisesar churkän uka kamachix akham siwa: 
Numbers31:22 quri, qullqi, bronce, hierro, estaño, plomo ukanakat lurat yänaka," 
Numbers31:23 ninatak ch'ullqhïki uka yänakxa, ninar apantasin q'umachapxäta, ukatsti q'umachir umampiw jariqxapxäta. Ukampis ninatak jan ch'ullqhïki uka yänaksti, q'umachir umampikiw jariqapxäta." 
Numbers31:24 Paqallqür urun isinakam t'axsusipxäta, ukat q'umachat uñjasxapxäta. Uka campamentorux mantxapxarakïta —sasa." 
Numbers31:25 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: 
Numbers31:26 —Eleazar sacerdotempi, markan jilïrinakapamp yanapt'ayasisin, madianita jaqinakar aparanit warminakampi, uywanakamp jakthapim," 
Numbers31:27 ukatsti payaruw jaljäta, mä chikatxa, nuwasir sarir soldadonakaruw lakintäta, mä chikatsti, markan qhiparir jaqinakaruw lakintarakïta." 
Numbers31:28 Soldadonakar wakt'ki ukanakatxa, sapa phisqa patakat maya jilt'ayarapita, warminakatsa, vacanakatsa, asnonakatsa, ukhamarak ovejanakatsa," 
Numbers31:29 ukanaksti Eleazar sacerdoteruw churäta, nayar luqtatäkaspas ukhama." 
Numbers31:30 Israelitanakar wakt'ki uka chikatatxa, sapa phisqa tunka warminakatsa, vacanakatsa, asnonakatsa, ovejanakatsa, taqpach uywanakatsa maya jilt'ayäta, ukanaksti qullan utaxan yanapasir levitanakaruw churäta —sasa." 
Numbers31:31 Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempisti Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjamaw lurapxäna." 
Numbers31:32 Taqi kunanaktix uñisirinakapat soldadonakax aparanipkatayna ukanak jan jakt'atasax, suxta patak paqallqu tunka phisqan waranqa ovejanaka," 
Numbers31:33 paqallqu tunka payan waranqa urqu vacanaka," 
Numbers31:34 suxta tunka mayan waranqa asnonaka," 
Numbers31:35 kimsa tunka payan waranqa chacha jan uñt'iri tawaqunakampïnwa. 
Numbers31:36 Ukhamasti, soldadonakar wakt'ki uka chikatax, kimsa patak kimsa tunka paqallqun waranqa phisqa patakan ovejanakänwa," 
Numbers31:37 ukanakat suxta patak paqallqu tunka phisqan ovejanakaw Tatitur katuyatäxäna; 
Numbers31:38 uka kimsa tunka suxtan waranqa vacanakatxa, paqallq tunka payan vacanakaw Tatitutak katuyatäxäna;" 
Numbers31:39 uka kimsa tunka waranqa phisqa patakan asnonakatxa, suxta tunka mayan asnonakaw Tatitur churatäxäna;" 
Numbers31:40 uka tunka suxtan waranqa tawaqunakatsti, kimsa tunka payan tawaqunakaw Tatitur katuyatäxäna." 
Numbers31:41 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw Tatitur wakt'ki ukanak Eleazar sacerdoter katuyxäna. 
Numbers31:42 Ukatsti israelitanakar wakt'kän uka chikatasti, kawkïr chikattix Moisesax yaqhachkatayna ukanakax," 
Numbers31:43 pachparakïnwa: kimsa patak kimsa tunka paqallqun waranqa ovejanaka," 
Numbers31:44 kimsa tunka suxtan waranqa urqu vacanaka," 
Numbers31:45 kimsa tunka waranqa phisqa patakan asnonaka," 
Numbers31:46 tunka suxtani waranqa tawaqunakampi. 
Numbers31:47 Aka chikatat Moisesax sapa phisqa tunkat maya, warminakatsa, uywanakatsa apaqäna, ukanaksti Tatitun qullan utapan yanapasir levitanakaruw Tatitun arsutaparjam churxäna." 
Numbers31:48 Ukatsti nuwasïwir sarapkatayna uka ejerciton jilïrinakapax, Moisesan ukar sarasin" 
Numbers31:49 juparuw sapxäna: —Nuwasïwir sarir israelita soldadonakaruw nanakax jakthapipxta, jupanakax phuqhatpachäskiwa." 
Numbers31:50 Ukat nanakax jikxatapkta uka taqpach quri yänak Tatitutak apanipxta, chipananaka, surtijanaka, aretenaka, yaqha k'achachasiñanaka, taqi ukanaka Tatitur luqtañataki, jucha luratat nanakar pampachañapataki —sasa." 
Numbers31:51 Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempisti taqpach uka quri yänak jilïrinakat katuqapxäna." 
Numbers31:52 Soldadonakan jilïripax churapkatayna uka quristi, patak kimsaqallq tunka pusin kilot juk'ampïnwa," 
Numbers31:53 sapa soldadow uñisirinakapat aparanit yänakat apanipxäna. 
Numbers31:54 Ukhamaw Moisesampi, Eleazar sacerdotempix jilïrinakat quri katuqapxäna, ukanaksti Tatitun israelitanakat amtasiñapatakiw Tatitump Jikisiñ Carpar apapxäna." 
Numbers32:1 Rubén, Gad ayllunkir jaqinakan uywanakapax waljapunïnwa. Jupanakasti Jazer uraqimpi, Galaad uraqimpi, uywanak uywañatak wali suma uraqïtap uñjasinxa," 
Numbers32:2 Moisesampiru, Eleazar sacerdotempiru, markan jilïrinakapampir jikxatiriw sarapxäna, ukat jupanakar sapxäna:" 
Numbers32:3 —Uñtapxam: Atarot, Dibón, Jazer, Nimrá, Hesbón, Elalé, Sebam, Nebo, Beón uka uraqinakax" 
Numbers32:4 uywanakatak suma ch'uxñanakan uraqinakawa, nanakansti walja uywaw utjapxitu. Tatituw uka uraqinak markapatak katuntawayi." 
Numbers32:5 Jumanakan amuyatamat walïspa ukkhaxa, nanakar uka uraqinak churapxita, ukatsti Jordán jawir khurkatar jan makhatayapxistati —sasa." 
Numbers32:6 Moisesasti jupanakarux sänwa: —¿Jumanakasti akanti qhiparañ munapxta, marka masinakaman nuwasïwir sarañapkamasti?" 
Numbers32:7 ¿Kunatarak israelitanakar mayjt'ayañ munapxtasti, Tatitux churapktam uka uraqir jan mantapxañapatakisti?"
