Numbers32:8 Uka kipkarak awkinakamax lurapxäna, jupanakar nayax Cadés-barnea chiqat uka uraqinak uñakipir khitkäyät ukkhaxa." 
Numbers32:9 Jupanakax Escol sat jisk'a jawirkam purisin uka uraqinak uñatatanipxäna, ukat israelitanakarux mayjt'ayapxäna, Tatitux churkatayna uka uraqir jan mantapxañapataki." 
Numbers32:10 Ukat Tatitun q'apisiñapax ukürun aqtäna, juramentompiw jupax arsurakïna:" 
Numbers32:11 “Nayar taqi chuyma jan iyawsapxatap layku, juramentompiw arsta Egiptot mistunipki uka jaqinakax janiw maynis pä tunka maranit amstarux mantkaniti, kawkïr uraqtix Abraham, Isaac, Jacob nayra awkinakapar churañatak nayax arsuwaykta uka uraqiruxa." 
Numbers32:12 Caleb sat Jefuné chachan yuqapampi, Josué sat Nun chachan yuqapampikiw mantapxani, nayar iyawsapxatap layku” sasa." 
Numbers32:13 Tatitun q'apisiñapaw Israel markatak aqtäna, ukat jupanakar wasaran pusi tunka mara uksar aksar sarnaqayäna, jan wali luräwinakapampi jucha lurapkatayna uka jaqinakan taqpach jiwarañapkama." 
Numbers32:14 Jichhasti jumanakax jucha lurir awkinakan wawanakapa, awkinakamjamaw lurañ munapxaraktaxa, Israel markatak wasitat Tatitun q'apisiñap aqtayañataki." 
Numbers32:15 Jumanakatix Tatitur jan arkañ munapkstaxa, jupax walja maranakampiw israelitanakarux wasaran sarnaqayani, ukatsti jumanakaw juchanïpxäta jupanakan t'unjat uñjasiñapataki —sasa." 
Numbers32:16 Ukapachaw jupanakax wasitat Moisesar jak'achasisin sapxäna: —Nanakax aka chiqan uywanakaxatak uywa uyunak lurapxä, wawanakaxatakisti markanak sayt'ayapxarakï." 
Numbers32:17 Ukampis nanakax ejerciton nayraqatap sarantapxä, ukatsti mayni ayllunakamp chikaw nuwasiñatak wakichrantasipxä, jupanakan jakañatak uraqip utjañapkama. Ukchañkamasti wila masinakaxax suma sayt'ayat markanakan qhiparapxani, uka chiqan jakirinakax jupanakar jan kuna jan walsa lurasipkañapataki." 
Numbers32:18 Mayni israelitanakax jakañatak uraqipar utt'asipkani ukapachaw nanakax uraqixar kuttanxapxä. 
Numbers32:19 Nanakax janiw jupanakamp kuna uraqsa Jordán jawirat khurkatankirit jaljasiñ munapkti, nanakan katuqäwixax akankiwa, jawirat inti jalsu tuqina." 
Numbers32:20 Ukxaruw Moisesax jupanakar säna: —Jumanakatix ukham lurañ munapxstaxa, wakichrantasipxam, nuwasïwir sarantapxam." 
Numbers32:21 Jordán jawir khurkatar wakichrantat makhatapxam, ukatsti Tatitun yanapapamp uñisirinakamar jupan jaqunukuñapkam ch'amamp nuwasipxam." 
Numbers32:22 Tatitux uka uraqi katuntkani ukapachasti, jumanakax utanakamaruw kuttanxapxäta, ukampix arsüwinakamsa Tatit nayraqatana, Israel marka nayraqatansa phuqhapxätawa. Aka uraqisti, Tatitun arsutaparjamaw jumanakankani." 
Numbers32:23 Ukampis janitix ukham lurapkätaxa, Diosatakiw juchachasipxäta, uka jucha luratat mä uruw mutuñax jumanakatak purinini." 
Numbers32:24 Ukhamasti utamankirinakatak markanak sayt'ayapxam, uywanakamatakis uyunak lurapxam, arsutanakamarusti phuqhapxarakim —sasa." 
Numbers32:25 Gad, Rubén ayllunkirinakax ukxaruw Moisesar sapxäna: —Nanakax juman luqtirinakamäpxtwa, arsutamarjamaw lurapxä." 
Numbers32:26 Nanakan warminakaxampi, jisk'a wawanakaxampi, taqpach uywanakaxampix, aka Galaad markanakan qhiparapxani," 
Numbers32:27 nanak luqtirinakamasti, wakichrantasisin Tatitun arsutapar jaysasin nuwasïwirux sarantapxä, jumax sapkista ukhamarjama —sasa." 
Numbers32:28 Moisesasti Josué chachampi, Eleazar sacerdotempi, Israelan ayllunakapan jilïrinakapampiw parläna, jupanakarusti akham säna:" 
Numbers32:29 —Gad, Rubén ayllunakankir taqpach jaqinakapatix jumanakamp chika Jordán jawir wakichrantat makhatapxani, Tatitun arsutapar jaysasa, jumanakan uka uraqi katuntañamkamaxa, ukapachasti jumanakax Galaad uraq jupanakar churapxäta." 
Numbers32:30 Ukampis jupanakatix arsutanakaparjam jan phuqhapkanixa, Canaán uraqin jupanakax jumanak taypin jakir sarapxani —sasa." 
Numbers32:31 Ukxaruw Gad, Rubén ayllunkirinakax sapxäna: —Nanaka, juman luqtirinakamax Tatitun arsutaparjamaw lurapxä." 
Numbers32:32 Wakichrantataw Tatitur jaysas Canaán uraqir makhatapxä, ukampis nanakax Jordán jawirat akkatan jakiriw kuttanxapxä. Akäniw nanakan uraqixaxa —sasa." 
Numbers32:33 Ukhamaw Moisesax Gad, Rubén ayllunkirinakaru, Manasesan chikat ayllupar uka uraqit churäna. Sihón sat amorreo reyin uraqinakapa, ukhamarak Og sat Basán reyin uraqipa, jupanakan markanakapampi, markanak muyuntir pampanakapampi." 
Numbers32:34 Ukatsti Gad ayllunkir jaqinakax, Dibón, Atarot, Aroer sat markanak wasitat sayt'ayapxäna," 
Numbers32:35 ukhamarak Atarot-sofán, Jazer, Jogbehá," 
Numbers32:36 Bet-nimrá, Bet-arán uka markanakampi, uka markanakar sum uyuchrantapxäna, uywanakapatakis uywa uyunak lurapxarakïna." 
Numbers32:37 Rubén ayllunkir jaqinakax, Hesbón, Elalé, Quiriataim sat markanak wasitat sayt'ayapxäna," 
Numbers32:38 ukhamarak Nebo, Baal-meón, Sibmá markanakampi, yaqhip markanakan sutinakapsa yaqha sutimpiw uchapxäna, jupanakan sayt'ayat markanakarusti machaq sutinak uchapxäna." 
Numbers32:39 Manasés chachan Maquir sat yuqapan saraqirinakapax, Galaad uraqir mantantasin uka uraqi katuntasipxäna, uka uraqin jakir amorreo jaqinakarusti jaqunukupxänwa." 
Numbers32:40 Ukat Moisesax Maquir chachan saraqirinakaparux Galaad uraqinak churäna, jupanakasti ukan utjantasipxäna." 
Numbers32:41 Manasés chachan Jaír sat yaqha yuqapax amorreo jaqinakan mä qawqha campamentonakap katuntasïna, ukarusti Havot-jaír sutimpiw uchäna." 
Numbers32:42 Nóbah chachan tamapankir jaqinakax Quenat uraqi katuntasipxäna, uka thiyanakan utjir markanakamppacha, uka uraqirusti Nóbah sutipampiw uchapxäna." 
Numbers33:1 Israelitanakax Egipto uraqit mistunipkän ukapachax, mä ejercitor uñtataw tam tama siqicht'at sarantapxäna, Moisesampi Aaronampi irpata." 
Numbers33:2 Moisesax Tatitun arsutaparjamaw qillqäna, kawkha chiqattix sartawayapkäna, kawkha chiqarutix purintapkän ukawjanakan sutinakapa. Israelitanakan thakhi sarapxatapax akhamänwa:" 
Numbers33:3 Israelitanakax nayrïr phaxsina, tunka phisqan uru saraqataruw Ramsés uraqit mistunipxäna, Pascua uruyäwit qhipüru. Jupanakax wali ch'amaniw mistunipxäna, taqpach egipcio jaqinakan uñjkata." 
Numbers33:4 Uka pachpa uruw, egipcionakax tayna yuqall wawanakapan amayap p'amp'asipkäna, Tatituw jupanakarux jakañap apaqatayna, Egipto uraqin diosanakapar mutuyañataki." 
Numbers33:5 Israelitanakax Egiptonkir Ramsés markat sartawayasax Sucot chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:6 Sucot chiqat mistuwayasax Etam chiqaruw purintapxäna, wasar qurpa thiyana." 
Numbers33:7 Etam chiqat sartawayapxäna, Pi-hahirot tuqi muytapxäna, Baal-sefón inti jalsu tuqina, ukatsti Migdol uñkatasin utjnuqtapxäna." 
Numbers33:8 Pi-hahirot chiqat sartawayasasti, jach'a quta makhatasin wasararuw puripxäna. Etam wasaranjam kimsa uru sarasasti, Mará chiqan utjnuqtapxäna." 
Numbers33:9 Mará chiqat sartawayasax Elim chiqaruw puripxäna, kawkhantix tunka payan uma jalsunakampi, paqallqu tunka palmera quqanakamp utjkatayna ukkharu, ukatsti ukawjan utjnuqtapxäna." 
Numbers33:10 Elim chiqat sartawayasasti Mar Rojo quta thiyaruw utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:11 Mar Rojo quta thiyat sartawayasax Sin sat wasararuw utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:12 Sin wasarat sartawayasasti Dofcá sat chiqaruw utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:13 Dofcá chiqat sartawayasasti Alús sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:14 Alús chiqat sartawayasasti Refidim sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna, markan uma umt'añapatak jan utjkän ukkharu." 
Numbers33:15 Refidim chiqat sartawayasasti Sinaí wasaran utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:16 Sinaí wasarat sartawayasasti Quibrot-hataavá sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:17 Quibrot-hataavá chiqat sartawayasasti Haserot sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:18 Haserot chiqat sartawayasasti Ritmá sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:19 Ritmá chiqat sartawayasasti Rimón-peres sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:20 Rimón-peres chiqat sartawayasasti Libná sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:21 Libná chiqat sartawayasasti Risá sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:22 Risá chiqat sartawayasasti Quehelata sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:23 Quehelata chiqat sartawayasasti Séfer sat qullun utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:24 Séfer qullut sartawayasasti Haradá sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:25 Haradá chiqat sartawayasasti Maquelot sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:26 Maquelot chiqat sartawayasasti Táhat sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:27 Táhat chiqat sartawayasasti Térah sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:28 Térah chiqat sartawayasasti Mitcá sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:29 Mitcá chiqat sartawayasasti Hasmoná sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:30 Hasmoná chiqat sartawayasasti Moserot sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:31 Moserot chiqat sartawayasasti Bené-jaacán sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:32 Bené-jaacán chiqat sartawayasasti Hor de Guidgad sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:33 Hor de Guidgad chiqat sartawayasasti Jotbata sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:34 Jotbata chiqawjat sartawayasasti Abroná sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:35 Abroná chiqawjat sartawayasasti Esión-guéber sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:36 Esión-guéber chiqawjat sartawayasasti Cadés chiqan utjnuqtapxäna, Sin sat wasarana." 
Numbers33:37 Cadés chiqawjat sartawayasasti Hor sat qullun utjnuqtapxäna, Edom uraqi qurpana." 
Numbers33:38 Tatitun arsutaparjamaw Aarón sacerdotex Hor sat qullur makhatäna, jupasti ukan jiwxäna, phisqïr phaxsina, nayrïr uru saraqataru, pusi tunka mara israelitanakax Egiptot mistunipkatayna uka urut jakt'asina." 
Numbers33:39 Aarón sacerdotex Hor sat qullun jiwxäna, jupasti ukapachax patak pä tunka kimsan maranïnwa." 
Numbers33:40 Arad chiqankir cananeo reyix, Négueb chiqan utjasïna Canaán uraqina, jupax israelitanakan purinitap yatïna." 
Numbers33:41 Hor sat qullut sartawayasasti Salmoná chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:42 Salmoná chiqawjat sartawayasasti Punón sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:43 Punón chiqawjat sartawayasasti Obot sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:44 Obot chiqat sartawayasasti Iié-abarim sat chiqawjan utjnuqtapxäna, Moab uraqi qurpana." 
Numbers33:45 Iié-abarim chiqat sartawayasasti Dibón-Gad sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:46 Dibón-Gad chiqat sartawayasasti Almón-diblataim sat chiqan utjnuqtapxäna. 
Numbers33:47 Almón-diblataim sat chiqat sartawayasasti Abarim sat qullu patanakan utjnuqtapxäna, Nebo qullut inti jalsu tuqina." 
Numbers33:48 Abarim qullunakat sartawayasasti Moab pampanakan utjnuqtapxäna, Jordán jawir thiyana, Jericó marka uñkatasina." 
Numbers33:49 Jupanakax Jordán jawira irananakan utjnuqtasipxäna, Bet-jesimot chiqawjata, Abel-sitim sat chiqakama, Moab uraqi pampanakana." 
Numbers33:50 Moab uraqi pampanakana, Jordán jawira thiyana, Jericó marka uñkatasina, Tatitux Moisesar parläna, akham sasa:" 
Numbers33:51 “Israelitanakar akham sarakim: Jumanakax Jordán jawir makhatapkäta, ukatsti Canaán uraqir mantapkät ukkhaxa," 
Numbers33:52 uka uraqin jakir jaqinakaruw alisnukupxäta, qalampita, metalampit lurat diosanakapar taqpach t'unjapxäta, ukatsti diosanakapar qullu patanakan yupaychapki ukawjanak t'unjapxarakïta." 
Numbers33:53 Uka uraqi katuntapxam, ukan utjantasipxam, nayaw jumanakar uka uraq katusxapxañamatak churapxsma." 
Numbers33:54 Ukampis suerte jaqtasaw uraqi jaljapxäta, taqpach ayllunakan utjir wila masi tamanakaru; walja jaqini wila masi tamarux jach'a uraqinak churapxäta, juk'a jaqini wila masi tamanakarusti jisk'a uraqinak churapxarakïta; suertet wakt'ki ukhamarjamaw sapa wila masi tamanakax katuqani." 
Numbers33:55 Jumanakatix uka uraqin jakir jaqinakar jan alisnukupkätaxa, uka uraqin qhiparirinakax jisk'a t'una lawar uñtata, jan ukax, janchinakamar jan walt'ayir ch'aphir uñtataw jan walt'ayapkätamti;" 
Numbers33:56 ukapachaw nayax jumanakar kuntix uka jaqinakar lurañ amtkäyät ukanak lurä” sasa. 
Numbers34:1 Tatitux Moisesaruw säna: 
Numbers34:2 “Israelitanakar parlam jupanakarusti sarakim: Jumanakax Canaán uraqir mantañampïpxtawa. Aka uraqinakaw jumanakankani, qurpanakapasti akanakäniwa:" 
Numbers34:3 “Aynach tuqirux Sin wasarampi, Edom uraqimpi qurpäniwa. Inti jalsu tuqit sartasinsti, Mar Muerto quta aynachat qurpax qalltani," 
Numbers34:4 ukatsti aynach tuqirux Acrabim sat amsta chiqakamaw sarani, Sin chiqanjam sarakipani, ukatsti Cadés-barnea chiqakamaw purini. Ukatsti Hasar-adar chiqatxa, Asmón chiqakamaw sarani," 
Numbers34:5 Asmón chiqatsti Egiptompi qurpaski uka jisk'a jawirkamaw sararakini, ukatsti Mediterráneo jach'a qutaruw tukuyani." 
Numbers34:6 “Inti jalanta tuqirusti, Mediterráneo jach'a qutampi qurpäniwa." 
Numbers34:7 “Amsta tuqi qurpax, Mediterráneo jach'a qutat Hor sat qullukamaw sarani," 
Numbers34:8 Hor qullutsti Hamat uraqin mantañapkama, ukawjatsti Sedad chiqakama." 
Numbers34:9 Sedad chiqatsti, Zifrón sat chiqakamaw sarani, ukatsti Hasar-enán chiqaruw tukuyani, ukäniw amsta tuqinkir qurpaxa." 
Numbers34:10 “Inti jalsu tuqitakix, qurpax Hasar-enán chiqat qalltasina Sefam chiqakamaw sarani," 
Numbers34:11 ukawjat Riblá sat chiqakamaw sarani, ukasti Ain sat inti jalsu tuqinkiwa; uka chiqatsti qurpax Quinéret qutat inti jalsu tuqinjam sarani," 
Numbers34:12 ukatsti Jordán jawiranjam sararakini, Mar Muerto qutakama. “Jumanakan uraqiman qurpanakapax ukanakäniwa.”" 
Numbers34:13 Moisesax israelitanakar sarakïnwa: —Aka uraqinak jumanakax suertetkam lakintasipxäta; Tatituw uka uraqinak churasiñapatak arsüna, llätunk chikatani qhiparir ayllunakaru." 
Numbers34:14 Rubén ayllunkirinakampi, Gad ayllunkirinakampi, Manasesan ayllupankir chikat jaqinakampix, wakt'ki uka uraqip katuqasxapxiwa, Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tuqiru, Jericó marka uñkatasina —sasa." 
Numbers34:15  
Numbers34:16 Tatitusti Moisesar sarakïnwa: 
Numbers34:17 “Jumanak taypin uraqinak lakintapkani ukanakax, Eleazar sacerdotempi, Nun chachan Josué yuqapampiwa." 
Numbers34:18 Uraq lakintañatakisti, sapa ayllutkam mä jilïriparuw jumanakar yanapt'ir jawsapxäta." 
Numbers34:19 Jawsapxañamäki uka chachanakan sutinakapax akanakawa: “Judá ayllutxa: Caleb sat Jefuné chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers34:20 “Simeón ayllutxa: Samuel, Amihud chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers34:21 “Benjamín ayllutxa: Elidad sat Quislón chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers34:22 “Dan ayllutxa: Buquí jilïri, Joglí chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers34:23 “Manasesan ayllunakapatxa: Haniel, Efod chachan yuqapa." 
Numbers34:24 Efraín ayllutxa: Quemuel sat Siftán chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers34:25 “Zabulón ayllutxa: Elisafán sat Parnac chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers34:26 “Isacar ayllutxa: Palatiel sat Azán chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers34:27 “Aser ayllutxa: Ahihud sat Selomí chachan yuqapa. 
Numbers34:28 “Neftalí ayllutxa: Pedahel sat Amiud chachan yuqapa.” 
Numbers34:29 Tatitux uka chachanakaruw Canaán uraqi israelitanakar lakintapxañapatak jaytäna. 
Numbers35:1 Israel markax Moab uraqi pampanakan jikxataskäna, Jordán jawira jak'ana, Jericó marka uñkatasina, ukapachaw Tatitux Moisesar parläna, akham sasa:" 
Numbers35:2 “Israelitanakar parlam, jupanakar wakt'ki uka uraqinakatxa, levitanakan jakasipxañapatak markanak churapxpan, uka markanakar muyuntir uraqinak taypin, uywanak awatisiñ uraqinak churapxarakpan." 
Numbers35:3 Uka markanakan levitanakax jakapxani, pampanakansti uywanakapampi, yaqha animalanakamp uywapxani." 
Numbers35:4 Levitanakar churapkäta uka uywa awatisiñ uraqinakatxa, pusi patak phisqa tunkan metrow utjañapa pirqat anqäx tuqiru." 
Numbers35:5 Taqpach uraqix pusi thiyanïniwa, llätunka patak metro sapa thiyaru, inti jalsu tuqitsa, inti jalanta tuqitsa, amsta tuqitsa, aynacha tuqitsa tupupax pachpäniwa. Markasti chika taypinkaniwa, uywa awatiñ uraqinakamp muyuntata." 
Numbers35:6 “Levitanakar churapkäta uka markanakatxa, suxta markax imantasiñ markäniwa, jaqi jiwayir jaqix uka markan imantasini. Uka suxta markanakxarusti yaqha pusi tunka payan markanakamp churapxäta;" 
Numbers35:7 taqpacharusti, pusi tunka kimsaqallqun markanak levitanakar churapxäta, ukhamarak uywa awatiñ uraqinakapamppacha." 
Numbers35:8 Israelitanakan uraqipat levitanakatak markanak churapkäta ukkhaxa, sapaqat ayllunakaw churani qawqhatix wakt'katayna ukhamarjama: Jilpach uraqinakan ayllunakaxa, jilpach markanak churani; juk'a uraqinakan ayllunakasti, juk'a markanakak churarakini.”" 
Numbers35:9 Tatitux Moisesar sänwa: 
Numbers35:10 “Israelitanakar parlam, jupanakarusti akham sarakim: Jumanakax Canaán uraqir mantañataki, Jordán jawir makhatapkäta ukkhax," 
Numbers35:11 imantasiñ markanak ajllisipxäta, jan jiwayañ amtampi jaqi masipar jiwayirix ukar imantasir jaltxañapataki." 
Numbers35:12 Ukhamat qhispiyat uñjasini, jiwayat jaqin wila masinakapan jan jupar phuqsusiñ amtampi jiwayaskañapataki; uka jaqisti taripatäñatak marka nayraqatan uñstañapkamax janiw jiwkaniti." 
Numbers35:13 Markanakat churapkäta ukanakatxa, suxta markax imantasiñatakïniwa:" 
Numbers35:14 Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tuqirux kimsa markanak yaqhachapxäta, Canaán uraqinsti kimsa marka yaqhachapxarakïta." 
Numbers35:15 Uka suxta markasti imantasiñ markanakäniwa, israelitanakatakisa, yaqha markat jutasin jumanak taypin jakir jaqitakisa. Uka markanakan imantasini, khiti jaqitix jan jiwayañ amtampi jaqi masipar jiwaykani ukaxa." 
Numbers35:16 “Maynitix masipar hierromp jawq'antasin usuchjani, ukatsti usuchjat jaqitix jiwanixa, jawq'antir jaqix, jaqi jiwayiriwa, uka jaqisti jiwañapatak juchañchataw uñjasini." 
Numbers35:17 “Maynitix masipar qalampi jaqt'asin jiwayanixa, qalamp jaqt'irix, jaqi jiwayiriwa, uka jaqisti jiwañapatak juchañchataw uñjasini." 
Numbers35:18 “Maynitix masipar mä lawampi jawq'antasin jiwayanixa, jawq'antirix jaqi jiwayiriwa, uka jaqisti jiwañapatak juchañchataw uñjasini." 
Numbers35:19 Jiwayat jaqin jak'a wila masipaw jaqi jiwayirir jikxatasin jiwayani. 
Numbers35:20 “Maynitix masipar uñisiñat nukt'ani, jan ukax, jan wali amuyumpi kunampisa jaqt'arakini," 
Numbers35:21 jan ukax, uñisiñat nuwjasin jiwayani ukasti, juchanix jiwañapatak juchañchataw uñjasini, jupan jaqi jiwayirïtap layku. Jiwatan jak'a wila masipaw uka jiwayirirux jikxatasin jiwayarakini." 
Numbers35:22 “Ukampis maynitix jan munkasin masipar nukt'ani, janirak uñisiñatsa; jan ukax, jan kuna jan wali amuyumpi kunampis jaqt'ani," 
Numbers35:23 jan ukax, jan sum uñtasin qalamp jaqt'ani, ukat qalampi jaqtat jaqix jiwaspa, jan jupanakpura uñisirïkasina, janirak jupax masipar kuna ñanqha amtañampi lurkaspa," 
Numbers35:24 ukapachasti markaw taripirit sayt'ani, ukatsti aka kamachinakarjamaw jiwayki uka jaqimpiru, jiwayat jaqin wila masipampiru phuqsusiñ munatapat uñjani." 
Numbers35:25 Jan munkasin jaqi masipar jiwayir jaqirux markaw arxatañapa, phuqsusiñ munir wila masipata, ukatsti juchañchatarux imantasiñatak jaltkatayna uka markaruw kuttayxañapa. Jiwayir jaqix ukan qhiparañapa, sacerdotenakan jilïripa jakañapkama." 
Numbers35:26 Ukampis juchañchat jaqitix imantasiñ markan qurpapat mistuwayanixa," 
Numbers35:27 jiwayat jaqin wila masipax jiwayaskaniwa, marka anqäxantix jiwayir jaqir jikxatkani ukkhaxa, janiw jupax jiwayatapat juchañchat uñjaskaniti." 
Numbers35:28 Jiwayki uka jaqix imantasiñ markan qhiparañapa. Sacerdotenakan jilïripan jiwatap qhipatsti, jupax utapar kuttaskaniwa, janiw khitis jupar kamachkanisa." 
Numbers35:29 “Aka arunakasti jumanakatakix mä kamachïniwa, ukanakasti wawanakaman wawanakapatakïniwa, kawki chiqantix jakapkäta ukana." 
Numbers35:30 “Mä jaqi jiwayir jaqix walja uñjirinak qhanañchañatak utjchi ukapachakiw jiwañapatak juchañchat uñjasini. Mayni sapakix janiw askïkiti khitir jiwañapatak juchañchañatakisa. 
Numbers35:31 “Jaqi jiwayatapat jiwañapatak juchañchat jaqix, janiw qullqi churas qhispit uñjaskaniti; uka jaqix jiwañapapuniwa." 
Numbers35:32 “Jaltxasin imantasiñ markan jakir jaqix, janiw qullqimpi uka markat mistkaniti, utaparus kuttkaniti. Sacerdotenakan jilïrip jiwañapkamaw suyañapa." 
Numbers35:33 “Jakapkäta uka uraqirux jan jaqi jiwayañanakamp q'añuchapxamti, jaqi jiwayañax uraqi q'añuchi, janiw kunampi kuttsuyasiñas mä jaqi jiwayatat utjkiti, jan ukasti jiwayirix jiwañapapuniwa." 
Numbers35:34 “Jakapkät uka uraqir janiw ñanqhachapxätati, nayax uka uraqin jakarakï, naya, Tatitux israelitanak taypin jakasta.”" 
Numbers36:1 Mä urusti, Manasés chachan ayllupankiri, Galaad chachan wila masi tamapan jilïrinakapax, Moisesamp parliriw sarapxäna. Jupanakasti Israelan ayllunakapan jilïrinakap nayraqatan jupar sapxäna:" 
Numbers36:2 —Tatitux suertet wakt'kani uka uraqinak israelitanak taypin lakintañamatakiw jumar sistam, ukatsti saraktamwa Selofhad wila masixar wakt'añapäki uka uraqi phuchhanakapar churxañamataki." 
Numbers36:3 Jichhasti jupanakatix israelitanakan yaqha ayllunkir chachanakampi jaqichasipxanixa, jupanakar wakt'ki uka uraqinakax, janiw nanakan ayllunakaxankxaniti, jan ukasti jaqichasipki uka chachanakan ayllupankirïxaniwa. Ukhamat suertet wakt'apkitän uka uraqinakax jisk'ar tukxani." 
Numbers36:4 Israelan qhispiyasiñ mara uruyäwix purinkan ukkhasti, uka uraqinakapax wiñayatakiw uka yaqha ayllutakïxani, nanakan aylluxasti wakt'ki uka uraqit jisk'a uraqinikïxaniwa —sasa." 
Numbers36:5 Moisesasti Tatitun arsutaparjamaw israelitanakar säna: —José chachan ayllupankir chachanakax walik arsusipki. 
Numbers36:6 Tatitux Selofhad chachan phuchhanakapan khiti chachanakamp jaqichañapsa munaskaniwa, ukampis uka chachanakax awkipan ayllupankirïñapawa." 
Numbers36:7 Israelan sapa maynir wakt'ki uka uraqinakax, janiw mä ayllut yaqha ayllur sarakipkaniti; taqi israelit jaqiw uraqipa pachpa ayllupan katxäsiñapa." 
Numbers36:8 Mä ayllunkir imill wawatix uraqinak katuqanixa, jupax pachpa ayllupat wila masi tamankir chachampiw jaqichasini. Ukhamat sapa israelita jaqix awkinakapat katuqat tuti katxäsini." 
Numbers36:9 Janiw katuqat uraqix, mä ayllut yaqha ayllurux sarakipkaniti. Israelan sapaqat ayllunakapaw wakt'ki uka uraqinak katxäsiñapa." 
Numbers36:10 Ukat Mahlá, Tirsá, Hoglá, Milcá, Noá sat Selofhad chachan phuchhanakapax, kunjämtix Tatitux Moisesar siskatayna ukhamarjam lurapxäna, jupanakasti awkipan jilanakapan yuqanakapampiw jaqichasipxäna," 
Numbers36:11  
Numbers36:12 uka chachanakasti Manasés ayllunkirinakänwa. Ukhamat uka imill wawanakan katuqat uraqinakapax, awkipan ayllupankir uraqipakïskäna." 
Numbers36:13 Aka arsutanakampi, kamachinakamp Tatitux Moisés tuqi israelitanakar churäna, kunapachatix jupanakax Moab pampanakana, Jordán jawir jak'ana, Jericó marka uñkatasin jikxatasipkän ukapacha." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Aka arunak Moisesax taqpach Israel markar parläna, kunapachatix jupanakax Cadés-barnea sat moabita markan jikxatasipkän ukapacha, Arabá sat wasarana, Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tuqinkir Suf chiqa uñkatasina. Uka jak'an Parán, Tófel, Labán, Haserot, Dizahab markanakax jikxatasi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Cadés-barnea sat markar puriñatakisti, Seír qullun thakhipanjam sarasaxa, Horeb qulluta tunka mayan uru sarañäskiwa." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Kunapachatix pusi tunka maräxän ukkhaxa, tunka mayan phaxsina mä uru saraqatarusti, Moisesax taqi Israel markaruw parläna taqi kuntix Tatitu Diosax juparu iwxawaykatayna ukanaka." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Thakhinjam sarkasasti, Moisesax reyinakaruw atipjatayna: Hesbón uraqinxa amorreonakan Sihón sat reyiparu, Edrei uraqinsti Astarot sat chiqanxa, Basán markankir Og sat reyiparuraki." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Israelitanakax Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tuqin jikxatasipkän ukkhaw Moisesax jupanakar aka iwxa arunak säna: 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Jiwasan Tatit Diosasax Horeb qullun jikxataskäyätan ukkhaxa, aka arunak sistu: ‘Jumanakax walja maranakaw aka qullunkxapxtaxa." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Jichhasti taqi yänakam apthapisxapxam, ukatsti amorreonakan qullunakaparu, jupanak jak'an utjir uraqinakar sarapxam: Arabá wasararu, qullu chiqanakaru, qhirwanakaru, Négueb pampanakaru, quta thiyanakaru, cananeonakan uraqiparu, Líbano uraqiru, Éufrates sat jach'a jawirar puriñkama." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Nayaw taqi uka uraqinak amparamar katuyapxsma; jichhasti sarapxamay uka uraqinak katuntiri, naya Diosaw uka uraqinak Abrahamampiru, Isaacampiru, Jacobumpiru, jupanakat saraqir wawanakapampir churañatak juramentomp arsta’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Nayax khaya urunakan jumanakarux sapxäyäsma: ‘Naya sapakix janiw taqi jumanakar apnaqirjamäkti. 
Deuteronomy1:10 Tatit Diosax jumanakar walja wawanak churapxtam, jichhasti jumanakax wali jach'a markäpxtawa, alaxpach warawaranakjam jan jakt'kayäpxaraktawa." 
Deuteronomy1:11 ¡Awkinakaman Tatit Diosapay jumanakarux waranqan waranqap jiltaypan, arsuwayapktam ukhamarjam aski waxt'äwinak churarakpan!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ukampis naya sapax janiw jumanakan jan walt'añanakamxa, ch'axwanakamsa askichirjamäkti." 
Deuteronomy1:13 Ukhamïpansti jichhax ayllunakam taypit suma amuyt'an chachanak ajllisipxam, ch'ikhi jaqinaka, aski lurir jaqinaka, jupanakar jach'a jilïrimat nayan uskuñaxataki’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:14 “Ukatsti jumanakax sapxistawa: ‘Kuntix jumax lurañ munkta ukax, nanakatakix walikiwa’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:15 “Ukat nayax sapaqat ayllunakam taypit amuyt'ani jaqinak ajllïyäta, yatiñan jaqinakaru, jumanakar apnaqañapataki; yaqhiparux waranqa jaqinak apnaqañapatakiw uchäyäta, yaqhiparusti patak jaqinak apnaqañapataki, mayninakarux phisqa tunka jaqinak apnaqañapataki, mayninakarusti tunka jaqinak apnaqañapataki, yaqhanakarusti sapaqat ayllunakan jilïripäñapataki." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Ukhamarusa, jumanakan ajllit taripirinakarux aka arunak iwxarakta: ‘Taqinir sum uñjapxam, marka masinakamaru, yaqha markat jutir jaqinakarusa, sapaqat maynir suma chiqa kankañamp uñjapxarakim;" 
Deuteronomy1:17 kunapachatix jumanakax juchanakap uñjapxäta ukkhaxa, janiw jumanakax ajanu uñkatasaki taripapxätati, jan ukasti pist'añan sarnaqir jaqirusa, qamir jaqirusa khuskak uñjapxäta, jan khitir axsarasa, juchañchañasti Diosankiwa. Mä kunasa jumanakatak jan askichkayänixa, nayaruw yatiyanipxitäta, nayaw ukanak uñjä’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:18 “Ukapachasti nayax walja iwxanak churapxäyäsma, kunanaktix lurapxañamäki ukanakxata." 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Uka qhipatsti, Tatitun iwxanakap ist'asinxa, Horeb qullut sartawayxtan, ukatsti amorreonakan qullup tuqiruw sarapxtan. Ukatsti uka jach'a axsarkañ wasar chiqaw muytanipxaraktan, Cadés-barnea chiqar puriñkama." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Uka chiqan nayax sapxsma: ‘Purinxtanwa, amorreonakan qullunakaparu, Tatit Diosasax churkistu uka uraqiru." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Jumanakan Tatit Diosamaw aka uraqinak churapxtam, jichhasti mantapxamaya, awkinakaman Tatit Diosapan arsutaparjam utjantasipxam. Jan axsarapxamti janirak ch'amanakamsa jiwt'ayasipxamti’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Ukampis jumanakax taqiniw jutasin nayar sapxista: ‘Jiwasanakat mayni chachanak nayraqat khithañäni, uka uraqi uñaqanipxañapataki, ukat kuttanisin jupanakax kawki thakhinjamsa sarsna, kawkïri markanakarus mantaraksna ukanak yatiyistani’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Uka amuyt'asti nayatakix walikïnwa, ukat nayax jumanak taypit tunka payan jaqinak ajllïyäta, sapa ayllut mayniru." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Jupanakasti qullunak tuqiruw uñjir sarapxäna, ukatsti Escol qhirwanakar purisax taqi uka chiqanak muytanipxäna." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ukatsti jupanakax uka uraqin achunakap jiwasar uñacht'ayir apanipxäna, akham sapxarakistu: ‘Tatit Diosasax churkistu uka uraqix wali sumawa’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Ukampis jumanakax janiw sarañ munapktati, Tatit Diosasan arsutaparux janiw jaysapktati," 
Deuteronomy1:27 utanakamansti jupataki arusisax, sapxaraktawa: ‘Tatitux janiw munkistuti, jiwasanakar q'al tukjañatakiw Egipto markat amorreonakan amparapar katuyañatak irpsunistu." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Jichhasti, ¿kawkirurak sarañänisti? Jilanakasax sapxiwa, ukan wali ch'amani jach'a tansa jaqinak utjatapa, ukhamarak jach'a pirqanakan muyuntat markanak utjatapa, Anac jach'a tansa jaqin yuqanakaparus uñjapxataparaki. Taqi ukanakasti ch'am jiwt'ayapxitu’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Ukat nayax jumanakar sapxsma: ‘Jan llakisipxamti, janirak jupanakarus axsarapxamti." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Tatit Diosamaw jumanakan nayräxam saraski, jumanakat arxatasisaw nuwasirakini, kamisatix Egipto markan lurir uñjapxta," 
Deuteronomy1:31 wasaran lurkän uksa uñjapxarakta ukhama. Jumanakan Tatit Diosamaw kawkha thakhinjamtix jutapkta ukanxa amparapar irpanipxtam, aka chiqar puriniñkama, kunjämatix mä awkix wawapar irpki ukhama.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ukampis jumanakax janiw Tatit Diosamar taqi chuymampi iyawsapkäyätati," 
Deuteronomy1:33 jupasti saräwiman jumanakan nayräxam saräna, kawkharutix puripxañamäki ukawja thaqhañataki. Arum sarañatakisti ninampi qhant'ayasa, urusti mä qinayampi thakhi uñacht'ayasa." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Tatitux jumanakan arusitanakam ist'asasti, walpun q'apisïna, ukat juramentomp arsurakïna:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Aka ñanqha jaqinakat janiw maynisa, kuna suma uraqtix nayra awkinakapar churañ arskäyät ukarux mantkaniti," 
Deuteronomy1:36 Jefuné jaqin Caleb yuqapakiw mantani, jupampiru, wawanakapampiruw kawkharutix takt'apkani uka uraqinak churä, Tatitur taqi chuymampi arkapxatap layku’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:37 “Jumanakan jucham laykuw Diosax nayatakis q'apisïna, ukat situ: ‘Janirakiw jumas uka uraqirux mantkätati." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Juma lantisti Josué yanapirimaw mantani. Jichhasti jupar ch'amañcht'am, jupaw aka uraqinak Israel markar katuyani." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Jumanakax sapxäyätawa: Uñisirinakasaw warminakasa, wawanakas aparistani, sasa; ukampis uka wawanakawa, kawkïrinakatix janïra sum amuyt'asirïpki uka wawanakaw uka uraqinakarux mantani, nayaw uka uraqinak jupanakar churä." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Jumanakasti, ¡wasarar kuttapxam, Mar Rojo quta tuqir wasitat sarapxam!’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Nayax ukanak yatiyapxsma, jumanakasti ukxar sapxistawa: ‘Dios nayraqatan jach'a jucha nanakax lurapxta, ukampis jichhax sarapxäwa, Tatit Diosasax iwxawaykistu ukhamarjamaw nuwasipxarakï’ sasa. Ukatsti sapa mayniw nuwasiñ yänakam aptasipxtaxa, qullur makhatañax janis ch'amäkaspa ukhama." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Ukampis Tatituw nayarux situ: ‘Jupanakar sarakim: Jan jumanakax nuwasir sarapxamti, uñisirinakamax atipjapxiristamwa, nayax janiw jumanak chikäkti’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy1:43 “Nayasti jumanakarux uk sapxsma, ukampis janiw nayarux ist'apkistati, jumanakax janiw Diosan arsutapar yäqapktati, ukatsti jach'a jach'a tukusaw qullur makhatapxtaxa." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Ukatsti uka qullunakan jakir amorreo jaqinakaw jumanakamp nuwasir mistunipxäna, jupanakasti wayrunqunakar uñtataw alisinipxtamxa, ukatsti atipjapxtamwa, Seír chiqat qalltasina, Hormá sat chiqakama." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Kuttanxapxta ukkhasti, jumanakax Tatit nayraqatan jachapxtaxa, ukampis jupax janiw jachatanakam ist'känti." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Ukat jumanakax Cadés chiqan qhiparapxtaxa, walja maranakaw ukan utjasipxaraktaxa." 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Ukatsti wasar tuqiruw sarapxtan, Mar Rojo qutar sarki uka thakhinjama, Tatitux nayar siskitu ukhamarjama, Seír qullunak thiyan jaya maranakaw sarnaqtan." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Tatitusti nayar situwa: 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Wali jaya pachaw aka qullunak muyxapxtaxa, jichhasti amsta tuqir sarxapxam." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Markarusti akham iwxarakim: Jumanakax Esaú chachan wawanakapan uraqip chiqaw sarakipapxäta, jupanakasti Seír chiqan jakapxi, jumanakan wila masinakamawa, jumanakarux axsarapxtamwa, ukampis wal amuyasipxam," 
Deuteronomy2:5 janirak jumanakax jupanakar nuwantapxamti, nayax janiw mä jisk'a uraqsa uka markat jumanakar churapkämati, uka Seír sat qullunakasti Esaú chachan wawanakapankiwa. Nayaw jupanakar churxta." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Qullqimpiw manq'añanak jupanakat alasipxäta, umt'apkäta uka umsa alasipxätawa’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Jumanakan Tatit Diosamax taqi luräwinakaman aski waxt'äwinak churapxtam; jupaw aka pusi tunka maranakas jumanakamp chikäski, aka jach'a wasaranjam sarnaqañansa jan kun pist'ayas imapxaraktam." 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Ukatsti Arabá, Elat, Esión-guéber ukar sarañ thakhipanjam sarxapxtan, wila masinakasan uraqip chiqa sarakipasina, kawkhantix Esaú chachan wawanakapax jakapki uka Seír qullunak chiqa. Ukawjat muytapxaraktan Moab wasara thakhinjam sarañataki." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Ukapachaw Tatitux sarakitu: ‘Moabita jaqinakar jan axsarayamti, janirak nuwasimsa, jupanakax Lot chachan wawanakapawa; nayasti janirakiw mä jisk'a uraqsa uka markat churkämati. Nayaw jupanakar Ar sat uraqinak churta’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Uka uraqix nayratpach emita sat jaqinakan jakäwipänwa, jupanakasti jach'a tansa jaqinakänwa, waljanïpxarakïnwa, Anac sat jach'a tansa jaqin wawanakapjam jach'a tansarakïnwa." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Chiqpachansa jaqinakax refaíta jaqinakat uñt'apxäna, moabitanakax emitanaka sasa sutichapkchïn ukasa." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Uka Seír uraqinxa, nayrapachax horeo sat jaqinakaw jakapxatayna, ukampis Esaú chachan wawanakapaw jupanakarux tukjatayna, ukat uraqinakapan utjantasipxatayna, kunjämtix Israel markax lurkatayna kawkïr uraqtix Tatitux jupanakar churkatayna ukhama.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Tatitusti sänwa: ‘Jichhasti sarantapxam Zéred sat jisk'a jawir makhatapxam’ sasa. Ukatsti ukhamaw jiwasanakax uka jawir makhatapxtan. 
Deuteronomy2:14 “Kunapachatix Cadés-barnea chiqat mistunipktan, ukat Zéred sat jisk'a jawir makhatapktan uka urkamaxa, kimsa tunka kimsaqallqun maraw mäkipxäna. Ukchañkamasti campamenton jikxatasipkän uka nuwasiñatak wakichat jaqinakax jiwarxapxänwa, Tatitux juramentomp arskatayna uka arsutarjama." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Tatitun jach'a ch'amapaw jupanakxar purïna taqinir jiwarayasa. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Nuwasiñatak wakichat jaqinakax jan mayan jiwarxapxän ukapachasti," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Tatitux nayarux sitänwa: 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Jichhürpachaw Moab uraqin qurpanakap makhatäta, ukatsti Ar sat uraqiruw sararakïta." 
Deuteronomy2:19 Ukampisa, amonita jaqinakamp jikiskät ukapachaxa, janiw kuns jumax arxayätati, janirakiw nuwasiñ munätasa, jupanakax Lot chachan saraqirinakaparakiwa, janiw nayax uka uraqit kuns churkämati, uka uraq jupanakaruw churxta’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Uka uraqix refaíta jaqinakan uraqipat uñt'atarakïnwa, nayrapachax refaíta sat jach'a tansa jaqinakaw uka chiqan jakapxarakitayna, jupanakarusti amonita jaqinakax zamzumita sasaw sutichapxäna." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Uka zamzumita markasti walja jaqinakani jach'a markänwa, jaqinakapas jach'a tansanakänwa, Anac sat jach'a tansa jaqin wawanakapjamänwa, ukampis Tatituw jupanakarux amonita jaqinak tuqi t'unjäna, ukatsti amonitanakaw uka uraqinakanxa utjantasipxäna." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Kunjämatix Seír uraqin jakir Esaú chachan wawanakapax uka uraqinakan utjantasiñatak horeo sat jaqinakar tukjkatayna ukhama. 
Deuteronomy2:23 Uka pachparakiw heveo sat markampix lurasïna, jupanakasti jisk'a markanakan jakapxäna Gaza uraq jak'ana, ukatsti Creta uraqit jutir filisteo jaqinakaw jupanakarux tukjäna, uraqinakap katuntasinsti ukan jakapxarakïna.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Tatitusti sänwa: ‘¡Jichhasti sarantapxam, uka Arnón jawir makhatapxarakim! Nayaw uka amorreo Sihón sat Hesbón markan reyiparu, ukhamarak markaparusa jumanakar katuyapxäma. ¡Uraqip katuntasipxam, jupanakamp nuwasipxarakim!" 
Deuteronomy2:25 Jichhürut uksarusti taqi markanakaw jumanakatak axsarapxani. Jumanakat parlir ist'asinsti, jupanakax wal khathatipxani, llakisipxarakini’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Cademot sat wasaratpach nayax jaqinak khithäyäta, Hesbón markan Sihón reyiparu sumat akham sañapataki:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Uraqim chiqa sarakipt'apxä, nanakax thakhi chiqakiw sarapxä, uraqinakamat yaqha chiqanak jan takt'asaki." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Qullqiruw manq'añ aljapxitäta, umapkä uka umsa alasipxämawa. Uraqimanjam sarakipt'añak munapxta," 
Deuteronomy2:29 kunjämtix Seír chiqan jakir Esaú chachan wawanakapasa, Ar chiqan jakir moabita jaqinakas sarakipt'ayapkitu ukhama, Jordán jawir khurkatar makhatañkama, ukhamat kawkïri uraqtix nanakan Tatit Diosaxax churapkitani ukar puriñataki’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Ukampis Sihón reyix janiw uraqip chiqa sarakipañas munkänti, jumanakan Tatit Diosamaw jan munañapatak uka reyin chuymap mayjt'ayäna, ukhamat jumanakan amparamar katuyañataki, kamisatix jichhürun jikxataski ukhama." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Ukat Tatitux nayar situ: ‘Jichhatpach nayax Sihón reyir katuysma, taqi uraqinakapsa katuyaraksma; uraqipar mantam, ukatsti jumatak katuntasim’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy2:32 “Sihón reyisti taqi ejercitopampiw jiwasamp jikintasir mistunïna, Jahas chiqan nuwasiñataki," 
Deuteronomy2:33 ukampis jiwasan Tatit Diosasaw amparanakasar katuyistu, ukatsti jupampiru, wawanakapampiru, taqi ejercitopampiruw atipjaraktan." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Taqpach markanakap katuntasin t'unjaraktanxa; ukatsti chachanakampiru, warminakampiru, wawanakampiruw jiwaraytanxa, janiw maynirus jakayktanti." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Jiwasanakatakisti uywanakampi, jila alan jilt'ir yänakampik uka atipjat markanakat katustanxa." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Janiw kawkïri markas jiwasan amparanakasat jaltirjamäkänti; Tatit Diosasaw taqi aka markanak amparasar katuyistu, Arnón jawir thiyankir Aroer sat markat qalltasa, qhirwa chinqankir marka, Galaad uraqkama." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Ukat sipansa kawkïr uraqinaktix jan katuntkäyätan ukanakax akanakänwa: Amonitanakan uraqipa, Jaboc jawir tuqinkir taqi uka uraqinaka, qullunakankir markanaka, ukhamarak taqi kawkïri uraqinaktix Tatitu Diosax ‘Janiw nuwantapxätati’ siskäna uka uraqinaka." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Uka qhipatsti yaqha thakhinjam Basán tuqir sarapxtan, ukampis Edrei sat chiqar purisasti Basán marka apnaqir Og sutin reyipax taqpach ejercitopampiw jiwasamp nuwasir mistunïna." 
Deuteronomy3:2 “Ukat Tatitux nayar sarakitu: ‘Jan jumax axsaramti, nayaw jupampiru, ejercitopampiru, ukhamarak taqi markaparus amparamar katuyaskäma, ukhamat jumax kunjämtix Hesbón markan jakir amorreonakan Sihón sat reyipar lurkta, uka kipka jupar lurañamataki’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Ukasti ukhamänwa. Tatit Diosasax jiwasan amparanakasaruw Og reyimpiru, taqpach ejercitopampir katuyistu. Ukatsti jupanakarux taqiniruw jan maynin jiwaraytan." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Argob sat chiqankir suxta tunka markanakapsa taqpach katuntapxaraktan, janiw mä markas jan katuntatax uñjaskänti." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Taqi uka markanakasti suma jach'a pirqanakan muyuntatänwa, jach'a punkunakani, hierrot lurat barranakani; ukatsti walja jan uyuchrantat markanaksa t'unjaraktanwa." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Taqi uka markanak t'unjapxtan, kunjämtix Hesbón markankir Sihón reyimpix lurktan ukhama, ukhamarak chachanakarusa, warminakarusa, wawanakarusa jiwarayasa," 
Deuteronomy3:7 jiwasanakatakisti taqi uywanakampi, taqi kunanakatix jila alanïki ukanakampik katuntastanxa." 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Ukhamaw jiwasax khä urunakan uka pä amorreo reyinakan uraqinakap katuntastan, jupanakax Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tuqin jakapxäna, Arnón jawira chiqat Hermón sat qullukama." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Sidonio jaqinakax uka Hermón sat qullurux Sirión sasaw sutichapxäna, amorreo jaqinakasti Senir sasaw sutichapxarakïna.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 Og reyin apnaqatäkän taqi uka markanak katuntapxäyätan, pata pampanakankir markanakata, Galaad, Basán uraqinakata, Salcá, Edrei chiqakama." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Og sat reyikiw refaíta sat jach'a tansa jaqinakat qhiparxäna. Ikiñapax hierrot luratänwa; sayt'urux pusi metronïnwa iranarusti pä metronïnwa. Uka ikiñasti jichhakamaw amonitanakan Rabá sat markapan utjaski.) 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Kawkïr uraqinaktix katuntapkäyätan uka uraqinakatsti, Rubén, Gad uka ayllunkirinakaruw churäyäta, Arnón jawir thiyankir Aroer sat chiqata, Galaad chikat qullunakkama, markanakapamppacha." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Ukatsti Manasesan chikat aylluparuxa, Galaad uraqit jilt'askäna, taqi Basán uraqinaka Og reyix apnaqkatayna uka uraqinak churäyäta, Argob uraqinakamppacha; uka uraqinakasti refaíta jaqinakan uraqipat uñt'atänwa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 (Manasesan Jaír sat yuqapaw Argob uraqinak katuntasxäna, Guesur, Maaca uraqinakamp qurpaski uka chiqakama. Jaír chachax Basán uraqirux Havot-jaír sasaw sutichäna pachpa sutipampi, uka sutimpiw jichhürunsa uñt'atäski.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Maquir chacharusti Galaad uraqi churäyäta," 
Deuteronomy3:16 Rubén, Gad ayllunkirinakarusti Galaad uraqita Arnón jawirkamäkis uka uraqinak churäyäta, chika qhirwata, Jaboc sat jawirkama, amonitanakan uraqipampi qurpäki ukakama." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Inti jalsu tuqirusti Arabá sat uraqi churäyäta, Pisgá sat qullu kayu chiqaru, Jordán jawirampi qurpaski uka uraqi, Quinéret qutat Mar Muerto sat qutäki ukakama." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Uka urun nayax akham iwxapxaraksma: ‘Jumanakan Tatit Diosamaw aka uraqi jumanakar katuyapxtam. Khitinakatix nuwasiñ yatipkta ukanakax nuwasiñ yänakam apxarusin israelit jilanakam nayräxap sarantapxam. 
Deuteronomy3:19 Churapksma uka markanakansti warminakampi, wawanakampi, walja uywanakamampikiw qhiparani, jumanakan walja uywanakanïpxatam yattwa." 
Deuteronomy3:20 Janiw jumanakax churapksma uka uraqir kuttanipkätati, Tatitux jilanakamar samarañ churkani ukkhakama, kunjämtix jumanakar churapktam ukhama, jupanakan kawkïr uraqtix Tatit Diosamax Jordán jawirat khursar churkani uka uraqinak katuntasiñapkama’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Josué chacharusti aka iwxa churarakta: ‘Taqi kuntix Tatit Diosamax uka pä reyir lurki ukxa kipka nayranakamampiw uñjtaxa. Kawkhanjamtix sarkäta uka markanakarux, uka pachparak lurani." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Uka markanakar jan axsaramti, juman Tatit Diosamaw jumanakat arxatasis nuwasiskani’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Ukapachaw Tatitur achikt'asta: 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Dios Tatay, jumaw aka luqtirimar ch'amam uñacht'aytaxa. Janiw jumjam jach'a muspharkañanak lurir yaqha Diosax utjkiti alaxpachansa, akapachansa." 
Deuteronomy3:25 Jordán jawir khurkatar makhatt'ayakitaya, khä suma uraqi uñjañ munta, khä suma qullunaksa, Líbano uraqsa uñjañ munarakta’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Ukampis Diosax jumanakan jucha luratanakam laykuw nayatak q'apisïna, janirakiw mayisitaxarux ist'añ munkitänti. Ukat sipan akham sitäna: ‘¡Jan juk'ampi ukxat parlistati!" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Jichhasti khä Pisgá sat qullur makhatam, uka patat uñatatam amsta tuqiru, aynach tuqiru, inti jalsu tuqiru, inti jalanta tuqiru, ukampis jumax janiw Jordán jawir khurkatarux makhatkätati." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Jichhasti Josué yanapirimar kunatix iwxañäki ukanak iwxam, ch'aman sayt'añapatak jupar ch'amañcham, jupaw markan nayräxap sarani, uka uraqinaksa katuntarakini, kawkïr uraqtix jichhax uñjkäta ukanaka’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Uka qhipatsti, jiwasax Bet-peor sat qhirwan qhiparapxtan." 
Deuteronomy4:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Jichhasti Israelit jaqinaka, yatichapksma uka kamachi arunak ist'apxam, uka kamachi arunakarjam phuqhas sarnaqapxarakim, kawkïri uraqtix nayra awkinakaman Tatit Diosapax churapkätam ukan jakapxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Churapksma uka kamachi arunakarux janipun jilxatayapxamti, janirak apaqapxamsa; jan ukasti, Tatit Diosaman kamachi arunakap phuqhapxam." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Jumanakasti uñjapxtawa, kuntix Tatitux Baal-peor sat chiqan lurki ukxa, ukhamarak kunjämtix jumanak taypit ukan utjir diosar yupaychirinakar jiwaraykän uksa." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Ukampis jumanakat khitinakatix Tatit Diosamar taqi iyawsañampi arkapkta ukanakax jakasipktawa. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Nayasti jumanakarux Tatit Diosax iwxawaykitu taqi uka kamachi arunak yatichapxsma, katuqapkäta uka uraqin uka kamachinakarjam sarnaqapxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Uka kamachi arunak phuqhasaraki sarnaqapxam, ukhamat taqi markanakas yatini, jumanakan yatiñ kankañanïpxatama, suma amuyt'anïpxatama; kunapachatix uka kamachinakxat yatipkani ukkhasti, jupanakax sapxaniwa: ‘Kunja suma amuyt'an markas aka markaxa’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy4:7 ¿Kawkïr jach'a markan diosaparak jupanak jak'anki, kamisatix Tatit Diosasax jupar art'asipktan ukapacha jiwasanak jak'ankki ukhamsti?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 ¿Kawkïr jach'a markarak utji, kamachinakapasa, arsutanakapas chiqa, nayax jumanakar jichhürun yatiyapksma ukhamasti?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Jichhasti sum imapxam, janipun armasipxamti taqi kuntix uñjapkta ukanaka, janirak chuymanakamatsa mistpanti; ukat sipana, wawanakamansa wawanakapar yatichapxam." 
Deuteronomy4:10 “Kunürutix Horeb qullun jumanakax Diosan nayraqatapan jikxatasipkäyäta ukkhaxa, Tatitux nayaruw sitäna: ‘Taqpach markar tantachthapim, arunakax ist'añapataki, jakañanakapan nayar waqaychañ yatiqañapataki, ukatsti wawanakapar kipkarak yatichapxañapataki’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Jumanakasti qullu kayuruw jak'achasipxtaxa, qullutsti aqaskir ninanakaw wali alaykam mistüna, ch'iyar ch'amak qinayaw uñjasirakïna;" 
Deuteronomy4:12 ukatsti Tatitux nina taypit parlanipxtam. Jumanakasti arunakap ist'apxtawa, ukampis janiw jupar uñjapktati." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Tatitusti jumanakarux jupan suma arust'äwip yatiyapxtam, ukasti Tunka Kamachinakawa, pä qala tablar qillqt'at churapxtam, jumanakan uka kamachinakarjam sarnaqapxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Nayaruw Tatitux iwxitu kamachinakapa, arsutanakap jumanakar yatichañataki, churapkätam uka uraqin phuqhañanakamataki." 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Kunürutix Tatitux Horeb qullun nina taypit parlanipktam ukkhax janiw kunsa uñjapktati. Walpun ukanakat amuyasipxam," 
Deuteronomy4:16 jan jumanakan uka yaqha diosanak lurañ juchar puripxañamataki, kawkïrinakatix chacharu, warmiru uñtat luratäki ukanaka," 
Deuteronomy4:17 janiraki animalanakaru, jamach'inakaru," 
Deuteronomy4:18 asirunakaru, chawllanakar uñtat luratäki ukanaksa." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Ukatsti alaxpach uñtasina, intiru, phaxsiru, warawaranakaru, taqpach warawaranakar uñtapkät ukapachaxa, jan ukanakar yupaychapxamti, ukanaksti Tatit Dios awkisaw taqi akapach uraqinkir markanakatak luri." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Jumanakarusti Tatituw irpsunipxtam khä Egipto hierro umatatayañ hornota, ukatsti jupan markaparuw tukuyapxtam, kunjämatix jichhax jikxatasipkta ukhama." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Ukampisa, Tatitux jumanakan juchanakam laykuw nayatak q'apisi, ukatsti juramento luri nayan Jordán jawir jan makhatañaxataki, churapkätam uka suma uraqir jan mantañaxatakisa." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ukhamasti nayax aka markan jiwä, janirakiw Jordán jawir khurkatarus makhatkäti, ukampis jumanakax uka jawir makhatapxätawa, uka suma uraqsa jumanakatakiw katuntasipxäta." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Ukampis amuyasipxam janipun kuna suma arust'äwtix Diosampi lurapkta ukanak armasipxamti. Janirak kuna idolonaksa, kunar uñtat yaqha diosanaksa lurasipxamti. Tatitun arunakap phuqhapxam, janipun kuna idolonakarus yupaychapxamti." 
Deuteronomy4:24 ¡Jumanakan Tatit Diosamasti tumpasir Diosawa, taqi kuns nakhantir ninjamawa!" 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Kunapachatix jumanakax uka uraqin wawanakanïxapxäta, allchhinakanïxapxäta, jumanakas awkiptxapxarakïta, ukatsti jumanakax kuna uñtat yaqha diosanak lurasisa jucharu puripxäta, ukhamat Tatit Diosam nayraqatan mä jach'a jucha lurasina, ukat jupar q'apisiyapxät ukkhaxa," 
Deuteronomy4:26 alaxpachampi, akapachampiw qhanañchirit sayt'ani, janiw walja urunak Jordán jawira khurkatankir uraqin jakapkätati, jan ukasti taqi jumanakax t'unjataw uñjasipxäta." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Tatitusti jumanakarux taqi markanakaruw ananukupxätam, ukatsti mä juk'anikirakiw jumanakat uka markanakan jilt'ani." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Uka markanakansti jaqin lurat diosanakaruw luqtapxäta qalata, lawata lurat idolonakaru, ukanakasti janiw uñjapkiti janirakiw ist'apkisa, manq'apkisa, samsupkisa." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Ukampis jumanakatix uka chiqan Tatit Diosamar taqi chuymampi, taqi jakañampirak thaqhapxäta ukaxa, jikxatapxätawa." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Kunapachatix jumanakax taqi uka t'aqhisiñanakana, llakisiñanakan uñjasisina, Tatitur kuttapxäta, iyawsapxarakïta ukkhaxa," 
Deuteronomy4:31 Diosan suma chuymanïtap laykux janiw jaytanukupkätamti, t'unjapkätamsa, janiw awkinakamamp lurat arust'äwit armaskaniti, janirakiw arupampi arsuwayki ukanak phuqhañsa armaskaniti." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Jichhasti jumanakat nayra pacha urunak uñtapxam, Diosax jaqir aka uraqin irnuqkän uka pachatpach yatxatapxam; taqi akapach uraqinjam sarasin jiskt'apxarakim, kunapachach kunjämatix jichhax muspharkañanak luraski ukhama jach'a lurasïwinakax utjpachäna." 
Deuteronomy4:33 ¿Utjpachati kuna markasa jumanakjam Diosan nina taypitpach parlanitap ist'irixa? 
Deuteronomy4:34 ¿Utjarakpachati mä diosasa markaparu yaqha markanak taypit ajlliri, wali yant'anakampi, uñacht'äwinakampi, muspharkay luräwinakampi, nuwasiñanakampi, ukatsti wali ch'aman amparampi katuntasa, wali axsarkañ luräwinak luriri, kunjämatix Tatit Diosamax jumanakatak Egipto markan lurkäna ukhamsti?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Ukanakasti Tatitun chiqpach Diosätapa yatipxañamataki uñacht'ayatawa, jupat sipansa yaqhax jan utjatap yatiñamataki." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Jupasti alaxpachatpach jumanakar chiqachañatak parlanipxtam, aka uraqinxa jach'a ninap uñacht'ayapxtam, arunakapsti nina taypit ist'apxaraktaxa." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Jupaw nayra awkinakamarux munäna, ukatsti wawanakaparuw ajllirakïna, Egipto markat jach'a ch'amapamp qhispiyanisa." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Jumanak nayräxatsti walja jaqinakan markanakaruw jaqunuku, jumanakat sipansa juk'amp ch'aman markanakaru, jupanakan uraqinakap katuntasisin utjasipxañamataki, kunjämtix jichhax luraski ukhama." 
Deuteronomy4:39 “Ukhamasti, chuymanakamar sum imapxam Tatitukiw Diosaxa, alaxpachansa, akapachansa, janiw yaqhax jupat juk'amp utjkiti." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Jichhürun churapksma uka kamachi arunakap phuqhapxam, ukatsti jumanakasa, wawanakamasa, sumakiw sarnaqapxäta, walja maranakarakiw jakapxäta Tatit Diosamax wiñayatak churapkätam uka uraqina.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Ukatsti Moisesax kimsa markanak ajllïna Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tuqiru," 
Deuteronomy4:42 ukhamat khiti jaqitix masipar jan munkasin jiwaykaspa, jani uka masipampix ch'axwirïkasina, ukhamat uka kimsa markanakat maynïr markar jaltxasin qhispiyasiñataki." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Uka markanakasti akanakänwa: Rubén ayllunkirinakatakixa, wasara pata pampankir Béser marka; Gad sat ayllunkirinakatakisti, Galaad uraqinkir Ramot sat marka; Manasesan chikat ayllunkirinakatakisti, Basán uraqinkir Golán sat marka." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Aka yatichäwinak Moisesax Israel markar churäna," 
Deuteronomy4:45 ukhamarak kamachinaka, kamachi arunaka, arsüwinak yatiyäna, kunapachatix jupanakax Egipto markat mistunisina," 
Deuteronomy4:46 Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tuqin jikxatasipkän ukapacha, Bet-peor sat uraqi uñkatas qhirwana; amorreonakan Sihón sat reyipan uraqipana. Sihón reyisti Hesbón markan jakäna, ukatsti Moisesampi Israel markampiw jupar atipjapxäna, israelitanakax Egipto markat mistunipkän ukapacha." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Israelitanakasti Sihón reyin taqpach uraqinakap katuntäna, Og sat Basán markan reyipan uraqinakapamppacha, Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tuqin jakapkän uka pani amorreo reyinakan uraqinakapa." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Jupanakan uraqinakapasti Sirión sat qullut qalltäna, uka qullusti Hermón sutimpi uñt'atarakiwa. Aroer chiqata, aynach tuqir muytanïna, Arnón jawir thiyanakata, Pisgá sat qullukama. Ukatsti Mar Muerto sat quta sarakipäna, Arabá sat taqpach uraqinakampi. Uka chiqan Moisesax, Jordán jawirat inti jalsu tuqin israelitanakarux Tatitun kamachi arunakap katuyäna." 
Deuteronomy4:49  
Deuteronomy5:1 Moisesasti Israel markar tantachthapisin säna: “Israelankir jaqinaka, sum ist'apxam kawkïr kamachinaka, kamachi arsutanaktix jichhürun yatiyapkäma ukanaka. Sum p'iqinakamar yatiqapxam, ukatsti taqi sarnaqäwiman ukarjam sarnaqapxarakim." 
Deuteronomy5:2 “Tatit Diosasax mä suma arust'äwi jiwasampi Horeb qullun lurawayi. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Janiw Diosax awkinakasampikiti uka suma arust'äwi lurki, jan ukasti taqi jiwasanakampiw luraraki, khitinakatix jichhürun aka chiqan tantacht'ata jikxatasktan ukanakampi." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Diosasti mä nina taypit jumanakampix ajanuy ajanu parli. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Nayasti ukankaskäyätwa, Tatitumpi jumanakampi uka chika taypina, Diosan arunakap jumanakar yatiyasa, jumanakasti ninaru axsarapxatamat qullurux jan makhatapktati. Tatitusti akham säna:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 “ ‘Nayätwa juman Tatit Diosamaxa, nayarakiw Egipto markat irpsunsma, kawkhantix t'aqhisiyat jaqïkäyat uka markata." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “ ‘Janiw nayat sipan yaqha diosanakanïyätati. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “ ‘Janiw yaqha diosanak lurasïtati kunar uñtatsa, alaxpachankirir uñtatsa, aka uraqinkirir uñtatsa, quta manqhankirir uñtatsa." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Janiw ukanakar killisïtati yupaycharakïtasa; nayätwa Tatit Diosamaxa, janiw yaqhampïpxañam munkti. Nayasti nayar uñisiri awkinakan juchanakapat wawanakapan wawanakaparuw mutuyta;" 
Deuteronomy5:10 ukampisa munasiñampiw uñjarakta, khitinakatix nayar munasipkitu, kamachi arunakaxsa phuqhapkaraki jupanakan waranqa mita wawanakan saraqirinakaparusa." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “ ‘Janiw Tatit Diosaman sutip inamayatak aytasïtati. Jupasti inamay sutip aytasirinakarux mutuyaniwa. 
Deuteronomy5:12 “ ‘Sábado urut amtasïta, uka urun Tatit Diosar jach'añchañamataki, kunjämtix Tatit Diosamax iwxawayktam ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Suxta uruw irnaqäta, taqi kuntix lurañamäki ukanakxa, ukürunakaw luräta," 
Deuteronomy5:14 ukampis paqallqüri urux Tatit Diosamar luqtat samarañ uruwa. Uka urux janiw jumax kuns lurätati, yuqamasa, phuchhamasa, uywatamasa, kawkïri uywanakamasa, asnomasa, markanakaman utjasir jaya markat jutir jaqisa janirak kuns lurpati; ukhamat uywatamax chachäpasa, warmïpasa, jumjamarak samarañapataki." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Egipto markan t'aqhisiyat jaqïtam amtasim, Tatit Diosamaw jach'a ch'amapamp uka markat irpsuntam, ukat Tatit Diosamax iwxtam sábado urun samarañamataki." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “ ‘Awkimaru, taykamaru waqaycham, Tatit Diosamax iwxawayktam ukhamarjama, Tatit Diosamax churkätam uka uraqina walja maranak jakañamataki." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “ ‘Janiw jiwayätati. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “ ‘Janiw wachuq jucha lurätati. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “ ‘Janiw lunthatasïtati. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “ ‘Janiw jaqi masimatak kuna k'ari arunaksa parlätati. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “ ‘Janiw jaqi masiman warmip munapayätati. Janirakiw jaqi masiman utapsa, uraqinakapsa, uywatapsa, uywanakapsa, asnopsa, kunatix jupankki ukanaksa munapayätati.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Aka arunaksti Tatituw jach'at parläna, kunapachatix taqi jumanakax qullu kayun tantachasipkta ukapacha. Arupasti nina taypita, mä ch'iyar qinay taypit mistunïna. Tatitux pä qala tablanakaruw kamachinak qillqäna, uksti nayaruw katuyitu, ukatsti janiw kunampsa arskxänti." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Ukampis jumanakax Tatitun arup uka ch'amak taypit arsunitap ist'asaxa, ukatsti qullun nina aqaskatap uñjasaxa, axsarayasipxäyätawa, ukat jumanakax ayllunakan jilïrinakapampi, Israelan jilïrinakapampix nayamp parlir jutapxtaxa," 
Deuteronomy5:24 ukatsti sapxistawa: ‘Chiqpachapuniw jiwasan Diosasax qhapaq kankañapampi, jach'a ch'amapamp uñacht'ayistu, arupsa nina taypitpach ist'apxtan. Jichhüruw uñjtan Tatitu Diosan jaqimpi parlatapa, jaqir jan jiwayasa." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Ukampisa, ¿kunatarak jiwasasti uka ninan nakhantat jiwañänisti? Wasitattix Tatit Diosasan arup ist'añänixa, jiwañäniwa;" 
Deuteronomy5:26 ¿khiti jaqirak jiwasanakjam jakkir Diosan arup nina taypit parlaskir ist'asin, jan jiwkisti?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Jumakiy jak'achasim, ukatsti taqi kuntix Tatit Diosasax siskätam uk ist'arakïta, ukat nanakar yatiyapxitäta kuntix parlkätam ukanaka; nanakasti kuntix sapkitäta ukanak phuqhapxäwa’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Tatit Diosasti taqi parlatanakam ist'äna, ukat nayarux situ: ‘Aka markan taqi parlatanakap ist'ta, sapki ukax walikiwa." 
Deuteronomy5:29 ¡Walïspaw jupanakan ukham amuyunïpxaspa ukaxa, ukatsti jach'añchapxitaspa, kamachi arunakaxsa taqi urunakan phuqhapxarakispa ukaxa, ukhamat wawanakapasa, jupanakas wiñay sum sarnaqapxaspa!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Jichhasti jupanakar sanim: Utjäwinakamar kuttxapxam, sasa;" 
Deuteronomy5:31 ukampis jumax akankañatakiw kuttanïta. Kamachinak katuyäma jupanakar yatichañamataki, ukhamat jupanakax uka kamachi arunakarjam kuna uraqtix churkä ukan sarnaqapxañapataki’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Ukhamasti israelitanaka, Tatit Diosaman taqi iwxanakaparjamay jan kawksarus jithiqtasa jakäwinakaman sarnaqapxam." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Tatit Diosamax uñacht'ayapktam uka thakhinjam sarapxam, katuqapkäta uka uraqin walja maranak jakapxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Aka kamachi arunaka, kamachinaka, arsutanakap Tatit Diosamax nayar churitu jumanakar yatichañataki, ukhamarjam jumanakan sarnaqapxañamataki, kawkïr uraqinaktix jupax churapkätam uka uraqina." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Ukhamat jumanakax Tatit Diosamar jach'añchapxäta, ukatsti taqi jakañaman phuqhapxarakïta, jichhürun jumanakaru, wawanakamaru, allchhinakamar churapksma uka kamachinakampi, kamachi arunakampi, ukhamat walja maranak jakapxarakïta." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Ukhamasti israelit jaqinaka, ukhamarjam sarnaqapxam, uka arunak phuqhañatak ch'amañchasipxam. Ukhamat kusisita sarnaqapxäta, ukatsti mä jach'a markaw uka uraqin tukupxarakïta, kawkhantix lechesa, misk'is umjam jalaski uka uraqina, kunjämatix nayra awkinakaman Tatit Diosapax arupampi arsuwaykän ukhama." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Ist'am Israel marka: Jiwasan Tatit Diosasax mä sapakiwa. 
Deuteronomy6:5 “Tatit Diosamarux taqi chuymamampi, taqi jakañamampi, taqi ch'amamampi munam." 
Deuteronomy6:6 “Jichhürun sisksma uka arunak chuymamaruw katuqasïta," 
Deuteronomy6:7 ukatsti wawanakamaruw uka arunakxat yaticharakïta; utamankkasina, thakhinjam sarkasina, ukhamarak ikintañatakisa, sartañatakis parläta." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Uka kamachi arunaksti amparamaruw ñach'antasïta, paramaruw mä chimpur uñtat uchasirakïta," 
Deuteronomy6:9 uta punkumaruw qillqantäta, markaman jach'a punkunakaparuw qillqantarakïta." 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Jumanakan Tatit Diosamax kuna uraqtix Abraham, Isaac, Jacob awkinakamar churä siskatayna ukaruw puriyapxätam. Uka uraqisti wali jach'awa, suma markanakaniwa, uka markanakasti janiw jumanakan luratäkiti." 
Deuteronomy6:11 Suma yänakan phuqhantat utanakan jakapxäta, ukanakasti janiw jumanakan ch'amamäkiti, phuch'unakat uma umt'asipxäta, uka phuch'unaksti janiw jumanak allisipktati; ukatsti uva, olivo yapunakat sist'asiñkam manq'asipxäta, uka yapunaksti janiw jumanak satapktati." 
Deuteronomy6:12 Taqi ukanakax ukhamäxani ukapachaxa, janipun jumanakax Tatitut armasipxamti, jupaw Egipto markat irpsunipxtam, t'aqhisiyat sarnaqapkäyäta uka markata." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Ukhamasti, jumanakan Tatit Diosamar yupaychapxam, jupa saparukirak luqtapxam, ukatsti kunapachatix juramento lurapkäta ukkhaxa, Tatitun sutipxaruk lurapxam." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Janipuni yaqha markanakan diosanakaparux yupaychapxamti. 
Deuteronomy6:15 Jumanakampïki uka Tatitu Diosamasti janiw yaqhampïpxañam munkiti, jupasti jumanakatakiw q'apisispa, ukatsti q'alpun jumanakar t'unjapxiristam." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Janirak jumanakan Tatit Diosamarux yant'apxamti, kunjämtix Masá chiqan lurapkta ukhama." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Taqi chuymampirak Tatit Diosaman kamachi arunakap phuqhapxam, churapktam uka iwxanakapsa, kamachinakapsa phuqhapxarakim." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Ukatsti Diosan nayraqatapan chiqäki, askïki ukanak lurapxam, kusisit jakapxañamataki, kawkïr uraqtix Diosax arupampi awkinakamar churañ arskäna uka uraqir mantapxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy6:19 Tatituw taqi uñisirinakamar jumanak nayräxat ananukuni, kunjämtix arsuwaykän ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Kunapachatix wawanakamax mä uru jiskt'apxätam: ‘¿Kun sañarak muni uka kamachi arunakampi, arsutanakampi, Tatit Diosasax churawaykistu ukanakasti?’ sasa," 
Deuteronomy6:21 jumanakasti jupanakarux sapxätawa: ‘Nanakax Egipto markan faraón reyin t'aqhisiyat uywatapäpxayätwa, ukampis Tatituw wali ch'amapampi ukat irpsunipxitu." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Nanakax Diosan jach'a uñacht'äwinakapampi, jach'a muspharkañ luräwinakapamp uñjapxta, Egipto markan faraón reyipar mutuyki, taqi utapankirinakarus mutuykaraki ukanaka." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Ukampis Tatitux uka markat nanakarux irpsunipxitu, ukatsti kawkïr uraqtix nayra awkinakaxar churañ arskatayna ukaruw irpanipxarakitu." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Ukatsti Tatit Diosasax taqi uka kamachi arunakarjama, axsartañ chuymampi sarnaqañ iwxapxitu, jiwasanakan wiñay kusisit jakañasataki, kamisatix jichhürkam jakayaskistu ukhama." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Chiqapar uñjatäñäniwa, jiwasatix uka kamachi arunakap axsartañ chuymampi Tatit Diosan nayraqatapan phuqkañäni ukapacha, kunjämtix iwxawaykistu ukhamarjama’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Tatit Diosasaw churapkätam uka uraqir puriyapxätam, ukatsti jumanakat sipan paqallqu wali jach'a ch'amani markanakaruw jaqunukuni: hititanakaru, gergeseonakaru, amorreonakaru, cananeonakaru, ferezeonakaru, heveonakaru, jebuseonakaru." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Kunapachatix Tatit Diosamax uka markanak jumanakar katuyapkätam, ukatsti jupanakar atipjapxarakïta ukkhasti, janiw jumanakax jupanakat khuyapayasipxätati, janirakiw kuna suma arust'äwirus jupanakampi mantapxätati; q'alpun uka markanak t'unjapxäta." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Janiw jumanakax jupanakamp mä wila masir tukupxätati, janirakiw yuqall wawamarusa, imill wawamarus uka jaqinakan wawanakapamp jaqichasiñap munapxätati." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Ukham lurapxasma ukkhasti, jupanakax wawanakamarux Tatitut armasiyapxaspa, yaqha diosanakaruw yupaychayapxarakispa. Ukatsti Tatitux jumanakatakiw q'apisispa, ukatsti jank'akiw t'unjapxiristam." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ukat sipana, jupanakarux akanak lurapxäta: Altaranakap tinkuyapxäta, yupaychañ qalanakapampi, lawanakapamp t'unjapxarakïta, idolonakapsa taqpach phichhantapxäta." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Jumanakasti Tatit Diosamatak ajllit markäpxtawa; Tatituw jumanakarux aka uraqin utjir taqi markanak taypit ajllisipxtam, ukhamat jumanakan jupatak yaqhachat markäpxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Tatitusti janiw jumanakarux yaqha markanakat sipan jach'a markäpxatam laykuti ajllisipktamxa, jan ukasti jumanakax taqi markanakat sipan jisk'a markakïpxtawa." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Tatituw Egipto markan t'aqhisiyat jakañat irpsunipxtam, ukatsti jach'a ch'amapampiw faraón reyin apnaqäwipat qhispiyanipxtam, jumanakar taqi chuymapampi munatapata, awkinakamar arupampi arsuwaykatayna uka arunak phuqhañ munasa." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Yatipxam, Tatit Diosax chiqa Diosawa, jupakirakiw arust'äwipsa munasiñampi wawanakapana, wawanakapamp phuqharaki, jupar taqi chuymampi munasirinakaru, kamachi arunakapsa phuqhirinakaru." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Ukampis jupar uñisirinakarux jank'akiw t'unjaraki. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Ukhamasti, kamachi arunakampiru, arsüwinakampir phuqhapxam, kunjämtix jichhürun churapksma ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Jumanakatix uka arsutanak ist'asin phuqhapxäta, uka kamachinakarjam sarnaqapxarakïta ukkhaxa, Tatit Diosax munasiñampiw phuqhani nayra awkinakamamp lurat suma arust'äwipampi, arsutapampi." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Jumanakarusti munasiñampiw uñjapxätam, aski waxt'äwi churapxätam, mirantayapxarakïtamwa; wawanakamar aski waxt'äwinak churani, yapunakamaru, taqi achunakamaru, trigo yapunakamaru, vinomaru, aceitemaru, ukhamarak vacanakamana, ovejanakaman qallunakapar aski waxt'äwinak churani, nayra awkinakamar juramentomp churañ arsuwaykän uka uraqina." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Jumanakasti taqi markanakat sipan walja aski waxt'äwinak katuqapxäta; janiw jumanak taypin jan wawachasir warmisa, jan wawani jaqisa utjkaniti; uywanakam taypinsa janiw jan mirir uywax utjkaniti, qachu uywatsa, urqu uywatsa." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Tatitusti taqi usunaka, mutuñanaka jumanakat apaqapxätam, Egipto markar apaykän uka usunak apanukuni; ukampis Tatitux taqi uka usunakampiw uñisirinakamar t'aqhisiyani." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Jumanakasti kawkïri markanaktix Tatit Diosamax amparanakamar katuyapkätam uka markanakarux t'unjapxätawa; jan jumanakax jupanakat khuyapayasipxamti, diosanakaparus jan yupaychapxamti, ukham lurapxätaxa, aynacht'añaruw puripxasma." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Inas jumanakax chuymanakaman amuyapxchïta: ‘Aka markanakax jiwasat sipan juk'ampi jilt'atawa, ¿kunjämaraki t'unjapxiriststi?’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy7:18 ¡Ukampis jumanakax jan axsarapxamti! Sum amtasipxam kunjämtix Tatit Diosamax faraón reyimpiru, egipcionakampir lurkän ukanaka." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Amuyt'asipxarakim, nayranakamamp uñjapkta uka jach'a uñacht'äwinakata, uka jach'a muspharkañ luräwinakatsa, kunja jach'a ch'amampis Tatit Diosamax Egipto markat irpsunipxtam ukanakata. Uka pachparak Tatit Diosamax lurani, axsarapkta taqi uka markanakaruxa." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ukhamarusa, Tatitux jupanak taypir wali axsarkañanak apayanini, jiwañat qhispirinakampiru, imantasirinakampir jiwarayañataki." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Ukhamasti jumanakax jan jupanak nayräxan khathatipxamti, jumanakan Tatit Diosama, jach'a axsarkañ Tatituw jumanakampïski." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Tatitux juk'at juk'at uka markanakar jaqunukuskani; jumanakasti janiw jupanakar jank'aki tukjapkasmati, qullun jakir qhuru animalanakaw mirantaspa, ukatsti muyuntasin chhukxatapxiristam." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Ukampis Tatit Diosamaw uka markanak jumanakar katuyapxätam, juk'at juk'at jupanakar q'al tukjañkama." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Reyinakaparus jumanakaruw katuyapxätam, ukatsti jumanakaw jupanakarux chhaqtayapxäta aka uraqin khitis jupanakat jan amtaskiri. Janiw jupanakat khitis jumanak nayräxan sayt'asirjamäkaniti, jumanakaw taqi jupanakarux jiwarayapxäta." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Uka markanakar atipjasasti, diosanakapsa ninampiw phichhantapxäta, ukampis janiw uka diosanakapar lip'suyat quripsa qullqipsa katusiñ yant'apxätati; jumanakax jan ukamp yant'ayasipxamti, uk lurasasti Tatit nayraqatan jan wali lurapxasma." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Ukhamasti, jumanakax utanakamar kunatix ñanqhachatäki ukanak jan apasipxamti, taqi ukanakax ñanqhachatawa, uk lurapxäta ukasti, jumanakas t'unjataw uñjasipxarakïta." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Wali amuyumpiy jichhürun sapksma uka kamachi arunak phuqhapxam, ukhamat kawkïr uraqtix Diosax nayra awkinakamar churañ arskän uka uraqir mantasin jakapxañamataki, mä jach'a marka tukupxañamatakiraki." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Tatit Diosamax wasaranjam pusi tunka mara sarnaqayasa irpanipktam taqi uka thakhit amtasipxam, jumanakar t'aqhisiyañataki, yant'añataki, amtäwinakam uñt'añataki, kamachi arunakap phuqhirjamäpxtati janicha uk yatiñataki." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Diosax t'aqhisiyapkchïyätam, manq'atsa awtjayapkchïyätam ukasa, jupax maná sat manq'añ manq'ayapxtam, uka manq'añsti janiw jumanakasa, nayra awkinakamas uñt'apkataynati, ukhamat jumanakan yatipxañamataki: jaqix janiw t'ant'a sapampiki jakkiti, jan ukasti Tatitun lakapat mistki uka arunakampiw jakaraki." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Uka pusi tunka maranak sarnaqasinxa, isinakamas janiw thanthaskänti, kayunakamas janirakiw p'usurkänti." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Amuyasipxamaya, kamisatix mä awkix wawapar iwxki, uka kipkarak Tatit Diosamax jumanakar iwxapxäyätam." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Tatit Diosaman kamachi arunakap phuqhapxam, jupar jach'añchapxam, yatichäwinakaparjam arkapxarakim." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Diosasti mä suma uraqiruw irpapxätam, jalaskir jawiranakan markaru, qhirwanakapansa, qullunakapansa uma jalsurinakan uraqiru;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 uka uraqisti trigo, cebada, uva, higo, granado, olivo achuyi, walja aceite, walja misk'iw utjaraki." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Uka markansti jumanakax janiw manq'at t'aqhisipkätati, janirakiw kunas pist'apkätamti; qalanakapatsa hierro apsupxäta, qullunakapatsti cobre apsupxarakïta." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Ukatsti kunapachatix manq'asxapxäta sist'asipxarakïta ukkhaxa, Tatit Diosamaruw yupaychapxäta uka suma uraqi jumanakar churatapata." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Tatit Diosamat amtasiñ jan armasipxamti, jichhürun churapksma uka kamachi arunakapa, arsutanakapa phuqhañsa jan armasipxamti." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Kunapachatix jumanakax manq'asisin sist'asipkäta, ukatsti uka suma lurat utanakan jakapxarakïta," 
Deuteronomy8:13 ukatxa vacanakamsa, ovejanakamsa mirantir uñjapxäta, qurimsa, qullqimsa taqi yänakamsa jilxatir uñjapxarakïta ukapachasti," 
Deuteronomy8:14 jumanakax janipuniw jach'a jach'a tukupxätati, janirakiw Tatit Diosamatsa armasipxätati, jupaw Egipto markan t'aqhisiyat jakañat irpsunipxtam." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Jupaw uka axsarkañ jach'a wasaranjam irpanipxtam, mich'intasir asirunakani, ajarankhunakan phuqhantata, kawkhantix umas jan utjkäna uka chiqa, ukampis Tatitux mä qarqat uma jalsuyäna jumanakan umapxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Ukatsti wasaran maná sat manq'a manq'ayapxtam, janiw nayra awkinakamas uka manq'a uñt'apkataynati, ukhamat jumanakar yant'añataki, llamp'u chuymanïñ yatiqapxañamataki, ukasti jumanakan askimatakirakïnwa." 
Deuteronomy8:17 “Janirak ukatxa chuymanakaman amuyapxamti: ‘Taqi aka yänak ch'amasampiw jikxatasisktan’ sasa. 
Deuteronomy8:18 Tatit Diosamat amtasipxam, jupaw uka yänak jikxatañatakix ch'am churapxtam, ukhamat jumanakampi phuqhasi kawkïr arust'äwtix nayra awkinakamamp lurkatayna ukaxa." 
Deuteronomy8:19 “Ukampisa, jumanakatix Tatit Diosamat armasipxäta, yaqha diosanakan qhipap arkapxäta, ukanakar yupaychapxarakïta ukaxa, nayax jichhatpach sapxsma, taqi jumanakax t'unjataw uñjasipxäta." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Kamisatix Diosax markanakar jumanak nayraqatan t'unjkani ukhamarakiw jumanakax t'unjat uñjasipxäta, Tatit Diosamar jan ist'apxatamata." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Israelit jaqinaka, ist'apxam: Jordán jawira khurkatar makhatañampïpxtawa, jumanakat sipan juk'amp jach'a ch'aman markanak katuntapxäta, ukhamarak jach'a pirqanakan uyuchrantat suma markanaksa;" 
Deuteronomy9:2 markachirinakapasti jach'a tansa jaqinakawa, Anac sat jach'a tansa jaqin saraqirinakapjama, jumanakasti aka säwi yatxapxtawa: ‘¿Khitirak Anac jach'a tansa jaqin wawanakapar saykataspasti?’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy9:3 “Jichhasti jumanakax yatipxañamawa, Tatit Diosamaw jumanak nayram saraski, mä ninar uñtataw jumanak nayräxan uka markanakar t'unjani, jisk'achjarakini. Jumanakax uka markanakarux mä ch'ipxtanak jaqunukupxäta t'unjapxarakïta, kunjämtix Tatit Diosamax arsuwayki uka aruparjama." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Tatit Diosamax nayraqatanakamat uka markanakar jaqunukkani ukapachaxa, jumanakax chuymanakaman jan sapxamti: ‘Jiwasan aski luräwinakas laykuw Diosax aka markanak churistu’ sasa, Diosax jupanakar juchan sarnaqatanakap laykuw uka uraqinakat jaqunukuni." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Janiw jumanakan aski luratanakam laykuti uka uraqinak katuntapkäta, Tatitux jan wali luratanakapat uka markanakarux jumanak nayräxat jaqunukuni. Ukhamat Abraham, Isaac, Jacob nayra awkinakamar arsutap phuqhañataki." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Jichhasti yatipxätawa, janiw Diosax jumanakan aski luratanakam laykuti uka suma uraqinak churapktamxa, chiqpachansa, jumanakax mä jan ist'asir markäpxtawa." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Janipun jumanakax armasipxamti wasaran Tatit Diosamar q'apisiyapxatama. Egipto markat mistunipkta uküruta, aka chiqar puriniñkamaw Diosarux saykatapxtaxa." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Horeb qullun Diosarux q'apisiyapxtaxa, jupasti ukham wali q'apisitax niyapuniw jumanakar t'unjapxtam." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Nayax Horeb qulluruw makhatäyäta, qalat lurat tablanak aptiri, Diosax jumanakampi suma arust'äwi lurkatayna uka qala tablanaka, nayasti pusi tunka urumpi, pusi tunka arumampiw uka qullunkäyäta jan manq'ata jan umata." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Tatitusti ukapachaw nayarux qalat lurat pä tablanak amparapamp qillqata churanitu, kuna arunaktix jumanakar qulluna nina taypitpach parlanipkäyätam uka arunakampi qillqata, kunürutix qullun tantachaskäyätan uküru." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Tatitusti pusi tunka urumpita, pusi tunka arumampit qalat lurat uka pä tablanak churitu, arust'äwi qillqat qala tablanaka," 
Deuteronomy9:12 ukapachaw situ: ‘Jank'ak aka chiqat saraqawayam, Egipto uraqit irpsunkta uka markax juchan jikxatasi. Mäkiw jupanakax nayan iwxa arunakaxar phuqhañ apanukupxi, ukatsti metal umatatayasin mä dios lurasipxi’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Ukatsti Diosax sarakituwa: ‘Niy uñjtwa, aka markax jan ist'asir markawa." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Jumax sartam, nayaw aka marka t'unjä, aka uraqit chhaqtayarakï, jan mayamp amtasiñataki, ukampis jumarux jupanakat sipan ch'amani mä jach'a marka tukuyäma’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Nayasti nina aqaskir qullut saraqanxta ukapachaxa, suma arust'äwi qillqat pä tablanakxa, amparaxaruw apanïyäta." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ukampis jumanakan ukar purisasti, Tatit nayraqatan jucha luratanakam uñjta, metalat mä dios vaca qallu uñtani lursusipxatätaxa. Tatitux uñachayapktam uka thakhit jank'akiw saranukupxatätaxa," 
Deuteronomy9:17 ukapachaw nayax amparaxar apankta uka qalat lurat pä tablanak uraqir jaqunukta, jumanak nayräxaru jisk'a jisk'a t'unjasa." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Uka qhipatsti Tatitun nayraqatapan killt'asta, ukatsti, kamisatix nayrïr kutix lurkta ukhamaw pusi tunka urumpi, pusi tunka arumampi jan kuna manq'ata, umas jan umt'ata ukankäyäta, jumanakan jucha luratanakam layku, Diosar ñanqhachapxatamata, q'apisiyapxatamata." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Nayax Tatitun jumanakatak q'apisitapata, jumanakar t'unjañ munatapat wali mulljataw uñjasïyäta; ukampis Tatitux mä kutimpiw mayitaxar ist'itu." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Ukhamarakiw Tatitux Aarón chachatak wal q'apisïna, juparusti tukjañ munäna, ukampis nayaw jupatak Tatitur mayïyäta." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Ukatsti lurasipkatäta, jucha lurañar puriyapktam uka vaca qallu katusinxa, ninaruw jaquntäyäta, ukatsti ñut'u laq'ar tukuyasin qullut saraqanki uka jisk'a jawir umaruw warantäyäta." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Ukatsti jumanakax Taberá, Masá, Quibrot-hataavá uka chiqanakan Tatiturux q'apisiyapxaraktaxa." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Ukatsti kunapachatix Tatitux Cadés-barnea chiqat sartawayapxañamatak arskäna, churapktam uka uraqi katuntasir sarañataki ukapachaxa, ukhamarakiw jumanakax arsutanakapar jan ist'apktati, janiw jupar iyawsañanakamas utjkänti, janirakiw jaysapkäyätasa." 
Deuteronomy9:24 ¡Nayax uñt'apksma ukkhatpach jumanakax Tatitur qallasipxtaxa! 
Deuteronomy9:25 Tatitux jumanakar t'unjañ amtatayna, ukat nayax Tatit nayraqatan pusi tunka urumpi, pusi tunka arumampi killt'asta," 
Deuteronomy9:26 achikt'asisaw juparux sarakta: ‘Dios Tatay, janikiy jumax aka markamar t'unjamti, juman markamawa, jach'a kankañampiw qhispiytaxa, jach'a ch'amamampiw Egipto markatsa irpsuntaxa." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Amtasimay Abraham, Isaac, Jacob wawanakamata. Janiy aka markan jan ist'asirïtapa, ñanqha jaqinakätapsa, juchapsa amtasimti," 
Deuteronomy9:28 irpsunipkista uka markan jan sasipkañapataki: Diosax janiw kawkïr uraqtix churañ amtkatayna ukar puriykxataynati, jupanakar uñisisaw wasaran jiwarayir akat irpsuwayi, sasa." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Ukhampachas jupanakax juman markamawa, jumaw Egipto markat jach'a ch'amamampi irpsuntaxa’ ” sasa." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Ukapachaw Tatitux nayar sarakitu: ‘Qalat lurat pä tablanak wakichasim, nayrïr tablanakjama, ukxarusti lawat mä arca luram, ukatsti nayamp parliri qullur makhatanim." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Nayaw uka tablanakar wasitat qillqä, p'akjktas uka nayrïr tablanakar qillqatäkän uka pachpa kamachi arunaka, ukatsti uka tablanakxa arcaruw imxarakïta’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Ukatsti nayax acacia lawat mä arca lurta, uka pä tablanak qalat k'utharakta, ukatsti ukanak apt'ataw qullu patar makhatawayta." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Tatitusti uka tablanakaruw Tunka Kamachinak qillqantäna, kamisatix nayrïr kutix lurkatayna ukhama, kunürutix taqpachani tantachaskäyätan, qullu patan nina taypitpach jumanakar parlapkäyätam ukapacha. Ukat uka tablanak nayar churitu," 
Deuteronomy10:5 ukatsti nayax qullut saraqanxasinxa; lawat lurat arcaruw uka tablanak uchta, kunjämtix Tatitux siskitu ukhamarjama, ukan jichhakamas imatäskaraki” sasa." 
Deuteronomy10:6 Israelitanakasti Beerot-bené-jaacán sat chiqat mistuwayasax Moserá sat chiqaruw puripxi. Uka chiqan Aarón chachax jiwxäna, amayapsti ukan imt'xapxarakïna, ukatsti Eleazar yuqapaw jupa lanti sacerdotexäna." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Uka chiqat mistuwayasinxa Gudgoda sat chiqaruw puripxäna, Gudgoda chiqatsti Jotbata tuqiruw sarapxarakïna, kawkhantix walja jisk'a jawiranakax utjki ukaru." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ukapachaw Tatitux Leví ayllurux ajllïna, suma arust'äwi arca apañapataki, Tatitun nayraqatapankapxañapataki yupaychäwinak luqtañataki, jupan sutipxar aski waxt'äwinak churañataki, kamisatix jichhürkam lurasipki ukhama," 
Deuteronomy10:9 ukat Leví ayllunkirinakax jilanakap taypin jan uraqinïpkiti, jupanakan katuqäwipax Tatituwa, kamisatix Tatitux arskäna ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Nayasti pusi tunka urumpi pusi tunka arumampiw Horeb qullunkäyäta, kamisatix nayrïr kutin qullu patan jikxataskäyät ukhama, Tatitusti ist'ituwa, ukat jumanakarux jan t'unjapktamti," 
Deuteronomy10:11 jan ukasti, Tatitux situwa: ‘Sartasim, markan nayräxap sarantañatak wakicht'asim, kawkïr uraqtix awkinakamar churañatak nayax arskta uka uraqi katuntapxañamataki’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Jichhasti israelit jaqinaka, ¿kunarak Tatitu Diosamasti jumanakan lurapxañam munisti? Jupax jupar jach'añchañanakam muni, jupan thakhipanjam arkañanakama; ukatsti jupar munañanakama, taqi chuymamampi, taqi jakañamamp jupar yupaychañanakama," 
Deuteronomy10:13 kusisit sarnaqapxañamatakisti, kamachi arunakapa, kamachinakap phuqhañanakam muni." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Amuyapxarakim, jumanakan Tatit Diosamankiw alaxpachasa, alaxpachan alaxpachapasa, uraqisa, taqi kunatix ukan utjki ukanakasa." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Ukampis Diosax jumanakan awkinakamaruw ajllïna, jupanakarux munasirakïnwa, ukatsti taqi markanak taypit jupanakan wawanakaparuw ajllirakïna, ukanakasti jumanakäpxtawa, kamisatix jichhürun uñjaski ukhama." 
Deuteronomy10:16 “Suma arust'äwin chimpup chuymanakamar uchapxam, jan juk'amp chuymanakam qalarayasipxamti." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Jumanakan Tatit Diosamax diosanakan Diosapawa, tatitunakan Tatitupawa; jach'a ch'amani, axsarkay Diosawa, janiw jaqir yaqha yaqha uñjkiti, janirakiw churäwinakampi alayaskiti." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Jupasti chiqa kankañampiw wajcharusa, ijmarusa uñji, jumanak taypin jakki uka jan uñt'at jaqirux munasiwa, manq'ayiwa, isi churaraki." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Jumanakasti munasiñ chuymampiy yaqha markat jutir jaqirux khuyapayapxam, jumanakax Egipto markan yaqha markankir jaqjam sarnaqapxatam layku." 
Deuteronomy10:20 “Tatit Diosamar jach'añchapxam, jupa saparuk yupaychapxarakim; jupar jaysirïpxam, juramento lurapkäta ukkhasti Diosan sutipxar lurapxam." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Juparukiw q'uchunak q'uchupxäta, jupakiw jumanakan Diosamaxa, jumanak laykuw jumanakan uñjkañ jach'a muspharkañanak luraraki." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Nayra awkinakamax paqallq tunkanikiw Egipto markar puripxäna, ukampis jichhax Tatit Diosamax alaxpach warawaranakjam waljaniruw tukuyapxtam." 
Deuteronomy11:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Jumanakax Tatit Diosamar munasipxam, ukatsti iwxanakapa, kamachinakapa, arsutanakapsa phuqhapxarakim." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Tatit Diosaman chiqachäwinakap jichhürun uñt'apxam, wawanakamax uka chiqachäwinak janiw uñt'apkiti uñjapkarakisa. Jach'a kankañapampi, ch'amapamp uñt'apxam," 
Deuteronomy11:3 ukhamaraki, kunjämtix Egipto markan faraón reyitaki, taqpach markapatak sayt'askäna, jach'a uñacht'äwinaka, muspharkay luräwinak lurkarakïna ukanaksa," 
Deuteronomy11:4 kunjämtix egipcio ejercitoru, caballonakaparu, nuwasiñ carronakapar lurkarakïna ukanaka, kunjämtix jumanakar arktanipan Mar Rojo umanak manqhar jupanakar chhaqtaykäna ukanaka. Diosaw jupanakarux jan mayampitak t'unjäna." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Ukatsti taqi kunanaktix jumanakatak wasaran lurki aka chiqar jumanakar puriyaniñkama taqi ukanakat amtasipxarakim; 
Deuteronomy11:6 ukatsti kunjämtix Datanampiru, Abiramampiru Rubenat saraqir Eliab chachan wawanakaparux lurkäna ukanak amtasipxam; kunjämtix jupanakatak uraqix jist'artkäna, ukatsti Israel jaqinakan uñjkaña uraqix jupanakaru, wila masinakaparu, chhujllanakaparu, yänakapamppachar manq'antkäna ukanaka." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Jumanak kipkaw Diosan jach'a muspharkañ luräwinakap pachpa nayranakamamp uñjapxtaxa. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Jumanakasti jichhürun churapksma uka kamachi arunakarux phuqhapxamaya, ukhamat ch'amañchasisin uka uraqinak katuntasipxañamataki," 
Deuteronomy11:9 ukatsti walja maranak uka uraqin jakapxañamataki, kawkïr uraqtix Diosax nayra awkinakamar arupamp arskatayna wawanakapar churañataki, kawkhantix lechesa, misk'is umjam jalaski uka uraqina." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Katuntapkäta uka uraqix janiw Egiptot mistunipkta uka uraqjamäkiti; khä markan jumanakax yapuchapxäyätawa, ukatsti kayumpiw qarpapxäyätaxa, kamisatix huertanakan luraski ukhama," 
Deuteronomy11:11 ukampis katupkäta uka uraqix wali qullunakani, qhirwanakan uraqiwa, alaxpach jallumpi qarpat uraqirakiwa." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Tatitu Diosaw uka uraqi uñjaski, marpacharakiw jupax uñch'ukisinki." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Jumanakatix jichha uruna churapksma uka kamachi arunakaru phuqhapxäta, ukatsti Tatit Diosamar munasipxäta, ukat taqi chuymampi, taqi jakañamampi yupaychapxarakïta ukkhaxa," 
Deuteronomy11:14 jupaw wakisitapar nayra jallsa qhipa jallsa apayanipxätam, jumanakan trigo, aceite, vino apthapipxañamataki," 
Deuteronomy11:15 ukhamat jumanakax suma manq'at sarnaqapxäta, uywanakaman manq'añapatakisti pampanakaman ch'uxñanak jilayarakini." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Ukampis jumanakax amuyasipxam, jan sallqjayasipxamti, janirak Diosat jayan sarnaqapxamti, yaqha diosanakarus yupaychapxamti, jupanakatakis alt'asipxarakimti,"
