Deuteronomy11:17 ukham lurapxasma ukaxa, Diosax jumanakatakiw q'apisispa, janiw jallux purxatkaspati, uraqisti janiw juk'ampi kuna achunak churkaspati, ukatsti Diosax churapkätam uka suma uraqinxa, jumanakax jank'akiw jiwarapxarakisma." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Aka arunaksti chuymanakamaru, p'iqinakamar uchapxam; mä chimpur uñtat amparamarusa, paramarus uchasipxam." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Wawanakamar uka arunakat yatichapxarakim utamankkasina, thakhi sarkasa, ukhamarak ikintañataki, ikiñat sartañatakisa." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Ukatsti uta punkunakamaru, markanakaman jach'a punkunakapar qillqantapxarakim;" 
Deuteronomy11:21 ukhamat alaxpachampi, uraqimpi utjañapkamax jumasa, wawanakamas walja maranak jakapxäta, kawkïr uraqtix Diosax awkinakamar churañ arskatayna uka uraqina." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Jumanakatix aka kamachi arunak suma amuyumpi phuqhapxäta, jichhürun sapksma ukhamarjam sarnaqapxarakïta, ukatsti suma chuymampirak Tatit Diosamar munapxäta, thakhipansa suma iyawsañamp arkapxäta ukkhaxa," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Tatitux jumanakan nayräxanakamat taqi uka markanakaruw jaqunukuni, jumanakasti juk'amp ch'amani walja jaqinakani markanak katuntapxäta." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Kawkharutix jumanakan kayunakamax takt'kani ukawjax jumanakankaniwa. Uraqinakaman qurpanakapax wasarat qalltasin Líbano uraqkamäniwa; ukatsti Éufrates jawirata Mar Mediterráneo jach'a qutakamäniwa. 
Deuteronomy11:25 Janiw khitis jumanakar atipjir markax utjkaniti. Jumanakan Tatit Diosamaw kawkha chiqanjamtix sarapkäta uka markanakar axsarañat khathatiyani, Diosan arsutaparjam phuqhasa." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Jichha urun nayax aski waxt'äwimpita, ñanqhachäwimpita ajllisipxañamatak churapxsma." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Jumanakatix jichhürun churapksma uka Tatit Diosaman kamachi arunakap phuqhapxätaxa, aski waxt'äwinak katuqapxäta;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 ukampis jumanakatix Tatit Diosaman kamachi arunakapar jan phuqhapkäta, yaqha jan uñt'at diosanakar arkañ laykus thakhipat saraqapxarakïta, jichhürun yatichapksma uka iwxanak apanukupxarakïta ukaxa, ñanqhachäwi katuqapxäta." 
Deuteronomy11:29 “Tatit Diosamax kawkïr uraqtix katuntapkät uka uraqir puriyapkätam ukkhaxa, Guerizim sat qullur sarasin uka patan aski waxt'äwinak arsupxäta. Ñanqhachäwinaksti, Ebal sat qullu patanarak arsupxäta." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Uka pä qullux Jordán jawirat inti jalanta tuqinkiwa, Guilgal sat uraqi uñkatasina, Moré sat quqanak thiyana, cananeonakax jakapki uka qhirwana." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Jumanakax Jordán jawira makhatañampïpxtawa, Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka uraqi katuntapxäta. Jumanakax uka uraqi katuntasin uka uraqin jakasipxarakïta ukapachaxa," 
Deuteronomy11:32 jichhürun churapksma uka kamachinakarjama, kamachi arunakarjam taqi chuymampiy sarnaqapxam." 
Deuteronomy12:1 Ukxarusti Moisesax markaruw akham säna: “Taqi aka kamachinakarjama, arsutanakarjamaw jakañanakaman jumanakax sarnaqapxäta, kawkïr uraqtix awkinakaman Tatit Diosapax utjäwinakamatak churapkätam uka uraqina." 
Deuteronomy12:2 “Kawkha markanaktix katuntapkäta uka markanakanxa, diosanakapar yupaychañ chiqanakxa q'al t'unjapxäta: qullunakana, jisk'a qullunakana, ukhamarak jach'a quqa manqhanakansa." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Altaranakap t'unthapipxäta, qalanakapsa jisk'a jisk'a tukjapxarakïta; kawkïr lawanakarutix yupaychapki ukanaksa phichhantapxätawa, uka kunayman uñtan diosanakapsa, jan mayampitakiw t'unjapxarakïta." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Tatit Diosamarux janiw uka markanakan saraparjam yupaychapxätati. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Ayllunakam taypit Diosax mä chiqawja ajllisini sutipan ukankañapataki, jumanakasti uka chiqaruw jupar yupaychir sarapxäta." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Uka chiqan jumanakax uywa wilañchanak jupar yupaychañatak luqtapxäta, sapa tunkat maya churäwinak jupatak aparapipxäta, churäwinakam Diosar churasa, arsut phuqhañ luqtanaka, chuymamatjam luqta katuyañanaka, ukhamarak vacanakamana, ovejanakaman nayrïr qallunakap churañanaka." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Uka chiqan Tatit Diosaman nayraqatapan manq'apxäta, ukatsti wila masinakamamp chikaw kusisipxarakïta, irnaqäwinakamamp jikxatat achunakata, Diosaman aski waxt'äwinak jumanakar churatapata." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Uraqinakaman jakxapxäta ukkhaxa, janiw khitis jupan munañapar kuns lurkaniti, akanxa sapa maynis munañaparuw kuns luri." 
Deuteronomy12:9 Chiqpachansa janïraw jumanakax samarañ uraqir puripktati, Diosax churapkätam uka uraqiru." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Ukampis Jordán jawir khurkatar makhatxapxäta, ukatsti Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka uraqin jakapkäta, ukhamarak uñisirinakamat qhispita, jan kunar axsarasa uñjasipkäta," 
Deuteronomy12:11 ukapachaw jumanakax kawkha chiqarutix Tatit Diosamax sutipan utjasiñapatak ajlliskani, uka chiqan taqi kunanaktix sapksma ukanak luqtapxäta: jupar yupaychañatak nakt'at uywa wilañchanak luqtasa, sapa tunkat maya churäwinak luqtasa, taqi kuntix sum ajllisin Tatit Diosamar churañ arsupkta ukanak luqtasa." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Ukatsti mä jach'a kusisiñ uru jumanakax Tatit Diosaman nayraqatapan lurapxäta taqi wawanakamampi, uywatanakamampi chika, jumanak taypin jakir levita jaqinakamp chika, jupanakasti janiw jumanak taypin kuna uraqinaksa katuqapkiti." 
Deuteronomy12:13 “Ukatsti sum amuyasipxam, uywa wilañcha luqtäwi Tatitur katuyañ munapkäta ukapachasti, janiw jumanakax kawkhantix munapkta uka chiqan luqtapxätati." 
Deuteronomy12:14 Jan ukasti ukxa Tatit Diosamax ayllunakam taypit ajlliskani uka chiqanak lurapxäta. Uka chiqan jumanakax taqi kuntix sapksma ukanak phuqhapxäta. 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Ukampisa, munapxät ukapachaxa, markanakaman uywanak jiwayasin aycha manq'asipkasmawa, Tatit Diosamax aski waxt'äwinak churapktam ukhamarjama. Uka aychsti taqi jumanakaw manq'apxäta, gacelana, tarujana aychapäkaspas ukhama, q'umachatäpxamsa janis q'umachatäpxam." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Ukampis janiw wilxa manq'apxätati jan ukasti uraqiruw waranukupxäta umäkaspas ukhama. 
Deuteronomy12:17 “Jumanakasti janiw markanakaman jakañamkamaxa, trigomata, vinomata, aceitemat sapa tunkat maya churañanakatxa manq'apxätati, janirakiw vacanakamana, ovejanakaman nayrïr qallunakapatsa, Tatitur churañ arsupkta ukanakatsa, chuymanakamat waxt'anak churä sapkta ukanakatsa manq'apxätati." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Jan ukasti Tatit Diosaman nayraqatapana, jupan ajllisita chiqawjanak manq'apxäta; Tatit Diosaman nayraqatapan wawanakamampi, taqi uywatanakamampi, jumanak taypin jakir levitanakamp chikaw taqi irnaqäwiman achunakapat kusisipxäta." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Uka uraqin jakkasasti janipuniw levitanakarux apanukupxätati. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Ukampisa, kunapachatix jumanakan Tatit Diosamax jupan arsutaparjam uraqinakam jach'aptaykani, ukatsti aycha manq'añatix jumanakar munasipxätam ukkhaxa, kuna pachas manq'asipkätawa." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Tatit Diosamax ajlliskani uka chiqatix jumanakan utjäwinakamat jayankani ukapachaxa, nayax sapksma ukhamarjam uka utjäwinakaman Tatitux churapktam uka vacama, ovejama kharsusin qawqtix munapkta uk jumanakax manq'apxam." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Kamisatix gacelana, tarujana aychap manq'apkta ukhama, jumanakax q'umachatäpxamsa, janis q'umachatäpxam." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Ukampis janiw kuna laykus wilap manq'apxätati, wilax jakañawa; ukhamasti janiw jakañxa wilampi chika manq'antapkasmati." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Jan ukasti uraqiruw umäkaspas ukham waranukupxäta. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Janipun wila manq'apxamti, ukat jumanakas wawanakamas suman jakapxäta, Diosan nayraqatapan suma luräwinak chiqap uñacht'ayapxatamata." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Ukampisa kawkïr yänaktix Diosar luqtä sapkta ukanakxa, kawkha chiqarutix Diosax ajlliski ukaruw apapxäta," 
Deuteronomy12:27 uka chiqansti, Tatit Diosaman altarap patxaruw nakt'at wilañchanakam luqtapxäta, ukatsti kawkïr uywanaktix luqtañatak churapkäta ukanakan wilap Tatit Diosaman altarap patxaruw warakipapxäta, ukat aychap manq'apxäta." 
Deuteronomy12:28 “Ist'apxam, phuqhapxarakim, taqi kuntix sapksma uka arunaka, ukhamat jumanakasa, wawanakamas sum sarnaqapxañamataki, kunatix Diosan nayraqatapan askïki, chiqäki ukanak luratamata." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Moisesasti markar saskakïnwa: “Kunapachatix Tatit Diosamax kawkïri uraqinaktix katuntapkäta uka markanak t'unjkani, ukatsti uka t'unjat uraqinakan jumanakax utjantasin jakasxapxäta ukkhasti, jumanakax amuyasipxam uka markanakan sarnaqäwinakaparjam jakañata, jupanakan utjir diosanakapar yupaychañatsa." 
Deuteronomy12:30  
Deuteronomy12:31 Jan jumanakax Tatit Diosamar ukham lurapxamti, kunjämtix uka markanakax diosapar waqaychapki ukax Diosar axtasiyiwa. Jupanakax ninampi phichhantasaw kipka wawanakapsa wilañcha luqtapxi." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Ukhamasti, taqi aka kamachinak phuqhapxam, ukhamarjam sarnaqapxarakim, jan kunsa k'ichxatasa, janirak kuns k'ichiqasa." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Jumanak taypintix khiti profetasa, jan ukax unañchäwinak uñjir jaqis uñstani, ukatsti unañchanakampi, jach'a uñacht'äwinakamp lurani," 
Deuteronomy13:2 ukatsti ukanakan phuqhasitapat jumanakar sapxiristam: ‘Sarapxañäni, jan uñt'apkta uka yaqha diosanakar arkapxañäni, yupaychapxarakiñäni’ sasa," 
Deuteronomy13:3 ukapachasti jan jumanakax jupanakar ist'apxamti; Tatit Diosamaw uka tuqit jumanakar yant'añ munasipktam, jumanakax taqpach chuymampiti, taqpach jakañamampit jupar munapxta uk yatiñataki." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Tatit Diosam saparukiw arkapxäta, jach'añchapxarakïta, kamachi arunakap phuqhapxam, arunakap ist'apxam, juparu yupaychapxam; jupamp chikt'atapun jakapxarakim." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Uka unañchäwinak uñjir profetasti jiwayataw uñjasini, jumanakar Tatit Diosamatak sayt'asiñ amtayatapata, thakhipat jithiqtayañ munatapata. Ukhamat jumanak taypit taqi jan wali luräwinakxa saphitpach jik'inukupxäta. Tatitusaw jumanakar Egipto markan t'aqhisiyat sarnaqañat qhispiyanipxtam, ukhamasti juparukiw jaysapxäta." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Juman jilamatixa, pachpa jilamäkasina, jan ukax yuqall wawamasa, imill wawamasa, munat warmimasa, wali munat masimasa, jamasat jumar yaqha diosanakar yupaychayañ amtayätam, kawkïr diosanakarutix jumasa, awkinakamas jan uñt'kän ukaru," 
Deuteronomy13:7 jaya markankir diosäpasa, jak'a markankir diosäpasa," 
Deuteronomy13:8 janipuniw jupanakan munañanakap lurätati janiw ist'ätasa; janirakiw jupanakat khuyapayasïtati, jupat khuyapt'ayasisas imt'amti," 
Deuteronomy13:9 ukat sipan jupar jiwayam. Jumaw jiwayañatak nayraqat amparam aytäta, juma qhipatsti uka kipkarak taqpach markax lurani." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Jiwayañkamaw qalamp k'upjäta, Tatit Diosamat jumar armasiyañ munatapata, Egipto markan t'aqhisiñat qhispiyanktam uka Tatitumat jithiqtayañ munatapata." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Ukhamat taqpach Israel markax yatini, ukatsti mayampi ukham jucha lurañsa axsarayasipxaniwa." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Ukhamasti, kawkïr marktix Diosax jakañatak churapkätam uka markanakantix yatipxäta," 
Deuteronomy13:13 Diosar jan jaysir jaqinakan uñstatapa, markachirinakar Diosat jithiqtayaskatapa, yaqha jan uñt'at diosanakar yupaychayaskatapa ukkhasti," 
Deuteronomy13:14 ukanak ist'asin jumanakax sum yatxatapxäta, ukattix taqi ukanakan chiqätap yatipxäta, jumanak taypin jan wali luräwinak lurasitapsa," 
Deuteronomy13:15 jumanakax espadampkamaw uka markan jakir jaqinakarux jiwarayapxäta, taqpach uywanakapsa, uka markan utjir yänakapsa t'unjapxätawa." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Uka markan taqpach qamir yänakapsti chika plazaruw phint'apxäta, ukatsti ninampiw markarux phichhantapxäta taqi kunanaktix uñisirimat aparanipkta ukanakamp chika, taqpach t'unjasina, ninampi phichhantasina, Tatit Diosamataki nakhantat luqtäkaspas ukhama. Uka markasti laqayanakar tukuyata, jan mayampitaki t'unjataw uñjasini, janirakiw mayamp sayt'ayatäkaniti." 
Deuteronomy13:17 “Jan jumanakax kunatix t'unjañataki uchatäki ukanak aptasipxamti, Diosasti janirakiw ukapachax jumanakatak q'apiskaniti, ukampis jupax jumanakat khuyapayasini, mirantayapxarakïtamwa, jumanakan nayra awkinakamar arsuwaykän ukhamarjama," 
Deuteronomy13:18 jumanakatix Tatit Diosamar jaysapxäta, jichhürun churapksma uka kamachi arunakarjam phuqhapxäta, arunakaparjam sarnaqapxarakïta ukapacha, jupan nayraqatapan chiq sarnaqasa." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Jumanakax Tatit Diosaman wawanakapäpxtawa. Maynitix jiwani ukkhaxa, jan jumanakax janchinakam kharintasipxamti, janirak ñik'utanakamsa mururasipxamti." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Jumanakax Tatit Diosamatak yaqhachat markäpxtawa; jupaw aka uraqin utjir taqi markanak taypit jumanakar ajllisipxtam, jupan markapäpxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Jan jumanakax kuna q'añunaksa manq'apxamti. 
Deuteronomy14:4 “Aka uywanak jumanakax manq'asipkasma: Urqu vacanaka, urqu ovejanaka, cabritonaka," 
Deuteronomy14:5 tarujanaka, gacelanaka, gamos sat animalanaka, qullun jakir cabritonaka, kunayman antílope sat animalanaka." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Jumanakasti ch'uxñanak khisthuri, sillunakapas payar jaljtatäki uka animalanakan aychap manq'asipkasmawa." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ukampisa janiw camello, wank'u, tejón uka animalanak manq'apxätati, ch'uxñanak manq'irïskpansa, sillunakapax jaljtatäskpansa. Uka animalanakarusti q'añut uñt'apxäta." 
Deuteronomy14:8 “Janirakiw khuchhi manq'apxätati, kayunakapan sillunakapax jaljtayatäkchi ukasa, janiw ch'uxñanak manq'asin khisthupkiti uka layku. Q'añu animalat uñt'apxäta. Janiw uka animalan aychap manq'apxätati, janirakiw jiwat janchipsa llamkt'apxätati." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Uma manqhin jakir animalanakatsti kawkïrinakatix jisk'a chhiqhanakanïki, k'ilinïki ukanak manq'apxäta," 
Deuteronomy14:10 ukampis jan chhiqhanïki, janirak k'ilinïki uka animalanak janiw manq'apxätati; ukarusti q'añut uñt'apxäta." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Ukatsti chhiqhani q'uma animalanak manq'asipkasmawa. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Ukampis janiw chhiqhani animalanakat akïrinak manq'apxätati: pakalinaka, ch'akhanak p'akintir satäki uka pakalinaka, uman sarnaqir pakalinaka," 
Deuteronomy14:13 aycha manq'ir 
Deuteronomy14:14 kunayman jamach'inaka," 
Deuteronomy14:15 avestruz sat jach'a jamach'i, arum sarnaqir ch'usiqa, qillwanaka, gavilán sat jamach'inaka," 
Deuteronomy14:16 arum sarnaqir juku, ibis sat jach'a surun jamach'inaka, cisne sat jach'a kunkan jamach'i," 
Deuteronomy14:17 ukatsti pelícano, siwiq'ara, cormorán sat uman sarnaqir jamach'i," 
Deuteronomy14:18 cigüeña sat uman jakir jamach'i, abubilla sat laq'unak manq'ir jamach'i, chiñi, taqi ukanaka." 
Deuteronomy14:19 “Chhiqhani laq'unakxa q'añut uñt'apxäta janirakiw ukanak manq'apxätati. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Ukampis q'umat uñt'atäki uka jamach'inakak manq'apxäta. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Janiw jumanakax jupapach jiwat animalanakan aychap manq'apxätati, jumanakax Diosatak yaqhachat markäpxtawa; ukampis ukanakxa yaqha markat jutiri, jumanak taypin jakir jaqirux churasipkasmawa; jupax manq'askaspawa; jan ukax markam chiqa sarakipir jaya jaqiruw uk aljasipkarakisma. “Janiw cabritonakan aychapxa taykapan lechepar phayapxätati." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Sapa maraw jumanakax jan armasisa taqpach grano achunakamat sapa tunkat maya yaqhachapxäta. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Sapa tunkat mayäkis uka trigo, vino, aceite yaqhachatxa, ukhamarak vacanakamana, ovejanakamana nayrïr wawachat qallunakapatxa, jumanakax Tatit Diosaman nayraqatapan manq'apxäta, kawkha chiqarutix Tatit Diosamax utjäwipatak ajlliskani uka chiqana, ukhamat Diosar yupaychañ yatiqapxäta." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Ukampisa Diosatix jumanakar waxt'äwinakap churapxstam, ukatsti sapa tunkat maya churañäki ukanak jan apirjamäpksta, Diosax jupan utjäwipatak ajlliski uka chiqan wali jayätap layku," 
Deuteronomy14:25 ukapachasti jumanakax uka sapa tunkat mayxa aljxapxätawa, uka aljat qullqinaksti Tatit Diosamax jakañatak ajlliski uka chiqaruw apapxarakïta." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Uka qullqimpisti kuntix munapkäta ukanak ukawjan alasipxäta: vacanaka, ovejanaka, vino, p'usqtata umañanaka; taqi kuntix jumanakax munapkäta ukanaka, ukatsti uka pachpan manq'apxäta Tatit Diosaman nayraqatapana, wila masinakamamp chikaw k'uchirt'asipxarakïta." 
Deuteronomy14:27 “Markanakaman jakir levitanakarusti janipuniw apanukupxätati, jupanakasti janiw uraqinak jumanakjam katuqapkiti." 
Deuteronomy14:28 “Sapa kimsa maraw jumanakax taqi achunakamat sapa tunkat maya apaqapxäta, uka juyranaksti markanakamaruw imapxarakïta." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Ukhamat jan uraqini levitanakasa, jumanak taypin jakapki uka jayat jutir jaqinakasa, wajchanakasa, ijma warminakasa sist'asiñkam manq'apxañapataki. Aka yatichäwinaktix jaysapxätaxa, Tatit Diosamax taqi luratanakaman aski waxt'äwip churapxätam." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Sapa paqallqu marat manumäkani ukarux pampachäta. 
Deuteronomy15:2 “Uka pampachañasti akhamäniwa: Khiti jaqitix israelita masipar kunsa mayt'kani, mayt'ki ukxa janiw mayiskxaniti. Janiw jaqi masiparusa, marka masiparus kuttayxit sasax wayt'añapäkiti, uka marax, Diosar jach'añchasin manunakat pampachasiñ marätap layku." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Markaman jakki, yaqha markat jutir jaqirusti kuntix mayt'kta ukxa mayisxätawa, ukampis kuntix israelita jilamax mayt'asktam ukxa pampachätawa." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Ukhamat jumanak taypin pist'añan jakasir jaqinakax jan utjkaniti, Tatit Diosamax churkätam uka uraqinxa, aski waxt'äwinakap churätam," 
Deuteronomy15:5 jumanakatix jupan arunakap ist'apxäta, jichha urun iwxawayksma uka kamachi arunakarjam phuqhas sarnaqapxarakïta ukapacha." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Tatit Diosamax arsuwayktam ukhamarjamaw aski waxt'äwinakap churätam, yaqha markanakar mayt'añatakis utjarakïtamwa, ukampis jumax janiw kunsa mayt'askätati. Walja markanak apnaqarakïta, jupanakasti janiw jumar apnaqapkätamti." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Jumanak taypintix pist'añan jakasir mayni jaqix utjani, Tatitux churkätam uka markanak taypinsa, janiw pist'añan jakasir masimatakix chuymam qalarayasïtati, janirakiw janiw sätasa uka masimar yanapt'añatakixa," 
Deuteronomy15:8 jan ukasti, juparux khuyapt'ayätawa, ukatsti kuntix munki ukanak mayt'äta." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Janirak chuymaman aka jan wali amtäwix utjkpanti: ‘Niyaw paqallqüri marax jak'äxi, manunakat pampachañ maraxa’ sasa, ukat jan wali ajanump pist'añan jikxatasir marka masimar uñkatxasma, janirak kunsa mayt'kxasmati; jupasti ukapachax Diosaruw jumar ñanqhachas mayisini, uka luratamasti jucharakïniwa." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Jumax suma munasiñ chuymampipun yanapt'am, Tatit Diosamasti uka luratamat aski waxt'äwinak churätam taqi luräwinakamana." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Aka uraqinxa pist'añan jakasir jaqinakax utjapuniniwa, ukat nayax jumar aka iwxa arunak chursma, pist'añan jakasir marka masimataki, t'aqhisiñan sarnaqirinakatak khuyapayasir chuymanïñamataki." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Hebreo marka masimatix chachäpansa, warmïpansa; uywatamäñapatak jumar aljasïtam ukaxa, jupasti suxta marakiw luqtätam; paqallqüri mararusti janiw uywatamäkxaniti, utamat khithanukxätawa." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Ukampis khithanukxät ukkhaxa, janiw jan kunan khithanukütati," 
Deuteronomy15:14 jan ukasti uywa tamanakamat uywanak churäta, walja trigompi, vinomp churarakïta. Kuntix Tatit Diosamax churktam ukanakat jupampiw jaljasïta." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Janiw jumax Egipto markan t'aqhisiyat sarnaqatam armasïtati, Tatit Diosamaw qhispiyantam. Ukat nayax jumar aka iwxanak chursma." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Ukampis uywatamatix jumampiru, utamankirinakampir munatapata, juman jupar sum uywatamat jumat jan saraqañ munkätam ukasti," 
Deuteronomy15:17 mä p'iyañ aytasaw uta punkumar saykatayasin jupan jinchup p'iysüta; ukhamat jupax wiñayatak uywatamar tukuni. Uka pachparak juman uywat warmimpix luräta. 
Deuteronomy15:18 Jan jumax chuymaman mayjt'asimti uywatanakamar antutxasaxa. Jupanakan suxta mara jumar luqtatapaxa, mä irnaqir jaqir chikat qullqik churkasma ukhamakiwa, ukhamarusa, Tatit Diosamax taqi luräwinakaman aski waxt'äwinakap churätam." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Vacanakama, ovejanakamatix nayrïr qallup urqu wawachani ukanakxa, Tatit Diosamatakiw yaqhachäta. “Janiw vacaman nayrïr wawachat qalluparux irnaqayätati, janirakiw ovejaman nayrïr qallupatsa t'awra yawirätati." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Sapa maraw uka uywanak utamankirinakamamp chik manqäta, Tatit Diosaman nayraqatapana, jupax ajlliskani uka chiqana." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Ukampisa uka nayrïr wawachat qallunakatix jan k'umaräkani, kayu wixchünisa, juykhünisa, janiw ukham uywanak Tatit Diosamatak wilañcha luqtätati." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Kawkha markantix jakaskät uka markan uka uywanak manq'äta, uksti taqiniw manq'apxarakini, q'umachatäpxamsa, janisa, kamisatix gacelana, tarujan aychapax manq'atäki ukhama." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Ukampis janiw uka uywanakan wilap manq'ätati, uraqiruw waranuküta, umäkaspas ukhama." 
Deuteronomy16:1 Moisesasti markar saskakïnwa: “Abib sat phaxsix purinkani ukkhaxa, jumanakax Pascua uruyapxäta Tatit Diosamar jach'añchasa; uka phaxsin Tatit Diosamax mä aruma Egipto uraqit jumanakar irpsunipxatam layku." 
Deuteronomy16:2 “Pascua urunakanxa vacanakampi, ovejanakampi luqtapxäta, Tatit Diosamar wilañcha luqtasa, kawkha chiqarutix jupax sutipan utjäwipatak ajlliskani uka chiqana." 
Deuteronomy16:3 “Luqtapkäta uka animalxa jan levaduran t'ant'ampiw manq'apxäta. Paqallqu uruw jan levaduran t'ant'a manq'apxäta, t'aqhisiñ t'ant'äki uka, jumanakan Egipto markat jank'aki mistunipxatamata; ukham jumanakax jakkasin Egipto markat mistunipxatam amtasipxäta." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Uka paqallqu urunakan janiw jumanakan uraqinakaman levadurax utjañapäkiti; ukatsti nayrïr uruna jayp'u tuqir wilañcha luqtapkäta uka aychatxa, janiw qhipärmanthitak jilt'ayasipxätati." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka markanakanxa, janiw jumanakax Pascua wilañcha luqtapxañamäkiti," 
Deuteronomy16:6 jan ukasti, kawkïr chiqtix Diosax sutipan utjäwipatak ajlliskani ukawjanak luqtapxäta, jayp'u tuqiru, intix jalantkani ukapacha, Egipto markat jayp'u tuqiru mistunipxatam amtasisa." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Luqtat aychxa qhatiyapxätawa, ukatsti kawkha chiqtix Tatit Diosamax ajlliskani ukan manq'apxarakïta, qhipärmanthi willjtasti utanakamaruw kuttawayxapxäta." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Suxta uruw jan levaduran t'ant'a manq'apxäta, paqallqüri urunsti mä jach'a tantachasïwi lurapxäta, Tatit Diosamar jach'añchañataki, ukürusti janiw jumanakax kuna irnaqäwinaksa lurapxätati." 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Trigo apthapiñ qallta uruta paqallqu semana saraqxipansti," 
Deuteronomy16:10 jumanakax Semananaka sat phunchhäwi uruyapxäta Tatit Diosamar jach'añchañataki, ukatsti chuymanakamatjam waxt'anak luqtapxäta, Tatit Diosamax aski waxt'äwinak churapktam ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Ukatsti Tatit Diosam nayraqatan uruyapxäta, kawkha chiqarutix jupax sutipan utjäwipatak ajlliski uka chiqana, taqpach wawanakamampi, uywatanakamampi, levitanakampi, yaqha markat jutir jaqinakampi, wajchanakampi, ijmanakampi, khitinakatix jumanak taypin jakapki ukanakamp chika." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Amtasipxam, jumanakas Egipto markan t'aqhisiyat uywatäpxayätawa, ukat taqi aka kamachinakarjam sarnaqapxañamaxa." 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Kunapachatix trigo apthapiñ tukuyxapxäta, uvanak ch'irwsuñsa tukuyxapxarakïta ukkhaxa, paqallqu uruw Chhujllanaka lurañ sat amtasin uruyapxäta." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Uk uruyasasti, wawanakamampi, uywatanakamampi, levitanakampi, yaqha markat jutir jaqinakampi, wajchanakampi, ijmanakampi, taqi jupanakampiw kusisipxäta." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Paqallqu uruw Tatit Diosamar jach'añchas uruyapxäta, kawkha chiqtix jupax ajlliskani uka chiqana, Tatit Diosamax jumanakar yapu apthapitanakamaruw askimpi phuqt'apxätam, ukhamarak taqi irnaqäwinakamarusa, jumanakasti kusisitapuniw sarnaqapxäta." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Taqi chachaw Tatit Diosam nayraqatan maran kimsa kuti uñstani, kawkha chiqtix jupax ajlliskani uka chiqana, aka urunak uruyañataki: Jan Levaduran T'ant'a manq'añ uruyañ uruna, Semananaka sat uruyañ uruna, ukhamarak Chhujllanakan sat uruyañ uruna. Jupanakasti janiw Tatitun nayraqatapar ch'usa amparaki uñstkaniti," 
Deuteronomy16:17 jan ukasti sapaqat mayniw churäwinak apani, Tatit Diosamax askinak churki ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Tatit Diosamax sapa aylluruw markanak churani, jumanakasti sapa markanakan taripirinakampi, jilïri jaqinakamp utt'ayasipxäta, jupanakan suma chiqa kankañampi markar taripañapataki." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Chiqa kankañampiw markar taripapxani, apnaqapxarakini, janiw kuna qullqsa chilltayasipkaniti, qullqi chilltayasiñax jach'a amuyt'an jaqinakarux juykhu tukuyi, chiqa kankañampi parlir jaqinakan arunakapsa maysaruw uñtayi." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Chiqa kankañarukipuniw jumanakax arkapxäta, ukhamat Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka uraqin utjantasisin jakapxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Jan kuna quqanaksa yaqha diosanakar jach'añchañatak ayrupxamti, janirak Tatit Diosaman altarap jak'arus uka quqa uchapxamti." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Jan jumanakax kuna qalanaksa ukanakar yupaychañatak pirqsusipxamti, taqi ukanakasti Tatit Diosamarux axtasiyiwa." 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Janiw Tatit Diosamarux kuna usuchjat vacanaksa, ovejanaksa wilañcha luqta katuyapxätati, ukanakasti Tatitutakix axtaskañawa." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka markanakantix khiti jaqisa, warmisa Diosar ñanqhachäwinak lurani, suma arust'äwipsa p'akintarakini," 
Deuteronomy17:3 yaqha diosanakar yupaychasina, ukanakar killt'asisaraki, phaxsirüpasa, intirüpasa, warawaranakarüpasa, kuna luräwinaktix Diosax jan lurañas munki ukanak lurasa," 
Deuteronomy17:4 uk yatipxäta ukapachasti, wali amuyumpiw sum yatxatapxäta; ukatix chiqächi Israel markan uka axtaskañ luräwinakax utjapunchi ukaxa," 
Deuteronomy17:5 uka jan wal lurir jaqirux markan taripirinakap nayräxaruw irpapxäta, ukatsti qalampi k'upjasin jiwayatäñapatakiw juchañchapxarakïta." 
Deuteronomy17:6 “Jiwayatäñataki juchañchäwisti kunapachatix pani, jan ukax kimsanisa qhanañchapxani ukapachakiw juchañchäwix utjani, ukampis janiw mayni sapan qhanañchatapampikix khitis jiwayatäñatak juchañchatäkaspati." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Nayraqatax irkatirinakaw uka juchañchat jaqirux jiwayañatak qalanakamp k'upjani, ukxaruw taqpach markachirinakax k'upjarakini. Ukhamat uka jan wali luräwinak jumanak taypit tukjapxäta." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Kawkïr ch'axwanakatix jan taripkayänixa, kuna jiwayasiñxatsa, nuwasiñxatsa, janchi usuchjasiñxatsa, jan ukax, kuna jan walinakas markaman utjkani ukkhaxa, Tatit Diosamax ajlliski uka chiqaruw sarapxäta," 
Deuteronomy17:9 ukatsti levita sacerdotenakampiru, kawkïri taripiritix uñjañapäki jupampiruw uka ch'axwanak yatiyapxarakïta, jupanakaw uka juchañchañ tuqinakat uñjani," 
Deuteronomy17:10 jumanakasti, jupanakax sapkani ukhamarjamaw phuqhapxäta, kawkïr juchañchäwtix jupanakax arsupkani ukhamarjama, jan kunsa maysar uñtayasa." 
Deuteronomy17:11  
Deuteronomy17:12 Ukampisa jumanakat kawkïritix, jach'a jach'a tukuñampi Diosan luqtirip sacerdoten arsutaparu, jan ukax taripirin arsutapar jan ist'kanixa, uka jaqisti jiwayatäñatak juchañchatäniwa. Ukhamat jumanakax ñanqha luräwinak Israel markan tukjapxäta," 
Deuteronomy17:13 markankir jaqinakax ukanak yatisin taqiniw axsarapxani, jach'a jach'a tukuñanak apanukupxarakini." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka uraq katuntapkäta, ukatsti markanakaman utjantasxapxäta ukapachax sapxarakisma: ‘Nanakar apnaqañapatak mä reyinïñ munapxta, kamisatix nanak jak'ankir markanakan reyix utjki ukhama’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Ukhamäni ukaxa, kawkïr jilamarutix jumanak taypit Tatit Diosamax ajlliskani ukarukiw reyit utt'ayasipxäta. Janiw mä yaqha markat jutir jaqirux reyit utt'ayasipxätati, jan ukasti marka masimarukiw reyit utt'ayasipxäta." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Ajllitäkani uka reyisti janiw walja caballonak alañapäkiti, janirakiw jaqinaksa Egipto markar khithañapäkiti caballeriap yapxatañatakixa; Tatitusti jumanakarux sapxtamwa: ‘Jan mayampis uka thakhinjam kuttapxamti’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Janiw uka reyix walja warminïñapäkiti, jupan Tatitut jan maysar saranukuñapataki; janirakiw sinti walja quripasa, qullqipas utajañapäkiti." 
Deuteronomy17:18 “Kunapachatix reyix qunuñapar qunt'asxani ukkhasti, levita sacerdotenakax katki uka nayrïr qillqatat aka yatichäwinak qillqaqayasini." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Ukatsti jupampi chikpun uka qillqatanak apnaqasini, jakañapkamasti sapüruw uka kamachi ullarani, Tatit Diosapar yupaychañ yatiqañapataki, taqi uka yatichäwinak axsartañ chuymampi imañapataki, uka kamachi arunakarjam sarnaqañapataki," 
Deuteronomy17:20 israelita jila masinakap taypin jach'a jach'a jan tukuskañapataki, uka kamachi arunakatsa jan maysar saranukuskañapataki. Reyitix aka yatichäwinakarjam sarnaqanixa, jupasa, wawanakapasa, walja maranakaw Israel marka apnaqapxani." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Leví ayllunkir levita sacerdotenakaxa, janiw maynïr israelit jaqinakjam kuna uraqinïpkanisa. Jupanakasti Tatitur luqtatäkis uka waxt'anakat manq'asipxani." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Janiw levitanakax israelit jilanakap taypin uraqinak katuqapkaniti, pachpa Diosaw jupanakan katuqäwipaxa, kamisatix jupax arsuwayki ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Sacerdotenakarux Tatitur luqtat vaca aychanakampita, oveja aychanakampitxa; jikhanïwja, änkha, purakäwja ukanakaw wakt'ani," 
Deuteronomy18:4 ukhamarakiw nayrïr achur trigo, vino, aceite, ovejan nayrïr yawiqat t'awrapas wakt'arakini." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Tatit Diosamaw taqpach ayllunak taypit jupanakar ajllisi, awkinakapat wawanakapkama, Tatitun sutipar wiñay luqtapxañapataki." 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Khiti levitatix kawkha markanakamat mistunini, Israel uraqinakata, chuymapar jaysasin Tatitun ajllit chiqawjar jutañ munkan ukaxa," 
Deuteronomy18:7 uka chiqan Tatitun sutipxaruw sacerdote lurañap lurani, kamisatix ukankir levita jilanakapax Diosar luqtasipki ukhama," 
Deuteronomy18:8 ukatsti qawqtix mayni sacerdotenakax manq'añanak katuqapki ukkharak jupax katuqani, awkipat yaqha katuqäwi katuqkani ukanakampi." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Moisesasti jupanakarux saskakïnwa: “Kunapachatix jumanakax Tatit Diosaman churat uraqir mantapkäta ukkhaxa, jan jumanakax uka q'añu luräwi sarnaqäwinakapat yatiqasipxamti." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Jan jumanakat khitis ninar nakhantayas wawanakamar wilañcha luqtpati, janirak layqasiñanakan sarnaqpati, jutir urunakat yatxatañanakarus uchasipxpati, janiraki layqasir jaqïpxpati," 
Deuteronomy18:11 chinkänanakar jiskt'asiri, ajayunakar jawsiri, jiwatanakar jiskhir jaqïpxpati." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Tatiturux, ukham lurir jaqinakax axtasiyiwa. Ukham axtaskañ luräwinakanïpxatap laykuw Tatit Diosamax taqi uka markanakar jumanak nayräxat jaqunuku." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Jumanakasti Diosampix chiqa chuymampipuniw sarnaqapxäta. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Kawkïr uraqinaktix katuntapkäta ukan jakir jaqinakaxa, jutir urunakxat yatir jaqinakampiru, layqanakampiruw ist'apxi, ukampis jumanakan Tatit Diosamax janiw ukanak lurapxañam munkiti." 
Deuteronomy18:15 “Tatit Diosamax jumanak taypit nayjam mä profeta sayt'ayarakini, juparuw jumanakax ist'apxäta." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Chiqpachansa jumanakaw Tatit Diosamarux Horeb qullun uk mayipxtaxa, kunürutix taqpachani uka chiqan tantachasipkta ukapacha, sapxaraktawa: ‘Janiw mayampis Tatit Diosasan arupa ist'añ munapkti, janirakiw uka jach'a nina lawra uñjañ munapkti jan jiwaskañataki’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Ukat Diosax nayar sitäna: ‘Kuntix sapki ukax walikiwa. 
Deuteronomy18:18 Nayaw jilanakap taypit jumjam profeta sayt'ayä, ukatsti kuntix nayax, parlam siskä uk jupanakar parlañapataki, nayax arskä ukanak sañapataki." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Khitinakatix nayan sutixar arsuri profetan parlatap jan ist'kani ukarux, nayaw juchañchaskä." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ukampis kawkïr profetatix nayan sutixar parlañ munkani, ukatsti kuna arunaktix nayax jupar jan siskta ukanak parlani, jan ukax yaqha diosanakan sutipar parlkarakini ukaxa, uka profetax jiwayatäñatak juchañchataw uñjasini’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Jumanakatix chuymaman jiskt'asipxarakïta: ‘¿Kunjämatarak yatsna kuntix parlaski ukan Diosan arunakapätapsti?’ sasa, jumanakax akanak sum amuyapxäta:" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Kuntix profetax Tatitun sutipxaru parlkani, ukatsti janirak uka parlatapax phuqhaskani ukasti jumanakatakix qhanäniwa, uka parlatapax janiw Diosan arunakapäkiti, jan ukasti uka profetax jach'a jach'a tukusakiw ukanak parli, ukhamasti jumanakax jupar jan axsarapxamti." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Kunapachatix Tatit Diosamax taqi markanaka t'unjkani, jupanakan uraqinakapäki ukanak amparamar katuyapxarakïtam, jumanakasti markanakapsa, utanakapsa katuntasipxarakïta ukkhaxa," 
Deuteronomy19:2 Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka markanakat kimsa markanak yaqhachapxäta," 
Deuteronomy19:3 ukatsti uka markar sarki uka thakhip sum askichapxäta. Ukhamarusa, Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka uraqinak kimsaruw jaljapxäta, ukhamat taqi khititix jaqi jiwaykani ukaxa, uka markar jaltxañapataki." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Khititix jaqi masipar jiwayki ukax uka markaruw jakañap qhispiyasir jaltxani, nayraqatasti jan munkasin ukham luratap uñacht'ayañapa, ukhamarak jupanak pura jan uñisisiñan sarnaqatap uñacht'ayañaparaki." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Sañäni: Maynitix masipamp lawa ch'iyañatak ch'umir saraspa, ukatsti lawar phat'antasin hachapax katuñapat jalstawayaspa, ukhamat jaqi masipar jiwayaspa ukaxa, uka jaqix uka markanakaruw jaltxani, ukhamat jakañap qhispiyasini." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Ukat sipana, thakhitix jaya sarañächi ukasti, jiwatan wila masipax phuqsusiñ munasin jiwayir jaqir katjasax jiwt'ayaspawa, ukampis uka jiwayir jaqin jiwañapax janiw wakiskänti, jupanakan janipun kunapachas uñisiñan sarnaqapxatap layku." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ukat jumanakarux uka kimsa markanak yaqhachapxam sapxsma. 
Deuteronomy19:8 Kunapachatix Tatit Diosamax jumanakan uraqinakam jach'aptaykani, ukatsti taqpach uraqinak churapkätam, jumanakan nayra awkinakamar arsutaparjama," 
Deuteronomy19:9 ukapachasti jumanakax yaqha kimsa imantasiñ markanakamp yapxatapxäta, utjki uka kimsa markanakxaru (kunapachatix jumanakax aka kamachi arunakar ist'apxäta, ukarjam sarnaqapxäta, Tatit Diosamarus munapxäta, thakhipanjam sarapxarakïta ukapacha)." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Ukhamat Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka uraqinxa, jan juchan jaqin wilapa jan wartasiskañapataki, uka wila wartatat jumanakan jan juchanïsipkañamataki." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Ukampis mä jaqitix maynir uñisisina jupar arkanaqani, ukatsti qhipan jiwayxapunini, ukat uka imantasiñ markanakar jaltawayxarakini," 
Deuteronomy19:12 ukapachasti uka markan jilïr jaqinakapax uka jaqirux katuntayapxaniwa, ukatsti jiwat jaqin wila masinakaparuw katuyapxani juchañchasin jiwayatäñapataki." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Jan jumanakax jupat khuyapayasipxamti, ukhamat Israel markax jan juchan jaqin wilap wartasitapat jan juchanïkaniti. Jumanakatakisti taqi kunas walikïskaniwa." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka uraqinxa, janiw jaqi masiman qurpanakap jithiyapxätati, qurpa uchatäki uk yäqapxapunïtawa. Uka qurpanakax nayratpach ukham uchatapunïnwa." 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Mä taripäwinxa, jaqi jiwayatapat khitir juchañchañatakisa, pani, jan ukax kimsa irkatirin arsutapaw askïni. Janiw mä sapa irkatirin arsutapax juchañchañatak askïkaniti." 
Deuteronomy19:16 “Mä qhuru jaqitix k'ari irkatirit maynitak sayt'asisin mä juchat irkataspa," 
Deuteronomy19:17 ukapachasti ch'axwir jaqinakat panpachaniw Tatitu nayraqatar uñstapxani, ukhamarak sacerdotenakana, taripirinakan nayraqataparu." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Taripirinakasti wali suma amuyumpiw ukanakxat yatxatapxani, ukattix uka irkatirin jilaparu k'arisiñamp irkatatap amuyapxani ukapachasti," 
Deuteronomy19:19 juparuw mutuyapxani, kunjämtix jupax jilapan mutuñap munkäna ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Ukatsti kunapachatix mayninakax ukham lurasitap yatipxani ukkhax, jaqi masipatak k'arinak arsuñ axsartapxaniwa, janirakiw mayampis uka jan wali luräwinak lurañ munapkaniti." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ukham jan wal lurir jaqinakat jan khuyapayasipxamti: Jiwayatax jiwayapxarakim; uñkatatax uñkatapxarakim, tuqitax tuqipxarakim, nuwatax nuwapxarakim, takintatasti takintapxarakim." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Kunapachatix jumanakax uñisirinakamamp nuwasir sarantapkät ukapachaxa, janiw jupanakar axsarapxätati. Uñisirinakamax jumanakat sipan juk'amp ch'amanïskpasa, walja caballonakani, walja nuwasiñ carronakanïskpasa; Egipto uraqit irpsunipktam uka Tatit Diosamaw jumanakampïskani." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Nuwasiñ urux purinkani ukkhasti, sacerdotew taqpach ejercitor parlani," 
Deuteronomy20:3 akham sasa: ‘Ist'apxam israelit jaqinaka; jichhürux uñisirinakamampiw nuwasipxäta. Janiy ch'amanakamax jiwt'pati, janirak axsarapxamsa; jan khathatipxamti, janirak mulljasipxamsa," 
Deuteronomy20:4 jumanakan Tatit Diosamaw jumanakampïski; jupaw uñisirinakamamp nuwasiskani, jupanakarux atipjapxarakïtawa’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Ukxarusti ejerciton jilïrinakapaw soldadonakar parlarakini, akham sasa: ‘Jumanakat khititix mä machaq uta utachaschi, ukat janirak uka utan jakkchiti ukasti, utapar sarxpan, inampis jupax nuwasiñan jiwaspa ukat yaqha jaqik uka utapan utjasxaspa." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Jumanakat khititix uva yapu ayruschi, ukatsti janirak uka achunakat manq'kchiti, jupasti utapar sarxpan, inampis nuwasiñan jiwaspa ukat yaqha jaqik uka uva yapupat manq'xaspa." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Jumanakat khititix jaqichasiñatak parlatanïchi, ukatsti janirak jaqichaskchiti, jupax utapar sarxpan, inampis nuwasiñan jiwaspa ukat yaqhak parlatapamp jaqichasxchispa’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Ukatsti jilïrinakax ejercitonkirinakar sasipkakiniwa akham sasa: ‘Jumanakat khititix axsarayaschi, ch'amapsa jiwt'ayasirakchi ukax, utapar sarxpan jan mayni jilanakapar llajllasiyañapataki’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Kunapachatix jilïrinakax parlañ tukuyxapxan ukkhasti, ejerciton jilïrinakapax soldadonakapan nayraqatap nuwasïwir sarantapxani." 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Jumanakax mä markar katuntañatak jak'achasipkät ukapachaxa, nayraqatax sumankañxat jupanakamp parlapxäta." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Ukatsti uka markankir jaqinakatix sumankañ munapxani, markaparus mantayapxarakïtam ukapachax, jupanakar wali ch'ama irnaqañanak lurayasaw luqtayasipxäta." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Ukampis jupanakatix jumanakamp jan sumankañ munapkani, ukat nuwasiñ qalltapxani ukkhaxa, jumanakax markar muyuntasin nuwantapxäta." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Tatit Diosamaw jumanakar katuyapxätam, jumanakasti espadampkamaw taqi chachanakar jiwarayapxäta." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Taqi warminaka, wawanaka, uywanaka, taqi kunatix markan utjki ukanakax jumanakankaniwa, ukatsti uñisirinakamat aparanipkta ukanakat Tatit Diosamax manq'ayapxarakïtam." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Uka pachparak jumanakat jayankir taqpach markanakar lurapxäta, uraqimat jayankapki ukanakaru." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Ukampis Tatit Diosamax churkätam uka uraqin utjir markanakapanxa, janiw maynirus jakaskir jaytapxätati," 
Deuteronomy20:17 jan ukasti, Diosan arsutaparjam jan maynin t'unjanipxäta, hititanakaru, amorreonakaru, cananeonakaru, ferezeonakaru, heveonakaru, jebuseonakaru, Tatitur wilañcha luqtapkasma ukhama," 
Deuteronomy20:18 ukhamat uka axtaskañ sarnaqäwinakapa, kunjämtix diosanakapar yupaychapki ukanak jumanakar jan yatichaskañapataki, ukham lurasin Tatit Diosamatak jucha jan lurasipkañamataki." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Mä marka katuntañatakitix walja urunak uka markar muyuntapxañamächi ukapachaxa, janiw jumanakax achuni quqanakap hachamp tinkurayapxätati, achunakapax jumanakan manq'añamatakïniwa; ukhamarus pampankir quqanakakiwa, janiw jaqinakjam jumanakar saykatapkätamti." 
Deuteronomy20:20 Ukampis kawkïr quqanakatix achunak jan achurïki ukanak tinkurayapxäta, katuntapkät uka markar muyuntañatakiw lawanak munapxasma, amparanakamar jalt'añapkama." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Tatit Diosamax churkätam uka uraqintix mä jiwayat jaqir uñjapxäta, janirak khitin jiwayatapas yatiskani" 
Deuteronomy21:2 ukapachasti, jilïr jaqinakampi, taripirinakampiw uk uñjani, ukat kawkhantix jiwat jaqix jaquski uka chiqata, kawkïr markanakatix jak'ankki ukakam tupt'apxani." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Ukatsti uka jak'ankir markan jilïri jaqinakapax mä vaca qallu katupxani, yukump janïr ayxatat vaca qallu." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Ukatsti uka vaca qallxa mä qhirwaruw apapxani, kawkhantix kuna yapus jan luratäki, kunas jan satatäki, uma jalaskir jawiras jan wañskaraki ukaru, ukan uka vaca qallun kunkap q'iwinukupxani." 
Deuteronomy21:5 “Ukapachasti levita sacerdotenakaw ukar jak'achasipxani, Tatitux jupanakaruw ajllisi jupar luqtiritaki, yupaychiritaki, Diosan sutipar markar aski waxt'äwinak churiritaki. Taqi ch'axwañanakansa, tuqisiñanakansa jupanakan arsutanakaparjam t'aqañataki." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Ukatsti markan jilïr jaqinakapax uka jiwat vaca qallxan amparanakap jariqasipxani," 
Deuteronomy21:7 aka arunak arsupxarakini: ‘Diosaxay, janiw nanakax aka jaqir jiwayapkti, janirakiw kunjämat jiwatapsa uñjapkti." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Dios Tatay, juman qhispiyat Israel markamarux pampachakimaya, aka jan juchan jaqin jiwatapat janirak juchañchamti’ sasa. Ukhamat uka jaqin jiwatapat jan juchañchat uñjasipkätati," 
Deuteronomy21:9 jumanakasti kunatix chiqäki ukanak Diosan nayraqatapan lurapxäta, jumanak taypitsa uka jan juchani jaqin jiwatapat juchañchäwi apaqapxäta." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Kunapachatix uñisirinakamamp nuwasir sarapxäta, ukatsti Diosamax uñisirinakamar atipjasin amparamar katuyapxätam," 
Deuteronomy21:11 ukatsti, jumanakat khitis uka jaqinak taypin mä suma warmir uñjani, ukat jupan warmipäñapatak munarakin ukapachasti, akham lurani:" 
Deuteronomy21:12 jupax utaparuw irpasini, ukansti uka warmix ñik'utanakap mururasini, ampar sillunakap khuchhurasirakini." 
Deuteronomy21:13 Ukxarusti uchatäkän uka isip apsusisin machaq isimpiw uchasini, ukatsti uka utan jakiriw qhiparxarakini. Awkiparu, taykapar jaytjanitapatsti, mä phaxsiw jachani; ukanak qhipatsti, israelit jaqix uka warmimpiw jaqichasxani; ukatsti chacha warmïxapxaniwa." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Ukattix israelit jaqix uka warmir jan munkxani ukkhasti, khithanukxaniwa; ukampis janiw qullqir aljkaspati, janiw t'aqhisiyat uywatarjamas uñjkarakispati, jupan warmisitap layku." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Mä jaqitix pä warminïni, mayni warmiparusti wal munasini, maynirusti janirak munaskaniti, ukatsti panpach warmirak jupatakix wawanïni, ukatsti tayna wawax jan munat warmïkis ukankarakini," 
Deuteronomy21:16 ukatsti uka jaqin yänakap wawanakapar jaljañ urux purinkani ukkhaxa, janiw munat warmin wawapäkis ukarux tayna wawäkaspa ukham uñjkaspati, ukham lurasasti jan munat warmin wawaparux jan wal luraspa, chiqpachan tayna wawapäki uka wawaru." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Uka uñisita warmin wawaparuw tayna yuqall wawapat uñt'asiñapa, ukatsti taqi yänakapat mä ukkhamp churañapa; uka wawaw nayrïr wawapaxa, juparurakiw tayna wawa kankañax wakt'i." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Jumanakat khititix jan ist'asiri, qallasir wawanïchi, uka wawasti janirak awkiparusa, taykaparus jaysirïkchi, qawqha jawq'katas janipun ist'asirïkchi ukapachasti," 
Deuteronomy21:19 awkipampi, taykapampix marka mantañankir jilïrinakan ukaruw wawapar irpapxani." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Ukat jupanakar sapxani: ‘Aka wawaxax jan ist'asiri, qallasiriwa; janiw kun satas yäqapkituti, munañap sarnaqiriwa, ukhamarus machirirakiwa’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Ukatsti markankir taqpach jaqinakaw qalamp k'upjasin uka qallasir wawar jiwayapxani. Ukhamat jumanakax markaman uka ñanqha luririnak tukjapxäta, uk yatisinsti israelit jaqinakax wal axsarapxani." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Moisesasti sarakïnwa: “Khiti jaqitix mä quqar warkkatat jiwayatäkani mä jach'a jucha luratap layku," 
Deuteronomy21:23 uka jaqin janchipax janiw uka arumax uka quqan warkusiñapäkiti, jan ukasti ukürpachaw imt'xapxäta; quqar warkkatat jiwir jaqix Diosan ñanqhachatawa, Tatit Diosamax jumanakar churapkätam uka uraqxa, janiw jumanakax ñanqhachapxañamäkiti." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Jumanakat maynitix jilaman vacapsa, ovejapsa chhaqhat uñjapxäta ukasti, janiw jan uñjir tukupxätati, jan ukasti irpasin jilaman ukaruw jaytanxapxäta." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Ukampisa uywanitix jan marka masimäkchi, janirak jumax jupar uñt'kstati, ukapachax uka uywarux utamaruw irpäta, uywasti marka masiman tumpasiñapkamaw ukankani, tumpasxani ukapachaw jumax katuyxäta." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Uka pachparak asnopampisa, isipampisa, chhaqhat yänak jikxatapkät ukanakampis lurapxäta, janiw jan uñjir tukupxätati." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Jumanakat maynitix marka masipan asnoparu, vacaparusa thakhin liwitattata uñjani ukkhax, janiw maysa uñtas sarakipawayätati, jan ukasti sayt'añapatakiw yanapt'äta." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Mä warmisti janiw chacha isimpi uchasiñapäkiti, mä chachas janirakiw warmi isimpi uchasiñapäkiti, ukanak lurañasti Tatitutakix axtaskañawa." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Maynitix thakhi sarkasin mä quqansa, jan ukax uraqinsa mä jamach'in tapap jikxatanixa, uka tapansti tayka jamach'ix jamach'i qallunak patana, jan ukax k'awna patan jipiskchi ukax, janiw taykapamppach jamach'i qallunak apasiñapäkiti;" 
Deuteronomy22:7 jan ukasti, jamach'i qallunakak apasiñapa, tayka jamach'irusti antutnukxañapawa. Ukham lurapxäta ukax walja maranakaw kusisit jakapxäta." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Jumanakat maynitix mä machaq uta utachasini ukapachaxa, uta patarux mä pirqampiw muyuntayañapa; jan khitin uka patat jalaqtasin jiwaskañapataki; ukhamat wila masinakapan juchañchat jan uñjasiskañapataki." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Jan jumanakax uva yapunakamar yaqha jathanak satapxamti; ukham satapxasma ukasti, yapuchkta ukasa, uva yapumas taqpachaw qullanat uñt'atäxaspa." 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Janiw yapunakam asnompi vacampi yapthapis qhullipxätati. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Janiw t'arwampi, linompi kittata p'itat isinak uchasipxätati." 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Janxatasiñ isimarux pusi thiyanakapar chhaxchhanakan t'ikhanak uchapxäta. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Mä chachatix mä warmir warmipäñapatak irptasini, ukat warmisxatatsti janirak uka warmir munkxaniti ukasti," 
Deuteronomy22:14 jupamp jaljtañatakisti k'ari arunakak thaqhaspa, jaqinak nayraqatan ‘Sallqjituwa’ sasa, jan wal uñjayañatakisti akham parlarakispa: ‘Nayax aka warmimpiw jaqichasta, ukampis jupamp ikintxasinxa jupan chacha uñt'irïtap jikxatta’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy22:15 Ukat tawaqun awkipampi, taykapampix markan jilïrinakapan ukar sarasin, phuchhapan chacha jan uñt'irïtap uñacht'ayapxani." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Ukapachasti tawaqun awkipax jilïrinakaruw sani: “Nayaw phuchhaxarux aka jaqin warmipäñapatak churta, jichhasti jupax janiw wawaxar munkxiti," 
Deuteronomy22:17 jan ukasti jupax jan walinakak wawaxat parli, akham sasa: ‘Sallqjituwa, chacha uñt'ir tawaqütaynawa’ sasa, ukampis phuchhaxan chacha jan uñt'irïtap uñacht'ayä” sasa. Uk sasin warmin awkipax jilïr jaqinak nayraqatan ikiñapan wilararätap uñacht'ayani." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Ukat jilïrinakax uka jaqir katuntasin mutuyapxani, warmipar k'arintatapata," 
Deuteronomy22:19 ukhamarusa, uka jaqix warmipan awkiparux patak qullqi churañapaw wakt'ani, mä israelita aski warmit jan wal parlatapata. Uka jaqisti janiw warmipar irpanukkaniti, jan ukasti jupampix jakaskakiniwa." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Ukampis uka tawaqutix chacha uñt'irïsin jaqichaschi ukaxa," 
Deuteronomy22:21 ukapachax markankir jaqinakaw awkinakapan utapat jupar irpsunipxani, ukatsti ukarpachaw qalampi k'upjasin jiwayapxani, jupan mä jach'a jucha Israel markan luratapata, awkipan utap p'inqachayatapata. Ukhamat jumanak taypin jan wali lurañanak tukjapxäta." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Mä chacharutix chachan warmimpi ikintatäskir katjatänixa, panpachaniw juchañchasin jiwayatäpxani. Ukhamat jumanakax Israel markan jan wali lurañanak tukjapxäta." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Chacha jan uñt'ir mä tawaqutix jaqichasiñatak parlatanïchi, ukatsti yaqha chacharak uka tawaqur markan jikxatasin jupamp ikintani ukax," 
Deuteronomy22:24 panpachaniw markan jilïrinakap nayraqatar irpat uñjasipxani, uka jilïrinakasti qalampi k'upjasa jiwayatäpxañapatakiw juchañchapxani, tawaqurux markankkasin jaqinakar yanap jan mayitapata, chacharusti jaqi masipan warmipar p'inqachatapata. Ukhamat jumanak taypin ñanqha lurañanak tukjapxäta." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Ukampisa mä jaqitix jaqichasiñatak parlatani mä tawaqur pampan jikxatani, ukatsti munkir jan munkir jupamp ikintani ukkhasti, chacha sapakiw uka warmimpi ikintatapat jiwayat uñjasini," 
Deuteronomy22:26 tawaqurusti janiw juchañchatäkaniti, jupasti jiwayatäñatakix janiw kuna juchsa lurkiti. Uka jaqin luratapasti kunjämatix mä jaqix mayni jaqi masipar jiwayañatak jikxatki ukhamawa;" 
Deuteronomy22:27 uka jaqix tawaqurux sapak pampan jikxatäna, uka tawaqux qawqhas warariskasapänwa, janiw khiti arxatiris utjkasapänti." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Mä jaqitix chacha jan uñt'ir mä tawaqur jikxatani, ukatsti uka tawaqux janirak jaqichasiñatak kuna parlatanïkanisa, ukatsti munkir jan munkir uka jaqix jupamp ikintani, ukatsti jupanakax katjayasipxarakin ukapachasti," 
Deuteronomy22:29 uka jaqix phisqa tunka qullqi tawaqun awkiparux churani, uka tawaqur p'inqachatap laykusti, jupampiw jaqichasini, taqi jakañapan janiw uka warmimpix jaljtañapäkiti." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Janiw khiti jaqis awkipan warmipampix ikintañapäkiti, ukham lurasasti kipka awkiparuw p'inqachaski." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Janiw Tatitun tantachasïwipar mantañapäkiti khiti jaqin q'urutapatix usuchjatächi, jan ukax chhuxurasiñapas khariqatächi ukaxa." 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Janiw q'axat wawax Diosan tantachasïwipar katuqatäkaspati, janirakiw jupan saraqir wawanakapas katuqatäkaspati, tunka mita jaqi sarakipkani ukkhasa." 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Janirakiw amonitanakasa, moabitanakasa, wawanakapan wawanakapas Diosan tantachasïwipan katuqatäkaspati;" 
Deuteronomy23:4 kunapachatix jumanakax Egipto markat mistunisin jupanakan uraqipanjam sarakipawayapkta ukapachaxa, janiw kuna manq'añsa, umañsa waxt'apkäyätamti; ukat sipan jupanakax Mesopotamia uraqit jutir Petor markankir Balaam sat Beor chachan yuqaparuw qullqi churapxäna jumanakar ñanqha arunakamp ñanqhachañapataki." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Ukampis jumanakan Tatit Diosamax janiw Balaam chacharux ist'känti, jan ukasti uka ñanqhachäwirux jumanakar munasitap laykux mä aski waxt'äwiruw jumanakatak tukuyäna." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Jan jumanakax taqi jakäwiman jupanakan sumankañapsa, askipsa thaqhapxamti." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Ukampisa janiw jumanakax edomita sat jaqinakarux jisk'achapxañamäkiti, jupanakax jumanakan wila masinakamawa; janirakiw egipcionakar jisk'achapxañamäkiti, jupanakan markapan jumanakax jakapxäyätaxa;" 
Deuteronomy23:8 wawanakapan kimsïr mita jaqi saraqirinakapax Diosan tantachasïwipar katuqatäñapawa. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Moisesasti q'uma sarnaqañxat sarakïna: “Jumanakax uñisirinakamamp nuwasiñan jikxatasipkät ukapachaxa, jan kuna jan wali luräwinakampis juchañchasipxamti." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Jumanakat maynitix arum ikiskasin chhuxurasiñapat aywiyatap layku q'añu jikxatasini ukasti, uka jaqix campamento anqaruw mistuni, ukatsti jayp'untañkamaw uka anqankani." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Jayp'untxipansti, umampiw jariqasxani, ukatsti intix jalantkani ukkhaw wasitat campamentor mantxani." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Yaq'arañatakisti, campamento anqäxaruw mä chiqawja wakichasipxäta." 
Deuteronomy23:13 Yaq'arañ munkäta ukkhasti, mä jisk'a ch'akur ayasïta, uka ch'akurumpiw uraq p'iysüta ukar yaq'arañamataki, tukuyxät ukkhasti uka p'iyarux laq'ampiw allxatxäta." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Jumanakan Tatit Diosamax jumanak taypin campamenton sarnaqi, jumanakar imañataki, ukhamat uñisirinakamar atipjayañataki, ukhamasti, jumanakan campamentomax qullan chiqäñapawa, ukhamat jan kuna q'añunak Diosan uñjañapataki; janitix ukhamäkaspa ukasti, Diosax janiw jumanakampïkaspati." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Mä t'aqhisiyat uywatatix uywiripan ukat jaltanxaspa, ukatsti imantasir jumanakan ukar jutaspa ukapachaxa, janiw jumanakax uywiripar irpxaruyapxätati." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Jan ukasti jumanak taypin jakayapxäta, kawkïr markantix jupax jakañatak ajlliskani uka markana, jumanakasti jupar sum uñjapxäta." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Janiw khiti israelit chachasa, warmisa q'añu lurañanakan sarnaqañapäkiti, yaqha markanakax diosanakapar yupaychañatak lurapki ukhama." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Janirak jumanakax Tatit Diosaman utapan uka q'añu sarnaqañan jikxatat qullqinak katuqapxamti, ukham lurañanakasti Diosarux axtasiyiwa." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Kuntix israelit masimar mayt'apkta ukatxa, janiw jalaqtampi mayisïtati, qullqïpansa, manq'añäpansa, jan ukax kunäpansa." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Yaqha markat jutir jaqirusti kuntix mayt'käta ukan jalaqtap apsusipkasmawa, ukampis janiw mä marka masimar ukham lurätati. Ukhamat Diosamax katupkäta uka uraqin irnaqatanakamar askinak churapxätam." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Tatit Diosamar mä kun phuqhañatak arsupxäta ukaxa, jank'akiw phuqhapxäta, jan phuqhapkasma ukaxa, Tatit Diosamax wayt'apxiristamwa, juchañchataw uñjasipxarakisma." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Mä kun phuqhañataki jan arsupkät ukaxa, janiw kuna juchsa lurapkätati." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Ukampis juman chuymamatjam Tatit Diosamar mä kun churañatak arsütaxa, uka arsutam phuqhañamaw wakisi." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Jaqi masiman uva yapupar mantapkäta ukkhaxa, qawqtix munapkta ukkha manq'antasipkasmawa, ukampis janiw kunsa canastamar apasipxätati." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Trigo yapupar mantapkäta ukkhasti, trigo puyanak amparanakamamp k'ichirasipkasmawa, ukampis janiw mä yawiñampi trigo yawthapipxätati." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Moisesasti jaljtañxat sänwa: “Mä jaqitix mä warmimpi jaqichasini, uka qhipat warmix jupatak jan walïkchi ukasti, warmirux jaljtañ qillqat churxani, ukatsti utapat khithanukxarakini." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Uka warmisti uka utat sarxasax, yaqha chachampix jaqichasiskaspawa;" 
Deuteronomy24:3 qhipa chachapatix jupar kipkak jisk'achjani, ukat jaljtañ qillqat churxani, utapatsa khithanukxarakini, jan ukax uka qhipa chachapax jiwxarakini ukasti," 
Deuteronomy24:4 nayrïr chachapax janiw uka warmimpi jaqichaskaspati, jupan jan q'umätap layku; ukham lurañasti Diosatakix axtaskayawa, jumanakax janiw jisk'achayapxätati Tatit Diosamax katuyapkätam uka uraqxa." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Mä jaqitix jichhaki jaqichasiskchi ukaxa, janiw nuwasïwirux sarañapäkiti, janirakiw kuna yaqha luräwinakas uka marpacha wakt'añapäkiti; ukhamat uka urunakan utapankaskani warmipan kusisiñapataki." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Maynitix kuns mayt'asipxätam ukaxa, jan juparux uka mayt'atat piqañ qalap mayipxamti; ukham lurapxäta ukasti, jakañapan manq'sa apaqapkasma ukhamäspawa." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Mayni israelit jaqirutix jila masipar t'aqhisiyat uywatar tukuyañataki, jan ukax aljañatak imantaskir katjatäni ukasti, uka jaqirux jiwañapatakiw juchañchasini, ukhamat jumanak taypit ñanqha lurañanak tukjañataki." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Lepra usunak tuqitsti, sacerdotenakan yatichäwiparjamaw phuqhapxäta. Ukanaksti kunjämtix nayax jupanakar iwxawaykta ukhamarjamaw lurapxäta." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Amtasipxam kuntix Tatit Diosamax Egipto markat mistunipkta ukapachax thakhin María kullakaxar lurkän ukata. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Jumanakatix jaqi masimar kuns mayt'apxäta ukkhax jan utaparu mantasin kuna yänakapsa uka manut aptasinipxamti. 
Deuteronomy24:11 Uta punkupan suyt'apxam, jupaw kuna yänaksa jumar churañatak apsusinkani." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Uka jaqitix pist'añan sarnaqaskchi, ukatsti jupan mä isipaki mayt'atamat churañatak utjchi ukasti, janiw mä arumas uka isipxa katxäsipxätati;" 
Deuteronomy24:13 jan ukasti, intis janïr jalantkipan churxapxäta, uka isipamp janxatasis ikxañapataki. Ukhamat jupax jumanakar yuspagarapxätam, uka luratamasti Tatit Diosam nayraqatan askïniwa." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Jumanakatix pist'añan jikxatasir jaqiru irnaqayasipxäta ukkhaxa, jan jumanakax juk'ampi ch'am tukuyapxamti, janirak irnaqatapat qullqi churañäki uksa katxäsipxamti, jumanakan israelita masimäpansa, jan ukax jaya markat jutir jaqïpansa." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Ukürpachaw irnaqatapat qullqi churxapxäta, intin janïra jalantkipana; jupax pist'añan jikxatasir jaqiwa, manq'añ alasiñatakiw uka qullqi munaraki. Janitix ukham lurapkäta ukkhaxa, uka jaqix Diosaruw art'asini, jupasti jumanakarux juchañchapxätamwa." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Janiw awkimpi, taykampix wawanakapan jucha luratanakapat jiwayatäñatak juchañchatäkaniti, janirakiw wawanakas awkipana, taykapan jucha luratanakapat jiwayatäkaniti, jan ukasti sapaqat mayniw jucha luratap layku jiwañapatak juchañchat uñjasiskani." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Janiw yaqha markat jutir jaqinakarusa, wajchanakarus t'aqhisiyapxätati, janirakiw mayt'asir ijma warmitsa isipa apaqätati." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Janipuniw jumanakax armasipxätati Egipto markan t'aqhisiyat jaqïpxatama, Tatit Diosamaw uka markat qhispiyanipxtam. Ukat jumanakar iwxapxsma taqi uka yatichäwinak phuqhapxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Jumanakax yapunakamat apthapisipkät ukapachatix, mä pichu trigo aptawayañ armasipxäta ukaxa, janiw uka pichu aptir kuttapxätati; pachparuw jaytawayapxäta, pist'añan sarnaqir jaqinakataki, jumanak taypin jakasir jaya markat jutir jaqinakataki, wajchanakataki, ijma warminakataki, jupanakaw ukanak apthapisiskani; Tatit Diosamasti taqi lurañanakaman askimpiw phuqt'apxätam." 
Deuteronomy24:20 “Olivo yapunakamat aceitunanak apthapipkät ukapachaxa, janiw layminakap taypi mayamp thaqsupxätati; qhiparkani uka achunakxa, jaya markat jutir jaqitaki, wajchataki, ijma warmitakiw jaytapxäta." 
Deuteronomy24:21 “Uva yapumat uvanak apthapisipkät ukapachaxa, janiw layminakap taypi mayampi thaqsupxätati; qhiparkani uka uva achunakxa, jaya markat jutir jaqitaki, wajchataki, ijma warmitakiw jaytapxäta." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Amtasipxapunim, jumanakax Egipto markan t'aqhisiyat jaqïpxayätawa, ukat nayax iwxapxsma taqi uka yatichäwinak phuqhapxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Kunapachatix yaqhipanakax ch'axwañan sarnaqapkani ukkhaxa, jupanakax taripatäñatak jilïrinak nayraqatar uñstapxañapawa, ukatsti taripir jilïrinakaw juchan jaqir juchañchaskani, jan juchan jaqirus jan juchanirjamaw uñjarakini." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Juchan jaqirutix juchapat jawq'jañ wakischi ukapachasti, taripirix uraqiruw liwnuqayani, ukatsti jupa nayräxan jawq'jayani, kuna juchanaktix lurki ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Janiw kunäkipansa pusi tunkat juk'amp jawq'antapxätati, uka marka masiman jan juk'ampi usuchjatäñapataki, ukhamat jumanak nayräxan jan p'inqachat uñjasiñapataki." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Janiw vacarux trigo taksuskirir ñuku uskupxätati. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Mä utantix pani jila sullka jakapxani, uka paninit maynix jan wawan jiwxaspa ukapachasti, jiwirin warmipax janiw yaqha utankir chachamp jaqichaskaniti; jan ukasti jiwirin jilapax jilapan warmipampiw jaqichasini, ukhamat jupax jilapan warmipampi jila kankañ phuqhani." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Jupanakat yurir tayna wawax, jiwirin sutipanïniwa, Israel marka taypin jiwirin sutipax jan chhaqhañapataki." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Ukattix uka jaqix jilapan ijmapampi jaqichasiñ janipun munkanixa, warmix jilïrinakar yatiyiriw sarani akham sasa: ‘Jiwir chachaxan jilapaxa, janiw Israel taypin jilapan sutip jakayañ munkiti, janiw jupax jila kankañ phuqhañ munkiti’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Markan jilïrinakapasti juparuw jawsayapxani jupamp parlañataki, jupatix uka warmimpi jan jaqichasiñ munkani," 
Deuteronomy25:9 ukapachasti warmix taqi jilïrinakan uñjkataw chachapan jilapar jak'achasisin kayupat wiskhup thatsuni, ukatsti ajanupat thuskatarakini, akham sasa: ‘Akhamaw luraña khiti jaqitix jilapan sutip jan jakayañ munki ukaruxa’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Ukatsti uka jaqin wila masinakapax Israel markan: ‘Jan wiskhun wila masinaka’ sutimpi uñt'atäniwa. 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Pani chachatix nuwasisipkani, ukat mayni jaqin warmipax jak'achasini, chachapat arxatasis maynirux chhuxurasiñapat katuntani," 
Deuteronomy25:12 ukkhasti uka warmirux jan khuyapt'ayasisaw maysa amparap khariqapxäta. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Alasiñansa, aljasiñansa janiw k'ari tupunak apnaqapxätati." 
Deuteronomy25:14  
Deuteronomy25:15 Ukat sipan aljasiñ tupunakamax suma phuqhatapunïpan, ukhamat walja maranak jakapxäta, Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka uraqina." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Ukham jan chiqa kankañan sarnaqirinakax Diosar axtasiyiwa. 
Deuteronomy25:17 Moisesasti sarakïnwa: “Janipun jumanakax armasipxamti kuntix Amalec markankirinakax thakhin lurapktam ukanaka, jumanakax Egipto markat jutasipkäyät ukapacha." 
Deuteronomy25:18 Uka jaqinakax janiw Diosarus axsarapkänti; ukat sipana, kunapachatix jiwasax wali qarjata, ch'ama thayjtata uñjasipkäyätan ukkhaw jalxatistu; ukatsti ch'ama thayjtat qhipa jutirinakarus jiwayapxarakïnwa." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ukhamasti, kunapachatix Tatit Diosamax churkätam uka uraqin taqi uñisirinakamat qhispiykätam ukapachaxa, jumanakax Amalec chachan sutip aka uraqit chhaqtayapxañamawa. ¡Janipun uk phuqhañ armasipxamti!" 
Deuteronomy26:1 Moisesasti sarakïnwa: “Kunapachatix Tatit Diosamax churkätam uka uraqin jikxatasxäta ukapachaxa," 
Deuteronomy26:2 uraqix achuyarapkätam uka taqi apthapitanakamat nayrïr achunak apaqäta, ukatsti mä canastar uchasin kawkha chiqtix Tatit Diosamax sutipan ukankañatak ajlliskani uka chiqaruw apäta." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Ukatsti ukawjan luqtir sacerdoter uñstasin säta: ‘Nayax Tatit Diosaxan nayraqatapan arsta: jichhürunxa, jupan churat uraqiruw purxta, kamisatix Tatitux juramentomp nayra awkinakasar churañ arsuwaykatayna ukhamarjama’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Ukatsti sacerdotex amparamat uka canasta katuqätam, ukat Tatit Diosaman altarap nayraqatar uchani;" 
Deuteronomy26:5 jumasti aka arunak Diosam nayraqatan qhanañchäta: ‘Nayra awkinakaxax arameo muyuyku jaqinakänwa, juk'anikirakïnwa. Egipto markar jakiriw jupanakax sarxapxatayna, ukansti mä jach'a markaw tukupxatayna, wali ch'amani, waljani tukuñkama." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Ukampis egipcionakax janiw wal uñjapkitänti, jawq'japxitänwa, llakisiyapxitänwa, wal t'aqhisiyapxitäna, ch'ama lurañanak lurayapxitäna." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Ukapachasti nanakax awkinakaxan Tatit Diosaparuw mayipxäyäta nanakar yanapt'añapataki, Diosasti mayisitanakax ist'apxituwa, pist'añan sarnaqatanakaxsa, wali irnaqatanakaxsa, wali t'aqhisitanakaxsa uñjarakiwa." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Diosax jach'a ch'amap uñacht'ayäna, ukatsti muspharkañ luräwinakampi, jach'a axsarkañ luräwinakampiw Egipto markat irpsunxapxitu," 
Deuteronomy26:9 ukhamat aka uraqir irpantanipxitu, lechempi, misk'imp umjam jalaski uka uraqi nanakar churasa." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Ukat jichhax apanta, kawkïr uraqtix Diosax churkitu uka uraqin nayrïr achunakapa’ sasa. “Ukatsti Tatit Diosaman nayraqataparuw uka canasta uchäta, ukat jupan nayräxapar killt'asirakïta." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Uka qhipatsti mä phunchhäwi luräta taqi kuntix Diosamax jumampiru utamankirinakampir churktam ukanakat yuspagarasa. Ukatsti levitanakampi, jumanak taypin jakir jaya markat jutir jaqinakamp chikaw kusisirakïta." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Sapa kimsa maraw taqpach achunakamat sapa tunkat maya apaqäta, ukatsti uka achunakat levitanakaruw churäta, jumanak taypin jakir yaqha markat jutir jaqinakaru, wajchanakaru, ijmanakarus churarakïta. Ukhamat markanakaman jan khitis manq'atjam t'aqhiskaniti." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Ukapachaw jumax Tatit Diosamar säta: ‘Tatay, jumatak yaqhachat achunakaxat apaqxta, ukatsti levitanakarux churxtwa, yaqha markat jutir jaqinakaru, wajchanakaru, ijmanakarus churxaraktwa. Taqi iwxanakamar phuqhasa, kamachi arunakamarjam jan kun armasisa." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Janiw uka yaqhachat achunakat manq'kti, llakisita, ukhamarak q'añuchat jikxataskäyät ukkhasa, janirakiw jiwatanakarus luqtkti. Tatit Diosaxay, taqi arunakamaruw jaysta, ukhamarjamaw phuqharakta." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Jichhasti alaxpachatpach uñtanim, qullan jakäwimata, Israel markamar aski waxt'äwimp phuqt'am, ukhamarak churapkista uka uraqiru, kawkhantix lechempi, misk'impix umjam jalaski uka uraqiru; nayra awkinakaxar arsuwaykta ukhamarjama’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Moisesasti sarakïnwa: “Tatit Diosamaw jichha urun iwxtam juman uka kamachi arunakaparjam jakañamataki; taqi chuymampi, taqi jakañamampiw uka yatichäwinak phuqharakïta." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Jumaw jichhürun qhanañchtaxa, Tatitun juman Diosamätapa, ukatsti arumampiw arsuraktaxa jupan thakhipan arkaña, kamachinakapa, kamachi arunakap wiñayapun phuqhañsa." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Tatitusti jichhüruw qhanañcharaki, juma Israel markan jupan markapätama, kunjämatix arupampi arsuwayktam ukhama, taqi kamachi arunakap phuqhañamataki." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Jupaw jumarux taqi markanakat sipan mä jach'a marka tukuyätam, jach'a kankañani, aytat kankañani; ukhamat Tatit Diosamatak yaqhachat qullan markar tukurakïta, jupax sisktam ukhamarjama.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Moisesampi, Israelan jilïr jaqinakapampix aka arunak taqpach markar sapxäna: “Jichhürun churapksma taqi uka kamachi arunakar phuqhapxam." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Kunapachatix Jordán jawira makhatapkäta, ukatsti Tatit Diosamax churapkätam uka uraqir mantapkarakïta ukapachaxa, jach'a qalanak sayt'ayapxäta, uka qalanakarusti q'atawimpiw llusikipapxäta," 
Deuteronomy27:3 churapksma taqi uka yatichäwinak ukar qillqañataki. Uka uraqir mantapkäta ukspachaw lurapxäta, Tatit Diosamax churapkätam, kawkhantix lechempi, misk'impix umjam jalaski uka uraqir mantasina, nayra awkinakamar arsuwaykän ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Ukhamasti, Jordán jawira khurkatar makhatapkäta ukapachaxa, Ebal sat qullu patxan qalanak sayt'ayapxäta, sapksma ukhamarjama, ukatsti q'atawimpiw uka qalanak llusikipapxäta." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Uka chiqaruw Tatit Diosamatak qalanakat mä altar lurapxarakïta. Uka qalanakasti maypachäñapawa, janiw k'uthatäñapäkiti. Uka altaran Tatit Diosamarux nakt'ayat wilañchanak luqtapxäta," 
Deuteronomy27:6  
Deuteronomy27:7 sumankañ wilañchanaksa luqtapxarakïta; ukatsti Tatit Diosam nayraqatan manq'apxäta, kusisipxarakïta." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Uka qalanakxarusti churapksma taqi uka yatichäwinak suma qhan qillqantapxäta” sasa. 
Deuteronomy27:9 Ukatsti Moisesax levita sacerdotenakamp chikt'ataw israelitanakar säna: “Israelitanaka, jan uxupxamti, ist'apxam; jichhürut jumanakax Tatit Diosaman markapar tukupxtaxa." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Ukhamasti, jupar jaysapxam, jichhürun sapksma uka kamachi arunakaparjamaw sarnaqapxäta.”" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Uka pachpa uruw Moisesax markar akham iwxäna: 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Kunapachatix jumanakax taqpachani Jordán jawir makhatxapxäta ukkhaxa, Simeón, Leví, Judá, Isacar, José, Benjamín ukïr ayllunakax Guerizim qullu pataruw sayt'asipxani Israel markar aski waxt'äwi arunak arsuñataki." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Ukatsti Rubén, Gad, Aser, Zabulón, Dan, Neftalí, uka ayllunkirinakax Ebal qullu pataruw sayt'asipxarakini jan ist'asirinakar ñanqhachañataki." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Levitanakasti taqpach israelit jaqinakaruw parlani, ukatsti jach'at arsusaw akanak qhanañchani:" 
Deuteronomy27:15 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan metal umatatayasin yaqha diosanak lurir jaqixa, ukatsti jan uñjkañ chiqar imantarakini ukaxa; uka lurañasti Diosatakix axtaskayawa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy27:16 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan awkiparu, taykapar jisk'achañ chuymampi uñjir jaqixa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan lunthatañ amtampi jaqi masipan uraqi qurpanakap jithinaqayir jaqixa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa. 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan juykhu jaqiru thakhipat maysar irpanukur jaqixa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa. 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan yaqha markat jutir jaqiru, mä ijmaru, mä wajcharus jan chiqa kankañampi uñjir jaqixa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan awkipan warmipampi ikintirixa, ukham luratapampix awkiparuw p'inqachayi.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan mä uywampi q'añusir jaqixa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa. 
Deuteronomy27:22 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan kullakapamp ikintir jaqixa, awkipan phuchhapäpasa, jan ukax taykapan phuchhapäpasa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan taykch'ipampi ikintasir jaqixa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa. 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan jaqi masipar ch'uxña lurasin jiwayir jaqixa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa. 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan qullqi layku mä jan juchan jaqir jiwayir jaqixa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa. 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Ñanqhachatäpan aka yatichäwinakar jan yäqirixa, janirak ukhamarjam sarnaqki uka jaqixa.’ Uka arsutarusti taqpach markaw sani: ‘Ukhamäpan’ sasa." 
Deuteronomy28:1 Moisesasti saskakïnwa: “Chiqpachatix Tatit Diosamar jaysäta, ukatsti jichhürun churksma uka kamachi arunakaparjam sarnaqarakïta ukapachasti, Diosax taqi aka uraqin utjir markanakxaruw uchätam." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Ukhamarusa, Diosamar ist'atamat wiñayaw taqi aka aski waxt'äwinak katuqäta:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 Tatitux aski waxt'äwinak churätam kawkhantix jakaskät ukkhana, markansa, pampa uraqinsa." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Wawanakamasa, achunak apthapitamas askimp phuqt'atäniwa, ukhamarak vacanakamana, ovejanakaman qallunakapasa, taqpach uywanakamasa." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Achunak imasiñ pirwanakamasa, t'ant'a chapusiñ lamanamas askimp phuqt'atäniwa." 
Deuteronomy28:6 Jumasti taqi luräwinakaman askimp phuqt'ataw uñjasirakïta. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Diosaw jumar nuwantir uñisirinakamarux amparamar katuyätam. Jumamp nuwasirix suma siqicht'ataw jutantapxani, ukampis jumar uñjasax janiw kunjäm jaltxapxatapsa amtasipkaniti." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Tatit Diosamaw aski churäwinak apayanïtam, juyra pirwanakamaru, taqi luräwinakamaru, ukatsti churkätam uka uraqin kusisitaw jakäta." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Jumatix kamachi arunakap phuqhäta, thakhipanjam arkarakïta ukkhaxa, Tatit Diosamax jupatak yaqhachat marka tukuyätam, kamisatix juramentomp arsuwayktam ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Taqi akapach uraqin utjir markanakasti Tatitun sutipan jumampïtap uñjapxani, ukat jumar axsarapxätam." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Diosax munasiñap uñacht'ayätam, walja wawanak jumar churasa, vacanakaman qallunakapar jiltayasa, uraqinakamar jilarkir achuyasa, kunjämtix awkinakamar churañatak juramentomp arskatayna ukhamarjama." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Ukatsti jumatak suma imasitap jist'aranini, ukasti alaxpachawa, uraqinakamar wakisit pachapar jallu puriyaniñataki; ukatsti taqi irnaqäwinakamarux askinakampiw phuqt'ätam. Jumax walja markanakaruw mayt'äta, ukampis jumax janiw khititsa mayt'askätati." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Diosax mä jach'a jilïrit utt'ayätam, janiw qhipankkätati, mayninakat sipan amstankapunïtawa, janipuniw kunapachas aynachan uñjaskätati, jumatix jichhürun Tatit Diosaman kamachi arunakap churksma ukhamar phuqhäta, ukarjam taqi axsart'añamampi sarnaqäta," 
Deuteronomy28:14 janirak yaqha diosanakarus arkkäta ukapacha. 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Ukampis jumatix Tatit Diosamar jan ist'käta, janirak kamachi arunakaparjamasa, kamachinakaparjamas sarnaqkäta, jichhürun churksma uka iwxanakarus phuqkarakïta ukkhaxa, taqi aka ñanqhachäwinakaw jumxar jutani:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 Jumasti ñanqhachataw uñjasïta markansa, pampansa." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Achunak imañ pirwamasa, t'ant'a chapusiñ lamanamas ñanqhachatäniwa." 
Deuteronomy28:18 Wawanakamasa, yapu apthapitanakamas ñanqhachatäniwa, vacanakamana, ovejanakaman qallunakapasa, taqi uywanakaman qallunakapas ñanqhachatäniwa." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Jumasti taqi luräwinakaman ñanqhachataw uñjasïta. 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Taqi luräwinakamanxa, Tatitux ñanqhachäwinaka, pitusiñanaka, llakisiñanak apayanïtam, ukanakasti juk'a urunakan t'unjat uñjasiyätam, juman jan wali luräwinakamampi Tatitur apanukutam layku." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Kawkïr uraqtix katkäta uka chiqanxa Tatituw axsarkañ usuñanak jumar tukjañatak apayanini. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Ukhamarakiw apayanïtam jiwañ usunaka, ñanqha usunaka, p'usu usunaka, sinti junt'u pachanaka, waña pachanaka, trigo yapunakam tukjir laq'unaka, ukatsti kunayman usunakaw jumar t'unjañkam arkanaqätam." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Alaxpachatsti janiw jallux purinkaniti, aka uraqisti janirakiw kunsa achuyarapkätamti." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Diosasti jallu lantix laq'ampi ch'allampi jumxarux puriyanini, juman t'unjat uñjasiñamkama," 
Deuteronomy28:25 uñisirinakamamp jumar tukjayañkama. Jumax jupanakamp nuwasirix siqikiw sarantaskäta, ukampis janiw kunjäm jaltxatamsa amtaskätati, taqpach uraqin jakir jaqinakatakix axsarañjamäyätawa." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Jamach'inakampi, monte animalanakampiw jiwat janchim manq'antani, janiw khiti aliswaqiris utjkaniti." 
Deuteronomy28:27 “Tatituw jumar egipcionakarjam llixti usunakamp mutuyätam, p'usu usunakampi, sarna usunakampi, jasi jasi usunakampi, janiw uka usunakat waliptkätati." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Ukhamarakiw luqhiptañampi, juykhuptañampi, pixtusiñanakamp t'aqhisiyätam." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Ukatsti urunsa mä juykhur uñtataw katt'asis sarnaqäta. Janirakiw kuna luratamas sumäkaniti. T'aqhisiyata, sallqjatapuniw uñjasïta, janiw khitis yanapt'ir jutkarakïtamti." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Jaqichasiñatakis parlatanïskätawa, ukampis yaqha jaqiw parlatamampix ikintasini; mä utsa lurasiskätawa, ukampis janiw uka utan jakkätati; uva yapunaksa yapuchasiskätawa, ukampis janirakiw achupat kuns manq'kätati." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Nayraman uñjkataw urqu vacamsa kharirapxani, ukampis janiw aychapxa manq'kätati; asnomsa munkir jan munkir aparapxätam, ukatsti janiw kuttayapkätamti; ovejanakamas uñisiriman amparapankaniwa, janiw khitis uka uñisirinakamat aparañ yanapkätamti." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Nayraman uñjkataw yuqall wawamasa, imill wawamasa yaqha markankir jaqinakar katuyat uñjasini, jupanakar thaqkäwix qarïtawa, janiw jikxatkätati." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Jan uñt'at jaqinakaw yapunakamat manq'asini, jumasti t'aqhisiyata jan wali uñjatapuniw sapürus sarnaqäta." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Ukanak uñjasasti luqhirätawa. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Tatituw juman qunqurimaru, lankhu charamaru, taqpach janchimar ñanqha llixtinakamp t'aqhisiyätam, janiw kunas k'umarachkätamti." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Diosan munañapat jumasa, reyimasa katuntat uñjasini, ukatsti yaqha markar apataw uñjasipxäta, uka marksti janiw jumasa, awkinakamas uñt'apkänti. Ukatsti uka markan yaqha diosanakar yupaychapxäta, lawata, qalat lurat diosanakaru." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Ukatsti kawkha markarutix Diosax irpkätam uka markanakan p'inqachata, axtasita, jaqin parlasitaw sarnaqäta." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Yapunakamarux walja jathampiw yapuchaskäta, ukampis juk'a achunakak apthapïta, t'iju t'ijunakaw uka achunak manq'suni." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Uva yapunaksa yapuchaskätawa, sumsa uñjaskarakïtawa, ukampis janiw mä uvsa apthapkätati, janirakiw mä juk'a vinopsa umt'kätati, laq'unakaw taqi ukanak tukjani." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Taqpach uraqinakamaruw olivo quqanak ayruskäta, ukampis janiw aceitepampix q'aphirt'ayaskätati, aceitunanakax jupapachpakiw jalartxani." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Yuqall wawanakamasa, imill wawanakamasa utjaskätamwa, ukampis janiw jumampi chikäkaniti, katuntata yaqha markanakar apataw uñjasipxani." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Uraqiman utjir taqi quqanakapasa, achunakapas t'iju t'ijunakan tukjataw uñjasini." 
Deuteronomy28:43 Markaman jakapkani uka yaqha markat jutir jaqinakax sapa kutiw juk'ampi juk'ampi qamiriptapxani, ukampis jumax juk'ampikiw pist'añan sarnaqäta." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Jupanakasti wali qamirïpxaniwa, qullqsa mayt'ätamwa; ukampis janiw juman kuna mayt'añas utjkätamti. Jupanakax aka uraqin wali aytataw tukupxani, ukampis jumarux janiw yäqapkätamti." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Taqi aka ñanqhachäwinakaw jumxarux jutani, ukatsti jumar tukjañatak jikxatañkamaw arkätam, Tatit Diosamar jan ist'añ munatamata, janirak jupan iwxata kamachi arunakapar phuqhañsa munatamata." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Taqi akanakasti jumatakisa, wawanakamatakisa, wiñayatak mä jach'a uñacht'äwïniwa," 
Deuteronomy28:47 juman jan kusisiñampi, jan qhana arumpi Diosar yupaychatamata, walja yänak churktam ukasa." 
Deuteronomy28:48 Tatitux apayankätam uka uñisirinakaruw luqtäta; umatsa, manq'atsa t'aqhisïtawa, isitsa jalstata, kunayman pist'ayasiñanak uñt'äta. Diosax wali ch'ama lurañanakan t'aqhisiyätam, juman t'unjat uñjasiñamkama." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Diosasti wali jayankir uraqit jumar uñisir marka sartayani, juman jan uñt'at markat jutani, janiw jupanakan parlapsa yatktati. Uka jaqinakax jank'akiw nuwantasiñ yati, jaltir pakalir uñtata;" 
Deuteronomy28:50 wali axsarkay jaqinakäpxiwa, janiw chuyman jaqinakarux axsarapkaniti, janirakiw wawanakatsa khuyapt'ayasipkaniti." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Jupanakasti uywanakaman qallunakapa, uraqinakaman achunakap manq'antapxani, jan kunan jumar tukuyañkama; janiw jumatakix trigomsa, aceitemsa, vinomsa jilt'aykaniti, vacamana, ovejaman qallunakapsa janirakiw jilt'aykaniti; jumasti manq'atjamaw jiwäta." 
Deuteronomy28:52 “Uka jaqinakasti, Tatit Diosamax churapktam taqi uka markanakamar muyuntasaw t'unjapxani, jumanakan alkatasiñ jach'a thuru pirqanak tinkurayapxani." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Uñisirinakamax markanakamar muyuntapkani ukkhaxa, janiw kuna manq'añas utjapkätamti, wali manq'at awtjatätam laykusti, Tatit Diosamax churkätam uka yuqall wawanakamaru, imill wawanakamaruw manq'antasïta." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Jumanak taypin utjir wali llamp'u chuymani, munasiñan jaqisa jan wal kipka jilapar uñkatani, ukhamarak wali munat warmiparu, qhiparir wawanakaparusa," 
Deuteronomy28:55 jan jupanakamp chika wawanakapankïr aychapat manq'añataki. Janirakiw kuna manq'añas utjkaniti kunapachatix markanakamar nuwantapkani, ukhamarak wali axsarañanakampi, llakisiñanakampi uñisirinakamax markanakaman t'aqhisiyapkätam ukkhaxa." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Jumanak taypin jakir llamp'u chuymani warmisa, ukham suma llamp'u chuymanïsin jan q'ara kayus uraqir takt'ir warmisa, munat chachaparusa, wawanakaparus jan wal uñkatani," 
Deuteronomy28:57 jan jupanakamp chika jichha wawachasit wawapan janchipa, wawa uywañ parisapsa manqañataki; taqi ukanaksti jamasat manq'antani, kunapachatix uñisirinakamax markanakamar muyuntkani ukkhax janiw kuna manq'añas utjkaniti." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Jumatix jach'a ch'amani Tatit Diosaman sutipar jan yäqkäta, janirak aka qillqatan yatichäwinakaparjamas sarnaqkäta ukkhaxa," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Diosax jumampiru, wawanakamampirux mutuyäwinak apayanini, jan qullkaña ñanqha usunakampiw t'aqhisiyapxätam." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Ukatsti Egipto markar mutuykäna, jumar ukataq axsarayir uka pachpa mutuyäwiw jumxar jutani, janiw samart'aykätamsa." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Ukhamarusa, Diosax yaqha usunakampi, mutuyäwinakamp apayanïtam, ukanakax janiw aka kamachinakan qillqatäkiti, jumar t'unjañkama." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Jumasti Israel marka, alaxpacha warawaranakar uñtat waljätawa, ukampis mä juk'anirukiw tuküta, Tatit Diosamar jan ist'atam layku." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Kamisatix Tatitux suma askinak churasina, jumar mirantayasin kusiskäna, ukhamarakiw kusisini jumar aynacht'ayata, ch'usar tukut uñjasïta ukapachaxa, katkäta uka uraqitxa jan khuyapt'ayasis jik'inukutaw uñjasïta." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Diosax taqi markanakaruw mä thiyat mä thiykam ananukütam, ukansti yaqha diosanakaruw yupaychäta, lawata, qalat lurat diosanakaru, ukanaksti janiw jumasa, nayra awkinakamas uñt'känti." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Uka markanakan jakkasin janiw sumankañsa, samarañsa jikxatkätati; qawqhas kusisiñ munaskätawa, ukampis Diosax llakt'atak sarnaqayätam." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Jakañamax chijinakan muyuntataw jikxatasini, uruy arumaw axsarayasïta, jiwampis chikakïskätawa." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Axsarañampi atipjayasisasti, willjta tuqirux sätawa: ‘Jank'ak arumäxaspa’ sasa. Arumasti: ‘Jank'ak urüxaspa’ sasaraki." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Tatitux barconakat Egiptorux kuttayätam, jupax ‘janiw uka thakhinjam kuttätati’ siskchïyätam ukasa; ukatsti uñisirinakamaruw aljätam jupanakan t'aqhisiyat luqtiripäñamataki; ukampis janiw khitis jumar alasiñ munkaniti.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Moisesasti israelitanakarux kawkïr arust'äwi arunaktix Diosax jupanakamp Horeb qulluna lurkatayna ukanak iwxañ tukuyäna. Ukat Diosax Moisesar sarakïna Moab uraqin mä machaq arust'äwi jupanakamp lurañapataki. 
Deuteronomy29:2 Moisesasti israelitanakaruw tantachthapïna, ukatsti machaq arust'äwin yatichäwinakap jupanakar churasin säna: “Jumanakax niy uñjapxtawa taqi kuntix Tatitux Egipto uraqin faraón reyimpiru, jilïrinakapampiru, taqpach markapampir lurkän ukanakxa." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Ukatsti uñjapxaraktawa uka jach'a yant'anaka, uñacht'äwinaka, muspharkañ luräwinaka." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Ukampis Tatitux jichhürkamaw jan churapktamti yatiñ kankañ chuyma, janirakiw taqi ukanakan kunat ukham lurasitapsa amuyt'ayapktamti." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Nayax pusi tunka maraw wasaranjam irpanipxsma, taqi uka maranakansti janiw isimasa, wiskhumasa mirq'iskänti." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Janirakiw t'ant'sa manq'apkäyätati, vinsa, kuna machjayir umañanaksa umapkäyätati, ukhamat Tatitun jumanakan Diosamätapa yatipxañamataki." 
Deuteronomy29:7 “Kunapachatix aksa tuqinakar jutaskäyätan ukkhaxa, Sehón sat Hesbón markan reyipaw jiwasampi nuwasir mistunïna, Og sat Basán markan reyipas mistunirakïnwa, ukampis jiwasaw jupanakarux atipjäyätan." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Ukatsti uraqinakap katuntastan, uka uraqinaksti Rubén, Gad, Manasesan chikat aylluparuw churaraktan." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Ukhamasti, taqi aka arust'äwin arunakapar phuqhapxam, ukarjamarak sarnaqapxam, ukhamat taqi luräwinakaman sum sarañapataki."
