2Kings20:7 Ukatsti Isaías profetax, sarasin Ezequías reyir yatiyäna. Ukatsti higonak map'achayäna, ukampiw reyirux kawkhatix usutäkän ukkharu apxatasiyäna, reyin k'umaraptañapataki." 
2Kings20:8 Ukat Ezequiasax Isaiasar jiskt'äna: —¿Kuna chimpu tuqirak nayasti amuyasirista, Tatitun nayar k'umarachañapa, ukat kimsa urur Tatitun utapar sararakirista uksti?" 
2Kings20:9 Isaías profetasti ukxaruw säna: —Tatitux aka unañchäwi churätam kuntix arsktam uk jumampi phuqhañataki: “¿Jumax ch'iwina tunka chillqi nayrar sartañapti, jan ukax, tunka chillqi qhipar jittañapcha muntaxa?” —sasa." 
2Kings20:10 Ezequías reyisti ukxaruw säna: —Ch'iwin nayrar sartañapax janiw ch'amäkiti, ukampis ch'iwin qhipar jittañapaw wali ch'amaxa —sasa." 
2Kings20:11 Ukatsti Isaías profetax Tatituruw art'asïna, Tatitusti ch'iwirux qhiparuw jittayäna, Ahaz reyin gradanakapan ch'iwipa." 
2Kings20:12 Khä urunakanxa, Baladán sat chachan Merodac-baladán yuqapax khititix Babilonia markan reyipäkän ukaxa, Ezequías reyin usuntatap yatïna, ukhamasti khithanakap tuqiw qillqatanaka, churäwinak jupar apayäna." 
2Kings20:13 Ezequías reyisti uka khithanakarux sum katuqäna, ukatsti reyi utan utjir suma imasit yänakap uñacht'ayarakïna, qullqipa, quripa, suma q'apkir qullanakapa, suma aceitepa, nuwasiñ yänak imañ utapa, kunanakatix imañ utanakan utjkatayna taqi ukanaka. Ukatsti reyi uta taqpach muysuyäna, taqi kun uñacht'ayarakïna." 
2Kings20:14 Ukat Isaías profetax Ezequías reyin ukar sarasin jupar jiskt'arakïna: —¿Kawkitarak uka jaqinakasti jutapxi, kamsapxtamsa? —sasa. Ezequiasasti sänwa: —Babilonia jaya markat jutapxatayna —sasa." 
2Kings20:15 Isaías profetasti jiskt'askakïnwa: —¿Kunsa reyi utaman uñjawayapxi? —sasa. Ezequiasax ukxaruw säna: —Taqi kunatix uka manqhin utjki ukanak uñjapxi. Imasiñ utanakaxsa jan mayan taqi uñacht'ayta —sasa. 
2Kings20:16 Ukat Isaiasax jupar säna: —Tatitun yatiyäwip ist'am: 
2Kings20:17 “Akat qhipa urunakanxa, kunanakatix reyi utaman utjki ukanakampi, taqi kunanaktix nayra awkinakamax jichhürkam tantawayapki ukanakampxa, Babilonia markaruw apasxapxani. Janiw kunas akar qhiparkaniti." 
2Kings20:18 Jumat saraqir yaqhip wawanakamarus Babiloniaruw apasxapxani, jupanakarux capsusin reyin utapana luqtiritak uchapxani” —sasa." 
2Kings20:19 Ezequías reyisti jakañapkam samarañampi, sumankañampi utjañap amuyasin, Isaiasar säna: —Tatitutix ukham munchi ukaxa, nayatakix walikïskiwa —sasa." 
2Kings20:20 Ezequías reyin ukat ukxar sarnaqäwipasa, atipjäwinakapasa, uma qutaña luratapasa, ukatsti larqanjam markar uma apayatapasa, Judá markankir reyinakan luräwinakapa qillqatankiwa." 
2Kings20:21 Ezequías reyin jiwxatapatsti, Manasés sat yuqapaw jupa lantix marka apnaqxäna." 
2Kings21:1 Manasés waynax tunka payan maranïkäna ukkhaw marka apnaqañ qalltäna, jupasti Jerusalén markan phisqa tunka phisqan maraw Judá marka apnaqäna. Taykapax Hepsiba sutinïnwa." 
2Kings21:2 Ukampis Manasesan luratanakapax Tatitun nayraqatapan jan walinakänwa, jupasti kawkïr markanakarutix Tatitux israelitanakan nayraqatapat jaqunukkatayna ukanakan pachpa q'añu luräwinakap luräna:" 
2Kings21:3 Ezequías awkipax qullu patanakan utjir yupaychañ utanak t'unjkatayna ukanak wasitat luräna; Baal diosatak altaranak luräna, ukatsti Astarté diosan lantip lurarakïna, kunjämtix Israelan Ahab reyipax luraykatayna ukhama; ukhamarusa alaxpachan utjir taqi warawaranakaruw yupaycharakïna," 
2Kings21:4 ukxarusti altaranak Tatitun utapan luräna, uka chiqatsti Tatitux sataynawa: “Jerusalén markan sutixa uchä” sasa." 
2Kings21:5 Tatitun utapan utjir paypach uta anqäxapanxa pä yaqha altaranak luräna, ukanaksti alaxpachankir taqi warawaranakaruw luqtäna." 
2Kings21:6 Ukxarusti wawanakaparux wilañcha luqtasaw nakhantayäna, ukatsti ajayunakar jawsañampi, jamusiñanakampi yatïna, ukatsti ajayunakampi parlaña, layqasiñanakampi utt'ayäna. Luratanakapasti Tatitun nayraqatapan sinti jan walinakänwa, ukhamat Tatitur wali q'apisiyäna." 
2Kings21:7 Ukhamarakiw Tatitun utapan Astarté diosan lantip uchäna, uka tuqitsti Tatitux Davidaru, Salomón yuqaparus sataynawa: “Israelan taqi markanakapatxa, Jerusalén markaruw ajllista, ukan nayan utax uchañataki, ukan wiñay jakañatakiraki." 
2Kings21:8 Janiw israelitanakarux, nayra awkinakapar churkta uka uraqit wasitat jaqunukkäti, jupanakatix nayan arsutaxarjam sarnaqapxani, Moisés luqtirixax churawayki uka yatichäwinakarjamsa phuqhapxarakini ukapacha” sasa." 
2Kings21:9 Ukampis israelitanakax janiw Tatitur ist'apkänti. Jan ukasti, Manasés reyix kawkïr markanakarutix Tatitux israelitanakan nayraqatapan tukjkatayna ukanakat sipan, juk'amp ñanqha lurañanak jupanakar lurayäna." 
2Kings21:10 Ukat Tatitux profetanakap tuqi parläna, akham sasa:" 
2Kings21:11 “Manasés reyin jan wali q'añu luräwinakapata, ñanqha luräwinakapan jupat nayra utjir amorreonakat sipan juk'ampïtapata, Judá markarus idolonakapampi jucha lurayatapatxa," 
2Kings21:12 naya, Israelan Tatit Diosapaw arsta: Jerusalenampiru, Judá uraqimpirux, mä jan walt'añ apayanï, khititix uk ist'kani ukan jinchunakapas usuniwa." 
2Kings21:13 Jerusalén markarux mutuyäwa, kamisatix Samaria markarusa, Ahab reyin saraqirinakaparus mutuykta ukhama. Uka markax ch'usaw tukuni, kamisatix mä chuwax aytirasin k'umpt'añäki ukhama." 
2Kings21:14 Markaxat jilt'ir jaqinakarusti, jaytanuküwa, ukatsti uñisirinakapan amparaparuw katxaruyä, taqi yänakap apaqat uñjasiñapataki." 
2Kings21:15 Jupanakan luratanakapax nayraqataxan jan walinakätap layku; ukatsti kunürutix nayra awkinakapax Egiptot mistunipkän ukürut jichhakam nayar q'apisiyapxatap layku” sasa. 
2Kings21:16 Judá markar juchanak lurayatapatsa, Tatitun nayraqatapan jan wali luratanakapatsa, Manasesax Jerusalén markan jan juchan walja jaqinakaruw jiwarayäna, uka wilampiw markar mä thiyata mä thiykam phuqhantäna." 
2Kings21:17 Manasés reyin ukat ukxar sarnaqäwipasa, taqi luratanakapasa, juchanak luratapasa, Judá markankir reyinakan luräwinakapa qillqatankiwa." 
2Kings21:18 Manasés reyix jiwxäna ukkhasti, juparux reyi utapan utjir Uzá sata panqar uyun imt'xapxäna. Uka qhipatsti Amón sat yuqapaw jupa lantix marka apnaqxäna." 
2Kings21:19 Amón chachax pä tunka payan maranïkän ukkhaw marka apnaqañ qalltäna, jupasti Jerusalén markan pä maraw marka apnaqäna. Taykapax Mesulémet sutinïnwa, jupasti Jotbá chiqankir Harús chachan phuchhapänwa." 
2Kings21:20 Ukampis Amón reyin luratanakapax Tatitun nayraqatapan jan walinakänwa, Manasés awkipan luratanakapjamaraki," 
2Kings21:21 jupasti awkipan jan wali sarnaqäwip arkäna, awkipax yupaychkatayna uka pachpa idolonakaruw jupax yupaycharakïna." 
2Kings21:22 Ukham lurasaw jupax nayra awkinakapan Tatit Diosaparu apanuküna, janiw jupan munañaparjam lurkänti." 
2Kings21:23 Mä urusti, Amonan jilïr jaqinakapax jupatakiw sayt'asipxäna, ukat reyirux pachpa reyi utapan jiwayapxäna." 
2Kings21:24 Ukampis markankir jaqinakaw uka jilïr jaqinakar jiwayapxäna, ukatsti Amón reyin Josías yuqaparuw jupa lantix reyit utt'ayapxäna." 
2Kings21:25 Amón reyin ukat ukxar sarnaqäwipasa, luratapasa Judá markankir reyinakan luräwinakapa qillqatankiwa." 
2Kings21:26 Amón reyirux Uzá sat panqar uyupan imt'xapxäna. Uka qhipatsti Josías yuqapaw jupa lantix marka apnaqxäna. 
2Kings22:1 Josiasax kimsaqallqu maranïkän ukapachaw marka apnaqañ qalltäna. Jupasti Jerusalén markan kimsa tunka mayan maraw Judá marka apnaqäna. Taykapax Jedidá sutinïnwa, jupasti Boscat chiqankir Adaías chachan phuchhapänwa." 
2Kings22:2 Josías reyin luratanakapasti Tatitun nayraqatapan chiqapänwa; jupasti David nayra awkipan sarnaqäwiparjamaw arkäna. 
2Kings22:3 Kunapachatix Josías reyix tunka kimsaqallqun mara Judá marka apnaqaskän ukkhaw, jupax Tatitun utapar khithäna, Asalías chachan Safán yuqapa qillqiriparu, Mesulaman allchhiparu. Reyisti sänwa:" 
2Kings22:4 —Hilquías jilïr sacerdoten ukar saram, juparusti sätawa: “Kuna qullqinaktix jaqinakax Tatitun utapar mantañ punku uñjirinakaru katuyapki ukanak apthappan," 
2Kings22:5 ukatsti Tatitun utap lurayirinakaru churpan, jupanakasti khitinakatix Tatitun utap askichasipki ukanakaruw irnaqäwipat churapxarakini:" 
2Kings22:6 k'ullu khithurinakaru, irnaqäwinak sarayirinakaru, utachirinakaru, ukhamaraki lawanaka, ch'iyat qalanaka Tatitun utap askichañatak alapxañapataki." 
2Kings22:7 Jupar sarakïtawa, uka qullqi apnaqapxatapatxa janiw jakthapiñatak mayiñapäkiti, jupanakan chiqa chuymampi apnaqapxirïtap layku” —sasa." 
2Kings22:8 Mä urusti, Hilquías jilïr sacerdotex, Safán qillqiriruw yatiyäna, Tatitun utapan kamachinakan qillqat jikxatkatayna ukxata; ukatsti juparuw uka qillqat katuyäna, Safán qillqiristi uka qillqat ullaränwa." 
2Kings22:9 Ukatsti Safán chachax ukxat yatiyiriw reyin ukar saräna, akham sasa: —Juma, reyin luqtirinakamax Tatitun utapan utjkatayna uka qullqi apthapisinxa, khitinakatix askichayañataki utt'ayatäki uka jaqinakaruw churapxi." 
2Kings22:10 Ukhamarus, Hilquías sacerdotex aka qillqat jikxatatayna, uksti nayaruw katuyitu. Akax uka qillqataxa —sasa. Ukat Safán qillqirix reyitak ullart'arapïna." 
2Kings22:11 Reyisti kuntix kamachinakan siskäna ukanak ist'asin llakisiñat isip ch'iyanuqasïna," 
2Kings22:12 ukatsti ukspachaw Hilquías sacerdoteru, Safán chachan Ahicam yuqaparu, Micaías chachan Acbor yuqaparu, Safán qillqiriru, Asaías yanapiripampir akham säna:" 
2Kings22:13 —Tatitur jiskt'ir sarapxam, kuntix aka qillqatarjam lurañasax wakiski uk yatiñasataki; Tatitux jiwasanakatak wali q'apisitäpachawa, nayra awkinakasax janiw aka qillqatan arunakapar yäqapkänti, janirakiw aka qillqatanakarjamas sarnaqapkänti —sasa." 
2Kings22:14 Ukatsti Hilcías, Ahicam, Acbor, Safán, Asaías jupanakax Huldá sat profetisa warmin ukaruw sarapxäna; jupasti Jerusalén markan machaq markäkis ukan jakäna. Huldá warmix, Ticvá chachan Salum yuqapan warmipänwa, Harhás chachan allchhipa. Salum chachax reyin isinakap uñjirïnwa; jiskt'apkäna ukkhasti," 
2Kings22:15 Huldá profetisa warmix jupanakar akham säna: —Israelan Tatit Diosapan arupax akawa: ‘Nayar jiskt'ir khithanipktam uka jaqir sapxam," 
2Kings22:16 naya, Tatituw sista: Nayaw aka uraqirusa, jaqinakapxarus mä jan walt'añ apayanï, kunjämtix uka qillqatan Judá markankir reyix ullarki ukan yatiyatarjama." 
2Kings22:17 Jupanakax nayar apanukusin yaqha diosanakaruw inciensonak nakhayapxi, taqi uka luratanakapampi nayar q'apisiyasa; ukat nayan q'apisiñaxax aka chiqatak aqti, ukasti janiw t'akurkaniti." 
2Kings22:18 Jichhax Tatitur jiskt'añatak khithanipktam uka Judá markan reyiparux sapxam: Israelan Tatit Diosapax sarakiwa: Aka qillqatankir arunak ist'asina," 
2Kings22:19 aka chiqawja uraqitaki, markachirinakapampitaki tukjat uñjasiñapa, ñanqhachatäñapa yatisin chuymam llakthaptayatam layku, llamp'ur tukutamata, isim ch'iyanuqasitamata, nayraqataxan jachatam laykuw, nayax jumar ist'araksma. Naya, Tatituw uk sisma." 
2Kings22:20 Uka luratam laykuw, nayax samarañan jiwxañama wakiyta, nayra awkinakamampi jikisiñamataki, kuna jan walt'äwinaktix akawja uraqitak apayankä ukanakxa, janiw jumax uñjkätati’ —sasa. Reyin khithanakapasti, kuna arunaktix Tatitux Huldá profetisa tuqi siskatayna uka arunak reyir yatiyiri kuttawayapxäna." 
2Kings23:1 Ukatsti reyix Judá uraqinkir jilïrinakampiru, Jerusalén markankir jilïrinakampiruw jawsayanïna, jupamp tantachasipxañapataki." 
2Kings23:2 Ukat Tatitun utaparu sarapxäna, Judá uraqinkir taqi jaqinakampi, Jerusalenankir jaqinakampi, sacerdotenakampi, profetanakampi, taqpach markampi; wawanakat qalltasina, jach'a jaqinakkama. Ukansti jach'at reyix jupanakatak ullart'arapïna, Tatitun utapan jikxataskatayna uka arust'äwi qillqat arunakax siskän ukanaka." 
2Kings23:3 Uka qhipatsti reyix Tatitun utapan sayirinakap jak'aru sayt'asisin, Tatit nayraqatan jupar jaysañatak arsüna, kamachi arunakaparjama, iwxanakaparjam chiqa kankañamp sarnaqañataki, ukhamaraki arust'äwi lurat amtäwinakar qillqatarjam phuqhañataki. Ukxarusti taqpach markachirinakarakiw uk phuqhañataki arsupxäna." 
2Kings23:4 Ukatsti Josías reyix Hilquías jilïr sacerdotempiru, maynïr sacerdotenakampiru, punku uñjirinakampiruw säna, Tatitun utapat Baal diosana, Astarté diosana, alaxpach warawaranakan yupaychañ yänakap apsupxañapataki. Ukanaksti ninampiw nakhantayäna Jerusalén marka anqäxan Cedrón sat pampanakana, qhillanakapsti Betel chiqaruw apayäna." 
2Kings23:5 Ukatsti kawkïr sacerdotenakarutix Judá uraqinkir reyinakax qullunakan utjir yupaychañ utanakan inciensonak nakhayañapatak utt'ayapkatayna ukanakarux jaqunukünwa, uka utanakasti Baal diosaru, intiru, phaxsiru, alaxpach taqpach warawaranakar yupaychañatak luratänwa. Ukhamarus Judá uraqin utjir markanakata, Jerusalén thiyanakan utjir markanakat altaranak apaqayarakïna." 
2Kings23:6 Tatitun utapankkän uka Astarté diosan lantiparusti Jerusalenat anqäxaruw apanuküna, ukatsti Cedrón jawir thiyan qhillar tukuyañkamaw ninamp nakhantayäna, uka qhillsti markan amay imäwiparuw willitatäna." 
2Kings23:7 Ukatsti chachapura juch lurañataki wakichatäkäna uka utanaksa t'unjarakïnwa, uksti Tatitun utapan lurapxäna, yaqha diosanakar yupaychasa, ukanarak warminakax Astarté diosataki isinak p'itapxäna." 
2Kings23:8 Ukatsti Josías reyix, Judá markanakankir taqi sacerdotenakaruw jawsayäna, ukatsti qullu patanakan utjir yupaychañ utanak t'unjayäna, Gueba chiqata Beerseba chiqakama, kawkhantix uka sacerdotenakax incienso nakhayapkatayna uka utanaka, ukatxa Josías reyix Judá marka apnaqir Josué chachan reyi utapar mantañ punkupankkäna uka diosanakan altaranakap t'unjayarakïna, ukasti markar mantañana ch'iqa tuqinkänwa." 
2Kings23:9 Qullu patanakan yupaychañ utanakankiri sacerdotenakasti, janiw Jerusalenankir Tatitun altaraparux sarapkänti, jan ukasti jupanakax mayni sacerdote masinakapampiw jan levaduran t'ant'anak manq'apxäna." 
2Kings23:10 Josías reyix Ben-hinom sat qhirwan utjkatayna uka nakhayaña t'unjarakïna, jan khitis yuqall wawaparusa, imilla wawaparus Milcom diosatak wilañcha luqtasipkañapataki." 
2Kings23:11 Ukatsti Tatitun utapar mantañ chiqan utjkän uka caballonak apaqäna, nuwasïwir sarañ carronakap nakhantayarakïna, ukanakasti utanak uñjir Natán-mélec sat chachan utap jak'ankänwa. Judá markankir reyinakaw uka caballonakampi, carronakampi apnaqapxirïna inti diosar yupaychañataki." 
2Kings23:12 Ukhamarus kawkïr altaranaktix Judá marka apnaqir reyinakax Ahaz chachan utap patar lurapkatayna uka altaranak t'unjäna, ukhamaraki kawkïr altaranaktix Manasés chachax, Tatitun utap anqäxanakan lurkatayna ukanaksa; t'unjasasti t'unanakapxa Cedrón jawiraruw willtanïna." 
2Kings23:13 Ukatsti Josías reyix, Jerusalén markat inti jalsu tuqin utjkatayna uka yupaychañ utanak takichasirakïna, Olivos qullut aynach tuqina, ukanaksti Israelan Salomón reyipaw luratayna sidonionakan Astarté sat axtkañ diosapataki; moabitanakan Quemós sat uñiskañ idolopataki; amonitanakan Milcom sat uñiskañ idolopataki." 
2Kings23:14 Ukatsti yupaychañ qalanakampi, lawanakamp jisk'a jisk'a tukjarakïna, uchatäkatayna uka chiqanakarusti, jaqi ch'akhanakampiw phuqhantäna." 
2Kings23:15 Ukatsti Betel chiqan utjir altarampi, yupaychañ utanakapampi, kawkïrinaktix israelitanakaru juchar puriyiri Nabat chachan Jeroboam yuqapax lurkäna ukanakxa, Josías reyix laq'ar tukuyañkamaw tukjäna, ukatsti ninampiw nakhantayäna, ukhamarak Astarté diosan lantiparusa." 
2Kings23:16 Josías reyix Betel chiqat kutt'asinkän ukapachasti pachpa qullu patan utjkatayna uka amay imäwinak uñjäna, ukatsti uka amay imäwinakat ch'akhanak apsuyanisin ñanqhachasaw altarxar nakhantayäna. Ukhamat Tatitun arupax kunjämtix profeta tuqi yatiykatayna ukhamarjam phuqhasïna." 
2Kings23:17 Ukatsti akatjamat Josiasax mä amay imäwi uñjasin jiskt'äna: —¿Khitir amtañatak luratas khä sayki ukaxa? —sasa. Markankir jaqinakasti ukxarux sapxänwa: —Uka amay imäwix, Judá markat jutkäna uka profetan imäwipawa; jupaw kuntix juma reyix Betelankir altarampi lurkta ukxat yatiyäna —sasa." 
2Kings23:18 Ukat Josías reyix säna: —Ukhamäskpan. Jan khitis ch'akhanakap llawq'panti —sasa. Ukhamasti janiw khitis Judá profetan ch'akhanakap llawq'känti, ukhamaraki kawkïr profetatix Samariat jutkatayna uka profetan ch'akhanakapsa." 
2Kings23:19 Josías reyix, Samaria markan utjir qullu patanakan yupaychañ utanakap taqpach t'unjäna, uka yupachañ utanaksti Israelan reyinakapaw lurapxatayna ukhamat Tatitur q'apisiyasa, ukanaksti Josiasax q'al t'unjäna, kunjämtix Betel markan lurkäna ukhama." 
2Kings23:20 Ukatsti altar patxanakan jiwarayäna, kawkïri sacerdotenakatix uka qullu patanakan yupaychañ utanakan utjkäna ukanakaru; jupanak patxarusti jaqi ch'akhanak nakhantayäna. Uka qhipat Jerusalén markarux kutt'anxäna." 
2Kings23:21 Uka qhipatsti Josías reyix markachirinakaruw yatiyäna Pascua uru uruyapxañapataki, Israel markan Tatitupar jach'añchasa, kunjämtix arust'äwi qillqatankki ukhamarjama." 
2Kings23:22 Markachirinakax janipuniw kunapachas Pascua uru ukham uruyapxirïkataynati, Israel markax jilïr chachanakan apnaqatäkän uka urunakatpacha, janirakiw Israelana, Judá uraqin taqi reyinakapan urunakapansa." 
2Kings23:23 Kunapachatix Josías reyix, tunka kimsaqallqun mara marka apnaqkän ukapachaw, uka Pascua urux Jerusalén markana Tatitur jach'añchas uruyasïna." 
2Kings23:24 Josías reyix layqanakampiru, yatirinakampiruw tukjäna, wila masinakan wali munat idolonakapampiru, yaqha idolonakampiru, ukhamaraki Judá uraqina, Jerusalén markan utjkän uka k'ari diosanakar yupaychañ axtkay yänaksa. Uksti Josiasax kuna qillqattix Hilquías sacerdotex Tatitun utapan jikxatkatayna ukan qillqata arunakarjam phuqhañatakiw luräna." 
2Kings23:25 Janipuniw khiti reyisa jupat nayraxa, jupat qhipatsa, Josías reyjamax utjkänti, Moisesan kamachi arunakaparjam ñanqhanakat jithiqtata, taqi chuymampi, taqi amuyumpi, taqi ch'amamp Tatitur jaysirixa." 
2Kings23:26 Ukhamäkipansa, Tatitux Judá uraqinkirinakatak q'apisitakïskänwa, Manasés reyin jan wali luratanakapax juparu ñanqhachatayna uka layku." 
2Kings23:27 Ukat Tatitux yatiyäna Judá markaru jupan nayraqatapat apanukuña, kunjämtix Israel markaru apanukkatayna ukhama; ajllisit Jerusalén markaparux apanukuñ munäna, ukhamaraki kawkïr utantix sutipa ukankañapa munkäna uksa." 
2Kings23:28 Josías reyin ukat ukxar sarnaqäwipasa, taqi kun luratanakapasa, Judá uraqinkir reyinakan luräwinakapa qillqatankiwa." 
2Kings23:29 Mä urusti, Egiptonkir faraón Necao sat reyix, Éufrates jawiraruw saräna Asiria markankir reyir yanapt'iri. Josías reyisti Necao reyirux Meguido sat chiqan katuntañ amti, ukampis Necao reyix jupar uñjasin ukspachaw jiwayäna." 
2Kings23:30 Josiasan yanapirinakapasti jiwat janchipxa mä carror uchasin Meguido chiqata, Jerusalén markakamaw apxapxäna, ukan imt'xapxarakïna. Markankir jaqinakasti Josías reyin Joacaz yuqaparuw awkip lantix reyit utt'ayapxäna." 
2Kings23:31 Joacaz chachax pä tunka kimsan maranïkäna ukkhaw, marka apnaqañ qalltäna, jupasti Jerusalén markan kimsa phaxsikiw Judá marka apnaqäna. Taykapax Libná chiqankiri, Hamutal sutinïnwa, Jeremiasan phuchhapänwa." 
2Kings23:32 Ukampis luratanakapax Tatit nayraqatanxa jan walinakänwa, kunjämtix nayra awkinakapax jan wali lurkäna ukhama." 
2Kings23:33 Necao sat faraonaw Joacaz reyirux Hamat uraqina, Riblá chiqan katuntat ukankayäna, ukhamat Jerusalén markan jan apnaqañapataki; ukhamarusa, Judá markarux kimsa waranqa kimsa patakan kilo qullqimpi, kimsa tunka kimsani kilo qurimpi churañapatakiw wayt'äna." 
2Kings23:34 Ukxarusti Necao faraonax Josías reyin Eliaquim sat yuqaparuw awkip lantix reyit utt'ayäna, sutipsa yaqha sutimpiw uchäna, Joacín sasa. Ukatsti Joacaz reyirux Egiptoruw irpxaruwayäna, ukanarak jiwxäna." 
2Kings23:35 Joacín reyisti Necao faraonarux maykatayna uka qullqimpi, qurimp churäna, uka qullqi apthapiñatakisti, markankir jaqinakaruw apthapiñapatak wayt'äna. Ukatsti Necao faraonar churañatakix, sapa mayniw qullqita, qurita, qawqhatix churañäki uk churapxäna, qawqhatix sapa mayni irsuñapäkän ukarjama." 
2Kings23:36 Joacín chachax pä tunka phisqan maranïkän ukkhaw, marka apnaqañ qalltäna; jupasti Jerusalén markan tunka mayan maraw Judá marka apnaqäna. Taykapax Rumá chiqankiri, Zebudá sutinïnwa; Pedaías chachan phuchhapänwa." 
2Kings23:37 Uka reyin luratanakapasti, Tatitun nayraqatapan jan walinakänwa, kamisatix nayra awkinakapax ñanqha lurapkäna ukhama." 
2Kings24:1 Joacín reyix marka apnaqkän ukkhaw, Babiloniankir Nabucodonosor reyix Judá uraqir katuntir mantantäna, ukatsti Joacín reyix kimsa maraw uka reyin munañaparjam sarnaqäna. Ukatxa sum amuyt'asisin, janiw uka reyirux jaysañ munkxänti, jan ukasti jupatakiw sayt'asxäna." 
2Kings24:2 Ukat Tatitux Joacín reyitaki caldeo, sirio, moabita, amonita lunthata tamanak apayanïna Judá markar mantantasin tukjapxañapataki, kunjämtix Tatitux luqtir profetanakap tuqi yatiykatayna ukhamarjama." 
2Kings24:3 Tatitusti Judá uraqirux Manasés reyin taqi juchanakap laykuw mutuyäna, janiw markarux pampachañ munkänti, Manasés reyin jan juchan walja jaqinakaru Jerusalén markan jiwarayatap layku." 
2Kings24:4  
2Kings24:5 Joacín reyin ukat ukxaru sarnaqäwipasa, taqi luratanakapasa, Judá markankir reyinakan luräwinakapa qillqatankiwa." 
2Kings24:6 Joacín reyix jiwxäna ukkhasti, Joaquín yuqapaw jupa lantix reyïxäna." 
2Kings24:7 Ukat uksarusti Egiptonkir reyix janiw mayampsa uraqipat mistunkxänti, Babiloniankir reyiw Egipto reyin taqpach uraqinakap katuntasxatayna, Egipton jisk'a jawirapat qalltasina, Éufrates jawirkama." 
2Kings24:8 Joaquín waynax tunka kimsaqallqun maranïkän ukkhaw, Judá marka apnaqañ qalltäna, jupasti kimsa phaxsiw Jerusalenan marka apnaqäna. Taykapax Nehustá sutinïnwa, jupasti Elnatán chachan phuchhapänwa, Jerusalén markankirirakïnwa." 
2Kings24:9 Joaquín reyin luratanakapax Tatit nayraqatan jan walinakänwa, kamisatix awkipax ñanqha lurkatayna uka kipkarak jupax luräna." 
2Kings24:10 Khä urunakansti Babiloniankir Nabucodonosor reyin ejercitopax sarasin Jerusalén markar katuntañatakiw muyuntäna. 
2Kings24:11 Kunapachatix soldadonakax markar nuwantasipkän ukkhaw Nabucodonosor reyix purinïna. 
2Kings24:12 Ukat Judá marka apnaqir Joaquín reyix, taykapampi, jilïrinakapampi, yanapirinakapampi, jupan suma uñt'at jaqinakampi Babiloniankir reyiru katuyasxapxäna, uka reyisti jupanakarux katuntayxänwa. Ukasti kunapachatix Nabucodonosor reyix kimsaqallqu mara Babilonia marka apnaqkän ukapachaw lurasïna." 
2Kings24:13 Ukatsti Nabucodonosor reyix Tatitun utapata, ukhamaraki reyi utat taqpach imat yänak apsuwayäna, ukatsti, kunjämtix Tatitux yatiykatayna ukhamarjamaw qurit lurat taqi yänak p'akiräna, kuna yänaktix Israelan Salomón reyipax Tatitun utapatak luraykatayna ukanaka." 
2Kings24:14 Ukatsti Nabucodonosor reyix, Jerusalenankir taqpach jaqinakaruw katuntat apasxäna, taqpach jilïrinakaru, suma nuwasir soldadonakaru, amparampi suma yänak lurir jaqinakaru, herreronakaru, tunka waranqanir phuqhachañkama. Janiw khitis Judá uraqin qhiparkxänti, jan ukasti wali pisin jakasir jaqinakakiw Jerusalenan qhiparxäna." 
2Kings24:15 Nabucodonosor reyisti Joaquín reyiru, taykaparu, warminakaparu, jilïrinakaparu, wali aytat jaqinakaruw katuntat apasxarakïna. Jerusalenat katuntat jaqinak Babilonia markaruw apasxäna." 
2Kings24:16 Babiloniankiri reyix wali aytat jaqinak katuntat apasxäna ukanakat taqpachanix, paqallq waranqanïnwa; ukatsti amparampi suma yänak lurir jaqinakata, herreronakatsa, suma nuwasiri wali ch'amani chachanakatsa waranqani apasxarakïna." 
2Kings24:17 Ukatsti Babiloniankir reyix Matanías chacharuw Joaquín sobrinop lantix, reyit utt'ayäna, sutipsa yaqha sutimpiw uchäna, Sedequías sasa." 
2Kings24:18 Sedequías chachax pä tunka mayan maranïkän ukkhaw marka apnaqañ qalltäna, jupasti Jerusalenan tunka mayan maraw marka apnaqäna. Taykapax Hamutal sutinïnwa, jupasti Jeremías chachan phuchhapänwa, Libná markankirirakïnwa." 
2Kings24:19 Sedequiasan luratanakapax Tatitun nayraqatapan jan walinakänwa, kunjämatix Joacín chachax jan walinak lurkatayna ukhama." 
2Kings24:20 Ukat Tatitux Jerusalén markampitaki, Judá markampitakix q'apisïna; ukatsti jupan nayraqatapat jupanakarux jaqunuküna." 
2Kings25:1 Sedequías reyix llätunka mara marka apnaqkäna, tunkïri phaxsita tunka uru saraqataruw, Babiloniankir Nabucodonosor reyix taqpach ejercitopamp sarantasin Jerusalén markar muyuntäna. Ukatsti marka uñkatasiruw utjnuqtäna, marka muytarusti makhatañanak luräna, markar katuntañataki." 
2Kings25:2 Jerusalén markasti Sedequías reyix tunka mayan mara marka apnaqkän ukkhakamaw muyuntat uñjasïna. 
2Kings25:3 Uka pachpa marana, pusïr phaxsina, llätunka uru saraqataruw manq'at t'aqhisiñax Jerusalén markan jilxattäna, jaqinakanxa janiw kuna manq'añapas utjkxänti." 
2Kings25:4 Ukat Sedequías reyix soldadonakapampi markar muyuntki uka pirqa p'iysupxäna. Jupanakasti uka chiqaw arumpacha jaltxapxäna, pä pirqa taypin utjkäna uka mantañ chiqanjama, reyin panqar uyup jak'a sarakipasa, ukatsti Jordán qhirwar sarir thakhinjam jalapxäna. Ukchañkamasti, Babiloniankir soldadonakax markar muyuntatäsipkänwa." 
2Kings25:5 Ukampis Babiloniankir soldadonakax Sedequías reyirux arktapxänwa, ukatsti juparux Jericó pampan jikxatapxäna. Sedequiasan ejercitopasti taqpachaniw jupar apanukusin jaltxapxäna." 
2Kings25:6 Babilonio soldadonakasti Sedequías reyir katuntasin, Babiloniankir reyin nayraqataparuw apapxäna, jupasti Hamat uraqinkir Riblá chiqankaskänwa. Uka chiqan Nabucodonosor reyix, Sedequías reyitak juchañchäwip arsüna," 
2Kings25:7 ukatsti jupan nayraqatapan wawanakaparux kharinukuyäna. Sedequiasarusti nayranakap irsuyäna, cadenanakampi ñach'antataw Babiloniar apxaruyäna." 
2Kings25:8 Babiloniankir Nabucodonosor reyin marka apnaqatapax, tunka llätunkan maränwa, phisqïr phaxsin paqallq uru saraqatarusti, uka reyin ejercitopan Nebuzaradán sat capitanapax Jerusalenaruw purinïna" 
2Kings25:9 jupasti ninampiw Tatitun utap nakhantayäna, ukhamaraki reyin utapampi, markan utjir utanakampi, juk'ampisa wali aytat jaqinakan taqpach utanakapampi," 
2Kings25:10 ukatsti jupamp chika jutkatayna uka babilonio ejercitox, Jerusalén markar muyuntki uka pirqanak tinkurayäna." 
2Kings25:11 Ukatsti Nebuzaradán capitanax, khitinakatix Jerusalén markan qhiparkatayna, ukhamaraki Babiloniankir reyir jaqkattapkatayna ukanakaru, amparampi suma yänak lurir jaqinakampiruw Babiloniar katuntat apasxäna." 
2Kings25:12 Ukampis pisin jakasiri jaqinakat mä qawqhanirukiw jaytanukuwayäna, uva yapuchañapataki, yapunak lurañapataki." 
2Kings25:13 Babilonio jaqinakasti Tatitun utapan utjkatayna uka broncet lurat yänakxa, jisk'a jisk'a tukjapxäna: sayirinaka, katxäsirinaka, uma uchañ jach'a lamana, ukatsti broncenak taqpach Babiloniar apasxapxäna." 
2Kings25:14 Ukhamaraki qhilla uchañanaka, k'istuñanaka, nina jawriñanaka, jach'a wisllanaka, kunatix Tatitun utapan luqtäwitaki wakiski taqi uka bronce yänak apasxapxäna." 
2Kings25:15 Ukhamarusa, Nebuzaradán capitanax qurita, qullqit lurat taqi yänaka, incienso nakhayañanaka, jach'a qirunaka apasirakïna." 
2Kings25:16 Salomón reyix Tatitun utapatak luraykatayna uka broncet lurat pä sayirinakana, uma uchañ jach'a lamanana, takxäsirinakapan tupupax janiw yatiñjamäkänti." 
2Kings25:17 Uka pä sayirinakax kipkakïnwa, sapa mayasti alayarux kimsaqallqu metroni, uka patäxapansti broncet lurat capitel sat k'achachañaw utjäna, ukasti alayarux pä metronïnwa; ukan muytaparusti broncet lurat mä rejillanïnwa, granada achunakampi k'achachata." 
2Kings25:18 Ukhamarusa, Nebuzaradán capitanax Seraías jilïr sacerdoteruw katuntäna, ukhamarak Sofonías ukxankir sacerdoteru, Tatitun utap uñjir kimsa chachampiru." 
2Kings25:19 Markankir jaqinakatsti, soldado tamanak apnaqir jilïriru, reyir luqtiri phisqa jaqinakaparu, ejercitotak chachanak jawsthapiyir oficialaru, aytat jaqinakat suxta tunkaniruw katuntäna." 
2Kings25:20 Jupanakar katuntasinsti, Nebuzaradán capitanax, taqpachaniruw Babiloniankir reyin nayraqatapar apäna; jupasti Hamat uraqina, Riblá chiqankaskänwa. Ukan Babiloniankir reyix jupanakar jiwarayäna. Judá markankir jaqinakax ukhamaw uraqipat jayar apanukut uñjasipxäna." 
2Kings25:21  
2Kings25:22 Babiloniankir Nabucodonosor reyix, Ahicam chachan Guedalías yuqaparuw apnaqirit utt'ayäna, Safán chachan allchhiparu, kawkïr jaqinaktix jupax Judá uraqin jaytawaykatayna ukanakar apnaqañapataki." 
2Kings25:23 Ukatsti kunapachatix Judá ejercitonkir jilïrinakasa, jaqinakapas uk yatipxäna ukkhaxa, jupanakax Guedalías chachampi parliriw Mispá chiqar sarapxäna. Jupanak taypinsti aka chachanakänwa: Netanías chachan Ismael yuqapa; Caréah chachan Johanán yuqapa; Netofá chiqankir Tanhúmet chachan Serahías yuqapa; Maacá markankir mä chachan Jaazanías yuqapa." 
2Kings25:24 Guedalías chachasti jupanakaru, jaqinakapampirux juramentompiw arsüna, akham sasa: “Babilonio oficialanakar jan axsarapxamti. Jumanakatix uka uraqin qhiparapxäta, ukatsti Babiloniankir reyir luqtapxäta ukkhaxa, jumanakatakix taqi kunas walikïskaniwa” sasa." 
2Kings25:25 Ukampis kunapachatix Guedaliasax paqallqu phaxsi marka apnaqañ phuqkän ukapachaxa, Judá markankir reyinakat saraqir Ismael chachaw tunka jaqinakamp chikt'at Mispá chiqar purinïna, ukatsti jupax Guedalías chacharux jiwayänwa, jupar yanapiri judionakarusa, babilonio jaqinakarusa jiwayarakïna." 
2Kings25:26 Ukatsti jaqinakax babilonio jaqinakar axsarapxatap laykusti jisk'asa jach'asa, ejerciton jilïrinakapasa taqiniw Egiptor jaltxapxäna." 
2Kings25:27 Kunapachatix Judá markan Joaquín reyipax Babilonia markan kimsa tunka paqallqun mara, tunka payan phaxsi, pä tunka paqallqun uru apanukuta jakaskän ukkhaw, Evil-merodac sat reyix, Babilonia markan reyïña qalltäna; jupasti Joaquín chachat khuyapt'ayasisin carcelat apsxäna," 
2Kings25:28 juparusti sum uñjäna, yäqarakïna, jupamp chika Babilonia markankapkän uka reyinakat sipana." 
2Kings25:29 Ukhamat Joaquín chachax carcelan uchasiñ isipa apsusxäna, ukat uksar jakäwipansti reyimp chikaw manq'asïna." 
2Kings25:30 Ukhamarus Joaquín chachan jakañapkamasti, Babiloniankir reyit sapüruw manq'asiñapatak qullqi katuqäna." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adán chachan wawanakapa: Set, Enós," 
1Chronicles1:2 Cainán, Mahalalel, Jéred," 
1Chronicles1:3 Henoc, Matusalén, Lámec," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noé jupanakänwa. Noé chachan wawanakapa: Sem, Cam, Jafet." 
1Chronicles1:5 Jafet chachan wawanakapa: Gómer, Magog, Madai, Javán, Tubal, Mésec Tirás." 
1Chronicles1:6 Gómer chachan wawanakapa: Asquenaz, Rifat Togarmá." 
1Chronicles1:7 Javán chachan wawanakapa: Elisá, Tarsis, Quitim Rodanim." 
1Chronicles1:8 Cam chachan wawanakapa: Cus, Misraim, Fut, Canaán." 
1Chronicles1:9 Cus chachan wawanakapa: Sebá, Havilá, Sabtá, Raamá, Sabtecá. Raamá chachan wawanakapa: Sebá, Dedán." 
1Chronicles1:10 Cus jaqix Nimrod chachan awkipänwa, jupasti aka uraqin nayrïr wali munañan jaqïnwa." 
1Chronicles1:11 Misraim chachan saraqirinakapax akanakänwa: ludeonaka, anameonaka, lehabitanaka, naftuhitanaka," 
1Chronicles1:12 patruseonaka, casluhitanaka, caftoritanaka, filisteo jaqinakasti jupanakat saraqirïpxiwa." 
1Chronicles1:13 Canaán chachan wawanakapa: Sidón, tayna yuqall wawapa, Het sullka yuqall wawapa." 
1Chronicles1:14 Canaán chachat saraqirinakax akanakänwa: jebuseo, amorreo, gergeseo," 
1Chronicles1:15 heveo, araceo, sineo," 
1Chronicles1:16 arvadeo, semareo, hamateo, taqi ukanaka." 
1Chronicles1:17 Sem chachan wawanakapa: Elam, Asur, Arfaxad, Lud, Aram. Aram chachan wawanakapa: Us, Hu, Mas, Guéter." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arfaxad jaqix Sélah chachan awkipänwa, Sélah jaqisti Éber chachan awkiparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles1:19 Éber chachax pä yuqall wawanïnwa: tayna wawapax Péleg satänwa, jupan urunakapansti uka uraqin jakirinakax t'aqanuqtänwa. Péleg chachan sullka jilapax Joctán satänwa." 
1Chronicles1:20 Joctán chachan wawanakapa: Almodad, Sélef, Hazar-mávet, Jérah," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoram, Uzal, Diclá," 
1Chronicles1:22 Obal, Abimael, Sebá," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofir, Havilá, Jobab. Taqi jupanakax Joctán chachan wawanakapawa." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofir, Havilá, Jobab. Taqi jupanakax Joctán chachan wawanakapawa." 
1Chronicles1:24 Sem, Arfaxad, Sélah," 
1Chronicles1:25 Éber, Péleg, Reú," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serug, Nahor, Térah," 
1Chronicles1:27 Abram, jupasti pachpa Abraham chachawa." 
1Chronicles1:28 Abraham chachan wawanakapa: Isaac, Ismael." 
1Chronicles1:29 Jupanakat saraqir wawanakax akanakänwa: Nebaiot, Ismael chachan jilïr wawapa, Quedar, Adbeel, Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mismá, Dumá, Masá, Hadad, Temá," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetur, Nafís, Quedmá. Jupanakaw Ismael chachan wawanakapänxa." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abraham chachana, Queturá uñt'atapan wawanakapa: Zimrán, Jocsán, Medán, Madián, Isbac, Súah. Jocsán chachan wawanakapa: Sebá, Dedán." 
1Chronicles1:33 Madián chachan wawanakapa: Efá, Éfer, Hanoc, Abidá, Eldaá. Taqi jupanakaw Queturá warmin wawanakapänxa." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahamax Isaac chachan awkipänwa. Isaac chachan wawanakapa: Esaú, Israel." 
1Chronicles1:35 Esaú chachan wawanakapa: Elifaz, Reuel, Jeús, Jaalam, Coré." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifaz chachan wawanakapa: Temán, Omar, Sefó, Gatam, Quenaz; Timná warmin wawapax Amalec satänwa." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reuel chachan wawanakapa: Náhat, Zérah, Samá, Mizá." 
1Chronicles1:38 Seír chachan wawanakapa: Lotán, Sobal, Sibón, Aná, Disón, Éser, Disán." 
1Chronicles1:39 Lotán chachan wawanakapa: Horí, Hemam. Timná warmix Lotán chachan kullakapänwa." 
1Chronicles1:40 Sobal chachan wawanakapa: Alván, Manáhat, Ebal, Sefó, Onam. Sibón chachan wawanakapa: Aiá, Aná." 
1Chronicles1:41 Aná chachax Disón chachan awkipänwa. Disón chachan wawanakapa: Hemdán, Esbán, Itrán, Querán." 
1Chronicles1:42 Éser chachan wawanakapa: Bilhán, Zaaván, Jaacán. Disán chachan wawanakapa: Us, Arán." 
1Chronicles1:43 Israelitanakax janïr reyinïkän ukkhaxa, Edom markan reyinakapax akanakänwa: Bela, Beor chachan wawapa; markapax Dinhaba satänwa." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela chachax jiwxän ukkhaxa, jupa lantix Zérah chachan Jobab yuqapaw reyïxäna, jupasti Bosrá markankirïnwa." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela chachax jiwxän ukkhaxa, jupa lantix Zérah chachan Jobab yuqapaw reyïxäna, jupasti Bosrá markankirïnwa." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobab chachax jiwxän ukkhaxa, jupa lantix Temán chiqankir Husam chachaw reyïxäna." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobab chachax jiwxän ukkhaxa, jupa lantix Temán chiqankir Husam chachaw reyïxäna." 
1Chronicles1:46 Husam chachax jiwxän ukkhasti, jupa lantix Bedad chachan Hadad yuqapaw reyïxäna, jupasti Moab chiqankir madianitanakaruw atipjäna; markapax Avit satänwa." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadad chachan jiwxatapatsti, jupa lantix Masrecá markankir Samlá chachaw reyïxäna." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samlá chachan jiwxatapatsti, jupa lantix Saúl chachaw reyïxäna, jupasti jawir jak'ankir Rehobot markankirïnwa." 
1Chronicles1:49 Saúl chachan jiwxatapatsti, jupa lantix Acbor chachan Baal-hanán yuqapaw reyïxäna." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baal-hanán chachan jiwxatapatsti, jupa lantix Hadad chachaw reyïxäna; markapasti Pau satänwa. Hadad chachan warmipax Mehetabel satänwa, jupasti Matred chachan phuchhapänwa, Mezaab chachan allchhiparaki." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadad chachan jiwxatapatsti, Edom markan jilïrinakapax akanakänwa: Timná, Alvá, Jetet," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibamá, Elá, Pinón," 
1Chronicles1:53 Quenaz, Temán, Mibsar," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magdiel, Iram. Jupanakax Edom markan jilïrinakapänwa." 
1Chronicles2:1 Israel chachan wawanakapa: Rubén, Simeón, Leví, Judá, Isacar, Zabulón," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, José, Benjamín, Neftalí, Gad, Aser." 
1Chronicles2:3 Judá chachan wawanakapa: Er, Onán, Selá, jupanakänwa. Uka kimsanin taykapasti Súa chachan cananea phuchhapänwa. Ukampis Judá chachan Er sat jilïr yuqapax wali qhuru jaqïnwa, ukat Tatitux jakañap apaqäna." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamar sat Judá chachan yuxch'apax pä wawanïnwa: Fares, Zérah. Judá chachan taqpach wawanakapasti phisqanïnwa." 
1Chronicles2:5 Fares chachan wawanakapa: Hesrón, Hamul." 
1Chronicles2:6 Zérah chachan wawanakapa: Zimrí, Etán, Hemán, Calcol, Dardá, taqpachanix phisqanïnwa." 
1Chronicles2:7 Carmí chachan wawapax Acar satänwa, jupaw Israel markatak jan walt'añ apanïna, kuntix Tatitux q'al tukjapxam siskän uk katuntasitap layku." 
1Chronicles2:8 Etán chachan wawapax Azarías satänwa. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hesrón chachan wawanakapasti: Jerahmeel, Ram, Caleb ukanakänwa." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ram jaqix Aminadab chachan awkipänwa, Aminadab jaqix Nahasón chachan awkipänwa, jupasti Judá chachan yuqanakapan jilïripänwa." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahasón jaqix Salmá chachan awkipänwa, Salmá jaqix Booz chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles2:12 Booz jaqix Obed chachan awkipänwa, Obed jaqix Jesé chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles2:13 Jesé jaqin wawanakapasti: Eliab, Abinadab, Simá," 
1Chronicles2:14 Natanael, Radai;" 
1Chronicles2:15 Ósem, ukhamarak David." 
1Chronicles2:16 Jupanakan kullakanakapasti: Seruiá, Abigail ukanakänwa. Seruian wawanakapasti kimsanïnwa: Abisai, Joab, Asael." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigail warmix mä wawanïnwa, Amasá, jupan awkipax ismaelita Jéter chachänwa." 
1Chronicles2:18 Caleb, Hesrón chachan wawapa, Azubá warmimpix mä wawanikïnwa, Jeriot sata. Maynïr wawanakapasti: Jéser, Sobab, Ardón ukanaka." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azubá warmix jiwxän ukkhasti, Caleb chachax Efrata warmimpiw jaqichasxäna, jupampix mä wawanikïnwa, Hur sata." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hur jaqix Urí chachan awkipänwa, Urí jaqisti Besalel chachan awkiparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles2:21 Hesrón chachax suxta tunka maranïkän ukkhaxa, Maquir chachan phuchhapampiw jaqichasxäna, jupax Galaad chachan awkipänwa, uka warmimpix mä wawanikïnwa, Segub sata." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segub jaqix Jaír chachan awkipänwa, jupasti Galaad uraqin pä tunka kimsan markanakanïnwa." 
1Chronicles2:23 Ukampis Guesur, Aram jaqinakax Jaír chachan campamentonakap katuntasipxäna, Quenat jaqinkir jisk'a markanakapamppacha; taqpachax suxta tunka markanakänwa. Jupanakaw Maquir chachat saraqir wawanakapaxa, jupax Galaad chachan awkipawa." 
1Chronicles2:24 Hesrón chachan jiwxatapatsti, Caleb chachax Efrata sat warmimpiw jaqichasxäna, uka warmix Hesrón awkipan warmipänwa, uka warmimpix mä wawanikïnwa Ashur sata, jupax Tecoa chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Hesrón chachan Jerahmeel jilïr yuqapan wawanakapa: Ram, Buná, Oren, Ósem, Ahías ukanaka." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerahmeel chachax yaqha warminïnwa, Atará sutini, jupasti Onam chachan taykapänwa." 
1Chronicles2:27 Jerahmeel chachan Ram jilïr yuqapan wawanakapa: Maas, Jamín, Équer." 
1Chronicles2:28 Onam chachan wawanakapa: Samai, Jadá. Samai chachan wawanakapa: Nadab, Abisur." 
1Chronicles2:29 Abisur chachan warmipax Abihail satänwa, jupax Ahbán, Molid chachanakan taykapänwa." 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadab chachan wawanakapasti: Séled, Apaim ukanakänwa. Séled chachax jan wawaniw jiwxäna." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaim jaqix Isí chachan awkipänwa. Isí jaqisti Sesanan awkipänwa. Sesanasti Ahlai chachan awkipänwa. 
1Chronicles2:32 Samai chachan Jadá jilapan wawanakapa: Jéter, Jonatán. Jéter chachax jan wawaniw jiwxäna." 
1Chronicles2:33 Jonatán chachan wawanakapasti: Pélet, Zazá ukanakänwa. Jupanakaw Jerahmeel chachan wawanakapänxa." 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesán chachax janiw yuqanakanïkänti, jan ukasti phuchhanakanikïnwa. Jupansti Egiptonkir mä uywatapakiw utjäna Jarhá sutini," 
1Chronicles2:35 uka uywataruw maynïr phuchhapa warmipatak churäna, jupampix mä wawanïnwa, Atai sata." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai jaqix Natán chachan awkipänwa, Natán jaqisti Zabad chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabad jaqix Eflal chachan awkipänwa, Eflal jaqisti Obed chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles2:38 Obed jaqix Jehú chachan awkipänwa, Jehú jaqisti Azarías chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles2:39 Azarías jaqix Heles chachan awkipänwa, Heles jaqisti Elasá chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles2:40 Elasá jaqix Sismai chachan awkipänwa, Sismai jaqisti Salum chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles2:41 Salum jaqix Jecamías chachan awkipänwa, Jecamías jaqisti Elisamá chachan awkiparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles2:42 Jerahmeel chachan Caleb jilapan wawanakapa: Mesá, tayna yuqall wawapa, Mesasti Zifan awkipänwa; ukxankir yuqall wawapasti Maresá satänwa, jupasti Hebronan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebrón chachan wawanakapa: Coré, Tapúah, Réquem, Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Sema jaqix Ráham chachan awkipänwa, jupax Jorcoam chachan awkipänwa; Réquem jaqisti Samai chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles2:45 Samai jaqix Maón chachan awkipänwa, Maón jaqisti Bet-sur chachan awkiparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles2:46 Caleb chachax pä warminïnwa: Efá, Maacá ukanaka. Efá warmimpisti kimsa wawanïnwa: Harán, Mosá, Gazez. Harán chachax mä wawanïnwa, jilapat amtasisax Gazez sasaw sutichäna." 
1Chronicles2:47 Jahdai chachan wawanakapasti: Réguem, Jotam, Guesán, Pélet, Efá, Sáaf ukanakänwa." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maacá sat Caleb chachan uñt'atapax Séber, Tirhaná," 
1Chronicles2:49 Sáaf chachanakan taykapänwa, Sevá chachan taykaparakïnwa, Sáaf jaqisti Madmaná chachan awkipänwa, jupax Macbená, Guibeá chachanakan awkipänwa. Caleb chachax mä phuchhanikïnwa Acsa sutini." 
1Chronicles2:50 Taqi jupanakaw Caleb chachan wawanakapaxa. Efrata warmin Hur sat jilïr yuqapan wawanakapa: Sobal, jupax Quiriat-jearim chachan awkipänwa;" 
1Chronicles2:51 Salmá, jupasti Belén chachan awkipänwa; Haref, jupax Bet-gader chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles2:52 Quiriat-jearim chachan Sobal yuqapan wawanakapa: Reaías, manahetitanakan chikatapa," 
1Chronicles2:53 Quiriat-jearim chachan wila masinakapasti: itritanaka, futitanaka, sumatitanaka, misraitanaka jupanakawa, misraitanakat jutirinakax soratitanaka, estaolitanaka, jupanakawa." 
1Chronicles2:54 Salmá chachan wawanakapa: Belén, netofatitanaka, Atrot-bet-joab, manahetitanakat chikat jaqinaka, soreitanaka," 
1Chronicles2:55 Jabés chiqan jakapkän uka soferitanakan wila masinakapa, jan ukax tirateonaka, simateonaka, sucateonaka. Jupanakaw Hamat chachat saraqir quenitanakaxa, jupasti Bet-recab chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles3:1 Davidan wawanakapa, Hebrón chiqan yuripkän ukanaka: Amnón, tayna yuqall wawa, taykapasti Jezreelankir Ahinóam sutin warmïnwa; payïristi Daniel, Carmel chiqankir Abigail warmin wawapa;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Davidan wawanakapa, Hebrón chiqan yuripkän ukanaka: Amnón, tayna yuqall wawa, taykapasti Jezreelankir Ahinóam sutin warmïnwa; payïristi Daniel, Carmel chiqankir Abigail warmin wawapa;" 
1Chronicles3:2 kimsïrix Absalón, Maacá warmin wawapa, Guesur chiqankir Talmai reyin phuchhapa; pusïrix Adonías, Haguit warmin wawapa;" 
1Chronicles3:3 phisqïrix Sefatías, Abital warmin wawapa; suxtïrix Itream, Egla warmin wawapa, Davidan maynïr warmiparaki." 
1Chronicles3:4 Davidan uka suxta wawanakapax Hebrón chiqan yuripxäna, ukawjan paqallq mara suxta phaxsiniw marka apnaqäna. Uka qhipatsti kimsa tunka kimsan maraw Jerusalén markan apnaqäna," 
1Chronicles3:5 ukansti pusi wawanakampiw yurïna: Simá, Sobab, Natán, Salomón. Taqi jupanakax Amiel chachan Betsabé phuchhapan wawanakapänwa." 
1Chronicles3:6 Ukhamarus yaqha llätunka wawanakanïnwa: Ibhar, Elisúa, Elifélet," 
1Chronicles3:7 Nógah, Néfeg, Jafía," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisamá, Eliadá, Elifélet." 
1Chronicles3:9 Taqi jupanakaw Davidan wawanakapaxa, uñt'atanakapan wawanakapax janiw jakhutäkiti. Tamar warmix jupanakan kullakapänwa." 
1Chronicles3:10 Salomón reyin wawanakapa: Roboam, Abías, Asá, Josafat, Joram, Ocozías, Joás, Amasías, Azarías, Jotam, Ahaz, Ezequías, Manasés, Amón, Josías." 
1Chronicles3:11  
1Chronicles3:12  
1Chronicles3:13  
1Chronicles3:14  
1Chronicles3:15 Josías chachan wawanakapa: jilïrix Johanán; payïrix Joacín; kimsïrix Sedequías; pusïrix Salum. 
1Chronicles3:16 Joacim chachan wawanakapa: Jeconías, Sedequías." 
1Chronicles3:17 Markat apanukut Jeconías chachat saraqir wawanakapa: Salatiel, jupan jilïr yuqapa," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malquiram, Pedaías, Senazar, Jecamías, Hosamá, Nedabías." 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedaías chachan wawanakapa: Zorobabel, Simí. Zorobabel chachan wawanakapa: Mesulam, Hananías, Selomit jupanakan kullakapa," 
1Chronicles3:20 maynïr phisqa wawanakapa: Hasubá, Óhel, Berequías, Hasadías, Jusab-hésed." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hananías chachan wawanakapa: Pelatías, Isaías. Isaías chachan wawanakapa: Refaías, Arnán, Abdías, Secanías." 
1Chronicles3:22 Secanías chachan wawanakapa: Semaías, Hatús, Igal, Baríah, Nearías, Safat. Taqpachanix suxtanïnwa." 
1Chronicles3:23 Nearías chachan wawanakapax kimsanïnwa: Elioenai, Ezequías, Azricam." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elioenai chachan wawanakapax paqallqunïnwa: Hodavías, Eliasib, Pelaías, Acub, Johanán, Delaías, Ananí." 
1Chronicles4:1 Judá chachan wawanakapa: Fares, Hesrón, Carmí, Hur, Sobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaías, Sobal chachan wawapa, jupax Jáhat chachan awkipänwa, Jáhat jaqix Ahumai, Láhad chachanakan awkipänwa. Jupanakax soratitanakan wila masinakapänwa." 
1Chronicles4:3 Hur chachan wawanakapa: Etam, Jezreel, Ismá, Idbás, Penuel, jupax Guedor chachan awkipänwa, Éser, jupax Husá chachan awkipänwa. Jupanakax mä kullakanïnwa Haslelponi sutini. Jupanakax Hur chachan wawanakapänwa, Efratan jilïr wawapa, Belén chachan nayra awkiparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Ashur, Tecoa chachan awkipax pä warminïnwa: Helá, Naará." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naará warmix Ahuzam, Héfer, Temení, Ahastarí jupanakan taykapänwa. Jupanakaw Naará warmin wawanakapänxa." 
1Chronicles4:7 Helá warmin wawanakapa: Séret, Jesohar, Etnán." 
1Chronicles4:8 Cos jaqix Anub, Sobebá chachanakan awkipänwa, Aharhel chachan nayra awkipan wila masiparakïnwa, jupax Harum chachan wawapänwa." 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabés chachax jilanakapat sipan taqin uñt'at jaqïnwa, taykapax Jabés sutimpiw juparux sutiyäna, jupasti sänwa: “Wali t'aqhisiñampiw wawachasta” sasa." 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabés chachax Israel markan Diosaparuw mayisïna akham sasa: “Khuyapt'ayasita, mä jach'a uraq churita, nayan jan t'aqhisiñaxatak yanapt'ita, qhispiyarakita” sasa. Diosasti mayitaparux ist'änwa." 
1Chronicles4:11 Quelub, Suhá chachan jilapa, jupax Mehír chachan awkipänwa; Mehír jaqisti Estón chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles4:12 Estón jaqix Bet-rafá, Paséah, Tehiná chachanakan awkipänwa, jupasti Nahas marka utt'ayirïnwa. Jupanakaw Recá markan jakir jaqinakaxa." 
1Chronicles4:13 Quenaz chachan wawanakapa: Otoniel, Seraías. Otoniel chachan wawanakapa: Hatat," 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai, jupax Ofrá chachan awkipänwa. Seraías jaqix Joab chachan awkipänwa, Harisim qhirwan jakir jaqinakan nayra awkiparakïnwa, jupanakax amparampi lurat yänak lurirïpxänwa." 
1Chronicles4:15 Jefuné chachan Caleb yuqapan wawanakapa: Ir, Elá, Náam. Elá jaqix Quenaz chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles4:16 Jahaleel chachan wawanakapa: Zif, Zifá, Tirías, Asarel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Esdras chachan wawanakapa: Jéter, Méred, Éfer, Jalón. Méred chachax faraonan Bitiá phuchhapampiw jaqichasxäna, jupan wawanakapa: María, Samai, Isbah, Isbahasti Estemoa chachan awkipänwa. Méred chachax Judá ayllunkir yaqha warminïnwa, jupampix kimsa wawanïnwa: Jéred, Héber, Jacutiel. Jéred chachan wawapax Guedor sutini. Héber chachan wawapasti Socó sutini. Jacutiel chachan wawapax Zanóah sutiniraki." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 Odías chachax Náham chachan kullakapampiw jaqichasxäna, jupampix pä wawanïnwa: Queilá, Estemoa jupanaka, Queilá jaqix garmita ayllunkirïnwa, Estemoa jaqisti maacateos ayllunkirirakïnwa." 
1Chronicles4:20 Simón chachan wawanakapa: Amnón, Riná, Ben-hanán, Tilón. Isí chachan wawanakapa: Zohet, Ben-zohet." 
1Chronicles4:21 Judá chachan Selá yuqapan wawanakapa: Er, Lecá chachan awkipa, Ladá, Maresá chachan awkipa, wila masinakapax Bet-asbea chiqan lino irnaqapxäna," 
1Chronicles4:22 Joacín, Cozebá chiqankir jaqinaka, Joás, Saraf jupanakax moabita warminakampiw jaqichasipxäna, ukatsti Belenaruw kutt'anipxäna, kunjämatix nayra qillqatanakan parlki ukhama." 
1Chronicles4:23 Jupanakax sañu lurirïpxänwa; Netaim, Guederá chiqanakan jakapxäna, ukatsti reyin luqtiripäpxänwa." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simeón chachan wawanakapa: Nemuel, Jamín, Jarib, Zérah, Saúl." 
1Chronicles4:25 Saulux Salum chachan awkipänwa, Salum jaqisti Mibsam chachan awkipänwa, Mibsam jaqix Mismá chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles4:26 Mismá jaqix Hamuel chachan awkipänwa; Hamuel jaqisti Zacur chachan awkipänwa, Zacur jaqix Simí chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles4:27 Simí chachax tunka suxtan yuqalla, suxta imill wawanakanïnwa; jilanakapasti janiw walja wawanïpkänti, ukat saraqir wila masinakapax jan yapxatkänti, Judá chachan saraqirinakapjamaxa." 
1Chronicles4:28 Jupanakax Beerseba, Moladá, Hasar-sual," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilhá, Ésem, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betuel, Hormá, Siclag," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bet-marcabot, Hasar-susim, Bet-birai, Saaraim chiqanakan jakapxäna. Davidan reyïñapkamax uka markanakaw jupanakan markanakapänxa." 
1Chronicles4:32 Ukhamarus phisqa markanakampiw jupanakan utjäna: Etam, Ain, Rimón, Toquen, Asán," 
1Chronicles4:33 uka markanak jak'an utjkän taqpach jisk'a markanakamppacha Baalat chiqakama. Aka chiqanakan jupanakax jakapxäna, wila masinakapatkam qillqatäpkäna ukanakasa." 
1Chronicles4:34 Mesobab, Jamlec, Josías jupax Amasías chachan yuqapänwa," 
1Chronicles4:35 Joel, Jehú jupax Josibías chachan yuqapänwa, jupasti Seraías chachan yuqapänwa, jupax Asiel chachan yuqapänwa;" 
1Chronicles4:35 Joel, Jehú jupax Josibías chachan yuqapänwa, jupasti Seraías chachan yuqapänwa, jupax Asiel chachan yuqapänwa;" 
1Chronicles4:36 Elioenai, Jaacoba, Jesohaías, Asaías, Adiel, Jesimiel, Benaías," 
1Chronicles4:37 Ziza jupax Sifi chachan yuqapänwa, Alón chachan yuqapa, Jedaías chachan yuqapa, Simrí chachan yuqapa, Semaías chachan yuqaparaki." 
1Chronicles4:38 Aka aytat sutinakax wila masinakapan jilïrinakänwa. Jupanakan wila masinakapan yapxattas waljanir tukutapatxa," 
1Chronicles4:39 inti jalsu tuqinkir Guerar chiqan mantañapar purisax uywanakapatakiw manq'añanak thaqtapxäna," 
1Chronicles4:40 ukawjan walja suma chhuyu chhuxllanaka, suma jach'a uraqinak jikxatapxäna. Ukawjan nayra pachax Cam chachat saraqir wawanakapax jakapxatayna," 
1Chronicles4:41 ukampis Judá chiqankir Ezequías reyin urunakapansti, niya satäki uka jaqinakax jutasin jan mayampitakiw campamentonakapa, utanakap tukjapxäna, ukatsti jupanakaw uka chiqan jakxapxäna, uywanakapatak chhuxllanak utjatap layku." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ukhamarusa, Simeón chachat saraqir wawanakapax phisqa patak jaqinakaw Seír qullur sarapxäna aka chachanakan irpata: Pelatías, Nearías, Refaías, Uziel, jupanakasti Isí chachan yuqanakapänwa," 
1Chronicles4:43 ukatsti amalecitanakat jilt'apki uka jaqinakaruw tukjapxäna. Ukürut jichhürkamaw jupanakax ukawjan jakasipki. 
1Chronicles5:1 Israel chachan Rubén sat jilïr yuqapan wawanakapa: Hanoc, Falú, Hesrón, Carmí. Chiqpachansa Rubén chachaw jilïr yuqapänxa, ukampis awkipan warmipamp sarnaqasaw jilïr kankañap apt'asïna, jupan jilïr kankañapax Josean wawanakapar churatäxänwa, Joseasti Israel chachan maynïr wawaparakïnwa. Ukatsipana, Judá chachax jilanakapat sipan juk'amp munañaniw tukxäna, jupatarak mä jilïris mistüna; ukampis jilïr kankañapax Josear churatänwa." 
1Chronicles5:2  
1Chronicles5:3  
1Chronicles5:4 Joel chachat saraqir wawanakapa: Semaías, Gog, Simí, Micaías, Reaías, Baal, Beerá, rubenitanakan jilïripa, jupax Tiglat-piléser sat Asiriankir reyin katuntat irpatänwa." 
1Chronicles5:4 Joel chachat saraqir wawanakapa: Semaías, Gog, Simí, Micaías, Reaías, Baal, Beerá, rubenitanakan jilïripa, jupax Tiglat-piléser sat Asiriankir reyin katuntat irpatänwa." 
1Chronicles5:5  
1Chronicles5:6  
1Chronicles5:7 Beerá chachan jilanakapat wila masinakaparjam qillqatanaka: Jeiel, jilïr irpiripa, Zacarías," 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela, Azaz chachan wawapa, Sema chachan allchhipa Joel chachan yuqapa. Bela chachax Aroer chiqan jakäna, uraqipax Nebo, Baal-megón chiqakamänwa." 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela, Azaz chachan wawapa, Sema chachan allchhipa Joel chachan yuqapa. Bela chachax Aroer chiqan jakäna, uraqipax Nebo, Baal-megón chiqakamänwa." 
1Chronicles5:9 Inti jalsu tuqirusti, Éufrates jawir chiqata wasarax qalltaski ukakama, uywanakapasti Galaad chiqan walipuniw mirantäna." 
1Chronicles5:10 Saulux reyïkan ukkhaxa, rubenitanakax agarenonakampiw nuwasiñankäna, ukampis rubenitanakaw atipjäna, ukatsti Galaad chiqat inti jalsu tuqiruw utjantasipxäna." 
1Chronicles5:11 Gad chachan wawanakapax khitinakatix Basán chiqan Salcá markakama, rubenitanak uñkatasin jakapkän ukanakax akanakänwa:" 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel, wali aytat jaqi, jupxarusti Safán, Jaanai, ukhamarak Safat." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel, wali aytat jaqi, jupxarusti Safán, Jaanai, ukhamarak Safat." 
1Chronicles5:13 Jupanakan wila masinakaparjam qillqatax Micael, Mesulam, Sebá, Jorai, Jacán, Zía, Éber, ukanakänwa, taqpachanix paqallqunïnwa." 
1Chronicles5:14 Jupanakaw Abihail chachan wawanakapänxa, jupax Hurí chachan yuqapänwa, Jaróah chachan yuqapa, Galaad chachan yuqapa, Micael chachan yuqapa, Jesisai chachan yuqapa, Jahdó chachan yuqapa, Buz chachan yuqaparaki." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahí, Abdiel chachan yuqapa, Guní chachan allchhipa, jupaw jupanakan masinakapat p'iqt'irïna." 
1Chronicles5:16 Taqi jupanakaw Galaad, Basán, jisk'a markanakapana, Sarón chiqan uywa awatiñ uraqin qurpanakapkamäki ukan jakapxäna." 
1Chronicles5:17 Taqi jupanakaw Judá markankir Jotam reyina, Israelankir Jeroboam reyin urunakapan wila masitkam qillqantatäpxäna." 
1Chronicles5:18 Rubén, Gad, uka ayllunakat saraqirinakapampi, Manasés ayllunkir chikat jaqinakapampix jan axsarir soldadonakänwa, jark'aqasiñampi, espadampi, mich'inak antutt'añampi wakicht'atäpxänwa, nuwasiñatakis suma yatichsutäpxarakïnwa. Jupanakasti pusi tunka pusin waranqa paqallqu patak suxta tunkan chachanakänwa." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ukatsti agareno, Jetur, Nafís, Nodab uka jaqinakampiw nuwasipxäna;" 
1Chronicles5:20 ukampis Diosaw jupanakarux yanapt'äna, agarenonakasa, jupanakar jaqkattatanakas atipjataw uñjasipxäna, jupanakax nuwasïwinkasin Diosaruw mayisipxäna jupanakar yanapt'añapataki. Diosasti jupanakarux yanapänwa, jupar jaysapxatap layku." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ukatsti uñisirinakapan uywanakapxa, phisqa tunkan waranqa camellonaka, pä pataka phisqa tunkan waranqa ovejanaka, pä waranqa asnonak apasipxäna. Ukatsti patak waranqa jaqinak katurapxäna." 
1Chronicles5:22 Uñisirinakapasti waljaniw jiwarapxäna, uka nuwasïwix Diosat jutatap layku. Jupanakasti uka uraqin jakañatakiw qhiparapxäna jaya markar apanukut uñjasipkäna uka urunakkama." 
1Chronicles5:23 Manasés ayllut chikat saraqir wawanakapax waljanïtap laykux Basán chiqata, Baal-hermón uraqin jakasipxäna, Senir, Hermón sat qullukama." 
1Chronicles5:24 Wila masinakapan jilïrinakapax akanakänwa: Éfer, Isí, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremías, Hodavías, Jahdiel. Taqi jupanakax jan axsarir soldadonakänwa, wali uñt'at jaqinaka, wila masinakan jilïrinakaparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles5:25 Ukampis jupanakax nayra awkinakapan Diosapatakiw sayt'asipxäna, ukatsti kawkïr markanakarutix Diosax t'unjkatayna uka markanakan diosanakaparuw yupaychapxäna." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ukat Israelan Diosapax Asiriankir Pul sat reyiru, jan ukax Tiglat-piléser sat reyir amtayäna, jupaw rubenitanakaru, gaditanakaru, Manasés ayllunkir chikat jaqiparux alisnuküna; ukatsti jupanakarux Halah, Habor, Hará, Gozán jawiraruw anakiyäna, ukat jichhürkam ukan jakasipki." 
1Chronicles6:1 Leví chachan wawanakapa: Guersón, Quehat, Merarí." 
1Chronicles6:2 Quehat chachan wawanakapa: Amram, Ishar, Hebrón, Uziel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amram chachan wawanakapa: Aarón, Moisés, María. Aarón chachan wawanakapa: Nadab, Abihú, Eleazar, Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazar jaqix Finees chachan awkipänwa, Finees jaqisti Abisúa chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abisúa jaqix Buquí chachan awkipänwa, Buquí jaqisti Uzí chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzí jaqix Zeraías chachan awkipänwa, Zeraías jaqisti Meraiot chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiot jaqix Amarías chachan awkipänwa, Amarías jaqisti Ahitob chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitob jaqix Sadoc chachan awkipänwa, Sadoc jaqisti Ahimaas chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaas jaqix Azarías chachan awkipänwa, Azarías jaqisti Johanán chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles6:10 Johanán jaqix Azarías chachan awkipänwa, jupasti Salomonax Jerusalenan Tatitun utap luraykäna ukan sacerdotënwa." 
1Chronicles6:11 Azarías jaqix Amarías chachan awkipänwa, Amarías jaqisti Ahitob chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitob jaqix Sadoc chachan awkipänwa, Sadoc jaqisti Salum chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles6:13 Salum jaqix Hilcías chachan awkipänwa, Hilcías jaqisti Azarías chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles6:14 Azarías jaqix Seraías chachan awkipänwa, Seraías jaqisti Josadac chachan awkiparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles6:15 Josadac chachax jaya markar katuntat apayatänwa, Tatitux Judá markaru, Jerusalén markar Nabucodonosor reyimpi katuntat apaykän ukkha." 
1Chronicles6:16 Leví chachan wawanakapaxa: Guersón, Quehat, Merarí jupanakänwa." 
1Chronicles6:17 Guersón chachan wawanakapa: Libní, Simí." 
1Chronicles6:18 Quehat chachan wawanakapa: Amram, Ishar, Hebrón, Uziel." 
1Chronicles6:19 Merarí chachan wawanakapa: Mahli, Musí. Jupanakaw Leví chachan wawanakapänxa." 
1Chronicles6:20 Guersón chachan wawanakapaxa: Libní, Jáhat, Zimá, Joah, Idó, Zérah, Jeatrai jupanakänwa." 
1Chronicles6:21  
1Chronicles6:22 Quehat chachan wawanakapa: Aminadab, Coré, Asir, Elcaná, Ebiasaf, Asir, Táhat, Uriel, Uzías, Saúl." 
1Chronicles6:23  
1Chronicles6:24  
1Chronicles6:25 Elcaná chachan wawanakapa: Amasai, Ahimot. Ahimot chachan wawanakapa: Elcaná, Sofai, Náhat, Eliab, Jeroham, Elcaná." 
1Chronicles6:26  
1Chronicles6:27  
1Chronicles6:28 Samuel chachan wawanakapa: Vasní, jilïr wawapa, Abías, sullkïr wawapa." 
1Chronicles6:29 Merarí chachat saraqir wawanakapa: Mahli, Libní, Simí, Uzá, Simá, Haguías, Asaías." 
1Chronicles6:30  
1Chronicles6:31 Davidax q'uchunak sarayañatakix q'uchurinak utt'ayäna, kunapachattix arcax Tatitun utapan uchatäkän ukkhatpacha." 
1Chronicles6:32 Jupanakax Tatitumpi Jikisiñ Carpa nayraqatan q'uchupxäna, Salomonan Tatitun utap Jerusalenan lurañapkama, ukatsti saräwirjamax ukawjan luqtasipkakïnwa." 
1Chronicles6:33 Wawanakapampi ukankapkän uka q'uchurinakax akanakänwa: Quehat chachat saraqirinaka, Hemán sat q'uchuri, jupax Joel chachan yuqapa, jupax Samuel chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:33 Wawanakapampi ukankapkän uka q'uchurinakax akanakänwa: Quehat chachat saraqirinaka, Hemán sat q'uchuri, jupax Joel chachan yuqapa, jupax Samuel chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:34 jupax Elcaná chachan yuqapa, jupax Jeroham chachan yuqapa, jupax Eliel chachan yuqapa, jupax Tóah chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:35 jupax Suf chachan yuqapa, jupax Elcaná chachan yuqapa, jupax Máhat chachan yuqapa, jupax Amasai chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:36 jupax Elcaná chachan yuqapa, jupax Joel chachan yuqapa, jupax Azarías chachan yuqapa, jupax Sofonías chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:36 jupax Elcaná chachan yuqapa, jupax Joel chachan yuqapa, jupax Azarías chachan yuqapa, jupax Sofonías chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:37 jupax Táhat chachan yuqapa, jupax Asir chachan yuqapa, jupax Ebiasaf chachan yuqapa, jupax Coré chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:38 jupax Ishar chachan yuqapa, jupax Quehat chachan yuqapa, jupax Leví chachan yuqapa, jupasti Israel chachan yuqaparaki." 
1Chronicles6:39 Hemán chachan kupïxapansti Asaf sat wila masipaw sayt'asïna, jupax Berequías chachan yuqapa, jupax Simá chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:40 jupax Micael chachan yuqapa, jupax Baaseías chachan yuqapa, jupax Malquías chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:41 jupax Etní chachan yuqapa, jupax Zérah chachan yuqapa, jupax Adaías chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:42 jupax Etán chachan yuqapa, jupax Zimá chachan yuqapa, jupax Simí chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:43 jupax Jáhat chachan yuqapa, jupax Guersón chachan yuqapa, jupasti Leví chachan wawaparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles6:44 Hemán chachan ch'iqäxaparusti Merarí chachat saraqir wila masipaw sayt'asïna: Etán, jupax Quisí chachan wawapänwa, jupax Abdí chachan yuqapa, jupax Maluc chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:45 jupax Hasabías chachan yuqapa, jupax Amasías chachan yuqapa, jupax Hilquías chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:46 jupax Amsí chachan yuqapa, jupax Baní chachan yuqapa, jupax Sémer chachan yuqapa," 
1Chronicles6:47 jupax Mahli chachan yuqapa, jupax Musí chachan yuqapa, jupax Merarí chachan yuqapa, jupasti Leví chachan yuqaparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles6:48 Leví chachat saraqir maynïr wila masinakapax Diosan utapan taqi kun lurañatak uchatäpxänwa. 
1Chronicles6:49 Aarón chachampi, jupat saraqir wawanakampiw wilañcha luqtañ altarxarux waxt'äwinak nakt'ayapxirïna, ukhamaraki incienso luqtañ altärxaru. Jupanakarakiw Qullanan Qullanap chiqawjan uka luräwinak phuqhapxirïna, Israel markatak juchanakat pampachäwi mayisa, kunjämtix Diosan Moisés luqtiripax siskän ukhamarjama." 
1Chronicles6:50 Aarón chachan saraqir wawanakapa: Eleazar, Finees, Abisúa, Buquí, Uzí, Zeraías, Meraiot, Amarías, Ahitub, Sadoc, Ahimaas." 
1Chronicles6:51  
1Chronicles6:52  
1Chronicles6:53  
1Chronicles6:54 Aarón chachat saraqir wawanakapan qamäwi chiqanakasa, uraqinakapan qurpanakapasa akhamänwa: Quehat sat wila masinakapatakix Judá chiqan Hebrón uraqiw suertet wakt'äna," 
1Chronicles6:55 uywa awatiñ uraqinakapamppach kuna. 
1Chronicles6:56 Jefuné chachan Caleb wawaparux markankir uraqinakapa, jisk'a markanakapamppach churapxäna." 
1Chronicles6:57 Aarón chachat saraqir wawanakaparux Hebrón imantasiñ marka, Libná, Jatir, Estemoa," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hilén, Debir, Asán, Bet-semes uka jisk'a markanakamppach katuyapxäna, taqi uka markanakax uywa awatiñ uraqinkamänwa." 
1Chronicles6:59  
1Chronicles6:60 Ukhamarakiw Benjamín ayllunkirirux Gueba, Alémet, Anatot markanak churapxäna, taqi uka markanakax uywa awatiñ uraqinkamänwa. Ukhamasti Aarón chachan wila masinakaparux tunka kimsani markanakaw wakt'äna." 
1Chronicles6:61 Quehat chachan maynïr wila masinakaparux Manasés ayllun chikat jaqinakapankir tunka markanakapaw suertetkam wakt'äna," 
1Chronicles6:62 Guersón chachat saraqir wawanakaparux wila masinakan jakhüwiparjamax tunka kimsan markanak churapxäna Isacar, Aser, Neftalí ayllunakata, Basán chiqankkatayna uka Manasés ayllumpita." 
1Chronicles6:63 Merarí chachat saraqir wawanakarux qawqhatix wila masinakapax utjkän ukarjamax Rubén, Gad, Zabulón uka ayllunakat tunka payan markanakaw suertetkam wakt'äna." 
1Chronicles6:64 Israelitanakasti Leví chachat saraqir wawanakaparux aka markanak uywa awatiñ uraqinakapamppach churäna. 
1Chronicles6:65 Judá, Simeón, Benjamín ayllunakatsti niya satäki uka markanakaw suertetkam wakt'äna." 
1Chronicles6:66 Quehat chachan yaqhip wila masinakaparux Efraín ayllunkir markanakaw suertetkam wakt'äna. 
1Chronicles6:67 Ukhamarakiw Siquem sat imantasiñ marka churapxäna, ukax Efraín qullunakankänwa, ukhamarak Guézer," 
1Chronicles6:68 Jocmeam, Bet-horón, Aialón, Gat-rimón uka markanak churapxäna, taqi uka markanakax uywa awatiñ uraqinkamänwa." 
1Chronicles6:69  
1Chronicles6:70 Quehat wila masinakapat jilt'apki ukanakarux Aner, Bileam uka markanak churapxäna, uka markanakasti Manasés ayllun chikatapankirïnwa, sapa markax uywa awatiñ uraqinkamänwa." 
1Chronicles6:71 Guersón chachat saraqir wawanakaparux wila masinakapan jakhüwiparjamax Basán chiqankki uka Golán marka churapxäna, ukhamaraki Astarot marka, ukasti Manasés ayllun chikat jaqinakapankänwa, uywa awatiñ uraqinakamppacha." 
1Chronicles6:72 Ukhamarakiw Isacar ayllutxa, Quedes, Daberat, Ramot, Anem uka markanak churapxäna, sapa markasa uywa awatiñ uraqinkamänwa." 
1Chronicles6:73  
1Chronicles6:74 Aser ayllutsti Masal, Abdón, Hucoc, Rehob uka markanak churapxäna, sapa markasa uywa awatiñ uraqinkamänwa." 
1Chronicles6:75  
1Chronicles6:76 Neftalí ayllutsti Galileankir Quedes, Hamón, Quiriataim uka markanak churapxäna, sapa markasa uywa awatiñ uraqinkamänwa." 
1Chronicles6:77 Merarí chachat jilt'ir wawanakaparux Zabulón ayllutxa: Rimón, Tabor uka markanak churapxäna, sapa markasa uywa awatiñ uraqinkamänwa;" 
1Chronicles6:78 Rubén ayllutsti Jordán jawirata inti jalsu tuqiru, Jericó uñkatasi, wasarankki uka Béser, Jahas, Cademot, Mefáat uka markanaka, sapa markasa uywa awatiñ uraqinkamänwa;" 
1Chronicles6:79  
1Chronicles6:80 Gad ayllutsti, Galaad chiqankir Ramot, Mahanaim, Hesbón, Jazer ukanaka, sapa markasa uywa awatiñ uraqinkamänwa." 
1Chronicles6:81  
1Chronicles7:1 Isacar chachan wawanakapax pusinïnwa: Tolá, Puvá, Jasub, Simrón." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tolá chachan wawanakapa: Uzí, Refaías, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam, Samuel, jupanakasti Tolá awkipan wila masinakapan jilïrinakapänwa, ukatsti jan axsarir nuwasirinakänwa. Davidan urunakapansti jupanakat saraqir wawanakapax pä tunka payan waranqa suxta patakanïnwa." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzí chachan wawapax Israhías satänwa. Israhías chachan wawanakapa: Micael, Abdías, Joel, Isías. Taqpachanix phisqa jilïrinakänwa." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzí chachan wawapax Israhías satänwa. Israhías chachan wawanakapa: Micael, Abdías, Joel, Isías. Taqpachanix phisqa jilïrinakänwa." 
1Chronicles7:4 Jupanakan walja warminakani, walja wawanakanïtap laykuxa, jupanakan wila masinakapat saraqirinakax nuwasiñatak wali wakichrantatäpxänwa, taqpachanix kimsa tunka suxtan waranqa jaqinakänwa." 
1Chronicles7:5 Isacar chachan wila masinakapar jakthapitax kimsaqallq tunka paqallqun waranqa jaqinakänwa, jupanakasti jan axsarir nuwasirinakänwa." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjamín chachan wawanakapax kimsanïnwa: Bela, Béquer, Jediael." 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela chachan wawanakapax phisqanïnwa: Esbón, Uzí, Uziel, Jerimot, Irí. Taqi jupanakax wila masipan jilïrinakapa, jan axsarir jaqinakäpxänwa. Wila masinakapar qillqatarjamasti wawanakapax pä tunka payan waranqa kimsa tunka pusin jaqinakänwa." 
1Chronicles7:8 Béquer chachan wawanakapa: Zemirá, Joás, Eliézer, Elioenai, Omrí, Jerimot, Abías, Anatot, Alémet. Taqi jupanakaw Béquer chachan wawanakapaxa," 
1Chronicles7:9 jupanakan wawanakapar qillqatarjamax wila masin jilïrinakapax pä tunka waranqa pä patakani jan axsarir jaqinakänwa. 
1Chronicles7:10 Jediael chachan wawapax Bilhán satänwa. Bilhán chachan wawanakapa: Jeús, Benjamín, Ehud, Quenaaná, Zetán, Tarsis, Ahisáhar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Taqi jupanakaw Jediael chachan wawanakapaxa, wila masin jilïrinaka, jan axsarir nuwasirinaka, nuwasiñatakis wakicht'atanaka. Jupanakax tunka paqallq waranqa pä patakan jaqinakänwa." 
1Chronicles7:12 Ir chachan wawanakapa: Sufam, Hufam. Aher chachan wawapax Husim satänwa." 
1Chronicles7:13 Neftalí chachan wawanakapa: Jahseel, Guní, Jéser, Salum. Taqi jupanakaw Bilhá chachat saraqir wawanakapäna." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manasés chachax siriankiri uñt'atapampix pani wawanïnwa: Asriel, Maquir, Galaad chachan awkipa." 
1Chronicles7:15 Maquir chachax Maacá warmimpiw jaqichasïna, jupax Hufam, Sufam uka wila masitänwa. Maquir chachan payïr wawapax Selofhad satänwa, jupasti mä imill wawanikïnwa." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maacá, jupax Maquir chachan warmipänwa, jupax mä yuqall wawanïnwa, juparux Peres sutimpiw uchäna. Peres chachan jilapasti Seres satänwa, wawanakapasti Ulam, Réquem satänwa." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulam chachan wawapax Bedán satänwa. Jupanakaw Galaad chachan wawanakapäna, jupax Maquir chachan wawapänwa, jupasti Manasés chachan wawaparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles7:18 Maquir chachan kullakapax Hamoléquet satänwa, jupax Is-hod, Abiézer, Mahlá jupanakan taykapänwa." 
1Chronicles7:19 Semidá chachan wawanakapa: Ahián, Siquem, Liquehí, Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Efraín chachat saraqir wawanakapa: Sutélah, Béred, Táhat, Eladá, Táhat, Zabad, Sutélah, Éser, Elad. Éser, Elad, uka wawanakaparux Gat chiqankir jaqinakaw jiwarayäna, uywanakap lunthatir sarapxatap layku." 
1Chronicles7:21  
1Chronicles7:22 Efraín awkipax jupanakat amtasax jaya pachaw llakisïna, ukatsti wila masinakapaw chuymachir jutapxäna." 
1Chronicles7:23 Ukatsti jupax warmipampiw mayachasïna, warmix usur jaqiptasax mä yuqall wawa wawachasïna, juparux Beriá sutimpiw uchäna, utapan chiji utjatap layku." 
1Chronicles7:24 Seerá, Beriá chachan phuchhapax aynachankiri alayankir Bet-horón marka sayt'ayäna, ukatsti Uzén-seerá marka sayt'ayarakïna." 
1Chronicles7:25 Beriá chachat saraqir wawanakapa: Réfah, Résef, Télah, Tahán, Ladán, Amihud, Elisamá, Nun, Josué." 
1Chronicles7:26  
1Chronicles7:27  
1Chronicles7:28 Jupanakan uraqinakapa, qamañ utanakapax Betel markänwa; inti jalsu tuqinsti Naarán marka; inti jalanta tuqinsti Guézer marka; Siquem chiqat Ayah chiqakama; taqi uka markanakax jisk'a markanakapamppach kuna." 
1Chronicles7:29 Manasés chachat saraqir wawanakapax Taanac, Meguido, Dor uka markanak katuntasipxäna, jisk'a markanakapamppach kuna. Israel chachan José yuqapat saraqir wawanakapax uka markanakan jakapxäna." 
1Chronicles7:30 Aser chachan wawanakapa: Imná, Isvá, Isví, Beriá, Sérah ukasti jupanakan kullakapänwa." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beriá chachan wawanakapa: Héber, Malquiel jupax Birzávit chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles7:32 Héber jupax Jaflet chachan awkipänwa, Sémer, Hotam, Suhá jupax jupanakan kullakapänwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 Jaflet chachan wawanakapa: Pasac, Bimhal, Asvat." 
1Chronicles7:34 Sémer jilapan wawanakapa: Rohgá, Jehubá, Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Hotam jilapan wawanakapa: Sofah, Imná, Seles, Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Sofah chachan wawanakapa: Súah, Harnéfer, Súal, Berí, Imrá," 
1Chronicles7:37 Béser, Hod, Samá, Silsá, Itrán, Beerá." 
1Chronicles7:38 Jéter chachan wawanakapa: Jefuné, Pispá, Ará." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ulá chachan wawanakapa: Ará, Haniel, Risiá." 
1Chronicles7:40 Taqi jupanakaw Aser chachat saraqir wawanakapäna. Jupanakax wila masin jilïrinaka, jan axsarir soldadonaka, wali wakiskir jaqinakänwa. Wila masitkam qillqatanakax pä tunka suxtan waranqa jaqinakänwa, nuwasiñatakis wali wakicht'atanakänwa." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjaminax Bela chachan awkipänwa, jupasti jilïr wawapänwa; payïrix Asbel; kimsïristi Ahrah;" 
1Chronicles8:2 pusïrix Nohá, phisqïristi Rafá." 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela chachan wawanakapa: Adar, Guerá, Abihud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisúa, Naamán, Ahóah," 
1Chronicles8:5 Guerá, Sefufán, Hiram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ehud chachan wawanakapa, Gueba chiqan jakir wila masin jilïrinaka, jupanakax Manáhat chiqar alisnukutänwa:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamán, Ahías, Guerá jupax Uzá, Ahiud jupanakan awkipänwa, jupanakarux jupaw irpäna." 
1Chronicles8:8 Saharaim chachax Moab chiqan Husim, Baará warminakapamp jaljtxasax yaqha wawanakanïnwa." 
1Chronicles8:9 Hodes sat qhipa warmimpi wawanakapa: Jobab, Sibiá, Mesá, Malcam," 
1Chronicles8:9 Hodes sat qhipa warmimpi wawanakapa: Jobab, Sibiá, Mesá, Malcam," 
1Chronicles8:10 Jeús, Saquías, Mirmá satäpxänwa. Jupanakaw wila masinakat jilïr wawanakapaxa." 
1Chronicles8:11 Husim sat warmipampix Abitub, Elpáal uka wawanakanïnwa." 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpáal chachan wawanakapa: Éber, Misam, Sémed jupaw Onó, Lod markanak sayt'ayäna, jisk'a markanakapamppach kuna;" 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriá, Sema chachanakax wila masipan jilïripäpxänwa, Aialón chiqan jakapxarakïna, jupanakaw Gat chiqat nayra jakir jaqinakarux alisnukupxäna;" 
1Chronicles8:14 Sasac, Jeroham chachanakax jupanakan jilanakapänwa." 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadías, Arad, Ader," 
1Chronicles8:16 Micael, Ispá, Johá jupanakax Beriá chachan wawanakapänwa." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebadías, Mesulam, Hizquí, Éber," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ismerai, Izlías, Jobab jupanakax Elpáal chachan wawanakapänwa." 
1Chronicles8:18 Ismerai, Izlías, Jobab jupanakax Elpáal chachan wawanakapänwa." 
1Chronicles8:19 Jaquim, Zicrí, Zabdí," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, Siletai, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaías, Beraías, Simrat jupanakax Simí chachan wawanakapänwa." 
1Chronicles8:22 Ispán, Éber, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdón, Zicrí, Hanán," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananías, Elam, Anatotías," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifdaías, Peniel jupanakax Sasac chachan wawanakapänwa." 
1Chronicles8:26 Samserai, Seharías, Atalías," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaresías, Elías, Zicrí jupanakax Jeroham chachan wawanakapänwa." 
1Chronicles8:28 Jupanakaw wakiskir jilïri wila masit saraqirinakaxa, jupanakax Jerusalén markan jakapxäna." 
1Chronicles8:29 Gabaón markan Jehiel chachax jakäna, jupax Gabaón chachan awkipänwa. Warmipax Maacá satänwa." 
1Chronicles8:30 Wawanakapax akanakänwa: Abdón, tayna yuqall wawapa, ukxankirinaka: Sur, Quis, Baal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Guedor, Ahió, Zéquer," 
1Chronicles8:32 Miclot, jupasti Simí chachan awkipänwa, jilanakapar uñtas sarnaqasax Jerusalenan jupanakampix jakapxäna." 
1Chronicles8:33 Ner jaqix Quis chachan awkipänwa, Quis jaqix Saúl chachan awkipänwa, Saulux Jonatán, Malquisúa, Abinadab, Es-baal chachanakan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles8:34 Jonatanan wawapax Merib-baal chachänwa, jupax Micaías chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles8:35 Micaías chachan wawanakapa: Pitón, Mélec, Tarea, Ahaz." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahaz jaqix Joadá chachan awkipänwa, Joadá jaqix Alémet, Azmávet, Zimrí jupanakan awkipänwa; Zimrí jaqix Mosá chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosá jaqix Biná chachan awkipänwa, jupax Rafá chachan awkipänwa, jupax Elasá chachan awkipänwa, jupax Asel chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles8:38 Asel chachan wawanakapax suxtanïnwa: Azricam, Bocrú, Ismael, Searías, Abdías, Hanán satäpxänwa. Taqi jupanakaw Asel chachan wawanakapaxa." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ésec jilapan wawanakapa: Ulam, tayna yuqall wawapa, payïrix Jehús, kimsïrix Elifélet." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ulam chachan wawanakapax jan axsarir soldadonaka, mich'inakap apnaqañatakis wali yatxatatanakänwa. Jupanakax walja wawanakani, walja allchhinakanïnwa, taqpachanix patak phisqa tunkanïpxänwa, taqi jupanakaw Benjamín chachat saraqir wawanakapaxa." 
1Chronicles9:1 Ukhamaw taqi Israelitanakax Israel markan reyinakan qillqatapar qillqantatäna. Judá chiqankir jaqinakax jucha lurapxatap laykuw Babilonia markar apatäpxäna. 
1Chronicles9:2 Israelitanaka, sacerdotenaka, levitanaka, Tatitun utapa luqtirinakaw wasitat kuttanisin uraqinakaparu, markanakapar nayraqat utjantasipxäna." 
1Chronicles9:3 Jerusalén markansti Judá, Benjamín, Efraín, Manasés ayllut saraqir wawanakapaw utjantasipxäna." 
1Chronicles9:4 Judá chachat saraqir wawanakapa: Utai, Amihud chachan wawapa, jupax Omrí chachan wawapänwa, jupax Imrí chachan wawapa, jupax Baní chachan wawapa, Fares chachat saraqir wawanakapatxa, Judá chachan wawapa." 
1Chronicles9:5 Silonitanakatxa, Asaías jupax jilïrïnwa." 
1Chronicles9:6 Zérah chachat saraqir wawanakapatxa: Jeuel chachampi wila masinakapampix suxta patak llätunka tunkanïnwa. 
1Chronicles9:7 Benjamín chachat saraqir wawanakapatxa: Salú, Mesulam chachan wawapa, jupax Hodavías chachan wawapa, jupax Senúa chachan wawapa;" 
1Chronicles9:8 Ibneías, Jeroham chachan wawapa; Elá, Uzí chachan wawapa, jupax Micrí chachan wawapa; Mesulam, Sefatías chachan wawapa, jupax Reuel chachan wawapa, jupax Ibnías chachan wawapa." 
1Chronicles9:9 Jupanakan wila masinakapax taqpachanix llätunk pataka phisqa tunka suxtanïnwa, Taqi jupanakasti wila masinakapan jilïripänwa." 
1Chronicles9:10 Sacerdotenakatxa: Jedaías, Joiarib, Jaquín," 
1Chronicles9:11 Azarías, Hilquías chachan wawapa, jupax Mesulam chachan wawapa, jupax Sadoc chachan wawapa, jupax Meraiot chachan wawapa, jupax Ahitub chachan wawapa, Diosan utapan wakiskir jilïrirakïnwa;" 
1Chronicles9:12 Adaías, Jeroboam chachan wawapa, jupax Pashur chachan wawapa, jupax Malquías chachan wawapa; Masai, Adiel chachan wawapa, jupax Jahzera chachan wawapa, jupax Mesulam chachan wawapa, jupax Mesilemit chachan wawapa, jupax Imer chachan wawapänwa;" 
1Chronicles9:13 jupanakan wila masinakapax waranqa paqallq pataka suxta tunkanïnwa, wila masinakapatxa jupanakaw jilïrïnxa, Tatitun utapan luqtañatak suma yatichat chachanakänwa." 
1Chronicles9:14 Levitanakatxa: Semaías, Hasub chachan wawapa, jupax Azricam chachan wawapa, jupax Hasabías chachan wawapa, Merarí chachan wila masipata;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Bacbacar, Heres, Galal, Matanías, Micaías chachan wawapa, jupax Zicrí chachan wawapa, jupax Asaf chachan wawapa;" 
1Chronicles9:16 Abdías, Semaías chachan wawapa, jupax Galal chachan wawapa, jupax Jedutún chachan wawapa; Berequías, Asá chachan wawapa, jupax Elcaná chachan wawapa, Elcanax netofatitas sat jisk'a markanakapan jakäna." 
1Chronicles9:17 Punku uñjirinaka: Salum, Acub, Talmón, Ahimán. Salum, jupanakan jilapa, jupaw jupan irpiripänxa," 
1Chronicles9:18 jichhürkamas reyin punkup uñjiripawa, inti jalsu tuqinkki uka. Taqi jupanakax levitanakan campamentonakapan punkunakap uñjirïpxänwa." 
1Chronicles9:19 Salum, Coré chachan wawapa, jupax Ebiasaf chachan wawapa, jupax Coré chachan wawapa, coreítas wila masinakapax Tatitun utapar mantañ punkup uñjirinakänwa, kunjämatix nayra awkinakapax Tatitun campamentopar mantañap uñjapkän ukhama." 
1Chronicles9:20 Ukat nayrasti, Finees, Eleazar chachan wawapa, jupaw jupanakan jilïripäna. ¡Tatitux jupampïpan!" 
1Chronicles9:21 Zacarías, Meselemías chachan wawapa, jupaw Diosampi Jikisiñ Carpa punku uñjirïna." 
1Chronicles9:22 Punku uñjir ajllitanakax taqpachanix pä patak tunka payanïnwa, kawkha markanakantix wila masinakax qillqatäpkän ukhamaru. Davidampi, Samuel profetampiw uk lurañatakix utt'ayäna, wali sum lurirïpxatap layku." 
1Chronicles9:23 Jupanakampi, wawanakapampix maykipaw Tatitun utapar mantañ uñjapxirïna." 
1Chronicles9:24 Punku uñjirinakax pusi tuqinpach utjäna: inti jalanta tuqina, inti jalsu tuqina, amsta tuqina, aynach tuqina." 
1Chronicles9:25 Markanakapan jakapkän uka wila masinakapax sapa paqallq urut yanapt'irix jutapxirïna. 
1Chronicles9:26 Ukampis punku uñjir pusi levitanakax jan phist'ayasaw utanakapa, Diosan utapan imat yänak uñjapxirïna." 
1Chronicles9:27 Paqar arumaw Tatitun utapar muyukipat qhantatipxirïna, jupanakaw uñjañataki, sapa qhantatinak punku jist'arañatakix uchatänxa." 
1Chronicles9:28 Yaqhipanakax Tatitur yupaychañatak yänakax utjki uk uñjañatak uchatänwa, jupanakaw jakt'askam apsupxirïna, imapxirïna." 
1Chronicles9:29 Mayninakasti yaqha yänakata, qullan yänakata, jak'uta, vinota, aceiteta, inciensota, q'apkir qullanaka uñjañatak uchatänwa." 
1Chronicles9:30 Yaqhip sacerdotenakax q'apkir qullanak wakichapxäna," 
1Chronicles9:31 ukatsti coreitanakat Salum chachan jilïri Matatías sat levita yuqapaw waxt'äwitak tortanak lurirïna. 
1Chronicles9:32 Quehatitas wila masinakapat yaqhipax luqtañ t'ant'anak wakichañatak uchatänwa, sapa samarañ urun t'ant'anak siqik uchañataki." 
1Chronicles9:33 Q'uchurinakax utjarakïnwa, jupanakax levita wila masinakapan jilïripänwa, jupanakasti Tatitun utapan utjki uka utanakan jakapxäna, jupanakax uruy arumasa luräwip phuqhapxäna, janiw yaqha lurañanïpkänti." 
1Chronicles9:34 Qillqantatarjamasti, Tatitun utapan luqtirinakax Leví chachan wawanakapänwa, wila masinakapan jilïrinakapa, jupanakasti Jerusalén markan jakapxäna." 
1Chronicles9:35 Gabaón markan Jehiel chachax jakäna, jupax Gabaón chachan awkipänwa. Warmipax Maacá satänwa." 
1Chronicles9:36 Wawanakapasti akanakänwa: Abdón, tayna yuqall wawapa, Sur, Quis, Baal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedor, Ahió, Zacarías, Miclot," 
1Chronicles9:38 jupax Simam chachan awkipänwa. Jilanakapar uñtas sarnaqasaw Jerusalenan jupanakampix jakapxäna. 
1Chronicles9:39 Ner jaqix Quis chachan awkipänwa, Quis jaqix Saúl chachan awkipänwa, Saúl chachax Jonatán, Malquisúa, Abinadab, Es-baal jupanakan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles9:40 Jonatanax Merib-baal chachan awkipänwa, jupax Micaías chachan awkipänwa." 
1Chronicles9:41 Micaías chachan wawanakapa: Pitón, Mélec, Tarea, Ahaz." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahaz jaqix Jará chachan awkipänwa, Jará chachax Alémet, Azmávet, Zimrí jupanakan awkipänwa; Zimrí jaqix Mosá chachan awkipänwa," 
1Chronicles9:43 Mosá jaqix Biná chachan awkipänwa, jupax Refaías chachan awkipa, jupax Elasá chachan awkipa, jupasti Asel ukan awkiparakïnwa." 
1Chronicles9:44 Asel chachan wawanakapax suxtanïnwa: Azricam, Bocrú, Ismael, Searías, Abdías, Hanán." 
1Chronicles10:1 Filisteonakax Israel markaruw nuwantäna, israelitanakasti jupanakat jaltxapxänwa, ukampis Guilboa qullun jupanakarux jiwarayäna." 
1Chronicles10:2 Filisteonakasti Saúl reyimpiru, yuqanakapampir arktañatakiw sarapxäna, ukatsti Jonatán, Abinadab, Malquisúa jupanakaruw jiwarayäna." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ukatsti Saúl reyir katuntañatakiw tantachasipxäna, mich'inak antutt'irinakax mich'inakamp wakt'ayasaw usuchjäna." 
1Chronicles10:4 Ukhamasti Saúl reyix yanapiriparuw säna: “Espadam apsusim, ukamp jiwayita, aka jucharar jaqinakan nayat jan larusiskañapataki” sasa. Ukampis yanapiripax janiw jiwayañ munkänti, wal axsaräna. Ukhamasti Saúl reyix espadap katusaw espadapxar liwxattäna." 
1Chronicles10:5 Kunapachatix yanapiripax Saúl reyir jiwat uñjän ukkhaxa, jupax uka kipkarakiw espadapxar liwxattas jiwäna." 
1Chronicles10:6 Ukhamaw khä urux Saúl reyimpi, kimsa yuqapampi, utapankir wila masinakapampix jiwarapxäna." 
1Chronicles10:7 Qhirwan jakapkän uka israelitanakax jupanakan jaltxatapa, Saúl reyir kimsa yuqanakapamp jiwarat uñjasax markanakap jaytanukusin jaltxapxäna. Ukatsti filisteonakax uka apanukut markanakar mantasaw utjantasipxäna." 
1Chronicles10:8 Qhipürusti, kunapachatix filisteonakax jiwatanakan yänakap apaqir sarapkän ukkhaxa, Saúl reyiru, yuqanakapampirux Guilboa qullun jiwarat jikxatapxäna."
