Job3:26 Janiw nayatak samarañax utjkiti; janiw sumankañsa, samarañsa jikxatkti, t'aqhisiñakiw katuntxitu." 
Job4:1 Job, inas jumatak jan walïkchiniti maynin jumar parlxayañapaxa, ukampis janiw amukïñjamäkiti." 
Job4:2  
Job4:3 Jumax waljaniruw nayrax yatichäyätaxa, pisi ch'amaniruw ch'amañchäyätaxa;" 
Job4:4 arunakamampiw llakit jaqinakaru, aynacht'ir jaqinakar ch'amañchäyätaxa." 
Job4:5 Jichhax jumaruw t'aqhisiñax puriraktam ¿axsarayasïtati, khathatirakïtacha?" 
Job4:6 ¿Janit iyawsañamasti Diosar axsartañ chuymäkxisti?, ¿janit chiqap sarnaqäwimasti suyt'añamäkxisti?" 
Job4:7 Amuyt'asim, amthapisirakim, ¿khiti jan juchan jaqirak tukusiyat uñjasisti? ¿kawkïr aski jaqirak t'unjat uñjasisti?" 
Job4:8 Nayarux sarnaqäwiw yatichitu, ñanqha lurañanakan sarnaqirinakax luratapatjam achunak apthapi." 
Job4:9 Diosax phiñasiñapan jupanakxar phust'ani, samanapakiw jupanakar q'al tukji." 
Job4:10 Leonanakar uñtatas jach'at wararisipkpan, Diosaw jupanakarux laka ch'akhanakap t'unaras amukt'ayani." 
Job4:11 Manq'at awtjat leonanakar uñtataw jiwarani, wawanakapasti ananukutaw uñjasini." 
Job4:12 Mä aruw jinchuxar purinitu, k'achat uxurjamak ist'ta." 
Job4:13 Arumasti, ikix jaqinakar atipjki ukapachaw, mä jan wali samka uñjta." 
Job4:14 Axsarañaw nayarux katuntxitäna; ch'akhanakaxas wal khathatirakïna. 
Job4:15 Mä ch'uch'u thayaw ajanuxa sarakipawayi, ñik'utanakaxas q'alaw sayarawayi." 
Job4:16 Mayniw ukankaskäna, sayatap uñjarakta, ukampis janiw ajanup uñkatkti. Taqi kunas ch'ujtatakïnwa. Ukatsti mä aru ist'arakta:" 
Job4:17 “¿Jaqix Diosan nayraqatapan askïspati? ¿Jupar irnuqasir Diosapan nayraqatapan q'umat jikxatasispa? 
Job4:18 Diosax janiw angelanakaparus alkatkiti, jupanakan pantjasirïpxatap layku," 
Job4:19 ¡ukatsa juk'ampiw jaqir jan alkatkaspati, jaqin t'ukhätap layku, laq'a patxar utachat ñiq'i utar uñtatätap layku, ukanakasti thuthar uñtat pallalljatäspawa!" 
Job4:20 Mä arumakiw t'unjat uñjasi, wiñayatakiw jiwawayxi, janiw khitirus jiwatapax llakisiykiti." 
Job4:21 Jaqin jakañapax ch'ankhas t'aqaskaspa ukar uñtatakiw tukusi; yatiñ kankañ jan jikxatasakiw jiwawayxaraki.” 
Job5:1 Job, art'asim, inach khitis ist'askiristam. ¿Kawkïr angelarurak jichhasti art'asïta?" 
Job5:2 Chuyma usuyasiñasa, uñisisiñasa jiwañarukiw jaqirux apxi." 
Job5:3 Pisi amuyt'an jaqin qamiriptatap uñjta, ukampis utapax jank'akiw t'unjtawayxi." 
Job5:4 Wawanakapax janiw khiti yanapt'irsa jikxataskiti; taripañ utanakansti janiw jupanakarux chiqapar uñjapkiti, janirakiw khiti arxatiris jupanakatak utjkiti." 
Job5:5 Manq'at awtjat jaqinakaw yapu apthapitanakapsa manq'antxi, ch'aphi taypinakatpach apsusa, umat pharjatanakasti qamir yänakap munapayapxaraki." 
Job5:6 Ñanqha lurañax janiw uraqit sartkiti; llakir puriñax janiw akapachat mistkiti. 
Job5:7 Pachpa jaqiw llakir puriñ thaqhasiski, kamisatix pachpa nina taypit sank'anakax mistki ukhama." 
Job5:8 Jumäsinxa, nayax Diosaruw makhatxirista, jan walt'añanakaxsti amparaparuw uchxirista;" 
Job5:9 ¡jupax muspharkañ jach'a luräwinak luri, uka luräwinaksti janiw khitis amuyt'irjamäkiti!" 
Job5:10 Jupaw akapachar jallu apayani, ukampiw yapunak qarpanti;" 
Job5:11 jupaw jisk'achatanakar jach'ar apti, jupaw llakitanakarus imaskaraki;" 
Job5:12 jupaw ñanqha jaqinakan amtatanakap t'unatati, jupanakarus aynacht'ayaraki." 
Job5:13 Jupaw ñanqha chuyman jaqirux, pachpa ñanqha amtatanakapar jalantayi, uka ñanqha amtatanakapsa aynacht'ayaraki." 
Job5:14 ¡Urunpach jupanakax juykhur uñtat payinaqapxi, ch'amakanakan muyuntata, arumäkaspas ukhama!" 
Job5:15 Diosaw qhispiyi, jan kunan jaqirusa, t'aqhisiyat jaqirusa, ñanqha jaqinakan amparapata;" 
Job5:16 jupaw t'ukhanakan suyt'äwipaxa, ¡jupaw ñanqha jaqinakan lakanakap lluphantaraki!" 
Job5:17 Khitirutix Diosax chiqachki uka jaqix kusisiñaniwa. Taqi ch'aman Tatitun chiqachäwiparux jan jisk'achamti. 
Job5:18 Jupatix chhuxriñchjchixa, uka chhuxriñchjatarux qullxatarakiwa, Diosatix nuwantchixa, uka usuchjatarux juyartayarakiwa." 
Job5:19 Mayamp, mayamp chijir puriñat qhispiyätam, ñanqhan jumxar jutañapsa janiw munkaniti." 
Job5:20 Manq'at awtjat sarnaqañ urunakan, jiwañat qhispiyätam, ch'axwañ urunakansti jiwañat qhispiyarakïtam." 
Job5:21 Jupaw jaqin jan wali parlatanakapat imätam, aynacht'añ purinkan ukasa, janiw axsarkätati." 
Job5:22 Mach'anakatsa, chijinakatsa larusïtawa, janiw qhuru animalanakar axsarkätati." 
Job5:23 Qalanakax janiw yapuman jan walt'aykätamti, qhuru animalanakasti jumampix sumankaniwa." 
Job5:24 Utaman taqi phuqt'ataw sarnaqasïta, uywanakam tumpasïta ukkhasti, phuqhatpachäskaniwa." 
Job5:25 Wawanakamax pampan utjir qurar uñtatäniwa. 
Job5:26 Chuyman jaqïñarusti ch'amaniw puriskäta, suma puqt'ata trigo pichur uñtata." 
Job5:27 Pachpa sarnaqäwisaw ukanakan ukhamätap yatichistu; ukanak ist'am, juma kipkaw ukhamätap yatïta." 
Job6:1 Taqi llakisiñanakaxasa, aynacht'atanakaxasa mä tupur waytatäspa ukaxa," 
Job6:2  
Job6:3 quta iranankir ch'allat sipan juk'amp jathïspawa. Ukatpï ukham parlasktxa. 
Job6:4 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux mich'inakapampiw nayar usuchjitu, jiwayiri qullapasti janchixanjam saratati. Diosax usuchjatapampiw axsarayañapampi phuqhantitu." 
Job6:5 ¿Asnosti qura utjkipan qanchisiskakispati? ¿Jan ukax, urqu vacax qura patxankasin warariskakispacha?" 
Job6:6 ¿Khitirak jan jayunchat ch'aphaq manq'a manq'aspasti? ¿Kuna sumarak mä ch'aphaq manq'asti? 
Job6:7 Kuntix nayax janipun manq'añ munirïkta ukaw jichhax manq'axaxa. 
Job6:8 ¡Diosax mayitaxar churakitaspa; kuntix nayax munkta uksa phuqhakitaspa! 
Job6:9 ¡Diosax mäpit nayar t'unjxitaspa, mäpit jiwayxitaspa!" 
Job6:10 Ukasa nayatak chuymachasiñaxäspawa, jan amuykaya t'aqhisiñax taypin kusisirista, qullan Diosan kamachinakap imas sarnaqatax layku." 
Job6:11 Janiw ch'amax utjkxituti juk'amp jakaskañataki, nayan jakañaxax janiw kunatakis wakiskxiti." 
Job6:12 Janiw ch'amaxax qarqar uñtat ch'ullqhïkiti, janirakiw janchixas broncer uñtat ch'ullqhïkisa." 
Job6:13 Janiw nayapach sayt'asirjamäkxti, janirakiw khiti yanapt'irsa jikxataskxti." 
Job6:14 T'aqhisiskir jaqi masirux munañawa, taqi ch'aman Tatitutak janis taqi chuymäkchi ukasa." 
Job6:15 Ukampisa, jumanaka, jaqi masinakaxaxa, janiw yanapt'apkistati, waña jawirar uñtataw nayatak tukupxtaxa." 
Job6:16 Umax qunchuw saraqani, chhullunkhayampi, khunumpi kituntata," 
Job6:17 ukampis chhullunkhayax chullurawayxiwa, jawiranakasti wañsuwayxiwa; lupiw lupintxi, umasti wañsuwayxarakiwa." 
Job6:18 Saririnakarus thakhipat maysaruw saranukuyi, wasar tuqir sarasin ukan jiwarxapxaraki." 
Job6:19 Temá, Sabá markankir saririnakax wali suyt'añampiw uka jawiranak thaqhapxi." 
Job6:20 Ukawjar purisinsti, mayjt'ataw uñjasipxi, suyt'añapasti ina ch'usaruw tukuwayxaraki." 
Job6:21 Jumanakax nayatak ukhamäpxaraktawa: nayan t'aqhisitax uñjasin, axsarxapxaktawa." 
Job6:22 Ukampis nayax janiw kunsa mayipksmati, nayar qhispiyañ layku qullqi churapxañamsa mayipksmati," 
Job6:23 uñisirit nayar qhispiyapxañamsa mayipksmati, lunthatanakan amparapat nayar antutayapxañamsa mayipkaraksmati." 
Job6:24 Jumanakay yatichapxita, nayasti amukïskäwa; pantjasitax uñachayapxita." 
Job6:25 Jumanakatix arsutanakaman chiqätap uñachayapxasmaxa, janiw nayax ñanqhaskiristti; ukampis jumanakax jan kuna juchat juchañchapxistaxa." 
Job6:26 Jumanakax arsusitanakaxat k'umipxistaxa, luqhi jaqin arsusitanakapjam thayax apasxaraki." 
Job6:27 ¡Jumanakax wajcharus jiwayirjamäpxtawa, pachpa jaqi masimarus jumanakax aljantirjamäpxtawa!" 
Job6:28 Uñkatapxitaya, k'arisir jaqïtcha, sapxita." 
Job6:29 Amuyt'asipxam, jan kunsa ina ch'usat parlapxamti; nayan chiqapar arsutax jaysapxam." 
Job6:30 ¿Jumanakasti k'ari jaqïkirista ukhamti amuyapxista? Jan ukax, ¿jan amuyt'asakich parlpachätxa?" 
Job7:1 Jaqin jakañapax aka uraqin, luräwip phuqhir soldadon jakañapar uñtatawa," 
Job7:2 t'aqhisiyat uywat jaqir uñtat ch'iwinkañ munasa, irnaqir jaqir uñtat qullqi iraqasiñ suyasa." 
Job7:3 Phaxsi phaxsi t'aqhisis sarnaqañaw wakt'itu, arumanakasti paqar paqari t'aqhisiña." 
Job7:4 Ikintxasasti, arumax janiw jank'as willjtanirapkituti; qhanjtaniñapkam uksar aksar jaqukipstasax qarjasiraktwa, ukat sarakta, ¿kunapacharak sartxästi? sasa." 
Job7:5 Janchixax q'ala laq'untatawa, llixtimpi tukuntatawa, jinq'ikiw taqi chiqanakat aywiskitu." 
Job7:6 Jiwañ urunakaxax niyaw jak'achasinki, janiw kuna suyt'äwis utjkxiti, sawurin jaxchañapar uñtataw urunakax nayatak jalaraki." 
Job7:7 Amtasimay Dios Tata, jakañaxax samanampi sasikiwa, janiw mayampis kusisiñax nayatak utjkxaniti." 
Job7:8 Jichhürux uñjaskistawa, qharürusti janiw uñjkxitätati; thaqhitätawa, nayasti janiw akankxäti." 
Job7:9 Kamisatix qinayax sarxi, chhaqtawayxakiraki, ukhamaw chhaqtawayxi amay imäwir imantatäxi ukaxa. Janipuniw mayampis ukat kuttankxiti, utapankirinakax janiw mayampsa uñkatkxarakiti." 
Job7:10  
Job7:11 Ukatpï nayax jan amukt'irjamäktixa. Usuñaxansa, llakisiñaxansa, ayqutanakaxat arsusiskakipunïwa." 
Job7:12 ¿Nayasti jach'a qutankir axsarkañ jach'a laq'utti, ukham nayar uñch'ukiskañamatakisti?" 
Job7:13 Nayax lup'iskta ukapachax sistwa: “Ikiñaxan samarañ jikxatxä, ikiw llakisiñanakax juyart'ayani” sasa," 
Job7:14 ukampis jumax samkasitanakaxan axsarañampiw phuqhantistaxa; janiw ikthapiykistasa, ukkhat ukkhat thuqtayistaxa." 
Job7:15 Nayar jaychjañamaw walïspa; akham t'aqhisis jakañat sipan, jiwxañakiw nayatak walïspa." 
Job7:16 Ukhakamakïxtwa. Janiw jakañ munkxapunti. Samarayxita, jakañaxax samanamp sasikiwa." 
Job7:17 ¿Kunarak jaqisti, jupat amtasiñamatakisti, jupat llakisiñamatakisa," 
Job7:18 sapür jupar uñch'ukiñamataki, jupar sapa kuti yant'añamatakisti?" 
Job7:19 ¿Kunatarak nayar uñch'ukiskitätasti, thusunqayaksa jan mallintaykitätasti?" 
Job7:20 Jucha lurataxatix utjchi ukasti, jaqinakan uñjiripa, ¿kuna ñanqharak lursmasti? ¿Kunatarak nayamp katxatasistasti? ¿Jumatakix mä jathi q'ipjamätcha?" 
Job7:21 ¿Janit juchaxat pampachkitasmasti? ¿Jan wali luratax janit pampachkasmasti? Nayax jank'aw uraqir imantat uñjasxä, thaqhität ukapachasti, janiw jikxatkxitätati." 
Job8:1 ¿Kunapachkamarak ukham parlaskakïtasti? Arunakamax mä jach'a thayampi sasiwa. 
Job8:2  
Job8:3 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux, janipuniw kunapachas kunatix chiqapäki uk maysar q'iwkiti." 
Job8:4 Wawanakamatix Dios nayraqatan jucha lurapxchi ukaxa, jupax wawanakamar juchapatjam mutuyi." 
Job8:5 Taqi ch'amani Diosar thaqtam, jumat khuyapt'ayasiñapatak mayim." 
Job8:6 Jumatix q'uma kankañampi, chiqa kankañamp taqi kunsa luräta ukapachaxa, jupax jumar arxatätamwa, ukatsti kunatix utjkäyätam ukanak kutt'ayxarakïtamwa." 
Job8:7 Kuna qamir yänakamatix utjkän ukax, janiw kunäkanisa, kunanakatix qhipat utjkätam ukamp kikipt'ayataxa." 
Job8:8 Nayra jaqinakar jiskt'asim, nayra jaqinakan sarnaqäwinakapat yatiqarakim." 
Job8:9 Jiwasax masür jaqinakakïtanwa, janiw kuns yatktanti, jakäwisax aka uraqin ch'iwjam sarakipirikiwa." 
Job8:10 Ukampis nayra jaqinakaw taqi kunxat parlapxätam, yatichapxarakïtam." 
Job8:11 Junco alimpi, papiro alimpix, walja umax utjki ukawjanakan jilanti," 
Job8:12 ukampisa, ch'uxñpacha, janïra yawskataw, yaqha alinakat sipan nayra wañsuwayxaraki." 
Job8:13 Uka pachparakiw ñanqha jaqinakampix lurasi, Tatitut armasirinakampixa: suyt'äwinakapax ina ch'usarukiw tukuwayxi." 
Job8:14 Jupanakan suyt'añapampi alkatañapampisti, kusikusin simpapamp sasikiwa." 
Job8:15 Uka simpat waythapisiñ munapxani, ukasti t'aqasxakiniwa, jan ukax, uka simpax janiw jupanakar katxäskaniti." 
Job8:16 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax, ch'uxña alinakampi sasiwa, lupin lupt'atax panqar uypachan saratati," 
Job8:17 qarqa taypinakaruw saphinti, qalanakaruw wal katthapisi," 
Job8:18 maynitix uka alinak jik'inukuspaxa, janiw khitis yatkaspati uka alinakan ukkhankatapxa." 
Job8:19 Ukhamaw kusisit jakañapax tukusiwayxi, uka lantisti yaqha alinakaw ch'ichtanxaraki." 
Job8:20 Tatitux aski jaqir janiw apanukkiti, ñanqha jaqinakarus janirakiw yanapt'kiti." 
Job8:21 Jupaw jumarux wasitat larusiyxätam, kusisiñatsa arnaqasiyxarakïtam;" 
Job8:22 ukampisa, uñisirinakamax p'inqachjataw uñjasini, ñanqha jaqinakan utapasti t'unjataw uñjasirakini." 
Job9:1 Nayax ukhamätap suma yatta; ¿kamisarak jaqisti Tatit nayraqatan jan juchanjam arsusispasti? 
Job9:2  
Job9:3 Maynitix jupamp ch'axwañ munaspaxa, waranqa jiskt'anakarux janiw maysa arusxatkaspati." 
Job9:4 Diosan yatiñ kankañapax jach'awa, ch'aman kankañapas jach'arakiwa; ¿khitirak Tatit nayraqatan sayt'asispa, jupar atipjarakispasti?" 
Job9:5 Diosax phiñasiñapan qullunak unxtayi; pampa tukuyaraki, janiw khitis ukxa amuykiti." 
Job9:6 Jupaw uraqsa unxtayi, uraqin utt'äwinakapsa khathatiyaraki." 
Job9:7 Jupaw intirus jan mistuniñapataki mayi; warawaranakan jan qhanañapsa mayiraki. 
Job9:8 Jupa sapakiw alaxpach janatati, jach'a quta mathapinaksa t'akuyaraki." 
Job9:9 Jupaw jach'a qutu warawaranak luri: Osa Mayor, Orión, Pléyades sat warawaranaka, aynach tuqinkki uka qutu warawaranaksa." 
Job9:10 ¡Jupaw walja jach'a muspharkañanak luri, uka luräwinakapsti janiw khitis amuyt'kaspati!" 
Job9:11 Tatitutix naya jak'a sarakipawayaspaxa, janiw jupar uñjkiristti, sarakipaskaspawa, nayasti janiw amuykiristti." 
Job9:12 Jupatix mä kunsa katuntasispa ukasti, ¿khitirak juparusti “Jan uk luramti” saspasti? ¿Khitirak juparusti luratanakapat wayt'aspasti?" 
Job9:13 Tatitun q'apisitapax jan t'akurkayawa; jach'añchasirinakas Diosan nayraqatapan jisk'achjataw uñjasipxi. 
Job9:14 ¿Kunjämarak nayasti Diosar arusxatiriststi? 
Job9:15 Jan juchanïkirista ukasa, janiw arusxatkiristti; jupax nayan taripirixawa, khuyapt'ayasiñapak mayirista." 
Job9:16 Nayatix jupar jawsirista, jupasti uñstanirakispa ukaxa, janjaw arunakaxarus ist'kaspati." 
Job9:17 Mä jach'a thayampiw nayar t'aqhisiyitaspa, chhuxrinakaxsa jan kuna yänikiw jilxattayitaspa;" 
Job9:18 llakisiñampikiw nayar phuqhantitaspa, janirakiw samsuykitaspasa." 
Job9:19 ¿Nayax ch'amampit sayt'asiristxa? Jupax jila ch'amaniwa. ¿Taripäwirut jupar jawsiristxa? ¿Khitirak jupar uñstayanispasti? 
Job9:20 Nayax qawqha aski chiqa jaqïkirista ukasa, jupax nayar juchanitakpun mistuyaskitaspa." 
Job9:21 Nayax aski jaqïtwa, ukasti janiw nayatakix kunäkxisa; jakañampis qaritäxtwa." 
Job9:22 Taqi kunas pachpakiwa. Jichhasti ak lup'isirakta: Diosax juchanirusa, jan juchanirusa pachpak t'unji." 
Job9:23 Mä chijisa akatjamat jan juchan jaqirux jiwarayi, Diosax jupanakan ayqutanakapat larusiwa." 
Job9:24 Uraqix ñanqha jaqinakan amparapar katuyatawa, jupaw taripirinakan nayranakap ch'uqanti. Janitix Diosäkchi ukasti, ¿khitirak uk luristi?" 
Job9:25 Jakañ urunakaxax jalak jalarawayxi, kusisiñ jan uñt'asakiw jalarawayxi." 
Job9:26 Qutan sarir barcor uñtataw jank'ak sarawayxi, katjañatak jaltir pakar uñtataw jaltawayi." 
Job9:27 Nayatix llakinakax armasiñ munirista, k'uchik uñnaqañ munirista," 
Job9:28 ukapachax ukataqi t'aqhisitaxax axsarayituwa, Dios nayaraqatan jupatak juchanipunïtax yatiraktwa." 
Job9:29 Jupatix nayar juchanit uñt'chituxa, janiw nayan jupampi ch'am chikañaxax wakiskiti." 
Job9:30 Nayax jabonampis amparanakax jariqasiskirista ukasa, lejiampis qaqsusiskirista ukasa," 
Job9:31 Diosax ñiq'iruw nayar nukhuntitaspa, isixas nayat axtasitaspawa." 
Job9:32 Janiw nayax Diosamp mä jaqi masimpjam irkataskiristti, janirakiw panpachan taripäwir sarañäni siskiristsa." 
Job9:33 ¡Nanak taypin mä taripirix utjakispa, nanak panitak munañanïspa," 
Job9:34 Diosax t'aqhisiykitu uksa, axsarañamp phuqhantkit uksa, suyt'ayxakispa!" 
Job9:35 Ukapachasti nayax jan kuna axsarasaw arsusirista, amuyataxat janjaw jupar kuna ñanqhsa lurkti." 
Job10:1 ¡Jakañax nayatak ch'amäxiwa! Jachkäwiw tukusxä, t'aqhisitanakaxat taqi ch'amampiw arsusirakï." 
Job10:2 ¡Dios Tatay, janikiy nayar juchanit uñt'istati! Sitaya, ¿kunatarak juchañchistasti?" 
Job10:3 Jumaxay nayar uskuschistaxa; ¿walikit ukham nayar jisk'achasin t'aqhisiyatamasti? ¿Walikit ñanqha jaqinakan nayatak jan wali amtatanakapasti? 
Job10:4 ¿Jumasti janchi nayranïtati, jaqinakjam uñjañamatakisti?" 
Job10:5 ¿Jakañamasti jiwir jaqin jakañapjam juk'a urunakatakikiti? 
Job10:6 Ukhamasti, ¿kunatarak pantjasitaxampi, juchanakaxamp thaqhas sarnaqtasti?" 
Job10:7 nayan jan juchanïtax yatkasasa, amparamat jan khitin nayar qhispiyañap yatkasasa." 
Job10:8 Jumaw nayarux pachpa amparamampi irnuqista, ¡jichhasti t'unjañ munarakista!" 
Job10:9 Amtasimaya, nayarux ñiq'it luristaxa, jichhasti ¿wasitatti laq'ar tukuyxitäta?" 
Job10:10 Jumaw janchixan ukhamäñapatak luristaxa, kunjämatix lechex quesor tukuwaykxi ukhama;" 
Job10:11 jumaw patxa janchixsa, manqha janchixsa uchistaxa, ch'akhanakaxsa, ankunakaxsa k'anarakistaxa;" 
Job10:12 jumaw jakañ churistaxa, munasiñam churarakistaxa, nayar uñjatamaw jakayaskitu." 
Job10:13 Ukampis jichhax amuytwa, chuyma manqhaman imxäsiskatätaxa:" 
Job10:14 jucha lurtti, janicha uk uñch'ukisinkistästaxa, juchaxat nayar juchañchañataki." 
Job10:15 Nayatix juchanïsta ukasti, nayatak kunakïkani; jan juchanïksta ukasti, janiw p'iq waytkiristti, llakimp phuqhantat uñjasitax layku." 
Job10:16 Nayatix sayt'asiristxa, jumax leonar uñtataw qhamisiyitasma, nayar t'unjañatakix kunsa lurirjamätawa." 
Job10:17 Nayar irkatir jaqinakax janiw jumatak pist'arapktamti; nayatak q'apisitamax juk'ampiw jilxatti, ¡ejercitor uñtataw jan inakt'as katuntañ munistaxa!" 
Job10:18 ¿Kunatarak nayarusti yuriyistasti? Khitinsa janïr uñjkat jiwxañaxaw walïsapäna. 
Job10:19 Taykaxan purakapat amay imäwir chiqak sarxañaxaw walïsapäna, janis kunapachas nayax utjkiriskäyät ukhamäsapänwa." 
Job10:20 Jakañ urunakaxax jakhutäxiwa, ¡janiy juk'amp t'aqhisiyxistati! Mä juk'aksay kusist'ayita," 
Job10:21 jan mayampitaki sarxañäki ukar janïr sarxarkipana, ch'amakan markaparu, ch'iyär qinayanakan markaparu," 
Job10:22 ch'iwin markaparu, jan walt'añan markaparu, kawkhantix pachpa qhanasa ch'amakampix mayakïki ukaru." 
Job11:1 Ukataqi arunakxarusti ¿janit arusxatañ wakiskaspasti?, ¿aka jaqix ukataqi parlatap laykukiti jan juchanïkaspa?" 
Job11:2  
Job11:3 ¿Jumasti amuytati ukataqi parlatamamp nanakar amukt'ayañxa? ¿Janis khitis sawkasitanakamar arusxatirjamäkaspa ukti amuyta? 
Job11:4 Jumax saraktawa: “Nayan yatichäwixax chiqapawa; Tatitun nayraqatapan q'umätwa” sasa. 
Job11:5 ¡Diosax jumar arusxatañatak arsunispa! 
Job11:6 Jupaw yatiñ kankañan imantatanakap yatichiristam, ukanak amuyt'añax wali ch'amawa. Ukapachaw yatirakisma luratamatjam Diosan jumar jan mutuyatapa." 
Job11:7 ¿Jumasti amuytati Tatitun amtäwinakap uñt'aña, taqi munañ kankañap yatiñkam puriñsa?" 
Job11:8 ¿Kuns lurasma?, ukax alaxpachat sipan juk'amp amstawa. ¿Kunarak jumast yattasti?, ukax mik'ayat sipan juk'amp manqhawa." 
Job11:9 Uraqit sipan juk'amp jach'awa, jach'a qutat sipan juk'amp jach'arakiwa." 
Job11:10 Diosatix jutasin katuntiristam, ukatsti taripäwir jawsiristam, ¿khitirak jupar jark'aspasti?" 
Job11:11 Khititix k'arïki uk jupax yati, jupax ñanqha lurir uñjaraki, ¿jan ukax amuytacha Diosan jan ukanak amuyatapxa?" 
Job11:12 Kunürutix ch'uminkir asnox suma asnor tukxani, uküruw pisi chuyma jaqix amuythapisini." 
Job11:13 Jichhax taqi kunsa chiqapar lurañ amtasim, Diosat mayisirakim." 
Job11:14 Jumatix juchamp phuqhantatäsksta ukkhasti, uka jucham apanukum; utamansti ñanqha lurañax jan utjkpati." 
Job11:15 Ukapachaw jan khitinsa kun sata sayt'asïta, janiw kuna axsarañamas utjkxarakiniti;" 
Job11:16 t'aqhisitanakamsa armasxätawa, jalir umax jalakipki ukar uñtataw ukanak armasxäta." 
Job11:17 Jakañamax chika uru k'ajir intit sipan juk'ampiw k'ajani; wali ch'amaka urunakamasti willjta qhantatir uñtatäxaniwa. 
Job11:18 Suyt'añamas utjaskaniwa jan kuna axsarasaw jakasïta, Diosan uñjataw jan kun axsaras ikt'asirakïta." 
Job11:19 Khitir jan axsarasaw samart'äta, waljaniw juman yanapam thaqhir jutapxani." 
Job11:20 Ukampis ñanqha lurir jaqinakax, inamayakiw yanap thaqhani; janiw kawkhar imantasiñsa jikxatapkaniti, suyt'añapasti jiwañakïxaniwa." 
Job12:1 ¡Jumanakax chiqpachaw jaqinakan sutipxar arsupxtaxa, jumanakax jiwarxapxät ukapachax janiw khiti yatiñan jaqis utjkxaniti!" 
Job12:2  
Job12:3 Ukampis nayax amuyt'asiñ yatiraktwa, janiw jumanakat pisïkti. ¿Khitirak taqi ukanak jan yatkisti?" 
Job12:4 Mä urunakan, Diosar art'askäyät ukapachaxa, jupax mayisitaxar ist'apunitänwa; ukampis jichhax, masinakaxamppachaw nayat larusipxitu; nayax jan kuna juchanïkta ukasa, taqiniw nayat sawkasipxitu." 
Job12:5 Taqi kun yatir jaqixa, aynacht'at jaqirux jisk'achiwa; liwisirjamäki uka jaqirusa, juk'ampikiw nukt'xaraki." 
Job12:6 Lunthatanakax utanakapan k'uchikiw jakasipxi; Diosar ñanqhachirinakasti jan llakiniw jakasipxi, jupanakas Tatitur apnaqkaspa ukham amuyasipxaraki." 
Job12:7 Uywanakar jiskt'asim, ukanakasti yatichätamwa; alaxpach jamach'inakar jiskt'asim, ukanakasti yatiyätamwa;" 
Job12:8 uraqimpi parlam, uraqisti yatichätamwa; jach'a qutankir chawllanakamp parlam, chawllanakasti yaticharakïtamwa." 
Job12:9 Ukanakax sum yatipxi Diosan taqi kun amparapamp luratapa. 
Job12:10 Taqi jakirinakan jakañapax jupan amparapankiwa. 
Job12:11 Jinchux arunak ist'i, laxrasti manq'an sumätap katjaraki." 
Job12:12 Ch'ama qarit jaqinakax, yatiñ kankañanïpxiwa, walja maranakanïtapaw jupanakar amuyt'a kankañ churi." 
Job12:13 Diosasti yatiñ kankañani, ch'amanirakiwa; jupax amtiwa, amtäwinakapsti phuqhiwa." 
Job12:14 Kuntix Diosax t'unjki ukxa, janiw khitis wasitat sayt'aykaspati; khitirutix Diosax katuntki ukarux, janiw khitis antutaykaspati." 
Job12:15 Jupatix jallun purxatañap jark'xäschi ukaxa, pampanakax taqpachaw wañsuwayxi; jallu apayanki ukkhasti, taqi uraqpachaw umampi phuqhantat uñjasi." 
Job12:16 Ch'amapax jupar atipjayapuniwa. Sallqjayasir jaqisa, sallqjir jaqisa, jupan amparapankiwa." 
Job12:17 Jupaw yatiñani jaqinakarux yatiñ kankañap apaqi taripirinakarus luqhirayaraki. 
Job12:18 Reyinakarusti munañanïñap apaqi, q'alala, katuntat yaqha markar apayxaraki." 
Job12:19 Sacerdotenakarus lurañanakap apaqi, munañan jaqinakarus marka apnaqäwit jaquqaraki." 
Job12:20 Amuyt'ayirinakarusti jan arun antuti, chuyman jaqinakatsa amuyt'a kankañap apaqi." 
Job12:21 Munañan jaqinakarus jisk'achjiwa, ch'amaninakarus jan ch'aman lurjaraki." 
Job12:22 Kunanakatix jan yatitäkän ukanak qhanar apsu, kunanakatix jamasan luratäkän ukanaksa qhanaruw apsuraki." 
Job12:23 Jupaw markanakar jach'añchi, tukjaraki, jupaw ananuku, ukatsti anthapiraki." 
Job12:24 Mä markan jilïr irpirinakapatsti yatiñ kankañap apaqi, ukatsti wasararuw jan kawksaru sarañani jupanakar antutaraki," 
Job12:25 ukan ch'amakanak taypin kumpunaqapxi, machantat jaqinakjamaw liwinaqtapxi." 
Job13:1 Taqi akanak pachpa nayraxampiw uñjta, pachpa jinchuxampiw ist'arakta." 
Job13:2 Jumanakax yatipkta ukanakxa, nayax yatiraktwa; janiw kunansa jumanakat pisïkti." 
Job13:3 Ukampis nayax Diosampiw parlañ munirista, taqi ch'aman Tatitumpiw nayax arusxatañ munarakirista." 
Job13:4 Jumanakax chiqapäki ukxa k'arisiñampiw imt'apxtaxa, jan khitirus waliptayir qullirinakäpxtawa." 
Job13:5 ¡Amukt'apxakismasa, aski yatiñan jaqinakat uñt'ayasipxasma!" 
Job13:6 Jichhax sum ist'apxam, nayax arst'asirakïwa." 
Job13:7 ¿K'ari amuyunak arsusati Diosampi askit uñt'ayasiñ munapxtasti? ¿sallqjañanakampit jupar arxatañ munapxäta? 
Job13:8 Jumanakax Diosat arxatasiriw tukupxtaxa, jupan arxatiripäpkasmas ukham amuyasipxtaxa." 
Job13:9 Ukampisa, ¿kunas kamachaspa Diosatix jumanakar chuymanakam uñantapxiristam ukkhaxa? ¿Jumanakasti mä jaqirjamati sallqjapxasmaxa?" 
Job13:10 Diosax tuqinuqapxiristamwa, jumanakatix k'arinakampi jupar arxatañ munapxasma ukaxa." 
Job13:11 Diosan ch'amapax sinti jach'awa, jumanakarusti axsarañat khathatiyapxiristam." 
Job13:12 Jumanakan arunakamax jan kunatak inamay laq'amp sasiwa, ñiq'i pirqanakampi jark'aqasiñ munksnas ukhamakiwa." 
Job13:13 Jichhasti, ¡amukt'apxam, nayaw arsusirakï, kunasaya, kawkisaya nayatak utjaskpan!" 
Job13:14 Jiwañaxas wakisinixa janiw axsarkäti, taqi kun apt'asirjamäkä ukas arsusiskakïwa." 
Job13:15 Jupax jiwaykitani ukasa, sayt'asiskakïwa, ajanuy ajanuw jupan nayraqatapan sarnaqäwixat arsusï." 
Job13:16 Inas ukhamat qhispiskirista, janiw mä ñanqha jaqix nayraqatapar uñstkaspati." 
Job13:17 Jichhasti sum ist'apxam, kuntix sapkäm uka arunaka." 
Job13:18 Arsusiñatak wakicht'atäxtwa, Diosan jan juchanïtax uñjañap yatirakta." 
Job13:19 Maynitix nayar kunatsa juchañchañ munchituxa, nayax amukïxäwa, janipuniw wasitat arskxäti." 
Job13:20 Dios Tatay, pä amuyuxaruki jayst'ita, jaysitäta ukaxa, janiw nayax jumat imantaskäti:" 
Job13:21 Jan juk'amp mutuykxistati, janirak ukataq axsaraykxistati." 
Job13:22 Jawsitaya, nayasti ist'ämawa, munsta ukaxa, naya nayraqat arsü, ukat jumax jaysanitäta." 
Job13:23 Jichhasti sitaya, ¿kunarak juchaxasti? ¿Kunarak jan wali luratanakaxasti?" 
Job13:24 ¿Kunatarak nayatak imantastasti? ¿Kunatarak nayar uñisirimarjam uñjistasti? 
Job13:25 Nayax waña laphimpi sasiktwa, ¿kunatarak nayar t'unjañ munistasti? Nayax waña jichhumpi sasiktwa, ¿kunatarak nayar arknaqistasti?" 
Job13:26 T'aqhiskañ juchañchäwinak nayatak apantaxa; wayna kankañaxan pantjasitaxat t'aqhisiyaskistaxa. 
Job13:27 Kayunakaxarus maniyampiw ñach'antistaxa, chillqtatanakaxsa uñch'ukisktawa, takt'atanakaxsa uñakiparaktawa." 
Job13:28 Ñusantatäkiristsa ukhamaw nayax tukusiskta, thuthan thutjat isir uñtataw tukusiskarakta." 
Job14:1 Jaqin jakäwipax mä juk'a urutakikiwa, t'aqhisiñanakampi phuqhantata." 
Job14:2 Panqarar uñtataw panqart'i, ukatsti wañsuwayxakiwa; ch'iwir uñtataw chhaqtawayi." 
Job14:3 ¿Ukham jaqiruti uñtanta, jupatakit taripäwi wakichañ muntasti?" 
Job14:4 Janiw khitis q'añu kankañatxa, q'uma kankañ apskaspati," 
Job14:5 Jumaw jaqirux qawqha pacha jakañapatakis arstaxa, uka arsutamarusti janiw jilakipaykaspati," 
Job14:6 janiy jupar juk'amp uñch'ukxamti; samarayxamaya, ¡ch'amapamp jikxatasit qullqipamp kusispan, samaya!" 
Job14:7 Mä quqaru khuchhunuktan ukapachax, ch'ichtaniñapaw suyt'atäski, ch'ich'iqiripan utjañapax suyt'atäskapuniwa." 
Job14:8 Saphipax achachïskpasa, alipas uraqin ñusantaskpan," 
Job14:9 umampi warxatatax, ch'uxñtanxaniwa; mä machaq quqar uñtataw layminakapax jilantxani." 
Job14:10 Ukampisa, jaqix jan mayampitakiw jiwxi; jiwxasinsti, ¿kawkirurak sarxisti?" 
Job14:11 Jach'a qutan umapas wañsuwayxakispawa, jawiranakas wañantawayxakispawa," 
Job14:12 ukampis alaxpachan utjañapkamasti, jaqix janiw amay imäwipat sartkaniti; janirakiw ikïwipatsa p'arxtkaniti." 
Job14:13 ¡Q'apisiñam t'akuñapkamax, manqha pachar imantitasma, nayat amtasiñamatak mä uru wakt'ayasma!" 
Job14:14 ¿Mä jaqisti jiwxasin wasitat jaktanxaspati? Nayasti qawqhaya wakischispa ukkhakamaw suyt'irista, t'aqhisiñanakaxan tukusiñap puriniñapkama." 
Job14:15 Jumatix jawsitasmaxa, nayax jaysirismawa; munasiñampiw uñtanitasma, jumaxay nayar irnuqaschistaxa." 
Job14:16 Jichhax sapa chillqtatax uñch'ukiskistaxa, ukapachasti janiw nayan juchanakax amuykasmati;" 
Job14:17 pantjasitanakaxsa armanukxasmawa, jucha luratanakaxat q'umachxarakitasma." 
Job14:18 Qullunakas lluxitattiwa, qarqanakas yaqha chiqaruw jittapxi." 
Job14:19 Umax qalar mirq'suwa, jallu umasti uraqit laq'anak aptawayi, ukar uñtat jumax jaqin suyt'añap tukjtaxa." 
Job14:20 Jan mayampitakiw jaqir tukusiytaxa, uraqipatsa apanuktawa, jupasti q'ala tukjataw amay imäwir sarxi." 
Job14:21 Wawanakapax jach'añchatäsipkpasa, janiw jupax uk yatkiti; jan walt'añarus purisipkpan, janiw jupax uk amuykiti;" 
Job14:22 jupan janchipan usutapak yati, jupa kipkan t'aqhisitapak yatiraki." 
Job15:1 Yatiñan jaqixa, janiw ina ch'usa arunakamp arsuskiti, janirakiw thayan apañ aliq arunakampikis arsuskiti." 
Job15:2  
Job15:3 Janiw inamayak kunsa parlkiti, janirakiw ina ch'usa arsüwinaksa parlkiti." 
Job15:4 Ukampis jumax Diosar axsartañ apanukxtawa. ¡Tatitur taqi chuyma jak'achasiñsa t'unjtawa! 
Job15:5 Jan wali amtäwinakamaw ukham parlaytamxa, k'ari arunak parlayaraktamxa." 
Job15:6 Nayan jumar juchañchañaxas janiw wakiskiti, juma pachpaw arunakamamp juchañchasisktaxa." 
Job15:7 ¿Jumat nayrïr yurir jaqïtasti?, ¿qullunakan nayrapti yurtasti?" 
Job15:8 ¿Tatitun amuyt'ayiripjamti amuyastasti? ¿Jan ukax, jumakis akapachan yatiñanïkasma ukhamcha amuyastaxa?" 
Job15:9 ¿Kuntix nanakax jan yatipkta uk yattati? ¿Kuntix nanakax jan uñt'apkta uk uñt'tati? 
Job15:10 ¡Nanakax jilïr jaqinakäxapxtwa, awkimat sipan juk'amp yatiñanïpxaraktwa!" 
Job15:11 ¿Janit jumatak walikïki, pachpa Diosan jumar chuymachatapasti, suma arunakamp jumar parlxayatanakaxasa?" 
Job15:12 ¿Kunatarak q'apisiñampi atipjayasta, nayranakamatsa ninanakjam chhukhutataytasti?" 
Job15:13 ¿Kunatarak Diosatak mayjt'astasti, ukataqi jupatak tuqisiraktasti?" 
Job15:14 Q'uma jaqix janiw maynis utjkiti, jan juchan jaqisa janirakiw utjkiti." 
Job15:15 Jupatakix janiw angelanakas askïkiti, janirakiw nayrapatakix alaxpachas q'umäkiti," 
Job15:16 ¡jaqix ukanakat sipan jan walinak lurañ yatintatawa, jisk'achkañarakiwa, ñanqha lurañatakix umatsa pharjayaskaspa ukhamawa!" 
Job15:17 Job, jichhax ist'itaya, sarnaqäwixan yatiqkta uk säma," 
Job15:18 ukax amuyt'an jaqinakan yatichäwipawa. Jupanakax nayra awkinakapat yatiqapxatayna. 
Job15:19 ¡Janiw yaqha markankir jaqinakat yatiqapkänti! Ukat Tatitux jupanakar uraqi churäna, mä churawïkaspas ukhama." 
Job15:20 Ukampis qhuru ñanqha lurir jaqinakan churäwipax, t'aqhisiñampi, axsarayasiñampiwa." 
Job15:21 Axsarayir uxutanak ist'apuni; sumak samart'asiski ukapachaw lunthatanakas jalxati. 
Job15:22 Janiw jupatakix ch'amakat jaltañax utjkxiti; ¡espadampi jiwayat uñjasiñaki suyaski! 
Job15:23 Jiwat janchipasti siwiq'aranakan manq'aparuw tukuni; tukusiñ urupa jak'ankatap yatisi. 
Job15:24 Ch'amakanakaw juparux axsarayani, llakisiñampi jan walt'añanakampiw katuntarakini, nuwasïwin jank'aki katuntir reyir uñtata." 
Job15:25 Diosatak sayt'asiritakix ukhamaw lurasi, taqi ch'aman Tatitur saykatiritakisa," 
Job15:26 escudopampi jark'aqasisa tuqisiñampi Diosatak sayt'asiritakis ukhamaw lurasiraki. 
Job15:27 Ajanupasa, ch'illapas lik'imp phuqhantatawa." 
Job15:28 Jakkani uka markanakax q'ala t'unjataw uñjasini; utanakax apanukutaw qhiparani, laq'a phinaruw tukuni." 
Job15:29 Qamir kankañapax janiw jayatakïkaniti; uraqinakapsa, qamir yänakapsa tukjasiniwa." 
Job15:30 Janiw ch'amakanakat jaltirjamäkaniti; ninaw ch'ichtir alinakap naksuni; may phust'asakiw Tatitux tukjani. 
Job15:31 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax sallqjañar jan alkataspati, jupakiw sallqjat uñjasxani." 
Job15:32 Janïräkipan layminakapax wañantxani, janiw mayampis ch'uxñtankxaniti." 
Job15:33 Jan puqurir uva achun yapur uñtatäniwa, willirtir panqaranakan olivo quqar uñtatäniwa." 
Job15:34 Ñanqha jaqinakan saraqirinakapax janiw utjkaniti, qullqi chilltayasitanakamp qamirkiptat utanakapasti ninan nakhani." 
Job15:35 Jupanakax ñanqha lurañampi wallq'iptatäpxiwa, aynacht'añanak wawachasipki; achupasti sallqjañawa." 
Job16:1 Walja kutiw uka parlatanakam ist'xta. Jumanakax nayar chuymachkamayaxa, t'aqhisiyxapxakistawa." 
Job16:2  
Job16:3 Ukham ina ch'usa parlanakasti ¿janit tukuskani? ¿Kunatsa jumanakax ukham nayar kutipayapxista? 
Job16:4 Jumanakatix nayjam jikxatasipxasmaxa, nayax jumanakjamaw parlarakirista; sawkasiñampiw p'iqi uksar aksar khiwirista, kunayman walja arunak sapxirisma," 
Job16:5 suma chuymachasiñ arunak sapxirisma, jumanakar ch'amacht'añataki." 
Job16:6 Ukampis janiw parlañas t'aqhisitaxar samaraykiti, janirakiw amukïñas juyart'aykituti." 
Job16:7 Diosax ch'amsa pist'ayxituwa; jilat masinakaxsa apaqasxituwa," 
Job16:8 muyuntataw uñjasta, nayatakiw sayt'asi, k'ari irkatañ arunak nayatak sartayi." 
Job16:9 Tatitux jisk'a jisk'a tukjitu; nayar katuntañatakiw arktitu, qhuru animaljamaw axsarayitu, uñisirixäkaspas ukhamaw uñkatitu." 
Job16:10 Jaqinakax nayatak arsuñatakiw aywthapipxi, kunayman sinqch'ukipxitu jisk'achjasaw t'axllintapxarakitu." 
Job16:11 Diosax qhuru jaqinakan amparaparuw jalt'ayitu, jaqi jiwayirinakan amparaparuw katuyitu." 
Job16:12 Nayax kusisitaw jakaskäyäta, ukhamaruw jupax kunkat katuntitu; jisk'a jisk'a tukjitu, mich'inakapampiw antutjanirakitu." 
Job16:13 Taqi tuqit antutjanitu; jan khuyapt'ayasisaw janchixar chhuqhunuqitu, jiphillanakaxas uraqin jiskhasiskaraki." 
Job16:14 Mayampi mayamp janchixar chhuxriñchjitu, nuwasir ch'aman jaqjamaw nayar jalxatarakitu." 
Job16:15 Llakin phuqhantataw chhankha isinakamp isthapista, p'iqixsa laq'aruw muqintarakta." 
Job16:16 Ajanuxasti jachkäwis p'usuntxituwa; nayraxas juykt'xarakituwa," 
Job16:17 janiw nayan khitir ñanqha lurataxas utjkiti, jupar mayisitaxasti q'umawa." 
Job16:18 Nayar akham jan wali luratax uñjatäñapawa; ¡uraqi, janiy nayan arnaqasitax imantamti!" 
Job16:19 Alaxpachan maynis nayat arsurix utjapunpachawa. 
Job16:20 Dios nayraqatan chuymaxan amtatanakap qhanañchiri, ukhamat jachatanakax jupan uñjañapataki;" 
Job16:21 nayat arxatasis Dios nayraqatan arsuri, kunjämtix mä jaqin nayraqatapan maynit arxatasis arsuski ukhama." 
Job16:22 Juk'a maranakakiw nayan jakañaxatak utjxi, uka maranakasti jank'akiw sarakipawayxi, jan mayampi kuttaniñatak sarañampïsktwa." 
Job17:1 Jan ch'amaniw uñjasxta, jakañaxax tukusiñampïxiwa, jiwañakiw nayar suyt'askitu." 
Job17:2 Naya jak'ansti, jan walt'ayir jaqinakakiw utjaski, jupanakax jan khuyapt'ayasisaw t'aqhisiyapxitu." 
Job17:3 Ukampis jumax, Tatay, nayat arxatasitasmawa, jan jumäkät ukasti, ¿khitirak nayar arxatitaspasti?" 
Job17:4 Jumax jupanakan lup'ïwinakap mayjt'aytawa, janiy jichhax jupanakan nayar atipjañap munamti." 
Job17:5 Khitinakatix kunsa katuqt'asiñ laykuki, jilat masipatak sayt'apki ukanakan wawanakapax manq'at t'aqhisipxani." 
Job17:6 Jumaw taqinirus nayataki jan wali parlaytaxa, ajanutsa thuskatayarakistaxa." 
Job17:7 Nayranakaxas t'aqhiskäwix chhurkt'xituwa; janchixas juk'atakikïxarakiwa. 
Job17:8 Ukanak uñjasinsti, aski jaqinakax muspharataw uñjasipxi; ñanqha lurir jaqinakatakiw q'apisipxaraki." 
Job17:9 Jupanak pachpaw askit uñt'asipxi, jan kuna juch luririw tukupxaraki." 
Job17:10 Jumanaka, taqpachan aksar jutapxam, janiw jumanak taypin mayni yatiñan jaqsa jikxatkäti." 
Job17:11 Jakañ urunakaxax saraki sarawayxi, amtatanakaxasa ina ch'usaruw tukusiwayxaraki." 
Job17:12 Ukampis jumanakax arumarux ururuw tukuyapxtaxa; ¡ch'amakansa: “Qhanäxiwa” sasipkaktawa! 
Job17:13 Jichhasti jiwañak suyxirista, ch'amakanakan liwitattasin ikt'awayxañ suyxarakirista." 
Job17:14 ¡Awkixasa, taykaxasa, jilanakaxasa laq'unakampi sepulturampikïxiwa!" 
Job17:15 ¿Kawkinkarak suyt'añaxasti? ¿Kawkinkarak nayatak suma jakañasti? 
Job17:16 ¿Nayampi chikati ukanakasti jiwañar saraqani, ukhamat mayaki laq'an samarapxañaxataki?" 
Job18:1 ¿Kunapachkamarak ukataqi parlaskakïtasti? Nayraqat sum amuyt'asim, ukat parlasiñäni." 
Job18:2  
Job18:3 ¿Kunatarak nanakar animalanakarjam uñjapxistasti? ¿Kunatarak pisi chuyma jaqinakarjam uñjapxistasti? 
Job18:4 ¿Jumasti amuytati, janchim ukham jurqhinuqasis aka uraqin ch'usa wasarar tukuñapa, jan ukax, qarqanakan yaqha chiqar sartañapsa?" 
Job18:5 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakan jakañapax micha qhanar uñtataw jiwt'awayxi; 
Job18:6 uta qhanar uñtatawa, akatjamat jiwt'awayxi." 
Job18:7 Kayunakapas khathatxakiniwa, pachpa sipitaparuw jalt'arakini." 
Job18:8 Sartataparusti mä qäna uskusini, uka qänamp katuntataw uñjasirakini." 
Job18:9 Kayunakaparusti mä wiskampiw chint'asini, kayu muqunakapasti ñach'antatarakïniwa." 
Job18:10 Sipitasti thakhin imantatäskaniwa, saraskani ukapach jupar katjañataki." 
Job18:11 Taqi tuqit axsarayataw uñjasi; sapa sartäwipan arknaqat amuyasi. 
Job18:12 Ch'amanakapax manq'atjam tukusiwayxi, aynacht'añasti jupxar puriñatakix jank'akiwa." 
Job18:13 Usux janchip juk'at juk'at manq'anti; jiwañasti amparanakampi, kayunakamp manq'suskaraki." 
Job18:14 Samarat jakasiñ utapat waysutaw uñjasi, axsarayir reyin nayraqatapar qatatitaw uñjasi." 
Job18:15 Utaparusti ninampiw wiyantasi; yänakapasti azufrempi ch'axchsutawa. 
Job18:16 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax waña saphini, suwarat layminakani quqamp sasiwa." 
Job18:17 Jan mayampi amtaskañatakiw aka uraqit chhaqtxani, sutipasti janirakiw mayampis aytaskxaniti." 
Job18:18 Qhanat ch'amakar jaqunukutaw uñjasini; akapachat apanukutaw uñjasirakini. 
Job18:19 Markap taypinsti janiw wawanakapax utjkxaniti; utapankirinakas taqiniw jiwarat uñjasipxani. 
Job18:20 Ukham tukusiñap yatipxani ukapachasti, inti jalsu tuqinsa, inti jalanta tuqinsa, axsarañat khathatkiriw uñjasipxani." 
Job18:21 Ñanqha jaqin jakañapax ukhamaw tukusi, Diosar jisk'achir jaqin jakañapas tukusiraki." 
Job19:1 ¿Kunapachkamarak jumanakasti t'aqhisiyapxitäta, arunakamamp chuym usuchjapxitätasti?" 
Job19:2  
Job19:3 Mayampi, mayampi nayar jisk'achjapxistaxa. ¿Janit ukham nayar lurapxatamatsti p'inqasipkta?" 
Job19:4 Juchanïrista ukasa, juchaxax nayxankakispawa." 
Job19:5 Jumanakax nayat sipan juk'amp suma jaqiw tukupxtaxa, aynacht'ataxsti ajanuxaruw qhant'apxistaxa." 
Job19:6 Jichhasti yatipxam, pachpa Diosaw nayarux aynacht'ayitu, jupaw nayarux sipitar jalt'ayarakitu." 
Job19:7 “¡Jiwayañ munapxitu!” sasaw arnaqasta, janiw khitis yäqkituti; yanap mayta, janiw khitis nayarux chiqapar uñjkituti." 
Job19:8 Diosax thakhixsa jist'antxiwa; sarnaqañaxsa ch'amakt'ayxarakiwa. 
Job19:9 Yänakaxsa q'alpun aparasxitu; jach'añchäwinakaxsa apaqxarakituwa. 
Job19:10 Q'ala aynacht'atpun apanukutu; ¡Jan saphin tukjat quqar uñtat lurjawayitu! 
Job19:11 Nayatak q'apisitapax sinti jach'apuniwa, uñisiriparjamaw uñjarakitu." 
Job19:12 Mä ejercitor uñtataw katuntitu, taqi tuqit muyuntataw uñjasta." 
Job19:13 Diosax jilanakaxsa, jaqi masinakaxsa, jayaruw nayat apaqxitu, jupanakampisti jan uñt'ata jaqirjamaw uñjayarakitu." 
Job19:14 Wila masinakaxasa, jilat masinakaxas apanukxituwa; utaxankirinakas armxapxituwa. Nayan uywatanakaxas jaya jaqirjamaw uñjapxitu; jan uñt'iriw tukupxitu." 
Job19:15  
Job19:16 Mayni uywataxar jawsta ukapachasti janiw ist'kxituti, wali achikt'askipansa janiw ist'kxituti." 
Job19:17 Samanaxax warmixar axtasiyiwa; wawanakaxatakis axtaskañakïxtwa. 
Job19:18 Jisk'a wawanakamppachaw jisk'achapxitu; sartasiskta ukkhax jan walinakak nayxat parlapxi. 
Job19:19 Wali munata jilat masinakaxas uñisipxituwa; nayan wali munat masinakamppachaw apanukupxitu. 
Job19:20 Janchixax ch'akhanakaruw lip'katxitu, jan ch'amani, niyas jiwirjamäxaraktwa." 
Job19:21 Jilatanaka jumanakakisay nayat khuyapt'ayasipxita, Diosax q'apisiñapampiw chhuxriñchjitu." 
Job19:22 ¿Kunatarak jumanakasti Diosjam arknaqapxistasti? ¿Janit jakkirpachar nayar chhuxriñchjatanakamamp sist'asipkta? 
Job19:23 ¡Khitikis nayan arunakax qillqaspa, uka arunaksti mä metalaru qillqantat jaytaspa!" 
Job19:24 ¡Khitikis hierro qillqañampi uka arunak plomo metalar qillqantaspa, jan ukax mä qalxarus wiñayatak qillqantarakispa!" 
Job19:25 Nayax Diosaxan jakaskatap yattwa, jupaw aka uraqin nayan arxatirixäni." 
Job19:26 Janchixas jisk'a jisk'a willirtaskpan, nayasti Tatiturux uñkatapunïwa." 
Job19:27 Pachpa nayraxampiw uñkatä, naya kipkaw uñjä, janiw yaqhati uñjkani." 
Job19:28 Parlatanakam ist'asaxa, ch'amaxax thayjtawayituwa. Jumanakax nayar arknaqañak amtasipktaxa, nayax juchanïkirista ukham amuyapxaraktaxa;" 
Job19:29 ukampis wal amuyasipxam, Diosax taqi jiwasanakan taripirisawa; jupax jumanakar taripapkätam ukkhasti, jiwañampiw mutuyapxätam." 
Job20:1 Arunakamampix chuymaxsa mayjt'ayistawa, ukat jichhax jumar sañ munsma." 
Job20:2  
Job20:3 Tuqisitanakamampix jisk'achistawa, ukampis jumar kunjäm arusxatañsa nayax yatiraktwa." 
Job20:4 Jumax ukhampunïtap yattawa, jaqix aka uraqin utjki ukkhatpacha:" 
Job20:5 ñanqha lurir jaqin kusisiñapax juk'atakikiwa; kusist'añapasti jank'a tukusirikirakiwa. 
Job20:6 Uka kusisiñapax alaxpachjam jach'äskpasa, p'iqipas qinayanakkam puriskpan," 
Job20:7 wanur uñtatakiw tukusxani masinakapasti janiw kawkhankatapsa yatipkaniti. 
Job20:8 Samkjamakiw chhaqtawayxani, arum uñjäwir uñtatakiw jaltxani, janipuniw khitis jikxatirjamäkaniti." 
Job20:9 Khitinakatix jupampi jakapkäna, jupar uñjapkarakïna, jupanakasti janiw mayampis uñjkxapxaniti." 
Job20:10 Kuntix jupax jan kunani jaqinakar lunthatkatayna ukxa, wawanakapaw kuttayxani." 
Job20:11 Ch'aman waynpachakiw amay imäwi manqharu mantani. 
Job20:12 Ñanqha lurañax jupatak wali sumjamakiwa, muxsjam mallt'araki;" 
Job20:13 suma muxsapsti lakaparuw mallxäsi, k'achat k'achat mallirt'araki." 
Job20:14 Purakankxi ukapachasti, katarin mich'iparuw tukxaraki." 
Job20:15 Kuna qamir yänaktix manq'antkatayn ukanak kutsuyanxi; Tatituw ukanak purakapat apsuyanxi. 
Job20:16 Katarin mich'ip ch'amuskäna, uka mich'iw jiwayarakini." 
Job20:17 Umjam jalaskir lechempita, misk'impit janiw kusist'kaniti." 
Job20:18 Taqi kuntix jikxatkatayna ukanaksti kuttayxaniwa; janiw uka qamir yänakapat kusist'kaniti. 
Job20:19 Jan kunani jaqinakan ch'amapamp qamiriptasin, jupanakar apanukuwayxatap layku, jupan jan utachat utanak katuntasitap layku." 
Job20:20 Janipuniw kunampis inampst'añ chuymapax sisthapkänti, janirakiw kunas kusist'aykänti;" 
Job20:21 juk'ampsa munaskakïnwa, ukatpï kusisiñapax juk'atakikïnixa." 
Job20:22 Utjir yänakapas jilxataskaniwa, juk'amp llakitaw sarnaqani; ch'amampiw chijinakax jupatak utjarapini." 
Job20:23 Purakap phuqt'asiñ munaskani ukapachaw, Tatitux q'apisiñap jupxar puriyanini." 
Job20:24 Hierrot lurat jiwayañ yänakatsa jaltaskaniwa, broncet lurat mich'inakaruw jalt'ani." 
Job20:25 Antutt'at mich'iw janchip maysat maysa chhuqsuni, ukan k'achipasti k'iwchap chiqaw misturakini. Axsarañampi phuqhantataw uñjasini;" 
Job20:26 axsarkañ ch'amakaw juparux muyuntani. Jan khitin naktayat ninaw jupampir utapampir nakhantani. 
Job20:27 Alaxpachax jupan juchap qhanaruw uñstayani, uraqisti juchañchañatakiw sartasirakini." 
Job20:28 Tatitun q'apisiñapax jupxar purinkan ukapachaxa, qamir yänakapax taqpachaw chhaqtawayxani." 
Job20:29 Tatitux ukanak ñanqha lurir jaqitak wakichi; ukanakaw ñanqha lurir jaqirux suyt'askaraki. 
Job21:1 Nayatakix kusisiñäspaw jumanakatix nayar ist'apxitasma ukaxa. 
Job21:2  
Job21:3 Nayan parlañaxkamax llamp'u chuymampiy ist'apxita, uka qhipat larusiñ munapxäta ukasa, larusisipkäta." 
Job21:4 Nayan arsusitaxax janiw khiti jaqitakïkisa; janiw aliqat arsuskaraktti. 
Job21:5 Jumanakatix ist'apxitätaxa, axsarañatsa amutuw uñjasipxäta." 
Job21:6 Naya pachpaw ukanak lup'isax axsarayasta, janchixas khathatirakiwa." 
Job21:7 ¿Kunatarak ñanqha lurir jaqinakasti jakasipkakisti, chuyman tuqirus ch'aman phuqt'atäsipkarakisti?" 
Job21:8 Wawanakaparusa, allchhinakaparus jilarir uñjasipkaraki; uka wawanakapasa, allchhinakapasa jupa jak'an janiw kunatsa llakisipkiti." 
Job21:9 Janiw kunas jupanakar ñanqt'aykiti, Tatitus janirakiw jupanakar mutuykiti." 
Job21:10 Uywanakapax jupanakatak wal miranti; uywanakapan qallunakapasti janirakiw jiwarkiti. 
Job21:11 Wawanakapasti oveja qallunakjamaw uksa aksa chhukhunaqas sink'usipxi," 
Job21:12 kusisitaw thuqhupxi, t'isktapxaraki arpana, tamboranakana, pinkillunakan phust'asitapampi." 
Job21:13 Wali qamiriw sarnaqawayapxi; jan kuna llakiniw jiwawayxapxaraki. 
Job21:14 Diosarux sapxiwa: “¡Jan parlapxistati, janiw nanakax kamachinakam yatiñ munapkti!" 
Job21:15 ¿Khitirak taqi ch'aman Diosasti jupar luqtaskañasatakisti? ¿Kuna askirak jikxattan jupa nayraqatan killisisasti?” sasa. 
Job21:16 Ukampis ñanqha lurir jaqinakatakix kusisiñanakapax janiw amparapankkiti. ¡Ñanqha lurir jaqinakjam amtañax nayat jayankpan! 
Job21:17 ¿Kunapacharak ñanqha lurir jaqinakast janïräkasin jiwapxisti? ¿Kunapacharak jupanakasti chijinakar puripxisti? ¿Kunapacharak Tatitusti jupanakatak q'apisisin t'aqhisiyisti? 
Job21:18 ¿Kunapacharak jupanakasti tutuka thayampi jichhur uñtat willinukut uñjasipxisti? 
Job21:19 Satarakiwa: “Diosax awkinakapan juchanakapat wawanakaruw t'aqhisiyi” sasa. Ukampis pachpa ñanqha lurir jaqiw t'aqhisiskañapa, juchapatsa phuqhaskañaparaki." 
Job21:20 Jupaw Taqi ch'amani Tatitut mutuyäwip katuqaskañapa. 
Job21:21 Jiwatap qhipatsti, wila masinakapax janiw jupatakix kuna llakïkxisa." 
Job21:22 Ukampisa, ¿khitirak Diosar yatichaspasti?, jupax alaxpachan utjirinakarus juchañchiwa." 
Job21:23 Yaqhipanakax k'uchikiw jiwawayxapxi, ch'amani, kusisita, jan kuna llakini," 
Job21:24 wali k'umara, qamir yänakan phuqt'ataraki." 
Job21:25 Yaqhipanakasti aynacht'atakiw jakasipxi, kusisiñ jan uñt'asakiw jiwawayxapxaraki." 
Job21:26 Ukampisa, amay imäwin mayakïxapxiwa; taqinirus laq'unakaw manq'antxi." 
Job21:27 Nayax jumanakan lup'itanakam yatta, nayar ñanqha lurañ amtatanakamsa amuyaraktwa." 
Job21:28 Jiskt'asipxaraktawa: “¿Kawkinkarak uka ñanqha jaqin utapasti?” sasa. 
Job21:29 ¿Janit thakhi sarir jaqinakar jiskt'asipktasti? ¿Janit jupanakan parlatap ist'apktasti? 
Job21:30 Jupanakax sapxiwa: “Diosax q'apisiñapan mutuyäwi apayani, ukampis ñanqha lurir jaqirux, janiw kunas kamachkiti” sasa." 
Job21:31 Janiw khitis ñanqha luratanakap ajanupar irkatkiti, janiw khitis juchapatjam mutuykarakiti." 
Job21:32 Jiwxi ukapachasti, walja jaqinakaw imäwipar sarapxi jupan nayraqatapa, jupan qhipapa, amay imäwi jak'ansti uñjirinakaw uñjapxi, jupatak uraqi allsuñas jasakirakiwa." 
Job21:33  
Job21:34 ¡Jumanakax inamayaw nayar chuymachañ munasipkistaxa! ¡Jumanakan arsutanakamax k'arikamakiwa! 
Job22:1 Jumax wali yatiñan jaqïskasmawa, ukasti Diosatakix janiw kuna askïkisa." 
Job22:2  
Job22:3 ¿Taqi ch'aman Diosasti kunarak jikxati juman chiqa aski jaqïtamatsti? 
Job22:4 Jumatix chiqpachapun Diosar jaysasmaxa, jupax janiw kunatsa wayt'kiristamti." 
Job22:5 ¡Ukampis jan wali luratanakamax sintipuniwa, juchanakamasti jan jakht'kayawa!" 
Job22:6 Jumaxa, juk'a manunakatsa, isinakap katuntastaxa jan kunan jaqirux q'alalpach apanuktaxa." 
Job22:7 Janiw umat pharjat jaqir uma churktati; manq'at awtjat jaqirusti janiw manq'a churktati. 
Job22:8 ¡Jumax ch'amani, axsarat jaqïyätawa, uraqix jumankkaspas ukham amuyasïyätaxa!" 
Job22:9 Ijma warminakarux uksak khithanukurïtaxa, wajcha wawanakarusti t'aqhisiyirïtawa." 
Job22:10 Ukatpï jichhax jan walt'añax jumar muyunttamxa, akatjamat axsarañampi phuqhantat uñjastaxa," 
Job22:11 ch'amakanakan sarnaqkasmas ukhama, ch'amampi jalir uman jawiras qatatkiristam ukhama." 
Job22:12 Diosax alaxpachankiwa, juk'ampi alayana; juk'amp alayankir warawaranakas kayu takt'äwipankiwa." 
Job22:13 ¿Kamisarak sätasti: “Diosax janiw amuyaskiti, jach'a qinayanakaw taripañatak juparux jan uñjaykiti” sasasti? ¿Kamisarak sätasti: “Diosax janiw uñjkiti, alaxpachan mä thiyat mä thiy saranaqaski” sasasti?" 
Job22:14  
Job22:15 ¿Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax arkapkäna uka ch'amak thakhinjamti jumax arkañ munarakta? 
Job22:16 Jupanakax jank'akiw jiwarxapxi, jawirat phuqharir uman apatjama." 
Job22:17 Jupanakax Diosar sapxänwa: “¡Jan arxayapxistati! ¿Kunarak taqi ch'aman Diosasti jiwasatak luraspasti?” sasa. 
Job22:18 Ukampis Diosaw jupanakan utap taqi suma yänakampi phuqhantäna. ¡Ñanqha lurir jaqinakjam amtañax nayat jayankpan! 
Job22:19 Aski, jan juchani jaqinakax ñanqha lurir jaqinakat larusipxi, jan walt'añankapxatap uñjasax sapxiwa:" 
Job22:20 “¡Ninaw uñisirinakasan qamir yänakap t'unji!” sasa. 
Job22:21 Job, Diosamp sumar mantxam; jupasti wasitat qamiriptayxätam." 
Job22:22 Jupamp yatichayasim, arunakap p'iqimar katuqam." 
Job22:23 Jumatix alt'at chuyman tukxäta, taqi ch'amani Diosar makhatxarakïta, utamatsa uka ñanqhanak apanukxarakïta," 
Job22:24 wali suma qursa, laq'äkaspa ukham uñjarakïta, jawir qalanakäkaspas ukham uñjarakïta ukapachasti," 
Job22:25 taqi ch'aman Diosaw jumatak walja qurimänisa, walja qullqimänisa." 
Job22:26 Jupaw jumar kusisiyätam, taqi iyawsañampiw jupar uñtarakïta." 
Job22:27 Jupax mayisitanakam ist'ätam, jumasti arsutanakam phuqharakïta." 
Job22:28 Taqi luräwinakaman walt'askakïta; qhanasti sarnaqäwiman k'ajani. 
Job22:29 Diosax jach'a jach'a tukurirux jisk'achiwa, alt'at chuymanirusti jach'añcharakiwa." 
Job22:30 Diosax jan juchanirux qhispiyiwa, jumatix jan juchanïksta ukaxa, qhispiyarakïtamwa." 
Job23:1 Nayan arsusitaxax chuyma ust'kayakïskiwa, Tatitux nayar mutuyaskakituwa." 
Job23:2  
Job23:3 ¡Nayax yatikirista kunjämat jupar jikxatañsa, kawkhantix utjaski ukar kunjämat puriñsa!" 
Job23:4 Jupa nayraqatan arsusirista, arsusiñaxasti walipuniw utji." 
Job23:5 ¡Nayasti yatxiristwa kunjäm jupan arsutapar arusxatañsa! 
Job23:6 Jupasti janiw ch'amani kankañapampik atipjkitaspati, jan ukasti ist'itaspawa;" 
Job23:7 nayan arsusitaxan chiqapätap yatispa; nayarusti chiqaparuw uñjitaspa, ¡jan mayampitakiw antutnukxarakitaspa!" 
Job23:8 Ukampis nayax inti jalsu tuqin Diosarux thaqta, janiw jupax ukankkiti; inti jalanta tuqin thaqta, janiw jupar jikxatkti." 
Job23:9 Amsta tuqiruw sarta, janiw jupar uñjkti; aynach tuqiruw kuttanta, janiw jupar uñjkaraktti." 
Job23:10 Jupaw sarnaqäwixa yati; yant'atasti suma qurir uñtat q'umaw mistü. 
Job23:11 Nayax jan maysar saranukusapuniw arkta jupax uñacht'aykitu uka thakhinjama. 
Job23:12 Kamachinakapsa, kamachi arunakapsa phuqhapuntwa, janiw nayan munañaxak luraskti." 
Job23:13 Jupax kuna lurañsa amtasi ukapachasti, uka amtatapxa phuqhapuniwa. Kuntix jupax lurañ munki uk luri." 
Job23:14 Kuntix jupax nayampi lurañ amtki uk lurani, yaqha amtatanakapsa nayampix luraskakiniwa." 
Job23:15 Ukanak lup'ista ukapachasti, jupan nayraqatapar uñstañ axsarayastwa." 
Job23:16 ¡Taqi ch'aman Diosax axsarañat khathatiyitu! 
Job23:17 ¡Arum ch'amakas nayar chhaqtayxitaspa, laxa ch'amakas nayar muyuntxitaspa!" 
Job24:1 ¿Kunatarak taqi ch'aman Diosasti juchañchañatak urunak jan wakt'aykpachasti, ukhamat jupar munasirinakan uñjapxañapatakisti?" 
Job24:2 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax qurpanakap jithiyapxi, ovejanak lunthatapxi, tamanakapar yapt'asiñataki," 
Job24:3 wajchanakatsa, ijma warminakatsa uywanakap aparapxaraki." 
Job24:4 Jan kunan jaqinakarux thakhitsa maysaruw saranukuyapxi, jan yäqat jaqinakasti imantasxapxarakiwa." 
Job24:5 Jan kunan jaqinakasti, wasarankir asnonakar uñtataw wali ch'ama tukusin manq'añap thaqhir mistupxi, wawanakapatakix wasarat manq'añ apsupxaraki." 
Job24:6 Yaqha jaqinakan yapunakapat cebada puyanak apthapisir sarapxi, qhuru jaqinakan uva yapunakapat achunaksa pallasipxi." 
Job24:7 Arumanakasti jan kunampi janxatasiñaniw qhantatipxi, janiw thayan llawuntasiñatak kunapas utjkiti." 
Job24:8 Jallumpiw qullunakan ch'aranjayasipxi; jan jark'aqasiñ utjipansti qarqanakarukiw imantasipxi. 
Job24:9 Ijma warminakat asu wawanakap aparapxi, pisin jakasirinakat qullqi manutsa isinakap lluch'supxi." 
Job24:10 Pisin jakasirinakax q'alalakiw sarnaqxapxi, jaqin trigo yapup apthapkäwisti manq'atjam jiwarasipki." 
Job24:11 Aceite apsuñatak aceitunanak piqapxi, vino apsuñatak uvanak takipxi, ukañkamasti umatjam jiwarasipkaraki." 
Job24:12 Chhuxriñchjata, niyas jiwirpacha, markat jayanakan Tatitun yanapap mayisis wararisipki, ¡ukampis Diosax janiw jupanakan mayisitap ist'kiti!" 
Job24:13 Qhanar uñisir jaqinakaw utji, taqi sarnaqäwipan qhanat jithiqtapxaraki." 
Job24:14 Jaqi jiwayirixa, jan kunanir jiwayirix willjtat sartasi, arumthapirusti lunthataruw tukxi." 
Job24:15 Jaqin warmipampi sarnaqir jaqixa, ch'amakthapiñap suyi, ajanupsti sum imantasiraki: janiw khitis uñjkitaniti, sasa." 
Job24:16 Lunthatax arumaw utanakar manti; urusti janiw mistupkisa; jupanakax qhanar uñisipxiwa. 
Job24:17 Uru qhanasti jupanakatakix arum ch'amakawa; arum ch'amakan jan walinakak lurañ munasipki. 
Job24:18 Ñanqha lurir jaqix umampi apatawa. Uraqinakapas ñanqhachataw uñjasi, janiw khitis uva yapupan irnaqkxiti." 
Job24:19 Lupin junt'upampiw khunux chullutati; juchani jaqix amay imäwiruw chhaqtawayxaraki. 
Job24:20 Pachpa taykapaw jupat armasxani; laq'unakaw jupar manq'antxarakini, janiw khitis jupat mayampi amtaskxaniti. Ñanqha lurir jaqix khuchhunukut quqjamaw tinkuni." 
Job24:21 Jan wawachasiri warminakaru, ijma warminakaruw chhuxriñchjapxi, janipuniw kunapachas ijma warmin askip munapkiti." 
Job24:22 Ukampis Diosax ch'amapampiw munañaninakar tinkuyi; jupax sartasi ukkhasti, janiw khitis jakañapat yatiskiti." 
Job24:23 Diosaw jupanakarux sumak jakayaski, ukampis sapa chillqtatap uñch'ukiski." 
Job24:24 Ñanqha lurir jaqix mä juk'atakikiw sarti, ukampis akatjamat jiwawayxi. Jik'inukut alir uñtataw pharsuwayxi, k'umuptat trigo puyar uñtataw ankuntawayxaraki." 
Job24:25 Ukatix jan ukhamäkchi ukasti, ¿khitirak sitaspa: “Janiw ukhamäkiti” sasasti? ¿Khitirak qhanañcharakitaspa nayan pantjasitaxsti?" 
Job25:1 Diosax ch'amaniwa, axsarkañarakiwa; jupaw alaxpachan sumankañ utjayi." 
Job25:2  
Job25:3 Ejercitonakapax jan jakht'kayawa, qhanapasti taqinxaruw qhant'araki." 
Job25:4 ¡Dios nayraqatanxa, janiw khitis q'umätwa siskaspati!" 
Job25:5 Diosan nayraqatapan janiw phaxsis qhananïkiti, janirakiw warawaranakas k'ajkirïkiti," 
Job25:6 ¡jaqix ukanakat sipan juk'amp jan kunatak askiwa, mä jan yäqkañ laq'umpi sasikiwa!" 
Job26:1 ¡Jumax wali sumsa jan ch'amanirux yanapt'irïtätaxä, wali sumsa ch'amap pist'ayasirirus qhispiyirïtätaxä!" 
Job26:2  
Job26:3 ¡Wali sumsa iwxanaksa churirïtätaxä, pisi amuyunirusa amuyt'ayirïtätasä!" 
Job26:4 ¿Khitirak uka arunak arsuñatak yanaptamsti? ¿Khitirak ukham parlañatak amuyt'aytamsti? 
Job26:5 Jach'a quta manqhan utjir jiwatanakax, uka jach'a quta manqhan axsarañat khathatipxi." 
Job26:6 Janiw khitis Diosat imantaskaspati, janirakiw t'unjir jiwas imantaskaspati." 
Job26:7 Diosax alaxpach jan kunxarukiw janatatäna, akapachsa jan kunxarukiw warkt'arakïna." 
Job26:8 Jupaw umanak qinayar apxäsiraki, qinayanakas janiw uka jathi umampix phallkiti;" 
Job26:9 mä qinayampi imantasaw phaxsina ajanupsa ch'amakt'ayi. 
Job26:10 Qhanampina, ch'amakampin qurpapsti jach'a quta tukuyaruw uskuraki." 
Job26:11 Axsarkañ arunak Diosax arsuni ukapachasti, alaxpach apxäsir qullunakas axsarañat khathatipxi." 
Job26:12 Ch'amapampiw jach'a quta apnaqi; ch'ikhi kankañapampiw Rahab axsarkañ animalarus atipji. 
Job26:13 Samanapampi phust'asakiw alaxpach qinayanaksa chhaqtayi; amparapampiw qatatnaqtir katarirus jiwayaraki. 
Job26:14 Taqi ukanakasti, luräwinakapat mä uñacht'äwikiwa, ist'ktan ukasti, k'achat arxayat arsutakiwa. ¿Khitirak jach'a ch'amampi arsutap amuyt'aspasti?" 
Job27:1 ¡Diosax chuyma ust'ayitu, janiw chiqapar uñjañ munkituti, ukampis sutipxaruw arsta," 
Job27:2  
Job27:3 jupan nayar jakañ churañapkamasti," 
Job27:4 janipuniw k'ari arunak siskäti, janirakiw jan chiqap arunak arskäti!" 
Job27:5 Jakañaxkamax, jan juchanïtaxat arsusiskakipunïwa; ¡janiw jumanakan juchañchatanakamarux jayskäti!" 
Job27:6 Aski kankañanïtaxat arsusiskakipunïwa, janiw kunat p'inqasiñaxas utjkituti." 
Job27:7 ¡Nayar uñisirinakasti, ñanqha lurir jaqinakan puriñapar purpan!" 
Job27:8 ¿Kuna suyt'äwirak juchan jaqitakisti utjaspa, Diosax jakañap apaqxani ukapachasti?" 
Job27:9 Jupax jan walt'añanakan jikxataskani ukapachax, Diosax janiw achikt'asitanakap ist'kaniti." 
Job27:10 Ñanqha lurir jaqix janiw Diosar munaskiti, janiw kunapachas jupar art'askarakiti." 
Job27:11 Nayax Diosan jach'a ch'amap uñacht'ayapxäma, Taqi ch'aman Diosan amtatanakap yatiyapxäma." 
Job27:12 Jumanakatix ukanak yatxapxsta ukasti, ¿kunatarak ukataq luqhi arunak parlapxtasti?" 
Job27:13 Diosax suyt'askiwa ñanqha jaqinakar mutuykani ukapacha; mutuyäwipax akäniwa: 
Job27:14 wawanakapas waljanïskpan, nuwasïwin jiwarxapxani jan ukax, manq'atjam jiwarxapxarakini." 
Job27:15 Jiwañat qhispirinakarusti usunakaw jiwarayani, ijma warminakapasti janiw jupanakat jachapkaniti." 
Job27:16 Ñanqha lurir jaqix laq'ar uñtatsa qullqip qutuchaskpan, isipas walja q'ipinaka utjaskpan;" 
Job27:17 uka isinaksti aski jaqiw isisxani, uka qullqsa aski jaqiw katusxarakini." 
Job27:18 Ñanqha lurir jaqin utapax, jamach'i tapar uñtata t'unjtirikiwa, yapunak uñjirin chhujllapar uñtatakiwa." 
Job27:19 Jupax qamiriw ikintaskani; qhipür willjtasti, jan kunaniw sartxani." 
Job27:20 Axsarañax uru qhanan jupatak purinini, arum ch'amakan jach'a thayax apasxarakini." 
Job27:21 Inti jalsu ch'aman thayaw utapat jaqunukuni; 
Job27:22 jaltañ munaskani ukasa, jan khuyapt'ayasisaw jupatak thayt'anini." 
Job27:23 Ukhamaw ñanqha lurir jaqinax tukusipxani, khuych'ukita, p'inqachjata." 
Job28:1 Qullqimpi, qurimpix qhuyanakat apsutawa, ukanakasti ninampi q'umachatarakiwa." 
Job28:2 Hierrox uraqit apsutawa; cobresti qalanak umatatayasin apsutarakiwa. 
Job28:3 Jaqix ch'amakanak tukusiyi: uraqi manqhanakaruw manti; uka ch'amak manqhin suma qalanak thaqharaki. 
Job28:4 Mä wiskat warkuqtasin uraq manqhanakaruw mantapxi; qarqanak p'iyantapxi, kawki chiqantix jaqis jan sarnaqki uka chiqana, markanakat jayana." 
Job28:5 Uraqix, patxan trigo achuyaski, manqhatsti ninampjam muyuntatawa." 
Job28:6 Ukan zafiro sat suma qalanakax utji, quris laq'ampi kittatarakiwa." 
Job28:7 Janipuniw pakalinakasa, aycha manq'an jamach'inakas uka chiqanak uñjapkiti." 
Job28:8 Jaqi manq'an animalanakas janipuniw uka chiqar takt'apkiti; janirakiw leonanakas uka chiqan aywinaqapkiti. 
Job28:9 Jaqix ch'ullqhi uraqi amparapamp katji, qullunakan saphip tinkuyi." 
Job28:10 Qarqanakansti p'iyanak jist'ji, ukansti wali suma imatanak jikxati." 
Job28:11 Kawkittix jawiranakax sartanki ukakamaw puri, imantat yänaksti qhanaruw apsuraki." 
Job28:12 Ukampisa, ¿kawkitarak yatiñ kankañast jutisti? ¿Kawkhanarak ch'ikhi kankañast utjasisti?" 
Job28:13 Jaqix janiw yatkiti ukanakan wali jila alanïtapxa, janirakiw akapachansa ukanak jikxatkiti." 
Job28:14 Jach'a lamar qutax siwa: “Janiw akankkiti” sasa. Jisk'a qutasti sarakiwa: “Janiw amparaxankkiti” sasa. 
Job28:15 Janiw qurimpi jikxatatäkaspati, janirakiw qullqimpis alatäkaspati." 
Job28:16 Janiw wali suma qurimpis alatäkaspati, janirakiw cornalina, zafiro suma qalanakampis alatäkaspati." 
Job28:17 Cristalat sipana, qurit sipan juk'ampi jila alaniwa; janiw suma quri yänakampis lantitäkaspati." 
Job28:18 Yatiñ kankañax coral suma qalat sipan juk'amp sumawa, perlanakat sipan juk'ampi jila alanirakiwa." 
Job28:19 Etiopiankir crisólito suma qalasa janiw yatiñ kankañampix kikipaskaspati, janirakiw suma q'uma qurimpis alatäkaspati." 
Job28:20 ¿Kawkitarak yatiñ kankañasti jutisti? ¿Kawkinkarak ch'ikhi kankañasti? 
Job28:21 Taqpach jakirinakan uñjatäñat imantasi, alaxpach jamach'inakan uñjatäñat imantasiraki." 
Job28:22 Manqhapachampi, jiwampix sapxiwa: “Nanakax jupat parlirik ist'apxta” sasa." 
Job28:23 Ukampis Diosax yatiñ kankañan thakhip uñjiwa; jupa sapakiw yati kawkhan jikxatañsa. 
Job28:24 Diosax akapach mä thiyat mä thiykam uñji, alaxpachat aynachan utjki taqi ukanaksa uñjarakiwa." 
Job28:25 Kunapachatix Diosax thayar ch'amapa churkäna, umanakan qurpapsa uskkarakïna," 
Job28:26 jalluna puriñapatakis pachanak utt'aykäna, jach'a thayarus thakhipa uñacht'aykarakïn ukapachaxa;" 
Job28:27 yatiñ kankañarux uñjarakïnwa, askïtap yatïna, sum uñakipäna, ukatsti walikiw sarakïnwa." 
Job28:28 Jaqinakarusti Diosax sänwa: “Yatiñ kankañax: Tatitur taqi chuyma jaysañawa; ch'ikhi kankañax: ñanqhat jithiqtañawa” sasa. 
Job29:1 ¡Nayra pachanakanjam sarnaqañar kuttirista, Diosax nayar imkitän uka urunakanjam wasitat jakirista!" 
Job29:2  
Job29:3 ¡Janiw ch'amakax axsaraykïtänti Diosaw qhanapamp sarnaqäwixar qhant'ayaniskïtäna; 
Job29:4 nayax waynaskäyätwa, ch'amanïskarakïyätwa, Diosasti utaxarux munasiñapampiw uñjäna;" 
Job29:5 khä urunakan wawanakaxax naya chikäsipkänwa, taqi ch'aman Diosasti naya jak'axankaskänwa;" 
Job29:6 manq'asiñax chiqansti lechex janiw pist'irïkänti, p'iqixansa q'apkir qullax utjapunirïnwa;" 
Job29:7 markan tantachasïwinakapan jilïrin qunt'asiñaparuw qunt'asirïta. 
Job29:8 Nayar purir uñjasax, waynanakax maysaruw jittapxirïna, chuyman jaqinakasti sayt'asisaw nayar katuqapxirïna." 
Job29:9 Wali aytat jilïr jaqinakas naya ukankipan amukt'apxirïnwa," 
Job29:10 Mark apnaqirinakasti, jisk'atak parlasipxirïna laxranakapas lakanakaparuw lip'kattarakïna." 
Job29:11 Nayar parlir ist'irinakasti, suma arunakampiw nayar jallallt'apxirïna." 
Job29:12 Nayasti ukapachax wajcharusa, pisin jakasir jaqirusa yanapt'apunirïyätwa;" 
Job29:13 ijma warminakampi, jan kunan jaqinakampix yuspagarapxitänwa, yanapataxasti chuymanakap kusisiyirïna." 
Job29:14 Chiqapar uñjañ kankañampipuniw mayninakar uñjirïta; ukham lurañasti nayatakix, isthapiskiristsa ukhamänwa." 
Job29:15 Juykhunakan irpiripäyätwa, kayu muruqatanakan yanapt'iripäyätwa;" 
Job29:16 pist'ata sarnaqirinakan awkipäyätwa, yaqha markat jutir jaqinakan arxatiripäyätwa!" 
Job29:17 Qhuru jaqinakan munañan kankañap tukjtwa, jan wali lurañanakapsa apanukuytwa." 
Job29:18 Nayax säyätwa: “Walja maranakaw jakä, wali chuymaniw pachpa utaxan jiwxarakï." 
Job29:19 Jaliri uma thiyankir quqar uñtatätwa, sullax layminakap arum tuqir sullantki ukhama." 
Job29:20 Nayan aytat kankañaxax nayamp chikaw machaqkipstaskani, janiw ch'amaxas tukuskarakiniti” sasa." 
Job29:21 Taqiniw nayar ist'apxitäna, amukiw iwxa arunakaxsa suyt'apxirïna." 
Job29:22 Janiw khitis arsutaxar kutipaykänti. Arunakaxax chuymanakapar purkirïnwa," 
Job29:23 jupanakasti nayan arunakax wali suyt'apxirïna, lupi urunakan jallux suyt'atäki ukhama." 
Job29:24 Lart'asis jupanakar uñkatkäyät ukkhasti, janis chiqäkasp ukham amuyapxäna, kusisita ajanuxax jupanakar ch'amañchänwa." 
Job29:25 Nayaw jupanakar sarañ thakhip uñacht'ayirïyäta, jupanakan lurañanakapäki ukanaksa sarakïyäta, ejercitop taypinkir reyir uñtataw jupanak taypin jakasïyäta. Llakisit jikxatasipxipansti, nayaw chuymachirïyäta." 
Job30:1 Jichhasti sullka waynanakakiw nayat larusipxitu, uka waynanakan awkinakaparux janiw ovejanakax uñjir anunakamp chikas nayax jaytkirïskäyatti." 
Job30:2 ¿Kunatakis nayax ch'amap muniriskäyätxa? Jupanakax janiw kuna ch'amanïpkänsa 
Job30:3 manq'atjam aynacht'atäpxatap layku, pist'añan jikxatasipxatap layku. Ch'usa wasaran arumanakax, waña saphinakak t'urusipkäna;" 
Job30:4 alinak taypit k'allk'u quranakak jik'iqasipxäna, retaman saphinakapamppach manq'apxäna." 
Job30:5 Taqi jaqinakansa jupanakax uñisitaw sarnaqapxäna, lunthatanakarjam jach'at arnaqañampi arknaqataw uñjasipxäna;" 
Job30:6 qarqa putunakana, q'awanakana, qarqanak taypin jakapxañapäna;" 
Job30:7 alinak taypin wararisa, ch'umi taypin qutuchasisa." 
Job30:8 Jan kunatak aski jaqinakäpxänwa, pachpa uraqipat jaqunukut jaqinakänwa." 
Job30:9 Ukampisa jichhax jupanakaw nayat sawkasipxi, nayxat kunayman sawkasisaw larusipxaraki." 
Job30:10 Axtasisaw nayat jithiqtawayapxi, ajanuxatsa thuskatasipkakituwa." 
Job30:11 Jan yäqata, jisk'achjataw uñjasta, jan axsartañampiw uñjapxitu." 
Job30:12 Jak'axaruw tantacht'asipxi, liwisiyapxituwa, nuwantapxituwa, jiwayañ munapxarakitu." 
Job30:13 Thakhixsa nayar t'unjañatakiw jark'antapxi, janiw khitis jupanakaru jark'irix utjkiti." 
Job30:14 P'iyantat pirqa chiqas jutantapkaspa ukhamaw jach'at warart'asis nayar chhukxatanipxitu. 
Job30:15 Axsarañaw nayar khathatiyitu; nayan jaqi kankañaxax mä thayjamakiw sarawayxi, qamir kankañaxas qinayjamakiw chhaqtawayxi." 
Job30:16 Janiw jakañatak ch'amaxax utjkxituti; llakisiñakiw nayarux katuntxitu. 
Job30:17 Usuñax ch'akhakamaw puritu; arumanakas wal t'aqhisiyarakitu. 
Job30:18 Diosax nayar kunkat katuntitu; ch'amampiw isixa ch'iyanuqaraki. 
Job30:19 Ñiq'iruw liwintitu, laq'äkiristsa, qhilläkiristsa ukhama." 
Job30:20 Dios Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, jumasti janiw ist'kistati; nayraqatamaruw uñstanta, jumasti janiw sumsa uñkatkistati." 
Job30:21 Nayatakisti wali qhuruw tukxtaxa, jan khuyapt'ayasisaw arknaqarakistaxa." 
Job30:22 Thayampiw apayista, jach'a thayampiw thalsuyarakista," 
Job30:23 juman nayar jiwañar apañ munatam yatistwa, taqi jaqin puriñapäki ukaru." 
Job30:24 ¿Janit nayasti pisin jakasir jaqir yanapkatätsti janit aynacht'at uñjasitapat yanapt'katätsti? 
Job30:25 ¿Janit t'aqhisir jaqit jachkatätsti? ¿Janit pist'ayasir jaqit khuyapt'ayaskatätsti? 
Job30:26 Nayax kusisiñ suyt'askäyäta, ukampis t'aqhisiñakiw jutxi; qhanan puriniñap suyt'askäyäta, ukampis ch'amakakiw purinxi." 
Job30:27 Chuymaxax walpun usutu; jan samart'asaw putuqitu, llakisiñ urunakakiw nayarux suyt'askitu." 
Job30:28 Sarnaqäwixax llakisiñakiwa, urpuntat urur uñtatawa; taqinin nayraqatapan yanap mayista." 
Job30:29 Qamaqinakan jilapäkiristsa ukhamätwa, suri jamach'inakan masipäkiristsa ukhamätwa." 
Job30:30 Janchixas ch'iyäraw tukuwayxi, ninjamaw nakharakitu." 
Job30:31 Arpanakana, pinkillunakan phust'asitapasti, nayatakix jachañaru, t'aqhisiñarukiw tukuwayxi." 
Job31:1 Naya pachpaw chuymaxan amtasta, mä tawaqur jan uñch'ukiñataki." 
Job31:2 ¿Kunarak nayast alaxpachankir taqi ch'aman Diosat katuqtsti? 
Job31:3 ¡Ñanqha jucharar jaqir wakt'ki uka t'aqhisiñaki! 
Job31:4 Amuyatax Diosax janis uñjkitaspa ukhama janiraki luräwinakax uñjkaspa ukhamawa. 
Job31:5 Nayax juramentompiw arsta, janipuniw khitirus ñanqha amtañamp kuns lurkti, janiw khitirus sallqjañ amtkaraktti." 
Job31:6 ¡Diosax nayar yant'itpan, ukhamat nayan jan juchanïtax yatirakini!" 
Job31:7 Nayatix chiqa thakhit saranuksta, inampst'añanakampi atipjayasiraksta, jaqin kuna yänakapsa katuntasiraksta," 
Job31:8 ukapachasti, yaqhanak yapuxat manq'pan, ayrusitanakaxsa saphitpach jik'inukupxpan." 
Job31:9 Mä warmimpitix sallqjayastxa, jan ukax, uta jak'ankir masixan warmipar uñch'ukiskaraksta ukasti," 
Job31:10 warmixax yaqha jaqin uywatapar tukpan, jan uñt'at jaqinakarak warmixampix ikintpan." 
Job31:11 Uka luräwinakax jach'a p'inqäspawa; mutuñ katuqañas wakisirakispawa. 
Job31:12 Tukjir ninar uñtatäspawa, ukhamarakiw taqi kunaxsa tukjaspa." 
Job31:13 Uywatanakaxatix kunsa mayipkitän ukapachaxa, nayax mayitanakapar ist'apunïyätwa." 
Job31:14 Jan ukasti, ¿kunjämatsa nayax Diosan nayraqatapar uñstiristxa? Jupatix lurataxat jiskt'itaspa ukapachasti, ¿kamsasarak arsusiriststi?" 
Job31:15 Pachpa Diosakiw taykasan purakapan irnuqasistu, jupanakarusa, nayarus jupakiw jakañ churarakistu." 
Job31:16 Jan kunan jaqirux pist'ayasiñapan yanapt'apunïyätwa, janirakiw ijma warminakan manq'at awtjat sarnaqañapsa munkäyätti." 
Job31:17 Janipuniw naya sapaki manq'ataxax utjkiti wajchar manq'a jan waxt'asa. 
Job31:18 Awkipäkiristsa ukhampun wajcharux uñjäyäta, ijma warminakan arxatiripapunïyätwa." 
Job31:19 Kunapachatix maynix jan isin uñjasïnxa, jan ukax, jan kunan jaqix kunampi janxatasiñapas jan utjkän ukapachasti," 
Job31:20 ovejanakaxan t'awrapat isi lurasin churirïyäta, jupasti walpun nayar yuspagart'irïna." 
Job31:21 Janipuniw kunapachas taripirinakamp sumankataxat wajcharux axsarayirïkti. 
Job31:22 Uka arunakatix jan chiqäkchi ukaxa, amparanakaxax p'akirtitpan, kallachitsa jalaqtarakitpan." 
Job31:23 Nayax Diosan mutuyäwip axsarayätwa; ¡Janiw ch'aman kankañaparus ch'urkhiskiriskäyätti! 
Job31:24 Janipuniw qamir kankañar alkatasis sarnaqkäyätti. 
Job31:25 Janipuniw walja qamir yänakäniñax kusisiñaxäkänti, jan ukax walja qullqi jikxatañasa." 
Job31:26 Intin k'ajatap uñjta, phaxsin suma qhanapamp saraskir uñjarakta," 
Job31:27 ukampis janipuniw ukanakarux jamasansa qhanansa yupaychkti. 
Job31:28 Uka lurañax mutuñ katuqañatakïsapänwa, ¡alaxpachankir Diosar jan uñt'ir tukuñäsapänwa!" 
Job31:29 Janipuniw uñisirixan aynacht'atapat kusiskäyätti, jan walt'añ jupar puritapatsa kusiskäyätti." 
Job31:30 Janipuniw uñisirixarux ñanqhachkäyätti, janirakiw jiwañapsa munkäyätti." 
Job31:31 Nayamp chika utjirinakatix jaya markat jutirinakar jan walinak lurañ munapxäna ukapachasti," 
Job31:32 nayax janipuniw uka jaqirux anqar ikiyirïkti. Thakhi saririnakarux utaxarupuniw katuqirïyäta. 
Job31:33 Janipuniw mayninakjamax jucha luratanakax imantkäyätti, janirakiw chuymaxarus imt'askäyätti," 
Job31:34 jaqinakar axsaratax layku. Janipuniw wila masinakaxamp jan jisk'achayasiñ laykux kunapachas ukanakxa jamasar imxäskäyätti. 
Job31:35 ¡Khitikis nayar ist'itaspa! Arsutaxsti, sutixamp qillqantasaw “Ukhamaw” sarakta; jichhasti, ¡taqi ch'amani Diosax sitpan! Nayar juchañchañanaksti qillqasin arsunipxpan," 
Job31:36 ukanaksti taqi chuymaw katuqä, mä pillükaspas ukham uchasirakï." 
Job31:37 Nayax taqi lurataxat Diosar katuyä, jan kuna axsarasaw jupa nayraqatarux jak'achasï." 
Job31:38 Uraqinakaxax janiw nayatak arnaqasis alaxpachar mayipkiti, janirakiw sukanakapas llakisiñat jachapkiti." 
Job31:39 Ukampis maynirutix achunakap nayax lunthatsta, jan ukax, irnaqirinakar t'aqhisiysta ukaxa," 
Job31:40 ¡uraqinakaxan trigo lantix ch'aphinak achpan, cebada lantis quranakarak jilantpan! Uka arunakampiw Job chachax arsusiñap tukuyäna." 
Job32:1 Uka kimsa jaqinakasti, Job chachar jan juchan aski jaqïtap arsusiri ist'asinxa, janiw jupamp parlañ munkxapxänti." 
Job32:2 Ukat mayni jaqix Elihú sutini, Buz markankiri, Ram chachat saraqir Baraquel jaqin yuqapax Job chachatak mayjt'asïna, Job chachan ukhama jan juchanïtap amuyasitapata, Diosar juchañchatap ist'asina." 
Job32:3 Job chachan kimsa masinakapatakis mayjt'asirakïnwa, Job chachar jan suma arusxatasin Diosaruw jan wal uñjayapxatayna." 
Job32:4 Elihú chachax taqinit sipan juk'amp waynakïnwa, ukat suyt'äna mayninakan Job chachampi parlañ tukuyañapkama;" 
Job32:5 ukampisa, jupanakan Job chacharu jan suma arunakampi arusxatirjamäpxatap uñjasasti walpun q'apisïna, janiw amukt'irjamäkxänti" 
Job32:6 ukat parlañ qalltäna: Nayax sullkäsktwa, jumanakasti chuyman jaqinakäpxaraktawa; ukat nayax kun arsuñsa axsaräyäta." 
Job32:7 Chuymaxan säyätwa: “Jila mara sarnaqäwini jaqinak parlpan; walja marani jaqinakax yatiñ kankañap uñacht'ayapxpan” sasa. 
Job32:8 Mä tuqitsti taqi jaqiw amuyt'a kankañani, taqi ch'aman Diosaw taqinir amuyt'a churaraki." 
Job32:9 Walja maranak jakañax janiw khitirus yatiñ kankañan tukuykiti, jaqix qawqhas sunkhanïskpan, janiw ukax suma amuyt'a churkapunirakispati." 
Job32:10 Ukat sarakta: “Jichhax nayar ist'apxitpan, nayan kuna arst'añaxas utjarakituwa” sasa." 
Job32:11 Nayax jumanakan arsutanakam amukiw ist'askta, wali suma amuyt'a arunak thaqhirsa uñjapxaraksmawa," 
Job32:12 janiw jumanakat maynisa Job chachan amuyt'äwipar wakiskir arunakampi arusxatirjamäpktati. 
Job32:13 Jumanakan wali yatiñanjam jan tukusipkañamatakisti, janiw mä jaqiti, jan ukasti Diosaw juparux suma arunak churani." 
Job32:14 Ukampis, janiw Job chachati nayarux maykitu, janirakiw nayax jupar jumanakjam parlkäti." 
Job32:15 Job, aka kimsa jaqinakax pantjasipxiwa, janirakiw jupanakan kuna arunakas arusxatañatakix utjkiti;" 
Job32:16 ukampis jan jumax amuyamti jupanakan jan aruni uñjasipxatap layku nayan amukt'añaxa. 
Job32:17 Nayan arsuñaxax utjarakituwa, kunatix sañaxäki uk sarakï." 
Job32:18 Parlañaxax waliw utji, janiw amukt'irjamäkxti;" 
Job32:19 vino imañ machaq wayaqar uñtat phallirjamätwa. 
Job32:20 Chuymaxat mistuñapatakiw arsü; amuyumar arusxatañatakiw lakax jist'arä. 
Job32:21 Janiw khitirus arsutaxamp sumachkäti; taqinirus khuskhak uñjarakï. 
Job32:22 Nayax janiw khitirus sumachañ yatkti; ¡khitir sumachirista ukapachaxa, alaxpach Diosax mutuyitaspawa!" 
Job33:1 Ukhamasti, Job, arunakax ist'ita, arsutanakaxar amuyump isch'ukim." 
Job33:2 Lakaxankxiw jumar sañaxa: 
Job33:3 Taqi chuymaw jumar sarakïma, nayan amuyt'a arunak qhan sarakïma." 
Job33:4 Taqi ch'aman Diosaw nayarux irnuqitu, ajayupampiw jakañ churarakitu." 
Job33:5 Wakischi ukax, arsusim; arsusiñatak wakichasim." 
Job33:6 Jumampi, nayampix Diosan nayraqatapan mayakïtanwa; nayas ñiq'ita luratakirakïtwa." 
Job33:7 Ukhamax janiw kunat axsarañamas utjañapäkiti, janiw nayax jumat sipan juk'amp yatiñanïkti." 
Job33:8 Jumarux ist'asamachaksmawa, akham siri:" 
Job33:9 “Nayax q'umätwa, janiw juchanïkti, janiw pantjasitaxasa, juchaxas utjkituti." 
Job33:10 Ukampis Diosax kunat juchañchañsa thaqhapuniwa, mä uñisiriparjamaw uñjarakitu;" 
Job33:11 kayunakaxarusti cadenampiw ñach'antitu, sapa chillqtäwixa uñch'ukirakitu” sasa." 
Job33:12 Amuyam, janiw uka arsutamax chiqapäkiti, Diosax jaqinakat sipan juk'amp jach'awa." 
Job33:13 ¿Kunatarak Diosatak arsustasti? ¿Arsusitanakamar jan jaysatapatti ukham parlta? 
Job33:14 Diosax kunayman tuqit jiwasarux parlistu, jiwasasti janiw amuyasktanti." 
Job33:15 Yaqhip pachanakax arumanakaw parlistu, mä samka tuqi, jan ukax mä unañchäwi tuqi, jaqinakax ikimpi atipjayasipki ukapacha." 
Job33:16 Diosax jinchu jak'atak jaqinakarux parli; arsutanakapampi iwxt'asax axsarayiwa," 
Job33:17 jan wali luräwinakat jithiqtañapataki, jach'a jach'a tukuñat jithiqtañapataki." 
Job33:18 Ukhamat jupax sepulturar puriñat qhispiyi, jiwañatsa qhispiyaraki." 
Job33:19 Yaqhip kutinakax Diosax usuñanakampiw jaqirux chiqachi, janchiparus wali usuyasaraki." 
Job33:20 Manq'añanakax qawqhasa sumäskpan, jan manq'kañaw tukurapxi." 
Job33:21 Janchipas q'alaw tukusiwayxi, ch'akhanakapas uñstxarakiwa." 
Job33:22 Jakañapax amay imäwiruw jak'achasiski, jiwañana punkupankarakiwa." 
Job33:23 Ukampis jupa jak'antix mä angelax utjchi, waranqat maynikis jupat arxatasis parlpan, chiqa aski jaqïtapat arsurakpan;" 
Job33:24 jupat khuyapt'ayasisarak Diosar sarakpan: “Jiwañat qhispiyam, qhispiyasiñap jikxatta” sasa." 
Job33:25 Ukapachaw janchipax wasitat k'umar uñjasxani, ukatsti wayna urunakaparuw kutjtani." 
Job33:26 Diosaruw mayisini, jupasti ist'arakiniwa; kusisiñampiw Diosarux ajanuy ajanu uñkatani, jaqinakarusti Diosan khuyapayasiñapat q'uchuni." 
Job33:27 Sarakiniwa: “Juchachastwa, kunatix jan chiqapäki ukanak lurta, ukampis Diosax janiw mutuyañ munkituti;" 
Job33:28 ukat sipana, nayarux jiwañat qhispiyitu, qhansa uñjaskaraktwa” sasa." 
Job33:29 Diosax jaqirux ukham uñji, mayampi, mayampi ukham uñji;" 
Job33:30 jiwañat qhispiyi, qhansa uñjayaskarakiwa." 
Job33:31 Job, jichhax amuyump ist'ita; arsutanakaxar amuk isch'ukim." 
Job33:32 Kuna arsusiñam utjipansa, arsuskakita; arsusitamatix chiqapäni ukapachax, taqi chuymaw iyawsäma;" 
Job33:33 janitix chiqapäkchi ukapachasti, amuki ist'ita, nayaw jumarux yatiñ kankañat yatichäma." 
Job34:1 Jumanaka, yatiñan ch'ikhi jaqinaka, arunakax ist'apxita." 
Job34:2  
Job34:3 Jinchux arunak ist'asin amuyiwa, kunjämtix lakax manq'a mallt'ki ukhama." 
Job34:4 Ukhamarakiy jiwasax aka luräwi purapat amuykipapxañäni, ukatsti kunjämarus uñjañäspa uk amtarakiñäni." 
Job34:5 Job chachax sistuwa: “Nayax janiw juchanïkti, ukampis Diosax janiw chiqapar uñjañ munkituti;" 
Job34:6 nayax aski jaqïtwa, ukampis k'arisir jaqjamätwa; janiw kuna juchsa lurkti, ukampis Diosax walpun janchixar chhuxriñchjitu” sasa." 
Job34:7 ¡Janiw khitis Job chachjamax utjkiti! Umsa umt'kaspa ukham Diosat sawkasi; 
Job34:8 jupatakix ñanqha jaqinakamp chikachasiñasa, jan wali jaqinakamp chik sarnaqañas sumawa." 
Job34:9 Jupax siwa: “Janiw jaqitakix kuna askis utjkiti, Diosar axsartas sarnaqasaxa” sasa." 
Job34:10 Wali amuyt'an jaqinaka, ist'apxita: ¡Taqi ch'aman Diosax janiw kuna jan walsa lurkaspati, janirakiw kunatix jan chiqapäki uksa lurkaspati!" 
Job34:11 Jupax sapaqat jaqirus irnaqatapatjam churi; jaqin sarnaqataparjamaw uñjaraki. 
Job34:12 Chiqpachansa taqi ch'amani Diosaxa, janiw kuna ñanqhsa lurkiti, janirakiw jan chiqapäki uksa lurkiti," 
Job34:13 taqi aka uraqpacha apnaqañatakix janiw khititsa ch'ama katuqkarakiti. 
Job34:14 Jupatix jaqinakat jakañ samanap apaqaspaxa, taqiniw jupanakax jiwarapxaspa, taqiniw laq'ar kuttapxarakispa." 
Job34:15  
Job34:16 Job, jumatix amuyt'asirïsta ukaxa, ist'ita; arsutanakaxar amuyump ist'am." 
Job34:17 Diosatix chiqa kankañar uñisispaxa, janiw akapach apnaqkaspati. ¿Kunjämaraki juchañchasmasti khititix q'umansa q'umapäki ukarusti?" 
Job34:18 Reyinakampi, jilïrinakampitix qhurüpxchixa, Diosax janiw ajanupar irkatañ axsarkiti." 
Job34:19 Jupax janiw marka apnaqirinakat arxataskiti, janirakiw qamirinakarus jan kunaninakat sipan juk'amp khuyapayaskiti, jupaw taqpachanir irnuqasistu." 
Job34:20 Jaqinakax akatjamatak mä arum jiwt'awayxapxi; jaqix uxtiwa ukatsti chhaqtawayxarakiwa; munañan jaqisti jan kunaki jaqunukutawa. 
Job34:21 Diosax jaqin luräwip uñch'ukiski; taqi sarnaqäwip yatiskaraki. 
Job34:22 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax janiw sinti ch'amak arumansa imantasipkaspati. 
Job34:23 Diosax jaqitak janiw mä uru wakt'aykiti jupa nayraqatapar uñstañapatakixa. 
Job34:24 Janiw kuna yatxatañanakarus uchaskiti ch'aman jaqinakar jaquqañatakixa, ukat yaqhanakar jupa lanti uchañatakisa." 
Job34:25 Diosax jupanakan luräwip yatiwa, mä arumakiw jupanakar t'unji." 
Job34:26 Jaqi jiwayir jaqinakarjamaw taqinin uñjkat jupanakar mutuyi," 
Job34:27 jupar jaysañ jan munapxatap layku, arunakaparjam sarnaqañsa jan munapxatap layku." 
Job34:28 Jupanakax jan yäqat jaqinakaruw t'aqhisiyapxäna, wararitanakapax Diosan nayraqatapkamaw purïna, ukat jupax jupanakar ist'äna." 
Job34:29 Diosatix amukïspa ukasti, ¿khitirak juchañchaspasti? Jupatix ajanup imantasispa ukasti, ¿khitirak uñjaspasti? Jupaw markanakarusa, jaqinakarus uñch'ukiski," 
Job34:30 ñanqha lurir jaqinakan markar jan apnaqañapataki, markar jan sallqjañapataki." 
Job34:31 Juchanïtamsa uñt'askäta ukasa," 
Job34:32 ukatsti jan juk'ampi jucha lurañatak arsuskäta ukasa," 
Job34:33 Diosax janiw jumarux walikiw siskätamti. Jumaw juparux apanuktaxa, janiw nayati jumat arskäxa, ukhamasti, kuntix jumax lup'kta uk sapxita." 
Job34:34 Yatiñan jaqinakax sapxitpan, jumanaka, amuyt'an jaqinakasti ist'apxitpan:" 
Job34:35 “Job chachax jan amuyt'asisakiw parli; arunakapax jan amuyumpi arsut arunakawa. 
Job34:36 ¡Job chachat suma yatxataspan, arsusitanakapax qhuru jaqin arunakapjamawa!" 
Job34:37 Job chachax janiw juchakti lurkixa, jan ukasti Diosaruw saykati; jiwasan nayraqatasanpach Diosat sawkasi, Diosampis jaychasirakiwa” sasa." 
Job35:1 Job, ¿Diosatak arsutaxax walikïskiwa satamasti, amuyatamat chiqap amuyukïskiti?" 
Job35:2  
Job35:3 Jumax Diosarux sistawa: “Nayatix jucha lursta ukasti, ¿kunansa jucha lurataxax jan walt'aytamxa?” sasa." 
Job35:4 Jichhasti nayaw sarakïma, jumarusa, masinakamarusa." 
Job35:5 Alaxpach uñtam, sum amuyarakim; qinayanakax jumat sipan juk'amp alayankiwa." 
Job35:6 Jumatix jucha lurstaxa, ukax janiw Diosarux kuna ñanqhsa lurkiti; qawqhas jach'a juchanak luraskam, janiw juparux kunsa kamächktati." 
Job35:7 Jumatix askinak lursta ukasti, janiw juparux kuna asksa lurktati" 
Job35:8 Juman jucha luratamax jaqi masimaruw ñanqhachi, aski luratanakamasti jaqi masimatak askirakiwa." 
Job35:9 T'aqhisiyat uñjasisaw jaqinakax yanap mayisipxi; munañan jaqinakat qhispitäñ thaqhapxaraki; 
Job35:10 ukampis janiw jupanakar irnuqir Diosarux thaqtapkiti, t'aqhisiñan ch'ama churir Diosaru;" 
Job35:11 jiwasar animalanak tuqi amuyt'ayiri, jiwasar jamach'inak tuqi yatichir Diosaru." 
Job35:12 Wararisipkiwa, ukampis Diosax janiw jupanakar ist'kiti, jupanakan qhuru, jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakäpxatap layku." 
Job35:13 Taqi ch'aman Diosax janiw k'ari arunakarux ist'kiti. 
Job35:14 Jumax “Janiw Diosarux uñjkti” saskamsa, uka arsutamax jupa nayraqatankiwa jupar suyt'am, jupaw jumar uñjätam." 
Job35:15 Saraktawa: “Jupax janiw phiñaskiti, janirakiw mutuykisa, jucharus janiw ukakam uñjkiti” sasa." 
Job35:16 ¡Job, jumax jan parlañ parlasktaxa, sintpun parltaxa, jan amuyt'asisaw taqi kuns arstaxa!" 
Job36:1 Llamp'u chuymamp suyt'ita, ukat yatichäma, Diosat arxatasis arsuñaxax utjaskakipuniwa." 
Job36:2  
Job36:3 Nayar irnuqasir Diosax chiqaparuw uñji; nayan taqi yatiñ kankañaxax jupat juti, uksti uñacht'ayämawa." 
Job36:4 Janiw kuna k'ari arunaksa jumar siskämati, juma nayraqatansti wali yatiñan jaqiw sayt'atäski." 
Job36:5 Diosax ch'amaniwa, yatiñ kankañapax jach'awa, janiw khiti jaqirus jisk'achkiti." 
Job36:6 Jan yäqat jaqinakarux chiqaparuw uñji; ukampis ñanqha lurir jaqirux janiw jakañap pampachkiti. 
Job36:7 Aski jaqinakarux arxatapuniwa; reyinakampi chikaw qunuñapar qunt'ayi, jach'ar aptataw uñjasipxi." 
Job36:8 Llakitanakarusa, jan ukax carcelar jist'antat uñjasirinakarusa," 
Job36:9 Diosaw jupanakarux juchap uñacht'ayaski, jach'a jach'a tukuñampi atipjayasipxatapata." 
Job36:10 Jupanakan chiqachasiñapatakiw parli, ñanqha luräwinakap apanukupxañapatakiw mayiraki." 
Job36:11 Jupanakatix Diosar ist'apxani, jaysapxarakini, kusisita, askimp phuqt'ataw sapür sarnaqapxani." 
Job36:12 Janitix Diosar jaysapkani ukasti, jiwax jupanakan jan amuykataw purinini." 
Job36:13 Jucharar jaqinakax ñanqhasirinakawa, katuntatäkasas janiw yanap mayipkiti." 
Job36:14 Waynpachaw jiwarapxi; mä p'inqaw tukusiwayxapxaraki. 
Job36:15 Diosasti t'aqhisirirux t'aqhisiñ tuqi qhispiyi; jaqirux llakisiñ tuqi amuyt'ayaraki. 
Job36:16 Jumarusti jan walt'añanakat qhispiyaraktam, taqi kunan phuqt'ata, suman sarnaqasiñ churtam; manq'añamsa jilarkir churaraktam." 
Job36:17 Jumanwa ñanqha lurir jaqin juchañchäwipax phuqhasi, taripatäñampita, juchañchatäñampit janiw qhispkasmati." 
Job36:18 Amuyasim, qamir yänakamp jan sallqjayasimti, qullqi chilltayasiñamp jan atipjayasimti." 
Job36:19 T'aqhisiñan ukanakax inamayakïniwa, wararitamasa, ch'amamasa." 
Job36:20 Aruma puriniñap jan suyamti, arum ch'amakax janiw jumar imantkätamti." 
Job36:21 Ñanqha lurañar kuttañat wal amuyasim, ukat jumax t'aqhisiñampi yant'at uñjastaxa." 
Job36:22 Diosan jach'a ch'amap uñtam; janiw jupjam khiti yatichiris utjkiti. 
Job36:23 Janiw khitis kunatix lurañapäki uk siskaspati, janirakiw khitis ajanupar jan wali luratapsa qhant'kaspati." 
Job36:24 Taqi jaqiw jupan luräwinakap jach'añchi; jumasa luräwinakap jach'añchañat amtasirakim. 
Job36:25 Taqi jaqinakaw luratanakap uñjaspa, jayatpachsa uñjarakispa."
