Job36:26 Diosax jach'a kankañaniwa, janiw amuyt'irjamäktanti, janirakiw qawqha maranïtapsa yatksnati." 
Job36:27 Jupax mayawjaruw uma ch'aqanak apthapi, uka uma ch'aqanaksti jalluruw tukuyi." 
Job36:28 Jallux qinayanakat waraqtani, ukatsti akapacharuw purintaraki." 
Job36:29 ¿Khitirak qinayanakan kunat unxtatapsa, qhixu qhixunakan kunat alaxpachan qhixuqitapsa amuyt'aspasti?" 
Job36:30 Diosaw lliju llijunak jach'a qutxar saratatayi, ukatsti uka jach'a quta manqharuw chhaqhayaraki." 
Job36:31 Diosaw markanakarux apnaqi, manq'añsa jilarkir churaraki." 
Job36:32 Jupaw lliju llijurus amparapar katxäsi, kawkharutix puriñapäki ukawjaruw antutnuku." 
Job36:33 Qhixu qhixux Diosan utjatap yatiyaski, jach'a thayasti jupan q'apisitap qhanañchaskaraki." 
Job37:1 Jach'a thaya uñjasax chuymaxax putuqiwa, chuymax mistuñ munxarakitu." 
Job37:2 Diosan jach'a ch'amampi arsutap ist'apxam, lakapat mistki uka jach'a arupa." 
Job37:3 Jupaw lliju llijunak alaxpachan saratatayi, uraqinsti mä thiyat mä thiykam ukanak puriyaraki." 
Job37:4 Uka qhipatsti mä jach'a qhixu qhixuw ist'asi, jupax jach'a arupa arski ukkhaxa; uka qhixu qhixunakan ist'asiñapkamasti, lliju llijunakax janiw sayt'kiti." 
Job37:5 Diosax arunakap ist'asiyki ukapachasti, jach'a muspharkañanakaw lurasi; jan khitinsa amuyt'kaya jach'a luräwinakaw utjaraki." 
Job37:6 Khunurux uraqxar puriniñapatakiw arsu, jallurusti ch'amampiw purxatayaniraki." 
Job37:7 Jaqinakarusti utanakaparuw qhiparayi, ukhamat taqinis amuyapxañapataki, jupan taqi ukanak luraskatapa." 
Job37:8 Animalanakax putunakaparuw mantxi, ukaruw imantasxapxaraki." 
Job37:9 Jach'a tutukax aynach tuqit juti, amsta tuqitsti wali thayaw jutaraki." 
Job37:10 Diosan phust'atapampiw umax chhullunkt'i, walja umanakas luxuntaraki." 
Job37:11 Jupaw qinayanakarux umampi phuqhanti, uka qinayanakat qhixu qhixunaksa mistuyaniraki;" 
Job37:12 qhixu qhixunakasti q'iwi q'iwiw alaxpachanjam sari, taqi aka uraqpachar phuqhantasa, Diosan arsutanakaparjam phuqhasa." 
Job37:13 Diosax taqi ukanakxa akapachar t'aqhisiyañatakiw utjayi, jan ukax, khuyapayasiñap uñacht'ayañatakiraki." 
Job37:14 Job, jumax llamp'u chuymamp ist'am. Diosan muspharkañ luräwinakap amuyt'am." 
Job37:15 Jumax yattati ¿kunjämsa Diosax taqi ukanak luri, kunjämsa lliju llijunakas qinayan llijtkaraki ukxa?" 
Job37:16 Jumax yattati, ¿kunjämsa qinayanakax alaxan tuynaqapxi, ukax Diosan aski luräwipätapxa?" 
Job37:17 Aynach thayax uraqir samarayki ukkhax, jumax isimamp isintatax junt'jata jikxatastaxa." 
Job37:18 ¿Jumax Diosar yanapt'asmati alaxpach janatatañanxa, metalar uñtat ch'ullqhi tukuyañsa?" 
Job37:19 Kuntix Diosar sapkä uk yatichapxita, janiw kuns yatipkti, janiw kuna arsuñas utjapkituti." 
Job37:20 Nayax janiw kun arsuñsa munkiristti, ukasti t'unjayasiñsa munkirista ukhamäspawa." 
Job37:21 Janiw intin qhanapax uñjañjamäkiti, qinayanakax imantki ukapachaxa; ukampisa thayt'anki ukapachasti, alaxpachax q'aljtawayxiwa." 
Job37:22 Quri lliphipirinakaw amsta tuqit uñstani, Diosax jach'a kankañapamp muyuntayaski ukapachaxa." 
Job37:23 Taqi ch'aman Diosax jan amuyt'kayawa, jupax jach'a ch'amani chiqaparakiwa; chiqapar uñjañ kankañapax jach'awa, janiw khitirus t'aqhisiykiti." 
Job37:24 Ukat jaqinakax jupatak axsartapxi; yatiñan jaqinakax janiw jupatakix kunäpkisa. 
Job38:1 Tatitusti Job chacharux mä jach'a thaya taypitpach parlanïna: 
Job38:2 ¿Khitïtas jumax nayan yatiñ kankañaxat pächasiri, pachpa arunakamamp jan yatitamsa uñacht'ayañatakixa?" 
Job38:3 Jichhax jan axsarirïtam uñacht'ayita, aka jiskt'anakar arusxatarakita." 
Job38:4 Nayax aka uraqi utt'aykäyäta ukapachasti ¿kawkinkarakïyätasti? ¡Jumatix chiqpacha sum yatsta ukapachax sitaya! 
Job38:5 ¿Khitirak aka uraqin ukch'äñapatak arsusti, khitis aka uraqi ukham lurixa?" 
Job38:6 ¿Kunxar utt'ayatas taqpach uraqixa? ¿Khitis thurxäsir qala uchantixa? 
Job38:7 ¡Jumax janiw ukankkäyätati, qhanjtanir warawaranakan q'uchuñapkama, alaxpacha angelanakaxan kusisiñapkamaxa!" 
Job38:8 Jach'a qutax uraqi manqhat mistunkän ukapachax, ¿khitis uka umanak jark'añatak punkunak uchantixa?" 
Job38:9 Nayaw ukarux mä isimpjam qinayanak muyuntayta, wawa isimpjamaw urpumpi llawuntarakta." 
Job38:10 Nayaw jach'a qutarux qurpa uskta, punkunakapsa jist'añampiw jist'antarakta." 
Job38:11 Ukatsti qutarux saraktwa: “Akakamakiw purinïta, ukat khursarusti janiw makhatätati; akkharuw jach'a mathapinakamas t'unasirakini” sasa." 
Job38:12 Jan ukax ¿kunapachach jumax uru qhanjtaytaxa, intirusa mistuniñapatak mayiraktaxa?" 
Job38:13 ¿Kunapachach jakañaman aka uraqir sista, ñanqha lurir jaqinakar jaqunukuñapatakixa?" 
Job38:14 Kunapachatix machaq urun qhanapax, qullu qhipäxanakat uñstaniwayi ukapachasti;" 
Job38:15 ñanqha lurir jaqinakax janiw urun qhanapamp walt'asipkiti; ukapachaw ch'aman kankañapax tukusiwayxi. 
Job38:16 ¿Jumax jach'a quta manqhanakkam manttati, kawkhattix jach'a qutanakax sartanki uk uñjtati?" 
Job38:17 ¿Kawkhankis axsarkay jiwañan punkupaxa, uk yattati?" 
Job38:18 ¿Aka uraqin jach'ätapsa amuytati? ¡Chiqpachan taqi kun yatsta ukax, sitaya!" 
Job38:19 ¿Kawkin imatäskis qhanampi, ch'amakanakampixa?" 
Job38:20 ¿Jumasti ukanakar mä thiyakam puriyañ yattati, ukat utjäwipar kuttayaniñsa?" 
Job38:21 ¡Walja maranakanïxatam laykux jumax yatpachätawa, uka pachatakix niy yurpachätawa!" 
Job38:22 ¿Jumax purtati kawkharutix nayax khunumpi, chhijchhimp imkta uk uñjirixa?" 
Job38:23 Nayaw llaki pachanakatak taqi ukanak imta, jan walt'añ urunakan apayaniñataki, ch'axwäwi urunakan apayaniñatakisa." 
Job38:24 ¿Qhixu qhixunakan kawsaru saratapsa yattati? ¿Inti jalsu thayan uraqir kunjäm thayt'atapsa yattati? 
Job38:25 ¿Khitin jallu purxatayatapsa, jach'a thayarus thakhip uñacht'ayatap yattati?;" 
Job38:26 ¿Khitin wasar uraqin jallu puriyatapsa, kawkhantix jan khitis jakki," 
Job38:27 uka waña uraqinak qarpatapsa, ukan quranak ch'ichtayatapsa yattati?" 
Job38:28 ¿Khitirak jallumpiru, sullampiru utjayisti?" 
Job38:29 ¿Khitirak chhullunkhayampiru, qaqawarampiru utjayarakisti?" 
Job38:30 ¿Khitirak umanak chhullunkt'ayisti, jach'a qutanaksa luxt'ayarakisti?" 
Job38:31 ¿Jumätati Pléyades warawaranakar tantachirixa, Orión warawaranakar willitatirisa?" 
Job38:32 ¿Jumätati qhantati warawarar wakisitapar mistuyirixa? ¿Jumätati Osa Mayor, Osa Menor, sat warawaranakar irpirixa?" 
Job38:33 ¿Yattati jumax alaxpach apnaqäwi kamachinakxa? ¿Jumati uka kamachinakarjam aka uraqin apnaqaraktaxa? 
Job38:34 ¿Jumasti qinayanakan ist'añapkam art'asismati jumaru umampi chhaqtayañapatakisti? 
Job38:35 ¿Jumati qhixu qhixunakar sarañap uñacht'aytaxa? ¿Qhixu qhixusti “Akäsktwa” sasati jaysaraktamsti? 
Job38:36 ¿Khitirak ibis jamach'ir yatiñ churi, wallparus amuyt'a churarakisti?" 
Job38:37 ¿Khitirak wali ch'ikhi kankañani qinayanak jakht'añatakisti? ¿Khitirak uka qinayanakat jalluyanirakispa," 
Job38:38 laq'ax ñiq'ir tukuñapataki, khulanakas mayaruk tukuñapatakisti?" 
Job38:39 ¿Jumat qachu leonanakatak manq'añ thaqharaptaxa, qallunakapan sist'asiñkam manq'apxañapataki," 
Job38:40 putunakapar imantasipki ukapacha, jan ukax, qura taypin qhamisiyasipki ukapachasti?" 
Job38:41 ¿Khitirak allqamarinakar manq'ayisti, chhiwchhinakapax manq'a thaqhas aywinaqapki jach'at ch'isiqis manq'añ mayipkitu ukapachasti?" 
Job39:1 ¿Kunapachas ch'uminkir cabritonakax qalluchapki uk yattati? ¿Qachu tarujanakan wawachasitap uñjaraktacha? 
Job39:2 ¿Qawqha phaxsitsa wawachasipki uk yattati? 
Job39:3 Wawachasiñatakix k'umthapipxiwa, ukat qallunakapax yuripxi." 
Job39:4 Uka qallunakasti wali ch'amaniw jilarapxi, pampan jach'aptapxi, ukatsti jan mayamp kuttaniñatakiw sarxapxi." 
Job39:5 ¿Khitirak ch'uminkir asnor antutnukusti? ¿Khitirak ukham antutnukut sarnaqayisti? 
Job39:6 Nayaw ukarux kawkhantix jakañapäki uk uñacht'ayta, wasarampi, qullpa pampanakamp uñacht'ayta." 
Job39:7 Janiw ukanakax markan uxutanakaparux yäqkiti, janirakiw uywa anakirinakan jariyataparus ist'kiti." 
Job39:8 Qullu patanakan quranak thaqhasaw sarnaqi, ch'uxña alinak jikxatañkama." 
Job39:9 ¿Amuyatamat ch'uminkir urqu vacax jumar luqtiristamti, juman uywa uyuman mä arum ikt'añ munarakispati?" 
Job39:10 ¿Jumasti uka urqu vacar yapt'asina qhulliyasmati, jan ukax, juman qhipäxam jutasincha uraqi unxtayaspaxa?" 
Job39:11 ¿Jumasti uka urqu vacan ch'amanïtap layku alkatasismati, juman lurañanakam jupar lurayarakismati?" 
Job39:12 ¿Amuyatamat yapum apthapiñatak walikïspati, pirwamarkam granonak apthapiñapatakis walikïspati?" 
Job39:13 Uñtam, suri jach'a jamach'iru, chhiqhanakap kusisitaw jawq'asi, cigüeña jamach'in chhiqhapat chhiqhanïkaspa ukhama," 
Job39:14 k'awnanakapsa ch'alla patarukiw apanukuwayi, lupin junt'upampi chhiwchhi qallunakap ansuñapataki." 
Job39:15 Jupax janiw amuykiti mä khitinsa ukanakar takxatañapxa, pampankir kuna animalan takxatat uñjasiñapsa." 
Job39:16 Chhiwchhinakapatakix wali qhuruw tuku, janis chhiwchhinakapäkasp ukham uñji, janiw jupatakix inamaya ch'ama tukutapax kunäkisa." 
Job39:17 Nayaw juparux amuyt'a jan churkti; suma amuyt'asiñsa jan churkaraktti. 
Job39:18 Ukampis chhiqhanakap janatataski ukkhasti, caballonakat sipan juk'amp jaltañ yati." 
Job39:19 ¿Jumat caballor ch'am churtasti, jumati kunkapar suma t'asampi k'achacht'araktasti?" 
Job39:20 ¿Jumat caballor t'iju t'ijunakar uñtat thuqnaqaytasti, axsarkaña jixisiñapatakisti?" 
Job39:21 Wali jach'a tukuñampiw uraqin thawirasi, nuwasïwirusti jan axsarasaw jalawayi." 
Job39:22 Janiw kunarus axsarkiti, janiw mulljaskarakisa, janiw espadataki qhipar kuttawaykiti." 
Job39:23 Jupa patan anttut'añ mich'inakax suxuqiski, lanzanakampi, jabalinanakampis paqaskaraki." 
Job39:24 Janis kunäkasp ukhamak wali jaya thakhinak jalawayi; trompeta phust'asipansti janiw inakt'irjamäkiti. 
Job39:25 Trompetan phust'atap ist'asasti qanchisiwa, jayatpach nuwasïwirux mukt'i, jilïrinakan jach'a arunakap ist'i, arnaqasitanak ist'araki." 
Job39:26 ¿Jumasti wali yatiñanipunïtati pakalirus jalnaqañ yatichañataki, aynach tuqir tuytawayañapatakisti?" 
Job39:27 ¿Jumati pakali jach'a jamach'iru, qullu patanakar tapachasiyaraktasti?" 
Job39:28 Pakalix uruy arumaw jach'a qarqa patanakan jaki, qarqanakan ch'utupan utjäwip utt'ayasi." 
Job39:29 Uka patatpach uñch'ukisini katuntkani ukar qhamisiyaraki. 
Job39:30 Pakali qallunakapax wila juchhapxi, kawkhantix jiwatanakax utjki ukawjan tantachasipxi." 
Job40:1 Jumax nayar taripäwi qalltañ munäyätaxa, naya, taqi ch'aman Diosar juchañchaña, ¿jichhax arsusiñ munaskaktati?" 
Job40:2  
Job40:3 ¿Kunarak naya jan kunatak aski jaqisti arsusiriststi? Nayax amukt'xakïwa. 
Job40:4  
Job40:5 Mayampi, mayamp nayax arsusxta, janiw kuna arsusiñaxas utjkxituti." 
Job40:6 Tatitux jach'a thaya taypitpach Job chachar wasitat parlxayani: 
Job40:7 Jichhax jan axsarirïtam uñacht'ayita, ukatsti jiskt'käma ukanakar arusxatanim." 
Job40:8 ¿Jumax nayar jan chiqapätaxatti juchañchañ munista, ukhamat jumax jan juchani mistuñamatakixa?" 
Job40:9 ¿Jumax nayjam ch'amanïtati? ¿Jach'at arsutamas nayan arsutaxjamati? 
Job40:10 Ukhamächi ukasti, jach'a kankañam uñacht'ayam, ¡ch'aman kankañam uñacht'ayarakim." 
Job40:11 Taqi jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakar uñtam: jupanakar jisk'achjam, q'apisiñaman samarasim." 
Job40:12 May uñtasak ukanakarux jaqurpayam, ñanqha lurir jaqinakarux kawkhan jikxatasas takxatam." 
Job40:13 Uraqirkam taqpachanir imantam, jiwatanakan utjäwipar jist'antarakim." 
Job40:14 Ukapachasti naya kipkaw yatirakï ch'amamamp juman atipjaskatama. 
Job40:15 Behemot sata jach'a axsarkañ animalar uñtam, ukax nayan irnuqatawa, kamisatix jumar irnuqksma ukhama: urqu vacanakjam quranakarak manq'i;" 
Job40:16 uñtam kunja ch'amanis kallachipaxa, janchinakapax kunja ch'amanirakisa." 
Job40:17 Wich'inkhapax cedro quqar uñtata ch'ullqhiwa, kayu ankunakapas taqi tuqir k'anantatawa." 
Job40:18 Ch'akhanakapax broncet luratjamawa, charanakapas hierrot luratjamarakiwa." 
Job40:19 Ukax nayan wali suma lurataxawa; naya sapa, jupar irnuqirikiwa, juparux t'unjiristxa." 
Job40:20 Kawkhantix pampa animalanakax anatasipxi; uka ch'uminakat quranak manq'añapatak apanirapipxi. 
Job40:21 Alinak k'uchuruw jipt'asi, juqhun utjir suqusanak taypiruw imantasiraki." 
Job40:22 Quqanakaw ch'iwicht'ayi, jawir thiyankir saucenakaw muyuntaraki." 
Job40:23 Jawir uman jilxattanitapatsa janiw mulljaskiti; umax nasakamas makhataskpa, janiw axsarkiti." 
Job40:24 ¿Khitirak ch'amanïspa katuntasin nayrap k'ilsuñataki, jan ukasti, nasapatsa wiskampi chinuntañatakisa?" 
Job41:1 ¿Cocodrilo sata animalarusti anzuelompi katjasmati? ¿Laxrapsa mä ñach'añampi ñach'antasmati? 
Job41:2 ¿Nasapat mä wiskampi chinuntasmati, jan ukax, laka änkhapsa p'iyjasmacha?" 
Job41:3 ¿Uka animalax jumar achikt'asir jutaspati, jan ukax, axsarañampicha parliristamxa?" 
Job41:4 ¿Jumasti ukarux juman uywatamäñapatakit arsuyarakisma? 
Job41:5 ¿Mä jisk'a jamach'impjamat jupamp anatasmasti? ¿Imill wawanakaman anatasiñapatakit chinkatarakismasti? 
Job41:6 ¿Alakipa jaqinakax jisk'a jisk'a ukar jalanuqasax aljapxaspati? 
Job41:7 ¿Mich'inakampit lip'ichip chhuqsusmasti, jan ukax, maxañanakampich p'iqipat jununtasmaxa?" 
Job41:8 Jumatix jupar luqxatasmaxa, jan mayampis armaskañamatakiw nuwjiristamxa, ukatsti janiw mayampsa jumax uk lurkxasmati." 
Job41:9 Cocodrilo animalar uñjasakiw, khitis axsarañat jiwt'añ munaspa." 
Job41:10 Maynin turiyataxa, jupax luqhiptiwa; janiw khitis jupampi nuwasiñ munkaspati." 
Job41:11 ¿Jupampi nuwasiñ munirix, jan kuna kamacht'atakit uñjasispasti? ¡Janiw maynis aka uraqin jupampi nuwasirix utjkiti!" 
Job41:12 Kayunakapat parlañsa, jach'a ch'amapat parlañsa janiw amukt'käti." 
Job41:13 ¿Khitirak janchip imt'iri lip'ichip iqaraspasti, jan ukax khitich imxatir lankhu janchipsa maysat maysar junsuspasti?" 
Job41:14 ¿Khitis lakap ansatatayaspa, ari laka ch'akhanakap uñjañatakisti?" 
Job41:15 Jikhanipax jach'a ch'akhanakan siqintatawa, qalar uñtat ch'ullqhirakiwa." 
Job41:16 Sinti jak'apurar ñiqintatawa, janiw samanas uka chiq mantkaspati." 
Job41:17 Wali jak'ar k'anantatawa, janiw khitis jaljtaykarakispati." 
Job41:18 Ujurt'asitapas lliju llijur uñtatawa; nayranakapasti willjta intir uñtataw k'aji. 
Job41:19 Nina lawranakaw nasa p'iyanakapat mistsuni nina sank'anakaw willisiniraki. 
Job41:20 Nasapat jiwq'iw mistuni, wallaqir phukhut jiwq'ix mistki ukar uñtata." 
Job41:21 Samanapax sank'anak aqtayi, nasa p'iyapatsti ninaw mistuniraki." 
Job41:22 Ch'amapax kunkapankiwa, jupa nayraqatan taqiniw axsarayasipxi." 
Job41:23 Janchipasa wali qhuluwa, jan jununtkayawa, hierror uñtat ch'ullqhirakiwa." 
Job41:24 Chuymapasti qarqar uñtat ch'ullqhiwa, k'iyañ qalar uñtat ch'ullqhirakiwa." 
Job41:25 Jupax thalaraski ukapachasti, juk'amp ch'amaninakas axsarañat chhuktawayxapxi." 
Job41:26 Janiw espadasa, lanzasa, mich'inakas jupar katuntañatakix kunatakïkisa." 
Job41:27 Jupatakix hierrosa mä ch'illiwäkaspasa ukhamakiwa, bronces ñusantat lawäkaspas ukhamakiwa." 
Job41:28 Antutt'at mich'inakax janiw juparux jaltaykiti, qalampi jaqt'añasti, jichhumpis jaqt'atäkasp ukhamakiwa." 
Job41:29 Hierro k'uphañampi jupar k'uphantañasa, mä suqusampi jawq'antatäkaspa ukhamakiwa, mich'inakan khuyusis saratap ist'asas larusiwa." 
Job41:30 Ñiq'in qatatnaqtki ukapachasti, qhulliñampjamaw sukanak sukachsu." 
Job41:31 Jach'a quta manqhir jalantki ukapachasti, umax wallaqir phukhur uñtatawa." 
Job41:32 Umsti janq'uk jupuqtäwayi, k'ajkir qaqa ñik'utanakjama." 
Job41:33 Janiw aka uraqin jupjamax utjkiti; jan kuns axsarañatak irnuqataw jupaxa. 
Job41:34 Jupat juk'ampi ch'amaninakarus saykataskakiwa, taqi jach'a axsarkañ animalanakan jilïripawa." 
Job42:1 Nayax yattwa, jumax taqi kunatakis ch'amanïtawa, janiw jumatakix kunas jan lurkayäkiti." 
Job42:2  
Job42:3 ¿Khitïtsa nayaxa, juman jach'a kankañamat pächasiñatakixa, ukhamat pisi amuyt'an jaqïtax uñacht'ayañatakixa? Nayax jan amuyt'käyät ukanakat parlaskäyäta, muspharkañ yänakata, nayatak jan amuyt'añjamäk taqi ukanakat parlaskäyäta." 
Job42:4 Jumax sarakistawa: “Ist'ita, nayax parlañ munsma; aka jiskt'anakar arusxatanim” sasa." 
Job42:5 Jichhakamasti, nayax mayninakan parlatap tuqik jumarux uñt'ayäsmaxa, ukampis jichhax pachpa nayraxampiw uñkatsma." 
Job42:6 Ukatpï jichhax laq'a taypina, qhilla taypin qunt'ata taqi arsutanakaxat chuym liq'istxa." 
Job42:7 Tatitusti Job chachampi parlasin, Elifaz chacharuw parlarakïna, akham sasa: “Jumatakix wali q'apisitätwa, ukhamaraki uka pani masimatakisa; jumanakax janiw nayxatxa kunatix chiqapäki uk parlapktati; kunjämtix Job luqtirixax parlki ukhama." 
Job42:8 Jichhasti paqallqu urqu vacampi, paqallqu urqu ovejampi katupxam, ukatsti Job luqtirixan ukaru sarapxam, ukatsti nakt'ata wilañcha jumanakataki luqtapxarakim. Job luqtirixaw jumanakatak mayini, nayasti jupan mayitapxa ist'arakïwa, janiw kuna ñanqhsa jumanakarux lurapkämati, jumanakar mutuyañas wakiskchi ukasa, nayxat jan chiqapar qhanañchapxatam layku, kunjämtix Job luqtirixax qhanañchki ukhama” sasa." 
Job42:9 Ukatsti Elifazampi, Bildadampi, Zofar chachampix, kunjämarutix Tatitux siskatayna ukhamarjamaw phuqhapxäna, Tatitusti Job chachan mayisitapar ist'arakïnwa." 
Job42:10 Job chachan, jilat masinakapataki mayirapkän uka qhipatsti, Diosax Job chacharux nayra qamir kankañap kuttayxänwa, qawqha yänakapatix nayrax utjkän ukat sipan pä ukkhampi churxäna." 
Job42:11 Ukatsti taqi jilanakapa, kullakanakapaw jupar tumpt'ir sarapxäna, ukhamaraki nayra pacha uñt'at jaqinakasa; ukatsti utapan mä jach'a manq'äwi lurapxarakïna. Taqi jan walt'añanakapat Job chachar chuymachapxäna, kuna t'aqhisiñanaktix Tatitux jupxar apayankatayna taqi ukanakata; jupanakat sapa maynirakiw mä qawqha qullqimpi, mä quri anillompi jupar churapxäna." 
Job42:12 Diosasti Job chacharux nayra maranakat sipan aski waxt'äwinak juk'amp churxarakïna. Ovejapas tunka pusini waranqäxänwa, camellonakapasti suxta waranqa, urqu vacanakapas pä waranqa, qachu asnonakapasti waranqarakïxänwa." 
Job42:13 Ukxarusti tunka pusin yuqall wawani, kimsa imill wawanïxarakïnwa." 
Job42:14 Jilïr phuchhaparux Paloma sutimpiw sutichäna, ukxarüki uka phuchhaparusti Jazmín sutimpi, sullkïr phuchhaparux Azucena sasaw suticharakïna." 
Job42:15 Job chachan phuchhanakapjama wali suma uñnaqt'ani warminakax janipuniw aka uraqpachan utjkänti. Awkipasti jupanakampiru, jilanakapampirux yänakap churxäna." 
Job42:16 Uka qhipatsti Job chachax patak pusi tunkan marampiw jakaskäna, wawanakaparus uñjasiwaykänwa, allchhinakan allchhinakapkama. Ukatsti Job chachax wali chuymankam jakasaw jiwxäna." 
Job42:17  
Psalms1:1 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakan amtayataparjam jan sarnaqirix kusisiñan jaqiwa, jupax janiw jucharar jaqinakan thakhipan sarnaqkiti, janirakiw Diosampi sawkasirinakampis chikachaskiti," 
Psalms1:2 jan ukasti, jupan kusisiñapax Tatitun arupawa, uka arupatsti arumay uruw lup'i." 
Psalms1:3 Jupax, jawir thiyan ayruntat quqar uñtatawa: wakisitarjamaw achunak churi, laphinakapax janiw wañskiti. ¡Taqi luräwinakapasti walt'askakipuniwa!" 
Psalms1:4 Jan wali jaqinakampisti janiw ukhamäkiti: jupanakax thayan apat jipir uñtatäpxiwa. 
Psalms1:5 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax janiw taripäwit jaltapkaniti; jucharar jaqinakas janirakiw aski jaqinak taypinkapkaniti. 
Psalms1:6 Tatituw aski jaqinakan sarnaqäwip imaski, ñanqha lurir jaqinakan thakhipasti aynacht'añaruw puriyi." 
Psalms2:1 ¿Kunatarak markanakasti Diosar saykatasipxisti? ¿Kunatarak ñanqha amtanak amtasipkisti? 
Psalms2:2 Akapach reyinakax mayacht'asipxiwa, jilïr jaqinakax mä amtañaruw puripxi, Tatitumpiru, ajllit reyipampir qallkatañataki." 
Psalms2:3 Jupanakax jach'at arsupxi: “¡Chinuntatäpktan ukanak t'aqanukupxañäni! ¡Ñach'antatäpktan ukanakat jararasipxañäni!” sasa. 
Psalms2:4 Ukampis alaxpachan jakir Tatitux jupanakat larusiwa; 
Psalms2:5 q'apisiñampiw jupanakar mulljanti, tipusiñampiw saraki:" 
Psalms2:6 “Naya pachpaw reyixarux ajllista, Sión, qullan qullux patxaruw utt'ayta” sasa." 
Psalms2:7 Tatitun arsutap yatiyä: Jupax situwa: “Jumaw nayan wawaxätaxa: jichhüruw jumarux jakañ chursma. 
Psalms2:8 Jumax nayat mayiskakita: katuqäwimjam markanak katuyxäma, uraq tukuskam apnaqañamatakiw churxarakïma." 
Psalms2:9 Hierro thujrumpiw jupanakarux apnaqäta, ¡ñiq'i phukhunakarjamaw t'unjarakïta!” sasa." 
Psalms2:10 Aka uraqinkir reyinaka, amuyt'asipxam, ¡aka yatichäwinak sum yatiqapxam!" 
Psalms2:11 Tatiturux axsart'añampi yupaychapxam; jupan nayraqatapan khathatiñampi alt'asipxam, q'apisini ukapachasti, jiwarataw uñjasipxasma, Tatitun jank'aki q'apisirïtap layku. ¡Jupampi arxatayasirinakax kusisiñanïpxiwa!" 
Psalms2:12  
Psalms3:1 Tatay, waljaniw nayar uñisirinakaxa, waljaniw nayatakix sayt'apxi," 
Psalms3:2 waljaniw nayat sapxi: “Diosax janiw jupar qhispiykaniti” sasa. 
Psalms3:3 Ukampis Tatay, jumaw nayan arxatirixätaxa, jumaw jach'ar aptirixätaxa, jumarakiw ch'amañchirixätasa." 
Psalms3:4 Jach'at art'asisaw Tatitut mayista, jupasti qullan qullupatpach ist'itu." 
Psalms3:5 Ikintkäsa, ikkäsa, uñatatkä ukapachasa: Tatituw nayarux yanapaskitu." 
Psalms3:6 Nayar katuntañatak muyuntir uñisirinakax janiw axsaraykituti. 
Psalms3:7 ¡Tatay, sartasikimaya! ¡Dios Tatituxay, qhispiyasikitaya! Jumaw uñisirinakaxan ajanupat t'axllinuqäta; ¡ñanqha luririnakan laka ch'akhanakap t'unsurakïta!" 
Psalms3:8 Tatay, jumaw qhispiyirïtaxa; ¡askinakampiy markamar phuqhantam!" 
Psalms4:1 Arxatir Diosaxay, ¡mayisitaxar ist'akitaya! Jumaw llakisiñaxan chuymax qhanartayista, ¡nayat khuyapt'ayasita, mayisitaxarus ist'arakita!" 
Psalms4:2 Jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinaka, ¿kunapachkamas jisk'achapxitäta?, ¿kunapachkamas jan walïki ukak munasipkäta?, ¿kunapachkamas sallqjañak munasipkäta?" 
Psalms4:3 Yatipxam: Tatitux jupar iyawsirirux munasiwa; jupar art'askta ukkhasti Tatitux ist'ituwa. 
Psalms4:4 ¡Axsarthapipxam, jan juk'amp juch lurapxamti! Ikintxapxät ukkhasti, kuntix lurapkta ukanakat sum amuythapisipxam;" 
Psalms4:5 chiqpach luqtäwinak Tatitur katuyapxam, taqi chuymampirak iyawsapxam." 
Psalms4:6 Waljaniw sapxi: “¿Khitirak kusisiñ churistanisti?” sasa. ¡Tatay, khuyapayasiñampiy uñtanipxita!" 
Psalms4:7 Jumaw chuymaxarux juk'amp kusisiñ uchtaxa jilarkir trigoninakat sipansa, vinoninakat sipansa." 
Psalms4:8 Nayax jan kuna llakiniw ikintta, mäkirakiw ikt'awayxta, Tatay, jumakiw iyawsañ chuyman jakayista." 
Psalms5:1 Tatay, Reyixay, Diosaxay, arsutanakaxarux ist'akimaya, ayqutanakaxarus jaysakimaya, arnaqasitanakaxarux iyawsakimaya, jumarukiw mayisitax luqtansma." 
Psalms5:2  
Psalms5:3 Qhantatiw mayisitaxar ist'taxa, willjtaw llakix yatiyasinsma, nayasti ist'añam suyaskta." 
Psalms5:4 Jumax janiw ñanqhampi kusisir Diosäktati, ñanqha lurir jaqinakax janiw jak'aman jakapkaspati," 
Psalms5:5 jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakasa, janirakiw nayraqataman utjapkaspati. Jumax ñanqha lurir jaqinakarux uñistawa," 
Psalms5:6 k'arinakarux t'unjtawa; ch'uxña chuyman jaqinakampiru, jaqi jiwayirinakampirux uñisnuktawa." 
Psalms5:7 Ukampis nayax jach'a munasiñam laykuw qullan utamarux mantä; qullan utam manqhansti, alt'at chuymampiw yupaychäma." 
Psalms5:8 Tatay, nayar uñisirinakan utjatap laykux aski kankañamampiy irpita, suma thakhimanjamay irpita." 
Psalms5:9 Jupanakax k'arikamakïpxiwa, nayar aynacht'ayañak munasipki. Janipuniw kunsa chiqap sapkiti, jiwañatak parlt'asipki." 
Psalms5:10 ¡Diosaxay! ¡Jupanakarux mutuyamaya, amtatanakap aynacht'ayam! Jumar qallkatapxatap laykusti, juchanak luratapat jaqunukum." 
Psalms5:11 Jumampi arxatayasiñ thaqhirinakax kusisipxpanaya; jupanakar imaskatam laykux, kusisiñat wiñayapun q'uchupxpan. Jumar munasirinakax jumïpan kusisipxi," 
Psalms5:12 Tatay, jumaw chiqa jaqirux askinak churtaxa, khuyapayasiñamax jark'aqasiñar uñtataw muyuntaski." 
Psalms6:1 Tatay, janikiy q'apisiñamampix tuqintistati; janirak phiñasiñamampis mutuyistati." 
Psalms6:2 Tatay, nayat khuyapt'ayasita, ch'ama pisiw uñjasta. Tatay, wasitat k'umaraptayxita, taqpach janchixaw khathatiski." 
Psalms6:3 ¡Axsarañat inakiw khathatiskta! Tatay, jumasti ¿kunapacharak jutätasti?" 
Psalms6:4 Tatay, jutakimaya, ¡jakañax qhispiyakitaya! ¡Khuyapayasiñam laykuy qhispiyita!" 
Psalms6:5 Janiw khitis jiwatanak taypin amtaskiristamti, ¿khitirak manqhapachan jach'añchiristamsti?" 
Psalms6:6 Jachkäwix qaritäxtwa. Paqar paqariw ikiñaxan jachta, jachaxampix ch'ijmaxarus juriptaytwa." 
Psalms6:7 Jachkäwix nayraxax ch'amakt'xituwa; ¡uñisirinakaxan juchap laykuw nayraxax ch'amakt'xi! 
Psalms6:8 Ñanqha lurir jaqinaka, nayat jithiqtapxita, Tatituw jachataxarux ist'itu;" 
Psalms6:9 Tatituw achikt'asitaxar jaysitu, Tatituw mayisitax katuqitu." 
Psalms6:10 Nayampi timasirinakax axsarañat aynacht'apxani, ¡mä ch'ipxtanak p'inqapat jaltxapxani!" 
Psalms7:1 Tatit Diosaxay, taqi chuymampiw jumar alkatsma; ¡nayar arknaqirinakat qhispiyasita! Janitix qhispiykität ukax leonanakjamaw q'al tukjapxitani; janirakiw khitis arxatkitaniti." 
Psalms7:2  
Psalms7:3 Tatit Diosaxay, ¿kuna jan walsa jupanakar lurtxa? ¿Khitiruch jiwaytxa?" 
Psalms7:4 ¿Uñt'at jaqi masixar ñanqha lurataxach utji? ¿Jan ukax uñisirixaruch jan kunat t'aqhisiytxa? 
Psalms7:5 Ukhamächi ukasti, uñisirixax arktasin katjitpan; katjasin uraqinjam qatatitpan, jaqi kankañaxsti takisirakpan." 
Psalms7:6 ¡Tatay, q'apisiñampiy sartasim! ¡Uñisirinakaxan q'apisiñaparux jumay saykatam! Jumax chiqapar uñjañatakiw arstaxa, ¡jichhax nayaruy arxatt'ita!" 
Psalms7:7 Markanakampiy muyuntayasim, qhapaq qunuñam jach'ar aptam, markanak apnaqañatak qunt'asirakim." 
Psalms7:8 Tatay, jumaw markanakar tariptaxa: aski kankañaxarjamay uñjita; jan juchanirjamay taripita." 
Psalms7:9 Chiqapar uñjir Tatay, jumaw amtäwinak uñakiptaxa, chuyma manqha amtäwinaka, ¡juchararanakan ñanqha lurañanakap tukusiyam, aski jaqirusti thuruñchat sayt'ayam!" 
Psalms7:10 Alaxpachankir Tatituw imantasiñaxaxa, q'uma chuymaninakaruw jupax qhispiyi." 
Psalms7:11 Tatitux chiqapar uñjir taripiriwa, jucharar jaqirux mutuyapuniwa." 
Psalms7:12 Janitix jaqix Tatitur kutikipstkanixa, Tatitux espadap wakicht'asini; mich'ip antutt'añas niy jiyintatpachawa," 
Psalms7:13 nina aqtat mich'inakapax wakicht'atawa, ¡jiwayir yänakapax wakicht'atawa." 
Psalms7:14 Ñanqha jaqir uñtapxam: wawachasir warmjamaw t'aqhisiski, ñanqhampi wallq'iptatawa, k'ari kankañ wawacharakini." 
Psalms7:15 Wali manqha p'iypun allisi, pachpa allisitaparuw jalantani." 
Psalms7:16 ¡Ñanqha luratanakapatxa jupa kipkaw t'aqhisiskani! 
Psalms7:17 Nayasti, Tatituruw chiqapar uñjatapat jach'añchä, alaxpachankir Tatitun sutiparuw q'uchunak q'uchü." 
Psalms8:1 Tatay, nanakan reyixay, ¡sutimax taqpach uraqin muspharkayawa! ¡Qhapaq kankañamax alaxpachat juk'ampi khurikamawa!" 
Psalms8:2 Uñisirinakaman utjatap laykux ñuñuskir wawanakan jach'añchatapampiw ch'amam uñacht'aytaxa, timasirinakampiru, qallasirinakampir t'unjañataki." 
Psalms8:3 Juman lurat alaxpach uñatatta, juman uchat phaxsimpiru, warawaranakampir uñtkta ukapachax," 
Psalms8:4 sistwa: ¿Kunarak jaqisti, jupat amtasiñamatakisti? ¿Kunatarak jupat llakistasti?" 
Psalms8:5 Jaqirux niyas mä diosarjamaw lurtaxa, jaqjam aytat kankañampiw juparux pillunttaxa;" 
Psalms8:6 taqi luratanakam apnaqañapatakiw katuytaxa, taqi kunxaruw utt'ayaraktaxa:" 
Psalms8:7 ovej tamanakxaru, vacanakxaru, ch'uminkir animalanakxaru," 
Psalms8:8 alax chiq thuqnaqir jamach'inakxaru, lamar qutankir chawllanakxaru, lamar qutan taqi utjirinakxaru." 
Psalms8:9 Tatay, nanakan reyixay, ¡taqi uraqpachan jach'a Diosapunïtawa!" 
Psalms9:1 Tatay, taqpach chuymaxampiw yupaychsma muspharkañ luratanakamat yatiyasa." 
Psalms9:2 Alaxpachankir Diosay, jumïpan kusisiñat arnaqasiñ munta; sutimaruw q'uchunak q'uchuñ munta." 
Psalms9:3 Uñisirinakaxax juman nayraqatamat jaltxapxiwa; tinkurapxiwa, jiwarapxarakiwa." 
Psalms9:4 Jumätaw chiqap taripirixa: qunuñamar qunt'asaw nayarux chiqapar uñjista. 
Psalms9:5 Jumar jan yupaychir markanakarux tuqinuqtawa, ñanqha lurir jaqinakarux t'unjtawa, sutipsti jan mayampitakiw chhaqtaytaxa." 
Psalms9:6 Uñisirix jiwatäxiwa, jupamp chikaw markanakapax t'unjataraki, sutipasti wiñayatak chhaqtayatawa." 
Psalms9:7 Ukampis Tatitux wiñayatakiw reyit qunt'asi; taripañatakiw qunuñap sum utt'ayasi: 
Psalms9:8 aski kankañampiw akapacharux taripani, markanakarusti chiqaparuw uñjani." 
Psalms9:9 T'aqhisiyat jaqinakarux Tatituw arxataski, jupaw llakisiñ pachanakan imaski." 
Psalms9:10 Tatay, jumar uñt'irinakax jumaruw katuyasipxtam, jumar thaqhirinakarus janipuniw apanukktati." 
Psalms9:11 Sión qullun jakir Tatitur q'uchupxam; muspharkañ luratanakap markanakar yatiyapxam. 
Psalms9:12 Tatitux t'aqhisirinakat amtasipuniwa, jachatanakapatsa janiw armaskiti, jupanakar t'aqhisiyirinakarux mutuyiwa." 
Psalms9:13 Tatay, nayat khuyapt'ayasita, uñisirinakaxan nayar t'aqhisiyatap uñtanim, ¡jiwañ punkutsa wayst'asita!" 
Psalms9:14 Ukhamat Jerusalén punkunakanxa, taqi jaqinakar Tatitur yupaychapxam sä, nayar qhispiyatamat kusisitaxsa yatiyarakï." 
Psalms9:15 Jumar jan uñt'ir jaqinakax jupanakan wakichat sipitaruw jalt'apxi; kayunakapax jupanakan imantat pachpa sipitapan simpantatawa. 
Psalms9:16 Tatitux chiqapar uñjirïtap uñt'ayasi: ñanqha lurir jaqisti pachpa sipitaparuw jalt'i. 
Psalms9:17 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakampi, Tatitur jan uñt'irinakampi, jupat armasirinakampix jiwañ mik'ayan jiwarapxani." 
Psalms9:18 T'aqhin jakir jaqinakax janipuniw armatäpkaniti, janirakiw suyt'añapas wiñayatak tukuskaniti." 
Psalms9:19 Tatay, sartasikimaya; janikiy jaqin jach'a jach'a tukuñaparux walikiw samti; ¡jumar jan uñt'irinakarux nayraqataman taripam!" 
Psalms9:20 Tatay, axsarañ chuymay jupanakarux churam, ¡jupanakax jaqikïpxatap yatipxpan." 
Psalms10:1 Tatay, ¿kunatarak nayat jayanktasti? ¿Kunatarak t'aqhisiñaxan nayat imantastasti?" 
Psalms10:2 Qhuru jaqin jach'a jach'a tukuñapax q'apisiñampiw llakit jaqirux t'aqhisiyi; ukampis jupan wakichat pachpa sipitaruw jalt'askani. 
Psalms10:3 Ñanqha lurir jaqix munapayatapat jach'achasi; Tatiturusti ñanqhachji, jisk'achjarakiwa." 
Psalms10:4 Ñanqha lurir jaqix, nasa qhiwtasaw arsu: “Janiw Diosax utjkiti, janiw khitis lurataxat wayt'irix utjkiti” sasa. Ukak jupax lup'iski." 
Psalms10:5 Taqi kunas jupatakix walikipuniwa. Jupatakix juman kamachinakamax wali jayankiwa. Uñisirinakapatsa sawkasiwa," 
Psalms10:6 janis khitis tinkuykaspax ukham amuyasi, janis jan walt'añanakar purkaspax ukham amuyasi." 
Psalms10:7 Arunakapax chuyma ust'ayir arunakawa; suma arunïpkaspas ukhamäpxiwa, ukampis ñanqhachaña, t'aqhisiyañ amtanïpxiwa." 
Psalms10:8 Jamasanakar qunt'asaw suyxati, jan juchan jaqirux uka jamasan jiwayi. Jan arxatirin jaqirux aliqapuniw qhamisiyi:" 
Psalms10:9 mä leonar uñtataw putupar imantasis jan arxatirin jaqirux suyanti, akatjamat jupar katjañatakix suyxati, katji ukkhasti, sipitapar uskuntasaw qatati." 
Psalms10:10 Jupax alt'araki, lip't'arakiwa, jan arxatirin jaqinakasti jach'a sillunakaparuw jalt'i." 
Psalms10:11 Ñanqha chuyman jaqix siwa: “Diosax aka jaqit armasiwa, jupar jan uñjañatakix ajanupsa imantasiwa” sasa." 
Psalms10:12 ¡Tatay, sartasikimaya, amparam luqatatasim! ¡T'aqhisir jaqinakat janikiy armasimti!" 
Psalms10:13 Diosaxay, ¿kunatarak ñanqha lurir jaqinakast sawkasipxätamsti, janis jupanakar kuns wayt'kasma ukhamsti?" 
Psalms10:14 Juma pachpaw ñanqha luratanakap uñjtaxa, ¡jumaw uñjtaxa, jupanakarusti juchap uñt'ayätaxa! Jumaruw jan arxatirin jaqinakax makhatxapxtam; jumaw wajchanakan yanapiripätaxa." 
Psalms10:15 ¡Ñanqha lurir jaqinakan amparap t'unaram! ¡Ñanqha luratanakapat wayt'am, taqi kunat phuqhañapkama!" 
Psalms10:16 Tatitux wiñayapuniw reyit qunt'asi, ¡Tatitur jan uñt'irinakasti uraqipat jaqunukutäniwa!" 
Psalms10:17 Tatay, jumaw jan yäqat jaqinakan mayisitap ist'asktaxa, jumaw chuymachtaxa, ch'amañcharaktaxa." 
Psalms10:18 Wajcharusa, t'aqhisiyatarus chiqaparuy uñjam: ¡laq'at lurat jaqisti, janipun axsarayañ wasitat utjaypati!" 
Psalms11:1 Tatituw nayan imantasiñaxaxa. Inamayaw sasipkitu: “Jamach'ir uñtat qullur jaltxam. 
Psalms11:2 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakar uñtam: mich'i antutt'añatakiw wakichrantapxi, mich'i antutt'añsa sum jiyintapxi, jamasawjat aski jaqinakar wakt'ayañatak mich'ip antutt'apxi." 
Psalms11:3 Kunapachatix qalltapax t'unasispa ukkhax ¿kamachaspas aski jaqixa?” sasa. 
Psalms11:4 Ukampis Tatitux qullan utapankiwa. Tatitun qunuñapax alaxpachankiwa, nayranakapas arikipuniw taqi jaqinakar uñch'ukiski." 
Psalms11:5 Tatitux juchanirus jan juchanirus taqiniruw uñch'ukiski, ñanqha lurañ munirinakarusti walpun uñisi." 
Psalms11:6 Tatitux ñanqha lurir jaqinakxarux nina sank'ampi, azufrempi jalluyanini, mä junt'u thayaw jupanakarux q'al tukjani. ¡Tatitux lurataparjamaw mutuyani!" 
Psalms11:7 Tatitux chiqapar uñjiriwa, kunatix chiqäki ukarux munasiwa; ¡ukat aski jaqinakax ajanup uñkatapxani!" 
Psalms12:1 Tatay, qhispiyapxitaya, aski jaqinakax tukusiskiwa, chiqap sarnaqir jaqinakax janiw utkxiti." 
Psalms12:2 Maynit maynikamaw k'arintasipxi, sallqa chuymampiw parlapxi, ch'uxña chuymampiw arsupxi." 
Psalms12:3 Tatay, jach'achasir jaqinakaru, ch'uxña jaqinakarus jik'inukum," 
Psalms12:4 khitinakatix sapxi: “Jiwasax arsuñatakix lakanïtanwa; wali sum arsuñ yattanxa. ¿Khitis apnaqistaspasti?” sasa. 
Psalms12:5 Tatitux jupanakarux siwa: “T'aqhin jakir jaqinakampi, jan yäqat jaqinakampix mutuyata, t'aqhisiyataw uñjasipxi. Jupanakar yanapt'añatakiw sartasï, yanapt'ayasiñ munataparjamaw yanapt'ä” sasa." 
Psalms12:6 Tatitun arsutanakapax chiqpachawa; ninampi paqallq kuti q'umachat qullqir uñtatawa. 
Psalms12:7 Tatay, jumaw nanakarux imasipxitäta; ¡uka jaqinakat jark'aqapxitäta." 
Psalms12:8 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax taqi chiqan muyupayapxi, taqi jaqiw ñanqharux jach'ar apti." 
Psalms13:1 Tatay, ¿kunapachkamarak nayat armasitätasti? ¿Wiñayatakipunit armasitätasti? ¿Kunapachkamarak nayatak imantasïtasti?" 
Psalms13:2 ¿Kunapachkamarak ajayuxas t'aqhisiñankanisti? ¿Kunapachkamarak sapürus llakt'at sarnaqästi? ¿Kunapachkamarak uñisirixasti apnaqitanisti? 
Psalms13:3 Tatit Diosaxay, ¡uñtanikitaya, ist'akitaya, suma qhanam uñjayakitaya! ¡Janikiy wiñay jiwañar puriyistati!" 
Psalms13:4 Janikiy uñisirixax sispati: “Nayaw atipjta” sasa. Aynacht'ataxatsa janikiy kusispati. 
Psalms13:5 Nayax khuyapayasiñamaruw iyawsta; chuymaxax nayar qhispiyatamat kusisi. 
Psalms13:6 ¡Tatituruw nayax aski luratapat q'uchü! 
Psalms14:1 Pisi chuyman jaqinakax siwa: “Janiw Diosax utjkiti” sasa. Taqiniw ñanqha lurir tukupxi; kunayman ñanqhanak lurapxi; ¡janiw khitis aski luririx utjkiti! 
Psalms14:2 Tatitux alaxpachatpach jaqinakarux uñtani, inach khitis amuyt'asirix utjaspa, inach khitis Diosar thaqtirix utjaspa." 
Psalms14:3 Jaqinakasti taqiniw jan wali thakhir saranukupxi; taqpachaniw ñanqha lurir tukupxi. ¡Janiw khitis aski luririx utjkiti! ¡Janiw maynis utjkiti! 
Psalms14:4 Ñanqha luririnakax jan amuyunïpxiwa, markaxarux t'ant'jam manq'antapxi, janiw Tatitun sutipsa art'asipkiti." 
Psalms14:5 Jupanakax axsarañat khathatipxani, Diosasti jupar jaysirinakampipunïskiwa." 
Psalms14:6 Jan yäqat jaqin amtäwinakapat larusipxi, ukampis Tatituw jupanakarux imaski." 
Psalms14:7 ¡Israel markan qhispiyasiñapax Jerusalén markatpach jutakispa! Tatitux t'aqhisiyat markapar kusisiykan ukapachaxa, Jacobun wawanakapax kusisiniwa, Israel markpachaw kusisirakini." 
Psalms15:1 Tatay, ¿khitirak qullan utaman jakaspasti?, ¿khitirak qullan qulluman utjasispasti?" 
Psalms15:2 Khititix juch jan luras jakki uka, khititix aski lurasapun sarnaqki uka, khititix taqi chuymamp chiqap arski uka;" 
Psalms15:3 khititix jaqi masipar jan k'arintki uka, jilaparus jan ñanqha lurki uka, uta jak'a masiparus jan jisk'achki uka;" 
Psalms15:4 khititix ñanqha lurañarux jisk'achki uka, Tatitur axsartirirus jach'añchki uka; khititix jan walir purkasas arsutap phuqki uka;" 
Psalms15:5 khititix qullqi mayt'asin jalaqtap jan apski uka, jan juchanir aynacht'ayañatak qullqi jan katuqaski uka. Khititix ukham lurasapun sarnaqki ukaxa, janipuniw aynacht'kaniti." 
Psalms16:1 Diosaxay, imasikitaya; taqi chuymampiw jumar alkatsma." 
Psalms16:2 Nayax jumaruw sisma: “Jumaw nayan Tatituxätaxa, askixätasa, janiw khitis jumjamax utjkiti” sasa." 
Psalms16:3 Akapach aytat jaqinakan kusisiñ jikxatirinakax sapxiwa: aka uraqinkir diosanakax ch'amaniwa, sasa." 
Psalms16:4 Kunayman diosanak jupanakax uñstayapxi, ukanakarusti alt'at chuymampiw luqtapxi. Ukampis nayax janipuniw wilañcha luqtäwinakapampi chikachaskäti, janirakiw sutinakapsa aytaskäti." 
Psalms16:5 Tatay, jumaw nayan taqi kunaxätaxa; jumaw askinakamampi phuqhantista; jakañaxax amparamar katuyatawa." 
Psalms16:6 Mä suma chiqawjaw nayarux wakt'itu, katuqäwixax walpun kusisiyitu." 
Psalms16:7 Nayar irpatapat Tatituruw jach'añchä, arumanakasa chuymax manqhan chiqachitu." 
Psalms16:8 Nayax Tatitumpi chikapuniw sarnaqaskta; jupaw kupi tuqixanki, janiw kunas tinkuykitaniti." 
Psalms16:9 Ukat chuymaxax walpun kusisi, ajayuxasa k'uchisi, janchixasa samararaki." 
Psalms16:10 Janiw jumax jiwar katxaruykitätati, ¡janirakiw arkiriman janchipa ñusantañapsa munkätati!" 
Psalms16:11 Jumaw jakañ thakhi uñacht'ayitäta. Nayraqataman jach'a kusisiñaw utji; jak'amansti wiñay kusisiñaw utjaraki. 
Psalms17:1 Tatay, chiqapat mayisitaxarux ist'akimaya, arnaqasitaxar jaysakimaya, mayisitaxar iyawsakimaya, janiw k'ari arunakampi mayisksmati." 
Psalms17:2 Nayar juchañchañax jumat jutpan, jumaw chiqapäki uk yattaxa." 
Psalms17:3 Jumaw taqpach amuyunakax yattaxa; arumanakaw chuymax uñaqir jutista; ninampjamaw yant'ista, janirakiw kuna ñanqhsa jikxatkistati. Lakaxax janiw k'ari arunak arskiti," 
Psalms17:4 kunjämtix jaqinakax k'arisipki ukhama; ch'axwañ thakhinakat jithiqtasta, juman arsutamarjamaw phuqta." 
Psalms17:5 Kayunakaxax thakhiman thurt'ataw sarnaqi; chillqtanakaxasti janiw thakhimat jithiqtkiti. 
Psalms17:6 Diosaxay, ist'asirïtam laykuw mayisinsma, naya tuqiruy jinchum alkatanim, arunakaxar ist'arakim." 
Psalms17:7 Munasiñamay uñacht'ayita, ch'amamar taqi chuymamp iyawsirirux jumaw uñisirinakapat arxattaxa." 
Psalms17:8 Nayarusti, nayranakaman qalaparjamay imita, chhiqhanakaman ch'iwipar imantita," 
Psalms17:9 nayar chhukxatir qhuru jaqinakata, ¡jiwayañatak muyuntir uñisirinakaxata!" 
Psalms17:10 Jach'a jach'a tukurinakäpxiwa, jach'a jach'a tukuñampiw kuns arsupxi;" 
Psalms17:11 nayan sarnaqatax sum yatxatapxi, nayar jaqunukuñatakisti taqi tuqit uñch'ukiyapxitu." 
Psalms17:12 Katuntañatak jalxatir leonanakar uñtatäpxiwa, imantasiñapan jalxatañatak suyantir leonanakar uñtatäpxarakiwa." 
Psalms17:13 Tatay, sartasikimaya, ¡saykatasin killt'ayam! Ñanqha lurir jaqit espadamampi qhispiyita;" 
Psalms17:14 Tatay, ch'amamampiy jupanakat qhispiyita; ¡akapachat jupanakar jaqunukum, akapachan jakañapax tukuspan! Yänakampix qamirkipstasipkakpan, wawanakapax phallañkam manq'apxpan, allchhinakapatakis jilt'askakpan." 
Psalms17:15 Nayasti kusisitaw jikxatasï; ajanuy ajanu jumar uñkatasina, ¡uñatatkä ukkhax nayraqataman jikxatasisina!" 
Psalms18:1 Tatay, jumaw ch'amañchirixätaxa, jumaruw taqi chuymamp munassma." 
Psalms18:2 Jumaw arxatirixätaxa, imantasiñaxätasa, jumaw qhispiyirixätaxa, Diosaxätasa, nayar imantir qarqaxätasa, imir jark'aqasiñaxätasa, qhispiyir ch'amaxätasa, wali amstankir imantasiñaxätasa." 
Psalms18:3 Tatay, jumaw jach'añchatäñatak askïtaxa: art'asinsma ukapachax uñisirinakaxat qhispiyista." 
Psalms18:4 Jiwax sipitanakapampiw simpantitu; axsarkay t'unjirin nayraqatapan axsarta. 
Psalms18:5 Jiwax chinuñanakapampiw muyuntayitu, ¡jiwañ sipitanak taypin jikxatasta!" 
Psalms18:6 Llakisiñaxan Tatitur art'asta, Diosaxat yanap mayista: jupasti qullan utapatpach ist'anitu; ¡arnaqasitaxax jinchupkamaw puri!" 
Psalms18:7 Ukapachaw uraq khathatix utjäna, qullunakasti saphitpach unxtäna; Tatitun q'apisiñapampi khathatiyatäpxänwa." 
Psalms18:8 nasapat jiwq'iw mistüna, lakapatsti nakhantir ninaw lawrsüna, ¡lakapat k'illim sank'anak jutayäna." 
Psalms18:9 Alaxpach jist'arasin saraqanïna. Ch'iyär juri qinayxaruw takt'äna. 
Psalms18:10 Mä chhiqhanin chhiqhapxaruw qunxatäna, thayampi chikaw chhiqhanakap patanjam jaltäna." 
Psalms18:11 Ch'amak taypiruw imantasïna, ch'iyär ch'amaka uman phuqhantat qinayanak taypiru, uka qinayaw q'al chhaqtayäna." 
Psalms18:12 Jach'a qunuñap taypitsti, qinayampi, chhijchhimpi, nakhaskir sank'anakampiw mistüna." 
Psalms18:13 Jach'a munañan Tatitux alaxpachatpach axsarkañ jach'a arup ist'asiyäna; chhijchhjama, nakhaskir sank'jama." 
Psalms18:14 Mich'inakap antutt'asaw uñisirinakaxar tutuktayäna. 
Psalms18:15 Lamar quta manqhax uñstxänwa; aka uraqin qalltapas uñstxarakïnwa, Tatitun axsarkañ arup ist'asitap layku, q'apisiñ samanap ch'amampi phust'atap layku." 
Psalms18:16 Tatitux alaxpachatpach amparap luqtanitu, amparapampiw jach'a lamar qutat waysutu." 
Psalms18:17 Wali ch'aman uñisirinakaxat qhispiyitu, nayat juk'amp ch'aman timanakat antutnukuyitu." 
Psalms18:18 Llakinkipan nayarux chhukxatapxitu, Tatitusti yanapt'apampiw arxatitu:" 
Psalms18:19 qhispiñ thakhiruw irpsutu, ¡nayar munatap laykuw qhispiyitu!" 
Psalms18:20 Tatitux q'uma sarnaqataxatjam churäwip waxt'itu," 
Psalms18:21 nayax Tatitun thakhipan sarnaqta, ¡janipuniw Diosaxarux armanukkti!" 
Psalms18:22 Taqpach arsutanakapax chuymaxankaskiwa; ¡janipuniw kamachinakapat jithiqtaskti! 
Psalms18:23 Janiw nayraqatapan juchachaskti, ñanqha lurañat jithiqtasta." 
Psalms18:24 Tatituw churäwip waxt'itu, nayraqatapan q'uma chuyman sarnaqataxata." 
Psalms18:25 Tatay, aski jaqitakix askirakïtawa, jan kamskayäki uka jaqitakis jan kamskayarakïtawa," 
Psalms18:26 qhana chuymanitakix qhana chuymanirakïtawa, sallqa chuymanitakisti ch'ikhi chuymanïtawa." 
Psalms18:27 Jumaw t'aqhisiyat jaqinakarux qhispiytaxa, jach'a jach'a tukurinakarusti jisk'achjtawa." 
Psalms18:28 Tatay, jumaw nayarux qhana churista; Diosaxay, jumaw arum ch'amakaxar qhantaytaxa." 
Psalms18:29 Juman yanapamampiw uñisirinakaxarux atipjä, yanapamampiw uyuchrantat markanakapar mantantä." 
Psalms18:30 Tatitun thakhipax chiqapawa, jupan arsutanakapax taqi chuymamp iyawskayawa, ¡Tatitux jupar taqi chuymamp alkatirinakarux imaskapuniwa!" 
Psalms18:31 Israel markan Diosapa, juma sapakiw chiqpach Diosätaxa, ¡juma sapakiw arxatir Diosätaxa!" 
Psalms18:32 Tatituw nayarux ch'am churitu, juparakiw sarnaqäwixar q'um tukuyi," 
Psalms18:33 jupaw tarujan kayupjam jaltir kayunak churitu, alax chiqawjanakan kayunakaxar sum thuruñcharakitu," 
Psalms18:34 jupaw uñisirinakaxamp nuwasiñatak yatichitu, jupaw atipjañatak ch'am churitu." 
Psalms18:35 Jumaw arxatista, qhispiyarakista, kupi amparamampiw katxarusista, khuyapayasiñamaw aytat jaqir tukuyitu." 
Psalms18:36 Jumaw thakhixarux jasaptaytaxa, kayunakaxasti janiw llust'kiti." 
Psalms18:37 Uñisirinakaxarux arktasin jikxatta, jupanakar tukjanisaw kutinxta." 
Psalms18:38 Jisk'a jisk'a tukjanta, jan mayampi sartkir lurjanta. ¡Kayunakaxampi takxatataw uñjasipxi!" 
Psalms18:39 Jumaw nuwasïwin ch'am churista; qallasirinakarux nayraqataxaruw alt'aytaxa," 
Psalms18:40 nayraqataxat uñisirinakaxan jaltxapxañapataki. Ukhamat nayar uñisirinakarux q'al tukjanta. 
Psalms18:41 Jupanakax yanap mayisipxäna, janiw khiti yanapt'iris utjkänti, Tatituruw art'asipxäna, jupasti janiw ist'känti." 
Psalms18:42 ¡Thayan apat laq'arjamaw jupanakarux tukusiyta! ¡Thakhinkir ñiq'irjamaw taksurakta! 
Psalms18:43 Qallkatasir markat qhispiyista, markanakan jilïripat utt'ayista, jan uñt'at jaqinakampiw luqtayista." 
Psalms18:44 Arux ist'asax mäkiw jaysapxitu; yaqha markankir jaqinakaw jach'achapxitu," 
Psalms18:45 yaqha markankirinakax llajllasipxiwa, khathatt'asisaw imantasïwipat mistunipxi." 
Psalms18:46 ¡Tatitux jallallatäpan! ¡Arxatirixax qullanäpan! ¡Qhispiyir Tatituxax jach'añchatäpan! 
Psalms18:47 Jupaw naya lanti phuqsur Tatituxa, jupaw amparaxarux markanak katuyitu." 
Psalms18:48 Jupaw uñisirinakaxan phiñasitapat qhispiyitu, nayar qallkatir jaqinakat antutayitu. ¡Tatay, jumaw qhuru jaqinakat qhispiyista!" 
Psalms18:49 Ukatpï markanak taypin yuspagarsmaxa, sutimarus q'uchunak q'uchuraktxa." 
Psalms18:50 Jumaw ajllit reyimarux atipaytaxa; Davidampiru, wawanakapampirux munasiñampipuniw uñjtaxa." 
Psalms19:1 Alaxpachax Diosan qhapaq kankañap yatiyi, alaxpachax amparapan luratap qhanañchi." 
Psalms19:2 Urunakax jupanakkamaw yatiyasipxi, arumanakas jupanakkamaw yatiyapxaraki." 
Psalms19:3 Janis arsupkchixa, janis arunakapax ist'askchixa," 
Psalms19:4 uraqpacharuw yatiyatapax ist'asi, uraq tukuskamaw arupax puri. Tatitux alaxpachan mä chiq intitakix uskt'arapi," 
Psalms19:5 intisti jaqichasir waynjamaw utapat misttani, jalir jaqjamaw thakhip jalañatakix kusisi." 
Psalms19:6 Intix maysa thiyat uñstani, maysa thiyar puriñkamaw muyti, janiw kunas lupi junt'upat imantaskaspati." 
Psalms19:7 Tatitun kamachinakapax chiqapawa, jaqin chuymap machaqaptayiriwa. Tatitun arunakapax askiwa, llamp'u chuyman jaqir yatiñan tukuyiriwa." 
Psalms19:8 Tatitun kamachi arunakapax chiqapawa, chuymar kusisiyiriwa; Tatitun arsutanakapax q'umawa, yatiñ kankañ chuririwa." 
Psalms19:9 Tatitun arunakapax q'umawa, wiñayatak utt'atawa; Tatitun arsutanakapax chiqapawa, taqpachax askirakiwa," 
Psalms19:10 ¡suma qurit sipan juk'amp sumawa!, ¡chhuyu misk'it sipan juk'amp muxsawa!" 
Psalms19:11 Arkirimatakis iwxt'a arunakawa, uka arunakam imañax askinak jikxatañawa." 
Psalms19:12 Janiw khitis pantjasitap amuyaskasamachiti. ¡Tatay, jan amuyaskasin juchanak lurataxat q'umacht'asita!" 
Psalms19:13 Jach'a jach'a tukuñ chuym apaqt'asita; janikiy jach'a jach'a tukuñampix atipjayistati. Ukhamat jan juchan jaqirux tukü; jach'a juchat qhispirakï. 
Psalms19:14 Tatay, arsutaxasa, chuymaxan lup'itapas jumar kusisiykirïpan, Tatay, nayan qhispiyirixa, imantasiñaxa." 
Psalms20:1 Tatitux llakisiñaman jumarux ist'pan; Jacobun pachpa Diosapax jumar arxatpan. 
Psalms20:2 Qullan chiqawjatpach yanap apayanpan, Sión qullutpach jumarux yanappan." 
Psalms20:3 Taqpach luqtäwinakamat jupax amtaspan, wilañcha luqtatanakamax jupar kusisiypan." 
Psalms20:4 Chuymaman munataparjam phuqpan, taqi amtäwinakam phuqhasiypan." 
Psalms20:5 Atipjatamat taqpachaniw kusisipxä, Tatitusan sutiparusti wiphalanak khiwtapxä, ¡Tatitux taqpach mayisitanakamar jayspan!" 
Psalms20:6 Jichhakuchaw amuyta, Tatitux ajllit reyiparuw atipt'ayani; qullan alaxpachatpach juparux ist'ani, ch'amapampiw jach'a atipt'äwinak churani." 
Psalms20:7 Yaqhipanakax nuwasiñ carronakanïpxiwa, yaqhanakasti walja caballonakanïpxiwa; jiwasanakasti Tatit Diosasan yanapt'apanïtanwa." 
Psalms20:8 Jupanakax tinkurayataw uñjasipxi, jiwasanakasti ch'aman sayt'atakïsktanwa." 
Psalms20:9 Tatay, ¡reyirux atipjañ ch'am churam! ¡Mayisipkäm ukapachasti, ist'apxakitaya!" 
Psalms21:1 Tatay, reyix ch'am churatamat walpun kusisi; ¡atipjayatamat wal kusisiraki!" 
Psalms21:2 Munataparjamaw phuqtaxa; mayisitanakaparuw ist'araktaxa. 
Psalms21:3 Jach'a askinak churasaw jupar katuqtaxa, p'iqiparusti quri pillumpiw asxattaxa." 
Psalms21:4 Jupax jakañ mayisïyätam, jumasti churtawa: walja maranak jakañampi, jan tukusir jakañampi churtaxa." 
Psalms21:5 Yanapt'am laykuw jupax ch'aman uñjasi; aytat jaqiruw tukuytaxa, aski jaqiruw tukuytaxa." 
Psalms21:6 Jan tukuskir askinak jupar churtaxa; jupamp chik sarnaqatam laykuw kusisiytaxa. 
Psalms21:7 Jumasti rey, janipuniw tinkkätati, Tatitur taqpach chuymamp katuyasitam layku; ¡Taqi ch'aman Tatituruw katuyastaxa!" 
Psalms21:8 Ch'iqa amparamax taqpach timanakamaruw katuntani; kupi amparamasti uñisirinakamaruw katjarakini; 
Psalms21:9 taripañatak uñstkät ukapachaxa, parintat hornorjamaw jaquntäta. Tatitux q'apisiñapampiw ninampi nakhantayani." 
Psalms21:10 Jumaw akapachat wawanakapar chhaqtayäta. Jumaw aka uraqit allchhinakapar chhaqtayäta. 
Psalms21:11 Ñanqha lurañsa munapkchïtam, jan walinak lurañsa amtapkchïtam, janiw kamachapkätamsa," 
Psalms21:12 kunapachatix jalxatkäta ukkhasti, taqi tuqiruw jaltxapxani." 
Psalms21:13 ¡Tatay, ch'amamampiy sayt'asim! ¡Nanakasti q'uchunakampiw atipjäwimat kusisipxä!" 
Psalms22:1 Diosaxay, Diosaxay, ¿kunatarak jaytanukustasti?, ¿kunatarak qhispiyir jan jutistasti?, ¿kunatarak arnaqasitaxar jan ist'istasti?" 
Psalms22:2 Diosaxay, uruy arumaw arnaqasinsma, jumasti janiw ist'kistati; ¡janiw nayatakix samart'añax utjkiti!" 
Psalms22:3 Jumasti qullanätawa; jumaw Israel markan jach'añchatätaxa. 
Psalms22:4 Nayra awkinakaxax jumaruw alkatasipxäyätam, jupanakarusti qhispiytawa;" 
Psalms22:5 yanap mayipxäyätam, jumasti jupanakarux qhispiytawa; jumaruw alkatasipxäyätam, jumasti janiw inamay suyayktati." 
Psalms22:6 Nayasti janiw jaqïkti, laq'ur uñtatakïtwa, ¡jaqin p'inqachatakïtwa!" 
Psalms22:7 Nayar uñjasax larusipxiwa; nayatakix jan wal uñanaqapxi, p'iqipsa khiwisipxiwa," 
Psalms22:8 ukat sapxaraki: “Aka jaqix Tatituruxay alkatchïnxa; Tatituy jichhax qhispiypan. Juparuxay munchixa, qhispiypanaya” sasa." 
Psalms22:9 Kunsay parlapxpan, jumaw taykaxan purakapat yuriyista; jarphipar samart'ayasaw uywasista." 
Psalms22:10 Nay janïr yurkipan uñjasista, taykaxan purakapatpach nayan Diosaxätaxa." 
Psalms22:11 Janikiy nayat jayarst'amti, t'aqhisiñar jalantirpachätwa, janiw khiti yanapt'iris utjkituti." 
Psalms22:12 Uñisirinakaxax urqu vacanakjamaw muyuntitu, Basán uraqin waxrasir urqu vacanakjamaw jalxatitu;" 
Psalms22:13 leonanakar uñtataw wararipxi, lakanakap jist'arataw chhukt'anipxitu." 
Psalms22:14 Nayasti waranukut umjamätwa, ch'akhanakaxas qhaqhanukutkamakiwa; chuymaxasti lik'ir uñtataw naya manqhan umatati," 
Psalms22:15 mallq'axax q'ala wañkatatawa, laxraxas laka manqhan lip'katatawa, ¡jiwañ laq'ar puriyañkamaw jumax jaquntista!" 
Psalms22:16 Jan wali jaqinakax anunakjamaw q'al muyuntitu; amparanakaxsa, kayunakaxsa q'al jurqhiritu." 
Psalms22:17 ¡ch'akhanakaxsa jakht'asiristwa! Uñisirinakaxasti aliqapuniw uñch'ukipxitu," 
Psalms22:18 jupanakkamaw isinakax jalanuqasipxi, suerte jaqtasaw isix katuntasipxi." 
Psalms22:19 Jumasti, Tatay, nayar ch'amañchirïtawa, ¡janikiy nayat jayankamti!, ¡jank'akiy nayar yanapt'irix jutam!" 
Psalms22:20 Espadampi jiwañat qhispiyita, anunakan amparapat jakañax qhispiyita;" 
Psalms22:21 leonanakan lakapat qhispiyita, ¡urqu vacanakan waxranakapat tuwaqt'ita!" 
Psalms22:22 Nayasti jilanakaxaruw jumat yatiyä, tantachasïwinakapan yupaychäma." 
Psalms22:23 Tatitur alkatirinaka, ¡Diosaruy jach'ar aptapxam! ¡Jacobun wawanakapa, juparuy jach'añchapxam! ¡Israelan wawanakapa, juparuy yupaychapxam!" 
Psalms22:24 Jupax janiw jan utjirin jaqinakarux jisk'achkiti, janiw jan yäqasas uñjkarakiti, janirakiw jupanakatakix imantaskiti. ¡Yanap mayipki ukapachax, jupax ist'iwa!" 
Psalms22:25 Arsutam phuqhirïtamat markam taypin jach'añchäma; arsutanakaxsti iyawsirinakam nayraqatan phuqharakï. 
Psalms22:26 T'aqhisiyat jaqinaka, sist'asiñkam manq'apxam; Tatitur thaqhirinaka, jupar yupaychapxam, walja maranak jakapxarakim." 
Psalms22:27 Taqpach jaqinaka, taqpach markanaka, aka uraqpachan jakir jaqinaka: Tatitut amtasipxam, jupar makhatxapxam; ¡nayraqatapar killt'asipxam!" 
Psalms22:28 Tatituw reyixa, jupaw taqi markanakarux apnaqi." 
Psalms22:29 Nayraqatapan alt'apxam, juparuk yupaychapxam, jilarkir utjirin jaqinaka, laq'ar tukur jaqinaka, jumanak pachpax janiw jakañanïpktati." 
Psalms22:30 Wawanakaxax Tatituruw yupaychapxani, jupatsti wiñayaw parlapxani;" 
Psalms22:31 jupanak qhipat yuririnakarusti, Tatitun chiqapar uñjirïtapat yatiyapxani, aski luratanakapat yatiyapxarakini." 
Psalms23:1 Tatituw awatirixaxa, janiw kunatsa t'aqhiskäti:" 
Psalms23:2 suma ch'uxña ch'ijinakaruw samart'ayitu; q'uma uma thiyanakaruw awatitu," 
Psalms23:3 jupaw machaq ch'am churitu, chiqa thakhinjam irpitu, sutipar jach'añchañ layku." 
Psalms23:4 Axsarkay laxa ch'amak chiqawja sarkasasa, janipuniw kunarus axsarkäti, nayampi chik saratam layku; uywa awatiñ lawamasa, thujrumasa, ch'am churitu." 
Psalms23:5 Uñisirinakaxan uñjkañaw manq'añ wakicharapista; kusisiñampiw phuqhantista, wali sumpun uñjarakista." 
Psalms23:6 Munasiñamampi khuyapayasiñamampix sapürupuniw nayampi chikäski, Tatay, utamansti wiñayapuniw jakä." 
Psalms24:1 Taqpach uraqix Tatitunkiwa, ukan utjirinakas jupankiwa, ukan jakirinakas jupankiwa." 
Psalms24:2 Tatituw aka uraqirux lamar qutxar utt'ayi, jupaw jawiranakxar utt'ayaraki." 
Psalms24:3 ¿Khitirak Tatitun qullupar makhataspasti? ¿Khitirak qullan utapankaspasti? 
Psalms24:4 Jan juch lurir jaqiw ukankaspa, q'uma chuyman jaqiw ukankaspa, yaqha diosanakar jan yupaychir jaqiw ukankaspa, k'ari juramento jan lurir jaqiw ukankarakispa." 
Psalms24:5 Tatitu Diosapa, Qhispiyiripa, jupakiw taqi kun churani, chiqaparuw uñjarakini." 
Psalms24:6 Ukhamäñapaw Tatitur thaqhirinakaxa, Jacobun Diosapar thaqhirinakaxa." 
Psalms24:7 ¡Wiñay punkunaka, jist'artapxam! ¡Jist'arat qhiparapxam, qhapaq markankir Reyiw mantani!" 
Psalms24:8 ¿Khitirak qhapaq markankir Reyisti? ¡Taqi ch'aman atipir Tatituwa! ¡Nuwasïwin jan axsarir Tatituwa! 
Psalms24:9 ¡Wiñay punkunaka, jist'artapxam! ¡Jist'arat qhiparapxam, qhapaq markankir Reyiw mantani!" 
Psalms24:10 ¿Khitirak qhapaq markankir Reyisti? ¡Taqi atipir Tatituwa! ¡Qhapaq markankir Reyiwa! 
Psalms25:1 Tatay, jumaruw mayisinsma;" 
Psalms25:2 Diosaxay, jumaruw taqi chuymamp alkatsma: janikiy p'inqa tukuñar jalantañax munamti. ¡Janikiy uñisirinakaxas nayat larusipxitpati!" 
Psalms25:3 ¡Jumar taqi chuymamp alkatirinakax janipun p'inqa tukupxpati! ¡Ina ch'usat jumar qallasir jaqinakay p'inqa tukuñarux puripxpan! 
Psalms25:4 Tatay, thakhim uñacht'ayita, thakhiman irpnaqasita;" 
Psalms25:5 jumat jan jithiqtas sarnaqayita; jumaw Diosaxätaxa, Qhispiyirixätasa. ¡Jumarukiw sapürus suyt'asksma!" 
Psalms25:6 Tatay, munasiñama, khuyapayasiñam churapkistäyäta ukat amtasikimaya," 
Psalms25:7 janikiy jucha luratanakaxat amtasimti, janirak wayna kankañaxan ñanqha luratanakaxatsa amtasimti. Tatay, khuyapayasiñam laykuy nayat amtasita, munasiñam laykuy amtasita." 
Psalms25:8 Tatitux askiwa, chiqaparakiwa; jupaw juchararanakan luratap chiqacht'i;" 
Psalms25:9 llamp'u chuymaninakarus jupaw chiqa thakhinjam irpi; aski kankañapan yaticharaki. 
Psalms25:10 Tatitux khuyapayasiñampi aski kankañampipuniw irpi, arust'äwipampi, arsutanakapampi imir jaqinakaruxa." 
Psalms25:11 Tatay, juchanakaxax waljapuniwa; sutiman jach'ätap laykuy pampacht'ita." 
Psalms25:12 Tatitur waqaychir jaqirux, kawkïr thaktix sarañapäki uk uñacht'ayi;" 
Psalms25:13 askinakampiw juparux phuqhanti, wawanakaparusti uraq katuyxaraki." 
Psalms25:14 Tatitux arkirinakapampix sum parlasi, jupanakarusti arust'äwir mantatap uñt'ayi." 
Psalms25:15 Nayax Tatiturukipuniw uñtta, jupaw taqi jan walt'añanakat qhispiyitu." 
Psalms25:16 Tatay, uñtanikitaya, nayat khuyapt'ayasita, sapakiw uñjasta, llakt'atarakïtwa." 
Psalms25:17 Chuymaxax juk'ampipuniw llakisi; taqi llakinakaxat irpst'asita. 
Psalms25:18 Llakinakaxaru, ch'ama tukutanakaxar uñtanim, taqi juchanakaxat pampacht'arakita." 
Psalms25:19 Uñisirinakaxan waljanïtap uñtanim, jiwayañ chuymampiw uñisipxitu." 
Psalms25:20 ¡Arxatt'asikitaya, jiwañat qhispiyakitaya! ¡Janikiy p'inqa tukuñar jalantañax munamti, nayax jumampi arxatayasiñatakiw thaqsma!" 
Psalms25:21 Aski kankañaxampi, chiqa kankañaxampix arxatapxitpan, jumaruw taqi chuymamp katuyassma." 
Psalms25:22 ¡Diosaxay, Israel markamarux taqi t'aqhisiñanakapat qhispiyakimaya!" 
Psalms26:1 Tatay, chiqaparuy uñjita, jakañaxax jan kamskayawa. Tatay, jumaruw taqpach katuyassma;" 
Psalms26:2 chuymax uñantita, ¡yant'arakita!, ¡taqi amuyunakax yant'ita, chuymax manqhan amtatanaksa yant'arakita!" 
Psalms26:3 Munasiñamat amtasipuntwa, jumarusti chiqpach chuymaxampiw arksma;" 
Psalms26:4 janiw k'ari jaqinakampix qunt'askti, janirakiw ch'uxña chuyman jaqinakampis chikachaskti." 
Psalms26:5 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakan tantachasïwinakaparux uñistwa; ¡janipuniw ñanqha luririnakampix utjaskti! 
Psalms26:6 Tatay, amparanakaxas q'umachataw makhatansma, juchaxatsa pampachataw altaramar jak'achasinsma," 
Psalms26:7 jach'añchañ q'uchunak q'ucht'asisa, muspharkañ luräwinakam yatiyasa." 
Psalms26:8 Tatay, qullan utamarux munastwa, qhapaq kankañamax ukankiwa." 
Psalms26:9 Janikiy jucharar jaqinakampi chikax jakañax apaqistati; janikiy jaqi jiwayirinakarjamas puriyistati," 
Psalms26:10 uka jaqinakan amparanakapax ñanqha lurañanakampi, qullqi chilltayasiñanakampi phuqt'atawa." 
Psalms26:11 Sarnaqäwixasti jan kun kamskayawa; ¡nayar qhispiyasita, nayat khuyapt'ayasita!" 
Psalms26:12 Kayuxax ch'ullqhi uraqxar suma takt'atawa; ¡Tatiturux qullan markap taypin jach'añchä! 
Psalms27:1 Tatituw qhanaxasa, qhispiyasiñaxasa, ¿khitirurak axsarästi? Tatituw jakañaxar arxati, ¿khitirurak axsarästi?" 
Psalms27:2 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakasa, uñisirinakaxasa, nayar chhukxatasin jiwayañatakiw mayacht'asipxi; ukampis jupanakakiw lanqtasxapxi, tinkxapxaraki." 
Psalms27:3 Nuwasir tamas nayatak tantachasiskpan, chuymaxax janiw khathatkaniti; nayar jalxatañatakis wakichasisipkpan, janiw nayax llakiskäti." 
Psalms27:4 Tatitur mä mayisiñaxakiw utji, ukakirak munta: jakañaxkam utapan utjasiña, utapan jupar yupaychañataki, qhapaq kankañap uñjasin kusisiñataki." 
Psalms27:5 Jan walt'añ urunak purinkan ukapachaxa, Tatituw utapan imantitani; ch'iwipampiw imxäsitani. ¡Mä qarqa patxarjamaw sayt'ayitani!" 
Psalms27:6 Ukapachaw p'iqix waytä, uñisirinakaxar aynacht'ayasa; ukapachaw utapan wilañchanak churä, kusisiñat arnaqasï, Tatituruw kusisiñat q'uchurakï." 
Psalms27:7 Tatay, jumaruw arnaqasinsma, ist'akitaya. Nayat khuyapt'ayasita, ¡jaysakitaya!" 
Psalms27:8 Chuymaxax situwa: “Tatitur thaqtam.” Nayasti, Tatay, jumaruw thaqtsma." 
Psalms27:9 ¡Janikiy nayatak imantasimti! ¡Janikiy q'apisiñampi jaqunukustati! ¡Jumakiw nayan arxatirixätaxa! Janikiy jan arxatirin sapak jaytanukustati, jumätaw Diosaxaxa, qhispiyirixasa." 
Psalms27:10 Awkixas, taykaxas apanukchitani, juma, Tatituw nayar uywasiskitäta." 
Psalms27:11 Tatay, thakhim uñacht'ayita; chiqa thakhiman irpita, uñisirinakaxan utjatap layku;" 
Psalms27:12 janikiy uñisirixan amparapar katuyistati, k'ari irkatirinakaw nayatak sarti, qhuru jaqinakaw sartaraki." 
Psalms27:13 Nayasti aka jakañ uraqinxa, Tatitun munasiñap uñjapunïwa." 
Psalms27:14 ¡Tatitur taqpach chuymamp iyawsam! ¡Ch'amañchasim, jan axsaramti! ¡Tatitur taqpach chuymamp iyawsam!" 
Psalms28:1 Arxatir Tatituxay, jumaruw art'asinsma. ¡Janikiy mayisitaxar jan ist'irix tukumti! Janitix ist'kitasma ukasti, jiwatanakampi chikäxiristwa." 
Psalms28:2 Arnaqt'asis yanap mayisksma ukapachax ist'akitaya, qullan utam uñkatat amparanakax aytankta ukapachax jaysakitaya." 
Psalms28:3 Janikiy qhuru jaqinakamp chika qatatistati, janikiy ñanqha luririnakampis chikachasiyistati, pata chuymakiw jaqi masipampi sumankirix tukupxi, chuymapasti ñanqhan phuqhantatawa." 
Psalms28:4 Luratanakaparjam jupanakarux uñjam; jan wali sarnaqäwiparjam uñjam; jan wali luratanakaparjam mutuyam. 
Psalms28:5 Jupanakax janiw Diosan luräwinakapat amtasipkiti, janiw luratanakapat yatiñ munapkiti, ¡jupay jan mayampitak jupanakar tukjpan!" 
Psalms28:6 ¡Tatitux qullanäpan!, jupaw mayisitaxarux ist'i;" 
Psalms28:7 Tatituw jach'a ch'aman arxatirixaxa; juparuw taqpach katuyasta, jupasti yanapt'ituwa. Chuymaxax kusisitawa, Tatituruw q'uchü, yuspagararakï." 
Psalms28:8 Tatituw markapar ch'amañchirixa, juparakiw ajllit reyipar yanapirisa, arxatirisa." 
Psalms28:9 Tatay, markamarux qhispiyakimaya; jumar iyawsirinakar askinak churam. Mä awatirjamay jupanakar uñjam; ¡wiñayapun amparamamp irpam!" 
Psalms29:1 Tatitun wawanakapa, Tatitur yupaychapxam, qhapaq kankañaparusa, ch'amaparus jach'añchapxam," 
Psalms29:2 Tatitun qhapaq sutip jach'ar aptapxam, qullan utapan Tatitur yupaychapxam." 
Psalms29:3 Tatitun arupax lamar qutan ist'asi, qhapaq kankañan Diosax arup qhuxuqiyi; ¡Tatitux jach'a lamar qutxan ist'asiyi!" 
Psalms29:4 Tatitun arupax wali ch'amaniw ist'asi; Tatitun arupax axsarkayaw ist'asi. 
Psalms29:5 Tatitun arupax cedro quqanak qhaqhari, ¡Líbano uraqinkir cedro quqanak tinkurayi!" 
Psalms29:6 Líbano qullunakarux urqu vacanakarjamaw t'isktayi, Sirión qullunakarusti vaca qallurjamaw thuqtayi." 
Psalms29:7 Tatitun arupax taqi tuqiruw nina lawrayi; 
Psalms29:8 Tatitun arupax ch'usa wasararuw khathatiyi; ¡Tatituw Cadés wasararux khathatiyi! 
Psalms29:9 Tatitun arupax roble sat quqanak khiwiliyi, ch'uminaksti jan quqan tukusiyaraki. Qullan utapan taqiniw jupar jach'añchapxi." 
Psalms29:10 Tatituw jallurux apnaqi; ¡jupaw wiñay reyjamax qunt'asi! 
Psalms29:11 Tatituw markaparux ch'am churi; jupaw markaparux sumankañ churi. 
Psalms30:1 Tatay, jumaruw yupaychsma, nayar qhispiyatamata, uñisirinakaxan nayat jan larusiyatamata." 
Psalms30:2 Dios Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, jumasti waliptayistawa;" 
Psalms30:3 Tatay, jumaw jiwañat qhispiyista; jakañ churista, jiwañat qhispiyista." 
Psalms30:4 Tatitun arkirinakapa, ¡jupar q'uchupxam!, ¡qullan sutipar yuspagarapxam!" 
Psalms30:5 Q'apisiñapax mä juk'atakikiwa, munasiñapasti wiñayatakiwa. Jayp'u tuqirutix jachañax puristanixa, willjta tuqirux kusisiñaw utjxistani." 
Psalms30:6 Nayax walin jikxatasisax säyätwa: “Janipuniw kunas tinkuykitaniti” sasa. 
Psalms30:7 Tatay, khuyapayasiñaman suma chiqaruw sayt'ayista, ukampis nayatak imantasitamatxa, axsarañat pächasiñaruw purta." 
Psalms30:8 Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma; Tatay, jumaruw achikt'asinsma:" 
Psalms30:9 ¿Kunarak jiwataxamp jikxatasmasti?, ¿kunarak amay imäwir mantataxamp apsusmasti? ¡Jiwatanakax janiw yuspagarkiristamti, janirakiw aski kankañamatsa parlapkaspati!" 
Psalms30:10 Tatay, ist'akitaya, khuyapt'ayasikitaya; Tatay, ¡nayar yanapt'akitaya!" 
Psalms30:11 Jachañaxarux kusisiñaruw kipstaytaxa; llaki isi apaqasinxa, kusisiñ isimpiw isthapiyista." 
Psalms30:12 Dios Tatay, ukat ajayuxax jan amukt'as ¡jach'añchañ q'uchunak q'uchuni, jumarusti yuspagarapunïmawa!" 
Psalms31:1 Israelan Diosapa, jumax chiqapar uñjir Diosätawa; janikiy p'inqachjat uñjasiyistati. ¡Qhispiyasikitaya, jumaruw katuyasinsma!" 
Psalms31:2 Ist'akitaya, ¡jank'akiy nayar qhispiyir jutita! Nayan imantasiñ qarqaxaruy tukum, ¡qhispiyasiñ utaxaruy tukurakim!" 
Psalms31:3 Jumaw arxatir qarqaxätaxa, imantasiñ utaxätasa. Sutim laykuy irpita, imarakita." 
Psalms31:4 ¡Sipit uchatanakat wayst'ita, jumakïtaw nayan arxatirixaxa!" 
Psalms31:5 Amparamaruw ajayux katuyassma; ¡Tatay, chiqpach Diosay, qhispiyasikitaya!" 
Psalms31:6 Yaqha diosanakar yupaychirirux uñisipuntwa. Nayasti Tatituruw taqi chuymamp katuyasta. 
Psalms31:7 Munasiñamaw kusisiñ churitu. Jumaw llakinakax amuyista, jakañaxan chijinakapsa uñjarakta;" 
Psalms31:8 uñisirinakaxat qhispiyista; ¡suma thakhiruw kayunakax takt'ayista! 
Psalms31:9 Tatay, nayat khuyapt'ayasita, jan walt'añar jalantirjamätwa. Nayranakaxax llakimp ch'amakt'atawa, taqpach janchixasa, chuymaxas tukusiskiwa." 
Psalms31:10 ¡Jakañaxax llakimpiw aynacht'aski, sarnaqañ urunakaxax ayquñampiw tukusiski! Llakisiñaw ch'amaxarux tukuntaski; ¡janchixas jan ch'amaniw jikxatasi!" 
Psalms31:11 Uñisirinakaxatakix larusiñakïxtwa, uta jak'a masixatakis sawkasiñakïxtwa, nayar uñt'irinakatakis axsarkañätwa. ¡Nayar uñjasax kawkhansa jaltxapxakiwa!" 
Psalms31:12 Jiwatarjamaw armanukxapxitu, t'unjat qirur uñtatakïxtwa." 
Psalms31:13 Jaqinakan nayxat parlasitanakap ist'ta: “Taqi chiqas axsarañan phuqhantatawa.” Mayar tukt'asakiw nayar aynacht'ayañatakix amtapxi; ¡nayar jiwayañatakiw amtapxaraki! 
Psalms31:14 Nayasti, Tatay, jumaruw katuyassma; “¡jumaw nayan Diosaxäta!” saraksmawa." 
Psalms31:15 Jakañaxax amparamankiwa; ¡nayar arknaqir uñisirinakaxat qhispiyita! 
Psalms31:16 Uywatamarux khuyapayasiñampiy uñtanim, munasiñam laykuy qhispiyita." 
Psalms31:17 Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, ¡janikiy p'inqa tukuñar nukt'istati! ¡Ñanqha lurir jaqinakar p'inqa tukuyam; jupanakarux manqhapachar jaquntam!" 
Psalms31:18 K'arisir jaqinakax amukt'apxpan, jisk'achjasiñampiw aski jaqinakxat parlas chuymanakap ust'ayapxi." 
Psalms31:19 ¡Tatay, kunja jach'as munasiñamax jumar waqaychirinakatakixa! Mä qurïkaspas ukham imtaxa, jumar katuyasirinakarusti, taqin uñjkañaw munasiñam lakirpaytaxa." 
Psalms31:20 Jupanakampïtamat ñanqha luririnakan jan wali amtäwinakapat qhispiytaxa; uñisirinakapampi jan tuqiyañatakisti jupanakarux utamaruw imanttaxa. 
Psalms31:21 Tatitux jach'añchatäpan, jupax llakisiñ urunakaxan, munasiñapampiw muspharkañanak lurarapitu." 
Psalms31:22 Llakimp atipjatax säyätwa: “Tatitux nayraqatapat jaqunukxituwa” sasa; jumar arnaqasinsma ukapachasti, art'asitaxarux ist'istawa." 
Psalms31:23 Tatitur iyawsirinaka, jupar munasipxam. Tatitux aski arkirinakaparux imiwa, jach'a jach'a tukurinakarusti lurataparjamaruw juchañchi." 
Psalms31:24 Tatitur suyt'irinaka, ch'amañchasipxam, jan axsarapxamti." 
Psalms32:1 Khititix taqpach juchapat q'umachat jikxataski uka jaqix kusisiñaniwa. 
Psalms32:2 Ñanqha jan amtir jaqix kusisiñaniwa, juchapat Tatitump jan irkatayasiñ utjatap layku." 
Psalms32:3 Juchanakax janïr arsusiñkamaxa, janchixax k'achat k'achataw jachataxat aynacht'askäna," 
Psalms32:4 amparamax uruy arumaw jatxattasin t'aqhisiyitäna. Lupin suwantir panqarjamaw wañsurakiyäta. 
Psalms32:5 Jucha lurataxatsti, jan akch'as imaqasaw arsusta; juchanakax jumar arsusiñatakiw amtta, Tatay, jumasti juchanakaxat pampachistawa." 
Psalms32:6 Ukatpï jumar iyawsirinakax jan walt'añanakan jumar mayisinipxätamxa, jan walt'añanakax walja umanakjamas llumintasinkpan, janipuniw jupanakan ukakamax purkaniti." 
Psalms32:7 Jumaw imantasiñaxätaxa: jan walt'añanakat qhispiyista, atipjäwi q'uchunakampiw muyuntayista." 
Psalms32:8 Tatitux situwa: “Nayranakaxax jumaruw uñch'ukisktam. Nayaw yatichaskäma, nayaw amuyt'ayaskäma, nayaw sarañamäki uka thakhi uñachayaskäma." 
Psalms32:9 Jumasti jan caballor uñtatämti, janirak mular uñtatämsa ukanakax janiw amuyapkaspati, ukanakar apnaqañatakix jakimampi uchantas apnaqañawa, jan ukham uchatax janiw jak'achasipkiristamti” sasa." 
Psalms32:10 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax llakinakampiw t'aqhisipxani; Tatitur iyawsirinakarusti munasiñapaw imani. 
Psalms32:11 Aski jaqinaka, Tatitun kusisipxam, chiqa chuymaninaka, Tatitur kusisiñat jach'añchapxam." 
Psalms33:1 Aski jaqinaka: Tatitur art'asipxam, aski jaqinakan yupaychäwipax askipuniwa." 
Psalms33:2 Tatiturux q'uchunakampi yupaychapxam, arpa, salterio ukanakampi chik q'uchupxam," 
Psalms33:3 machaq q'uchumpi yupaychapxam, ¡juparux wali sumpun jallallt'apxam!" 
Psalms33:4 Tatitun arunakapax chiqapawa, luratanakapax arsutap phuqhirïtap uñachayi." 
Psalms33:5 Tatitux askimpiru chiqapampiruw munasi; ¡munasiñapax uraqpacharuw phuqhanti! 
Psalms33:6 Tatitux arupampiw alaxpach lurt'i; inti, phaxsi, warawara taqi ukanak utjayi." 
Psalms33:7 Jupaw lamar quta umanak mayawjaruk tantthapi. 
Psalms33:8 Aka uraqin taqpachan Tatitur axsartapxam; ¡akapachan jakirinakax jupar waqaychapxpan! 
Psalms33:9 Jupax arupampikiw taqi kun utt'ayawayi; arsutapampikiw taqi kun sayt'ayawayi. 
Psalms33:10 Tatitux ñanqha lurir markanakan amtatanakap q'al aynacht'ayi," 
Psalms33:11 Tatitun amtäwinakapasti wiñayatakipuniw sayt'i. 
Psalms33:12 Tatitut Diosanïki uka markax kusisiñaniwa, jupar ajllisipki uka markax kusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms33:13 Tatitux alaxpachatpach uñtani, taqi jaqinakaruw uñjaraki;" 
Psalms33:14 akapachan taqpach jakir jaqinakarux utjäwipatpach uñch'ukisinki; 
Psalms33:15 jupaw taqinir amuy churi, juparakiw taqi luräwinakap uñch'ukiski." 
Psalms33:16 Janiw kawkïr reyis jach'a nuwasir tamanïtap layku atipkiti, janirakiw nuwasir jaqis wali ch'amanïtap layku qhispkiti;" 
Psalms33:17 caballonakapax atipañatak janiw kunäkisa; wali ch'amanïsipkpasa, janiw qhispiyapkaspati." 
Psalms33:18 Tatitusti iyawsirinakaparux sum uñjaski, munasiñapar katuyasirinakarus imaskiwa," 
Psalms33:19 jiwan amparapat jupanakar qhispiyañataki, mach'a pachanakan chuymachañataki." 
Psalms33:20 Jiwasanakax Tatituruw taqi chuymamp iyawsapxtan: ¡jupaw arxatirisaxa, jark'aqirisasa!" 
Psalms33:21 Jupampiw chuymanakasax kusisi; qullan sutiparuw taqi chuymamp iyawsapxtan. 
Psalms33:22 ¡Tatay, khuyapayasiñamax nanakxar purinpan, kamisatix jumat suyapksma ukhamarjama!" 
Psalms34:1 Jan qarjasisaw Tatiturux jach'añchä, lakaxax jupar jach'añchapuniniwa." 
Psalms34:2 Ajayuxax Tatitunkasaw jach'achasi; ¡llamp'u chuymaninaka, ist'apxam, kusisipxam!" 
Psalms34:3 Tatitun jach'a kankañap taqpachan yupaychapxañäni. 
Psalms34:4 Tatituruw nayax art'asta, jupasti ist'ituwa, taqi llakinakaxatarak irpsutu." 
Psalms34:5 Jupar uñtirinakasti, kusisitaw qhiparapxani, janipuniw p'inqachat uñjasipkaniti." 
Psalms34:6 Tatitur art'asir llakit jaqirux, jupax ist'iwa, taqi llakinakapat qhispiyaraki." 
Psalms34:7 Tatitun angelapaw iyawsirinakarux uñjaski, Tatitur waqaychirinakarus imaskaraki." 
Psalms34:8 Yant'apxam, uñjapxarakim, Tatitux suma jaqiwa. ¡Jupar taqi chuymamp makhatirix kusisiñaniwa!" 
Psalms34:9 Jupan qullanañchat jaqinakapa, Tatitur axsartapxam, jupar axsartirinakarux janiw kunas pist'kaniti." 
Psalms34:10 Qamirinakax jan kunaniruw tukupxi, manq'at t'aqhisipxaraki, Tatitur thaqhirinakasti janiw kunatsa t'aqhisipkaniti." 
Psalms34:11 Wawanakaxay, jutapxam, ist'apxita: Tatitur axsartañ yatichapxäma." 
Psalms34:12 ¿Walja maranak jakañ munasmati? ¿Taqi kunan phuqt'at jakañ munasmati? 
Psalms34:13 Ukhamax ñanqha arunak jan arsumti, janirak k'ari arunaksa parlamti." 
Psalms34:14 Ñanqha lurañat jithiqtasim, askïki ukakpun luram, sumankañ thaqham, qhipap arkarakim." 
Psalms34:15 Tatitux aski jaqinakaruw imaski, arnaqasitanakaparus ist'arakiwa." 
Psalms34:16 Tatitux ñanqha luririnakatakiw sayt'i, aka uraqit jupanakar chhaqtayañataki." 
Psalms34:17 Tatitux aski jaqin arnaqasitaparux ist'iwa, taqi llakinakapatsa waysurakiwa." 
Psalms34:18 Tatitux llakimpi aynacht'atanakan jak'apankaskiwa, aynacht'at chuymap qhispiyañatakix jak'apankaskiwa." 
Psalms34:19 Tatitunkirinakax t'aqhisiñankapxiwa, ukampis Tatituw uka t'aqhisiñanakar atipjañ yanapi." 
Psalms34:20 Tatituw jupanakarux imaski, janiw kuna jan walt'añas jupanakxar purkaniti." 
Psalms34:21 Ñanqha lurir jaqirux pachpa ñanqha luratapaw jiwayi, aski jaqir uñisirinakasti mutuyatäpxaniwa." 
Psalms34:22 Tatitusti uywatanakaparux qhispiyiwa; ¡jupar iyawsirinakax janiw juchañchatäpkaniti! 
Psalms35:1 Tatay, nayar nuwirinakampix jumay nuwasim; nayampi ch'axwirinakampix jumay ch'axwam." 
Psalms35:2 Jark'aqasiñam katxarusim, yanapt'iriy jutita;" 
Psalms35:3 lanzam apxarusim, nayar nuwañatak jalxatirinakar saykatam; ¡nayaw atipjayirimätxa! sitaya." 
Psalms35:4 Nayar jiwayañ munirinakax, mä p'inqay atipjayasipxpan, nayatak ñanqha amtirinakasa, p'inqachat jaltxapxarakpan;" 
Psalms35:5 ¡thayan apat jipir uñtatäpxpan; Tatitun angelapan jaqunukut uñjasipxpan! 
Psalms35:6 ¡Thakhipax ch'amakäpan, llust'arakïpan, Tatitun angelapamp arktat uñjasipxpan!" 
Psalms35:7 Ina ch'usat nayatakix sipit wakichapxi; jiwañ p'iyanak jalantañaxatak wakichapxi. 
Psalms35:8 ¡Chijix akatjamat jupanakar katuntpan! ¡Pachpa sipitanakapar jalt'apxpan! ¡Jan walt'añar puripxpan! 
Psalms35:9 Nayasti Tatitumpiw kusisï, nayar qhispiyatapat layku." 
Psalms35:10 Taqpach chuymaxampiw arsü: “Tatay, ¿khitirak jumjam utjisti? Jila ch'aman jaqinakan amparapata, jan yäqat jaqirux qhispiytaxa, ch'ama apjir jaqita jan kunan jaqirux qhispiytaxa.”" 
Psalms35:11 K'ari irkatirinakaw nayatakix uñsti, kuntix jan yatkta uk jiskhipxitu." 
Psalms35:12 Aski lurataxatxa, jan walimpiw kutiyapxitu, ukhamätanakapax walpun llakisiyitu;" 
Psalms35:13 jupanakar usuntir uñjasaxa, walpun jupanakat llakisïyäta, khankha isimpi isthapisisaw ayuno luräyäta, chuyma manqhixansti, Tatituruw mayirapïyäta." 
Psalms35:14 Taykaxas jiwkaspa, jilaxasa, masixas jiwkaspa ukhamaw chuymas kawkst'at sarnaqäyäta." 
Psalms35:15 Liwisitax uñjasasti, taqpachaniw nayat larusipxi; jan uñt'at jaqinakjamaw nayarux wal nuwjapxitu." 
Psalms35:16 Qhuru kankañampiw nayat sawkasipxitu, uñisiñat laka ch'akhanakap t'urusirapipxitu." 
Psalms35:17 Tatay, ¿janit kuns jupanakarux lurkäta? ¡Uka jan wali jaqinakax jiwayañpun munapxitu! ¡Jakañaxay qhispiyita, ukakiw utjxitu!" 
Psalms35:18 Nayasti qullan tantachasïwin yuspagaräma; ¡waranq waranqa jaqinak taypin yupaychäma! 
Psalms35:19 Uñisirinakaxax janikiy nayat larusipxitpati; uñisirinakaxax janikiy ina ch'usat nayranakapsa ch'irmisipxpati. 
Psalms35:20 Jupanakax janiw suman jakasiñ thaqhapkiti, suman jakasir jaqinakar k'arintañatakikiw amtasipki;" 
Psalms35:21 wali jach'at nayatak lakapsa jist'arapxi: “Uñtapxam, nayrasampiw uñjtanxa” sasa." 
Psalms35:22 ¡Tatay, jumaw taqi kun uñjtaxa! ¡Janikiy amukt'amti! ¡Janikiy nayat jayarst'amti!" 
Psalms35:23 Dios Tatay, ¡arxatt'asitaya! Tatay, chiqaparuy uñjita." 
Psalms35:24 Dios Tatay, chiqapar uñjañamampiy taripita. ¡Janikiy nayat larusipxitpati!" 
Psalms35:25 Janikiy jupanakax sapxpati: “¡Ukpï uñjañ munäyätanxa! ¡Jichhax jan mayampitakiw aynacht'aytanxa!” sasa. 
Psalms35:26 Llakir puritaxat kusisirinakax p'inqachjatay uñjasipxpan; nayat juk'ampi amuyasirinakax p'inqachjatay sarnaqapxpan. 
Psalms35:27 Nayan atipañax munirinakasti q'uchupxpan, kusisipxarakpan, jan qarjasis arsupxpan: “¡Tatitux jach'a ch'amaniwa, uywatapar sum jakasir uñjasax kusisiwa!” sasa." 
Psalms35:28 Aski kankañamat arsupunïwa; ¡sapüruw yupaycharakïma! 
Psalms36:1 Ñanqha lurir jaqirux ñanqhaw chuymapar parlxayi. Diosar axsartañasti janipuniw jupan utjkiti. 
Psalms36:2 Jupax aytat jaqïkaspas ukham amuyasi, ñanqha luratapan jan walïtapsa janiw amuykiti." 
Psalms36:3 Q'añu arunak parlir k'ari jaqiwa, aski lurañanakxa, janipuniw amuykiti." 
Psalms36:4 Ikiñapan ikintatax jan wali lurañanak amti; ñanqha lurañ thakhir chinkatatjamawa, ñanqha lurañsa janiw apanukuñ munkiti." 
Psalms36:5 Tatay, munasiñamax alaxpachkamaw puri; aski kankañamasti alaxpachkamaw makhati." 
Psalms36:6 Chiqapar uñjañ kankañamax jach'a qullunakjamawa; arsutanakamasti jach'a lamar umanakjamawa. Tatay, jumaw jaqinakarusa, animalanakarus imasktaxa." 
Psalms36:7 ¡Dios Tatay, munasiñamax muspharkayawa! ¡Chhiqhanakamampi imantayasiñatakiw jaqinakax jumar thaqhapxtam!" 
Psalms36:8 Utaman utjir manq'ampix sist'atäpxiwa; muxsa uman jawirat umayaraktaxa," 
Psalms36:9 juman jakkir umax utji, qhanamasti qhan uñjayapxitu." 
Psalms36:10 Jumar uñt'irinakarux khuyapt'ayaskakim, q'uma chuymaninakarusti chiqapar uñjaskakim." 
Psalms36:11 Jach'a jach'a tukurinakax jan takisitpati, ñanqha lurir jaqinakas janirak jaqunukutpati." 
Psalms36:12 ¡Ñanqha luririnakan aynacht'añap uñjapxpan! ¡Jan mayampitak sartkiriw tinkupxi! 
Psalms37:1 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakar uñjasax jan q'apisimti, janirak ñanqha luririnakarus yäqamti," 
Psalms37:2 jupanakax jank'akiw alinakjam pharsupxi; ¡ch'uxña qurjamaw wañsupxi! 
Psalms37:3 Tatitur taqi chuymamp alkatasax ask luram, aka uraqin utjasim, chiqaparak sayt'am." 
Psalms37:4 Tatiturux suma chuymamp munasim, jupasti mayisitamarjamaw churätam." 
Psalms37:5 Tatitun amparapar sarnaqäwim katuyasim; jupar taqi chuymamp alkatam, jupasti jank'akiw yanapt'ätam." 
Psalms37:6 Aski kankañam taqinin uñjkay qhantayani, kunjämtix chika urun intix qhantki ukhama." 
Psalms37:7 Tatitun nayraqatapan amukt'am; jupan yanapap llamp'u chuymamp suyam. Ñanqha lurir jaqin nayrar sartatapat jan q'apisimti, ñanqhanak amtir jaqitsa janirak mayjt'asimti." 
Psalms37:8 Q'apisiñ apanukum, chuym ch'amakt'ayasiñ jaytanukum, ukham lurasax jan walirupuniw purisma." 
Psalms37:9 Ñanqha luririnakax markat jaqunukutäpxaniwa, Tatitur katuyasirinakasti suma uraqi katuqapxani." 
Psalms37:10 Mä juk'a urunakatsti ñanqha lurir jaqinakax janiw utjkxaniti; jupanakar thaqkätasa, janiw jikxatkätati." 
Psalms37:11 Llamp'u chuymaninakax suma uraqi katuqapxani, sumankañan jakasipxani." 
Psalms37:12 Ñanqha lurir jaqix, aski jaqirux jan wal lurañ amti, phiñasit nayrampiw uñkati." 
Psalms37:13 Tatitusti uka ñanqha jaqit larusiwa, tukusiñ urus jupatakix purinxarakiwa." 
Psalms37:14 Ñanqha jaqinakax espadanakap apsusipxi, mich'inak antutt'añ sum jiyantapxi, jan kunan jaqinakar aynacht'ayañataki, ¡chiqap sarnaqir jaqinakar jiwayañataki!" 
Psalms37:15 Ukampis pachpa espadapaw chuymapar chhuqhuntani, mich'inak antutt'añapas p'akinuqatäniwa." 
Psalms37:16 Aski jaqin mä juk'ak utjatapaxa, ñanqha jaqin yänakapat sipansa wali askiwa." 
Psalms37:17 Tatitux ñanqha jaqinakarux tukjaniwa, aski jaqinakarusti uywasirakiniwa." 
Psalms37:18 Tatitux aski jaqinakarux imasipuniwa, suma uraqi katuqapki ukax wiñayatakïniwa." 
Psalms37:19 Jan wali urunakan manq'añax jan utjkani ukkhaxa, janiw p'inqachatäpkaniti, manq'añapasti jilarkiripunïniwa." 
Psalms37:20 Ñanqha jaqinakax waña alinakar uñtataw nakhapxani, Tatitur uñisirinakax jiwq'ir uñtataw chhaqtapxani." 
Psalms37:21 Ñanqha jaqix mayt'asisin janiw kutt'aykxiti, aski jaqisti khuyapt'ayasiri, suma chuymaniwa." 
Psalms37:22 Tatitun qullanaptayat jaqinakax suma uraqi katuqasipxani, jupan ñanqhachatanakasti jaqunukutäpxaniwa." 
Psalms37:23 Tatitux jaqirux suma thakhinjam irpi, jupar kusisiykir thakhiruw irpxati;" 
Psalms37:24 liwisin ukasa, jank'akiw sarthapini, Tatituw juparux amparapat wayxäsiski." 
Psalms37:25 Nayax waynäyätwa, jichhasti ch'ama tukutäxtwa, ukampis janipuniw aski jaqir apanukut uñjkti, janirakiw wawanakapar mayjasir uñjkti." 
Psalms37:26 Aski jaqix sapüruw khuyapayasi, mayt'araki; wawanakapasti aski katuqäwïkaspas ukhamawa." 
Psalms37:27 Ñanqha lurañat jithiqtasim, kunatix askïki ukarak luram, jakañamatakisti utax utjapunïtamwa." 
Psalms37:28 Tatitux aski kankañar muniriwa, arkirinakaparusti janiw jaytanukkiti; jucharar jaqinakarux tukjiwa, jan wawanakanirak jayti." 
Psalms37:29 Aski jaqinakax suma uraqi katuqapxani, wiñayatakiw ukan jakapxarakini." 
Psalms37:30 Aski jaqix yatiñ kankañampiw parli; chiqa jaqisti chiqap parli. 
Psalms37:31 Tatit Diosapan kamachinakap chuymapar katxäsi; ¡kayunakapasti janipuniw llust'kaniti! 
Psalms37:32 Ñanqha jaqix aski jaqiruw uñch'uki, jupar jiwayañataki amtaraki;" 
Psalms37:33 Tatitusti janiw amparapar jalt'aykaniti, janirakiw juchañchat uñjasiñap munkaniti." 
Psalms37:34 Tatitur taqpach chuymamp katuyasim, juparurak jaysam, jupaw uraqi katuqañamatakix ch'amañchätam. ¡Pachpa nayranakamampiw ñanqha jaqinakan t'unjatätap uñjäta!" 
Psalms37:35 Ñanqha jaqiruw jach'achasir uñjta, mä jach'a quqjam jilantaskir uñjta;" 
Psalms37:36 jupasti jiwxataynawa, thaqhiriw sarta, janiw jupar jikxatkti." 
Psalms37:37 Aski jaqir sumpach uñtam: jutir jakañapax sumankañ jakañawa. 
Psalms37:38 Tatitur kutkatasirinakax tukjatäpxaniwa; akat qhiparusti taqpach t'unjatäpxaniwa. 
Psalms37:39 Aski jaqinakax Tatitut yanap katuqapxi, juparakiw jan walt'añ urunakan arxatiripaxa." 
Psalms37:40 Tatituw jupanakar qhispiñ yanapi, qhuru jaqinakan amparapat jaltayi, qhispiyaraki, jupar taqpach chuymamp thaqhapxatap layku." 
Psalms38:1 Tatay, janiy q'apisiñamamp tuqintistati, janikiy phiñasiñamamp mutuyistati." 
Psalms38:2 Mich'inakamax nayaruw chhuqhuntitu; ¡amparamax walpun nayar t'aqhisiyitu! 
Psalms38:3 Jucha lurataxat q'apisitamatxa, taqpach janchixaw usuntata; ¡ch'akhanakaxas taqpach p'akiratawa!" 
Psalms38:4 Juchanakaxax sintipuniw jatxattitu; janipuniw q'ipxäsirjamäkxti. 
Psalms38:5 Jan amuyt'asirïtax laykux chhuxrinakaxax thujsantaskiwa. 
Psalms38:6 Sapürus llakitakiw sarnaqta, p'iqixas alt'ata, q'ala aynacht'ata." 
Psalms38:7 Jikhanixax ninjamaw nakhitu; ¡janchixas q'ala usuntatawa! 
Psalms38:8 Jan akch'as ch'amani, q'ala tukjatätwa; ¡ayqutaxas chuymax manqhitpach mistu!" 
Psalms38:9 Tatay, jumaw taqpach amtatanakax uñt'taxa, ¡chuymaxan llakisitapas jumatakix qhanäskiwa!" 
Psalms38:10 Chuymaxax walipuniw putuqi, janiw ch'amas utjkxituti, ¡nayraxas juykt'xarakiwa!" 
Psalms38:11 Uñt'at masinakaxasa, nayar uñt'irinakas jithiqtxapxituwa, wila masinakaxas jayatak uñch'ukipxitu." 
Psalms38:12 Nayar jiwayañ munirinakax sipitanak ucharapipxitu; aynacht'añax munirinakasti jiwayañ munapxitu, sapüruw nayar jan walt'ayañatak lup'ipxi." 
Psalms38:13 Janis ist'kiristxa ukham uqaraw tukta; amutükiristsa ukhamaw lakax jan jist'arkti. 
Psalms38:14 Jan ist'ir jaqir uñtatätwa, jan arsusir jaqjamarakïtwa." 
Psalms38:15 Dios Tatay, jumarukiw nayax suyt'sma, jumakiy jupanakarux saykatam." 
Psalms38:16 Nayat jan larusipxañapatakiw mayt'assma, liwiskä ukkha jan kusisipxañapatakiw achikt'assma." 
Psalms38:17 Chiqpachansa, niya tinkurjamätwa; llakixasti janipuniw apaqtkituti." 
Psalms38:18 ¡Taqi juchanakax arsusxä, ukanakaw walpun t'aqhisiyitu!" 
Psalms38:19 Uñisirinakaxax waljaniptiwa; waljanipuniw ina ch'usat uñisipxitu. 
Psalms38:20 Aski luratat jan walimpiw kutiyapxitu; aski lurañ munataxat nayatakiw thuqtasipxi. 
Psalms38:21 Tatay, ¡janikiy apanukt'asistati! Diosaxay, ¡janikiy nayat jayankamti!" 
Psalms38:22 Qhispiyir Diosaxay, ¡jank'akiy yanapt'ir jutita!" 
Psalms39:1 Nayax sum sarnaqañatakiw arsta, arsutaxampis juch jan lurañataki, uñisirixan nayraqatapansa lakaxsa llupt'asiñataki." 
Psalms39:2 Nayasti amutuw tuküyäta; janiw kuns arskäyätti. ¡Janiw askit kuna parlataxas utjkänti! T'aqhisiñaxasti juk'ampiw jilxatäna; 
Psalms39:3 ¡chuymaxax ninjamaw nakhäna! Ukxat lup'kasasti, juk'ampiw nakhantitu, ukham uñjasisaw jach'at jupar art'asta:" 
Psalms39:4 Tatay, kunjämarus purt'askä ukay yatiyita, qawqha pachampis jakaskä ukay yatiyita, kunja jisk'akis jakañaxax ukay yatiyita."
