Psalms39:5 Jakañaxatakix juk'a urunakak churistaxa; jakañaxax janiw nayraqataman kunäkisa. ¡Jaqin jakañapax mä samsuñampi sasikiwa! 
Psalms39:6 ¡Jaqin jakañapax mä ch'iwjamakiwa! Inamayaw yänaksa arkuntaski, ukanak khitis katuntasini uksa janiw yatkiti." 
Psalms39:7 Jichhasti, Tatay, ¿kunsa suyt'iristxa? ¡Jumakiw nayan suyt'añaxätaxa!" 
Psalms39:8 Taqi juchanakaxat qhispiyita; t'axmar jaqinakan nayat larusiñap jan munamti. 
Psalms39:9 Nayasti amutuw tukta, janiw lakax jist'arkti, jumaw taqi kuns luraskta." 
Psalms39:10 Janikiy nayarux juk'ampi t'aqhisiyistati; nuwantatanakamax q'alpun aynacht'ayitu. 
Psalms39:11 Jumaw jaqirux juchapat mutuyas chiqachtaxa, thuthar uñtataw yänakap tukjtaxa. ¡Jaqix mä samsuñampi sasikiwa!" 
Psalms39:12 “Tatay, mayisitaxar ist'ita, ¡t'aqhisiñat jakhusitanakaxar ist'ita!, ¡janikiy jachataxatakix uqar tukumti! Nayax jumatakix jayat jutir jaqïtwa, nayrapach awkinakaxjam sarir jaqikïtwa." 
Psalms39:13 Janiy ukhamak uñch'ukistati, janïr nay jiwkipana, mä juk'a samart'ayita” sasa." 
Psalms40:1 Nayax Tatituruw taqpach chuymaxamp suyt'ta: jupasti naya tuqir alt'anisin arnaqasitax ist'itu; 
Psalms40:2 jiwañ p'iyat waysusitu, mik'ayar jalantkiriruw qhispiyitu. Qarqa patxaruw kayunak takt'ayitu; takt'añaxaruw ch'amañchi." 
Psalms40:3 Machaq q'uchu lakaxar uchitu, Diosaxar yupaychañ q'uchu. Uk uñjasax waljaniw chuym ch'allxtayasipxi, Tatiturusti taqi chuymampiw iyawsapxaraki." 
Psalms40:4 ¡Taqpach chuymamp Tatitur alkatir jaqix kusisiñaniwa, jupax janiw qallasirinakar thaqkiti, janirakiw k'ari diosanakar yupaychirinakarus thaqkiti!" 
Psalms40:5 Dios Tatay, muspharkañ luratanakamax waljawa, nanakat khuyapayatamas waljarakiwa. ¡Janiw khitis jumjamax utjkiti! Ukanakxat yatiyañ munta, arsuñ munarakta, ukampis nayatakix janiw jakht'añjamäkiti." 
Psalms40:6 Janiw jumax wilañchanakampix kusisktati, janirakiw luqtanakas kusisiyktamti; janiw jucha pampachañatakix wilañchanak mayktati. Ukatsipan nayarux jinchunakax jist'arista." 
Psalms40:7 Ukat nayax sista: “Akankasktwa” sasa, kamisatix qillqatax nayxat parlki ukarjama." 
Psalms40:8 Dios Tatituxay, munañam lurañaw kusisiyitu; ¡yatichäwinakamax chuymaxankiwa!" 
Psalms40:9 Markam taypin qhispiyäwimat yatiyta; ¡Tatay, nayan jan amukt'ataxat jumakiw yattaxa!" 
Psalms40:10 Aski kankañamat arsuñxa, janiw chuymaxar imantkti; arsutam phuqhirïtamampita, qhispiyäwimampit yatiyta. Jach'a tantachasïwi taypinsti, janipuniw khuyapayasiñamampita, aski kankañamampit amukt'kti." 
Psalms40:11 ¡Tatay, munasiñam churakitaya! ¡Khuyapayasiñamampi aski kankañamampix imapunitpan!" 
Psalms40:12 Walja llakinakaw muyuntitu, jan jakht'kay llakinakaw muyuntitu. Pachpa juchanakaxaw katuntitu; ¡juykhur uñtataw jikxatasta! P'iqi ñik'utaxat sipan juk'amp jilawa, ch'amas pist'xarakituwa." 
Psalms40:13 Tatay, ¡nayar waytir jutakimaya! Tatay, ¡jank'akiy nayar yanapt'irix jutam!" 
Psalms40:14 ¡Nayar jiwayañatak thaqhirinakax, p'inqachjat jikxatasipxpan! ¡Nayar ñanqha lurañ amtirinakax, mä p'inqa jaltxapxpan!" 
Psalms40:15 ¡Nayat larusir jaqinakax, p'inqapat jaltxapxpan!" 
Psalms40:16 Jumar thaqhirinakasti kusisiñampi phuqhantasipxpan; qhispiyasiñam munirinakax arsupxapunpan: “¡Tatitux jach'a ch'amanipuniwa!” sasa. 
Psalms40:17 Tatay, nayax jan kunanïtwa, llakitarakïtwa, janikiy nayat armasistati. Jumaw nayan arxatirixätaxa, qhispiyasiñaxätasa: ¡Diosaxay, jank'akiy jutam!" 
Psalms41:1 Jan kunan jaqimpiru, pisi ch'aman jaqimpir uñjir jaqix kusisiñaniwa; Tatituw jan walt'añ urunakan juparux qhispiyani." 
Psalms41:2 Tatituw juparux imaskani, jupaw akapachan jakayani, kusisiñ churarakini, janiw uñisirinakapan munañapar katuykaniti." 
Psalms41:3 Tatituw usuntäwipan ch'am churani, ¡uka usupsti juyartayaniwa!" 
Psalms41:4 Nayax jupar sistwa: “Tatay, nayat khuyapt'ayasita, juch lurkta ukasa, k'umaracht'asita” sasa." 
Psalms41:5 Uñisirinakaxax juk'ampi aynacht'añax muni: “Jiwxpan, sutipasti chhaqtpan” sapxiwa." 
Psalms41:6 Nayar tumpir jutapki ukkhasti, jan wali arunakak apanipxi; sarxapxi ukkhasti nayxat parlasakiw misttawayxapxi." 
Psalms41:7 Uñisirinakax tantachasisin mayar tukt'asakiw nayatak achusipxi; juchaxatsa t'aqhiskirista ukham amuyapxi," 
Psalms41:8 ukat sapxi: “Jan qullkay ñanqha usuniwa, jan mayampi sartañatakiw ikinti” sasa." 
Psalms41:9 Nayan munat masixamppacha, khitirutix alkataskäyät ukamppacha, khititix nayamp manq'kän ukamppachaw nayarux ch'uxña luritu." 
Psalms41:10 Tatay, nayat khuyapt'ayasita; usuxat k'umaraptayita, ukat jupanakat phuqsusï." 
Psalms41:11 Uñisirixax jan atipjkitan ukapachaw yatï, juman nayar munasiskatama." 
Psalms41:12 Nayarusti chiqap sarnaqataxatxa, amparamampi waythapt'ita, nayraqataman wiñay jakayarakita." 
Psalms41:13 ¡Israelan Tatit Diosapax jach'añchatäpan, jichhasa, wiñayan wiñayapansa! ¡Ukhamäpan!" 
Psalms42:1 Diosaxay, kunjämatix tarujax umat pharjatax jalkir uma thaqkixa, ukhamaw nayax jumar thaqsma." 
Psalms42:2 Nayax jakkir Diosat pharjatätwa: ¿Kunapacharak Diosan nayraqatapar uñstir sarästi? 
Psalms42:3 Urus arumas jachaxakiw manq'añaxaxa, ukchañkamasti uñisirinakaxax wal jiskhipxitu: “¿Kawkinkarak Diosamasti?” sasa." 
Psalms42:4 Ukanakxat amthapisisasti, jan chuymachkayaw jachta. Diosan utapar jaqinakar irpataxat amtasta, q'uchunakampi, yuspagarañanakampi. ¡Khä urunakax kusiskañ urunakänwa!" 
Psalms42:5 ¿Kunatarak chuym mayjt'ayasïsti? ¿Kunatarak llakthaptästi? Diosarukiw nayax suyt'ä, juparukiw yupaycharakï. ¡Jupaw Qhispiyirixaxa, Diosaxasa!" 
Psalms42:6 Wali mayjt'atapuniw jikxatasta. Ukat jumat walpun lup'ta, Jordán jawiratpacha, Hermón, Mizar qullunakatpacha." 
Psalms42:7 Uka manqhanakatpach ist'asi, uma waraqtaman qhuthutinakapaxa; juman apayanit lluxlla uma waraqtanakax, naya patanjam llumikipi." 
Psalms42:8 Uru tuqirux Tatituw khuyapayasitu, arum tuqirusti janiw q'uchuñ qarjaskti, janirakiw jakayir Diosaxat mayisiñsa armaskti." 
Psalms42:9 Arxatir Diosaxarux sistwa: “¿Kunatarak armasistasti? ¿Kunatarak llakit sarnaqañaxasti wakisi, uñisirixansa t'aqhisiyat kunasti?” sasa." 
Psalms42:10 Timanakaxan sawkasitanakapatxa, ch'akhanakaxamppachaw usutu, sapa kutiw jiskhipxitu: “¿Kawkinkarak Diosamasti?” sasa." 
Psalms42:11 ¿Kunatarak chuym mayjt'ayasïsti? ¿Kunatarak llakthaptästi? Diosarukiw nayax suyt'ä, juparukiw yupaycharakï. ¡Jupaw Qhispiyirixaxa, Diosaxasa!" 
Psalms43:1 Diosay, chiqapar uñjita; ¡qhuru jaqinakat arxatita! ¡K'ari, ñanqha lurir jaqit qhispiyasita," 
Psalms43:2 jumästaxay Diosaxasa, arxatirixasa! ¿Kunatarak jan ist'añ munistasti? ¿Kunatarak timaxan t'aqhisiyata, llakit sarnaqañaxasti wakisisti?" 
Psalms43:3 Qhanamampi chiqa kankañamampiy apayanita, ukanakan thakhim nayar uñacht'ayañapataki, qullan qullumkam purki uka thakhi, utjäwimkam purki uka thakhi." 
Psalms43:4 Diosay, nayax altaramaruw jak'achasï, arpampi chikaw yuspagaräma, Diosaxay, jumaw jakañaxarux kusisiytaxa." 
Psalms43:5 ¿Kunatarak chuym mayjt'ayasïsti? ¿Kunatarak llakthaptästi? Diosarukiw nayax suyt'ä, juparukiw yupaycharakï. ¡Jupaw Qhispiyirixaxa, Diosaxasa!" 
Psalms44:1 Tatit Diosay, jinchunakaxampiw ist'apxta, awkinakaxaw yatiyapxitu kuntix khaya urunakapan lurkta taqi ukanakata:" 
Psalms44:2 Diosar jan uñt'irinakarux amparamampiw jaqunuktaxa, markanakaruw mutuytaxa, ukarurakiw nayra awkinakaxar utt'aytaxa." 
Psalms44:3 Janiw ch'amampiti, espadampisa atipjapkiti, jupanak sapakix janiw uka uraq katuntasipkiti. ¡Jan ukasti, amparamampi, ch'amamampiwa! ¡Juman qhanamampiw atipjapxi, jupanakar munasitam layku!" 
Psalms44:4 ¡Reyixay! ¡Diosaxay! Jumaw Israel markaman atipjañapatak ch'am churtaxa; 
Psalms44:5 yanapamampiw uñisirinakarux atipt'apxta; ¡sutimaruw nanakar uñisirirux takxatapxta! 
Psalms44:6 Janiw nayax mich'inak antutt'añaru, mich'inakarus alkatkiristti, janirakiw espadaxas atipaykitaspati;" 
Psalms44:7 jumaw uñisirinakarux atipjayapxista, jumarakiw jupanakarux mä p'inqa tukuyaraktaxa." 
Psalms44:8 ¡Tatit Diosay, wiñayaw jumat jach'añchasipxä, sutimarus wiñayaw yupaychapxarakï!" 
Psalms44:9 Jichhax juman apanukutaw uñjasipxta; mä p'inqa tukuyapxarakista. Nuwasir tamaxampi chikax janiw mistkxtati. 
Psalms44:10 Timasirinakaxan jak'apat jaltayapxista, uñisirinakaxasti yänakax aparapxitu; munataparjamaw taqi kun apasipxi." 
Psalms44:11 Khariñ ovejanakarjamaw amparapar katuyapxista; Diosar jan uñt'ir markanak taypiruw anatatapxista; 
Psalms44:12 wali iraqataruw markamarux aljanuktaxa, aljatampisti janiw kuns jikxatktati." 
Psalms44:13 Jaqi masixan tuqiñatakiw uchapxista, nanakar uñt'irinakan sawkasiñapatakikiw utjayapxista." 
Psalms44:14 Diosar jan uñt'irinakampiw larusiyapxista; markanakasti nanak uñjasax p'iqip khiwisipxi. 
Psalms44:15 Sapüruw jisk'achat uñjasta; ajanuxas p'inqaxat uraqinkiwa," 
Psalms44:16 nayar tuqitanak ist'asina, uñisirixar uñjasina." 
Psalms44:17 Taqi ukanakan nanakxar jutatapaxa, janiw jumar armat laykükänti. ¡Janiw arust'äwim p'akintat laykükänsa!" 
Psalms44:18 Janiw jumar apanukuñsa amtapkti, janirakiw thakhimatsa saranukupkti." 
Psalms44:19 Ukampis jan walt'añ chiqanakan aynacht'ayapxista, ¡Axsarkañ ch'amakampiw muyuntayapxista!" 
Psalms44:20 Dios Tatay, jumarutix armanukupxiriskasamäna, yaqha diosarutix yupaychapxiriskäyätxa," 
Psalms44:21 jumax yatxasamänwa, chuyma manqhankir amtäwinak yatitam layku." 
Psalms44:22 Jumar arkatax laykuw jiwayañ munapxitu, khariñ ovejanakarjamaw uñch'ukipxitu." 
Psalms44:23 Dios Tatay, p'arxtasikimaya, ¿kunatarak iktasti? ¡Sartasikimaya, jan wiñayatak armanukupxistati!" 
Psalms44:24 ¿Kunatarak nanakatak imantastasti? ¿Kunatarak ukataq t'aqhisipxataxat armastasti? 
Psalms44:25 Qarjata, p'inqachjataw jikxatasipxta, janchinakaxsa uraqinjamak qatatinxapxta." 
Psalms44:26 ¡Sartasikimaya, nanakar yanapt'irix jutakimaya, khuyapayasiñam laykux qhispiyapxakitaya!" 
Psalms45:1 Muxsa arunakaw chuymaxan phullch'iraski; laxraxax qillqirin suma qillqañapjamawa. ¡Reyin nayraqatapan q'ucht'arapï! 
Psalms45:2 ¡Jaqinakat sipan juk'ampi sumätawa! ¡Lakamat munayasiñ arunakax mistsuski! Tatitusti wiñayatakiw askinak churtam. 
Psalms45:3 Jan axsarir jaqi, espadam wak'ar uskuntasim, ukaw k'achachirimaxa, ukarakiw jach'añchirimasa." 
Psalms45:4 Atipjañampi sarantam, chiqa layku ch'amachasisa, llamp'u chuymaninakar chiqapar uñjasa. ¡Kupi amparamax muspharkañanak lurpan!" 
Psalms45:5 Mich'inakamax wali arinakawa, markanakax jumaruw makhatxapxtam, reyimpi timasirinakax axsarayasxiwa." 
Psalms45:6 Dios Tatay, reyi kankañamax wiñayatakiwa, reyi kankañamax chiqapar uñjañawa." 
Psalms45:7 Aski kankañarux munastawa, ñanqharusti uñistawa. Ukat Diosamax jumar ajllistam, masinakam taypin kusisiñampiw phuqhanttam." 
Psalms45:8 Isinakamax suma q'apkir qullanakaniw mukt'asi; mirra, áloe, canela ukanakampi; marfilat lurat reyin utapatpach arpanakax jumar kusisiytam." 
Psalms45:9 Reyinakan phuchhanakapaw juma taypinki, reinax kupïxaman qunt'atäskiwa, qurit lurat k'achachañanakampi uchantata." 
Psalms45:10 Phuchhaxay, uñtanim; jinchum alkatanisin ist'ita: Markamat armasxam, wila masinakamat armasxarakim," 
Psalms45:11 reyix suma uñnaqt'anïñam muni; jupaw uywirimaxa, juparux jaysañamawa." 
Psalms45:12 Tiro markankir reyin phuchhapa, qamir markanakax churäwipampiw suma chuymam jikxatañ munapxi." 
Psalms45:13 ¡Akaxay, reyin phuchhapax wali k'achachataw mantani! ¡Isipas qurimp k'achachatawa!" 
Psalms45:14 Reyin ukarux suma isthapitpun irpapxi; qhipap nayrap sarir tawaqunak taypina. 
Psalms45:15 Wali kusist'asisaw sarantapxi; reyin utaparuw kusisit mantapxaraki. 
Psalms45:16 Jach'a rey, wawanakamax nayra awkinakam lantiw reyit qunt'asipxani, taqpach uraqir jilïrit utt'ayarakïta." 
Psalms45:17 Nayax sapa mita jaqinak taypin sutim aytatäñapatakix ch'amachasï, markanakasti wiñayan wiñayapaw jumarux jach'añchapxätam." 
Psalms46:1 Diosaw imantasiñasaxa, juparakiw ch'amañchirisasa, jupaw chijinakan arxatirisaxa." 
Psalms46:2 Ukat jan axsarapkañäniti, uraqis khathatiskpan, qullunakas lamar qutar tinkuntaskpan," 
Psalms46:3 lamar qutan mathapinakapas qhuthutiskpan, qullunakarus uxix khathatiyaskpan." 
Psalms46:4 Mä jawiraw Diosan markaparux kusisiyi, Alaxpachankirin qullan markaparu." 
Psalms46:5 Tatit Diosax markap taypinkiwa, jupaw imaskani; Diosaw qhanjtatpach markaparux yanapaskani." 
Psalms46:6 Markanakax uxuwa, reyinakasti khathatiwa, uraqix khathatiwa, ch'aman arup ist'asiyki ukapachaxa." 
Psalms46:7 ¡Taqi ch'aman Tatitux jiwasampïskiwa! ¡Jacobun Diosapaw arxatirisaxa! 
Psalms46:8 Tatitun muspharkañ luräwinakap uñjir jutapxam, uraqin lurki uka muspharkañ luräwinaka:" 
Psalms46:9 aka uraq tukuskamaw nuwasiñ t'akurayi; mich'i antutt'añanak jisk'a jisk'a p'akinuqi, lanzanak t'unarpayi, ¡nuwasiñ carronaksa ninampiw phichhantaraki!" 
Psalms46:10 “¡Amukt'xapxam! ¡Nayan Diosätax yatipxam! ¡Nayax markanakat juk'ampïtwa! ¡Uraqitsa juk'ampirakïtwa!” 
Psalms46:11 ¡Taqi ch'aman Tatitux jiwasampïskiwa! ¡Arxatirisax Jacobun Diosapawa! 
Psalms47:1 ¡Taqpach markanaka, ampar t'axllirasipxam! ¡Kusisiñat art'asiñampi Diosar jach'añchapxam!" 
Psalms47:2 Tatitux muspharkañ axsarkayawa, taqi akapachan jach'a Reyipawa." 
Psalms47:3 Jupaw markanakarux t'unji, amparasaruw uka markanak katuyi." 
Psalms47:4 Jupaw markapäñatak ajllisistu, munat Jacobun jach'añchatäñapataki." 
Psalms47:5 ¡Tatit Diosax qunuñaparuw makhati, kusisiñat arnaqt'asis taypina, trompetanakan phust'asitap taypina!" 
Psalms47:6 ¡Q'uchupxam, Diosatak q'uchupxam! ¡Q'uchupxam, Reyisatak q'uchupxam!" 
Psalms47:7 ¡Kusisiñampi Diosar q'uchupxam, jupaw taqpach uraqin Reyipaxa!" 
Psalms47:8 Diosax markanakan Reyipawa! ¡Diosax qullan qunuñapxan qunt'atäskiwa! 
Psalms47:9 Akapach markanakan jilïrinakapax Abrahaman markapampiw tantachasipxi," 
Psalms47:10 akapachan jilïr kankañax Diosankiwa. ¡Jupax taqi kunxar jilïriwa! 
Psalms48:1 ¡Tatitux jach'a ch'amaniwa! ¡Diosasax jach'añchatäñatakix askiwa, qullan markapansa, qullan qullupansa!" 
Psalms48:2 ¡Qullan jach'a qullux munkayawa, alay tuqin jikxataski uka qulluxa! ¡Taqi akapachan kusisiñapawa! ¡Jach'a ch'aman reyin markapawa!" 
Psalms48:3 Tatit Diosax Jerusalén utjäwip taypinkiwa; jupax suma arxatirit uñt'ayasi. 
Psalms48:4 Akapachankir reyinakax mayakiw jupatakix sayt'apxi; 
Psalms48:5 Diosan markap uñjasasti wal mulljasipxi, axsarañatsti jaltxapxakiwa." 
Psalms48:6 Ukan axsarañax jupanakar katunti, wawachasiñatak ayquskir warmir uñtata;" 
Psalms48:7 wasar thayax Tarsis markankir barconakar tukjki ukhama. 
Psalms48:8 Kuntix ist'apkäyät uk uñjapxta, taqi ch'aman Tatitun markapana, Diosasan markapana: ¡Jupaw wiñayatak Jerusalén markar utt'ayi!" 
Psalms48:9 Tatit Diosay, qullan utam taypin khuyapayasiñamat amtasipxta." 
Psalms48:10 Tatit Diosay, taqi uraqpachan sutimax jach'añchatawa, kunjäm jach'añchatäñapäkitix sutimax ukhama. Ch'amamampix kunatix askïki uk lurtaxa." 
Psalms48:11 ¡Sión qullux kusispan! Chiqap arsutanakamampix Judá uraqinkir markanakax kusisipxpan. 
Psalms48:12 Sión qullu muytapxpan, torrenakap jakht'apxpan;" 
Psalms48:13 pirqanakap amuyapxpan, suma utanakap uñakipapxpan, jutir mita jaqinakar yatiyañataki:" 
Psalms48:14 “Akapï Tatit Diosasaxa” sasa. ¡Jupaw wiñay irpirisaxa! 
Psalms49:1 Taqpach markanaka, aka arunak ist'apxam, akapachan jakirinaka, sum ist'apxam," 
Psalms49:2 qamir jaqinaka, jan kunan jaqinaka, aytat jaqinaka, jan yäqat jaqinaka." 
Psalms49:3 Lakaxax yatiñ kankañampiw arsuni, arsutaxax wali amuyt'kayäniwa;" 
Psalms49:4 säwi arunak arsü; arpa toct'asin kuntix sañ munki uk qhanañchä. 
Psalms49:5 ¿Kunatarak axsaraskästi jan wali urunak jutipansti? ¿Kunatarak axsaraskästi timanakaxan muyuntat jikxatasisasti? 
Psalms49:6 Jupanakax yänakaparuw chuymap uchapxi, qamir kankañapat jach'a jach'a tukupxi," 
Psalms49:7 ukampis janiw khitis jupa pachpax qhispiyaskaspati, janirakiw qhispiyasiñatakix Diosar qullqi churapkaspati." 
Psalms49:8 ¡Jaqin jakañapax janiw qullqimpi alatäkaspati," 
Psalms49:9 wiñay jakañapataki, jiwañat qhispiñapataki!" 
Psalms49:10 Uñjatakiwa, taqiniw jiwarapxi, yatiñaninakasa, pisi chuymaninakas pachpak jiwarapxi, yänakapasti yaqhanakatakiw qhiparxi." 
Psalms49:11 Uraqinakapas sutipankaskpan, amay imäwiw wiñay utjäwipänixa, ¡ukan wiñayatak utjapxani!" 
Psalms49:12 Jaqix janiw wiñay jakirïkiti; qamirïskpasa, uywanakjam jiwirikiwa." 
Psalms49:13 Ukhamaw ch'amapar alkatirinakax tukusipxi; ukhamaw jupa pachpa jach'añchasirinakan tukuyapaxa. 
Psalms49:14 Uka jaqinakatakix jiwaw awatiripaxa, ovejanakarjamaw amay imäwirux anakiski. Willjtankan ukapachasti, aski jaqinakaw jupanakarux atipjani; ch'amapax aynacht'aniwa, utapasti manqhapacharakïniwa." 
Psalms49:15 Nayarusti Diosaw qhispiyitani, jiwañan amparapat antutnukuyitani, jupampi chikaw irpasxarakitani." 
Psalms49:16 Maynitix qamiriptchi ukaxa, jan mayjt'asimti, yänakapas jilxatchi ukas janirak llakisimti," 
Psalms49:17 jiwxan ukapachax janiw kuns apaskaniti, yänakapax janiw jupampi chiq imantatäkaniti." 
Psalms49:18 Jakkasax kusisitas sarnaqaskpan, qamirïtapat jach'ar aptatas uñjasiskpan," 
Psalms49:19 mä uruw jiwañapax purinini, janiw mayampsa qhana uñjkaniti." 
Psalms49:20 Jaqix qamirïskpasa, janiw wiñayatakïkiti, uywanakjam jiwirikiwa." 
Psalms50:1 Khititix diosanakan Diosapäki uka Tatituw arsu; inti jalsuta, inti jalantat jakirinakarux jawsthapi." 
Psalms50:2 Jerusalén markatpacha, k'ajkir markatpach Diosax qhantaski." 
Psalms50:3 Diosasax jutaskiwa, janiw amuk jutkiti: nakhantir ninaw nayraqatapanjam jutaski; jach'a tutukampi muyuntataw jutaski." 
Psalms50:4 Diosax alaxpacharu akapacharuw jawsi, markapar taripäwi uñjayañataki." 
Psalms50:5 “Nayar iyawsirinakar tantacharapipxita, arusjäwixar wilañchampi chimpuntirinakaru” sasa." 
Psalms50:6 Alaxpachasti Diosan aski taripirïtap yatiyi. 
Psalms50:7 “Israel markaxay, ist'ita, jumaruw qhan parlxayäma. ¡Nayaw Diosätxa! ¡Nayaw jumar juchanchir Diosamätxa!" 
Psalms50:8 Janiw luqtanakamar jisk'achkti, janiw wilañchanakamatakis q'apiskti." 
Psalms50:9 Janiw utamankir vaca qallu luqtañam mayksmati, janirakiw tamanakamat mä cabrito mayksmati," 
Psalms50:10 ch'umi manqhankir animalanakax nayankituwa, qullunakankir uywanakas nayankarakituwa;" 
Psalms50:11 qullunakankir jamach'inakax nayan uñt'atawa, pampanakan utjirinakas amparaxankiwa." 
Psalms50:12 Manq'at awtjayaskirista ukas janiw jumat maykirismati, akapachasa, ukan utjirisa, nayankatap layku." 
Psalms50:13 ¿Vaca aychti manq'txa jan ukax, cabritonakan wilapcha umtxa?" 
Psalms50:14 ¡Diosar luqtañamax yuspagarañ chuymäpan; Alaxpachankir Diosar arsutanakam phuqham! 
Psalms50:15 Llakitäkät ukkhax nayar jawsita; nayasti qhispiyämawa, jumax jach'aruw aptarakitäta” sasa." 
Psalms50:16 Jucharar jaqirusti Diosax siwa: “¿Kuna munañanïtas kamachinakax aynaqasiñataki, jan ukax arust'äwix aytasiñamatakisa," 
Psalms50:17 nayampi jan chiqachayasiñ munkasasa, arunakaxarus jan jayskasasa?" 
Psalms50:18 Lunthatarux qhumantasaw katuqtaxa; ¡wachuqan sarnaqirinakampiw chikachastaxa! 
Psalms50:19 Ñanqha lurañatakiw lakam jist'artaxa, lakamax k'ari arsuñatakiw wakichasi." 
Psalms50:20 Jilamaruw ina ch'usat k'arinttaxa; ¡pachpa jilamaruw jisk'achtaxa! 
Psalms50:21 Ukanak lurkipansa, amukïskäyätwa; nayax jumjamäkirista ukham amuytaxa. Jichhasti jumaruw juchañchäma, ajanumaruw irkatäma." 
Psalms50:22 Naya Diosat armasirinaka, sum ist'apxam, ukatarak q'al tukjasipkirisma; janirak khiti arxatirsa jikxatasisipkasma;" 
Psalms50:23 nayar yuspagaririx jach'aruw aptitu; thakhixan sarnaqirirusti nayaw qhispiyä” sasa. 
Psalms51:1 Dios Tatay, munasiñam laykuy khuyapt'ayasita; khuyapayasirïtam laykuy juchanakaxat pampachita." 
Psalms51:2 ¡Ñanqha luratanakaxat jariqt'ita! ¡Jucha luratanakaxat q'umacht'ita! 
Psalms51:3 Jucha luratax uñt'astwa; juchaxax janiw amuyuxat chhaqtkiti. 
Psalms51:4 Jumataki, jumatakiw juchachasta, jumax juchañchkta uka juch lurta. Ukat juchañchatamax chiqapa; taripäwimas jan kamskayaraki." 
Psalms51:5 Nayax yuritaxatpach juchanïtwa; taykaxan purakapatpach juchanïtwa. 
Psalms51:6 Jumax q'uma chuymaniruw munastaxa, chuymaxarusti yatiñ kankañ uchtaxa." 
Psalms51:7 Hisopo alimp ch'axch'ukipita: nayasti q'umachataw uñjasï; jariqt'itaya, nayasti khunut juk'ampi janq'uw tukxä." 
Psalms51:8 K'uchirt'asiñampi phuqhantita, usuchjkchista ukas wasitat kusisiyxita." 
Psalms51:9 Janikiy juchanakaxarux uñtanimti, taqi ñanqha luratanakaxat q'umachita." 
Psalms51:10 Dios Tatay, ¡q'uma chuymay churita!, ¡machaq aski ajayuy churita!" 
Psalms51:11 Nayraqatamat jan apanukusistati, janirak qullan ajayumsa irpaqasistati;" 
Psalms51:12 qhispiyäwi kusisiñam wasitat churxita; ch'aman ajayumampi thurt'ayita," 
Psalms51:13 jucharar jaqinakar thakhimat yatichañataki, juchaninakasti jumaruw makhatxapxätam." 
Psalms51:14 ¡Dios Tatay! Nayan qhispiyirixa, jiwañat qhispiyita, q'ucht'asisaw juman chiqätam qhanañchä." 
Psalms51:15 Tatay, lakaxay jist'arita, lakaxampisti jumar jach'añchasaw q'uchü." 
Psalms51:16 Jumax janiw luqtanak munktati; wilañchanaksa luqtirismawa, ukampis janiw ukanakax kusisiyktamti." 
Psalms51:17 Diosatak chiqpach luqtäwix llamp'u chuyma luqtañawa; ¡Diosay, llamp'uptat chuymarux janiw jumax jisk'achktati!" 
Psalms51:18 Tatay, munasiñam laykuy Jerusalén markarux ask luram; pirqanakapsa wasitat sayt'ayam." 
Psalms51:19 Ukapachaw luqtäwinak katuqasxäta, churäwinakampi, wilañchanakampi; ukapachaw altaramxarux vaca qallunak luqtasxani." 
Psalms52:1 Munañan jaqi, ¿kunatarak ñanqha luratamat jach'achastasti? ¡Diosan munasiñapax jan tukuskiriwa!" 
Psalms52:2 Ñanqha lurañak sapürus lup'isktaxa; laxramax ari cuchillor uñtatawa. 
Psalms52:3 Askir munañat sipanxa, ñanqharuw muntaxa, chiqapar munañat sipansti, k'ariruw muntaxa." 
Psalms52:4 K'arinak parlir laxra, chuym usuchrantir arunakak arsuñ munasktaxa;" 
Psalms52:5 ukampis Diosax wiñayatakiw tukjätam: t'aqhisiyasin utamat jaqunukütam; aka uraqit jakañam apaqarakïtam. 
Psalms52:6 Diosar jaysir jaqinakax uk uñjasax axsarapxaniwa; khä jaqitsti larusisaw sapxani: 
Psalms52:7 “Uñtapxam, jan axsarir jaqiru, Diosar jan iyawsañ munir jaqiru, qamir yänakapar alkatasir jaqiru, ñanqha luras sarnaqir jaqiru” sasa." 
Psalms52:8 Nayasti Diosan utapanxa, ch'uxñaskir olivo quqar uñtatätwa; ¡wiñayatakiw Diosan munasiñapar alkatä!" 
Psalms52:9 Diosay, nayatak ask luratamatxa jumarux yuspagarapunïmawa; aski jaqinakam nayraqatan jach'añchäma, juman sinti munasirïtam layku." 
Psalms53:1 Pisi amuyt'an jaqix siwa: “Janiw Diosax utjkiti” sasa, taqiniw ñanqhanak lurasax aynacht'apxi; ¡janiw aski luririx maynis utjkiti!" 
Psalms53:2 Diosax alaxpachatpach jaqinakarux uñtani: “Inach khitis amuyt'asirix utjaspa, inach khitis Diosar thaqhirix utjaspa” sasa." 
Psalms53:3 Ukampis taqiniw jan walir saranukupxi, taqiniw ñanqhanak lurapxi. ¡Janiw aski luririx khitis utjkiti! ¡Janiw maynis utjkiti!" 
Psalms53:4 Ñanqha luririnakax jan amuyunïpxiwa, markaxar t'ant'jam manq'antirinakax jan amuyt'anïpxiwa, Diosar jan art'asirinakax jan amuyt'asirïpxiwa." 
Psalms53:5 Janis kunat khathatiñas utjkpan, jupanakax axsarañat wal khathatipxani, uñisirin ch'akhanakap Diosan willitatatap layku. Jupanakasti mä p'inqaw uñjasipxani, jupanakar Diosan jan katuqatap layku." 
Psalms53:6 ¡Israel markan qhispiyasiñapax Jerusalén markat jutakispa! Diosax markapar wasitat kusisiykan ukapachaxa, Jacobun wawanakapax kusisiniwa, taqpach Israel markax k'uchirt'asiniwa." 
Psalms54:1 ¡Diosaxay, sutim laykuy qhispiyasita! ¡Ch'amamampiy arxatasita!" 
Psalms54:2 Diosaxay, mayisitaxarux ist'akimaya, arunakaxarux jaysakimaya," 
Psalms54:3 jach'a jach'a tukurinakaw nayatak sartasipxi, qhuru jaqinakaw jiwayañ munapxitu. ¡Janiw Diosar axsartañapax utjkiti!" 
Psalms54:4 Nayatakisti Diosaw arxatirixaxa, Tatituw jakañ churirixaxa." 
Psalms54:5 Jupaw uñisirinakaxan ñanqha luratanakapxa, jupanak pachpar kutt'ayani. ¡Arsutam phuqhirïtam laykuy jupanakar t'unjam! Nayasti taqi chuymaw luqtäwi katuyäma, aski sutimar yuspagarasaw q'uchüma," 
Psalms54:6  
Psalms54:7 jumaw taqi llakinakat waysusta, uñisirinakaxan aynacht'atap uñjayarakista." 
Psalms55:1 Diosaxay, mayisitaxarux ist'akimaya; janikiy jan ist'ir tukumti." 
Psalms55:2 Jaysakitaya, ist'akitaya; llakitäsin mayisinsma. Uñisirixan arupaw axsarayitu, ñanqha lurir jaqinakan wararitanakapaw khathatiyitu. Kunayman llakimpiw apxatapxitu; q'apisiñampiw katjañ munapxitu." 
Psalms55:3  
Psalms55:4 Axsarañat chuymaxax walpun putuqi; jiwayir axsarañaw nayar katuntitu. 
Psalms55:5 Mulljasiñampi axsarañampiw muyuntitu, axsarañat khathatkiriw uñjasta." 
Psalms55:6 Ukat sista: “paloman chhiqhapanikïrista; ukapachax thuqtiristwa, samart'arakiristwa." 
Psalms55:7 Thuqtasax wali jayaruw sarxirista; wasaran jakiriw qhiparxirista. 
Psalms55:8 Kunayman jach'a thayanakatakiw imantasxirista, jach'a tutukanakatakiw jaltxirista” sasa." 
Psalms55:9 Tatay, jupanakarux tukjam, amtäwinakapsa t'unjam, nuwasiñampi uñisisiñampik jupanak taypin uñjta," 
Psalms55:10 uruy arumaw markar muyupayapxi. Markansti jaqi jiwayañampi, ñanqha lurañampikiw utji;" 
Psalms55:11 thakhinakapansti, qhuru kankañampi, k'arisiñampikiw phuqhäski." 
Psalms55:12 Uñisirixatix tuqitaspaxa, nayax amukïskiristwa; timaxatix nayatak sayt'aspaxa, jupatakix imantasxiristwa;" 
Psalms55:13 ukampis jumaw nayampi chik sarnaqirïtaxa, jumätaw nayan alkatañaxaxa," 
Psalms55:14 jumampiw wali sum parlt'asïyätan; kusisisaw jaqinak taypin Diosan utapar saräyätan. 
Psalms55:15 ¡Jiwax akatjamat uñisirinakaxar katuntpan! ¡Manqhapacharux jakkirpach mantapxpan, ñanqhan chuymapankatap layku!" 
Psalms55:16 Nayax Diosarukiw art'asï; Tatitusti qhispiyitaniwa. 
Psalms55:17 Willjtasa, jayp'usa, arumasa, jacht'asisaw jupar yatiyasï. Diosasti mayisitaxarux ist'aniwa." 
Psalms55:18 Nuwasïwinakan imitani; jakañax qhispiyani, uñisirinakaxax waljanïkchi ukasa." 
Psalms55:19 Wiñay jakir Diosaw ist'itu, jupanakarusti aynacht'ayaniwa, sarnaqäwinakapsa janiw chiqachasiñ munapkiti, janirakiw Diosarus axsarapkiti." 
Psalms55:20 Masinakapatakiw amparanakap luqtapxi, arust'äwinakaparus janiw phuqhapkiti." 
Psalms55:21 Arunakapax lik'it sipan juk'ampi quñawa, amuyunakapasti nuwasiñ amuyunakawa. Arsutanakapax aceitet sipan juk'ampi llamp'uwa, ukampis ari espadanakar uñtatawa." 
Psalms55:22 Diosar llakinakam katuyam, jupasti ch'aman tukuyätam; Diosar jaysirin aynacht'añapxa, janipuniw jupax munkaniti." 
Psalms55:23 Diosaxay, k'arinakampi, jaqi jiwayirinakampix janiw jakañapat chikatsa jakapkaniti; jumaw jupanakarux mik'ay manqhar jaquntäta, ukampis nayax jumarukiw katuyassma." 
Psalms56:1 Diosaxay, nayat khuyapt'ayasita, nayar arknaqir jaqinakaw utji; uruy arumaw t'aqhisiyapxitu." 
Psalms56:2 Jan qarjasisaw timasirinakax arknaqapxitu, waljaniw jach'achasiñampi jalxatapxitu." 
Psalms56:3 Axsarayaskta ukapachax jumarukiw alkatsma. 
Psalms56:4 Diosaruw taqpach chuymamp iyawsta, arunakap jach'ar aptarakta; Diosaruw taqpach chuymamp alkatta, janiw kunarus axsarkti: ¿Kamacharakitan jaqisti?" 
Psalms56:5 Sapüruw arsutanakapampix chuym usuchjapxitu; nayar ñanqha lurañak amtasipki. 
Psalms56:6 Ukkhar akkhar imantasisaw sarnaqapxi, sartataxampi, qunt'ataxampi uñch'ukipxi, akatjamat jalxatasin nayar jiwayañataki." 
Psalms56:7 ¿Ñanqha luräwinakapat jaltapxpachäniti? Diosay, q'apisiñamampiy markanakarux t'unjam." 
Psalms56:8 Diosaxay, jaltatanakaxax juman jakhutawa; jumaw jachatanakaxsa yattaxa. ¿Janit ukanakast qillqataman qhanäkisti?" 
Psalms56:9 Jumat yanap maykäm ukapachaxa, nayampi timasirinakax jayaruw jaltxapxani. Nayax yattwa, Diosan nayar arxatirïtapa." 
Psalms56:10 Diosaruw taqpach chuymamp iyawsta; arunakap jach'ar aptarakta; Tatituruw taqpach chuymamp alkatta, arunakap jach'ar aptarakta;" 
Psalms56:11 Diosaruw taqi chuyma katuyasta, janiw kunarus axsarkti: ¿Kamacharakitan jaqisti?" 
Psalms56:12 Diosaxay, jumar arsutanakaxsti, yuspagarañ chuymampiw phuqhäma," 
Psalms56:13 jiwañat nayar qhispiyatam layku, tinkuñat nayar jark'aqatam layku, Diosan nayraqatapansti jakañ qhanan sarnaqañaxataki." 
Psalms57:1 Diosaxay, nayat khuyapt'ayasita, jumampi arxatayasiñatakiw thaqsma, nayat khuyapt'ayasipunita. Jan walt'añ nayat jithiqañapkamasti, amparamampi imantayasiñ munta." 
Psalms57:2 Alaxpachankir Diosaruw art'asï, taqi kunan yanapir Diosat mayisï." 
Psalms57:3 Jupaw alaxpachat munasiñapa, chiqa kankañap apayanitani, jupaw nayar jiwayañ munirinakat qhispiyitani." 
Psalms57:4 Jaqnuqataw uraqin uñjasta, jaqi manq'an leonanak taypinjam jikxatasta; laka ch'akhanakapax lanzanakjama, mich'inakjamawa, laxrapax ari espadar uñtatarakiwa." 
Psalms57:5 Diosaxay, jumax alaxpachat sipan jilanktawa, ¡Qhapaq kankañamax taqpach uraqiruw phuqhanti!" 
Psalms57:6 Nayampi timasirinakax sipit uchantapxi, uka sipitar jalt'añaxataki; mä jach'a p'iya jalantañaxatak lurapxi, ukampis jupanakakiw ukarux jalantxapxi." 
Psalms57:7 Diosaxay, chuymaxax wakichatawa, q'uchunak jumatak q'uchuñatak wakichatawa." 
Psalms57:8 Ajayuxay, p'arxtasimaya; arpa, salterio p'arxtasipxam; ¡nayasti machaq qhantatin yupaychä!" 
Psalms57:9 Tatay, markanak nayraqatan jach'añchäma, markanak nayraqatan q'uchunakamp yupaychäma." 
Psalms57:10 Munasiñamax alaxpachat juk'ampi jach'awa; aski kankañamax alaxpachkamaw puri. 
Psalms57:11 Diosaxay, jumax alaxpachat sipan jilanktawa, ¡Qhapaq kankañamax taqpach uraqiruw phuqhanti!" 
Psalms58:1 Marka apnaqirinaka, ¿chiqaparut taqi kunsa uñjapxta?, ¿chiqaparut jaqinakar uñjapxta?" 
Psalms58:2 Janiw ukham lurapktati; jan walinak lurañ amtapxtaxa, jaqinak taypinsti, nuwasiñanak utjayapxtaxa." 
Psalms58:3 Ñanqha luririnakax taykapan purakapatpach ukham ñanqha lurirïpxi; k'arinakasti janïr yurkasaw k'arinak arsxapxi. 
Psalms58:4 Katarinakjam jiwayir mich'inïpxiwa, jiwayir mich'in katarir uñtataw jinchunakapsa llupantasipxi, uqaraw tukupxi," 
Psalms58:5 ukhamat amulljayirin arup jan ist'añataki, layqirin arsutap jan yäqañataki." 
Psalms58:6 Diosaxay, ¡laka ch'akhanakap t'unaram! Tatay, ¡uka leonanakan kiwunakap t'unsum!" 
Psalms58:7 Ch'umarir umar uñtat chhaqtapxpan; takisit qurar uñtat pharsupxpan; 
Psalms58:8 ch'urur uñtat phusak tukupxpan, ¡inti jan uñjir wawa sullur uñtat tukusipxpan!," 
Psalms58:9 janïr amuyasipkipan ch'aphinakjam nakhantapxpan; ch'uxña qurar uñtat qhurutasiñamp jik'inukutäpxpan. 
Psalms58:10 Aski jaqisti, phuqsur uñjasax kusispan; ¡ñanqha luririn wilapamp kayunakap wilachsuspan!" 
Psalms58:11 Ukapachaw sapxani: “¡Aski jaqix walirukis puriskixä! ¡Diosax chiqapar uñjirïskapunisä!” sasa. 
Psalms59:1 Diosaxay, nayamp timasirinakat qhispiyita, nayar uñisirinakat arxatita." 
Psalms59:2 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakat qhispiyita, jaqi jiwayirinakat jark'aqita," 
Psalms59:3 wali ch'aman jaqinakaw utji, nayar jiwayañatakiw suyxatasipkitu. Tatay, janiw qallasirïkti, janirakiw juchsa lurkti;" 
Psalms59:4 janiw kuna ñanqhsa lurkti, jan kuna juchatak katuntañ munapxitu. ¡Sartasikimaya! ¡Nayar yanapt'irix jutakimaya!" 
Psalms59:5 Tatay, taqi ch'aman Diosay, Israelan Diosapa, sartasikimaya, khä ñanqha lurir markanakarux mutuyamaya; khä ch'uxña chuyman jaqinakat jan khuyapayasimti." 
Psalms59:6 Arumthapirux anunakjam wajasisaw kutt'anipxi, markansti uksar aksaruw muytapxi." 
Psalms59:7 Kuns arsusipkakiwa, arsutanakapampis chuym ust'ayapxi: “Janiw khitis ist'kistaniti” sasa." 
Psalms59:8 Jumasti, Tatay, jupanakat larustawa; juchaninakat phiskastawa." 
Psalms59:9 Diosaxay, juman imataw sarnaqaskta, jumaw ch'amañchirixätaxa, imirixätasa." 
Psalms59:10 Nayar munasir Diosax jikxatitaniwa; uñisirixan aynacht'atap uñjayitani. 
Psalms59:11 Diosaxay, jupanakat jan khuyapayasimti, markaxan ukxat jan armasiñapataki; jupanakarux ch'amamampiy ananukum, mä p'inqa aynacht'ayarakim. ¡Tatay, jumaw nanakar arxatirïtaxa!" 
Psalms59:12 Taqi arsutanakapampiw juch lurapxi; jach'a jach'a tukuñapan katuntatäpxpan, k'ari juramentonakapan chinuntatäpxpan." 
Psalms59:13 ¡Q'apisiñamax jupanakar tukjpan! ¡Jupanakax jiwarapxpan! Jacobun markapar Diosan apnaqatap yatipxpan, akapach tukuskam apnaqirïtap yatipxarakpan." 
Psalms59:14 Arum tuqirux anunakjam wajasisaw kutinipxani, markansti manq'a thaqhasaw muytapxani, jan jikxatasasti anunakjamaw awullipxani." 
Psalms59:15  
Psalms59:16 Nayasti willjtaw jumarux q'uchüma; munasiñamampita, ch'amamampit yatiyä. Jumaw nayan arxatirixätaxa, jumaw llakisiñaxan imantasiñaxätaxa." 
Psalms59:17 Diosaxay, jumaruw q'uchunak q'uchüma, jumaw nayan imantasiñaxätaxa, nayan arxatirixätasa; ¡jumaw nayar munasir Diosätaxa!" 
Psalms60:1 Diosay, q'apisiñaman jaytanukupxista, q'alpun tukjapxista; ¡jichhasti wasitatay ch'am churapxita!" 
Psalms60:2 Uraqirux khathatiytawa, q'awanak jist'artaytaxa; ¡jichhax uka q'awanak jist'antxam, niya alliranttañampïskiwa!" 
Psalms60:3 Markamarux jach'a yant'anakampiw t'aqhisiytaxa, luqhiptayir vino umantayapxistaxa." 
Psalms60:4 Arkirinakamarux mä chimpu churtaxa, mich'inakat jaltxapxañapatakiw churtaxa." 
Psalms60:5 ¡Ist'apxakitaya, ch'amamampiy qhispiyapxita! ¡Munatanakamarux qhispiyakimaya!" 
Psalms60:6 Diosax qullan utapan sänwa: “¡Kusisisaw Siquem uraq jalanuqä, Sucot qhirwa uraq lakinuqarakï!" 
Psalms60:7 Galaad uraqix nayankiwa, Manasés uraqis nayankiwa; Efraín uraqix p'iqixar asxatasiñawa, Judá uraqisti, jilïr kankañ thujruxawa;" 
Psalms60:8 Moab uraqix jarisiñ llataxawa; Edom uraq patxaruw wiskhunakax uchasï; ¡Filisteo jaqinakar atipjataxat arnaqasï!” sasa. 
Psalms60:9 ¿Khitirak uyunakampi muyuntat markar irpitanisti? ¿Khitirak Edom uraqkam puriyitanisti? 
Psalms60:10 Diosay, jumax apanukupxistawa, nuwasir tamaxampi chikax janiw mistkxtati." 
Psalms60:11 Uñisirinakaxat arxatapxita, jaqin yanapapax inamayakiwa." 
Psalms60:12 Diosan yanapapampix muspharkañanak lurañäni; ¡jupaw uñisirinakasarux takxatani! 
Psalms61:1 Diosaxay, ayquskir arnaqasitaxar ist'akimaya, ¡mayisitaxarux jaysakimaya!" 
Psalms61:2 Chuymaxan aynacht'atap laykux uraq tukuyatpach jumar art'asinsma. Jach'a qarqa patxaruy sayt'ayita," 
Psalms61:3 jumaw nayan imantasiñaxätaxa. ¡Jumaw timasirixat jark'aqir ch'aman pukarätaxa! 
Psalms61:4 Wiñayatakiw utaman jakañ munta, amparamampi jark'aqataw utjasiñ munta." 
Psalms61:5 Diosaxay, jumaw arsutanakax ist'ista, sutim waqaychirinakan katuqäwip churxarakista." 
Psalms61:6 Reyirux jaya maranak jakañay churam; jupax walja maranakay jakpan," 
Psalms61:7 askinakam katuqasay markarux apnaqpan. Munasiñamampi aski kankañamampi imam; 
Psalms61:8 nayasti sutim jach'aruw aptä, arsutanakaxsti sapüruw phuqharakï." 
Psalms62:1 Dios sapanak ajayuxax samarañ jikxati; qhispiyasiñaxax jupat juti. 
Psalms62:2 Jupakiw qhispiyitu, arxatarakitu. Janiw pächaskäti, jupaw imantasiñaxaxa." 
Psalms62:3 ¿Kunapachkamarak nuwañatak arknaqapxitätasti? ¿Kunapachkamarak tinkuyañ munapxitätasti? ¿Kunapachkamarak lluxisir pirqarjam uñjapxitätasti? ¿Kunapachkamarak tinkuñampïskir uyurjam uñjapxitätasti? 
Psalms62:4 Nayar tinkuyañak lup'isipki; k'arisiñax walpun kusisiyi. Lakakiw jach'añchapxitu, chuymampisti ñanqhachapxituwa." 
Psalms62:5 Nayax Dios sapanak samarañ jikxatta, suyt'añaxax jupat juti." 
Psalms62:6 Jupakiw qhispiyitu, arxatarakitu. Janiw tinkkäti, jupaw imantasiñaxaxa." 
Psalms62:7 Diosaw qhispiyirixaxa; jach'a kankañaxas jupat juti; jupaw arxatirixaxa, juparakiw imantasiñaxasa." 
Psalms62:8 ¡Markaxay, jupar taqi chuymamp iyawsam! ¡Taqi chuymamp jupar mayisim! ¡Diosaw jiwasan imantasiñasaxa!" 
Psalms62:9 Jaqix mä samsumpi sasikiwa, qamirisa, jan kunanisa; jupanakarutix balanzampi waytasispaxa, mä samsut sipan phisnakïspawa." 
Psalms62:10 Ch'axwañanakarux jan wayusipxamti; ¡janirak lunthatasiñarus chuym katuyasipxamti! Qamiris tukusipkätaxa, qullqir jan alkatapxamti." 
Psalms62:11 Diosan arsutap ist'ta, jupan arup yatta: “ch'amasa, munasiñas jupankatapa, jupax sapa mayniruw lurataparjam waxt'i” sasa." 
Psalms62:12  
Psalms63:1 ¡Diosaxay, jumaw Diosaxätaxa! Jumarux walpun thaqsma, ajayuxax jumatjam pharjatawa; taqi chuymapuniw jumarux munsma, jan umani, jan jakañan waña uraqir uñtata." 
Psalms63:2 ¡Qullan utaman uñjañ munsma, ch'amamampi jach'a kankañamampi uñjañ munta," 
Psalms63:3 munasiñamax jakañat sipan juk'ampiwa! Lakaxampiw jumarux yupaychäma; 
Psalms63:4 taqi jakäwixampiw jach'añchäma, jumat mayisiñatakix amparanakax aytä." 
Psalms63:5 Jach'a manq'äwinkir jaqjamaw kusisï, lakaxasti kusisitaw yupaychätam." 
Psalms63:6 Arumanakax ikiñan jumat amtasta, ikintataw jumxat lup'irakta;" 
Psalms63:7 jumaw nayan yanapirixätaxa. ¡Amparamankasax kusisitätwa! 
Psalms63:8 Jakañaxax jumampi chikt'atawa; kupi amparamasti janiw antutnukkituti. 
Psalms63:9 Nayar jiwayañ munirinakasti, manqhapacharuw jalantapxani;" 
Psalms63:10 ¡espadampi jiwarayataw uñjasipxani, qamaqinakan manq'antataw tukusipxani!" 
Psalms63:11 Reyisti Diosankasaw kusisini; sutip layku juramento luririnakaw q'uchupxani, k'arinakan lakapasti llupt'atäniwa." 
Psalms64:1 Diosaxay, ayqutaxar ist'akimaya; axsarkay uñisirinakat jakañax jark'aqita." 
Psalms64:2 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakat imantita, nayatak ñanqha amtir jaqinakat jark'aqita, nayar jiwayañ munirinakat qhispiyita," 
Psalms64:3 jupanakax espadar uñtat laxranakap ariptayapxi, mich'inakar uñtat ñanqha arunak antutt'apxi." 
Psalms64:4 Jan juchan jaqirux jamasat chhuxriñchapxi, jan khuyapt'ayasisaw akatjamat chhuxriñchapxi." 
Psalms64:5 Ñanqha lurañatakix purapat ch'amañchasipxi; jamasar imantat sipitanak uchañatakiw amtapxi, janis khitis uñjkaspa ukham amuyapxi," 
Psalms64:6 janis khitis ñanqha luratanakap yatxatkaspa ukham amuyapxaraki. Ukampis jaqin chuyma manqhip uñt'iristi, taqi jan wali luratanakap yatxatani." 
Psalms64:7 Diosaw mich'inakapampi chhuxriñchjani, akatjamat chhuxriñchjataw uñjasipxani;" 
Psalms64:8 pachpa arunakapaw aynacht'añarux puriyani, jupanakar uñjirinakasti larusipxaniwa." 
Psalms64:9 Taqiniw ukapachax Diosar jach'añchapxani, luräwinakapat yatiyapxani; luratanakap amuyapxarakini." 
Psalms64:10 Aski jaqix Tatitumpiw kusisini, jupampiw arxatayasini, q'uma chuyman jaqinakasti kusisitaw jakasipxani." 
Psalms65:1 Sión markan Diosapa, ¡jumax jach'añchatäñatakix askïtawa!, ¡arsutanak jumar phuqhañax wakisiwa," 
Psalms65:2 jumax mayisitanakar ist'irïtawa! Taqi jaqinakaw juman ukarux jutapxi. 
Psalms65:3 Jucha luratanakaxaw aynacht'ayapxitu, ukampis jumaw juchanakaxat pampachapxista." 
Psalms65:4 Juman ajllit jaqix kusisiñaniwa, juma jak'an jakañapataki, qullan utaman utjasiñapataki. ¡Utaman utjir yänakampiy kusisiyapxita, qullan churäwinakamampiy phuqt'apxita!" 
Psalms65:5 Qhispiyir Diosaxay, muspharkañ aski kankañampiw jaysapxista; taqi uraqpachaw jumarux alkatapxtam, qutat khurin jakirinakas alkataraktamwa;" 
Psalms65:6 jumïpan qullunakax sayt'atäski, juman ch'amam laykuw thurt'atäski." 
Psalms65:7 Jumaw lamar quta mathapinakarux t'akuraytaxa, jumaw markanakan ch'axwatap amukt'aytaxa;" 
Psalms65:8 uraq tukuyan jakirinakax muspharkañ luräwinakamat khathatipxi; inti jalsu tuqita, inti jalanta tuqikamax, jumïpan kusisiñat art'asiñax utji." 
Psalms65:9 Jumaw akapach uraq uñjasktaxa; jallumpiw achunak utjaytaxa; jilarkir uma qarpampiw trigo yapunak jilaraytaxa. ¡Ukham lurasaw uraq wakichtaxa! 
Psalms65:10 Jumaw sukanak umampi qarptaxa, khulanaksa khuskhachtaxa, jallumpiw uraqirux jasak tukuytaxa, ukhamat jilarkir achuytaxa." 
Psalms65:11 Jumaw askinakam marpach churtaxa, qinayanakamax jilarkir askinak warxatani;" 
Psalms65:12 wasarankir ch'ijinakax ch'uxñatatiwa, qullunakasti kusisiñ isimpjamaw isthapisi;" 
Psalms65:13 pampanakax ovej tamanakampiw phuqhantasi, qhirwanakas yapunakampiw phuqhantasi; ¡taqiniw q'uchupxi, taqiniw kusisiñat arnaqasipxi!" 
Psalms66:1 Taqi akapachankir jaqinaka, Tatitur kusisit q'uchupxam;" 
Psalms66:2 qullan sutipar q'uchunak q'uchupxam, q'uchunak q'uchusax jach'ar aptapxam;" 
Psalms66:3 Diosarux sapxam: “Luratanakamax muspharkañapuniwa. Timanakamax jach'a ch'amam laykuw nayraqataman axsarañat tinkurapxi; 
Psalms66:4 taqpach jaqinakaw nayraqataman killt'asipxi, sutimaruw q'uchunak q'uchupxaraki” sasa." 
Psalms66:5 Diosan luratanakap uñjir jutapxam, jaqin askipatak muspharkay luräwinakap uñjapxam:" 
Psalms66:6 lamar qutarux waña uraqiruw tukuyäna, nayra awkinakasax wañanjam jawir makhatapxäna; ¡jichhasti Diosampi kusisipxañäni!" 
Psalms66:7 Ch'amapampiw wiñayatak markanakar apnaqi; nayranakapax markanakaruw uñch'ukiski, qallasir jaqinakan jupatak jan sayt'añapataki." 
Psalms66:8 ¡Markanaka, Diosasar jach'añchapxam!, ¡jach'añchañ q'uchunak jach'at q'uchupxam!" 
Psalms66:9 Jupaw jakayasiskistu; janiw jiwañas munkiti. 
Psalms66:10 Diosay, jumaw yant'arux puriyapxista, ¡qullqirjamaw q'umachsupxista!" 
Psalms66:11 Sipitaruw jalt'ayapxista; jach'a llakinakampiw apxatapxista. 
Psalms66:12 Khitimpis takisiyapxakistawa; nina chiqa, uma chiqaw makhatapxta, ukampis qhipa tuqiruw samart'ayapxista." 
Psalms66:13 Utamar mantasin luqtäwinak churäma; ukhamat jumar arsutanakax phuqhä," 
Psalms66:14 chijinkasin jumar arskäyäsma, uka arsutanak phuqhä." 
Psalms66:15 Lik'i uywanak nakt'ayat luqtanïma, urqu vacanakampi, cabritonakamp churanïma, urqu ovejanakampi kun luqtanïma." 
Psalms66:16 ¡Jumanakax taqin jutapxam, jutapxam, Diosar yupaychirinaka! ¡Ist'apxam, kuntix Diosax nayatak lurki ukanak yatiyapxäma!" 
Psalms66:17 Lakaxampi, laxraxampiw juparux jawsta, ukatsti yupaycharaktwa." 
Psalms66:18 Jan wali amuyutix utjitasapänxa, Tatitux janiw ist'kitasapänti;" 
Psalms66:19 ¡ukampis Diosax ist'ituwa, mayisitaxarus jaysituwa!" 
Psalms66:20 ¡Diosax jach'añchatäpan, mayisitaxarux ist'apunituwa, munasiñapsa churapunituwa!" 
Psalms67:1 Diosaxay, nanakat khuyapayasipxita, askinakay churapxita nayramampiy uñtanipxita," 
Psalms67:2 aka uraqin utjki uka markanakax, munañamampi, qhispiyäwimampi uñt'apxpan." 
Psalms67:3 Diosay, markanakax jumar yupaychapxpan; ¡taqpach markanak jumarux jach'añchapxpan!" 
Psalms67:4 Markanakax kusisiñat q'uchupxpan, aski kankañampi akapachar apnaqatam layku; ¡jumaw taqpach markanak irpxartaxa!" 
Psalms67:5 Diosay, markanakax jumar yupaychapxpan, ¡taqpach markanak jumarux jach'añchapxpan!" 
Psalms67:6 Uraqix achunakap churi; ¡Tatit Diosasaw askinak churistu! 
Psalms67:7 ¡Diosax askinakap churistpan! ¡Akapachankirinakax jupar jach'añchapxpan! 
Psalms68:1 Diosax sayt'aski ukapachaxa, jupampi timasirinakax chhuktxapxiwa, jupar uñisirinakax nayraqatapat jaltxapxiwa;" 
Psalms68:2 jiwq'ir uñtataw chhaqtapxi, ninampi umatatayat lik'jamaw umatatapxi; ñanqha lurir jaqinakax Diosan nayraqatapan tukusipxi." 
Psalms68:3 Aski jaqinakasti kusisipxiwa; Diosan nayraqatapan kusisipxi, kusisiñat t'isktapxi." 
Psalms68:4 Diosar q'uchupxam, sutipar jach'añchapxam; qinay patan sarnaqirir jach'añchapxam. ¡Tatitump kusisipxam! ¡Nayraqatapan k'uchisipxam!" 
Psalms68:5 Diosax wajchanakan awkipawa, ijma warminakan arxatiripawa, jupax qullan utjäwipan jaki." 
Psalms68:6 Diosax aynacht'at jaqinakatak uta wakicharapi, katuntat jaqinakar antutayasin askinak churi; qallasir jaqinakasti jan achur uraqin qhiparapxi." 
Psalms68:7 Diosaxay, jumax markaman nayraqatap sarkäyäta, wasar chiqanjam sarantkäyät ukapachaxa," 
Psalms68:8 uraqix khathatïnwa, jallux alaxpachat purintäna, Sinaí qullux Diosan nayraqatapan khathatïna; Israelan Diosap nayraqatan axsaräna." 
Psalms68:9 Diosaxay, jumaw walja jallunak apayantaxa; markamax q'ala aynacht'atänwa, ukampis jumaw ch'am churtaxa." 
Psalms68:10 Markamax uka uraqin utjantasïna, juman munasiñam laykuw jan kunan jaqirux wakisirinak churtaxa." 
Psalms68:11 Tatituw mä yatiyäw arsu; walja warminakaw ukxat yatiyapxäna: 
Psalms68:12 “¡Reyinakampi, nuwasir tamanakapampix jaltxapxiwa!” sasa. Warminakax utanakapan katuntat yänak jalanuqasipxäna, uñisirinakat aparapkatayna uka yänaka," 
Psalms68:13 ukampis jumanakax uywa uyunakan qhiparapxtaxa. ¡Qullqimpi llusikipata paloma chhiqhanaka! ¡suma qurimpi apakipata phuyunakapa! 
Psalms68:14 Taqi Munañanix, reyinakar chhukjaykäna ukkhax, khunux Salmón qulluruw khununtäna." 
Psalms68:15 ¡Basán qullunakax wali jach'anakawa, qullunakapax wali qhathanakawa!" 
Psalms68:16 Jach'a qullunaka, ¿kunatarak uñisiñampi Diosan utjasiñapatak ajllit qullur uñch'ukipxtasti? ¡Tatitux uka qullun wiñayatakiw jakani!" 
Psalms68:17 Diosan nuwasiñ carronakapax waranqanakawa; Diosax Sinaí qullut ukanakxat utapar jutanti. 
Psalms68:18 Diosay, alay qullunakaruw makhattaxa, katuntat jaqinak ukarux irptaxa; jaqinak taypin jach'añchatäñ katuqtaxa, Tatay, jumar qallkatir jaqinakamppachaw jumar makhatxapxtam." 
Psalms68:19 ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan, jiwasan Diosasaru, Qhispiyirisaru, jupax sapüruw jan walt'añanakas apaski!" 
Psalms68:20 Diosasax qhispiyir Diosawa, jupaw jiwañat qhispiyistaspa." 
Psalms68:21 Diosax uñisirinakapan p'iqip jaljtayani, juch lurasipkaki uka jaqinakan p'iqi ch'akhap t'unjani." 
Psalms68:22 Tatitux siwa: “Basán uraqitpach kutiyanxäma, lamar quta manqhatpach irpsunxäma," 
Psalms68:23 timasirinakaman wilapampiw kayum ch'aranachasïta, anunakamasti uka wil jallq'apxarakini” sasa." 
Psalms68:24 Diosay, jumar waqaychirinakaw uñstasinki, qullan chiqawja tuqiruw sarantasipki. Diosaxan, Reyixan waqaychirinakapawa." 
Psalms68:25 Q'uchurinakax nayraqat sarantapxi, arpa jachsuyirinakasti qhipat arkapxi, chika taypinsti tawaqunakaw chhullu chhullunakampi sarantapxi." 
Psalms68:26 ¡Tatit Diosar kusisiñampi jach'añchapxam, Israel markpach tantachat jupar yupaychpan!" 
Psalms68:27 Jupanakan nayraqatapsti, sullkïr Benjaminaw sarantaski, Judá markankir jilïrinakampi chikaw sarantaski, Zabulón, Neftalí markanakan jilïrinakapamp chikaw sarantaraki." 
Psalms68:28 Diosaxay, ch'amam uñacht'ayam; nanak layku luratam wasitat qhanañcham." 
Psalms68:29 Jerusalenankir utamatpacha, kawkharutix reyinakax jumataki churäwinak apanipki," 
Psalms68:30 ukawjatpach Egipto markar tuqinuqam, khä ch'uxña taypinkir animalaru, khä waxrasir urqu vaca tamanakaru, khä muqisir vaca qallunakaru, jupanakax juk'ampi qamiriptañ munasinxa, markanakar jisk'achasaw t'aqhisiyapxi; ¡nuwasiñ munir jaqinakar chhukhunukuyam!" 
Psalms68:31 Munañan jaqinakax Egiptot purinipxani, Etiopía markax Diosatakiw amparanakap luqtapxani." 
Psalms68:32 ¡Uraqinkir reyinaka, Diosar q'uchupxam. Tatitutak q'uchunak q'uchupxam," 
Psalms68:33 alaxpachanjam sarnaqiriru, wiñay alaxpachan utjasiriru! Ch'aman arupampi arnaqasir ist'apxam." 
Psalms68:34 Diosan ch'amap uñt'apxam: qhapaq kankañapax Israel markan uñsti, ch'amapasti alaxpachkamaw puriraki." 
Psalms68:35 Diosax qullan utapan muspharkayapuniwa; jupaw Israelan Diosapaxa, jupaw markaparux ch'am churi. ¡Diosax jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms69:1 Diosaxay, qhispiyasikitaya, umampi axskatirjamätwa;" 
Psalms69:2 ñiq'i phuch'uruw jalantaskta, janiw kawkhar takt'asiñas utjkiti. Uma manqharuw purta, uka walja umaw apxitu." 
Psalms69:3 Arnaqaskäwix q'ala chhajantatätwa, mallq'as walipuniw usxitu; ¡Diosaxar uñch'ukkäwix nayraxas juykhuptatäxiwa!" 
Psalms69:4 Ina ch'usat uñisirinakaxax ñik'utanakaxat sipansa juk'amp jilawa; ina ch'usat nayar uñisipxitu, jiwayañpun munapxitu; jan lunthataskta ukanak kutiyañatakiw wayt'apxitu." 
Psalms69:5 Diosaxay, jumaw jan amuyt'asirïtax uñt'ista; janiw juchanakax jumat imt'kiristti." 
Psalms69:6 Taqi ch'aman Dios Tatay, ¡jumar iyawsirinakax janikiy juchax laykux p'inqa tukupxpati! Israel markan Diosapa, ¡jumar thaqhirinakax janikiy juchax laykux aynacht'añar puripxpati!" 
Psalms69:7 Juma laykuw jisk'achat uñjasta; p'inqatsa ajanuxax ninapuniw nakhi; 
Psalms69:8 jilanakaxatakix yaqha markankir jan uñt'at jaqjamätwa. 
Psalms69:9 Utamar munañax ninjamaw nakhitu; jumar tuqirinakan arunakapax, nayxarkamaw wakt'itu." 
Psalms69:10 Llakisiñat jan manq'kta ukkhaxa, nayat larusipxitu;" 
Psalms69:11 llaki isimp uchasta ukapachasti, nayat taqinipuniw sawkasipxitu." 
Psalms69:12 Taqi jaqin parlasitaw sarnaqta, machatanakas nayxat jayllipxi." 
Psalms69:13 Tatay, nayasti jumaruw art'asinsma. Diosaxay, ¡jichhax yanapt'akitaya! Jach'a munasiñam laykux ¡ist'akitaya! Yanapt'asir kankañam laykuy qhispiyita." 
Psalms69:14 ¡Janikiy nayan ñiq'ir jalantañax munamti! ¡Nayar uñisirinakat qhispiyakitaya, walja uma manqhanakat wayst'asikitaya!" 
Psalms69:15 ¡Janikiy ch'aman umax apitpati! ¡Janikiy mik'ay chinkänax manq'antitpati, janirak nayxarus jist'antaspati!" 
Psalms69:16 Tatay, ist'akitaya; ¡jumax suma jaqïtawa, khuyapayirirakïtawa! Jach'a munasiñanïtam laykux, uñjt'akitaya;" 
Psalms69:17 ¡janikiy aka uywatamatakix ajanum imantasimti! ¡Jan walinpun uñjasta, jank'akiy jaysita!" 
Psalms69:18 Nayaruy jak'achasinim, qhispiyarakitaya; ¡nayampi timasirinakat jark'aqita!" 
Psalms69:19 Jumaw llakinkatax uñjaskistaxa, jumaw p'inqa tukutaxsa, jisk'achatsa uñjistaxa; jumaw uñisirinakaxarux uñt'araktaxa." 
Psalms69:20 Jaqin tuqitanakapax chuymaxaruw t'unanti; jan ch'amanipuniw uñjasta. Inamayakiw nayar khuyapt'ayiri, nayar chuymacht'iri thaqta." 
Psalms69:21 Manq'axarusti jiwayañ qulla warantapxi, umat pharjayaskta ukkhasti, vinagre churapxitu." 
Psalms69:22 ¡Jach'a manq'äwinakapasti, jupanakatakix sipitapar tukpan!" 
Psalms69:23 ¡Juykhu tukupxpan, kayunakapas aliqapun khathatpan!" 
Psalms69:24 Q'apisiñam jupanakxar samarasim; aqkir q'apisiñamax jupanakar katjpan. 
Psalms69:25 Utjäwinakapax ch'usa wasarar tukpan, janirak khitis chhujllanakapan jakpati;" 
Psalms69:26 jupanakax juman usuchjat jaqiruw arknaqapxi; juman chhuxriñchat jaqiruw sawkxayapxi. 
Psalms69:27 Ñanqhat ñanqha jupanakar kutt'ayam; janipun khuyapayasiñam jikxatapxpati. 
Psalms69:28 ¡Jakañ qillqat taypit sutip apsum! ¡Janipun aski jaqinakampi chik qillqantamti! 
Psalms69:29 Naya usuntata, llakit jaqirusti, Diosaxay, waytakitaya, qhispiyarakita." 
Psalms69:30 Q'uchunakampiw Diosan sutiparux jach'añchä; yuspagarasaw juparux yupaychä," 
Psalms69:31 Tatitusti ukampix juk'ampi kusisini, mä toro wilañcha luqtäwit sipana, waxranakani, sillunakani vaca qallu luqtäwit sipana." 
Psalms69:32 Uk uñjasax llakitanakax kusisipxaniwa, Diosar thaqhirinakan chuymanakapasti ch'amañchasiniwa;" 
Psalms69:33 Tatitux jan kunan jaqinakarux ist'iwa, jupankir katuntat jaqinakarux janiw jisk'achkiti." 
Psalms69:34 ¡Diosar jach'añchapxam, alaxpachas akapachasa, lamar qutasa, taqi ukan jakirinakasa!" 
Psalms69:35 Diosaw Jerusalén markarux qhispiyani, Judá uraqinkir markanak wasitat sayt'ayani. Uywatanakapan wawanakapaw uka marka katuqasxapxani; uka markan jakapxani; ¡sutipar munirinakaw ukan jakasxapxani!" 
Psalms69:36  
Psalms70:1 Diosaxay, ¡nayar qhispiyirix jutakimaya! Tatay, ¡nayar yanapt'irix jank'akiy jutam!" 
Psalms70:2 ¡Nayar jiwayañ munirinakax mä p'inqa atipjayasipxpan! ¡Nayar ñanqha lurañ amtirinakax mä p'inqa jaltxapxpan! 
Psalms70:3 ¡Nayat larusirinakax p'inqachat jaltxapxpan! 
Psalms70:4 Jumar thaqhirinakasti taqinipun kusisipxpan; qhispiyäwim thaqhirinakax wiñayapun arsupxpan: “¡Diosax jach'a ch'amaniwa!” sasa. 
Psalms70:5 Naya, llakita, jan kunan jaqirusti, Diosaxay, ¡jank'akiy yanapt'ir jutita! Jumaw arxatirixätaxa, qhispiyasiñaxätasa; ¡Tatay, jank'akiy jutam!" 
Psalms71:1 Tatay, jumaruw alkatasinsma; janikiy mä p'inqa tukuyistati." 
Psalms71:2 Aski kankañam laykuy qhispiyita, ist'akitaya, qhispiyarakitaya." 
Psalms71:3 Jumay nayan arxatir qarqaxäma, jumarak imantasiñ jach'a utaxäma, ¡jumaw qarqaxätaxa, jach'a utaxätasa!" 
Psalms71:4 Diosaxay, ñanqha lurir jaqin amparapat qhispiyita, jaqi jiwayirin amparapata, qhuru jaqit jark'aqita," 
Psalms71:5 Tatay, jumaw nayan suyt'añaxätaxa, wayna kankañaxatpach alkatañaxätasa." 
Psalms71:6 Taykaxan purakapankkäyät ukkhatpach jumarux alkatäyäsma. ¡Jumaw nayarux qhan uñjayista! ¡Nayasti jumarux yupaychapunïmawa! 
Psalms71:7 Waljaniw sarnaqäwixampix muspharapxäna, jumakiw nayan arxatirixätaxa." 
Psalms71:8 Lakaxax sapüruw qhapaq kankañamatxa, jach'añchäwi q'uchunakampi phuqt'atäski;" 
Psalms71:9 janikiy ch'ama qarit tuqir jisk'achistati; ch'amaxax tukusxani ukkhax janikiy jaytanukustati. 
Psalms71:10 Timasirinakaxax nayxat jan wal parlapxi, aliqapuniw uñch'ukipxitu, jupanakax jiwayañ munapxitu." 
Psalms71:11 Ukatsti sapxiwa: “Arktapxam, katuntapxam, Diosax jupar apanukxiwa, janiw khitis arxatkaniti” sasa." 
Psalms71:12 Diosaxay, janikiy nayat jayarst'amti; ¡jank'akiy nayar yanapt'ir jutam!" 
Psalms71:13 ¡Nayar jiwayañ munirinakax p'inqachjatäpxpan, tukjatäpxarakpan! ¡Nayar ñanqha luririnakax axtañar tukuyatäpxpan!" 
Psalms71:14 Nayasti jumarukiw suyt'askäma, juk'ampi juk'ampirak yupaychäma;" 
Psalms71:15 lakaxax arxatatamat yatiyani, qhispiyäwimat sapüruw arsuni. Ukax janiw nayatak amuyañjamäkiti." 
Psalms71:16 Tatay, jach'a luräwinakamat yatiyä; juma sapak chiqätamat arsurakï." 
Psalms71:17 Diosaxay, wayna kankañaxatpach yatichasista, nayasti jichhakamas muspharkañ luratanakamat yatiyaskaktwa." 
Psalms71:18 Diosaxay, ch'ama qaritäxä ukapachaxa, janq'u ñik'utanïxä ukkhasa, janikiy jaytanukt'asistati, jichhür jakirinakaru, janïra yuripki jupanakar jach'a ch'amamat yatiyañaxaw wakt'askitu." 
Psalms71:19 Diosay, muspharkañ aski kankañamax alaxpachkamaw puri; jumax jach'a luräwinak uñachaytaxa; ¡janiw khitis jumjamax utjkiti!" 
Psalms71:20 Chijinak tuqi irpakipasista, jach'a llakinak uñt'ayista, ukampis machaqat jakayxitäta; uraq manqhatpach wayst'asxitäta," 
Psalms71:21 aytat kankañaxaruw jiltayxitäta, wasitat chuymachxitäta." 
Psalms71:22 Israel markan Qullan Diosapay, nayasti yuspagar churäma, arsutam phuqhirïtamatsti, arpampi, salteriompiw q'uchüma." 
Psalms71:23 Tatay, lakaxax jumar q'uchusax kusisiniwa, juman qhispiyat ajayuxas kusisirakiniwa." 
Psalms71:24 Laxraxax taqi pachan askïtamat arsuni, nayan aynacht'añax munirinakasti mä p'inqaw atipjat uñjasipxani." 
Psalms72:1 Diosaxay, aski kankañam reyir churam, chiqapar uñjañam reyin yuqapar churam," 
Psalms72:2 chiqapar uñjañamp markamar irpañapataki, jan yäqat wawanakamar chiqap uñjañapataki." 
Psalms72:3 Jach'a qullunakax sumankañ apanpan, jisk'a qullunakas aski kankañ puriyanpan." 
Psalms72:4 ¡Reyix jan yäqat jaqinakar arxatpan! ¡Jan kunan jaqin wawanakapar qhispiypan, t'aqhisiyir jaqinakarusti takxatpan!" 
Psalms72:5 ¡Reyix jumar wiñay axsartirïpan, intin phaxsin utjañapkama!" 
Psalms72:6 ¡Ch'ijinakar purxatir jalljamäpan, uraqir jasaptayir jallur uñtatäpan!" 
Psalms72:7 ¡Aski kankañax marka apnaqäwipan panqarpan, sumankañasti phaxsin tukusiñapkam utjpan!" 
Psalms72:8 ¡Maysa lamar qutat maysa lamar qutkam apnaqpan, Éufrates jawirat qalltasa, aka uraq tukuskama!" 
Psalms72:9 ¡Wasaran jakir timanakapax ch'amamp apnaqirïtap yatipxpan, jisk'achjat uñjasipxpan!" 
Psalms72:10 ¡Tarsis markankir reyinakasa, quta wat'ankir reyinakasa, jupar qullqi churapxpan, Arabiankir reyinakasa, Etiopiankir reyinakasa churäwinak luqtapxpan!" 
Psalms72:11 ¡Taqpach reyinakax jupa nayraqatar killt'asipxpan! ¡Taqpach markanakarak juparux luqtapxpan! 
Psalms72:12 Jupaw art'asir jan kunan jaqirux antutayani, yanap jan jikxatir llakit jaqirus yanapani." 
Psalms72:13 Jupaw jan aytat jaqinakat khuyapt'ayasini, jan kunan jaqinakarus qhispiyarakini." 
Psalms72:14 Jupaw t'aqhisiñ taypit waysuni, jakañanakapan jila alanïtap layku." 
Psalms72:15 ¡Reyix jallallatäpan! ¡Sabá uraqit apanit quri churapxpan! ¡Jupatakix Diosat mayipxapunpan! ¡Jupax wiñayapun jach'añchatäpan! 
Psalms72:16 ¡Trigox yapunakan jilarkir utjpan, qullu patanakansti jilantarakpan! ¡Líbano uraqinjam granox achuntpan, pampa alinakjam trigo puyanakax puqurpan!" 
Psalms72:17 ¡Reyin sutipax wiñayatakïpan; aytat kankañapasti intir uñtat utjapunpan! ¡Taqpach markanakax jupa tuq askinak katuqapxpan! ¡Taqpach markanakasti “kusisiñanïtawa” sapxpan! 
Psalms72:18 Israelan Tatit Diosapax jach'añchatäpan, jupakiw muspharkañanak luririxa;" 
Psalms72:19 qullan sutipax wiñayatak jach'añchatäpan. ¡Qhapaq kankañapasti uraqir phuqhantpan! ¡Ukhamäpan! 
Psalms72:20 Akawjaruw Jesé chachan David yuqapan mayisitanakapax tukuyi. 
Psalms73:1 ¡Diosax Israel markatakix munasiñaniwa, q'uma chuyman jaqinakatakis munasiñanirakiwa!" 
Psalms73:2 Nayasti, mä juk'ampïsapänxa, tinkuriskäyätwa; kayunakaxax niyapuniw llust'äna," 
Psalms73:3 jach'achasir jaqinakar uñisitax layku, ñanqha jaqinakar qamirkipstir uñjatax layku." 
Psalms73:4 Jupanakarux janiw jiwañax llakisiykiti, k'umarakiw sarnaqasisipki;" 
Psalms73:5 janiw jaqin llakip uñt'apkiti, janirakiw mayninakjamas t'aqhisipkiti." 
Psalms73:6 Jach'achasiñampiw k'achachasipxi, nuwasiñampiw isthapisipxi;" 
Psalms73:7 ñanqha lurañampi puquntatäpxiwa, nayranakapas thuqhurirjamawa, ñanqha amtäwinakapax walipuniwa." 
Psalms73:8 Jaqinakat jan wal parlapxi; ¡taqinit phiskasipxi! Jach'a jach'a tukuñapax jach'apuniwa, ñanqha lurañatak parlt'asipki." 
Psalms73:9 Arunakapampix Diosaruw ñanqhachapxi, parlatapampisti jaqinakaruw jan walt'ayapkiti." 
Psalms73:10 Ukat jaqinakax jupanakar jach'añchi, janirakiw kuna juchsa jupanakan jikxatkiti." 
Psalms73:11 Jupanakax akham jiskt'asipxi: “¿Diosasti uk yatispati? ¿Alaxpachankiristi uk amuyaspati?” sasa. 
Psalms73:12 Ukhamäpxiw ñanqha lurir jaqinakaxa, jan khitir yäqasaw qamirkipstapxi." 
Psalms73:13 ¡Inamayakiw chuyma q'umachasitaxaxa! ¡Inamayakiw amparanakax ñanqhat jariqasitaxasa! 
Psalms73:14 Jan inakt'asaw nuwat uñjasta, sapa willjtaw mutuyat uñjasirakta." 
Psalms73:15 Nayatix jupanakjam amtiriskäyätxa, wawanakamarux aljantiriskäyätwa." 
Psalms73:16 Nayax ukxat amuyt'añ munäyäta, nayatakisti ukax wali ch'amänwa:" 
Psalms73:17 Diosan qullan utapar mantasinak amuyta, kunarutix puripkan uka." 
Psalms73:18 Jupanakarux llust'a chiqaruw uchtaxa, aynacht'añaruw nukt'araktaxa." 
Psalms73:19 ¡Akatjamat t'unjatax uñjasipxani! ¡Axsarañampi tukjataw tukusipxani! 
Psalms73:20 Tatay, ikit p'arxtasir jaqjam sartaskät ukapachasti, k'ari uñnaqaparux jisk'achätawa." 
Psalms73:21 Nayax wali llakitäskayätwa, chuymaxas walpun usutänxa," 
Psalms73:22 nayax jan amuyt'asir jalta chuyma jaqïyätwa; ¡nayraqatamansti uywar uñtatäyätwa! 
Psalms73:23 Kunäkipansa, jumampi chikapuniw utjasïyäta, jumaw kupi amparaxat wayxarustaxa," 
Psalms73:24 amtatamarjamaw irpistaxa, tukuyarusti jach'achasaw katuqitätaxa." 
Psalms73:25 ¿Khitis alaxpachan utjitu? ¡Juma sapakïtawa! Jumampi chik utjasax janiw kuns aka uraqin munkti. 
Psalms73:26 Chuymaxasa, janchixas tukusiskiwa, ukampis Diosaw wiñay katuqäwixaxa, jupaw chuymaxarux katxäsiski." 
Psalms73:27 Jumat jayarst'irinakax jiwapxaniwa; arsutam jan phuqhirinakarusti t'unjätawa. 
Psalms73:28 Nayasti Diosaruw jak'achasï, ukaw nayatakix askixa. Dios Tatay, jumaw arxatirixätaxa, taqpach luräwinakamat yatiyä." 
Psalms74:1 Diosay, ¿kunatarak apanukt'asipxistasti? ¿Kunatarak q'apisiñamasti tamamankir ovejanakatak nakhisti?" 
Psalms74:2 Nayra pachatpach jikxatasit markamat amtasim, jumankañapatak qhispiyat markamat khuyapayasim; kawkhantix utjaskäyäta uka Sión qullut amtasirakim." 
Psalms74:3 Aka t'unjat markamar uñjir jutakimaya; ¡uñisirix qullan utamarux taqpach t'unjawayi! 
Psalms74:4 Timanakamax atipjasin qullan utaman waruripxi; ¡yaqha markankir wiphalanak sayt'ayasipxi," 
Psalms74:5 mantañawja punkuruw uchapxi! Ch'umi taypinkir lawa ch'iyirinakjamaw," 
Psalms74:6 hachampi, martillomp jawq'antasax lawat lurat k'achachatanak t'unthapipxi." 
Psalms74:7 Qullan utamarux ninampiw irkatapxi; uraqitpach allinukusaw sutiman utjäwip ñanqhachapxi. 
Psalms74:8 Nanakar taqpach tukjañatakiw amtapxi; jumar yupaychañ chiqawjanak ninampiw phichhantapxi. 
Psalms74:9 Janiw qullan chimpunakax uñjatäkxiti; janirakiw profetas utjkxiti, janiw khitis kunapachkam ukhamäñapsa yatkiti." 
Psalms74:10 Diosaxay, ¿kunapachkamarak nanakar uñisirinakasti t'aqhisiyapxitanisti? ¿Kunapachkamarak sutim jisk'achapxanisti?" 
Psalms74:11 ¿Kunatarak ch'iqa amparam aythapistasti? ¿Kunatarak kupi ampar qhumthapit qhipartasti? 
Psalms74:12 Diosaxay, jumaw nayratpach reyixätaxa, jumaw aka uraqin walja kuti atipjtaxa." 
Psalms74:13 Jumaw lamar qutarux ch'amamampi payar jaljtaytaxa, lamar qutankir axsarkañ animalan p'iqip phallaytaxa," 
Psalms74:14 jumaw Leviatán axsarkañ animalan p'iqip pallalljtaxa, wasarankir animalanakan manq'añapatakiw jaqunuktaxa." 
Psalms74:15 Jumaw uma jalsunaksa, jawiranaksa jalsuytaxa, jumaw jan wañsur jawiranak wañt'aytaxa." 
Psalms74:16 Jumankiw urusa, arumasa; jumaw phaxsimpiru, intimpirux uchtaxa;" 
Psalms74:17 jumaw akapach qurpanak ayrunttaxa; jumarakiw jallupacha, awtipacha uchtaxa." 
Psalms74:18 Tatay, janikiy armasimti, timasirix jisk'achtamwa, jan amuyt'asir jaqisti jumat jan wal parli." 
Psalms74:19 ¡Janikiy nanakat armasipxistati! Qhurukutur uñtat pisi ch'amäpxtwa; ¡janikiy axsarkañ animalanakar katuyapxistati! 
Psalms74:20 ¡Nanakampi arust'äwi luratamat amtasim, akapachax jan wali lurañanakamp phuqhantatawa!" 
Psalms74:21 T'aqhisiyat jaqirux janikiy p'inqachayamti; jan kunan jaqinakarusa, llakitanakarusa, sutim jach'añchir tukuyam." 
Psalms74:22 ¡Diosay, sartasikimaya! ¡Amtatamax amtatapunïpan! Jan amuyt'an jaqinakan jumar ñanqhachatapat amtasim." 
Psalms74:23 Janikiy timanakaman uxutanakap armasimti, janirak jumar qallantañatak wararitapatsa armasimti." 
Psalms75:1 Diosay, yuspagarapxsmawa, sutim aytasipxta, muspharkañ luräwinakam q'uchupxta." 
Psalms75:2 Tatitux siwa: “Wakiskani ukapachaw, chiqa kankañampi taripä." 
Psalms75:3 Aka uraqix jaqinakapamppach khathatki ukkhaxa, nayaw saphitpach thuruñchiripätxa” sasa." 
Psalms75:4 Jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakarux sistwa: “Jan jach'achasipxamti; ñanqha lurir jaqinakarusti saraktwa: p'iq jan waytapxamti; 
Psalms75:5 munañanïtamat jan ukataq p'iq waytapxamti, janirak q'añu arunak parlirïpxamti” sasa." 
Psalms75:6 Yanapax janiw inti jalsutsa, inti jalantatsa jutkiti, janirakiw wasaratsa, qullunakatsa jutkiti," 
Psalms75:7 jan ukasti, taripir Diosat juti: mayninakarux aynacht'ayiwa, yaqhanakarusti jach'aruw aptaraki." 
Psalms75:8 Tatitux wali q'apisitawa, mutuyañatakix jank'akiwa. May chuym ch'amakt'ayasin ukkhasti, jan khuyapt'ayasisaw q'apisiñapampix ñanqha lurir jaqinakar mutuyani." 
Psalms75:9 Nayasti Jacobun Diosapat yatiyä, q'uchunak jupatakiw q'uchurakï;" 
Psalms75:10 jupaw ñanqha lurir jaqinakan munañap tukjani, aski jaqin ch'aman kankañapsti jilxatayaniwa." 
Psalms76:1 Diosax Judá uraqin uñt'atawa; sutipax Israel markan wali aytatawa. 
Psalms76:2 Qullan utapax Jerusalenankiwa, utjäwipax Sión qullunkiwa;" 
Psalms76:3 ukawjan nuwasiñ yänak t'unjäna: jark'aqasiñanaka, espadanaka, mich'inak antutt'añanak tukjarakïna." 
Psalms76:4 ¡Diosay, jumax qhapaq kankañanïtawa! ¡Jach'a qullunakat sipan juk'amp jach'ätawa!" 
Psalms76:5 Ch'aman jaqinakax jaqunukutäpxänwa; nuwasir jaqinakax janiw nuwasirjamäpkänti; ¡jupanakax wiñayatakiw ikxapxäna! 
Psalms76:6 Jacobun Diosapa, axsarayañampikiw carronaka, caballonak sayantaytaxa." 
Psalms76:7 ¡Jumax axsarkayapunïtawa! ¿Khitirak nayraqataman sayt'aspasti, q'apisiñaman ninjam aqtatap laykusti?" 
Psalms76:8 Diosay, alaxpachatpach arsutam yatiytaxa; uraqix axsariwa, amukt'arakiwa," 
Psalms76:9 kunapachatix jumax taripañatak sayt'askta, t'aqhisiyatanakar qhispiyañatak sartaskta ukapachaxa." 
Psalms76:10 Jaqin tipusiñapax jumar jach'añchañaruw tuku; juk'a q'apisiñapas jumaruw jach'añchi. 
Psalms76:11 Tatitutak arsupxam, phuqhapxarakim, jupan jaqinakapa, axsarkañ Diosar luqtäwinak churapxam." 
Psalms76:12 Jupaw p'iqichirinakarux jisk'achji, akapachankir reyinakarus axsarayaraki." 
Psalms77:1 Diosaruw jach'at art'asta, nayar ist'añapatakiw mayista." 
Psalms77:2 Llakisiñaxan Tatituruw thaqta, arum paqariw amparas luqtat jupat mayista. Ajayuxasti janiw chuymachasiñ jikxatkiti." 
Psalms77:3 Diosat amtaskta ukkhasti; ch'ama laq'jtatak amuyasta walpun jachañ munarakta. 
Psalms77:4 Tatay, jumax janiw ikthapiykistati, ¡q'ala mayjt'atätwa, janiw arsurjamäkti!" 
Psalms77:5 Nayra pacha urunak amthapta, nayra maranakat amtasta;" 
Psalms77:6 arumanakax q'uchurïkäyät ukxat amtasta. Chuyma manqhixan naya pachpaw jiskt'asta: 
Psalms77:7 ¿Tatitux wiñayatakipunit jaytanukpachïstu? ¿Janipunit mayampis khuyapayaskxistani? 
Psalms77:8 ¿Munasiñapax tukusxapunpachati? ¿Arsutapax jan mayampitakich tukusxpacha? 
Psalms77:9 ¿Diosax munasiñapat armasxpachati? jan ukax, ¿q'apisiñach chuymap jist'antpacha? sasa." 
Psalms77:10 Naya pachpaw sista: “¡Tatitun jiwasanakar jan khuyapayasxatapax walpun chuym usuyitu!” sasa. 
Psalms77:11 Nayra pachan Tatitun muspharkañ luratanakapat amtasï; 
Psalms77:12 taqi kun luratapat lup'isï. 
Psalms77:13 Diosay, thakhinakamax qullanawa; ¿khiti diosarak jumjam ch'amanisti?" 
Psalms77:14 ¡Jumaw muspharkañanak lurir Diosätaxa! ¡Jumaw markanakar ch'amam uñacht'aytaxa! 
Psalms77:15 Ch'amamampiw markamarux qhispiytaxa: Jacobun wawanakaparu, Josean wawanakaparu." 
Psalms77:16 Diosaxay, lamar qutax jumar uñjasax axsarthapïnwa, walja umanakapas khathatirakïnwa;" 
Psalms77:17 qinayanakax waraskir jall purxatayäna, alaxpachansti q'ixu q'ixunakaw sartäna, lliju llijunakaw taqi chiqan llijtarakïna." 
Psalms77:18 Q'ixu q'ixunakamax jach'a thayampi chikaw ist'asïna, lliju llijunakamax taqi akapach qhant'ayäna, uraqisti khathatirakïnwa." 
Psalms77:19 Jumax lamar qutan thakhi jist'arastaxa, walja umanak taypinjam makhattaxa, ukampis janiw khitis takt'atam jikxatkänti." 
Psalms77:20 Markamarux ovej tamar uñtat irpäyätaxa, Moisesampin Aaronampin amparap tuqi." 
Psalms78:1 Markaxay, yatichäwinakaxar ist'am; kuntix siskäma uk sum ist'am." 
Psalms78:2 Säwinak tuqiw arsü; nayra pachatpach imantatanakat parlä. 
Psalms78:3 Kuntix nanakax ist'apkta, yatipkarakta, kuntix awkinakax yatiyapkitu ukanakxa," 
Psalms78:4 janiw wawanakaxarux imt'apkäti. Jutir wawanakampiw Tatitur jach'añchapxä, ch'amapampita, muspharkañ luräwinakapampit yatiyapxä." 
Psalms78:5 Diosaw Jacobutakix mä kamachi uñstayäna; Israel markaruw kamachi arunak churäna: jupaw nayra awkinakasarux mayïna, wawanakapar yatichañataki," 
Psalms78:6 jutir wawanakan uka kamachinak yatipxañapataki, uka qhipat yurir wawanakas uñt'apxañapataki, jupanakasti wawanakapar yatiyapxañapatakiraki;" 
Psalms78:7 Diosar taqpach chuymapampi iyawsapxañapataki, luräwinakap jan armapxañapataki; arsutanakap waqaychapxañapataki," 
Psalms78:8 nayra pachan jakir awkinakapjam jan sarnaqapxañapataki, qallasir t'axmar jaqir jan tukupxañapataki, pächasir chuyman jaqir jan tukupxañapataki, Diosat saraqtir jaqir jan tukupxañapataki." 
Psalms78:9 Efraín ayllunkir mich'inak apnaqir jaqinakax, nuwasïwi urun qhiparuw uñtxapxäna," 
Psalms78:10 janiw Diosamp arust'äwi luratanakap yäqapkänti, janirakiw yatichäwinakaparus jaysañ munapkänti." 
Psalms78:11 Diosan luräwinakapat armasipxäna, muspharkañ luräwinak uñjayatapat armt'asipxäna." 
Psalms78:12 Diosax Egiptonkir Soan uraqinxa, awkinakapan uñjkañaw muspharkañanak luräna:" 
Psalms78:13 lamar qutarux payaruw jaljtayäna, uka chiq jupanakarux makhatayäna, pirqanakar uñtat umanak sayt'ayäna." 
Psalms78:14 Mä qinayaw urux irpäna, nina qhanaw arumax irparakïna." 
Psalms78:15 Wasaran payaruw qarqa jaljtayäna, jupanakarusti jilarkir uma umapxañapatak churäna." 
Psalms78:16 Diosax jach'a qarqat uma jalsuyäna, walja umanakan jawira jaltayäna." 
Psalms78:17 Jupanakasti juch lurasipkakïnwa; Alaxpachankirirux wasaran qallasisipkakïnwa. 
Psalms78:18 Diosaruw yant'añ munapxäna, munañaparjam manq'a mayisa;" 
Psalms78:19 Diosatakix arusipxänwa: “¿Diosasti wasaran manq'añ wakichaspati? 
Psalms78:20 Chiqansa jupax qarqaruw sak'antäna, umasti waljapuniw uka qarqat jalsüna, ukampis, ¿t'ant'a churarakistaspati?, ¿markapatak aycha utjayarakispati?” sasa." 
Psalms78:21 Tatitux uk ist'asinxa, phiñasïnwa; q'apisiñapasti ninjamaw Jacobutak aqtäna." 
Psalms78:22 Janiw jupanakax Diosar taqi chuymamp alkatapkänti, janirakiw yanapaparus iyawsapkänti." 
Psalms78:23 Diosasti qinayanakaruw mayïna, alaxpach punkunak jist'aräna;" 
Psalms78:24 ¡maná sat t'ant'a jupanakxarux jalluyäna, alaxpach t'ant'a manq'añapatak churäna!" 
Psalms78:25 Jaqisti angelanakan t'ant'ap manq'äna, Diosax jilarkir manq'añ apayanïna." 
Psalms78:26 Inti jalsu thayampi, aynach thayampiw alaxpachan thayt'äna; ¡Diosaw ch'amapampi thayt'ayäna!" 
Psalms78:27 Laq'a tutukar uñtat aycha jalluyäna; ¡quta ch'allar uñtataw jamach'inakax purintanïna! 
Psalms78:28 Diosax chhujllanak taypiruw ukanak puriyäna, chhujllanakap anqäxaruw puriyarakïna." 
Psalms78:29 Jupanakasti sist'asiñkamaw manq'apxäna, ukhamat Diosax jupanakan munataparjam phuqhäna." 
Psalms78:30 Ukampis, janïraw manq'at awtjatap apartayasipkänti, lakapas manq'ampi phuqhantatäskän ukapachaw" 
Psalms78:31 Diosan q'apisiñapax jupanakatak purinïna; wali ch'aman jaqinakaruw jiwarayäna. ¡Israelankir aski chachanakaruw tukusiyäna! 
Psalms78:32 Ukanak uñjkasasa, juch lurasipkakïnwa; janiw Diosan muspharkañ luratanakaparux iyawsapkänti." 
Psalms78:33 Ukat Diosax jupanakar jiwarayäna, mä samsukïkaspas ukhama, wali t'aqhisiñ taypin tukusiyäna." 
Psalms78:34 Diosax jupanakar mutuykäna ukapachakiw juparux thaqhapxäna, jank'akiw Diosar makhatxañatakix thaqhapxäna;" 
Psalms78:35 ukapachakiw alaxpachankir Diosat amtasipxäna, ukapachakiw jupanakar imaskatapa, qhispiyatap amuyasipxäna." 
Psalms78:36 Lakakiw juparux parlapxäna, laxrampisti k'arintapxänwa," 
Psalms78:37 janiw chuymanakapan qhan arsupkänti, janirakiw arust'äwiparjamas phuqhapkänti." 
Psalms78:38 Diosasti jupanakat khuyapayasïnwa, ñanqha luratanakap pampachäna, janiw jupanakarux tukjkänti; walja kutiw q'apisiñap t'akurayasïna, janiw phiñasiñapampi atipjayaskänti." 
Psalms78:39 Diosax jupanakan janchïpxatap amtasïna; jan kuttanir thayar uñtatäpxatap amuyarakïna. 
Psalms78:40 ¡Walja kutiw Diosarux jan jaysapkänti, wasarankasaw chuym usuyapxäna!" 
Psalms78:41 Wasitatsa, yant'asipkakïnwa; ¡Israelan Qullanaparuw llakisiyapxäna!" 
Psalms78:42 Janiw jupanakax amtasipkänti, Diosax uñisiripan amparapat ch'amapamp qhispiykän uka urutxa;" 
Psalms78:43 Egipto uraqin muspharkañanak lurkän ukanakata; 
Psalms78:44 jawir umanakar wilar tukuykän ukata, Egiptonkirinakax uka umanak jan umirjamäpkän ukata." 
Psalms78:45 Mich'isir chhichhillankhanakampi, jamp'atunakampi apayanïna, ukanakasti taqi kun manq'antapxäna, tukjapxarakïna;" 
Psalms78:46 ch'amapampi achuyat yapunaksti, t'iju t'ijunakaruw katuyäna." 
Psalms78:47 Higo yapunakarux chhijchhimpiw t'unjäna, uva yapunakarusti juyphimpiw tukjäna." 
Psalms78:48 Vaca tamanakapax chhijchhimpiw jiwarapxäna, ovej tamanakapasti q'ixu q'ixumpiw tukusipxäna." 
Psalms78:49 Diosaw jach'a q'apisiñap jupanakatak apayanïna: q'apisiña, juchañchatäña, llakisiñ apayanïna, ukanakax t'unjir khithanakar uñtatäpxänwa." 
Psalms78:50 ¡Ukanak tuqiw Diosax q'apisiñap samarayasïna! Jupanakarux janiw jiwañat qhispiykänti, jan ukasti jiwañaruw katxaruyäna;" 
Psalms78:51 ¡pachpa Egipto markan jiwarayäna, sapaqat utankir tayna yuqall wawanakaru!" 
Psalms78:52 Israel markarux mä ovej tamar uñtat irpsunïna; tamar uñtat wasar chiqanjam anakïna. 
Psalms78:53 Wali thuriñchat jupanakarux irpäna, jan axsarasipkañapataki, timanakaparusti lamar qutaw p'amp'antäna." 
Psalms78:54 Diosaw markaparux qullan uraqir irpantäna, jupan kutsuyasit qullunakaruw puriyäna." 
Psalms78:55 Israel markan nayraqatapatxa, Tatitur jan uñt'ir markanakarux ananukünwa; ayllunakaparuw uraqinak lakintäna, chhujllanakapan jakayarakïna." 
Psalms78:56 Jupanakasti Alaxpachankir Diosarux, arsutanakapar jan yäqasaw yant'apxäna, qallasipxarakïna;" 
Psalms78:57 awkinakapjamaw Diosarux apanukupxäna, maysa uñtapxarakïna; ¡p'akisir mich'i antutt'añar uñtataw k'umthapipxäna!" 
Psalms78:58 Jucha lurañ altaranakapampiw Diosarux q'apisiyapxäna, akapach diosanakar yupaychatapampiw Diosan chuymap mayjt'ayapxäna." 
Psalms78:59 Diosax uk uñjasax q'apisïnwa, Israel markarusti apanukupunïnwa," 
Psalms78:60 ukat Siló chiqan utjäwip jaytanukxäna, jaqinak taypin qullan utjäwip apanukxäna." 
Psalms78:61 Aytat kankañ chimpupsa, ch'aman kankañ chimpupsa, timasirinakapampiw apaqayxäna." 
Psalms78:62 Markapatakix wali q'apisitänwa, uñisirinakapampiw q'al atipjayäna." 
Psalms78:63 Waynanakax ninamp nakhantayataw jiwarapxäna; jaqichasir tawaqunakatakix janiw warurt'añanakax utjkxänti; 
Psalms78:64 sacerdotenakax espadamp jiwayatäpxänwa, warminakapasti janiw jupanakat jachapkänti." 
Psalms78:65 Tatitusti ikïwitjam sartäna, vinomp machjat nuwasir jaqjamaw p'arxtäna," 
Psalms78:66 timanakaparux atipjasin alisnuküna; ¡wiñayatakiw p'inqa tukuyäna! 
Psalms78:67 Josean wawanakaparus jaqunukünwa, janirakiw Efraín ayllurus ajllkänti;" 
Psalms78:68 Judá aylluruw ajllïna, munat Jerusalén markaparuw chhijlläna." 
Psalms78:69 Qullan utapxa, alaxpachjam jach'a utachäna, uraqjama wiñayatak thuriñchat sayt'ayarakïna." 
Psalms78:70 David uywataparuw ajllisïna, ovej awatirïkän ukaru;" 
Psalms78:71 ovej tamanakan qhipap sarañat irpaqanïna, Jacobun markapar awatiñapataki, Israel markan awatiripäñapataki." 
Psalms78:72 Davidasti taqpach chuymampiw Tatitun markapar awatïna; ch'ikhi kankañampiw uñjäna, irparakïna." 
Psalms79:1 ¡Diosaxay, Tatitur jan uñt'ir jaqinakaw uraqimarux mantantanipxi! ¡Qullan utamaruw ñanqhachapxi, Jerusalenarusti t'unjat markaruw tukuyapxi!" 
Psalms79:2 Chiqpach arkirinakaman amayanakapxa, allqamarinakan manq'añapatakiw jaqunukupxi, animalanakan manq'añapatakiw liwtapxi." 
Psalms79:3 Jerusalén thiyanakanxa, umar uñtat wilanakap wartapxi, jiwatanakar janiw khiti p'amp'iris utjkiti." 
Psalms79:4 Nanak jak'an utjir markanakan phiskasiñapäpxtwa; nanakar muyuntirinakan larusiñapäpxaraktwa. 
Psalms79:5 Tatay, ¿kunapachkamarak q'apisitakïskätasti? ¿Kunapachkamarak q'apisiñamasti ninjam nakhanisti?" 
Psalms79:6 ¡Jach'a q'apisiñampiy t'aqhisiyam, jumar jan uñt'ir markanakaru, sutim jan aytasir reyinakaru!" 
Psalms79:7 Jupanakaw Israel markarux t'unjapxi, utanakap q'al tinkurayapxi." 
Psalms79:8 Nayra awkinakaxan juchanakapatxa, janikiy nanakar mutuyapxistati; ¡khuyapayasiñamax jank'akiy purinpan, nanakax aynacht'ataw uñjasipxta!" 
Psalms79:9 Qhispiyir Diosaxay, ¡juman jach'a sutim laykuy arxatapxita, qhapaq sutim laykuy qhispiyapxita, juchanakat pampachapxarakita!" 
Psalms79:10 ¿Kunatarak jucharar jaqinakast sasipkani: “Kawkinkarak Diosapasti?” sasa. Nanakan uñjkañay Diosar jan uñt'irinakax mutupxpan, chiqpach arkirinakamar jiwayapxatapat t'aqhisipxarakpan." 
Psalms79:11 Katuntat jaqin ayqutap ist'am: jiwañar juchañchatanakarusti ch'amamampiy qhispiyam. 
Psalms79:12 Tatay, marka masinakaxarux paqallq kutimp kutiyam, jumar jan walinak luratapata;" 
Psalms79:13 nanakasti markamjamaxa, wiñayaw yuspagarapxäma, tamamankir ovejanakjamaxa, wiñayaw jach'añchapxäma, yupaychañ q'uchunak wiñayaw q'uchupxarakï." 
Psalms80:1 Israel markan awatiripa, ist'apxakitaya, ovej tamar uñtat Josean markapar irpiripa, jaysapxakitaya; querubines sat taypin qunuñaman qunt'asiri, ist'apxakitaya. Efrainan ayllunakaparux uñtanikimaya," 
Psalms80:2 Benjamín, Manasés ukanakan ayllunakaparus khuyapt'ayanikimaya. ¡Sartasikimaya, ch'amamamp qhispiyir jutakimaya!" 
Psalms80:3 Diosay, kunjamäpkäyättix ukhamaruy kutjtayxapxita, ¡khuyapayasiñampiy uñtanipxita, nanakasti qhispiyataw uñjasipxä!" 
Psalms80:4 Taqi ch'aman Dios Tatay, markaman mayisitapampisti, ¿kunapachkamarak q'apisitakïskätasti?" 
Psalms80:5 Manq'añ lantxa, jachañ churapxista, uma lantsti, juk'amp jachañ utjayarapipxista." 
Psalms80:6 Marka jak'a masinakaxan sawkasiñaparuw tukuyapxista, timanakaxasti nanakat larusipxituwa." 
Psalms80:7 Taqi ch'aman Diosay, kunjamäpkäyättix ukhamaruy kutjtayxapxita, ¡khuyapayasiñampiy uñtanipxita, nanakasti qhispiyataw uñjasipxä!" 
Psalms80:8 Jumaw Egiptot uva alir uñtat apsuntaxa, Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinak jaqunukusin ayrunttaxa." 
Psalms80:9 Jumaw uraq sum q'umachtaxa, uva alisti, saphintänwa, uraqpacharuw phuqhantarakïna." 
Psalms80:10 Ch'iwipax qullunak imt'äna, layminakapasti jach'a quqanakaruw imt'arakïna." 
Psalms80:11 Layminakapax lamar qutkamaw purïna, külltir alinakas Éufrates jawirkamaw purirakïna." 
Psalms80:12 ¿Kunatarak muyuntat pirqanakap tinkunukuytasti? ¿Kunatarak thakhi saririnakampi uva alinak jik'iraytasti? 
Psalms80:13 Ch'uminkir khuchhix q'alpun yapu tukji, ch'umi manqhankir animalanakasti manq'supxarakiwa." 
Psalms80:14 Taqi ch'aman Diosay, kuttanxakimaya; khuyapayasir nayramampi alaxpachat uñtanikimaya, uva yapum tumpasir jutakimaya," 
Psalms80:15 amparamamp ayruntat uva alïchixaya, juman ch'amaniptayat alirakïchixaya." 
Psalms80:16 Uka alir khuchhuririmpiru, ninampi phichkatirimpirux q'apisiñamamp tukjam;" 
Psalms80:17 juman ajllita chacharusti yanapt'akimaya, jumaw uka chacharux ch'amañchtaxa," 
Psalms80:18 nanakasti janipuniw mayampis jumat saraqapkäti. ¡Jakañay churapxita, juma saparukiw yupaychapxäma!" 
Psalms80:19 Taqi ch'aman Diosay, kunjamäpkäyättix ukhamaruy kutjtayxapxita, ¡khuyapayasiñamampiy uñtanipxita, nanakasti qhispiyataw uñjasipxä!" 
Psalms81:1 ¡Kusisiñamp Diosar q'uchupxam, jupaw ch'amañchirisaxa! ¡Jacobun Diosapar kusisiñamp yupaychapxam!" 
Psalms81:2 Chhullu chhullunakampi chik q'uchupxam, munkay arpampi, salteriompi chik q'uchupxam." 
Psalms81:3 Machaq phaxsi uñstipan trompet phust'apxam, urt'a puripansti, phust'apxarakim ukürux jiwasanakan jach'a urusawa." 
Psalms81:4 Ukax kamachi arunakapawa, Jacobun Diosapaw Israel markar churawayi;" 
Psalms81:5 Josearus uka arunak churawayaraki, Diosax Egiptor jan walt'aykän ukapacha. Nayax jan uñt'at aru akham sir ist'äyäta:" 
Psalms81:6 “Jatxattir q'ipim kallachimat apaqxsma, ch'ama tukuñ lurañamat samart'aysma." 
Psalms81:7 T'aqhisiñaman jawsista, nayasti qhispiysmawa; q'ixuqir qinay taypitpach nayax jaysansma; Meribá uma jalsu jak'an yant'sma." 
Psalms81:8 Markaxay, iwxanakaxar ist'am; ¡Israel marka, inachay ist'itasma!" 
Psalms81:9 Janiw yaqha markankir diosanakanïyätati, janiw yaqha markankir diosanakarux yupaychätati." 
Psalms81:10 Nayaw Tatitu Diosamätxa, nayaw Egipto markat irpsunsma, kuns manq'añ munta, nayax jilarkir churäma” sasa." 
Psalms81:11 “Markaxasti janiw ist'añ munkitänti; ¡Israel markax janiw jaysañ munkitänti! 
Psalms81:12 Ukat munañaparjam sarnaqayta, munataparjamaw jakapxarakïna." 
Psalms81:13 Markaxatix ist'itasapänxa, Israel markatix thakhixanjam sarnaqasapänxa," 
Psalms81:14 mä ch'ipxtanak timanakaparux aynacht'ayiriskäyäta, uñisirinakaparus mutuyiriskäyäta.”" 
Psalms81:15 Tatitur uñisirinakax axsarañat liwirtapxaspa, juchañchäwipasti jan mayampitakïspawa." 
Psalms81:16 Diosax sumïr trigompiw markaparux manq'ayaspa, wasar misk'impiw umat pharjatap apaqarakispa." 
Psalms82:1 Diosax qullan tantachasïwin sayt'asïna, jilïr taripirinakaruw taripäna:" 
Psalms82:2 “¿Kunapachkamarak jan wal taripapxätasti? ¿Kunapachkamarak ñanqha lurir jaqinakar arxatapxätasti? 
Psalms82:3 ¡Jan yäqat jaqiru, wajchar yanapt'apxam! ¡Jan kunan jaqiru, pist'ayasir jaqir chiqapar uñjapxam!" 
Psalms82:4 ¡Jan yäqat jaqiru, jan kunan jaqinakar qhispiyapxam, ñanqha lurir jaqinakat arxatapxam!" 
Psalms82:5 “Jumanakasti janiw yatipktati, janirakiw amuyt'apktasa, ch'amakan sarnaqapxtaxa. Ukat aka uraqin utt'äwipas khathatixa." 
Psalms82:6 Nayax sapxsmawa: Jumanakax diosanakäpxtawa; taqpachanix Alaxpachankirin wawanakapäpxtawa; 
Psalms82:7 ukampis taqi jaqjamaw kipkak jiwapxäta, munañan kankañampi apnaqir jilïrinakjamaw aynacht'apxäta” sasa." 
Psalms82:8 ¡Diosay, aka uraqi apnaqañatakix sartasikimaya, jumankiw taqpach markanakaxa!" 
Psalms83:1 Tatay, janikiy amukïmti, Diosaxay, unxtasikimaya." 
Psalms83:2 Uñtam, timasirinakamax uxupxiwa, uñisirinakamasti jumaruw saykatapxtam." 
Psalms83:3 Markamatakiw jan walinak amtapxi, juman arxatat jaqinakatakiw ñanqha amtapxi." 
Psalms83:4 Jupanakax nanakar t'unjiriw jutañ amtapxi, markarux chhaqtayañ munapxi, Israelan sutipan jan mayampi amtatäñapataki." 
Psalms83:5 Jumar jan walt'ayañatakiw arust'asipxi, mä wawakiw akïr markanakax jumatak arusipxi:" 
Psalms83:6 Edom, Ismael, Moab, Agar ukanakan wawanakapa," 
Psalms83:7 Guebal, Amón, Amalec jaqinaka, Tiro uraqin jakir filisteonaka," 
Psalms83:8 asirionakas jupanakampiw chikachasipxi, Lot chachan wawanakaparus yanapt'apxiwa." 
Psalms83:9 Madián jaqinakarjam jupanakarux tukjam, Sísara jaqirjam lurjam, kunjämtix Quisón jawira jak'an Jabín jaqirux lurjkta ukhama," 
Psalms83:10 kamisatix jupanakax Endor chiqawjan t'unjat uñjasipkäna, uraqitakis wanur tukupkän ukhama." 
Psalms83:11 Oreb, Zeeb uka jilïrinakarux tukjam; Zébah, Zalmuná, uka jilïrinakarjam lurjam," 
Psalms83:12 jupanakax Diosan suma uraqinakap katuntasiñ munapxäna. 
Psalms83:13 Diosaxay, tutukan apat ch'aphirjam tukuyam, thayan apat waña laphinakarjam tukuyam;" 
Psalms83:14 kamisatix ninax ch'umir nakhantki ukhama, kunjämtix nina lawranakax qullunak nakhantki ukhama," 
Psalms83:15 ¡t'aqhisiñanakampi jupanakar ukham arktam, jach'a tutukanakamampi axsarayam!" 
Psalms83:16 ¡Tatay, jupanakarux p'inqa tukuyam, ukhamat juman Diosätam yatipxañapataki!" 
Psalms83:17 Wiñayatak p'inqachat uñjasipxpan, ¡atipjat jiwarapxpan!" 
Psalms83:18 ¡Juma sapak Diosätam yatipxpan, aka uraqxar juma sapak Alaxpachankirïtam yatipxarakpan!" 
Psalms84:1 ¡Taqi ch'aman Diosay, qullan utjäwimax munkayawa!" 
Psalms84:2 ¡Taqpach ajayuxampiw qullan utaman uyupankañ munta! ¡Taqpach chuymaxampiw jakkir Diosar kusisit q'uchta! 
Psalms84:3 Taqi ch'aman Tatituxay, Reyixay, Diosaxay, phichhitanka jamach'inakas jak'aman tapacht'asi, golondrina sat jamach'isti, chhiwlinakapatak altaraman tapa jikxataraki."
