Psalms84:4 ¡Utaman jakirinakax kusisiñanïpxiwa, jan qarjasisaw jumarux yupaychapxtam!" 
Psalms84:5 Juman ch'amam katuqirinakax kusisiñanïpxiwa, qullan utamkam puriñ munirinakax kusisiñanïpxiwa." 
Psalms84:6 Jachañ qhirwa taypinjam sarakipapkani ukapachaxa, uma jalsuruw tukuyapxani, jallumppachaw askinakampi phuqhantani;" 
Psalms84:7 ch'amanakapax jilxataniwa, Sión markansti Diosaruw uñjapxani." 
Psalms84:8 Taqi ch'aman Diosay, ¡mayisitaxarux ist'akimaya! Jacobun Diosapa, ¡arnaqasitaxarux jaysakimaya!" 
Psalms84:9 Nanakar arxatir Diosay, juman ajllit reyirux khuyapayasiñampiy uñtanim." 
Psalms84:10 ¡Mä urukis utaman qamañax juk'ampi sumawa, waranq urunak anqankañat sipana! Nayax Diosan utap q'umachirïñ munta, ñanqha lurañ chiqawjan jakañat sipana." 
Psalms84:11 Diosaw qhan churistu, imarakistu; jan kamskay askin jakirinakarux, jupaw khuyapayasiñampi, aytat kankañampi churi, Tatitux taqi kun churi." 
Psalms84:12 ¡Taqi ch'aman Diosay, jumar alkatir jaqinakax kusisiñaniwa!" 
Psalms85:1 Tatay, aka markamatakix sinti munasiñanïtawa, katuntat Israelarux wasitat kusisiñar kuttayanxta," 
Psalms85:2 markaman ñanqha luratanakap pampachtawa, taqpach juchanakapax pampachatawa;" 
Psalms85:3 q'apisiñam apanukxtawa. 
Psalms85:4 Qhispiyir Diosaxay, jichhax mayampi qhispiyapxakita, janikiy nanakampix q'apisitäxamti." 
Psalms85:5 ¿Nanakatakix q'apisitakïskätati, mara marapunit q'apisïtaxa?" 
Psalms85:6 ¿Janit wasitat jakañ churapkitäta, markaman jumamp kusisiñapatakixa?" 
Psalms85:7 Tatay, ¡munasiñam uñacht'ayapxita, qhispiyapxarakita!" 
Psalms85:8 Kuntix Tatitux arskän uk ist'ä: Diosax sumankañxat markaparux yatiyani, taqpach chuymamp jupar iyawsirinakaru, wasitat ñanqha jan lurapxañapataki." 
Psalms85:9 Diosax jak'asankapuniwa, iyawsirinakapar qhispiyañatakixa; qhapaq kankañapasti uraqisan utjasini." 
Psalms85:10 Khuyapayasiñampi, aski kankañampix jikisipxaniwa, sumankañampi, chiqapar uñjañampiw mayacht'asipxani," 
Psalms85:11 aski kankañax uraqit mistuni, chiqapar uñjañasti alaxpachatpach uñtanini." 
Psalms85:12 Tatit pachpaw jallu apayanini, uraqisasti sum achurakini." 
Psalms85:13 Aski kankañax jupan nayraqatap sarani, jupatakisti thakhi wakicharapini." 
Psalms86:1 Tatay, ist'akitaya, llakimp atipjatätwa, jan kunanirakïtwa;" 
Psalms86:2 arxatt'akitaya, juman aski arkirimätwa. Jumaw Diosaxätaxa; ¡jumar iyawsir uywatamarux qhispiyakimaya!" 
Psalms86:3 Tatay, nayat khuyapt'ayasita, jumaruw sapür art'asinsma." 
Psalms86:4 Tatay, uywataman chuymaparux kusisiyakimaya, jumaruw mayisinsma." 
Psalms86:5 Tatay, jumax munasiñanïtawa, juch pampachirirakïtawa; jumar art'asirinakatakix munasirïtawa." 
Psalms86:6 Tatay, mayisitaxarux ist'akimaya, ¡achikt'asitaxarux jaysakimaya!" 
Psalms86:7 Llakisiñaxan jumar art'asinsma, juman ist'asirïtam laykuw mayisinsma." 
Psalms86:8 ¡Tatay, janiw khiti diosas jumjamax utjkiti! ¡Janirakiw luratanakamjamax utjkiti!" 
Psalms86:9 Tatay, jumaw taqpach markanak utjaytaxa, jupanakasti jumar yupaychiri, sutim jach'añchiriw jutapxani." 
Psalms86:10 Juma sapakiw jach'a Diosätaxa; muspharkañanak lurtaxa. 
Psalms86:11 Tatay, thakhimay uñacht'ayita, jan saraqtas arkañaxataki. Chuymaxasti sutim waqaychirïpan." 
Psalms86:12 Diosaxay, Tatituxay, taqpach chuymaxampiw yupaychäma, sutimsti wiñayatakiw jach'añchä." 
Psalms86:13 ¡Munasiñamax nayatak jan tupt'kayawa! ¡Wiñay mik'ayar jalantañat qhispiyista! 
Psalms86:14 Diosaxay, jach'a jach'a tukurinakaw nayatak sartapxi, qhuru jaqinakaw nayar jiwayañatak thaqhapxitu, janiw jumarus axsarapktamti." 
Psalms86:15 Jumasti, Tatay, khuyapayasir Diosätawa, llamp'u chuymani, munasiñani, aski Diosätawa." 
Psalms86:16 Uñtanikitaya, ¡nayat khuyapt'ayasita! ¡Aka uywatamar qhispiyam! ¡Ch'amam churam!" 
Psalms86:17 Qhanpun munasiñam uñacht'ayita, uñisirinakaxasti uk uñjapxpan, p'inqa tukupxarakpan. ¡Tatay, jumaw yanapista, chuymacharakista!" 
Psalms87:1 Diosan markapax qullan qullunakxar utt'ayatawa. 
Psalms87:2 Tatitux Jerusalén markarux wal munasi, Israelan taqpach markanakapat sipana." 
Psalms87:3 Diosan markapa, aski aytkañanakaw jumxat yatiyasi:" 
Psalms87:4 “Nayar uñt'ir markanak aytä: Egipto, Babilonia, Filistea, Tiro, Etiopía; uka markanakax jumïpan utjapxi.”" 
Psalms87:5 Jerusalén markatxa, sapxaniwa: “Aka markasa, khaya markas jupan utjayatawa, Alaxpachankir pachpaw Jerusalén marka utt'ayi” sasa." 
Psalms87:6 Tatitux markanakan sutip mä qillqatar qillqanti: “Aka markax jupïpan utji” sasa. 
Psalms87:7 Uka markanakasti q'uchkasasa, thuqkasasa sapxaniwa: “Jerusalén markan Diosarux uñt'apxta” sasa." 
Psalms88:1 Tatituxay, Qhispiyir Diosaxay, uruy arumaw yanapam maysma," 
Psalms88:2 ¡mayisitaxar jaysakitaya!, ¡arnaqasitaxar ist'akimaya!" 
Psalms88:3 Ajayuxax llakinakampi aynacht'atawa, jakañaxasti jiwañar jalantañampiwa;" 
Psalms88:4 ¡jiwatanakampi chik jakhutäxtwa, jan ch'aman jaqiw uñjasta!" 
Psalms88:5 Jiwatanak taypin jaytanukutätwa; nuwasïwin jiwirinakar uñtatätwa, amay imäwin p'amp'antatanakar uñtatätwa; juman jan tumpatäki jupanakjama, juman armatäki jupanakjama." 
Psalms88:6 Wali mik'ay manqharuw jaquntista, ch'amak manqhanakaruw liwintista." 
Psalms88:7 Nayaruw q'apisiñam samarasista, ¡kunayman jan walinakampiw aynacht'ayista!" 
Psalms88:8 Uñt'at masinakaxat jayarst'ayista; jupanakan uñiskay nayarux tukuyista. ¡Jan jaltkir katuntat jaqjamätwa! 
Psalms88:9 Nayranakaxasti jachkäwix juykhuptatawa. ¡Tatay, sapüruw arnaqasinsma, amparanakax juma tuqir luqtansma!" 
Psalms88:10 ¿Jiwatanakatakisti muspharkañanak lurasmati? ¿Jiwatanakasti jumar yuspagarapxiristamti? 
Psalms88:11 ¿Chiqa kankañamatsti amay imäwin yatiyasispati? ¿Munasiñamatsti jiwatanak taypin parlasispati? 
Psalms88:12 Taqi kun armt'añ jiwañ ch'amak chiqansti, ¿khitirak chiqa kankañamampita, muspharkañ luräwinakamampit aytanisti?" 
Psalms88:13 Nayasti, Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, wali willjtat jumar mayisinsma." 
Psalms88:14 Tatay, ¿kunatarak jisk'achistasti? ¿Kunatarak nayatak maysa tuq uñttasti?" 
Psalms88:15 Wayna kankañaxatpach llakit uñjasta, niya jiwirpachaw uñjasirakta; axsarkay jan walinak jumat katuqsma, janiw juk'ampi katuqirjamäkxti." 
Psalms88:16 Axsarkañ q'apisiñamax nayxaruw puriwayi, atipjataw uñjasirakta;" 
Psalms88:17 uruy arumaw q'añu umar uñtat muyuntitu. 
Psalms88:18 Uñt'at masinakaxa, nayampi chik sarnaqirinak apaqista, jichhasti, ch'amakanakakiw nayampi chik sarnaqirïxi." 
Psalms89:1 Tatay, khuyapayasiñamat wiñayapuniw q'uchü, juman askïtamat jan qarjasisaw yatiyä." 
Psalms89:2 Wiñay munasiñamat arsü; arsutam phuqhirïtamat yatiyä, alaxpachjam jan mayjt'irïtamat parlarakï." 
Psalms89:3 Jumaw Davidampix arust'äwi luräyätaxa, ajllit uywatamarux arsüyätawa:" 
Psalms89:4 “Wawanakamaruw wiñayatak utt'ayä, reyit juma lanti qunt'asiñapataki” sasa." 
Psalms89:5 Tatay, alaxpachax muspharkañ luratanakam yatiyi, aski kankañamasti angelanak taypin yatiyasi." 
Psalms89:6 ¡Tatay, janiw kawkïr diosas alaxpachanxa, jumampi chikachaskaspati!" 
Psalms89:7 Taqi ch'aman axsarkay Diosätawa, alaxpachankirinakampi muyuntatätawa." 
Psalms89:8 Taqi ch'aman Tatit Diosay, taqpach ch'amax jumankiwa, chiqa kankañasti jumar muyuntiriwa; janiw khitis jumjamax utjkiti." 
Psalms89:9 Jumaw lamar qutarux llamp'uraytaxa, jach'a mathapinakarus t'akuraytaxa;" 
Psalms89:10 jumaw lamar qutankir axsarkañ animalar t'unjtaxa, ch'aman amparamampiw timanakamarux ananuktaxa." 
Psalms89:11 Alaxpachas akapachas jumankiwa, jumaw akapach lurtaxa, taqpach uraqin utjirinak luraraktaxa." 
Psalms89:12 Jumaw amsta tuqsa, aynach tuqsa lurtaxa; Tabor qullumpi, Hermón qullumpix kusisitaw sutim jach'añchapxi." 
Psalms89:13 Amparamax taqi ch'amaniwa; kupi amparamasti wali ch'amaniwa. 
Psalms89:14 Chiqapar uñjañampi, aski kankañampiw markarux apnaqtaxa, munasiñaman wiñayatakïtap uñacht'ayapxistaxa." 
Psalms89:15 Tatay, jumar kusisiñampi yupaychir markax kusisiñaniwa, qhanamamp qhant'ayat sarnaqir markax kusisiñaniwa," 
Psalms89:16 juman sutim laykuw sapür kusisiñanïpxi, juman aski kankañam laykuw kusisipxi." 
Psalms89:17 Jumaw ch'amapätaxa, aytat kankañapätasa, khuyapayasiñam laykuw ch'amanakaxax jilxati." 
Psalms89:18 ¡Jiwasanakan arxatirisax Tatituwa! ¡Reyisasti Israel markan Qullanapawa! 
Psalms89:19 Nayra pachanxa, unañchäwi tuqiw parläyätaxa, iyawsirinakamarusti akham säyätaxa: “Markax taypit jan axsarir chacharuw ajllista, juparuw jach'ar aptta, yanaparakta." 
Psalms89:20 ¡David uywataxaruw jikxatta! qullan aceitempi jawintasaw reyit utt'ayta; 
Psalms89:21 yanapaxax janipuniw jupatak pist'kaniti. Ch'amaxampiw jupar ch'amañchä," 
Psalms89:22 janiw timanakax jupar jalxatapkaniti, janirakiw qhuru jaqinakas atipapkaniti." 
Psalms89:23 Timanakaparux takxatäwa; uñisirinakaparusti t'unjäwa, jan mayampi uñjkay tukjä." 
Psalms89:24 Munasiñaxampi, aski kankañaxampi katuqani, sutix laykuw ch'amapax jilxatani." 
Psalms89:25 Jupax wali ch'amampiw apnaqani, Mediterráneo lamar qutat qalltasa, Éufrates jawirkam puriyasa." 
Psalms89:26 Jupax nayaruw art'asitani: ‘Jumaw Awkixätaxa, Diosaxätasa, jumaw qhispiyista, arxatarakista’ sasa." 
Psalms89:27 Nayasti tayna yuqall wawat uñt'asxä, akapachankir reyinak taypin jilïrit utt'ayä." 
Psalms89:28 Munasiñaxax jupatak wiñayäniwa, jupampi arust'ataxasti jan t'unjkayäniwa." 
Psalms89:29 Wawanakapax jupa lantiw markarux wiñay apnaqapxani, alaxpachan utjañapkamaw reyit utt'atäpxani." 
Psalms89:30 “Wawanakapatix yatichäwinakax jaytanukupxani, janirak arsutanakaxarjamas jakapkani," 
Psalms89:31 kamachinakaxtix ñanqhachapxani, janirak arsutanakax imapkan ukaxa," 
Psalms89:32 ñanqha luratanakapat mutuyä, jawq'añ thujrumpiw juchanakapat t'aqhisiyä;" 
Psalms89:33 Davidar munasitaxsti janiw jaytanukkäti, janirakiw jupar arsutax phuqhañsa armaskäti." 
Psalms89:34 Janiw jupamp lurat arust'äwirux p'akintkäti, janirakiw arsutanakaxsa mayjt'aykäti." 
Psalms89:35 Qullan kankañax laykuw juramento lurta, janiw juparux k'arintkäti:" 
Psalms89:36 wawanakapax jupa lantiw marka apnaqapxani, intin utjañapkamaw reyit utt'atäpxani." 
Psalms89:37 ¡Phaxsir uñtat thurt'atäpxaniwa! ¡Alaxpach utjañkamax jan unxtkayäpxaniwa!” 
Psalms89:38 Ukampis juman ajllit reyirux jaqunuktawa, jisk'acharaktawa; jupampix jachjayastawa." 
Psalms89:39 Uywatamampix arust'äwi p'akinttaxa; pillupsti uraqiruw jaqunuktaxa. 
Psalms89:40 Jerusalén markar jark'ir pirqanakapxa, q'al allinuktaxa." 
Psalms89:41 Taqi jaqiw uka chiq sarakipasax lunthatji; marka jak'a masinakapasti jupat larusipxi. 
Psalms89:42 Jumax timasirinakaparuw ch'amañchtaxa, uñisirinakapampiw larusiytaxa." 
Psalms89:43 Jupatakix espadap muthuptaytaxa, nuwasiñansti janiw yanapktati." 
Psalms89:44 Aytat kankañap alt'aytaxa; reyi kankañapsti uraqiruw jaqnuqtaxa; 
Psalms89:45 walja maranak jakañap apaqtaxa, p'inqa tukuñampiw phuqhantaraktaxa." 
Psalms89:46 Tatay, ¿kunapachkamarak imantasïtasti? ¿Q'apisiñamasti ninjamapunit aqtani?" 
Psalms89:47 Tatay, amtasim, jakañ urunakaxax juk'atakikiwa; juman irnuqat jaqix juk'a urunakakiw jaki." 
Psalms89:48 ¡Janiw khitis wiñay jakkaspati! ¡Janiw khitis jiwan ch'amapat qhispkaspati! 
Psalms89:49 Tatay, ¿kawkinkarak nayra munasiñamasti, Davidar churañatak juramentomp arsutamasti?" 
Psalms89:50 Tatay, uywatanakaman t'aqhisitapat amtasim: jaqinakan tuqitanakapxa, chuymaxaruw apaskta." 
Psalms89:51 Tatay, ¡timasirinakamax ukham t'aqhisiyapxitu!; ¡ajllitamarux sapa kutiw ukham jisk'achapxi!" 
Psalms89:52 Tatitux wiñayatak jach'añchatäpan: ¡Ukhamäpan! 
Psalms90:1 Tatay, mitat mita jaqinak taypin, jumaw nanakan imantasiñaxätaxa." 
Psalms90:2 Qullunak janïr utjkipana, akapachas janïr utjkipana, wiñayan wiñayapatakiw jumax Diosätaxa." 
Psalms90:3 Jumaw jaqirux laq'ar tukuytaxa, “Jaqinaka, laq'ar kuttxapxam” sasa." 
Psalms90:4 Jumatakix waranq maraxa, wasür tukusir urur uñtatakiwa. ¡Arum ch'amakax tukuski ukhamakiwa!" 
Psalms90:5 Jaqirux munkir jan munkir aptaxa, samkäkaspas ukham chhaqtaytaxa;" 
Psalms90:6 jaqinakax qurar uñtatakïpxiwa, alsusinxa willjta tuqiruw panqarsu, jayp'u tuqirusti pharsusin jiwsuraki." 
Psalms90:7 Juman q'apisiñamaw tukjapxitu, jan amuyun antutapxitu." 
Psalms90:8 Jucha luratanakaxaxa, ñanqha luratanakaxasa juman nayraqataman uñsti." 
Psalms90:9 Chiqpachansa, jakañanakaxax q'apisiñam laykuw tukusi; maranakaxasti mä samanjamakiw tukusi." 
Psalms90:10 Yaqhipanakax paqallq tunka maraw jakapxi; ch'amaninakasti kimsaqallq tunka marakamaw puripxi; ukataq jakañasti, jan walt'añanakampi, qhathami sarnaqañampik apani. ¡Urunakasti jaqinakjam jank'akiw tukusi!" 
Psalms90:11 ¿Khitirak phiñasiñamampi lurjatanak yatisti? ¿Khitirak q'apisiñam uñt'isti? 
Psalms90:12 Jakañ urunakaxay jakhuñ yatichapxita, amuyunakaxan yatiñ kankañ jikxatañapataki." 
Psalms90:13 ¡Tatay, uñtanxapxakitaya! ¿Kunapachkamarak apanukupxitätasti? ¡Aka uywatanakamat khuyapt'ayasim!" 
Psalms90:14 ¡Willjtatpach khuyapayasiñamamp phuqt'apxita, jakañaxansti kusisiñampiw q'uchupxä." 
Psalms90:15 ¡Qawqha urunakatix t'aqhisiyapkista ukkha urunakarak kusisiyapxita. 
Psalms90:16 ¡Uywatanakamax luratanakam uñjapxpan, wawanakapasti qhapaq kankañam uñt'apxarakpan!" 
Psalms90:17 Tatitun munasiñapax jiwasanakampïpan. ¡Tatay, luräwinakaxarux juk'ampiy jilxatayam! ¡Jïsa, irnaqatanakaxarux juk'ampiy yapxatam!" 
Psalms91:1 Alaxpachankir Taqi ch'amanin imat sarnaqir jaqixa," 
Psalms91:2 Tatiturux siwa: “Jumätaw imantasiñaxaxa, jark'aqasiñaxasa, Diosaxay, jumaruw taqpach chuymamp alkatsma” sasa." 
Psalms91:3 Jupakiw sipit qänat qhispiyätam, jupakiw jiwayir usut jark'aqätam," 
Psalms91:4 chhiqhanakapampiw imxatätam, chhiqhanakap manqhäxan imantasïta. ¡Amparapax jark'aqasiñar uñtataw imätam!" 
Psalms91:5 Axsarkay arum ch'amakarux jan axsarkamti, urun antutat mich'inakarus jan axsarkamti," 
Psalms91:6 ch'amakampi chik purinir usunakarux jan axsarkamti, uru qhanan jiwarayir usunakarus janirak axsarkamti;" 
Psalms91:7 ch'iqäxamarux waranqanakaw jiwarat liwirtapxani, kupïxamarusti tunka waranqaw tukusipxani, jumarusti janiw kunas kamachkätamti." 
Psalms91:8 Nayranakamamp uñjañatakikiw ukankäta, ñanqha lurir jaqinakan katuqäwip uñjäta." 
Psalms91:9 Jumax Tatitumpiw imayastaxa, Alaxpachankiriruw arxatirimat uchastaxa," 
Psalms91:10 chijix janiw jak'achaskätamti, usus janirakiw utamar purinkaniti," 
Psalms91:11 Diosax angelanakaparuw khithanini, sarnaqäwim imañataki." 
Psalms91:12 Amparapxaruw apapxätam, kayuman qalar jan lanqtasiñapataki." 
Psalms91:13 Katarinakarusa, asirunakarus takxataskakïtawa, leonanak taypinsa, sarnaqaskakïtawa." 
Psalms91:14 “Nayar munasitap laykusti, juparux qhispiyäwa, nayar uñt'atap laykusti, juparux imarakïwa." 
Psalms91:15 Nayar art'asitan ukapachaxa, mayisitaparux jaysäwa. Jupamp chikaw t'aqhisiñankä, llakisiñat irpsü, jach'aruw aptä;" 
Psalms91:16 walja maranakaw jakayä: ¡qhispiyäwixampiw jupar kusisiyä!” 
Psalms92:1 Alaxpachankir Tatay, ¡jumar yupaychañax sumapuniwa, sutimar q'uchuñas kusisiñawa!" 
Psalms92:2 Willjtanakan khuyapayasiñamat yatiyañax askiwa, arumanakan arsutam phuqhirïtamat parlañax askirakiwa," 
Psalms92:3 arpanakampi chika, salteriompi chika q'uchuñax kusisiñawa." 
Psalms92:4 Tatay, ¡luräwinakamax nayatak kusisiñawa! ¡Luratanakamax kusisiñampiw phuqt'itu!" 
Psalms92:5 Tatay, ¡luratanakamax sinti muspharkayawa!, ¡amtatanakamax jan amuyt'kayawa!" 
Psalms92:6 ¡Jan amuyt'an jaqikiw ukanak jan amuyt'kaspati! 
Psalms92:7 Jucharar jaqinakax qurar uñtatas alintasipkpan, ñanqha luririnakax panqarasipkpansa, jupanakax wiñayatak tukjatäpxaniwa." 
Psalms92:8 Jumasti, Tatay, wiñayatakiw alaxpachan apnaqtaxa." 
Psalms92:9 Tatay, timasirinakamax tukusipxaniwa, ñanqha luririnakasti ananukutäpxaniwa." 
Psalms92:10 Jumaw ch'am yapxatista, urqu vacan ch'amapar uñtata, p'iqixarusti q'apkir qullampiw warxatista." 
Psalms92:11 Nayax timanakaxar aynacht'ir uñjä, ñanqha jaqinakan ayqutap ist'arakï." 
Psalms92:12 Aski jaqinakax palma quqanakjamaw jilapxi, Líbano qullunkir cedro quqanakjamaw jiltapxi." 
Psalms92:13 Tatitun utapan ayruntatäpxiwa, Diosasan uyupan panqarapxi." 
Psalms92:14 ch'ama qarita tuqirus achu churasipkakiniwa, wali ch'amani, k'umarakïsipkaniwa," 
Psalms92:15 Arxatir Tatituxan askïtap yatiyapxani, imasirixan ñanqha jan lurirïtap arsupxani." 
Psalms93:1 ¡Tatitux reyiwa, reyi isimp isintatawa, Tatitux ch'aman kankañampi isthapitawa! Jupaw akapach sum thurt'ayi, jan unxtkir utt'ayi." 
Psalms93:2 Tatay, qunuñamax qalltatpach jan unxtkiriwa. ¡Jumasti wiñay jakirïtawa!" 
Psalms93:3 Tatay, jawiranakax qhuthutiwa, jawiranakax mathapinak sartayi;" 
Psalms93:4 Tatay, jumasti alaxpachanxa, ch'aman mathapinakat juk'amp ch'amanïtawa, lamar qutanakan uxinakapat jila ch'amanïtawa." 
Psalms93:5 Tatay, arsutanakamax jan unxtkiriwa. ¡Qullan kankañax utamar wiñay k'achachiriwa!" 
Psalms94:1 ¡Ukhamat ukham kutsuyasir Tatay, uñachayasikimaya!" 
Psalms94:2 Jumaw akapachar taripirïtaxa, jach'achasirinakarusti lurataparjamay mutuyam." 
Psalms94:3 Tatay, ¿kunapachkamarak juchararanakast utjanisti? ¿kunapachkamarak ñanqha luririnakast kusisinisti?" 
Psalms94:4 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax q'añu arunak parlirïpxiwa, jach'a jach'a tukurïpxiwa." 
Psalms94:5 Tatay, jupanakaw markamarux tukjapxi; ¡jumar iyawsirinakaruw jisk'achapxi!" 
Psalms94:6 Ijma warminakaruw jiwayapxi, qurpachayasir jaqinakaruw jiwayapxi, wajchanakaruw jiwayapxi," 
Psalms94:7 Tatitux janis uñjkaspa ukham amuyapxi, Jacobun Diosapax janis amuykaspa ukham lup'ipxi." 
Psalms94:8 ¡Pisi amuyt'an jaqinaka! ¿Kunapacharak amuyt'asxapxätasti? 
Psalms94:9 Jinchu luriristi, ¿janit ist'kanisti? nayranak utjayiristi, ¿janit uñjkanisti?" 
Psalms94:10 Markanakar chiqachiristi, ¿janit mutuykanisti? Jaqir yatichiristi, ¿janit yatkanisti?" 
Psalms94:11 Tatitux yatiwa, t'axmar amuyunakak jaqin lup'irïtapa." 
Psalms94:12 Tatay, juman yatichat jaqix kusisiñaniwa, kamachi arunakam yatichat jaqix kusisiñaniwa," 
Psalms94:13 t'aqhisiñ urunakan samarañ katuqani, ñanqha lurir jaqitakisti, aynacht'añap wakicharapiski." 
Psalms94:14 Tatitux janiw markaparux apanukkaniti, janirakiw jupankirinakarus jaytanukkaniti." 
Psalms94:15 Taripirinakax chiqa taripirinakäxaniwa, aski jaqinakasti jupanakat yatiqasipxani." 
Psalms94:16 ¿Khitirak jucharar jaqinakat arxatitanisti?, ¿khitirak ñanqha luririnakat jark'aqitanisti?" 
Psalms94:17 Tatitutix jan yanapkitasapänxa, niyaw jiwatanakampi chikäxiriskäyäta." 
Psalms94:18 Tatay, niy lanqtasiñampïskäyät ukapachaw, khuyapayasiñamax yanapt'itu." 
Psalms94:19 Llakinakaxax walipun yapxataskän ukapachaw chuymachäwimamp kusisiyista. 
Psalms94:20 Jan wali taripirinakampix janiw chikachaskasmati, kamachinak p'akintirinakampi, jan walinak amtirinakampi;" 
Psalms94:21 aski jaqir ñanqha lurañ amtirinakampi, jan juchan jaqir jiwayañatak juchañchirinakampi." 
Psalms94:22 Tatitusti nayan imantasiñaxawa; imantasiñ qarqaxax Diosawa. 
Psalms94:23 Tatituw ñanqha luratanakapat mutuyani, pachpa ñanqha luräwinakap laykuw t'unjatäpxani, ¡Diosasaw jupanakarux tukusiyani!" 
Psalms95:1 Jutapxam, Tatitur q'uchupxañäni, arxatir qhispiyirisar kusisit yupaychapxañäni." 
Psalms95:2 Yuspagarañ chuymamp nayraqatapar mantapxañäni, jupar jach'achañatak q'uchupxañäni." 
Psalms95:3 Tatitux jach'a ch'aman Diosawa, k'ari diosanakat sipan munañaniwa." 
Psalms95:4 Akapach mik'ay manqhanakax amparapankiwa, jach'a qullunakas jupankiwa." 
Psalms95:5 Jach'a lamar qutax jupankiwa, jupaw lamar qutarux utjayi; amparapampiw waña uraq lurt'i." 
Psalms95:6 Jutapxam, killt'asis yupaychapxañäni; Tatitun nayraqatapar killt'asipxañäni, jupaw jiwasanakarux irnuqistu." 
Psalms95:7 Jupaw Diosasaxa, jiwasanakasti jupan awatit markapäpxtanwa, jupan irpat ovej tamapäpxtanwa. Tatitun arup jichhür ist'apxam:" 
Psalms95:8 “Meribá uraqinjam chuymanakam jan qalarayasipxamti, Masá wasaranjam chuymanakam jan ch'ullqhiptayapxamti," 
Psalms95:9 nayra awkinakamax luräwinakax uñjkasasa, nayarux yant'apxitänwa." 
Psalms95:10 Pusi tunk maraw khä jaqinakatakix q'apisïyäta, ukat säyäta: ‘Aka markax wali pantjataw sarnaqi; ¡janiw arsutanakaxar jaysapkiti!’ sasa." 
Psalms95:11 Ukat q'apisiñaxan juramento lurta: janiw samarañaxar mantapkaniti” sasa. 
Psalms96:1 Tatitutakix machaq q'uchu q'uchupxam, akapachankir jaqinaka, Tatitur q'uchupxam;" 
Psalms96:2 Tatitur q'uchupxam, sutip jach'añchapxam, sapürupun atipjäwipat yatiyapxam." 
Psalms96:3 Aytat kankañapat markanakar yatiyapxam, muspharkañ luräwinakapat taqi jaqinakar parlapxam," 
Psalms96:4 Tatitux taqi ch'amaniwa, yupaychatäñapax wakisipuniwa, ¡k'ari diosanakat sipan wali axsarkayawa!" 
Psalms96:5 Yaqha markanakan diosanakapax janiw kunäpkisa, Diosasti alaxpach luririwa." 
Psalms96:6 ¡Aytat kankañampi, lliphipkir qhanampiw nayraqatapanki! ¡Ch'amampi, muspharkay kankañampiw qullan utapanki!" 
Psalms96:7 Taqi markankir jaqinaka, Tatitur jach'añchapxam, Tatitun aytat kankañapampiru, ch'amapampir jach'añchapxam;" 
Psalms96:8 Tatitun qhapaq sutip waqaychapxam; qullan utapan anqäxaparux luqtanakamp mantapxam; 
Psalms96:9 qullan utapan Tatitur yupaychapxam. ¡Taqpach jaqipun nayraqatapan khathatpan! 
Psalms96:10 Markanakarux sapxam: “¡Tatituw reyixa!” sasa. Jupaw akapacharux jan unxtañapatak utt'ayi; jupaw markanakarux chiqapar uñjas apnaqi. 
Psalms96:11 ¡Alaxpachax kusispan, uraqix k'uchiraspan! ¡Lamar qutas qhuthutpan, ukan utjirinakas kusisipxpan!" 
Psalms96:12 ¡Pampanakasa, ukan utjirinakas jallallapxpan! ¡Ch'uminkir quqanakas kusisiñat arnaqasipxpan," 
Psalms96:13 jutaskir Tatit nayraqatan wararipxpan! ¡Akapachar apnaqiriw jak'achasisinki, chiqapar uñjasaw akapacharux apnaqani, chiqa kankañampiw markanakarux sarayani!" 
Psalms97:1 ¡Taqpach uraqix kusispan! ¡Jan jakht'kay wat'anakax kusisipxpan! ¡Tatituw Reyixa! 
Psalms97:2 Jupax ch'amak qinayanakamp muyuntatawa; chiqapar uñjañampi, aski kankañampiw reyi qunuñaparux ch'amañchi;" 
Psalms97:3 ninax jupan nayraqatap saranti, muyuntir timanakaparuw nakhanti." 
Psalms97:4 Lliju llijunakapax akapach qhantayi; ¡uk uñjasinsti uraqix axsarañat khathati! 
Psalms97:5 Qullunakax lik'ir uñtataw umatati, taqpach uraqin Tatitun nayraqatapana." 
Psalms97:6 Alaxpachax aski kankañap yatiyi; markanakasti qhapaq kankañap uñjapxi. 
Psalms97:7 Akapach diosanakar yupaychirinakax jisk'achjatäpxiwa, uka diosanakat jach'achasirinakas aynacht'apxiwa. ¡Taqpach diosanakaw nayraqatapan qunqurt'asipxi!" 
Psalms97:8 Tatay, Jerusalén markampi, Judá uraqinkir markanakampix arsutanakamat walpun kusisipxi;" 
Psalms97:9 Tatay, jumaw taqi uraqpachan jilïrïtaxa, taqpach diosanakat sipan juk'amp jilanktawa." 
Psalms97:10 Tatitux ñanqhar uñisir jaqinakarux munasiwa; aski arkirinakapan jakañaparux imiwa; ñanqha lurir jaqinakan amparapat qhispiyaraki. 
Psalms97:11 Qhanax aski jaqitakix k'ajtiwa; kusisiñasti chiqap chuyman jaqinakatakiwa. 
Psalms97:12 ¡Aski jaqinaka, Tatitump kusisipxam, qullan sutip jach'añchapxam!" 
Psalms98:1 ¡Tatitutakix machaq q'uchu q'uchupxam, muspharkañanak luratap layku! ¡Ch'aman amparapampiw atipji, qullan amparapampiw timasirinakar atipji!" 
Psalms98:2 Tatituw atipjatap yatiyi, aski kankañap markanakar uñacht'ayi;" 
Psalms98:3 Israel markapatakisti, khuyapayasiñapata, arsutap phuqhirïtapat amtasi. Taqpach uraqin jakirinakaw Diosasan atipjatap uñjapxi." 
Psalms98:4 Uraqpachan jakirinaka, Tatiturux kusisiñamp q'uchupxam; art'asipxam, jallallapxam, q'uchunak q'uchupxam." 
Psalms98:5 Tatitutakix q'uchupxam, arpampi chik q'uchuntapxam." 
Psalms98:6 Tatit Reyir kusisiñampi yupaychapxam, kunayman phust'añanakamp chik q'uchupxam." 
Psalms98:7 Lamar qutampi ukan utjirinakampix qhuthutipxpan, akapachasa, ukan jakirinakas uxtapxarakpan;" 
Psalms98:8 jawiranakax amparanakap t'axllirasipxpan; qullunakax mayachasisin Tatitu nayraqatan 
Psalms98:9 kusisiñampi art'asipxpan, aka uraq apnaqir jutir Tatitutaki. ¡Jupax chiqpach aski Diosawa, markanakarusti chiqap kankañampiw apnaqani!" 
Psalms99:1 ¡Tatitux Reyiwa! ¡Reyi qunuñapax querubines sat chhiqhaninakxar utt'atawa! Markanakax khathatipxpan, taqpach uraqis unxtarakpan." 
Psalms99:2 Tatitux Jerusalén markan ch'amaniwa, taqpach markanakxar qunt'atawa." 
Psalms99:3 Axsarkañ sutipax jach'añchatäpan; ¡Tatitux qullanawa! 
Psalms99:4 Jumax ch'aman reyïtawa; aski kankañar munasirïtawa; jumaw chiqap sarnaqañ uñstaytaxa. Jumaw Jacobun wawanakaparux sum uñjtaxa, chiqaparuw taqi kuns tariptaxa." 
Psalms99:5 ¡Tatit Diosasar jach'añchapxam, kayunakap nayraqatar killt'asipxam! ¡Tatitux Qullanawa!" 
Psalms99:6 Moisesampi Aaronampix jupan sacerdotenakapänwa; Samuel profetax jupan luqtiripänwa. Jupanakax Tatituruw yanap mayipxäna, Tatitusti mayitanakaparux ist'änwa." 
Psalms99:7 Diosax qinay taypitpach jupanakarux parläna, kamachi arunakap churäna jupanakasti uka arunakap phuqhapxäna." 
Psalms99:8 Tatay, Diosaxay, jupanakarux ist'äyätawa, ñanqha luratanakapat t'aqhisiykchïyät ukasa, jupanakatakix juchat pampachir Diosäyätawa." 
Psalms99:9 Tatit Diosasar yupaychapxam, ¡qullan qullup nayraqatar killt'asipxam! ¡Tatit Diosasax Qullanawa!" 
Psalms100:1 ¡Taqpach aka uraqin jakirinaka, Tatitur kusisiñamp q'uchupxam!" 
Psalms100:2 Kusisit chuymamp Tatitur yupaychapxam; ¡jallallt'asis nayraqatapar mantapxam! 
Psalms100:3 Tatitun Diosätap uñt'apxam; jupaw irnuqistu, jiwasanakax jupankapxtanwa; jupan markapäpxtanwa, ovej tamapäpxaraktanwa." 
Psalms100:4 Tatitun utap punkupar jutapxam; yupaychañ q'uchunakampi, yuspagarañampi jak'achasinipxam. ¡Tatiturux yuspagarapxam, sutip jach'añchapxarakim!" 
Psalms100:5 Tatitux khuyapayasiriwa, munasiñapax wiñayatakiwa, chiqa kankañapasti jan tukuskiriwa." 
Psalms101:1 Munasiñaruw jach'añchañ munta, aski kankañaruw aytañ munta, Tatay, jumatakiw q'uchuñ munta;" 
Psalms101:2 chiqap jakañpun munta. ¿Kunapacharak nayar tumpitätasti? Utaxanxa, sarnaqäwixax jan kamskayäniwa;" 
Psalms101:3 ñanqha amtäwinakarux janipuniw uñtkäti. Diosat saraqtirinakarux uñisipuntwa; ¡janipuniw jupanakampix jak'achayaskäti! 
Psalms101:4 Ñanqha lurañ lup'iñanak apanukü: ¡janipuniw ñanqha lurañ munkti! 
Psalms101:5 Jamasat jaqi masipxat parlirirux amukt'ayäwa; uñch'ukisir jaqimpiru, jach'a jach'a tukurimpirux janipuniw jak'axankañap munkti." 
Psalms101:6 Aski jaqinakaruw nayax uñtä, nayampi chik jakapxañapataki; chiqap sarnaqir jaqikiw luqtitani." 
Psalms101:7 Sallqantañampi sarnaqir jaqix janiw utaxan jakkaniti; ¡k'ari jaqinakax janiw nayraqataxankkaniti! 
Psalms101:8 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakarux urut ururuw chhaqtayä, jan wali jaqinakarux Tatitun markapat jaqunukü." 
Psalms102:1 Tatay, mayisitaxarux ist'akimaya, ¡arnaqasitaxax jak'amkam purinikpanaya!" 
Psalms102:2 Janikiy llaki urun nayatak maysa uñtamti; ¡nayar ist'añatakix jank'akïmaya!, ¡art'asinsma ukapachax ist'akitaya!" 
Psalms102:3 Jakañaxax jiwq'ir uñtataw tukusiski, ch'akhanakaxasti nina sank'jamaw nakhantaski," 
Psalms102:4 chuymaxax aynacht'atawa, qurar uñtataw wañsuski; ¡janiw manq'as munaskituti!" 
Psalms102:5 Jachkäwi sarnaqataxatxa janchixas ch'akhanakaruw lip'katxi. 
Psalms102:6 Wasarankir ch'usiqar uñtatätwa, laqayanakan jakir jukjamätwa." 
Psalms102:7 Janiw ikis purkituti, uta patxankir saparst'at jamach'jamätwa." 
Psalms102:8 Timasirinakaxax jan inakt'asaw tuqitu, sutix aytasisaw ñanqhachapxitu." 
Psalms102:9 T'ant'a lantix qhillak manq'ta; umañaxasti jachaxampiw kituntasi," 
Psalms102:10 q'apisiñam layku, phiñasiñam layku, jumaw sayt'ayista, uka qhipat tinkuyarakista." 
Psalms102:11 Jakañ urunakaxax ch'iwir uñtataw sarakipi, qurar uñtataw wañsuskarakta." 
Psalms102:12 Jumasti, Tatay, wiñayapuniw jaktaxa, ¡sutimax wiñayapuniw amtatäni!" 
Psalms102:13 Sartasimaya, Sión markat khuyapt'ayasim, t'aqhisiñ urunakax phuqhasxiwa; ¡pampachxañam urux purinxiwa!" 
Psalms102:14 Uywatanakamax markapan qalanakaparuw munasipxi, t'unjat pirqanakapat jachapxi." 
Psalms102:15 Taqpach markanakaw Tatitun qhapaq sutip waqaychapxani, akapach reyinakasa, aytat kankañamatakiw axsarthapipxani," 
Psalms102:16 Tatitux Sión markar wasitat utachkani ukapacha, qhapaq kankañapan uñstkan ukapacha," 
Psalms102:17 apanukut jaqin mayisitap ist'kan ukapacha, achikt'asitanakapar jayskan ukapacha." 
Psalms102:18 Akax jutir mita jaqinakatak qillqatäpan, machaqat utt'ayat markan Tatitur jach'añchañapataki." 
Psalms102:19 Tatitux qullan utjäwipatpach uñtanïna, alaxpachatpach uraqirux uñtanïna," 
Psalms102:20 katuntatanakan ayqutanakap ist'añataki, jiwañatak juchañchatanakar qhispiyañataki;" 
Psalms102:21 Tatitun sutipat Jerusalén markan yatiyañataki, Tatitun aytat kankañap Jerusalenan jach'achañataki;" 
Psalms102:22 jaqinakax Tatitur yupaychañatak taqi markanakat mayachasipkan ukapacha. 
Psalms102:23 Jupaw chika thakhin ch'amaxar thayjtayi, jakañ urunakax juk'aptayaraki." 
Psalms102:24 Nayasti juparux sistwa: “Diosaxay, janikiy jakäwix chikatpach apaqistati” sasa. ¡Maranakamax janiw tukuyanïkiti!" 
Psalms102:25 Uraqirux qalltatpach sum utt'aytaxa; alaxpachasti amparamamp luratawa. 
Psalms102:26 Taqi ukanakax tukusxakiniwa, jumasti pachpakïsktawa. Ukanakax isir uñtataw mirq'isini; wariraptir isir uñtataw tukusini." 
Psalms102:27 Jumasti pachpakïsktawa, jakañ maranakamax janiw tukuskaniti." 
Psalms102:28 Uywatanakaman wawanakapax suma uñjataw jakapxani; nayraqataman wiñayaw jakapxani. 
Psalms103:1 Taqpach chuymaxampiw Tatitur jach'añchä, taqpach chuymaxampiw qullan sutip jach'ar aptä." 
Psalms103:2 Taqpach chuymaxampiw Tatitur jach'añchä, janiw khuyapayasiñapat armaskäti." 
Psalms103:3 Tatituw taqpach juchanakaxat pampachitu, jupaw taqi usunakaxat k'umarachitu," 
Psalms103:4 jupaw amay imäwit qhispiyitu, juparakiw munasiñamp phuqt'itu," 
Psalms103:5 Tatituw askinakamp kusisiyitu, pakar uñtat machaqar tukuyarakitu." 
Psalms103:6 Tatitux chiqaparuw uñji, t'aqhisir jaqinakaruw arxati;" 
Psalms103:7 Moisesaruw thakhip yatichäna, Israelan wawanakaparusti muspharkañ luräwinakap uñachayäna." 
Psalms103:8 Tatitux munasiriwa, khuyapayasiriwa; janiw mäk q'apisirïkiti, khuyapayasiñan phuqhantatawa." 
Psalms103:9 Janiw wiñay tuqinuqkistuti, janirakiw wiñayas tima amxäskiti;" 
Psalms103:10 janiw jucha luratasarjam t'aqhisiykistuti, janirakiw juchanakasatjam mutuykistuti;" 
Psalms103:11 kamisatix alaxpachax uraqit jayankixa, ukhamaw munasiñapax arkirinakapatakixa." 
Psalms103:12 Kamisatix inti jalsut inti jalantkam wali jayaxa, ukham jiwasanakat juchanakas jayarst'ayistu." 
Psalms103:13 Kunjämatix mä awkix wawanakapat khuyapayaski, ukhamaw Tatitux iyawsirinakapat khuyapayasi;" 
Psalms103:14 jupaw yati jiwasanakax kunat luratätansa uka: jupax ask yati laq'at luratätasxa. 
Psalms103:15 Jaqin jakañapax qurar uñtatakiwa; pampankir panqarar uñtatakiw panqarsu: 
Psalms103:16 may thayax thayt'anki ukatsti, q'alaw jiwsuwayxi, janirakiw khitis jupat juk'amp yatkxiti." 
Psalms103:17 Tatitur waqaychirinakatakisti munasiñapax wiñayawa; aski kankañapax wawan wawapatakis utjaskakiwa," 
Psalms103:18 arust'äwiparjam sarnaqirinakataki, arsutanakaparjam phuqhirinakataki." 
Psalms103:19 Tatitux alaxpachan qunuñap utt'ayasi, ch'amapampiw alaxpach akapach apnaqi." 
Psalms103:20 ¡Wali ch'aman angelanaka, Tatitur jach'ar aptapxam! Arsutanakap phuqhirinaka, arupar jank'ak jaysirinaka, Tatitur jach'añchapxam!" 
Psalms103:21 ¡Tatitun alaxpach tamanakapa, jupar jach'añchapxam, munañap phuqhir luqtirinakapa, jach'ar aptapxam!" 
Psalms103:22 ¡Taqpach luratanakapa, Tatitur jach'añchapxam, jupan apnaqat uraqpachan jach'ar aptapxam! ¡Taqpach chuymaxampiw Tatitur jach'añchä!" 
Psalms104:1 ¡Taqpach chuymaxampiw Tatitur jach'añchä! ¡Tatituxay, Diosaxay, jach'a ch'amanipunïtawa! K'ajkir qhapaq kankañampiw isthapistaxa;" 
Psalms104:2 qhankir isimpiw llawuntastaxa. ¡Alaxpacharux isir uñtat janatattaxa! 
Psalms104:3 ¡Jumaw utjäwimarux umanakxar utt'aytaxa! Qinayanakax juman sarnaqañ carronakawa; ¡thayan chhiqhanakapxan sarnaqtaxa! 
Psalms104:4 Thayanakax khithanakamawa, nina lawranakasti arsutam phuqhirinakawa." 
Psalms104:5 Uraqirux qalltapxaruw sum thurt'aytaxa, utt'ayatäkän ukawjat janipun unxtañapataki." 
Psalms104:6 Uraqirux lamar qutaw imxatäna, isïkaspas ukhamaw janxatäna. Umanakasti qullunakaruw chhaqtayäna." 
Psalms104:7 Ukampis ch'aman arunakam ist'asax sarxänwa, q'ixu q'ixu arunakam ist'asax jank'akiw jaltxäna:" 
Psalms104:8 Qullunakar makhatasa, pampanakar saraqasa, kawkharutix uchktas ukawjar puriñkama," 
Psalms104:9 kawkhakamatix puriñapäkän ukkhakama, ukhamat uraqir jan mayamp chhaqtayañataki." 
Psalms104:10 Jumaw uma jalsunakat jawiranak utjaytaxa, qullu taypinjam jalañapatakiw uchtaxa." 
Psalms104:11 Uka umanakat pampankir animalanakax umapxi; ch'uminkir asnonakas uka uma umt'asaw umat pharjayasitap apaqtayasi. 
Psalms104:12 Jawir jak'anakan jamach'inakax tapachasipxi, layminak taypin chhiwiqipxaraki." 
Psalms104:13 Jumaw alaxpachatpach qullunakarux qarpantaxa, alaxpach umampiw uraqirux sisantaytaxa." 
Psalms104:14 Uywanakatakiw quranak jiltaytaxa, jaqin yapuchat alinak jilaytaxa, uka yaput manq'añ apsusiñapataki," 
Psalms104:15 ch'amanchir t'ant'a jikxatañapataki, chuymapar kusisiyir vino apsusiñapataki, ajanupas aceitjam lliphipiñapataki." 
Psalms104:16 Tatitun ayrut Líbano qullunkir cedro quqanakasti, uka uma umt'asaw umat pharjatap apaqasipxi." 
Psalms104:17 Uka quqanakanxa, jisk'a jamach'inakamppachaw tapachasipxi, cigüeña jamach'inakas ukan jakasipxaraki." 
Psalms104:18 Jach'a qullunakax cabranakatak uchatawa, qarqanakasti añathuyanakan imantasiñapawa." 
Psalms104:19 Phaxsirux pachanak jakhuñapatakiw uchtaxa; intisti kuna pacha jalantañapsa sum yatisi. 
Psalms104:20 Ch'amakanak uchtaxa, ch'amak arum purinipansti, ch'uminkir animalanakax misturanipxiwa." 
Psalms104:21 Leonanakax manq'atjam wararipxi, Diosat manq'a mayisipxi." 
Psalms104:22 Inti jalsunipansti, sarxapxiwa, utjäwinakaparuw ikintxapxi." 
Psalms104:23 Jaqisti luräwiparuw mistu, jayp'ukamaw yapupan irnaqi." 
Psalms104:24 ¡Tatay, luräwinakamax waljapuniwa! Yatiñ kankañampiw taqi kuns lurtaxa; ¡uraqix luratanakaman phuqhantatawa!" 
Psalms104:25 Lamar qutax jan tupt'kayawa, jan jakht'kay animalanakaw utji; jach'anaka, jisk'anaka;" 
Psalms104:26 lamar quta chiqaw barconakax tuyupxi, Leviatán jach'a laq'us ukankiwa, uka laq'umpi anatasiñamatakiw lurtaxa." 
Psalms104:27 Taqi ukanakax jumaruw suyasipktam, wakisitapar manq'a churañamataki." 
Psalms104:28 Jumaw manq'a churtaxa, jupanakasti katuqasipxiwa; amparam luqatattaxa, jupanakasti sumanak manqapxi;" 
Psalms104:29 ajanum imantaskta ukapachax mulljasipxiwa; samanap apaqkta ukkhasti jiwt'apxiwa, laq'aruw tukxapxaraki." 
Psalms104:30 Jakañ samanam khithankta ukapachasti, machaqat utjayataw uñjasipxi. Ukham lurasaw uraqir machaqaptaytaxa." 
Psalms104:31 ¡Tatitun qhapaq kankañapax wiñayawa! ¡Tatitux luratanakapampiw kusisi! 
Psalms104:32 Diosax uñtanki ukapachax uraqix khathatiwa; ¡qullunakar llamkt'ki ukapachasti, jiwq'i mistuyapxi!" 
Psalms104:33 Jakañaxkamaw Tatitur yupaychä, jakkasaw Diosaxatak q'uchü." 
Psalms104:34 Lup'itaxax Tatitun chuymapar purkirïpan, nayasti jupanakpun kusisiñ jikxatta." 
Psalms104:35 ¡Jucharar jaqinakax aka uraqin tukusipxpan! ¡Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax jiwarapxpan! ¡Taqpach chuymaxampiw Tatitur jach'añchä! ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan! 
Psalms105:1 ¡Tatitur yuspagarapxam, sutip aytapxam! Muspharkañ luratanakapat markanakar yatiyapxam." 
Psalms105:2 Aytat kankañapar q'uchupxam. ¡Muspharkañ luratanakapat yatiyapxam! 
Psalms105:3 Qullan sutipat jach'achasipxam. ¡Tatitur thaqhirinakax chuymanakapan kusisipxpan! 
Psalms105:4 Tatitur jak'achasipxam, ch'amapar alkatapxam; jan qarjasis Tatitur thaqhapxam." 
Psalms105:5 Muspharkañ jach'a luratanakapat amtasipxam, kamachi arsutanakap amthapipxam;" 
Psalms105:6 Abraham uywatapan saraqirinakapa, jupan ajllit Jacobun wawanakapa." 
Psalms105:7 Tatituw jiwasanakan Diosasaxa; ¡jupaw taqpach uraq apnaqi! 
Psalms105:8 Waranqa mita jaqinakas sarakipaskpan, janipuniw arust'äwipax armatäkaniti," 
Psalms105:9 Abrahamampi arust'äwi luratapata, Isaacar juramentomp arsutapata," 
Psalms105:10 Jacobutak kamachi utt'ayatapata, Israel markatak wiñay arust'äwi luratapata," 
Psalms105:11 jupax sänwa: “Jumaruw Canaán uraq churxäma, jumar wakt'ir churäwimjam katuyxäma” sasa." 
Psalms105:12 Jupanakax mä juk'anikïpchïn ukasa, yaqha markankir jaqinakakïpchïn ukasa," 
Psalms105:13 markat marka muyupkchïn ukasa, jach'a markat yaqha markar sarapkchïn ukasa," 
Psalms105:14 Diosax janiw khitin t'aqhisiyañapsa munkänti; jupanak laykuw reyinakarus tuqïna. 
Psalms105:15 Jupax sänwa: “Ajllitanakaxarux jan llamkt'apxamti, profetanakaxarus janirak t'aqhisiyapxamti” sasa." 
Psalms105:16 Khä uraqirux mach'a apayanïna, manq'añanak jupanakat apaqäna." 
Psalms105:17 Ukampis Josearuw jupanakat nayraqat khithäna, uywatarjam aljantapkän ukaru." 
Psalms105:18 Egipcionakax Josearuw cadenanakampi kayunakapat ñach'antapxäna, ¡carcelaruw uchantapxäna!" 
Psalms105:19 Tatitun arupaw Josearux yant'äna, Josean yatiyäwip phuqhasiñapkama." 
Psalms105:20 Reyix Josear antutayañatakiw arsüna, walja jaqinakar apnaqirix antutnukuyxänwa;" 
Psalms105:21 reyix utap apnaqirit Josearux utt'ayäna, taqpach yänakap uñjañapatakiw katuyäna," 
Psalms105:22 jilïrinakar yatichañapatakiw utt'ayäna, jilïr jaqinakaruw yatiñanïpxañapatak yatichayäna." 
Psalms105:23 Jacob sat Israelax Egipto markaruw mantäna, Cam uraqin jakäna." 
Psalms105:24 Diosax markaparux waljaniptayänwa, egipcionakat juk'ampi ch'aman tukuyäna." 
Psalms105:25 Egipto uraqinkirinakarusti chuymanakap mayjt'ayäna Diosan markapar uñisipxañapataki, uywatanakapar jan walinak lurapxañapataki." 
Psalms105:26 Diosasti Moisesampiru, Aaronampiruw khithäna, luqtiripat ajlliskatayna jupanakaru," 
Psalms105:27 jupanakasti Diosan muspharkañanakap wasaran uñacht'ayapxäna: ¡Egipto uraqin muspharkañanak lurapxäna! 
Psalms105:28 Diosax ch'amak apayanisin ch'amakt'ayäna, egipcionakasti janiw arunakapar ist'apkänti." 
Psalms105:29 Jawir umanakap wilaruw tukuyäna, chawllanakaparusti jiwarayänwa;" 
Psalms105:30 uraqipax jamp'atunakamp phuqhantatänwa, jamp'atux reyin ikiñ utapamppachan aywtäna." 
Psalms105:31 Diosax arumpikiw jach'a chhichhillankhanak apayanïna, Egipto uraqpacharuw chhichhillankhamp phuqhantayäna." 
Psalms105:32 Jallu lantix chhijchhi apayanïna, uraqirusti nina lawranak apayanïna." 
Psalms105:33 Uva alinakampi, higo alinakampi tukjäna, Egipton utjir quqanak tinkurayäna." 
Psalms105:34 Diosax t'iju t'ijunakan puriniñapatakix aruk arsüna, jan jakht'kay t'iju t'ijunakaw purintanïna," 
Psalms105:35 uraqipan utjir quranak manq'supxäna, yapunakapan achunakap tuksupxäna." 
Psalms105:36 Pachpa Egiptoruw jiwampi mutuyäna, sapa utankir tayna yuqall wawaruw jiwayäna." 
Psalms105:37 Diosax quri, qullqi, apt'asit markaparux irpsunïna, ayllunakap taypinsti, janiw khitis aynacht'känti." 
Psalms105:38 Egiptonkirinakax mistxir uñjasax kusisipxänwa, jupanakax wali mulljatäpxänwa." 
Psalms105:39 Diosax mä qinayampiw jupanakarux imxatäna, arum ch'amakarusti ninampiw qhantayarapïna." 
Psalms105:40 Manq'añ mayitaxa, khullunak apayanïna, alaxpach t'ant'ampiw sisarayäna." 
Psalms105:41 Qarqaruw jist'jäna, umasti qarqat jalsunïna, wasaran jawir umanakax jaltäna." 
Psalms105:42 Qullan arust'äwit amtasïna, Abraham luqtiripar arsutat amtasïna." 
Psalms105:43 Diosax ajllit markaparux ukham irpsunïna, kusisiñat arnaqt'asisaw mistunxapxäna," 
Psalms105:44 Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakan uraqinakap katuyäna, yaqha markanakan uraqinakap churxäna," 
Psalms105:45 ukhamat Tatitun arsutanakap imapxañapataki, kamachinakap phuqhapxañapataki. ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms106:1 ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan! Tatitur yuspagarapxam, munasiñapax jan tukuskiriwa, khuyapayasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms106:2 ¿Khitirak Diosan muspharkañ luräwinakap arsuspasti? ¿Khitirak aytat kankañapat jach'añchaspasti? 
Psalms106:3 Chiqa kankañar yäqirinakax kusisiñaniwa, chiqapar uñjirinakas kusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms106:4 Tatay, markamar munasitam laykuy nayat amtasita, qhispiyir jutkät ukapachay nayar tumpasita," 
Psalms106:5 ajllitanakaman kusisiñap uñjañaxataki, markaman kusisiñapamp kusisiñaxataki." 
Psalms106:6 Nayra awkinakaxar uñtataw jucha lurapxta; kunayman ñanqhanaka, juchanak lurapxta." 
Psalms106:7 Egipto markankapkäna ukkhaxa, janiw muspharkañ luräwinakam amuyapkänti; jach'a khuyapayasiñamat armasipxäna, Mar Rojo quta jak'an jumarux qallkatapxäyätam." 
Psalms106:8 Ukampis juma, Diosaw jupanakarux qhispiyäyätaxa, ukhamat juman sutimax jach'achatäñapataki." 
Psalms106:9 Mar Rojo qutaruw tuqinuqäyätaxa, qutasti wañt'änwa, waña uraqinjam irpkatäyätaxa." 
Psalms106:10 Ukham lurasaw uñisirin amparapat qhispiyäyätaxa, timasirin amparapat antutnukuyäyätaxa." 
Psalms106:11 Jalxatirinakarux umaw axskatayäna, janiw maynis jupanakat qhispkänti." 
Psalms106:12 Ukat Diosan arunakapar iyawsapxäna, juparurakiw q'uchupxäna." 
Psalms106:13 Ukampis mäkiw Diosan luräwinakap armasipxäna, janiw amtäwinakap uñt'añatak suyapkänti." 
Psalms106:14 Khä ch'usa wasaran Diosarux yant'apxäna, munatanakaparjamaw manq'a mayipxäna." 
Psalms106:15 Ukat Diosax jupanakan mayitaparjam churäna, jiwarayir usunak jupanakar apayanïna." 
Psalms106:16 Chhujllanak taypin Moisesar uñisipxäna, Tatitur katuyat Aarón chacharus uñisipxarakïnwa." 
Psalms106:17 Ukat uraqix jist'artäna, Datán chachampiru, Abiram chachan tamapampiruw manq'antäna." 
Psalms106:18 ¡Ninaw jupanakxarux nakhäna! ¡Nina lawrax ñanqha luririnakaruw nakhantäna! 
Psalms106:19 Horeb qullun vaca qallu lursusipxäna, quri umatatayasaw mä dios lursupxäna, ukaruw yupaychapxäna:" 
Psalms106:20 ¡qhapaq Tatit Dios lantix qura manq'ir vacan uñnaqap uchasipxäna! 
Psalms106:21 Qhispiyir Diosapat armasipxäna, muspharkañanak Egipton lurkipansa," 
Psalms106:22 Cam uraqin muspharkañanak lurkipansa, Mar Rojo qutan jan amuyt'kañanak lurkipansa." 
Psalms106:23 Diosax jupanakar tukjañ munäna; jupan ajllit Moisesasti, nayraqatapan achikt'äna, ukat q'apisiñap t'akurayäna." 
Psalms106:24 Uka qhipatsti munkay uraqiruw jisk'achapxäna, janiw Tatitun arupar iyawsapkänti;" 
Psalms106:25 utanakap taypin Tatitutak arusipxäna, janiw arsutanakap ist'apkänti." 
Psalms106:26 Tatitusti jupanakar jan walt'ayañatakiw juramento luräna, jupanakar wasaran jiwarayañatakiw arsüna," 
Psalms106:27 wawanakapar jiwarayañataki, yaqha markanak taypir ananukuñataki." 
Psalms106:28 Pegor chiqan Baal diosan luqtiriparuw tukupxäna, jiwat diosanakar luqtatanak manq'apxäna." 
Psalms106:29 Ñanqha luratanakapampix Diosaruw q'apisiyapxäna, jupanak taypinsti jach'a usuw sartäna." 
Psalms106:30 Finees chachasti juchanirux juchap uñt'ayäna, ukhamat uka jach'a usux jan purinkxänti," 
Psalms106:31 Finees chachan aski luräwipatxa, wawapan wawapansa aytatapunïniwa." 
Psalms106:32 Meribá umanak jak'an Tatiturux q'apisiyapxäna, jupanak laykuw Moisesax jan walir purïna," 
Psalms106:33 jupan chuymap mayjt'ayapxäna, lakapasti jan arsuñanak parläna." 
Psalms106:34 Tatitun aruparjamax janiw markanakar t'unjapkänti, t'unjapxañapäkän uka markanakarux janiw tukjapkänti." 
Psalms106:35 Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakampiw chikachasipxäna, luräwinakap yatiqasipxäna:" 
Psalms106:36 diosanakaparuw yupaychapxäna, ukat jan walt'añanakar puripxäna," 
Psalms106:37 yuqanakapampi, phuchhanakapampi jiwayasax ñanqhanakaruw luqtapxäna." 
Psalms106:38 Jan juchan jaqin wilap wartapxäna, wawanakapan wilap wartapxäna, Canaán uraqi diosanakaruw wila luqtapxäna. Uraqix wilampi q'añuchataw uñjasïna," 
Psalms106:39 luräwinakapampiw q'añuchasipxäna, ñanqha luratanakapampiw wachuqapxäna." 
Psalms106:40 Tatitux markapatakiw q'apisïna, jupankirinakarux uñisïnwa;" 
Psalms106:41 Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakaruw katxaruyäna, uñisirinakapasti jupanakaruw apnaqäna;" 
Psalms106:42 timanakapax t'aqhisiyänwa, ch'amapampiw axsarayäna." 
Psalms106:43 Walja kutiw Tatitux jupanakar qhispiyäna: jupanakasti amtataparux saykatapxänwa, pachpa juchanakapampiw aynacht'apxäna." 
Psalms106:44 Ukampis Tatitux ayqupxatap uñtanïna, arnaqasitanakaparuw ist'äna;" 
Psalms106:45 jupanakamp arust'äwi luratat amtasïna, jach'a khuyapayasiñampiw ch'allxtayasïna, ukat jan mutuykxänti:" 
Psalms106:46 jupanakar katuntirinakampis khuyapayasiñampiw uñjayäna. 
Psalms106:47 ¡Tatit Diosaxay, qhispiyapxakitaya! ¡Yaqha markanak taypit irpthapxapxita, qullan sutim jach'añchañataki, kusisiñampi jumar yupaychañataki." 
Psalms106:48 Israelan Tatit Diosapax wiñayan wiñayapatak jach'añchatäpan. Taqpach markax sispan: “¡Ukhamäpan!” sasa. ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan! 
Psalms107:1 Tatitur yuspagarapxam, munasiñanïtap layku, khuyapayasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms107:2 Tatitun qhispiyatanakax arsupxpan, timasirin amparapat antutayatanaka," 
Psalms107:3 markanak taypit tantachthapitanaka, amsta tuqita, aynach tuqita, inti jalsu tuqita, inti jalanta tuqita." 
Psalms107:4 Jupanakax ch'usa wasaran muyupxäna, janiw markar irpir thakhi jikxatapkänti;" 
Psalms107:5 manq'at awtjayasipxäna, umat pharjayasipxäna, ¡jupanakax jiwarirjamäpxänwa!" 
Psalms107:6 Ukampis t'aqhisiñankasin Tatitur art'asipxäna, jupasti uka llakisiñat waysüna." 
Psalms107:7 Chiqa thakhiruw jupanakarux irpxatäna, jakañ markaruw irpäna." 
Psalms107:8 Tatiturux khuyapayasiñapat yuspagarapxam, jaqinakatak muspharkañanak luratapata." 
Psalms107:9 Umat pharjatanakaruw um churi, manq'at awtjatanakarusti jilarkir manq'a churaraki." 
Psalms107:10 Jupanakax axsarkay ch'amakan jakapxäna, cadenanakampi, llakisiñampi ñach'antataw jakapxäna," 
Psalms107:11 Tatitun arsutanakapar qallasipxatap laykuw t'aqhisipxäna, Alaxpachankirin amtäwipar jisk'achapxatap laykuw mutupxäna." 
Psalms107:12 Diosax ch'ama tukuñ lurañanakampiw aynacht'ayäna; lanqtasisaw liwisipxäna, janiw khiti waytiris utjkänti." 
Psalms107:13 T'aqhisiñankasinsti Tatitut art'asipxäna, jupasti t'aqhisïwit waysüna;" 
Psalms107:14 ch'amak laxa taypit irpsüna, cadenanakampi chinuntatat jaranuküna." 
Psalms107:15 Tatiturux munasiñapat yuspagarapxam, jaqinakatak muspharkañanak luratapata." 
Psalms107:16 ¡Jupaw broncet lurat punkunak t'unjäna! ¡Jupaw hierrot lurat jist'añanak p'akiräna! 
Psalms107:17 Ñanqha luratanakap laykuw usuntapxäna, juchanakap laykuw t'aqhisipxäna," 
Psalms107:18 manq'atakix axtasxapxänwa; ¡jiwan punkupan jikxatasipxäna! 
Psalms107:19 T'aqhisiñankasinsti Tatitut art'asipxäna, jupasti t'aqhisïwit waysüna;" 
Psalms107:20 may arsusakiw jupanakarux k'umaraptayäna; ¡manqhapachat qhispiyäna! 
Psalms107:21 Tatiturux munasiñapat yuspagarapxam, jaqinakatak muspharkañanak luratapata." 
Psalms107:22 Jach'añchañ luqtäwinak jupar katuyapxam, luräwinakapatsti kusisiñamp yatiyapxam." 
Psalms107:23 Aljasirinakax lamar qutaruw barconakat mantantapxäna. Lamar qutanjam aljañanak apapxäna," 
Psalms107:24 lamar qutan Diosan luräwinakap uñjapxäna, muspharkañ luratanakap uñatatapxäna." 
Psalms107:25 Tatitun arsutaparjamaw jach'a thayax sartäna, thayasti jach'a mathapinak sartayäna;" 
Psalms107:26 alayaru, manqhäxar jaqnaqataw uñjasipxäna, liwnaqkäwix aynacht'atäxapxänwa." 
Psalms107:27 Machatanakjamaw aytilipxäna, ¡yatitanakapax janiw kunatakïkänsa!" 
Psalms107:28 T'aqhisiñankasinsti Tatitut art'asipxäna, jupasti t'aqhisïwit waysüna;" 
Psalms107:29 jach'a thayarux llamp'u thayaruw tukuyäna, lamar quta mathapinakasti llamp'uchataw uñjasïna." 
Psalms107:30 Uxinak t'akurir uñjasax kusisipxänwa, Diosasti kawkharutix mistuñ munapkäna, ukaruw puriyäna." 
Psalms107:31 Tatiturux munasiñapat yuspagarapxam, jaqinakatak muspharkañanak luratapata." 
Psalms107:32 ¡Markan tantachasïwipan jach'añchapxam! ¡Jilïr jaqinakan tantachasïwipan yupaychapxam! 
Psalms107:33 Diosaw jawiranakarux wasarar tukuyi, uma jalsunaksti waña uraqiruw kipstayi;" 
Psalms107:34 purum uraqinak qullpa uraqir tukuyi, jaqinakapan ñanqha lurirïpxatap layku;" 
Psalms107:35 wasar uraqirux uma sayt'anakaruw tukuyi, waña uraqirux uma jalsunakaruw kipstayi;" 
Psalms107:36 ukaruw manq'at awtjatanakarux uchi, jupanakasti markanakap sayt'ayapxi." 
Psalms107:37 Yapunak yapuchapxi, uva alinak ayruntapxi, achunak jilarkir apthapipxaraki." 
Psalms107:38 Tatituw askip churi, juk'ampi jilxatayi, uywanakap mirantayaraki." 
Psalms107:39 T'aqhisiyat uñjasipxatap layku jiwarapkchi ukasa, chijinak layku, llakinak layku juk'aniptapkchi ukasa," 
Psalms107:40 Diosax t'aqhisiyir jilïr jaqinakarux jisk'achiwa, jan thakhin wasaranakaruw irpanti." 
Psalms107:41 Jan kunan jaqinakarusti Tatituw llakipat waysu; ¡uywa tamar uñtat wila masinakaparux mirantayi! 
Psalms107:42 Aski jaqinakax uk uñjasax kusisipxiwa, ñanqha lurir jaqinakasti lakap llupantasipxi." 
Psalms107:43 Ch'ikhi jaqix ukanak amuypan, Tatitun munasiñap amuyt'arakpan." 
Psalms108:1 Diosaxay, chuymaxax wakichatawa, ¡jumar q'uchuñatakix wakicht'atawa! Ajayuxay, sartasikimaya;" 
Psalms108:2 arpa, salterio, sartasipxam, ¡nayax qhantat willjtaruw sartayä!" 
Psalms108:3 Tatay, markanak nayraqatan q'uchunakamp yupaychäma." 
Psalms108:4 Munasiñamax alaxpachat juk'amp jach'awa. ¡Aski kankañamax alaxpachkamaw puri! 
Psalms108:5 Diosaxay, jumax alaxpachat juk'amp jach'ätawa, jach'a kankañamax uraqiruw phuqhanti." 
Psalms108:6 Ch'amamampiy qhispiyapxita, munat wawanakaman antutatäpxañapataki. ¡Mayisitanakaxarux ist'akimaya!" 
Psalms108:7 Diosax qullan utjäwipatpach arsüna: “¡Atipjañampiw Siquem uraq jalanuqä, Sucot pampa uraq lakinuqarakï!" 
Psalms108:8 Galaad uraqixa, Manasés uraqis nayankiwa; Efraín uraqix p'iqixar jark'aqiriwa, Judá uraqix jilïr kankañ thujruxawa;" 
Psalms108:9 Moab uraqix jariqasiñ llataxawa, Edom uraqiruw wiskhunakax liwnuqä; ¡filisteonakar atipjasin q'uchü!” sasa." 
Psalms108:10 ¿Khitirak uyuchrantat markar irpitanisti? ¿Khitirak Edom markar sarir thakhi uñacht'ayitanisti? 
Psalms108:11 Diosay, jumax nanakar apanukupxistawa; nuwasir tamanakaxampi chikax janiw mistkxtati." 
Psalms108:12 Timanakaxar saykatañatakiy yanapt'apxita, jaqin yanapapax janiw kunatakïkisa." 
Psalms108:13 Diosan yanapapampix muspharkañanak lurañäni, ¡jupaw timanakasarux takxatani!" 
Psalms109:1 Dios Tatay, mayisitaxatakix janikiy amukïmti," 
Psalms109:2 ñanqhar jichuntat k'ari jaqinakaw nayxat jan walinak parli, k'arinak nayxat parlapxi." 
Psalms109:3 Uñisisiñ arunakampiw muyuntayapxitu, ¡ina ch'usat nayatak sayt'apxi!" 
Psalms109:4 Munasiñanïtax laykuw k'arintapxitu; ukchañkamasti Diosat mayista. 
Psalms109:5 Aski lurataxatxa, ñanqhampiw kutt'ayapxitu, munasiñatsti uñisisiñampiw phuqhapxitu." 
Psalms109:6 Ñanqha lurir jaqiruy taripiripatak ucham, pachpa arxatiripax juchañchpan;" 
Psalms109:7 taripäwin juchañchat uñjaspan, pachpa arxatiripak juchañchpan." 
Psalms109:8 Jakañ urunakapax juk'akïpan, yänakapsti yaqha jaqi katuntaspan." 
Psalms109:9 Wawanakapax wajcha qhiparapxpan, warmipasti ijmarakïpan." 
Psalms109:10 Wawanakapax mayjasis muyupxpan, manq'añ mayjasipxpan, t'unjat utapat jaqunukutäpxpan." 
Psalms109:11 Qullqi mayt'irix yänakap katuntasxpan, jan uñt'at jaqinakax yänakap aparxapxpan." 
Psalms109:12 Jan khitis jupat khuyapayaspati, wajcha wawanakapat janirak khuyapayaspati." 
Psalms109:13 Wawapan wawapax jiwarayatäpan, sutipax wiñayatak chhaqtpan." 
Psalms109:14 Awkipan ñanqha luratanakap Tatitux amtaspan, taykapan juchapsti janirak pampachpati;" 
Psalms109:15 Tatitux ukanak amxäsiskakpan, sutipasti uraqit chhaqtayatäpan." 
Psalms109:16 Janipuniw jupax khuyapayasiñat amtaskänti; jan kunan jaqiru, mayjasir jaqiru, llakit jaqirux jiwayañatakiw arknaqäna." 
Psalms109:17 Ñanqhachañ munirïtap laykux ñanqhachatäpan; askinak jan munirïtap laykux uka askinakax jupat jayankpan. 
Psalms109:18 Ñanqhachäwix isimpjam imxatpan; purakaparux umjam ch'ach'antpan, ch'akhaparus aceiter uñtat mantpan;" 
Psalms109:19 ¡mä isimpjam imxatpan, wak'ampi jiyintatjam t'aqhisiypan!" 
Psalms109:20 ¡Ukhamay Tatitux nayamp timasirinakarux phuqpan, nayar k'arintirinakarus lurarakpan!" 
Psalms109:21 Jumasti, Tatay, sutim laykuy sum uñjita. ¡Qullan munasiñamampiy qhispiyita!" 
Psalms109:22 Nayax aynacht'at mayjasir jaqïtwa, chuymaxas chhuxriñchjatawa;" 
Psalms109:23 ch'iwir uñtataw chhaqtaskta; ¡thayax pilpinturjamaw jalayitu! 
Psalms109:24 Manq'atjamaw qunqurinakaxax khathati; manq'atjamasti t'ukharnukstaraktwa. 
Psalms109:25 Jaqin larusiñakiw sarnaqta, nayar uñjasax p'iqi khiwisipxi." 
Psalms109:26 Tatit Diosaxay, yanapt'itaya; ¡munasiñam laykuy qhispiyita!" 
Psalms109:27 Tatay, jupanakax yatipxpan, amparamampi taqi akanak luratama." 
Psalms109:28 Jupanakax ñanqhachapxitpasa, jumax askimay churita. Timanakaxax aynacht'apxpan, uywatamasti ukchañkamax kusispan." 
Psalms109:29 ¡Nayampi timasirinakax p'inqampi aynacht'apxpan! ¡P'inqax isimpjam jupanakar llawuntpan! 
Psalms109:30 Nayasti lakaxampiw Tatitur wiñay yuspagarä; ¡jaqinak taypin jupar yupaychä! 
Psalms109:31 Jupaw jan kunan jaqirux arxati, juchañchirinakat jakañap qhispiyaraki." 
Psalms110:1 Tatitux reyixarux sänwa: “Kupïxaxar qunt'asim, timanakamar atipjañaxkama” sasa." 
Psalms110:2 Tatitux Sión qullutpach ch'aman kankañ thujru ayxaruyätam. ¡Jumamp timasirinakarux atipjamaya! 
Psalms110:3 Markamax atipt'añam urunxa, jumaruw katuyasxätam. Qullan qullunak patxanxa, willjta sullar uñtataw wayna kankañamax sapür machaqaptani." 
Psalms110:4 Tatitux mayak arsu, arsutapatsti janiw yaqha amtkiti: “Jumaw wiñay sacerdotëtaxa, Melquisedec sacerdotjama” sasa." 
Psalms110:5 Tatitux kupïxamankaskiwa; q'apisiñap urunxa, reyinakaruw t'unjani;" 
Psalms110:6 markanakatakiw juchañchäwinak mistuyani; jaqi jiwatanak arkthapini; ¡uraqpachan p'iqi ch'akhanak p'akirani! 
Psalms110:7 Thakhinsti, jalaskir umat umt'ani, umasti machaq ch'am churani." 
Psalms111:1 ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan! Tatiturux taqi chuymampiw yupaychä, aski jaqinakan tantachasïwipan jach'añchä." 
Psalms111:2 Tatitun luratanakapax muspharkañawa, luratanakapar munirinakax sum yatxatapxi." 
Psalms111:3 Jupan luräwipax k'ajkiriwa, munkañarakiwa, aski kankañapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms111:4 Amtaskay muspharkañanak jupax luri. Tatitux munasiñaniwa, khuyapayasiriwa;" 
Psalms111:5 jupar iyawsirinakarux manq'añ churi; arust'äwipat wiñayapuniw amtasi. 
Psalms111:6 Tatitux luratanakapan ch'amap markapar uñacht'ayi, Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakan uraqip churxaraki." 
Psalms111:7 Luratanakapax askiwa, chiqaparakiwa; kamachinakapax taqi chuymamp iyawskayawa," 
Psalms111:8 wiñayatak suma utt'ayatawa, chiqapampi, aski kankañampi luratawa." 
Psalms111:9 Markaparux qhispiyiwa, arust'äwipsti wiñayatakiw utt'ayi. Diosax qullanawa, axsarkayarakiwa." 
Psalms111:10 Yatiñ kankañan qalltapax, Tatitur axsartañawa, jupar waqaychirinakax wali amuyt'anïpxiwa. ¡Tatitux wiñayaw yupaychatäni!" 
Psalms112:1 ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan! Tatitur axsartir jaqix kusisiñaniwa, arsutanakapar munasir jaqix kusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms112:2 Aski jaqin wawanakapax qullanäpxaniwa, aka uraqinsti munañanïpxaniwa." 
Psalms112:3 Walja yänakaw utapan utji, jaqir khuyapt'ayañapasti jan tukuskiriwa." 
Psalms112:4 Khuyapayasiñan aski jaqix, ch'amakan qhantir qhanjamaw k'ajti." 
Psalms112:5 Aski jaqix khuyapayasiñ chuymamp mayt'iriwa, chiqap chuymampiw yänakap apnaqi;" 
Psalms112:6 aski jaqix janipuniw kunapachas aynacht'kaniti. ¡Aski jaqix aytatapunïniwa! 
Psalms112:7 Jan wali yatiyäwinakarux janiw axsarkiti, Tatitunkasax chuymapax wali thurt'atawa." 
Psalms112:8 Chuymapax ch'amañchatawa, janiw axsarkiti, timasirinakaparux phiskasiñampiw uñkati." 
Psalms112:9 Jan kunan jaqinakaruw churäwinak waxt'i, jaqir khuyapt'ayañapax jan tukuskiriwa, jan khitin kamskañaw p'iqip wayti." 
Psalms112:10 Ñanqha lurir jaqisti jupar uñjasax q'apisiwa; jan kamachirjamäxasax laka ch'akhanakap t'urusi. Ñanqha jaqinakan inampst'añ chuymapasti aynacht'aniwa. 
Psalms113:1 ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan! Tatitur luqtirinaka, sutip jach'añchapxam." 
Psalms113:2 ¡Tatitun sutipax jach'ar aptatäpan, jichhasa, wiñayan wiñayapataki!" 
Psalms113:3 ¡Tatitun sutipax yupaychatäpan, inti jalsu tuqita, inti jalanta tuqikama!" 
Psalms113:4 Tatitux markanakxar jilïrit qunt'atawa; ¡qhapaq kankañapax alaxpachat jilankiwa! 
Psalms113:5 Janiw khitis Tatit Diosasjamäkiti, jupax wali alayan reyi qunuñapxan qunt'atawa;" 
Psalms113:6 Alaxpachampiru, uraqimpirux alxatasin uñtani." 
Psalms113:7 Tatituw laq'a uraqitpach pist'at jaqirux wayti, q'añu taypit jan kunan jaqirux waysu," 
Psalms113:8 aytat jaqinakampi chik qunt'ayañataki, markapan jilïrinakap taypir uchañataki." 
Psalms113:9 Jan wawachasir warmirux pä kusisiñ churi: wawanakanïña, utapan suman uñjatäña. ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms114:1 Israel markax Egipto markat mistunkän ukapacha, uka yaqha markat mistunkän ukapachaxa," 
Psalms114:2 Judá markax Tatitun qullan utjäwiparuw tuküna; Israel markax jupan apnaqat markaruw tuküna. 
Psalms114:3 Lamar qutax Israel markar uñjasax jist'jtänwa, Jordán jawir umasti qhiparuw kuttäna." 
Psalms114:4 ¡Jisk'a qullusa, jach'a qullusa, ovej qallunakar uñtataw t'isktapxäna!" 
Psalms114:5 Lamar quta, ¿kunatarak jist'arttasti? Jordán jawira, ¿kunatarak qhipar kuttasti?" 
Psalms114:6 Jach'a qullunaka, ¿kunatarak ovejanakar uñtat t'isktapxtasti? Jisk'a qullunaka, ¿kunatarak ovej qallunakar uñtat thuqtapxtasti?" 
Psalms114:7 ¡Uraqi, Tatitun nayraqatapan khathatim, Jacobun Diosap nayraqatan axsartam!" 
Psalms114:8 ¡Jupaw qarqanakat uma sayt'anak utjayi! ¡Jupaw qarqanakat uma jalsunak mistuyi! 
Psalms115:1 Tatay, qhapaq sutimarux jach'añchasikimaya, janis nanakarux jach'añchapkita; munasiñam layku, chiqapätam laykuy jach'añchasim." 
Psalms115:2 ¿Kunatarak ñanqha lurir jaqinakast jiskhisipkitani: “Kawkinkarak Diosamasti” sasasti? 
Psalms115:3 Diosasax alaxpachankiwa; kuntix jupax munki uk luri. 
Psalms115:4 Diosar jan uñt'irin diosanakapax qurimpita, qullqimpit luratakiwa, jaqin amparapampi luratakiwa:" 
Psalms115:5 lakanïkasas janiw arsupkiti; nayranïkasas janiw uñjapkiti; 
Psalms115:6 jinchunïkasas janiw ist'apkiti; nasanïkasas janiw mukt'apkiti; 
Psalms115:7 amparanïkasas janiw llamkt'apkiti; kayunïkasas janiw sarnaqapkiti; mallq'anïkasas janiw arsupkiti. 
Psalms115:8 Uka diosanakar luririnakax ukanak kipkakïpxiwa, iyawsirinakas pachpakïpxarakiwa." 
Psalms115:9 Israelitanaka, ¡Tatitur iyawsapxam! Jupaw yanapistu, arxatarakistu." 
Psalms115:10 Sacerdotenaka, ¡Tatitur iyawsapxam! Jupaw yanapistu, arxatarakistu." 
Psalms115:11 Tatitur iyawsirinaka, ¡jupar alkatapxam! Jupaw yanapistu, arxatarakistu." 
Psalms115:12 ¡Tatitux jiwasanakat amtasistuwa, askinak churarakistani! Israel markarux askinak churani, sacerdotenakarux askinak churarakini," 
Psalms115:13 Tatitur iyawsirinakarux askinak churani, jisk'arusa, jach'arusa, taqiniruw churani." 
Psalms115:14 ¡Tatitux wawanakamar waljaniptaypan, jumanakarusa, wawanakamarusa!" 
Psalms115:15 ¡Alaxpach akapach lurir Tatitux askinakapay jumanakar churpan! 
Psalms115:16 Alaxpachax Tatitunkiwa, jaqirusti uraq katuyi." 
Psalms115:17 Jiwatanakax janiw Tatitur yupaychapkaspati, janirakiw manqhapachankirinakas jach'ar aptapkaspati;" 
Psalms115:18 jiwasanakasti Tatituruw yupaychapxañäni, jichhasa, wiñayan wiñayapataki. ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms116:1 Nayax Tatituruw munasta, mayisitaxar ist'atap layku," 
Psalms116:2 naya tuqiruw jinchup alkatanitu. ¡Wiñayapuniw jupar art'asï! 
Psalms116:3 Jiwañ chinuñanakaw simpantitäna, mik'ayan sipitanakapaw katuntitäna, llakisiñan, ayquñan katuntataw uñjasïyäta." 
Psalms116:4 Nayasti Tatitun sutip art'asta: “Tatay, jakañax qhispiyita” sasa." 
Psalms116:5 Tatitux llamp'u chuymaniwa, askirakiwa; Diosasax munasiriwa." 
Psalms116:6 Tatitux jan yäqat jaqinakaruw imaski. Jan ch'amanïkiriruw qhispiyitu. 
Psalms116:7 Jichhakuchapï samart'at jikxatasxäxa, Tatitun nayat khuyapayasitap layku," 
Psalms116:8 jiwañat nayarux qhispiyitu, nayranakaxar jachañat apaqi, kayunakaxarusti tinkuñat sayt'ayi." 
Psalms116:9 Aka uraqin jakkasax Tatitur jaysasapun sarnaqä. 
Psalms116:10 Wali llakisiñan uñjaskasasa, iyawsañaxax utjaskakïnwa." 
Psalms116:11 Llakisiñankasax säyätwa: “Jaqinakax k'arikamakiwa” sasa. 
Psalms116:12 ¿Kunampirak Tatitur phuqhirista, nayatak askinak luratapatsti?" 
Psalms116:13 ¡Qhispiyasiñapat yuspagarasa, Tatitun sutip aytasa!" 
Psalms116:14 Jaqinakan nayraqatapan Tatitur arsutanakax phuqhä. 
Psalms116:15 Tatitutakix wali llakisiñawa, iyawsirinakapar jiwir uñjañaxa." 
Psalms116:16 ¡Tatay, nayax uywatamätwa! ¡Uywataman wawapätwa! Jumaw ñach'antatanakax t'aqanuktaxa." 
Psalms116:17 Tatay, yuspagarañ luqtäwi katuyäma, sutimaruw jach'añcharakï." 
Psalms116:18 Jaqinakan nayraqatapan Tatitur arsutanakax phuqhä," 
Psalms116:19 Tatitun qullan utap punkun phuqhä, ¡Jerusalén, juma taypin phuqhä! ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms117:1 Taqpach markanaka, Tatitur yupaychapxam," 
Psalms117:2 munasiñapax jiwasanakatak wali jach'awa, aski kankañapax wiñayatakiwa. ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan!" 
Psalms118:1 Tatitur yuspagarapxam, jupax khuyapayasiñaniwa, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms118:2 Israelitanakax sispan: “Tatitun munasiñapax wiñayawa.” 
Psalms118:3 Sacerdotenakax sispan: “Tatitun munasiñapax wiñayawa.” 
Psalms118:4 Tatitur iyawsirinakax sispan: “Tatitun munasiñapax wiñayawa.” 
Psalms118:5 Llakisiñaxan Tatitur art'asta; jupasti ist'ituwa, qhispiyarakituwa." 
Psalms118:6 Tatitux nayampïskiwa; janiw axsarayasktti. ¿Kamacharakitan jaqisti? 
Psalms118:7 Tatitux nayampïskiwa; jupaw yanapaskitu. ¡Nayar uñisirinakan aynacht'añap uñjä! 
Psalms118:8 Jaqir alkatañat sipanxa, Tatitur alkatañaw juk'amp sumaxa." 
Psalms118:9 Jilïr jaqinakar alkatañat sipanxa, Tatitur alkatañaw juk'amp sumaxa." 
Psalms118:10 Taqi markanakaw muyuntapxitäna, ukanakarusti Tatitun ch'amapampiw atipjta." 
Psalms118:11 Taqi tuqit muyuntapxitäna, Tatitun ch'amapampisti atipjtwa." 
Psalms118:12 Tamurayanakar uñtataw muyuntapxitäna, jupanakasti ch'aphinak taypin nakhir ninjamaw tukusipxäna; ¡Tatitun sutiparuw jupanakarux atipjta!" 
Psalms118:13 Wali ch'amampiw tinkuñaxatak nukt'apxitäna, Tatitusti yanapt'iriw jutitu." 
Psalms118:14 Tatituruw nayax jach'añchta, jupaw ch'am churirixaxa. ¡Jupaw qhispiyirixaxa!" 
Psalms118:15 Aski jaqinakan utanakapanxa, atipjäwi q'uchunakaw ist'asi: “¡Tatitun ch'aman amparapaw atipjayi!" 
Psalms118:16 ¡Tatitun amparapax jan atipjkayawa! ¡Tatitun ch'aman amparapaw atipjayi!” sasa. 
Psalms118:17 ¡Janiw jiwkäti, Tatitun luratanakap yatiyañatakix jakaskakïwa!" 
Psalms118:18 Tatitux t'aqhisiyituwa, mutuyarakituwa, ukampis janiw jiwañar katxaruykituti." 
Psalms118:19 ¡Qullan utan punkunakap jist'ararapipxita, Tatitur yuspagaririw mantañ munta!" 
Psalms118:20 Akapï Tatitun punkupaxa, uka chiqaw aski jaqinakax mantapxani." 
Psalms118:21 Tatay, nayar ist'atamat yuspagarsma, nayar qhispiyatamat yupaycharaksma." 
Psalms118:22 Utachirinakan jaqunukut qalaxa, wakiskir qalaruw tukxi." 
Psalms118:23 Tatituw ukham luri, ukax jiwasanakatak muspharkayawa." 
Psalms118:24 Tatitux lurkän uka urux jichhüruwa: ¡kusisipxañäni, k'uchirasipxarakiñäni!" 
Psalms118:25 Tatay, ¡qhispiyäwim churapxakitaya! ¡Taqi kunar atipt'ayapxakitaya!" 
Psalms118:26 ¡Tatitun sutipar jutirix qullanäpan! Tatitun utapatpach jach'añchanipxsma. 
Psalms118:27 Tatituw Diosaxa; jupaw qhant'anistu. Kusisiñ qalltapxam, altar thiyakam layminakamp k'achachapxam." 
Psalms118:28 Tatay, yuspagarsmawa, jumaruw jach'ar aptsma, jumaw nayan Diosaxätaxa." 
Psalms118:29 Tatitur yuspagarapxam, munasirïtap layku, khuyapayasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms119:1 Jan juchañchkay sarnaqir jaqix kusisiñaniwa, Tatitun yatichäwiparjam sarnaqirix kusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms119:2 Tatitun arunakapar jaysirinakax kusisiñaniwa, taqpach chuymamp jupar thaqhirinakax kusisiñaniwa," 
Psalms119:3 jan kuna ñanqha luririnakasa, Tatitun thakhipan sarnaqirinakas kusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms119:4 Jumaw arsutanakam yatiytaxa, arunakamax sum phuqhatäñapataki." 
Psalms119:5 ¡Sarnaqäwixax thuruñchatakïspa, arunakam phuqhañaxataki!" 
Psalms119:6 Janiw kunat p'inqa tukuñaxas utjkaniti, taqpach arsutanakam phuqkä ukapachaxa." 
Psalms119:7 Chiqa chuymampiw jumar jach'añchäma, chiqap arsutanakam yatiqkä ukapachaxa." 
Psalms119:8 ¡Kamachinakam phuqhañ munta! ¡Janipun armanukusistati! 
Psalms119:9 ¿Kunjämatarak mä waynasti q'uma jakañanïspasti? Arunakamarjam sarnaqasaki. 
Psalms119:10 Taqpach chuymaxampiw thaqsma, janikiy arunakamat saraqtañax munamti." 
Psalms119:11 Chuymaxaruw arunakam imta, juma nayraqatan juch jan lurañataki;" 
Psalms119:12 ¡Tatay, jumax qullanätawa! ¡Kamachinakamay yatichita!" 
Psalms119:13 Lakaxampiw yatiyä, juman taqpach arsut kamachi arunaka." 
Psalms119:14 Arunakamarjam sarnaqañ thakhin kusisï, qamir yänakampi kusisiñat sipana." 
Psalms119:15 Arsutanakamat lup'isï, thakhiman sarnaqañ amuyt'arakï." 
Psalms119:16 Kamachi arunakamampiw kusisï, janipuniw arunakamat armaskäti." 
Psalms119:17 ¡Aka uywatamarux jakayakimaya! ¡Nayasti arunakamarux phuqhapunïwa! 
Psalms119:18 Nayranakaxay jist'arita, muspharkañ yatichäwinakam uñxatañataki." 
Psalms119:19 Aka uraqin sart'ir jaqikïtwa; janikiy kamachi arunakam nayatak imantamti. 
Psalms119:20 Ajayuxax wali llakt'ataw uñjasi, arsutanakam yatiñ munasa." 
Psalms119:21 Jumaw jach'a jach'a tukurinakarux tuqinuqtaxa, arsutanakamat saraqapxatap layku." 
Psalms119:22 Llakinakampi, jisk'achañanakampi nayat jithiqtayita, kamachi arunakam phuqhatax layku." 
Psalms119:23 Jilïr jaqinakas nayatak arusipkanixa, uywatamax arunakamat lup'iskakiniwa." 
Psalms119:24 Arunakamax nayan kusisiñaxawa, arsutanakamax nayan amuyt'ayirixawa." 
Psalms119:25 Niy jiwirjamätwa, ¡arsutamarjamay jakañ churita!" 
Psalms119:26 Sarnaqäwix uñacht'aysma, jumasti ist'istawa. ¡Kamachi arunakamay yatichita!" 
Psalms119:27 Arsutanakamarjam arkañatak amuyt'ayita, muspharkañ luräwinakamat lup'iñ munta." 
Psalms119:28 Jach'a jachañan uñjasta; ¡arsutanakamampiy chuymacht'ita! 
Psalms119:29 K'arisiñat jithiqtayita, arunakamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:30 Chiqa thakhin sarnaqañ ajllista, arunakamaruw munasta." 
Psalms119:31 Tatay, arsutanakamaruw iyawsta; ¡janikiy p'inq tukuyistati!" 
Psalms119:32 Arsutanakam phuqhañatakix jank'akïtwa, chuymaxarux kusisiñampiw phuqt'ista." 
Psalms119:33 Tatay, kamachiman thakhipay uñacht'ayita, nayasti tukuykamaw arkä." 
Psalms119:34 Yatichäwinakam phuqhañatak suma amuyuy churita; ¡taqpach chuymampiw arunakam imä! 
Psalms119:35 Arsutanakaman thakhipanay irpita, ukankiw nayan kusisiñaxaxa." 
Psalms119:36 Arsutanakamaruy chuymax alkatayita, janikiy inampst'añar puriyistati." 
Psalms119:37 Janikiy k'ari diosanakar uñtayistati; ¡thakhiman sarañatak jakañ churita! 
Psalms119:38 Uywatamarux arsutam phuqhakimaya, iyawsirinakamar arsut arunaka." 
Psalms119:39 Axsarayir llakisiñ nayat apaqt'ita, arsutanakamax munasiñ arunakawa." 
Psalms119:40 Nayaw arsutanakamarux munasta; ¡aski kankañamampiy jakañ churita! 
Psalms119:41 Tatay, khuyapayasiñamay uñacht'ayita, qhispiyäwimax arsutamarjamay purinitpan." 
Psalms119:42 Ukhamat nayar tuqirirux kutkatasï, arunakamar taqi chuymamp iyawsatax layku." 
Psalms119:43 Janikiy lakaxat chiqa arunak apaqistati, nayax arunakamaruw chuymax uchta." 
Psalms119:44 ¡Jan inakt'asaw yatichäwim phuqhä, wiñayapuniw munañamar jaysä!" 
Psalms119:45 Ukhamat jan khitin kamsat jakä, arsutanakamar arkatax layku." 
Psalms119:46 Reyinakan nayraqatapan arunakamat parlä, janipuniw arsuñ p'inqaskäti." 
Psalms119:47 Arunakamarux munastwa, arunakamampix kusisitaw uñjasta." 
Psalms119:48 Arunakamarux munastwa, arsutanakamatsti walpun lup'ista." 
Psalms119:49 Uywatamar arsutamat amtasikimaya: arunakamaruw suyt'äwi uchayista. 
Psalms119:50 Llakisiñaxan chuymachasiñax akawa: arunakamaw jakañ churitu. 
Psalms119:51 Jach'a jach'a tukurinakax jan inakt'asaw tuqipxitu, nayasti janiw yatichäwimat saraqaskti." 
Psalms119:52 Tatay, nayra pacha arsutanakamat amtasta, uka arunakaman chuymachasiñ jikxatta." 
Psalms119:53 Arunakam jaytanukur ñanqha luririnakatakix chuymaxax walpun q'apisi. 
Psalms119:54 Jaqin markapan jakasax arunakamax nayan q'uchuxänwa. 
Psalms119:55 Tatay, arumanakaw jumat amtasta; ¡yatichäwimarjam phuqhañ munarakta!" 
Psalms119:56 May lurañaxaw wakt'itu: ukasti arsutanakam phuqhañawa. 
Psalms119:57 Tatay, jumakiw nayatakix utjarapistaxa, arunakam phuqhañatakiw arsta." 
Psalms119:58 Taqpach chuymampiw jumarux ist'añ thaqta; arsutamarjamay khuyapt'ayasita. 
Psalms119:59 Sarnaqäwixaruw uñakipasta, arunakamarusti wasitat jaysta." 
Psalms119:60 Jank'akiw sartasta, jan suyasarakiw arsutanakam phuqta." 
Psalms119:61 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax sipitanakampiw muyuntayapxitu, nayasti janiw yatichäwimat armaskti." 
Psalms119:62 Chika arumaw jumar yuspagarañatak sarthapta, chiqa arunakamat jumar yuspagarañataki." 
Psalms119:63 Jumar iyawsir jaqinakampiw chikachasta, arsutanakam phuqhirinakampiw mayachasirakta." 
Psalms119:64 Tatay, akapachax munasiñamampi phuqhantatawa; ¡kamachinakamay yatichita!" 
Psalms119:65 Tatay, aka uywatamarux askinakpun churtaxa, arsutanakamarjamaw uñjtaxa." 
Psalms119:66 Suma amuyt'a chuymay churita, yatiñ kankañ churarakita, arsutamarux taqpach chuymampiw iyawsta." 
Psalms119:67 Janïr t'aqhiskasax pantjataw sarnaqäyäta, jichhasti arunakamarjamaw sarnaqta." 
Psalms119:68 Jumax askïtawa, aski luraraktaxa; kamachinakamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:69 Qhuru jaqinakax ina ch'usat k'arintapxitu, nayasti taqpach chuymampiw arsutanakam phuqta." 
Psalms119:70 Jupanakan amuyt'anakapax ch'amakt'atawa, nayasti yatichäwimampiw kusista." 
Psalms119:71 T'aqhisitaxax aski apanirapitu, ukhamat kamachinakam yatiqta." 
Psalms119:72 Yatichäwinakamaw nayatakix taqi kunatsa askixa, waranq waranqa qurit sipansa, qullqit sipansa." 
Psalms119:73 Jumaw nayarux irnuqista, sayt'ayarakista; ¡arsutanakam yatiqañaxatak ch'ikhi chuymay churita!" 
Psalms119:74 Iyawsirinakamax nayar uñjasax kusisipxaniwa, arunakamar taqi chuymamp suyatax layku." 
Psalms119:75 Tatay, arsutanakamax chiqapawa, ukarjamaw nayarux t'aqhisiyista." 
Psalms119:76 ¡Munasiñamax chuymachitpan, nayatak arskäyätax ukarjam phuqhasiñapataki!" 
Psalms119:77 Khuyapayasiñam uñacht'ayita, jakañ churarakita, yatichäwimampix wali kusisitätwa." 
Psalms119:78 Qhuru jaqinakax p'inqachatäpxpan, nayar ina ch'usat t'aqhisiyapxatapata, nayasti kamachi arunakamat lup'ï." 
Psalms119:79 Iyawsirinakamax nayamp tantachasipxpan, arsutanakam uñt'irinakax nayamp chikachasipxpan." 
Psalms119:80 Chuymaxax kamachinakamarjam phuqhirïpan, ukhamat p'inqa jan tukuskañaxataki." 
Psalms119:81 Qhispiyäwim suykasaw tukusiskta; ¡arunakamaruw taqi chuymamp iyawsta! 
Psalms119:82 Nayranakaxax juykhuptaskiwa arsutam phuqhasiñap suykäwixa, ukchañkamasti sismawa: “¿Kunapacharak chuymachir jutitätasti?” sasa." 
Psalms119:83 Nayax armanukut jan yäqkañ ch'ama qaritäktsa, janiw kamachi arunakamat armaskti." 
Psalms119:84 ¿Kunapachkamarak suyästi? ¿Kunapacharak arknaqirinakaxar taripätasti? 
Psalms119:85 Qhuru jaqinakax yatichäwim jan yatkasaw sipit p'iyanak allirapipxitu. 
Psalms119:86 Ina ch'usat arknaqapxitu, arxatakitaya, ¡Taqpach arsutanakamax chiqapawa!" 
Psalms119:87 Niyapuniw aka uraqit chhaqtayat uñjasta, nayasti janiw arunakamat armaskti." 
Psalms119:88 Munasiñam laykuy jakañ churita, nayasti arsutanakam phuqhä." 
Psalms119:89 Tatay, arunakamax wiñayawa; ¡alaxpachat juk'amp suma thurt'atawa!" 
Psalms119:90 Chiqa kankañamax wiñayan wiñayapatakiwa; juman lurat uraqix jan unxtkiriwa. 
Psalms119:91 Arunakam laykuw taqi kunas jichhürkam utjaski, taqi luratanakax jumar luqtiriwa." 
Psalms119:92 Janitix yatichäwinakamax nayar kusisiykitasapänxa, niyaw llakisiñaxampi tukusiriskäyäta." 
Psalms119:93 Janipuniw arunakamat armaskäti, arunakamampiw nayarux jakayista." 
Psalms119:94 ¡Nayax jumankirïtwa, qhispiyasikitaya, arunakamarjamaw sarnaqta!" 
Psalms119:95 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax tukjañatakiw suyxatapxitu, ukampis nayax arunakamat lup'iskta." 
Psalms119:96 Taqi kunan tukusirïtap uñjta, kamachi arunakamasti jan tukuskiriwa." 
Psalms119:97 ¡Yatichäwimarux walpun munasta! ¡Sapüruw ukxat lup'iskta! 
Psalms119:98 Kamachi arunakamax nayamp chikt'atapuniwa; timanakaxat sipansa juk'amp yatiñan tukuyitu. 
Psalms119:99 Taqpach yatichirinakaxat sipan juk'amp amuyta, arunakamat wal lup'itax layku." 
Psalms119:100 Chuyman jaqinakat sipan juk'amp amuyta, arunakamarjam sarnaqatax layku." 
Psalms119:101 Arunakamarjam sarnaqañatakix taqi jan walinakat jithiqtasta. 
Psalms119:102 Janiw kamachi arunakamat saraqkti, jumaw nayarux yatichasista." 
Psalms119:103 Arunakamax nayatak wali muxsawa: misk'it sipan juk'amp muxsawa. 
Psalms119:104 Arunakaman yatiñ kankañ jikxatta, ukat k'ari sarnaqañarux uñista." 
Psalms119:105 Arunakamax sarnaqäwixatak mä qhanawa, thakhixan qhantirirakiwa." 
Psalms119:106 Juramento lurta, uksti phuqhapunïwa: ¡chiqa arunakamarjamaw sarnaqä!" 
Psalms119:107 Tatay, wali llakt'ataw jikxatasta; ¡arsutamarjamay jakañ churita!" 
Psalms119:108 Tatay, arsutanakaxax jumatak askïpanaya, kamachi arunakamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:109 Jakañaxax jiwañ chijir jalantañampiwa; nayasti janiw yatichäwinakamat armaskti. 
Psalms119:110 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax sipitanak ucharapipxitu, nayasti janiw arsutanakamat saraqaskti." 
Psalms119:111 Arunakamax nayatak wiñay katuqäwiwa, arsutanakamax chuymaxaruw kusisiyi." 
Psalms119:112 Taqpach chuymampiw kamachinakamarjam sarnaqañatak arsta, wiñayataki, tukuykam phuqhañatakiw arsurakta." 
Psalms119:113 Qhipäxat uñisisir jaqinakar uñistwa, yatichäwinakamarusti munastwa." 
Psalms119:114 Jumaw imantasiñaxätaxa, jark'aqasiñaxätasa; arunakamaruw taqpach chuymax katuyta." 
Psalms119:115 ¡Ñanqha lurir jaqinaka, nayat saraqapxita, Diosaxan arsutanakap phuqhañ munta." 
Psalms119:116 Arsutamarjamay ch'am churita, ukhamat nayax jakä; ¡janikiy inamay suyayistati!" 
Psalms119:117 Yanapt'itaya, nayasti qhispiyataw uñjasï, jan qarjasisaw kamachi arunakam phuqhä." 
Psalms119:118 Jumax kamachi arunakamar jisk'achirinakarux apanuktawa, amtäwinakapax jan amuyt'an amuyunakawa." 
Psalms119:119 Ñanqha luririnakax jumatakix q'añu t'unar uñtatawa, ukat nayax kamachi arsutanakamar munasta." 
Psalms119:120 Janchixax nayraqataman axsarañat khathati; ¡kamachi arunakam laykuw chuymax alt'ayta! 
Psalms119:121 Janipuniw chiqapäk uk lurañ jaytanukkäti; janikiy t'aqhisiyirinakaxan amparaparux antutistati. 
Psalms119:122 Jumakiy kusisit jakayita; janikiy qhuru jaqinakax t'aqhisiyitpati. 
Psalms119:123 Nayranakaxax qhispiyäwim suykäwiw juykhupti, arunakamarjam qhispiyañam suyaskta." 
Psalms119:124 Aka uywatamarux khuyapayasiñampiy uñjam; ¡kamachi arunakamay yatichita! 
Psalms119:125 Nayax juman luqtirimätwa. Amuyt'a kankañay churita, arsutanakam yatiñ munta." 
Psalms119:126 Tatay, urux purinxiwa, wakisxiw kun lurañamasa, arunakamarux janiw ist'añ munapkiti;" 
Psalms119:127 nayasti arunakamarux munastwa, jila alan qurit sipana." 
Psalms119:128 Ukat arsutanakamarjamax sarnaqta, k'ari sarnaqañarusti uñistwa." 
Psalms119:129 Arsutanakamax muspharkañawa, ukat arunakamar jaysta." 
Psalms119:130 Arunakaman qhanañchäwipax amuyt'ayituwa, pisi amuyt'aninakarux amuyt'ayiwa." 
Psalms119:131 Jank'akiw lakax jist'arta, kamachi arunakam yatiñ layku." 
Psalms119:132 Nayarux uñtanxakitaya, khuyapayasirakita, jumar munasirinakar uñjktas ukhamay uñjita." 
Psalms119:133 Arunakamarjam sarnaqayita; janikiy kuna ñanqhas nayar atipitpati. 
Psalms119:134 Jaqinakan t'aqhisiyañapat qhispiyita, nayasti arunakamarjam phuqhañ munta." 
Psalms119:135 Uywatamarux khuyapayasiñampiy uñtanim, kamachi arunakamay yatichita." 
Psalms119:136 Umjamaw jachax nayranakaxat warasi, yatichäwiman jan yäqatätap layku." 
Psalms119:137 Tatay, jumax askïtawa; kamachi arunakamax chiqapawa." 
Psalms119:138 Taqpach arsutanakamax chiqapa, askirakiwa." 
Psalms119:139 Arunakamar munañaw taqi kun armayitu, uñisirinakaxax arunakamat armt'asipxi." 
Psalms119:140 Arsutamax wali yant'ataw uñjasi; uywatamasti arsutamaruw munasi. 
Psalms119:141 Jan yäqatakïtwa, jisk'achatarakïtwa, ukampis janiw arunakamat armaskti." 
Psalms119:142 Chiqapar uñjañamax askiwa, yatichäwimasti chiqaparakiwa." 
Psalms119:143 Llakisiñanakampi jan walt'añanakampiw katuntitu, arunakamasti kusisiyituwa." 
Psalms119:144 Arsutanakamax chiqapapuniwa; amuyt'a kankañay nayan jakañaxatak churita. 
Psalms119:145 Tatay, taqpach chuymaxampiw art'asinsma; ¡ist'akitaya, kamachinakam phuqhañ munta!" 
Psalms119:146 Jumaruw art'asinsma, yanapt'akitaya, kamachi arunakamarjam phuqhañaxataki." 
Psalms119:147 Janïr qhanjtankipan jumat yanap maysma; arsutamaruw suyt'añax katuyta. 
Psalms119:148 Janïr ch'amakthapkipan arsutamxat lup'iñatak wakichasta. 
Psalms119:149 Tatay, munasiñam laykuy aruxar ist'am; chiqa kankañamarjamay jakañ churita." 
Psalms119:150 Qhuru arknaqirinakaxax jak'ankiwa, jupanakasti yatichäwi arunakamat jayankapxiwa." 
Psalms119:151 Jumasti Tatay, jak'ankasktawa, taqpach kamachi arunakax chiqapapuniwa." 
Psalms119:152 Nayratpach arunakam yatta, wiñay utt'ayat arunakama." 
Psalms119:153 T'aqhisitax uñtanikitaya, qhispiyarakitaya, janiw arunakamat armaskti." 
Psalms119:154 Nayat arxatasikitaya, qhispiyarakitaya; arsutamarjamay jakañ churita." 
Psalms119:155 Yanapt'amax ñanqha lurir jaqinakat jayankiwa, jupanakax janiw arunakamarjam jakapkiti." 
Psalms119:156 Tatay, munasiñamax wali jach'awa; chiqa kankañamarjamay jakañ churita." 
Psalms119:157 Nayar arknaqir timasirinakax waljaniwa, nayasti janiw arunakamat saraqaskti." 
Psalms119:158 Ch'uxña lurir jaqinakar uñjasax axtastwa, arunakamarux janiw jaysapkiti." 
Psalms119:159 Tatay, arunakamar munasitax uñtanita; ¡munasiñam laykuy jakañ churita!" 
Psalms119:160 Taqpach arunakamax chiqapapuniwa; taqpach arsutanakamax wiñayawa, askirakiwa." 
Psalms119:161 Ch'aman jaqinakax ina ch'usat arknaqapxitu, chuymaxasti arunakamaruw waqaychi." 
Psalms119:162 Nayax arsutamampix kusisitätwa, imantat yänak jikxatasin kusisir jaqjamätwa." 
Psalms119:163 K'arisiñarux uñistwa, janiw yatiñ munkti, yatichäwimarusti munastwa." 
Psalms119:164 Chiqa arunakamatxa, jan qarjasisaw yupaychsma." 
Psalms119:165 Arunakam munirinakax suman jakasipxi, janiw kunas jupanakarux tinkuykiti." 
Psalms119:166 Tatay, nayar qhispiyañam suyt'askta, kamachi arunakamarjamaw sarnaqta." 
Psalms119:167 Nayax arsutanakamaruw jaysta, taqpach chuymampiw munasirakta." 
Psalms119:168 Kamachi arunakamarux jaystwa, ¡jumaw taqi sarnaqäwix yattaxa!" 
Psalms119:169 Tatay, arnaqasitaxax nayraqatamaruy purinpan; ¡arunakamarjamay amuyt'a chuym churita!" 
Psalms119:170 Mayisitaxax nayraqatamar purinpan; ¡arsutamarjamay qhispiyita! 
Psalms119:171 Lakaxat jach'añchañ arunakax mistpan, jumaw kamachinakam nayar yatichista." 
Psalms119:172 Laxraxax arsutam phuqhirïtamat q'uchpan, taqpach kamachi arunakaman chiqapätap layku." 
Psalms119:173 Amparamax nayar yanapt'añatak wakichatäpan, arunakamar taqi kunat sipan munasitax layku." 
Psalms119:174 Tatay, ¡nayarux qhispiyakitaya! ¡Yatichäwinakamampix kusisitätwa!" 
Psalms119:175 Jumar yupaychañatakiw jakañ munta; aski kankañamax yanapitpanaya. 
Psalms119:176 Chhaqhir ovejar uñtataw payinukta, ¡nayar thaqhirix jutakimaya, janiw kamachi arunakamat armaskti!" 
Psalms120:1 Llakisiñaxan Tatitur art'asta, jupasti ist'ituwa." 
Psalms120:2 Tatay, k'ari parlirinakat jark'aqita, k'arimp aynacht'ayir laxrat qhispiyita." 
Psalms120:3 K'ari jaqinaka, ¿kunarak katuqätasti?" 
Psalms120:4 ¡Nuwasirin ari mich'inakapa! ¡Nakhaskir retama nina sank'anaka! 
Psalms120:5 ¡Nayax kunakïktxa, Mésec chiqan jaya jaqjam apanukutätwa, Quedar chiqan chhujllan jakarakta!" 
Psalms120:6 Sumankañar uñisirinak taypin sinti jayapuniw jakta; 
Psalms120:7 ¡nayax sumankañat parlkta ukapachaxa, jupanakax ch'axwañat parlapxi!" 
Psalms121:1 Nayranakaxampiw qullunak uñatatta: “¿kawkitarak yanapasti nayatak jutani?” sasa. 
Psalms121:2 Yanapax Tatit Diosat nayatak jutani, alaxpach akapach lurir Diosata." 
Psalms121:3 ¡Janipuniw jupax tinkuñam munkaniti! ¡Janipuniw jumar uñjirix ikkaniti! 
Psalms121:4 Janiw jupax ikkisa, samart'kisa; Israel markar uñjirix janipuniw ikkiti." 
Psalms121:5 Tatituw juman imirimaxa; jupaw juman jak'amankaski. 
Psalms121:6 Urux janiw intix ñanqhachkätamti, arumas janirakiw phaxsix kamachkätamsa." 
Psalms121:7 Tatituw taqi jan walt'añanakat imasktam; jupaw jakañam imaski; 
Psalms121:8 Tatituw mistutamsa, mantatamsa uñjaskani, jichhürut wiñaykama." 
Psalms122:1 ¡“Tatitun utapar sarañäni” sirinakampix walpun kusista! 
Psalms122:2 Jerusalén marka, ¡niyaw punkunakamar purinipxta!" 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalén markax suma sayt'ayatawa, wawanakapan tantachasiñapataki." 
Psalms122:4 Ukaruw Tatitun ayllunakapax sutipar yupaychir makhatapxi, Israel markar satäkän ukarjama." 
Psalms122:5 Ukankiw chiqapar uñjañ utanakaxa, ukankiw David reyin taripäwi utanakapaxa." 
Psalms122:6 Jumanakax taqpach chuymamp sapxam: “¡Jerusalén, sumankañax juman utjpan; jumar munirinakax jan khitin kamsat jakasipxpan." 
Psalms122:7 Pirqanakam manqhan sumankañax utjpan, reyiman utanakapas jan kuna kamachkayäpan!” sasa." 
Psalms122:8 Jichhasti, jilanakax layku, mayni masinakax laykuw arsü: “Sumankañax jumampïpan." 
Psalms122:9 Tatitu Diosasan utap laykuw juman askimatak thaqhä” sasa. 
Psalms123:1 Tatay, juma tuqiruw uñtansma; juma, alaxpachan jakiriruw mayisinsma." 
Psalms123:2 Achikt'asiñ chuymampiw Tatit Diosaxarux uñtapxta, Tatitun khuyapayasiñap suyasa, uywatanakax uywiripat suyapki ukhama, uywat warmix uywiripat suyki ukhama."
