Psalms123:3 Khuyapayasipxita, Tatay, khuyapayasipxita, jisk'achat sarnaqañampi qarjatäxapxtwa." 
Psalms123:4 Qamirinakan larch'ukitax walipuniw t'aqhisipxta, jach'a jach'a tukurinakan jisk'achatapampis qaritäxapxtwa." 
Psalms124:1 Tatitutix jan yanapkistasapän ukaxa, ¿kunäsapänsa jiwasanakatxa? ¡Taqiniw Israel markan yattanxa!" 
Psalms124:2 Tatitutix jan yanapkistasapän ukaxa, kunapachatix chhukxatapkistän ukkhaxa," 
Psalms124:3 jakkirpach manq'antistasapäna, q'apisiñapan jiwasanakatak ninjam nakhatap layku." 
Psalms124:4 Ukapachax jawirat jilarir umjamaw q'al chhaqtayxistasapäna, ¡jawir umjamaw jiwasanak pat llumikipasapäna!" 
Psalms124:5 ¡Jupuqun q'añu umjamaw kawkikam puriyistasapäna! 
Psalms124:6 ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan, janiw jupax apanukkistuti, janirakiw laka ch'akhanakapampis t'uruntaykistuti!" 
Psalms124:7 Jamach'ir uñtataw jiwayirin sipitapat jakañ qhispiyasipxtan; sipitapax t'aqasiwayxiwa, jiwasanakasti jaltxapxtanwa." 
Psalms124:8 Yanapt'ax Tatitut juti, khititix alaxpacha akapach lurki uka Tatituta." 
Psalms125:1 Tatitur taqpach chuymamp katuyasirinakax jan unxtkayäpxiwa; Sión qullur uñtataw wiñayatak sayt'asipxi. 
Psalms125:2 Kamisatix qullunakax Jerusalenar muyuntkixa, ukhamaw Tatitux markapar muyunti jichhasa, wiñayan wiñayapasa." 
Psalms125:3 Ñanqha lurir munañan jaqinakax janiw wiñayatak Diosan markapar apnaqkaniti; aski jaqinakan ñanqha jan lurasipkañapataki. 
Psalms125:4 Tatay, aski jaqinakarux askinakay churam, q'uma chuyman jaqinakarux askinakampiy phuqhantam;" 
Psalms125:5 jan wali thakhinjam saririnakarusti, ñanqha luririnakampi chik aynacht'ayam. ¡Israel markansti samarañax utjpan!" 
Psalms126:1 Tatitux Babilonia markat Jerusalén markar kuttayanxistän ukapachaxa, samkäkaspas ukhamänwa." 
Psalms126:2 Larusiñampiw lakax atipjayasïna, kusisiñ q'uchunakampiw laxrax phuqhantasïna. Ukapachasti Diosar jan uñt'irinakax sapxänwa: “¡Tatitux jach'a luräwinak jupanakatakix luri!” sasa." 
Psalms126:3 Jïsa, Tatitux jach'a luräwinak lurarapistu, jiwasanakasti wali kusisitäpxäyätanwa." 
Psalms126:4 Tatay, wasitat kusisiñ kuttayxapxita, kunjämtix wasarar jawiranak kutt'aykta ukhama." 
Psalms126:5 Jacht'asis yapuchirinakax kusisiñampiw apthapipxani. 
Psalms126:6 Jacht'asis jatha phawirinakax jayllt'asisaw kutinxapxani, trigo yawitanakap marqt'ata." 
Psalms127:1 Tatitutix jan utachkaspaxa, inamayakiw utachirinakax ch'am tukusipkaspa; Tatitutix markar jan imkaspaxa, inamayakiw marka uñjirinakax uñch'ukisipkaspa." 
Psalms127:2 Willjtat sarnaqatanakax inamayawa, jayp'ukam irnaqatas inamayawa, jump'i apsutampi t'ant'a manq'atas inamayawa, Diosax munat wawanakapan ikiñanakapkam t'ant'a churki ukapachaxa." 
Psalms127:3 Yurirapkistu uka wawanakax, Tatitun aski churäwinakapawa." 
Psalms127:4 Waynäpktan ukapach yurirapkistu uka wawanakax nuwasirin amparapankir mich'inakar uñtatawa. 
Psalms127:5 ¡Walja wawan jaqinakax kusisiñaniwa! Janiw timanakapamp p'inqachat uñjaskaniti, taripirinakan nayraqatapan jikxataskani ukkhaxa." 
Psalms128:1 Tatitur axsartir jaqix kusisiñaniwa, Tatitur jaysir jaqix kusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms128:2 Jumatix jupanakat maynïstaxa, ch'ama tukutamatjam manq'asïta, kusisitaw utjasïta, taqi kunas walikiw sararapïtam." 
Psalms128:3 Uta manqhimansti, warmimax wali achur uva alir uñtatäniwa; wawanakamasti manq'añawjamar muyuntataxa, külltanir olivo alinakar uñtatäniwa." 
Psalms128:4 Tatitux jupar waqaychirirux askinak churani. 
Psalms128:5 ¡Tatitux Sión qullutpach askinak jumar churpan! ¡Taqpach jakäwimansti, Jerusalén markan qamirkipstatap uñjawayam!" 
Psalms128:6 ¡Allchhinakamar uñjañkam jakawayam! ¡Israel markansti sumankañax utjpan! 
Psalms129:1 Wayna kankañaxatpach ukataq t'aqhisiyapxitu, jichhax Israel markax sispan," 
Psalms129:2 wayna kankañaxatpach ukataq t'aqhisiyapxitu, ukampis janiw atipjapkituti." 
Psalms129:3 Jikhanixarux jawq'käwiw chhuxriñchapxitu, jach'a sukanakjam jawq'käwix jist'japxitu," 
Psalms129:4 Tatitusti chiqapar uñjasir kankañapanxa, ñanqha lurir jaqinakan amparapat qhispiyitu." 
Psalms129:5 ¡Sión markar uñisirinakax, q'ala p'inqachjat jaltxapxpan!" 
Psalms129:6 Uta patan alir qurjamäpxpan, janïr jik'inukkat wañsur qurjama." 
Psalms129:7 Trigo yawirin amparapan jan phuqt'ir qurjama, marqthapirin amparapar jan phuqt'ir qurjama;" 
Psalms129:8 janiw khitis jupanakarux siskiti: “Tatituy askinak jumanakar churpan” sasaxa. Nanakasti Tatitun sutiparuw jumanakarux jach'añchapxsma. 
Psalms130:1 Tatay, jach'a t'aqhisiñ taypitpach art'asinsma:" 
Psalms130:2 ¡Tatay, mayisitaxar ist'akimaya!, ¡achikt'asiñamp arnaqasitaxar jaysakimaya!" 
Psalms130:3 Dios Tatay, jumatix taqpach juchanak amxäsiskakismaxa, ¿khitirak nayraqataman sayt'aspasti?" 
Psalms130:4 Ukampis jumaw juchanakat pampachapxista, ukhamat jumar waqaychañataki." 
Psalms130:5 Taqpach ajayuxampiw Tatitur suyt'askta, taqpach chuymaxampiw arunakapar iyawsta." 
Psalms130:6 Nayax Tatituruw suyt'askta, qhanjtaniñap uñch'ukir jaqit juk'ampi. Kunjämtix marka uñjirinakax willjtaniñap uñch'ukixa," 
Psalms130:7 ukhamay Israel marka, Tatiturux suyt'am, khuyapayasiñasa, qhispiyasiñasa Tatitunak utji." 
Psalms130:8 ¡Jupaw Israel markarux taqi juchanakapat pampachani! 
Psalms131:1 Tatay chuymaxax janiw inampst'irïkiti, janirakiw nayranakaxas jach'a jach'a tukurïkiti, janiw muspharkañ jach'a yänakan qhipap sarkti, ukanakan jan nayatakjamätap layku." 
Psalms131:2 Ukatsipana amukïsktwa, janiw llakisiñaxax utjkiti, taykapan amparapankir jichha ñuñuqayat wawjama. ¡Jichha ñuñuqayat wawjamätwa!" 
Psalms131:3 Israel marka, Tatituruk suyt'am, jichhasa, wiñayan wiñayapasa." 
Psalms132:1 Tatay, Davidat amtasikimaya, llakinakapatsa amtasikimaya;" 
Psalms132:2 Jacobun taqi Ch'aman Tatitupa, taqpach chuymamp juramento luratapat amtasikimaya:" 
Psalms132:3 “Janiw utaxar mantkäti, janiw samart'añatakis ikintkäti," 
Psalms132:4 janiw nayranakax ch'irmthapkäti, janirakiw ikkäsa," 
Psalms132:5 Tatitutak mä chiqawja jikxatañkama, Jacobun taqi Ch'aman Diosapatak mä utjäwi jikxatañkama” sasa." 
Psalms132:6 Efrata chiqawjan arust'äwi arcat ist'apxta, Quiriat-jearim uraqin uk jikxatapxarakta." 
Psalms132:7 Ukat sapxta: ¡Tatitun qullan utapar mantapxañäni! ¡Jupan nayraqatapar killt'asipxañäni! sasa. 
Psalms132:8 Tatay, qullan arcamampiy sartasim, kawkharutix samarkäta uka qulluruy jutam." 
Psalms132:9 Sacerdotenakamax chiqa kankañ isimp isthapisipxpan, jumar iyawsirinakax kusisiñat art'asipxpan." 
Psalms132:10 David uywatamar munasitam laykux, janikiy ajllit reyimatakix mays uñtamti." 
Psalms132:11 Tatitux juramentompiw David reyirux arsüna, uka arsutapatsti janiw yaqha amtkaniti:" 
Psalms132:12 “Juman saraqirinakamat mayniruw reyi qunuñamar qunt'ayä. Wawanakamatix arust'äwi arunakaxar phuqhapxani, yatichäwi arunakaxar phuqhapxarakin ukaxa, wawanakaman wawanakapas wiñayaw reyi qunuñaman qunt'asipxani” sasa." 
Psalms132:13 Tatituw Jerusalenarux ajllisi, ukan jakañatakiw jupax chhijllasi, akham saraki:" 
Psalms132:14 “Akaw wiñayatak nayan utjäwixaxa; akawjan jakä, nayar kusisiyatap layku." 
Psalms132:15 Manq'añanakaparux askinakampiw phuqhantä, jan utjirin jaqinakaparusti manq'ampiw sisarayä." 
Psalms132:16 Sacerdotenakaparux qhispiyasiñ isimpiw isthapiyä, chiqa arkirinakaparusti kusisiñampiw art'asiyä." 
Psalms132:17 Ukawjan Davidan ch'amap wasitat sartayä. Ajllit reyixatakix mä qhana wakicharapï. 
Psalms132:18 Timanakaparusti p'inqa tukuñampiw phuqhantä, Davidarusti k'ajkir pillumpiw asxatä” sasa." 
Psalms133:1 Uñjapxam: ¡kunja munkayasa jilanak pura mä wawak suman jakasiñaxa! 
Psalms133:2 Ukax q'apkir qullar uñtatawa, sacerdotenakan p'iqipat llumiqasin sunkhap chiq saraqki, kunka isipkam purki ukhamawa." 
Psalms133:3 Hermón qullut saraqir sulla umjamawa, Sión qullxar purir umar uñtatarakiwa. Ukham suman jakirinakarux Tatitux jaya pacha jakañ churi." 
Psalms134:1 ¡Tatitun uywatanakapa! ¡Jupar jach'añchapxam, Tatitun utapan arum paqar suyirinaka, jupar jach'añchapxam!" 
Psalms134:2 ¡Qullan uta tuqir amparanakam luqtapxam, Tatiturusti jach'ar aptapxam!" 
Psalms134:3 Tatitux Sión qullutpachay jumarux askinak apayanpan, jupaw alaxpacha, akapacha, luririxa." 
Psalms135:1 ¡Tatitux jach'ar aptatäpan! Tatitun sutip jach'añchapxam; Tatitun uywatanakapa," 
Psalms135:2 Tatitun utapankirinaka, Diosasan uta anqäxapankirinaka, jupar yupaychapxam." 
Psalms135:3 Tatitur yupaychapxam, jupax munasiriwa; sutipar q'uchupxam, jupax khuyapayasiriwa." 
Psalms135:4 Jupaw Israelarux ajllisïna, jupan markapäñapatakiw ajllisïna." 
Psalms135:5 Tatitun muspharkayätap yatta, jupax taqi diosanakat sipan ch'amaniwa." 
Psalms135:6 Tatitux taqi kuntix munki uk luri, alaxpachansa, akapachansa, lamar qutansa, quta manqhansa." 
Psalms135:7 Uraq tukusitpach qinayanak sartayi, lliju llijunakampiw jallun purxatañap yatiyi, imatäki ukkhatpach thayanakarux antutnuku." 
Psalms135:8 Jupaw Egiptonkir jaqinakan jilïr yuqall wawanakaparux jiwarayäna, nayrïr uywa qallunakaruw jiwarayarakïna." 
Psalms135:9 Muspharkañ uñacht'äwinak Egipto markar apayanïna, faraón chachar uñacht'ayañataki, jilïr jaqinakapar uñacht'ayañataki." 
Psalms135:10 Walja markanakaruw jiwamp tukjäna; munañan reyinakaruw jiwarayäna: 
Psalms135:11 amorreo uraqinkir Sihón reyiru; Basán uraqinkir Og reyiru, Canaán uraqinkir taqpach reyinakaru;" 
Psalms135:12 khä reyinakan uraqinakapsti, Israel markaparuw katuyxäna." 
Psalms135:13 Tatay, sutimax wiñayawa; sutimax wiñayapuniw amtatäni." 
Psalms135:14 Tatituw markaparux chiqapar uñjaski; uywatanakapat khuyapt'ayasiraki. 
Psalms135:15 Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakan idolonakapax qurit qullqit luratakiwa, jaqin amparapampi luratakirakiwa." 
Psalms135:16 Lakanïkasinsa janiw parlapkiti; nayranïkasinsa janiw uñjapkiti; 
Psalms135:17 jinchunïkasinsa janiw ist'apkiti; janiw jakañ samananïpkisa. 
Psalms135:18 Uka diosanak luririnakax ukanakjamakïpxiwa, ukanakar alkatirinakas pachpakïpxarakiwa." 
Psalms135:19 Israelitanaka, Tatitur jach'añchapxam; sacerdotenaka, Tatitur jach'añchapxam;" 
Psalms135:20 levitanaka, Tatitur jach'añchapxam; Tatitur iyawsirinaka, jupar jach'añchapxam." 
Psalms135:21 ¡Tatitux Sión markan qullanäpan, Jerusalén markan jakir Tatitux jach'añchatäpan! ¡Tatitux jach'ar aptatäpan!" 
Psalms136:1 Tatitur yuspagarapxam, munasirïtap layku, munasiñapax wiñayawa," 
Psalms136:2 diosanakan Diosapar yuspagarapxam, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:3 Munañaninakan Munañanipar yuspagarapxam, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:4 Jach'a muspharkañanak luririru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:5 Yatiñ kankañampi alaxpach luririru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:6 Uma patxar uraq jant'akt'iriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:7 Intimpi phaxsimpi luririru, munasiñapax wiñayawa:" 
Psalms136:8 Urun qhanañapatak inti uchiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa;" 
Psalms136:9 arum qhanañapatak phaxsimpi, warawaranakamp luririru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:10 Egiptonkirinakan jilïr yuqall wawanakapar jiwarayiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:11 Israelitanakar Egiptot irpsuniriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa;" 
Psalms136:12 taqi ch'aman amparapamp irpsuniriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:13 Mar Rojo qutar payar jaljtayiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:14 Israel markar lamar quta taypinjam irpkatiriru: munasiñapax wiñayawa. 
Psalms136:15 Mar Rojo qutar Faraonan jaqinakapar jaquntiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:16 Wasar chiq markapar irpiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:17 Aytat reyinakar jiwarayiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:18 Munañan reyinakar jiwarayiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa:" 
Psalms136:19 Amorreo jaqinakan Sihón reyipar jiwayiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa;" 
Psalms136:20 Basán uraqinkir Og reyir jiwayiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:21 Reyinakan uraqinakap markapar katuyiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa," 
Psalms136:22 uywat Israel markapar tuti churxiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:23 Aynacht'añasan jiwasanakat amtasiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:24 T'aqhisiyirinakasat qhispiyiriru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:25 Jaqinakarusa, uywanakarus manq'añ chuririru, munasiñapax wiñayawa." 
Psalms136:26 ¡Alaxpachankir Diosar yuspagarapxam, munasiñapax wiñayawa!" 
Psalms137:1 Babilonia jawir lakanakan qunt'ataw Sión markat amtasisax jachapxäyätan. 
Psalms137:2 Ukawjan alir sauce quqanakaruw arpanakas warkt'asipxäyätan. 
Psalms137:3 Jiwasanakar katuntat anakirinakasti, ukawjan q'uchuñas munapxäna, jiwasanakat taqi kun aparirinakax, kusisiñampi q'uchupxañas munapxäna; ¡Sión markankir q'uchunakap q'uchuñasa!" 
Psalms137:4 ¡Yaqha markanakanxa, janipuniw Tatitun q'uchunakap q'uchupkiristti!" 
Psalms137:5 Jerusalén marka, jumat armasirisma ukaxa, kupi amparaxax q'al pharantitpan." 
Psalms137:6 Jerusalén marka, janitix jumat amtaskä, janitix juk'ampi jumat kusiskä ukapachaxa, laxraxax lakaxar lip'katpan." 
Psalms137:7 Tatay, Edom uraqinkir jaqinakan arsutap amtam, Jerusalén markax aynacht'kän ukürux sapxänwa: “T'unjapxam, taqpach tukjapxam” sasa." 
Psalms137:8 ¡Jumasti Babilonia marka, t'unjataw uñjasïta! ¡Nanakar jan walinak luratamat t'aqhisiykätam ukax kusisitäniwa!" 
Psalms137:9 ¡Wawanakamar katuntasin qarqanakar jisktasin jiwaraykani ukax kusisitäniwa! 
Psalms138:1 Tatay, taqi chuymampiw jumar yuspagaräma; angelanakan nayraqatapan jumatak q'uchurapïma." 
Psalms138:2 Qullan utam uñtataw killt'asï, munasiñamampita, chiqa kankañamampit yuspagarañataki, sutimarusa, arunakamarus taqi kunxaruw jilankaytaxa." 
Psalms138:3 Art'asinsma ukapachax ist'istawa, ch'am yapxatarakista." 
Psalms138:4 Tatay, arsutanakam ist'asinxa, akapachankir reyinakax jumaruw yuspagarapxätam." 
Psalms138:5 Tatitun thakhipan sumätap q'uchupxani, Tatitun k'ajkir kankañapan jach'ätap layku." 
Psalms138:6 Tatitux alaxpachankchi ukasa, llamp'u chuyman jaqirux uñtaniwa, jach'a jach'a tukur jaqirusti jayat uñt'i." 
Psalms138:7 Chijinakar purkta ukapachaxa, jumaw jakañaxar imtaxa; ch'amamampiw timanakaxan amparapat qhispiyistaxa." 
Psalms138:8 ¡Tatituw nayarux askinakamp phuqhantitani! Tatay, munasiñamax wiñayawa; amparamamp luratanakarux janikiy jaytanukumti." 
Psalms139:1 Tatay, jumaw uñakipista, ukat nayarux sum uñt'ista;" 
Psalms139:2 jumaw qunt'ataxsa, sartataxsa yattaxa; lup'itanakaxsti jayatpach amuytaxa." 
Psalms139:3 Jumaw sarnaqataxsa yattaxa, ¡taqpach luräwinakaxsa yattaxa!" 
Psalms139:4 Tatay, janïraw kuns arskti ukkhaw jumax taqpach yatxtaxa." 
Psalms139:5 Taqi tuqit nayar muyuntista; amparamampiw imxäsista. 
Psalms139:6 Ukataq yatiñ kankañamax atipjapunituwa; ¡sinti muspharkayawa, janiw amuyt'irjamäkti!" 
Psalms139:7 Ajayum jak'atsti ¿kawkirurak sarästi? nayraqatamatsti ¿kawkirurak jaltästi? 
Psalms139:8 Alaxpacharutix makhatiristxa, jumax ukanktawa; uraq manqharutix mantiristxa, jumax ukankaraktawa;" 
Psalms139:9 inti jalsu tuqirutix thuqtawayiristxa, jan ukax lamar quta tukuskamas puriristxa," 
Psalms139:10 ch'iqa amparamax ukan jikxatitaspa; ¡kupi amparamasti janiw antutkitaspati! 
Psalms139:11 Ch'amakamp imxatayasiñtix amtiristxa, jan ukax, qhana urun ch'amak arumar tukuñaptix muniristxa," 
Psalms139:12 ch'amakax janiw jumat imantkitaspati, arum ch'amakax urut sipan juk'amp qhanäspawa. ¡Ch'amakasa, qhanasa, jumatakix pachpakiwa!" 
Psalms139:13 Jumaw nayarux irnuqasista; taykaxan purakapan utjayasista. 
Psalms139:14 Muspharkañ nayatak luratamat jumaruw yuspagarsma. ¡Uksti sumpun yatista! 
Psalms139:15 Janchixan jiltatapax juman uñjatänwa, jan khitin uñjkat irnuqatäkäyät ukchañkama, uraq manqhan utjayatäkäyät ukchañkama." 
Psalms139:16 Nayranakamax janchixan lurasitap uñjäna; taqi ukanakasti qillqatamar qillqantatänwa. Jakañ urunakaxax suma jakhutänwa, nayrïr uru janïr purinkipana." 
Psalms139:17 Diosaxay, juman amtatanakamax jan amuykayawa; ¡ukanakax jan tukuskiriwa!" 
Psalms139:18 Ukanaktix jakht'añ muniristxa, ch'allat sipan juk'ampïspawa; jakhuñ tukuyirista ukasa, jumamp chikakïskiristwa." 
Psalms139:19 Diosaxay, ñanqha luririnakarux tukusiyamaya, jaqi jiwayirinakarusti nayat jithiqtayam," 
Psalms139:20 jumxat jan wal parlir jaqinakat jithiqtayita, jumar jan walt'ayir jaqinakat jark'aqita." 
Psalms139:21 Tatay, jumar uñisirirux uñisiraktwa; jumar qallasirirusti jisk'acharaktwa." 
Psalms139:22 ¡Taqpach chuymaxampiw jupanakar uñista! ¡Uñisirixat jupanakarux uñt'ta! 
Psalms139:23 Diosay, uñakipitaya, chuymaxar uñantam; nayarux yant'itaya, lup'itanakax uñt'arakim;" 
Psalms139:24 nayatix ñanqha thakhin sarnaqirïstxa, chiqa thakhinjamay irpasita." 
Psalms140:1 Tatay, ñanqha lurir jaqit qhispiyita, qhuru jaqit imita," 
Psalms140:2 jan wali lurañanak chuymapan amtapxi, sapüruw nuwasiñanak utjayapxi." 
Psalms140:3 Laxrapax asirun laxrapjam wakichatawa; arunakapasti katarin jiwayir mich'ipjamawa. 
Psalms140:4 Tatay, ñanqha lurir jaqit arxatita, qhuru jaqinakat imita, tinkuñaxatak sipitanak wakichirinakat jark'aqita." 
Psalms140:5 Khä jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakax sipitanak wakicharapipxitu; ñanqha luririnakax qänanak jant'akt'arapipxitu, sarañaxarusti sipitanak uchantarapipxitu." 
Psalms140:6 Nayasti Tatiturux sistwa: “Jumaw Diosaxätaxa; ¡Tatay, jach'at mayisitaxarux ist'akimaya!" 
Psalms140:7 Tatay, taqi ch'aman qhispiyirixay, jumaw nuwasïwin p'iqixar imasktaxa” sasa." 
Psalms140:8 Tatay, janikiy ñanqha luririn munataparux jaysamti; janikiy amtäwinakapan sum sarantañap munamti. Nayar uñisirinakax p'iqinakap waytapxi; ¡ñanqhachatanakapax jupanak kipkar kutxatpan!" 
Psalms140:9  
Psalms140:10 Nina sank'a k'illiminak jupanakxarux jalxatpan; phuch'u p'iyanakar wiñayatak jaquntatäpxpan. 
Psalms140:11 K'ari jaqix uraqin jan jakpati, qhuru jaqirusti chijix arktasin jiwaypan." 
Psalms140:12 Llakit jaqir Tatitun chiqapar uñjatap yatta, t'aqhisiyat jaqir arxatatap yatirakta." 
Psalms140:13 Aski jaqinakax sutim jach'ar aptapxani; ¡chiqap jakir jaqinakasti nayraqataman jakapxani! 
Psalms141:1 Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, ¡jank'akiy jutam!, ¡art'asinsma ukapachax ist'akitaya!" 
Psalms141:2 Mayisitaxax incienso q'aphir uñtat nayraqatamar makhatanpan, luqatatat amparanakaxasti, jayp'u luqtäwjamäpan." 
Psalms141:3 Tatay, janiy kuna jan wali parlañanaksa arsuyistati." 
Psalms141:4 Ñanqha lup'iñ amuy apaqt'ita; ñanqha lurañanak jan lurayistati, janirak ñanqha lurir jaqinakan manq'äwipan chikachasiyistati." 
Psalms141:5 Aski jaqix mutuyitpan, suma jaqix tuqinuqitpan, ukanak katuqañatakix janiw jaltkäti; mutuykatpachas Tatitut mayisiskakïwa." 
Psalms141:6 Ñanqha luririnakan jilïrinakapax qarqanakat nukt'atäpxaniwa, arunakaxan askïtap uñjapxani." 
Psalms141:7 Ch'akhanakapax amay imäwi jak'an willitatatäniwa, uraq sukachsutax jist'artki ukar uñtatäniwa." 
Psalms141:8 Tatay, nayranakaxax jumaruw uñtantam, jumaruw imantasiñatak makhatansma, janikiy apanukustati." 
Psalms141:9 Jalantañaxatak uchat sipitat qhispiyita, ñanqha luririnakan sipitapat jark'aqita." 
Psalms141:10 Ñanqha luririnakax pachpa sipitanakapar jalantapxpan, nayasti ukchañkamax nayraqatar sarantaskakïwa." 
Psalms142:1 Tatiturux wali jach'at art'asta, khuyapayasiñ jach'at mayista." 
Psalms142:2 Jupan nayraqatapan llakinakax arsusta, nayraqatapan llakixat yatiyasta," 
Psalms142:3 kunapachatix aynacht'at jikxataskta ukkha. Tatay, jumaw sarnaqäwix yattaxa: thakhixarux mä sipit uchantapxi." 
Psalms142:4 Kupi tuqiruw uñtasta, janiw khitis yanapt'ir jutkituti. ¡Janiw khitis arxatkituti! ¡Janiw khitis nayat llakirix utjkiti!" 
Psalms142:5 Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, jumaruw saraksma: “Jumätaw nayan imantasiñaxaxa; jumakiw aka jakañ uraqin taqi kunaxätasa” sasa." 
Psalms142:6 Arnaqasitanakaxarux ist'akimaya, ch'ama thayjtataw uñjasta. Nayar arknaqirinakat qhispiyita, jupanakax nayat sipan juk'amp ch'amanïpxiwa." 
Psalms142:7 Aka t'aqhisiñ jakañat qhispiyita, jumar yupaychañatak wayst'asita. Aski jaqinakax kusisipxaniwa, khuyapayasiñamp nayar uñjatamata." 
Psalms143:1 Tatay, mayisitaxarux ist'akimaya; achikt'asitaxarux jaysakimaya. ¡Jumax chiqapästaxaya, ist'akitaya!" 
Psalms143:2 Janikiy uywatamarux juchañchamti, nayraqataman janiw khitis askïkiti." 
Psalms143:3 Timasirinakaxax jiwayañatakiw arknaqitu, uraqiruw taksupxitu; ch'amak taypin jakayañ munapxitu, jiwatarjamaw uñjañ munapxitu." 
Psalms143:4 Ajayuxax q'ala aynacht'atawa; chuymaxax llakimp tukusitawa. 
Psalms143:5 Nayra pachanakat amtasta, taqpach luräwinakamat lup'ta." 
Psalms143:6 Juma tuqiruw amparanakax luqtansma, waña uraqir uñtataw jumatjam pharjayasta." 
Psalms143:7 Tatay, ¡mayisitaxarux jank'akiy ist'am, samanaxax tukstañampïskiwa! Janikiy nayatak maysa uñtamti, jan ukax jiwatar uñtatïristwa." 
Psalms143:8 Willjtanakax munasiñamat ist'ayita, taqi chuymamp jumar iyawsatax layku. Sarañaxäki uka thakhi uñachayita, kuntix nayax munkta uk mayisinsma." 
Psalms143:9 Tatay, nayamp timasirixat qhispiyita, jumaruw imantasiñatak thaqsma." 
Psalms143:10 Munañam lurañ yatichita, nayan Diosaxätam layku. Munasir ajayumax chiqa thakhinjamay irpitpan." 
Psalms143:11 Tatay, sutim laykuy jakayasita, khuyapayasirïtam laykuy llakisiñat wayst'ita." 
Psalms143:12 Chiqätam laykuy timasirinakaxar t'unjam, ¡taqpach uñisirinakaxar tukusiyam, nayax juman arkirimästxaya!" 
Psalms144:1 ¡Nayar arxatir Tatitux qullanäpan! Jupaw ch'axwañatak wakicht'itu; 
Psalms144:2 jupaw nayan aski luririxaxa, arxatirixasa, jupaw jach'a imantasiñaxaxa, qhispiyirixasa; jupaw jark'aqasiñaxasa, ukampiw imt'asta; juparakiw markanakar nayamp apnaqayirisa." 
Psalms144:3 Tatay, ¿kunarak jaqisti, jupat amtasiñamatakisti? ¿Kunarak jaqinakasti, jupanakar munasiñamatakisti?" 
Psalms144:4 Jaqix mä samsumpi sasikiwa, jakañapax chhaqtir ch'iwjamakiwa." 
Psalms144:5 Tatay, alaxpacham jist'aram, saraqanirakim; jiwq'i mistuyapxañapatak qullunakar llamkt'am;" 
Psalms144:6 llixu llixurux antutnukunim, uñisirinakamarusti chhukhutatayam." 
Psalms144:7 Alaxpachatpach amparam luqtanim, lamar quta umanakat qhispiyita; yaqha markankir jaqinakan amparapat qhispiyita," 
Psalms144:8 khitinakatix k'ari arunak parlapki, kupi amparap aytas k'ari juramento lurapki ukanakata." 
Psalms144:9 Tatay, machaq q'uchu q'uchurapïma, arpamp chikaw q'uchurapïma." 
Psalms144:10 Jumaw reyinakar atipjaytaxa; jumarakiw David luqtirimar qhispiytaxa, jiwayir espadat arxatita; yaqha markankir jaqinakan amparapat qhispiyita, khitinakatix k'ari arunak parlapki, kupi amparap aytas k'ari juramento lurapki ukanakata." 
Psalms144:11  
Psalms144:12 Yuqall wawanakaxax alinak taypinjam jiltapxi; imill wawanakaxasti reyin utapar thurxäsir qalanakar uñtatäpxiwa. 
Psalms144:13 Pirwanakaxax phuqhantatawa, kunayman manq'añanakampi phuqhantatawa. Uywanakaxax walipuniw miranti, uraqixan waranq waranqa tamanakaw mirantaraki." 
Psalms144:14 Vacanakaxax wallq'ikamakiwa, janiw sulluririnakax utjkiti. Janirakiw thakhinakaxan warariyasiñanakas utjkiti." 
Psalms144:15 Ukham phuqt'at markax kusisiñan markawa, Tatitut Diosanïki uka markax kusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms145:1 Diosaxay, Reyixay, jach'aruw aptäma, wiñayaw sutim jach'añchä." 
Psalms145:2 Sapüruw jach'añchäma; wiñayaw yupaychäma. 
Psalms145:3 Tatitux jach'apuniwa, jach'ar aptatäñapax wakisiwa; jach'a kankañapax jan amuyt'kayawa." 
Psalms145:4 Jaqinakax wawanakapan wawanakapkamaw luratanakam aytani, muspharkañ luratanakam yatiyapxani." 
Psalms145:5 Muspharkañ qhapaq kankañamat jupanakarux yatiyasini, nayasti muspharkañ luratanakamat parlarakï." 
Psalms145:6 Axsarkay ch'aman luratanakamat yatiyasini, nayasti jach'a luräwinakamat parlarakï." 
Psalms145:7 Jach'a munasiñamat amtasaw yatiyapxani, juman aski kankañamat jach'at jallallapxani." 
Psalms145:8 Tatitux suma jaqiwa, khuyapayirirakiwa, q'apisiñapax k'achakiwa, munasiñapasti jilarkiriwa." 
Psalms145:9 Tatitux taqinir munasiriwa, luratanakaparux munasiñampiw uñji." 
Psalms145:10 ¡Tatay, luratanakamax taqpachapun jumar jach'añchpan! ¡Iyawsirinakamax jumar jach'añchapxpan!" 
Psalms145:11 ¡Aytat qullan sarayäwimat yatiyapxpan! ¡Jach'a luräwinakamat parlapxpan! 
Psalms145:12 ¡Muspharkañ ch'amamat jaqinakar yatiyaspan, aytkay qhapaq sarayäwimat parlasirakpan!" 
Psalms145:13 Qhapaq markamax wiñay qhapaq markawa, qhapaq apnaqäwimax wiñay apnaqäwirakiwa, Tatitux arsutanakap phuqhiriwa, taqi luräwinakapan munasiñaniwa." 
Psalms145:14 Tatituw tinkurinakarux katxäsiski, qaritanakarusti ch'amañcharaki." 
Psalms145:15 Taqinin nayranakapaw jumarux uñch'ukisipktam, jumaw wakisitarjam manq'añ jupanakar churtaxa." 
Psalms145:16 Jumaw amparam luqatattaxa, taqi jakirinakarusti askinak jilarkir churtaxa." 
Psalms145:17 Tatitux taqi sarnaqäwipan chiqap uñjiriwa, taqi luräwinakapan munasiñaniwa." 
Psalms145:18 Tatitux art'asirinakapan jak'apankaskiwa, chiqpach chuymamp jupat art'asirinakan jak'apankiwa." 
Psalms145:19 Jupar arkirinakan munataparjamaw phuqhi; arnaqasitanakap ist'i, qhispiyaraki." 
Psalms145:20 Tatitux jupar munirinakarux imiwa, ñanqha luririnakarusti t'unjiwa." 
Psalms145:21 ¡Lakaxax Tatitur yupaychpan! ¡Taqpach jakirinakax qullan sutip jach'añchpan, jichhasa, wiñayan wiñayapataki." 
Psalms146:1 ¡Tatitux jach'ar aptatäpan! Taqpach chuymaxampiw Tatitur yupaychä. 
Psalms146:2 Jakañaxkamax Tatituruw yupaychä; jupatakiw q'uchunak q'uchurakï. 
Psalms146:3 Jilïr jaqinakarux jan alkatapxamti, jiwir jaqïpxatap laykux janiw qhispiyapkaspati," 
Psalms146:4 jiwxapxi ukapachaxa, laq'aruw tukxapxi, ukürpachaw amtatanakapax tukusxi." 
Psalms146:5 Jacobun Diosapan yanapat jaqix kusisiñaniwa, Tatitu Diosapar suyt'irix kusisiñaniwa." 
Psalms146:6 Jupaw alaxpacha, akapach luri, lamar qutarusa, taqi ukan utjirinakarusa. Jupax arsutap phuqhapuniwa." 
Psalms146:7 T'aqhisiyat jaqinakaruw chiqapar uñji, manq'at awtjatanakaruw manq'añ churaraki. Tatituw katuntat jaqinakarux antutnukuyi;" 
Psalms146:8 Tatituw juykhunakarux uñjayi; Tatituw tinkur jaqinakarux wayti; Tatituw aski jaqinakarux munasi; 
Psalms146:9 Tatituw yaqha markankir jaqinakarux imi, wajchanakampiru, ijma warminakampiruw uywi, ñanqha lurir jaqinakatakisti thakhip chhaqtayi." 
Psalms146:10 Tatitux wiñayapuniw apnaqani; Sión marka, Diosamax wiñayan wiñayapaw apnaqani. ¡Tatitux jach'ar aptatäpan!" 
Psalms147:1 ¡Tatitur yupaychapxañäni! ¡Diosasar q'uchuñax kusiskañawa! ¡Jupar suma q'uchunakampi yupaychañaw wakisi! 
Psalms147:2 Tatituw Jerusalenarux wasitat sayt'ayi, Israel markat ananukutanakarusti tantachthapiraki." 
Psalms147:3 Jupaw chuyma usuchjatanakarux waliptayi, chhuxrinakapsa k'umaracharaki." 
Psalms147:4 Jupaw warawaranak jakht'i, sapa mayarusti suti ucharaki." 
Psalms147:5 Diosasax jach'a ch'amanipuniwa, yatiñ kankañapax jan tukuskiriwa." 
Psalms147:6 Tatituw llamp'u chuymaninakarux jach'ar apti, ñanqha luririnakarusti, q'al aynacht'ayi." 
Psalms147:7 Yuspagarañamp Tatitur q'uchupxam; Diosasatakix arpampi chik q'uchupxam. 
Psalms147:8 Jupaw alaxpacharux qinayanakamp phuqhanti, uraqitak jallu wakichi, ch'umi manqhanakan quranak ch'uxñaptayi," 
Psalms147:9 jupaw uywanakarux manq'añ churi, juparakiw allqamarin chhiwlinakaparux wararipki ukapachax manq'añ churi." 
Psalms147:10 Janiw caballonakan ch'amapax Tatitur kusisiykiti, janirakiw jaqin ch'amapas kusisiykiti;" 
Psalms147:11 jupar iyawsirinakaw kusisiyi, munasiñapar iyawsirinakaw kusisiyi." 
Psalms147:12 Jerusalén marka, Tatitur yupaycham; Sión marka, Diosamar jach'añcham." 
Psalms147:13 Jupaw punkunakaman jist'añanakap thuruñchi, wawanakamarusti marka taypin jach'añchi." 
Psalms147:14 Tatituw uraqimarux sumankañ uchi, jilarkir suma trigompiw sist'aytam." 
Psalms147:15 Jupaw arunakap uraqir apayani, arunakapasti jank'akiw yatiyasi." 
Psalms147:16 Jupaw khunurux t'awrar uñtat apayani, arum sullanakarusti laq'ar uñtat willtaraki." 
Psalms147:17 Jupaw chhullunkhayarux chhijchhir uñtat apayani; umasti thayampiw chhullunkhayar tuku. 
Psalms147:18 Jupax mä aruk arsu, ukampikiw chullurayi; thayampiw phust'ayi, ukat umax jaltaraki." 
Psalms147:19 Tatituw Jacoburux arunakap yatiyi, Israel markarusti kamachinakap churaraki." 
Psalms147:20 Janiw kawkïr markampis ukham lurkänti, uka markanakax janipuniw arsutanakap uñt'apkänti. ¡Tatitur yupaychapxañäni!" 
Psalms148:1 ¡Tatitur yupaychapxañäni! ¡Tatiturux alaxpachatpach jach'añchapxpan! ¡Tatiturux alaxatpach yupaychapxpan! 
Psalms148:2 ¡Tatitun angelanakapa, jupar jach'añchapxam! ¡Taqpach tamanakapa, Tatitur yupaychapxam!" 
Psalms148:3 ¡Inti, phaxsi, k'ajkir warawaranaka, Tatitur yupaychapxam!" 
Psalms148:4 ¡Alaxpacha, Tatitur jach'añcham, alaxpachankir umanaka, Tatitur yupaychapxam!" 
Psalms148:5 Tatitun sutip jach'ar aptapxam, arupampi arsusakiw taqi kun utjayäna;" 
Psalms148:6 jupaw wiñayatak taqi kun utt'ayäna, jan tukuskir kamachi aru ucharakïna." 
Psalms148:7 ¡Tatiturux uraqitpach yupaychapxam, lamar quta, axsarkañ animalanaka!" 
Psalms148:8 ¡Tatitur jach'añchapxam, q'ixu q'ixu, chhijchhi, khunu, urpu! ¡Arunakap jaysir jach'a thaya!" 
Psalms148:9 ¡Yupaychapxam, jach'a qullunaka, jisk'a qullunaka! ¡Achu churir quqanaka, cedro quqanaka!" 
Psalms148:10 ¡Animalanaka, uta uywanaka! ¡Uraqinjam qatatnaqtir animalanaka, thuqnaqir jamach'inaka!" 
Psalms148:11 ¡Tatitur jach'añchapxam, akapachankir reyinaka! ¡Taqpach jilïrinaka, akapach apnaqirinaka!" 
Psalms148:12 ¡Chachanaka, warminaka, waynanaka, ch'ama qaritanaka! ¡Tatitur yupaychapxam!" 
Psalms148:13 ¡Tatitun sutip jach'ar aptapxam, sutipakiw muspharkañaxa! ¡Jach'a kankañapax alaxpachatsa, uraqitsa jilankiwa!" 
Psalms148:14 ¡Jupaw markaparux ch'amañchi! ¡Jupar iyawsirinakapax yupaychañäni, jupan ajllit Israel markapätanwa! ¡Tatitur yupaychapxañäni!" 
Psalms149:1 ¡Tatitux jach'ar aptatäpan! Tatiturux machaq q'uchu q'uchupxam; iyawsirinakap taypin yupaychapxam. 
Psalms149:2 Israel markax utjayiripat kusispan, Sión markan wawanakapax Reyipat kusisipxpan." 
Psalms149:3 Thuqhuñanakampi sutiparux jach'añchapxam, arpanakampi, chhullu chhullunakampi q'uchupxam." 
Psalms149:4 Tatitux markapampix kusisiwa; llamp'u chuyman jaqinakarux atipt'ayiwa. 
Psalms149:5 Aski jaqinakax atipt'atapat kusisipxpan, ikkasas kusisiñat q'uchupxpan." 
Psalms149:6 Lakanakapan Diosar yupaychañax utjpan, amparanakapansti purapar arin espada ayt'atäpxpan;" 
Psalms149:7 Diosar jan uñt'irinakar ukhamat ukham apsusiñataki, jach'a markanakar mutuyañataki," 
Psalms149:8 reyinakar ñach'antañataki, munañaninakarus cadenanakamp ñach'antañataki," 
Psalms149:9 Tatitun arsutapax jupanakamp phuqhasiñapataki. ¡Ukax taqpach iyawsirinakapar jach'ar aptirïniwa! ¡Tatitux jach'añchatäpan! 
Psalms150:1 ¡Tatitux jach'ar aptatäpan! ¡Diosarux qullan utapan yupaychapxam! ¡Muspharkañ alaxpachan jach'añchapxam! 
Psalms150:2 ¡Wali muspharkañ luratanakapat yupaychapxam! ¡Muspharkañ jach'a kankañapat yupaychapxam! 
Psalms150:3 ¡Trompeta phust'añanakamp jach'añchapxam! ¡Arpanakampi, salterionakamp yupaychapxam!" 
Psalms150:4 Chhullu chhullunakamp thuqt'asis yupaychapxam! ¡Pinkillunakampi, mandolinanakamp jach'ar aptapxam!" 
Psalms150:5 ¡Wali kunkayir platillonakampi yupaychapxam! ¡Jach'at chhulluqir platillonakamp jach'ar aptapxam! 
Psalms150:6 ¡Taqpach jakirinakax Tatitur yupaychapxpan! ¡Tatitux jach'ar aptatäpan! 
Proverbs1:1 Salomonan arsüwinakapa. Jupax Davidan yuqapänwa, Israelan reyiparakïnwa." 
Proverbs1:2 Aka säwinakasti: Yatiñ kankañampi, yatichäwinakamp yatiyañatakiwa, yatiñan phuqt'at arunaka amuyt'äwir yanapt'añataki," 
Proverbs1:3 yatichäwinaka, ch'ikhi kankañ yatichañataki; aski luräwimpi, chiqa kankañan sarnaqañamp jikxatañataki;" 
Proverbs1:4 jan yatiñan waynanakar ch'ikhi kankañ yatichañataki, yatiñampi, amuyt'asiñampi churañatakiraki." 
Proverbs1:5 Yatiñani ch'ikhi jaqixa, aka arunak ist'iwa, ukhamat juk'amp yatiñ kankañampi, ixwanakamp jikxati," 
Proverbs1:6 yatiñan jaqinakan säwi arunakap jupan amuyt'añapataki, parlatanakapa, uñtasïwi arunakapa, jamusitanakap amuyt'añapataki." 
Proverbs1:7 Yatiñ kankañan qalltapax Tatitur axsartañawa; pisi amuyt'an jaqinakasti yatiñarusa, yatichäwirus jisk'achapxiwa." 
Proverbs1:8 Wawaxay, awkiman yatichäwinakap ist'am, janikiy taykaman yatichäwinakap jisk'achamti." 
Proverbs1:9 Uka yatichäwinakapasti p'iqimatakix mä suma pillur uñtatäniwa, kunkaman mä suma wallqar uñtatarakïniwa." 
Proverbs1:10 Wawaxay, jucharar jaqinakatix pantjayañ munapxätam ukaxa, ¡jumax jan ist'amti!" 
Proverbs1:11 Inas sapxchïtam: “Jutam, nanakamp chik saraskam, munañasar mä sipit wakichañäni, uka chiq sarakipaskir aski jaqir jiwayañataki." 
Proverbs1:12 Aski jaqinakar jakkirpach manq'antañäni, jiwax amay imäwir mantirinakar manq'antki ukhama." 
Proverbs1:13 Kunayman qamir yänak jikxatañäni, ¡lunthatat yänakampiw utasar phuqhantañäni!" 
Proverbs1:14 Jutam, nanakampïxam, jikxatkañän ukanakxa taqiniw jaljasiñäni” sasa." 
Proverbs1:15 ¡Ukampis, wawaxay, jupanakan ukarux jan saramti! Jupanakan jan wali sarnaqäwinakapat jithiqtam." 
Proverbs1:16 Jupanakax jank'akiw ñanqha lurañ munapxi; ¡masinakaparus jank'akiw jiwayañ munapxaraki! 
Proverbs1:17 Jamach'inakan uñjatax inamayaw sipitax uchatäski," 
Proverbs1:18 uka jaqinakax jupanak pachpatakiw sipita wakichasipxi, jakañanakapxa jan walt'añanakaruw puriyapxi." 
Proverbs1:19 Taqi kun muniri jaqinakan sarnaqäwipax ukham tukuyi: pachpa inampst'añ chuymapaw jiwayi. 
Proverbs1:20 Yatiñ kankañax anqanakan arnaqasiski; thakhinakan arup ist'asiyaski; 
Proverbs1:21 markar mantañ punkunakan arunakap yatiyaski; markan tantachasïwip chiqanakan akham saski: 
Proverbs1:22 “Jan yatiñani, sawkasiri, pisi amuyt'an waynanaka, ¿kunapachkamarak pisi amuyt'añan sarnaqapxäta, sawkasiñanakaman kusisiñ jikxatasa, kunapachkamarak yatiñ kankañar jisk'achasipkakïtasti?" 
Proverbs1:23 Nayan iwxa arunakaxar ist'apxita, nayaw ajayuxamp phuqt'apxäma, amtäwinakax yatiyapxarakïma." 
Proverbs1:24 Nayaw jumanakar jawsapxsma, ukampis jumanakax janiw ist'añ munapkistati." 
Proverbs1:25 Jan ukasti, suma iwxa arunakaxarux janiw jaysapkistati, nayan chiqachäwinakax katuqañsa janiw munapktati." 
Proverbs1:26 ¡Chijix puripkätam ukkhasti, nayax larusirakïwa! ¡Axsarañax katuntapkätam ukkhasti, nayax sawkasirakïwa" 
Proverbs1:27 axsarañanakampi, jan walt'añanakamp jumanakxar jutapkätam ukapacha, llakisiñanakasa, ayquñanakasa taqi kuns tukjir jach'a tutukjam jumanakatak jutkani ukapacha!" 
Proverbs1:28 “Uka urukiw jumanakax jawsapxitäta, ukampis nayax janiw ist'apkämati; thaqhapxitätawa, ukampis janiw jikxatapkitätati," 
Proverbs1:29 jumanakan yatiñ kankañar jisk'achapxatamata, Tatitur jan axsarapxatamata." 
Proverbs1:30 Jumanakax janiw suma iwxa arunakax katuqañ munapktati; chiqachäwi arunakaxarus jisk'achapxtawa. 
Proverbs1:31 ¡Jan wali sarnaqatanakamat t'aqhisipxäta! Ñanqha amtatanakamampiw amjayasipxäta. 
Proverbs1:32 Jan yatiñan jaqinakarux jan yatitanakapaw tukji, pisi amuyt'an jaqinakarusti jan amuyt'asitanakapaw aynacht'ayi;" 
Proverbs1:33 ukampis nayar ist'irixa, sumankañan jakasini, janiw kuna ñanqharus axsarkaniti.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Munat wawaxay, jumatix arunakax katuqitäta; kamachi arunakaxsa imäta," 
Proverbs2:2 yatiñ kankañarus ist'äta; taqi chuymampi ch'ikhi kankañar alkatarakïta; 
Proverbs2:3 jumatix ch'ikhi kankaña mayïta amuyt'añ kankañsa mayirakïta; 
Proverbs2:4 qullqirjama, jila alan imat yänakarjam thaqhäta," 
Proverbs2:5 ukapachaw Tatitur axsartañ yatïta; ¡kunäkitix Diosar uñt'añax uk jikxatarakïta! 
Proverbs2:6 Tatituw yatiñ kankañ churirixa; amuyt'añampi, yatiñ kankañampix lakapat mistu." 
Proverbs2:7 Tatituw chiqa aski, jan pantjasis sarnaqir jaqirux yanapi, arxataraki." 
Proverbs2:8 Jupaw chiqap sarnaqir jaqirux uñji, taqi chuyma jupar iyawsirirux imaraki." 
Proverbs2:9 Ukapachaw yatirakïta chiqäki, askïki uksa, ukat amuyt'arakïta taqi askin sarnaqañapun sumätapa." 
Proverbs2:10 Yatiñ kankañax chuymamaruw mantani, ukatsti yatiñ kankañan muxsätap yant'äta." 
Proverbs2:11 Amuyt'a kankañaw uñjaskätam, ch'ikhi kankañaw imaskätam." 
Proverbs2:12 Yatiñ kankañaw jan wali thakhit qhispiyätam, ñanqha arunak parlir jaqinakat jithiqtayätam;" 
Proverbs2:13 aski thakhit saraqirinakata, ch'amak thakhin sarnaqirinakata;" 
Proverbs2:14 jan walinak luras kusisirinakata, ñanqha luratanakapat k'uchirt'asirinakata," 
Proverbs2:15 q'iwi q'iwi thakhinakan sarnaqirinakata; chiqa thakhit maysar saranukurinakat jithiqtayätam. 
Proverbs2:16 Yatiñ kankañaw jan wali warmit qhispiyätam, quña arunakampi iyawsayir jan uñt'at warmit jithiqtayätam." 
Proverbs2:17 Tawaqu kankañan sarnaqki uka chachar apanukuri warmita, Diosampi arust'äwi luratapat armasirit jithiqtayätam." 
Proverbs2:18 Uka warmin utapar sarir thakhinjam sarañasti, jiwañar puriyir thakhiwa;" 
Proverbs2:19 uka warmimp sarnaqirinakax janiw kuttankxapxiti, janipuniw wasitatamp suma jakañ thakhir kuttankxapxiti." 
Proverbs2:20 Jumasti suma thakhinjam sarnaqam, aski chiqa jaqinakan sarnaqäwiparjam sarnaqarakim." 
Proverbs2:21 Aski lurir q'uma jaqinakax, wiñayatakiw aka uraqin jakani." 
Proverbs2:22 Ukampis jan wali sarnaqir jaqinakampi, sallqa jaqinakampix, aka uraqit jaqunukuta, apanukutaw uñjasini." 
Proverbs3:1 Munat wawaxay, janiy yatichäwinakaxat armasimti; kamachi arsutanakax chuymamarupun imam," 
Proverbs3:2 uk lurasasti jaya maranakaw jakasïta, kusisitaw sarnaqasirakïta." 
Proverbs3:3 Janipun kunapachas armasimti munasiñampita, chiqa kankañampita; mä wallqar uñtat kunkamar ukanak warkuntasim. Chuymamar ukanak sum imasirakim," 
Proverbs3:4 ukhamat khuyapayasiñampi, sumar uñjatäñamp jikxatäta Diosan nayraqatapansa, jaqinak taypinsa." 
Proverbs3:5 Tatitur taqi chuymamamp katuyasim; janiy juman ch'ikhi kankañamaruk alkatamti. 
Proverbs3:6 Taqi luräwinakaman Tatitut amtasipunim, jupaw chiqa thakhinjam irpaskätam." 
Proverbs3:7 Janiy sinti yatiñanjam tukumti; Tatitur axsartam, taqi ñanqhat jithiqtam," 
Proverbs3:8 ¡ukaw janchimar ch'amañchir suma qullaxa! 
Proverbs3:9 Taqi yänakamamp Tatitur jach'añcham, yapu apthapitamat nayrïr achunak churañampirak waqaycham;" 
Proverbs3:10 ukhamat pirwanakamas phuqhantat uñjasini, vino imañanakamas llumiraskarakini." 
Proverbs3:11 Munat wawaxay, janiy Tatitun yatichäwip jisk'achamti, janirakiy jumar chiqachatapatsa mayjt'asimti;" 
Proverbs3:12 Tatitux khitirutix munaski ukarux chiqachiwa, kunjämatix mä awkix munasit wawapar chiqachki ukhama." 
Proverbs3:13 Yatiñ kankañ jikxatir jaqix, kusisiñaniwa, ch'ikhi kankañ katuqir jaqis kusisiñanirakiwa;" 
Proverbs3:14 ukasti qullqit sipana, qurit sipan juk'amp askinak jikxatayi." 
Proverbs3:15 Yatiñ kankañax suma k'ajkir qalanakat sipansa juk'amp jila alaniwa; ¡janiw wali jila alan yänakampis chikachayatäkaspati! 
Proverbs3:16 Kupi amparampix walja maranak jakañ churi, ch'iqa amparampisti qamir yänakampi, aytat kankañamp churaraki." 
Proverbs3:17 Jupan sarnaqäwipar arkañax kusiskayawa, thakhinakapanjam sarnaqañasti suman jakañawa." 
Proverbs3:18 Yatiñ kankañ jikxatiritakix ukax jakañawa; ¡yatiñ kankañ katxäsirinakasti kusisiñaniwa! 
Proverbs3:19 Tatitux yatiñ kankañampi, ch'ikhi kankañampiw alaxpachsa, akapachsa sayt'ayi." 
Proverbs3:20 Yatiñ kankañampiw lamar quta jaljtayi, yatiñ kankañampiw qinayanakat jallu purxatayani." 
Proverbs3:21 Munat wawaxay, amuyt'a kankañ imapunim, iwxa arunakarjam sarnaqañ jan chhaqhayasimti," 
Proverbs3:22 ukasti jumarux jakañ churätam, mä suma wallqampjamaw k'achacharakïtam." 
Proverbs3:23 Jan axsarasaw thakhinjam sarnaqäta, janipuniw kunapachas lanqtaskätati." 
Proverbs3:24 Samart'askäta ukapachax janiw axsarayaskätati; ikintkxäta ukkhasa, jan axsarasaw ikxäta." 
Proverbs3:25 Akatjamat utjir chijinakarux janiw axsarkätati jan wali jaqinakar tukjañ uru jutkani ukarus janirakiw axsarkätati," 
Proverbs3:26 Tatituw jan axsarañamatak ch'amañchaskätam, kuna sipitar jalt'añatsa qhispiyarakïtamwa." 
Proverbs3:27 Yanapt'a mayiri jaqirux yanapt'apunïtawa, jupar yanapt'añamax amparamankaskchi uka." 
Proverbs3:28 Jichhür yanapt'irjamäsksta ukaxa, jan qharürutak imasimti. Janipun jaqi masimarux samti: “Qharüruw yanapt'äma” sasaxa." 
Proverbs3:29 Jumar alkatir jaqi masimatakix janiw kuna ñanqhsa amtätati. 
Proverbs3:30 Jan khitimpis ch'axwañar mantamti janitix khitis jumar kuna ñanqha lurkätam ukaxa. 
Proverbs3:31 Luqhi chuyman jaqirux jan jach'ar aptamti, janirak jupjam sarnaqañsa munamti;" 
Proverbs3:32 Tatitux luqhi chuyman jaqirux uñisiwa, aski jaqinakampisti sumankiwa." 
Proverbs3:33 Tatitux ñanqha lurir jaqin utaparux ñanqhachiwa, aski jaqin utaparusti askimpiw phuqt'i." 
Proverbs3:34 Tatitux sawkasir jaqinakat sawkasiwa, alt'at chuyman jaqinakarusti khuyapayasiñampiw uñji." 
Proverbs3:35 Yatiñan jaqinakan churäwipax aytat kankañawa, jan amuyt'asir jaqinakasti p'inqachatäniwa." 
Proverbs4:1 Wawanaka, awkiman suma iwxa arunakaparux ist'apxam; taqi chuymamp ist'apxam sum sarnaqañ yatiqapxañamataki." 
Proverbs4:2 Nayax suma yatichäwinak churapxsma; nayan yatichäwinakaxarusti jan jisk'achapxamti. 
Proverbs4:3 Nayax wawäñ yatiraktwa; taykaxan wali munatayätwa," 
Proverbs4:4 awkixasti akham sasaw yatichitäna: “Arunakay chuymamar imam; arsutanakaxar jaysam, ukat jakäta." 
Proverbs4:5 Yatiñ kankañampi, amuyt'a kankañamp jikxatam; janipun arunakaxat armasimti." 
Proverbs4:6 Yatiñ kankañarux janipun apanukumti, yatiñ kankañarux munasim jupaw imaskätam." 
Proverbs4:7 Taqi kunat sipan yatiñ kankañampi, amuyt'a kankañamp jikxatam." 
Proverbs4:8 Yatiñ kankañar munasim, ukasti jach'aruw aptätam; ukar yäqam, ukasti jach'añchätamwa;" 
Proverbs4:9 ¡p'iqimarux suma munkañ k'achachani, ukampiw munkay pillu uchani!” sasa." 
Proverbs4:10 Munat wawaxay, arunakax ist'asin katuqita, jakañ urunakamasti jilxataniwa." 
Proverbs4:11 Nayaw yatiñ kankañ thakhinjam irpäma, suma thakhinjam sarnaqayarakïma." 
Proverbs4:12 Uka thakhinsti janiw kunar lanqtañas utjkaniti; ukanjam jalkasas janiw lanqtaskätati. 
Proverbs4:13 Yatichäwinak sum katxarusim, jan apanukumti; uka yatichäwirjam sarnaqam, ukaw jakañamaxa." 
Proverbs4:14 Janiy ñanqha lurir jaqinakan thakhipanjam saramti, janirak jan wali sarnaqäwiparus arkamti." 
Proverbs4:15 Jan uka thakhipar mantamti, jan uka chiqa saramti; jupanakat jithiqtam, nayraqatar saraskakim." 
Proverbs4:16 Uka jaqinakax jan wal lurasax janiw samarapkiti; jaqi masipar jan aynacht'ayasax, janiw ikthapipkisa." 
Proverbs4:17 ¡Jupanakan manq'apampi, umañapampixa, ñanqha lurañampi tukjasiñampikiwa!" 
Proverbs4:18 Aski jaqinakan sarnaqäwipax willjta qhanjamawa; urutatañkamaw juk'at juk'at qhanti. 
Proverbs4:19 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakan sarnaqäwipasti ch'amakakiwa; ¡janiw kunar lanqtasipxatapsa yatisipkiti! 
Proverbs4:20 Munat wawaxay, iwxa arunakaxar ist'am; arsutanakaxar sum isch'ukim." 
Proverbs4:21 Janipun nayraqatamat chhaqtayamti, ¡chuymamarupun imam!" 
Proverbs4:22 Uka arunakax suma jakañ churi, khitinakatix jikxatapki ukanakaru." 
Proverbs4:23 Taqi kunanakat sipansa chuymam imam, jakañaman uka chuymat jutatap layku." 
Proverbs4:24 K'ari arsuñax lakamat jayankpan; k'ari parlañat jithiqtam. 
Proverbs4:25 Nayraqatar uñtam, nayraqatarupun uñtam." 
Proverbs4:26 Kawkharutix kayunakam takt'käta uk sum amuyasim, sarnaqäwimasti chiqapapunïniwa." 
Proverbs4:27 Thakhimat jan maysar saranukumti; jan wali sarnaqäwinakat jithiqtam. 
Proverbs5:1 Munat wawaxay, yatiñ kankañaxar ist'am, ch'ikhi kankañaxar sum ist'arakim." 
Proverbs5:2 Ukhamat suma yatiñampi sarnaqañ yatïta, amuyt'ampiw arsurakïta." 
Proverbs5:3 Jan wali warmin arunakapax misk'ir uñtatawa, arsutapasti aceitet sipan suma quñawa." 
Proverbs5:4 Ukampis qhiparux mullat sipan juk'amp k'allk'uwa, purapar arini espadat sipan juk'amp arirakiwa." 
Proverbs5:5 Uka warmimpi sarnaqañax jiwañaruw puriyi; chillqtatanakapax jiwañar chiqak irparaki. 
Proverbs5:6 Uka warmitakix sum sarnaqañax janiw kunäkisa, janirakiw sarnaqäwipan jan sumätapsa amuyaskiti." 
Proverbs5:7 Munat wawaxay, ist'itaya, janiy yatichäwinakaxat saraqamti." 
Proverbs5:8 Jan wali warmit jithiqtam; uta punkuparus jan jak'achasimti," 
Proverbs5:9 aytat kankañam yaqhanakar jan churaskañamataki, jikxatasitamsa qhuru jaqinakar jan katuyaskañamataki." 
Proverbs5:10 Jan uñt'at jaqis ch'ama tukutamamp jan phuqt'asiskañapataki. 
Proverbs5:11 Jan ukasti, qhiparux jachañakiw wakt'ätam, janchimax juk'at juk'at aynacht'xan ukapacha." 
Proverbs5:12 Ukkhakiw jumax säta: “¡Janik yatichäwi arunakar jisk'achkpachänti! ¡Janik chiqachäwi arunakarus apanukkpachänti! 
Proverbs5:13 ¿Kunatarak yatichirinakaxar jan ist'kpachätsti, nayar iwxt'irinakarus jan jayskpachätsti?" 
Proverbs5:14 ¡Niyapuniw nayax taqi jaqinak nayraqatan jan walt'añar purta!” sasa. 
Proverbs5:15 Jumasti warmimamp jakasim, kunjämatix maynix pachpa phuch'upan umapat umt'aski ukhama." 
Proverbs5:16 Munasiñamax warmimatakikïpan; jan yaqha warminakar churamti. 
Proverbs5:17 Jumampina, warmimampin kusisiñapax, jumatakikïpan," 
Proverbs5:18 ¡Juman warmimax aski waxt'äwinak katuqpan! ¡Wayna kankañaman kusisitak jupamp jakasim! 
Proverbs5:19 ¡Warmimax suma munkañ tarujar uñtatawa! ¡Munart'asiñapamp jumar kusisiyirïpan! ¡Munasiñapamp jumar wiñay kusisiyirïpan! 
Proverbs5:20 Munat wawaxay, ¿kunatarak chachan warmimp sarnaqaskätasti? ¿Kunatakirak jan uñt'at warmiru qhumaskätasti?" 
Proverbs5:21 Tatitux jaqin sarnaqäwip uñjaskiwa, sartatanakapsa sum uñch'ukiskaraki." 
Proverbs5:22 Ñanqha lurir jaqirux pachpa ñanqha luratapaw katunti; pachpa jucha luratapaw chinuñar uñtat chinxäsi. 
Proverbs5:23 Jan chiqachayasiñ munatapaw jiwañar irpani; pisi amuyt'asirïtapasti, chhaqhañaruw aparakini." 
Proverbs6:1 Munat wawaxay, jaqi masim laykutix manusiñapatak sayt'sta ukaxa, jan ukax, jan uñt'at jaqi laykutix arsutamax utjchi ukasa," 
Proverbs6:2 juma pachpaw sipit uskusisktaxa; pachpa arunakamaruw jalantasktaxa. 
Proverbs6:3 Munat wawaxay, jumax maynin amparapanktawa, ukat qhispiñatakisti akanak luram: jan p'inqasis jaqi masiman ukar achikt'asir mäki saram." 
Proverbs6:4 Jan ukanak askichkasinxa jan ikimti, janirak mä juk'as samaramti;" 
Proverbs6:5 mä tarujar uñtat katuntirimat jumax jaltxam; sipitatsti jaltir jamach'ir uñtat jaltxam. 
Proverbs6:6 Jayra jaqi, k'isimiranakar uñtam; irnaqatanakap uñjam, jupanakat yatiqasim." 
Proverbs6:7 Janiw khitis jupanakar luraykiti, janirakiw khitis uñch'ukiykiti, apnaqkarakisa;" 
Proverbs6:8 ukampis jupanakax yapu apthapiñ pachan manq'añ imkatasipxi. 
Proverbs6:9 Jayra jaqi, ¿kunapachkamarak ikïtasti? ¿Kunapacharak ikit jan sartkätasti?" 
Proverbs6:10 Jumatix ukham iki chutaliskäta, sum ikiñatakis amparanakam qhumthapisiskäta ukkhaxa," 
Proverbs6:11 jan kunan uñjasiñaw katuntätam, mä muyuyku jaqir uñtata." 
Proverbs6:12 Ñanqha jan wali jaqix, k'ari arunak parlasakiw sarnaqi;" 
Proverbs6:13 nayrampiw ch'irmt'i, kayunakap unuqt'ayi, ampar luk'anapampiw wikucht'i;" 
Proverbs6:14 amuyupasti ñanqha lurañamp chhaqtayatawa, chuymapan jan walinak lup'isakiw sarnaqi, ch'axwanak utjayañ lup'isakiw sarnaqaraki." 
Proverbs6:15 Ukat jupatak jan walt'añax akatjamat purinini; mä ch'ipxtanak q'ala tukjat uñjasini. 
Proverbs6:16 Tatitux suxta jan walinakaruw uñisi; paqallqüristi jupatakix jan walipuniwa: 
Proverbs6:17 Jach'a jach'a tukuñanakaru, k'ari parlañanakaru, jan juchan jaqi jiwayañanakaru," 
Proverbs6:18 jan wali amtañanakaru, jan wali lurañanakar mäki sarañanakaru," 
Proverbs6:19 k'ari irkatirit sarnaqañanakaru, jila pura ch'axwañanakaru." 
Proverbs6:20 Munat wawaxay, chuymamarux imapunim, awkiman, taykaman iwxa arunakapsa, yatichäwinakapsa." 
Proverbs6:21 Aka iwxanak katxäsipunim, ukanakax chuymamankapunpan." 
Proverbs6:22 Uka arunakaw saräwiman irpätam, ikiskäta ukkhasti ukanakaw imätam, ikit sartkäta ukkhasti ukanakaw parlarakïtam." 
Proverbs6:23 Chiqpachansa iwxa arunakampi, yatichäwinakampix qhanaskir lamparar uñtatawa; chiqachäwinakampi, suma iwxt'a arunakampix, jakañ thakhiwa." 
Proverbs6:24 Jan wali sarnaqir ñanqha warmitsa imätamwa, suma quña arunakapatsa imarakïtamwa." 
Proverbs6:25 Janiy chuymaman warmin jiwakïtap layku munapayamti, ¡janirak uñtatapampis atipjayasimti!" 
Proverbs6:26 Jan wali sarnaqir warmix qullqi laykukiw sarnaqi, chachanïkasin jucha lurir warmisti, aski chachäki uka katuykamaw sari." 
Proverbs6:27 ¿Mä jaqisti isipar nina apnaqaspati jan nakhantayasaxa? 
Proverbs6:28 ¿Mä jaqisti nina sank'anak patanjam sarnaqaspati kayup jan naksuyasisaxa? 
Proverbs6:29 Jaqi masipan warmipamp jucha lurañan sarnaqir jaqix ukhamarakiwa, juchapsti uñt'asipuniniwa." 
Proverbs6:30 Janiw khitis lunthatar jisk'achkiti, manq'at awtjatätap layku lunthatasitapata;" 
Proverbs6:31 lunthataskirtix katjayaskani ukapachasti, lunthatasitapat paqallqu ukkhamp kutt'ayani, kunatix jupan utjki taqi ukanakamppach churxarakini." 
Proverbs6:32 ¡Jaqi masipan warmipamp sarnaqirix jan amuyt'asiriwa! ¡Ukham jan wal lurir jaqixa, jupa pachpaw tukjasiski!" 
Proverbs6:33 Jupasti nuwjata, jisk'achataw uñjasini, uka p'inqa uñjasitapax janiw armatäkaniti." 
Proverbs6:34 Warmipampi sallqjayasir jaqin q'apisitapax ninar uñtatawa, ukhamat ukham phuqsusiñ uru purinipansti janiw khuyapayaskaniti;" 
Proverbs6:35 janiw kuna churatampis chuymachaskaniti, janirakiw walja churäwinakampis chuymap utt'ayaskaniti." 
Proverbs7:1 Munat wawaxay, arunakaxarux ist'akimaya; iwxa arunakax chuymamarupun imam." 
Proverbs7:2 Iwxa arunakaxampiru, yatichäwinakaxampir ist'amaya; nayranakaman qalaparjamay suma munat imasim, ukatsti jakätawa." 
Proverbs7:3 Ampar luk'anamar chinkatasim jan armasiñamataki, chuymaman sum katxäsim." 
Proverbs7:4 Yatiñ kankañarusti kullakamarjam uñt'asim. Ch'ikhi kankañarux jilat masimarjam munasirakim. 
Proverbs7:5 Uka yatiñ kankañampi, ch'ikhi kankañampiw jan wali warmit qhispiyätam, iyawsayir muxsa arunakapatsa jark'aqarakïtam." 
Proverbs7:6 Mä urusti nayax ventanaxan rejanakap taypit uñch'ukiskäyäta," 
Proverbs7:7 jan amuyt'asir walja waynanakaru, uka waynanak taypinsti, mayni jan amuyt'asir waynaruw uñjta." 
Proverbs7:8 Jupasti marka thakhi thiyar purisinxa, maykataruw makhati, uka warmin utap tuqiruw sari." 
Proverbs7:9 Niya jayp'untxänwa, ch'amakt'xarakïnwa." 
Proverbs7:10 Ukapachaw uka warmix jupar jikxatir mistuni, jan wali sarnaqir warmjam isthapita, sallqa chuymani," 
Proverbs7:11 jupasti parlañatakix jan axsariri, jan p'inqasiriwa, janirakiw utapansa acht'kiti," 
Proverbs7:12 jupax marka thakhinakana, plazanakana, thakhi muytañanakan sarnaqaski, khititix uka chiqanjam sarakipkani ukar katuntañatak suyxatasa." 
Proverbs7:13 Uka warmisti waynar jikxatasin qhumanti, jamp'att'araki, ukat jan axsarasaw saraki:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Nayax sumankäwi wilañchanak luqtañatakiw arsüyäta, jichhasti uka arsutax phuqxtwa." 
Proverbs7:15 Ukatarak nayax jumar jikxatir jutsma; ¡nayax walpun uñjañ munäyäsma, jichhasti jikxatsmawa!" 
Proverbs7:16 Ikiñax patxarux Egiptot apanit suma ikiñampiw janxatanta," 
Proverbs7:17 ukatsti mirra, áloe, canela sat suma q'apkir qullanakampiw uchanirakta." 
Proverbs7:18 Jutamaya, munart'asiñamp machjayasiñäni; willjtaniñapkam munasiñamp k'uchirt'asiñäni," 
Proverbs7:19 chachaxax janiw utankkiti, wali jayaruw saraski;" 
Proverbs7:20 jupax walja qullqi apt'ataw sari, chika phaxsiw utar kutt'asinkani” sasa." 
Proverbs7:21 Uka warmisti waynarux suma muxsa arunakampiw iyawsayi," 
Proverbs7:22 waynasti iyaw sasaw uka warmin qhipap sarawayi, kamisatix mä urqu vacax khariñatak irpatäki ukhama, kamisatix tarujax sipitampi katuntat uñjaski ukhama," 
Proverbs7:23 juparusti mä mich'iw chuymar mantasin jiwayxi, kamisatix mä jamach'ix jakañap jan apt'asiñap yatisisina sipitar jalt'ki ukhama." 
Proverbs7:24 Jichhasti, munat wawaxay ist'itaya; iwxa arunakaxar isch'ukim." 
Proverbs7:25 Janiy uka warmi layku amuyunakam saranukuyamti; janirak jupan qhipap sarañ layku chhaqhañar purimti. 
Proverbs7:26 Jupax waljaninakaruw jiwañar puriyi, ¡jiwayatanakapasti waljaniwa!" 
Proverbs7:27 Uka warmin utapar sarañ thakhisti, jiwañar sarañ thakhiwa." 
Proverbs8:1 Yatiñ kankañax jach'at arnaqasiski, ch'ikhi kankañasti arup ist'asiyaraki." 
Proverbs8:2 Qullu amsta chiqanakaruw sayt'asi, thakhi pallqanakaruw sayt'asi," 
Proverbs8:3 markar mantañ punkunakan arunakap ist'ayaski, akham sasa:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Chachanaka, aka arunakaxax jumanakatakiwa." 
Proverbs8:5 Jan yatiñ kankañan waynanaka, ch'ikhi kankañanïñ yatiqapxam, pisi chuymanaka, amuyt'asirïñ yatiqapxam." 
Proverbs8:6 Ist'apxita, nayax yatiyapxämawa suma chiqa arunaka." 
Proverbs8:7 Kuntix sapkäma ukax chiqawa, janiw nayatakix k'ari arunak parlañax askïkiti." 
Proverbs8:8 Taqpach arsutanakaxax chiqapawa, janiw uka arunakaxanxa k'arisiñax utjkiti." 
Proverbs8:9 Ch'ikhi jaqitaki, amuyt'asir jaqitakixa, arunakaxax qhana jan kamskayawa." 
Proverbs8:10 Qullqit sipana, suma qurit sipansa, yatichäwinakampi, yatiñ kankañamp jikxatapxam” sasa." 
Proverbs8:11 Yatiñ kankañax suma k'ajkir qalanakat sipana, juk'amp jila alaniwa; ¡janiw kunatix wali munkayäki ukampis kikipaskaspati!" 
Proverbs8:12 “Naya, yatiñ kankañax, ch'ikhi kankañamp chikaw jakta, suma iwxa arunak jikxatañ yatta." 
Proverbs8:13 Tatitur axsartañaxa, jan walir uñisiñawa. Nayax, jach'a jach'a tukuñarusa, jan walin sarnaqañarusa, k'arisiñarus uñistwa." 
Proverbs8:14 Nayankiw amtäwisa, amtäwin phuqhasiñapasa, nayätwa chiqap kankañaxa, ch'aman kankañasa." 
Proverbs8:15 Nayïpan reyinakas markar apnaqapxi, marka apnaqirinakas chiqap kamachinak utt'ayapxi." 
Proverbs8:16 Nayïpan markan jilïr sarayirinakapax munañanïpxi, marka apnaqirinakas chiqapar uñjapxaraki." 
Proverbs8:17 Nayar munasirinakarux munastwa, nayar thaqhirinakasti, jikxatapxituwa." 
Proverbs8:18 Nayaw qamir kankañampi, aytat kankañamp churta, jan tukuskir jach'a kankañampi, nayrar sartañamp churarakta." 
Proverbs8:19 Nayan churañaxax suma q'umachat qurit sipana, suma qullqit sipan juk'amp jilawa." 
Proverbs8:20 Nayax chiqap thakhinjam sarta, chiqa kankañ thakhinjama." 
Proverbs8:21 Nayar munirinakarux qamiriptaytwa, utanakaparus suma imasitanakampiw phuqhantarapta." 
Proverbs8:22 “Tatituw nayarux luräwinakap nayra irnuqitu, taqi kun lurañ janïr qalltkän ukapacha." 
Proverbs8:23 Nayarux qalltan luritu, aka uraqi janïra lurkän ukapacha." 
Proverbs8:24 Nayarux jach'a qutanakax janïra utjkän ukkhatpach uskusitu, jawiranakasa, uma jalsunakas janïra utjkän ukapacha." 
Proverbs8:25 Jisk'a qullunakasa, jach'a qullunakasa janïra utjkän ukkhawa Tatitux nayar utjayasitu;" 
Proverbs8:26 janïraw ukkhaxa Tatitux aka uraqsa, pampanaksa lurkänti, kuna laq'attix aka uraqix luratäki uka laq'sa lurkänti." 
Proverbs8:27 Kunapachatix Tatitux alaxpacha jach'a quta patxar utt'aykän ukkhaxa, nayax ukankäyätwa." 
Proverbs8:28 Kunapachatix qinayanak alaxpachan utjaykän ukapachax ukankäyätwa, quta manqhankiri uma jalsunaksa utjaykäna ukapachasa ukankäyätwa," 
Proverbs8:29 kunapachatix qutan umanakaparusa waña uraqiru jan makhatañapataki arskän ukkhasa, aka uraqi utt'aykän ukkhasa," 
Proverbs8:30 nayax Tatitump chikaw jan saraqtas ukankäyäta. Nayaw jupan sapür kusisiñapäyäta, jupan nayraqatapansti taqi urunakan k'uchirt'asïyäta;" 
Proverbs8:31 jupan lurat uraqin anatasïyäta, ¡nayax jaqinak uñjasin kusisiyätwa!" 
Proverbs8:32 “Jichhasti, wawanakaxay, ist'apxita; nayat yatiqasipxita, jumanakasti kusisitaw sarnaqapxäta." 
Proverbs8:33 Yatichäwinakar ist'apxam, yatiñ kankañar jan jisk'achapxamti." 
Proverbs8:34 Nayar ist'ir jaqix kusisiñaniwa, uta punkuxan sapürus suyxatir jaqisa kusisiñaniwa." 
Proverbs8:35 Nayar jikxatirixa, jakañ jikxatani, Tatitun khuyapayasiñap jikxatarakini;" 
Proverbs8:36 ukampis nayar apanukurixa, jakañap aynacht'añaruw apaski; ¡nayar uñisiñax jiwar munasiñawa!”" 
Proverbs9:1 Yatiñ kankañax utap utachasi, ukarusti paqallqu sayirinakampiw k'achacht'i;" 
Proverbs9:2 uywanak jach'a manq'äwitakix kharirayi, mä suma vino wakicht'i, manq'añ ucharaki." 
Proverbs9:3 Ukatsti uywat tawaqunakaruw khiti, marka amsta chiqatpach art'apxañapataki:" 
Proverbs9:4 “¡Jan yatiñan waynanaka, akkhar jutapxam!” sasa. Jan amuyt'asirinakarusti akham jawsayi:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Jach'a manq'äwixar jutapxam, nayan wakicht'at vino umt'ir jutapxam." 
Proverbs9:6 Jan amuyt'asis sarnaqañat jithiqtapxam, ukat jakapxäta; ch'ikhi kankañan jaqinakjam sarnaqapxam” sasa." 
Proverbs9:7 Jan ist'asir ñanqha jaqiru chiqachirixa, tuqimpi, chuyma usu arunakampik katuqasi." 
Proverbs9:8 Jan ist'asiri ñanqha jaqiru chiqacham, jupasti jumarux uñisïtamwa; ukampis amuyt'asir jaqir chiqacham, jupasti jumarux munasïtamwa." 
Proverbs9:9 Yatiñ kankañan jaqir yaticham, yatiñ kankañapax jilxataniwa; aski jaqir yaticham, yatiñapasti jilxataniwa." 
Proverbs9:10 Yatiñ kankañan qalltapax, Diosar axsartañawa; Qullanan qullanapar uñt'añax ch'ikhi kankañanïñawa." 
Proverbs9:11 Yatiñ kankañïpan walja urunak jakäta, walja maranakaw jakarakïta." 
Proverbs9:12 Yatiñan jaqïsta ukaxa, juma pachpatakiw yatiñanïskäta; jan ist'asir jaqïsta ukasti, jumakiw t'aqhisiskarakïta." 
Proverbs9:13 Pisi yatiñanïñax arunak apnaqir warmjamawa, pisi chuymani, jan yatiñani." 
Proverbs9:14 Jupax uta punkuparuw qunt'asi, taqpach markax uñstkis ukawjana," 
Proverbs9:15 ukatsti thakhi saririnakaruw jawsi, suma thakhinjam saririnakaru:" 
Proverbs9:16 “¡Jan yatiñan waynanaka aka chiqar jutapxam!” sasa. Ukatsti jan amuyt'asirinakar sanipxañapatakiw khitharaki akham sasa: 
Proverbs9:17 “Lunthatat umax juk'amp muxsawa; jamasat t'ant'a manq'añax juk'amp sumarakiwa” sasa. 
Proverbs9:18 Ukampis uka pisi chuyman jaqinakax janiw yatipkiti, jach'a manq'äwitaki jawsata jaqinakapax jiwañar sarasipkatapa." 
Proverbs10:1 Salomonan säwi arunakapa: Amuyt'asir wawax, awkipar taykaparuw kusisiyi, jan amuyt'asir wawasti jupanakarux llakisiyiwa." 
Proverbs10:2 Jan wali tuqit jikxatat qamir yänakax janiw askïkiti, chiqapat jikxatat yänakasti jiwañat qhispiyi." 
Proverbs10:3 Tatitux suma jaqirux janiw manq'at t'aqhisiykiti, ñanqha lurir jaqirusti manq'at awtjayasiñap janiw apaqkiti." 
Proverbs10:4 Juk'a irnaqir jaqix jan kunaniw jaki, wali irnaqir jaqisti qamiriptiwa." 
Proverbs10:5 Wakisitapar yapu apthapirix amuyt'asir jaqiwa, yapu apthapi urunakan ikir jaqisti, p'inqachatäniwa." 
Proverbs10:6 Aski jaqirux Tatituw aski waxt'äwinakapamp phuqt'i, ñanqha jaqirusti, jan wali luräwinakapaw aynacht'ayi." 
Proverbs10:7 Aski jaqix suma amtatäniwa; ñanqha jaqirusti mäkiw armatäxi. 
Proverbs10:8 Yatiñan jaqix arsüwinakar jaysiwa; jan amuyt'asis parlir jaqisti aynacht'añaruw puri. 
Proverbs10:9 Jan kuna manunïki uka jaqixa, janiw kunarus axsarkiti; jan wal sarnaqir jaqisti, jan waliw tukusiraki." 
Proverbs10:10 Jan wali amtampi nayra ch'irmt'ir jaqixa, jach'a jan walt'añanak utjayi; jan wali parlir jaqisti, aynacht'añaruw puri." 
Proverbs10:11 Aski jaqin arunakapax jakañ churir arunakawa, ñanqha lurir jaqirusti jan wali luräwinakaw aynacht'ayi." 
Proverbs10:12 Uñisisiñax ch'axwanak utjayi, munasiñasti taqi juchanak pampachi." 
Proverbs10:13 Yatiñan jaqin lakapanxa, yatiñ kankañaw utji; lawamp jawq'añasti jan amuyt'asir jaqin jikhanipatakiwa." 
Proverbs10:14 Yatiñan jaqinakax wali amuyt'ampiw parli, jan amuyt'asir jaqinakan parlatapasti, jan walt'añanak utjayi." 
Proverbs10:15 Qamir jaqirux qamir yänakapaw arxati; jan utjirin jaqirusti, janiw kuna arxatiripas utjkiti." 
Proverbs10:16 Aski jaqin katuqäwipax jakañawa; ñanqha jaqin katuqäwipasti jucha lurañakiwa. 
Proverbs10:17 Chiqachäwi arunak jaysir jaqix, jakañ thakhinjam saraski; jan jaysasiristi, chhaqhañ thakhiruw saraski." 
Proverbs10:18 K'arisir jaqinakax janiw uñisisiñ chuymap uñacht'ayapkiti; pisi chuyman jaqinakasti, taqi kun parlapxi." 
Proverbs10:19 Sinti parlir jaqixa, sinti parlatap laykuw pantjasi; amukt'añ yatiñasti, yatiñ kankañankiwa." 
Proverbs10:20 Aski jaqin arunakapax q'umachat qullqir uñtatawa, ñanqha jaqin amuyupasti jan kunatakiwa." 
Proverbs10:21 Aski jaqin arunakapax waljaninakaruw yatichi, jan yatiñan jaqisti jan amuyt'asirïtap laykuw jiwi." 
Proverbs10:22 Tatitun aski churäwipax qamir kankañawa; janiw kuna llakisiñas ukamp chik jutkiti. 
Proverbs10:23 Jan amuyt'asir jaqix jan walinak lurasax kusisiwa; yatiñan jaqisti, yatiñ kankañat kusisi." 
Proverbs10:24 Ñanqha lurir jaqitakix axsarki ukaw utjarapi, aski jaqitakisti amtatanakapax phuqhasirapiwa." 
Proverbs10:25 Jach'a tutukax mäkiw sarakipi, ñanqha jaqisti mäkiw chhaqtawayxi, aski jaqikiw wiñayatak jakaski." 
Proverbs10:26 Jayra jaqix khithasiripatakix laka ch'akhar jan walt'ayir vinagrer uñtatawa, jan ukax nayrar ch'isiyir jiwq'ir uñtatawa." 
Proverbs10:27 Tatitur axsartas jakañax, jaya maranak jakañ utjayi, ñanqha lurir jaqinakan jakañaparusti juk'aptayiwa." 
Proverbs10:28 Aski jaqinakarux kusisiñaw suyt'aski, ñanqha jaqinakarusti, aynacht'añaw suyt'askaraki." 
Proverbs10:29 Aski luririnakarux Tatitux imiwa, jan wal luririnakarusti tukjiwa." 
Proverbs10:30 Aski jaqix janipuniw aynacht'añar purkaniti, ñanqha jaqisti janiw uraqin jaya pacha jakkaniti." 
Proverbs10:31 Aski jaqin lakapat yatiñ kankañax mistsu, ñanqha lurir jaqirusti laxrap khariqapxani." 
Proverbs10:32 Aski jaqix suma arunak arsu; qhuru jaqisti jan wali arunakak parli. 
Proverbs11:1 Tatiturux wayuqat balanzanakax axtasiyiwa, phuqhat tupunakasti kusisiyiwa." 
Proverbs11:2 Jach'a jach'a tukuñax jan walt'añanak apani; yatiñ kankañasti alt'at chuyman jaqinakamp chikawa. 
Proverbs11:3 Chiqa sarnaqir jaqinakarux chiqa kankañapaw irpi; k'ari sarnaqir jaqinakarusti k'ari kankañapaw tukji. 
Proverbs11:4 Qamir yänakax taripäw urun maynirux janiw yanapkaniti, aski kankañasti jiwañat qhispiyani." 
Proverbs11:5 Chiqa kankañax aski jaqin thakhip chiqaptayi, ñanqha jaqirusti pachpa jan wali luratapaw aynacht'ayi." 
Proverbs11:6 Chiqa sarnaqir jaqinakarux aski kankañaw qhispiyani, inampst'ir jaqinakarusti juk'amp munañaw katjaskani." 
Proverbs11:7 Ñanqha lurir jaqix jiwxi ukkhaxa, amtäwinakapasa, suyt'äwinakapas tukusxiwa." 
Proverbs11:8 Diosax t'aqhisiñat aski jaqirux qhispiyi, jupa lantix jucharar jaqiruw t'aqhisiñaru uchi." 
Proverbs11:9 Ñanqha lurir jaqin arunakapax masinakaparuw tukji, aski jaqin ch'ikhi kankañapasti jupanakaruw qhispiyi." 
Proverbs11:10 Aski jaqinakan nayrar sartatapatxa, markax kusisiwa; ñanqha jaqinakan jiwatapatsti, kusisiñat t'iskti." 
Proverbs11:11 Aski jaqinakan suma luratanakapampiw markax jach'apti, ñanqha lurir jaqinakan arunakapasti markarux tukjiwa." 
Proverbs11:12 Jan amuyt'asir jaqix jaqi masipat jan wal parli; amuyt'asir jaqisti amukïskiwa. 
Proverbs11:13 Arunak apnaqir jaqix jan yatitanak qhanstayi, aski jaqisti imxäsiwa, janiw khitirus arskiti." 
Proverbs11:14 Mä markatix jan suma apnaqatäkixa, markax aynacht'iwa, walja amuyt'äwinak utjatap laykusti nayraqatar sarantañaw utji." 
Proverbs11:15 Jan uñt'at jaqin manusitapat sayt'añax, jach'a jan walt'añanakar puriñawa; jaqi lanti sayt'añ jan muniristi, kusisitaw jaki." 
Proverbs11:16 Khuyapayasir warmix jach'ar aptatäñ katuqi, jan axsarir jaqisti qamir yänak jikxataraki." 
Proverbs11:17 Khuyapayasir jaqix, jupa pachpatakiw aski lurasi, qhuru jaqisti, jupa pachpatakiw jan wal lurasi." 
Proverbs11:18 Jan wali jaqix sallqañtañ chuymampiw yänak jikxati; aski kankañamp luriristi, chiqa luräwipatjam katuqaraki." 
Proverbs11:19 Chiqa kankañar arkañax suma jakañ churi, ñanqha lurañar arkañasti jiwañaruw irpi." 
Proverbs11:20 Tatitux jan wali amtäwin jaqinakarux janiw munaskiti, chiqap sarnaqir jaqinakarusti munasiwa." 
Proverbs11:21 Chiqpachansa, ñanqha lurir jaqix mutuñap katuqapuniniwa, aski jaqinakasti qhispitaw uñjasipxani." 
Proverbs11:22 Khuchhin nasapan uchat quri anillor uñtatawa, suma uynaqt'an pisi chuyma warmixa." 
Proverbs11:23 Aski jaqinakan amtäwinakapax phuqhasipuniwa, jan wali jaqinakan amtäwinakapasti aynacht'añak apani." 
Proverbs11:24 Masinakapar churir jaqinakax juk'amp katuqi, mich'a jaqinakasti jan kunaniw tukusipxi." 
Proverbs11:25 Yanapt'añ yatir jaqiw juk'amp katuqi; waxt'ir jaqisti, katuqarakiwa." 
Proverbs11:26 Trigo arkuntir jaqirux, jaqix ñanqhachiwa; trigo aljir jaqirusti, jaqix jach'añchiwa." 
Proverbs11:27 Aski lurañ thaqhir jaqix, askinak jikxati, jan wali lurañ thaqhir jaqisti, jan walt'añan uñjasini." 
Proverbs11:28 Qamir yänakapar alkatir jaqix, waña laphir uñtataw jalaqtani, aski jaqinakasti layminakar uñtataw ch'uxñatatani." 
Proverbs11:29 Jan amuyt'asis utapankirinar apanukur jaqix, jan kunaniw qhiparani; jan amuyt'asir jaqix, amuyt'asir jaqin uywataparuw tukuni." 
Proverbs11:30 Chiqa kankañax jakañ churi, ñanqha lurañasti jakañ apaqi." 
Proverbs11:31 Aski jaqitix aka uraqinpach churäwip katuqchixa, ¡ñanqha jaqimpi, jucharar jaqimpix ukat juk'amp mutuñ katuqani!" 
Proverbs12:1 Chiqachatäñaru munañax, yatiñ kankañar munañawa; chiqachatäñar uñisiñax, jan amuyt'asirïñawa." 
Proverbs12:2 Aski jaqix Tatitun khuyapayasiñap jikxati, jan wali amtan jaqirusti juchañchiwa." 
Proverbs12:3 Jan wali lurañax janiw khititakis suma qalltäkiti, aski jaqinakasti aski luratapampix sumaw sayt'ani." 
Proverbs12:4 Aski lurir warmix jach'aruw chachapar apti, jan wali warmisti chachapar jisk'achayiwa." 
Proverbs12:5 Aski jaqinakan amtäwipax chiqapar uñjañawa, ñanqha lurir jaqinakan amtäwipasti ñanqha lurañakiwa." 
Proverbs12:6 Ñanqha jaqin arunakapax jiwayir sipitar uñtatawa; aski jaqin arunakapasti qhispiñawa. 
Proverbs12:7 Ñanqha jaqinakax aynacht'iwa, ukarakiw tukuyapaxa, aski jaqin wawanakapasti janiw tukjatäkaniti." 
Proverbs12:8 Yatiñan jaqix, yatiñ kankañapatjam jach'ar aptatäni, jan amuyt'an jaqisti, jan amuyt'asirïtapat jisk'achatäni." 
Proverbs12:9 Jisk'achat jaqix manq'añanïski ukax juk'amp askiwa, jan manq'añani jach'achasir jaqit sipana." 
Proverbs12:10 Aski jaqix uywanakapat khuyapayasiwa, ñanqha lurir jaqisti janiw khuyapayasiñ yatkiti." 
Proverbs12:11 Yapuchir jaqix walja manq'añaniwa; jan amuyt'asir jaqisti inamay luräwinakan sarnaqi. 
Proverbs12:12 Jan wali amtañanakax ñanqha jaqinakan sipitapawa; aski jaqinakan luratanakapasti wiñayatakiwa. 
Proverbs12:13 Ñanqha lurir jaqix pachpa k'arisitapampiw k'ithuntasi, aski jaqisti jan walt'añanakatxa mistukipuniwa." 
Proverbs12:14 Sapa mayni jaqiw parlatapatjam apthapi, luratapatjam katuqaraki." 
Proverbs12:15 Jan amuyt'an jaqitakix taqi kun luratapas walikïskiwa, yatiñan jaqisti, suma iwxa arunakarux ist'iwa." 
Proverbs12:16 Jan amuyt'an jaqix mäkiw kunatsa q'apisi, ch'ikhi jaqisti, chuyma uskay arunakarux janiw yäqkiti." 
Proverbs12:17 Chiqa arsuri jaqix, chiqap arsu; k'ari arsuri jaqisti, k'arinakak irkati." 
Proverbs12:18 Jan amuyt'as arsur jaqix, arunakapampiw maynir chuym usuchji, amuyt'ampi arsur jaqin arunakapasti qullar uñtatawa." 
Proverbs12:19 Chiqapa parlir jaqix wiñayatakiwa, k'ari parlir jaqin arunakapasti mäkiw chhaqtawayxi." 
Proverbs12:20 Ñanqha amtir jaqinakan lup'itanakapanxa k'ariw utji; sumankir jaqinakan suma iwxa arunakapansti kusisiñaw utji. 
Proverbs12:21 Aski jaqix janipuniw kuna jan walt'añansa t'aqhiskaniti, ñanqha lurir jaqisti, taqi jan walinakxa mayak katuqani." 
Proverbs12:22 K'ari parlirinakax Tatitur axtasiyiwa, chiqa arsurinakasti jupar kusisiyiwa." 
Proverbs12:23 Ch'ikhi jaqix janiw yatitapat jach'achaskiti, jan amuyt'an jaqisti t'axmarätap qhanañchasi." 
Proverbs12:24 Irnaqir jaqix apnaqaniwa, jayra jaqisti apnaqataw uñjasini." 
Proverbs12:25 Llakix jaqin chuymap mayjt'ayi; suma arusti jaqirux kusisiyiwa. 
Proverbs12:26 Aski jaqix jaqi masipar irpiriwa, ñanqha lurir jaqinakasti, maysaruw saranukupxi." 
Proverbs12:27 Jayra jaqix, janiw manq'añ jikxatkiti, q'apha jaqisti, jilarkir manq'añanak jikxatani." 
Proverbs12:28 Chiqa sarnaqañax jakañaruw irpi; ñanqha lurañasti, jiwañaruw irpi." 
Proverbs13:1 Yatiñan wawax awkipan iwxa arunakap katuqasiwa, jan ist'asir wawasti janiw chiqachäwi arunakxa katuqaskiti." 
Proverbs13:2 Aski lurañat parlir jaqix, wakiskir churäwi katuqani, ch'uxña lurir jaqinakasti jan walinak lurañak munasipki." 
Proverbs13:3 Amuyt'ampi juk'a aruki parlir jaqixa, jupa pachpaw imasiski; jan amuyt'asis sinti parlir jaqisti, jupa pachpakiw aynacht'añar puriski." 
Proverbs13:4 Jayra jaqix wal kuns muni, ukampis janiw kuns jikxatkiti; q'apha jaqisti walja yänak jikxati." 
Proverbs13:5 Aski jaqix k'ari arunakar uñisiwa; ñanqha lurir jaqisti p'inqachataw uñjasi. 
Proverbs13:6 Aski jaqirux chiqapar uñjañaw arxataski; ñanqha lurir jaqirusti, ñanqha luratanakapaw tukji." 
Proverbs13:7 Yaqhipanakax jan kunanïsinsa, qamirïpkaspas ukhamaw tukupxi; yaqhipanakasti taqi kunanïkasinsa, jan kunanïpkaspas ukhamaw tukupxaraki." 
Proverbs13:8 Qamir jaqirux yänakapaw jakañap qhispiyi; jan kunan jaqisti janiw kunapachas axsarayañanak ist'kiti. 
Proverbs13:9 Aski jaqinakax suma qhanar uñtataw k'ajapxi, ñanqha lurir jaqinakasti, micha qhanar uñtataw jiwarxapxi." 
Proverbs13:10 Jach'a jach'a tukuñax nuwasiñanakak utjayi, yatiñ kankañasti llamp'u chuymani jaqinakampiwa." 
Proverbs13:11 Mäki jikxatat qamir yänakax, mäkiw tukusxi, juk'at juk'at jikxatir jaqisti qamiriptiwa." 
Proverbs13:12 Suyatäki ukan jan phuqhasitapaxa, chuymaruw llakisiyi, munatasarjam phuqhasitapasti jakañ quqjamawa." 
Proverbs13:13 Yatichäwir jisk'achir jaqix, t'aqhisiniwa, kamachi arunakar ist'ir jaqisti, churäwi katuqani." 
Proverbs13:14 Yatiñan jaqin yatichäwinakapax jakañ chuririwa, jiwan amparapatsa qhispiyarakiwa." 
Proverbs13:15 Suma iwxanak churir jaqix taqinin munatawa, jan wali iwxanak churir jaqisti tukjataw uñjasini." 
Proverbs13:16 Amuyt'asir jaqix, ch'ikhi kankañampiw kuns luri; jan amuyt'asir jaqisti luqhi luratanakapat jach'achasi." 
Proverbs13:17 Jan wali yatiyirix jan walt'añanakaruw puriyi; chiqa yatiyiristi sumaruw puriyaraki. 
Proverbs13:18 Suma iwxa arunakar jisk'achir jaqix, jan kunani, jisk'achatakiw sarnaqani, chiqachäwi ist'ir jaqisti, wali jach'añchataw uñjasini." 
Proverbs13:19 Amtäwiru phuqhirïñaxa kusisiñawa. Jan amuyt'asir jaqinakasti janiw jan walinakat jithiqtañ munapkiti. 
Proverbs13:20 Yatiñan jaqinakamp chika sarnaqirix, yatiñ kankañ yatiqani; jan amuyt'an jaqinakamp chika sarnaqiristi, aynacht'añaruw purini." 
Proverbs13:21 Jucharar jaqinakax jan walt'añampi arknaqatäpxiwa, aski jaqinakasti suma churäwi katuqapxani." 
Proverbs13:22 Aski lurir jaqix allchhinakaparuw yänakap jaytawayi; jucharar jaqin yänakapasti, aski jaqinakatakiw qhiparxani." 
Proverbs13:23 Pist'ayasir jaqin yapuchatapax, jilarkir manq'añ utjayi, kawkintix chiqa kankañax jan utjki ukawjansti, taqpachawa apt'ataraki." 
Proverbs13:24 Wawapar jan chiqachir jaqix, janiw wawapar munaskiti, wawapar munasir jaqisti, wawapar chiqachiwa." 
Proverbs13:25 Aski jaqix sist'asiñkamaw manqt'asi, ñanqha lurir jaqisti manq'atsa awtjataw sarnaqi." 
Proverbs14:1 Amuyt'asir warmix utap sum uñjasi, jan amuyt'asir warmisti pachpa amparapampiw utap t'unji." 
Proverbs14:2 Chiqa sarnaqir jaqix Tatituruw axsarti, jan wali thakhin sarnaqir jaqisti, jisk'achiwa." 
Proverbs14:3 Jan amuyt'asir jaqix jach'achasiñampiw parli; yatiñan jaqin arunakapasti arxatañatakiwa. 
Proverbs14:4 Yuntax jan utjki ukkhasti, trigox pist'iwa; yunta vacan ch'amapampiw yapu apthapitax juk'amp jilxati." 
Proverbs14:5 Chiqa qhanañchir jaqix janiw k'ariskiti, k'ari irkatir jaqisti k'arinak arsu." 
Proverbs14:6 Saykatasir jaqix yatiñ kankañ thaqkasinsa, janiw jikxatkiti ch'ikhi jaqisti, jank'akiw yatiñ kankañ jikxati." 
Proverbs14:7 Jan amuyt'asir jaqit jithiqtam; jupan arunakapanxa janiw yatiñ kankañ jikxatkätati. 
Proverbs14:8 Yatiñ kankañax yatiñan jaqirux sarnaqañapan amuyt'ayi, jan amuyt'an jaqirusti pachpa jan amuyt'asitapaw sallqji." 
Proverbs14:9 Jan amuyt'an jaqinakax juchapat janis kunäkaspa ukham jan yäqapkiti, chiqa lurir jaqinak taypinsti, suma jakañaw utji." 
Proverbs14:10 Chuymax jupan pachpa llakisitanakap yatisi; kusisiñapsa janiw jan uñt'atanakarux yatiykiti. 
Proverbs14:11 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakan utapax tukjatäniwa, aski lurir jaqinakan utapasti janiw tukjatäkaniti." 
Proverbs14:12 Jaqin amuyatapat sarnaqäwinakapax walikjamakiwa, sarnaqäwinakapan tukuyapasti jiwañakiwa." 
Proverbs14:13 Larusiñansa chuymax ususiwa, kusisiñas llakisiñaruw tukuyi." 
Proverbs14:14 Jan amuyt'asir jaqix sarnaqatapampix kusisitakiwa, aski jaqisti, suma aski luratanakapat kusisi." 
Proverbs14:15 Jan amuyt'asir jaqix taqi kuntix sapki ukarux iyawsakiwa, ch'ikhi jaqisti janïr lurkasaw sum amuyt'asi." 
Proverbs14:16 Yatiñan jaqix ñanqharux axsariwa, jithiqtarakiwa, pisi chuyma jaqisti ch'amaparukiw alkati." 
Proverbs14:17 Mäki kunatsa mayjt'asir jaqix, jan amuyt'asisaw luri, amuyt'asir jaqisti, llamp'u chuyma uñacht'ayi." 
Proverbs14:18 Jan amuyt'asir jaqinakan katuqäwipax pachpa pisi chuymapawa, ch'ikhi jaqinakasti yatiñ kankañampi muyuntatäpxiwa." 
Proverbs14:19 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax suma jaqinakatakiw alt'asipxani, jan wali jaqinakasti aski jaqinakan punkunakapan achikt'asipxani." 
Proverbs14:20 Jan kunaninakax, pachpa jaqi masipansa uñisitawa, qamir jaqisti wali munatawa." 
Proverbs14:21 Jaqi masipar jisk'achirix, juch luri, ¡jan kunan jaqit khuyapayasiristi kusisiñaniwa!" 
Proverbs14:22 Ñanqha lurañ thaqhirinakax, maysaruw saranukupxi; aski lurañ thaqhirinakasti munasiñampi, chiqampi jikxatapxi." 
Proverbs14:23 Taqi ch'ama tukutat jilpacha katuqañax utji, inamay parlañasti jan kunan uñjasiñaw utji." 
Proverbs14:24 Yatiñan jaqin pillupax yatiñ kankañapawa, jan yatiñan jaqinakansti, pisi amuyt'aparakiwa." 
Proverbs14:25 Chiqa qhanañchir jaqix mayninakan jakañap qhispiyi; k'ari irkatir jaqisti jiwañaruw puriyi. 
Proverbs14:26 Tatitur axsartañax taqi chuyma jupar alkatañawa, wawanakapas Tatitun imatäniwa." 
Proverbs14:27 Tatitur jach'añchas sarnaqañanxa, jakañaw utji; jupaw jiwan sipitapat qhispiyi." 
Proverbs14:28 Reyitakix walja jaqinakar apnaqañax, jach'ar aptatäñawa; juk'a jaqinakar apnaqañasti, aynacht'añawa." 
Proverbs14:29 Llamp'u chuymanïñax, wali ch'ikhi kankañ uñacht'ayi; luqhi chuymanïñasti jan amuyt'asirïñ uñacht'ayaraki." 
Proverbs14:30 Samarañ chuymanïñax janchirux jakañ churi, uñisisir chuymanïñasti ch'akhatpach jaqirux tukji." 
Proverbs14:31 Jan kunan jaqir t'aqhisiyirix Diosaparuw jisk'achaski, pist'añan sarnaqir jaqit khuyapayasiristi Tatituruw jach'ar aptaski." 
Proverbs14:32 Ñanqha lurir jaqirux pachpa ñanqha luratapaw tukjaski, aski jaqirusti chiqa luratapaw arxataski." 
Proverbs14:33 Yatiñ kankañax amuyt'asir chuymanakan utjasi; jan amuyt'asir jaqinak taypinsti, janiw ukax uñt'atäkiti." 
Proverbs14:34 Mä markarux chiqa kankañaw jach'aptayi, juchasti taqi markaruw p'inqachayi." 
Proverbs14:35 Ch'ikhi uywatax reyir kusisiyiwa, jan p'inqan uywatasti reyirux q'apisiyiwa." 
Proverbs15:1 Suma arumpi kutt'ayañax q'apisiñ chuyma llamp'uchi, jan wali arumpi kutt'ayañasti, q'apisiñ juk'amp naktayi." 
Proverbs15:2 Yatiñan jaqinakax yatiñ kankañampiw arsupxi, jan amuyt'an jaqinakasti luqhi arunakak parlapxi." 
Proverbs15:3 Tatitux taqi chiqankiwa; aski jaqinakampiru, ñanqha jaqinakampiruw uñch'ukiski." 
Proverbs15:4 Chuymachasir arunakax suma qullar uñtatawa, jan wali amuyump arsut arunakasti, jaqin chuymap usuchjiriwa." 
Proverbs15:5 Jan amuyt'an jaqix awkipan yatichäwiparux jisk'achiwa; awkipar ist'ir jaqisti yatiñanïtap uñacht'ayi. 
Proverbs15:6 Chiqa lurir jaqin utapanxa, taqi kunapas jan tukuskiriwa, ñanqha lurir jaqin utapansti, jikxatatanakapax jan kunatakiwa." 
Proverbs15:7 Yatiñan jaqix wali suma yatichäwinak parli, jan yatiñan jaqisti jan walinakak luri." 
Proverbs15:8 Tatitux ñanqha jaqinakan luqtatanakapxa janiw uñjañ munkiti, aski jaqinakan mayisitanakapsti kusisiñampiw katuqi." 
Proverbs15:9 Tatitux ñanqha jaqinakan sarnaqatanakap janiw uñjañ munkiti; chiqa kankañan sarnaqir jaqirusti munasiwa. 
Proverbs15:10 Suma thakhinjam sarnaqañ apanukuri jaqirux qhuru kankañampi chiqachatawa; chiqachäwir jisk'achir jaqisti, jiwaniwa." 
Proverbs15:11 Tatitutakix amay imäwisa, jiwañas janiw jamasankkiti ¡ukat juk'amp jupax jaqinakan chuymap uñt'i!" 
Proverbs15:12 Jan yäqasir jaqix janiw jupar chiqachirirux munkiti, janirakiw yatiñan jaqinakampi chikas sarnaqañ munkiti." 
Proverbs15:13 Kusisit chuyman jaqix kusisit ajanuniwa; llakit chuyman jaqisti llakita ajanunirakiwa. 
Proverbs15:14 Amuyt'asir chuymax yatiñ kankañ thaqhi, jan amuyt'asir jaqinakasti jan walinakampiw phuqt'asi." 
Proverbs15:15 Llakit sarnaqiritakix, taqi urunakas jan walikamakiwa; kusisit sarnaqiritakisti, taqi urunakas kusisiñakiwa." 
Proverbs15:16 Wali qamiri, llakita jakañat sipansa, jan kunanïña, Tatitur axsartañaw wali askixa." 
Proverbs15:17 Munasiñampi jayuñcht'at ch'uxña juyranak manq'añaw juk'amp askixa, uñisiñampi jayuñcht'at vaca aycha manq'añat sipana." 
Proverbs15:18 Mäki mayjt'asir jaqix nuwasiñanak utjayi; llamp'u chuyman jaqisti, pachparuw nuwasiñ ch'ujtayi." 
Proverbs15:19 Jayra jaqitakix, thakhix ch'aphinakamp phuqhantatawa, aski jaqitakisti, thakhix suma khuskhakiwa." 
Proverbs15:20 Yatiñan wawax awkipampiru, taykapampirux kusisiyiwa; pisi chuyma wawasti jupanakarux jisk'achiwa." 
Proverbs15:21 Jan amuyt'asir jaqix pisi chuyma kankañapat kusisi; ch'ikhi jaqisti sarnaqäwinakapxa chiqachasiwa. 
Proverbs15:22 Kunapachatix jiskt'asiñanakax jan utjki ukkhax, amtäwinakax aynacht'iwa; walja amuyt'ayirinakampiw amtäwinakax phuqhasi." 
Proverbs15:23 ¡Kunja askisa jiskt'aru wakiskir arunak arusxatañaxa, wakisitapar arusxatañasti juk'amp askiwa!" 
Proverbs15:24 Jakañar irpir thakhix amstaruw sari, yatiñan jaqirusti jiwañar puriñat qhispiyaraki." 
Proverbs15:25 Tatitux jach'a jach'a tukurinakan utap t'unji, ijma warminakan uraqipsti janiw jittaykiti." 
Proverbs15:26 Tatitux ñanqha lurir jaqinakan amtäwinakaparux uñisiwa, ukampis juparux suma quña arunakaw kusisiyiwa." 
Proverbs15:27 Walja yänak munapayirix pachpa utapankirinakaruw tukji, qullqi chilltañar uñisiristi, jakaniwa." 
Proverbs15:28 Aski jaqix janïr parlkasaw suma amuyt'asi, ñanqha jaqisti mäkiw jan wali arunak parlatati." 
Proverbs15:29 Tatitux ñanqha lurir jaqinakat jithiqtiwa, aski jaqinakan mayisitanakapsti ist'iwa." 
Proverbs15:30 Suma kankañampi uñtañax chuymaruw kusisiyi; suma yatiyäwinakasti ch'amañchiwa. 
Proverbs15:31 Jakañ churir chiqachäwi arunakar ist'ir jaqix, yatiñan jaqinak taypin jakani." 
Proverbs15:32 Chiqachäwir jan ist'iri jaqix, jupa pachpaw jisk'achasiski; chiqachäwir ist'ir jaqisti, amuyt'asiñ kankañ jikxati." 
Proverbs15:33 Tatitur axsartañax yatiñ kankañ utjayi; jach'añchäwinak katuqañatakisti, nayraqatax llamp'u chuymanïñawa." 
Proverbs16:1 Amtäwinak lurañax jaqinkiwa, ukampis Tatituw munañani uka amtäwin phuqhasiñapatakisa, jan phuqhasiñapatakisa." 
Proverbs16:2 Jaqitakix taqi kun luratapas walikjamakiwa, ukampis Tatituw chuymanakap yati." 
Proverbs16:3 Taqi luräwinakam Tatitun amparapar katuyam, amtäwinakamasti phuqhasiniwa." 
Proverbs16:4 Tatitux mä amtäwimpiw taqi kuns luri; ñanqha jaqirusa t'aqhisiñ urutakiw irnuqi. 
Proverbs16:5 Tatitux jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakarux janiw uñjañ munkiti; jichhasa, akat qhiparusa mutuñap katuqapxapuniniwa." 
Proverbs16:6 Munasiñampi, chiqa kankañampiw jucha luratarux pampachi; Tatitur axsaratap laykuw jaqix ñanqhat jithiqti." 
Proverbs16:7 Jaqin sarnaqäwipax Tatitur kusisiyki ukapachax, uñisirinakapamppacharuw sumankayi." 
Proverbs16:8 Chiqapa lurañampi juk'aki jikxatataxa, juk'amp askiwa, sallqjañampi waljanak jikxatañat sipana." 
Proverbs16:9 Jaqix chuymapan sarnaqañapat lup'iski, ukampis Tatituw sarnaqäwip irpaski." 
Proverbs16:10 Tatituw reyirux amtäwinakapan yanapi, jan pantjasis chiqapar taripañapataki." 
Proverbs16:11 Tupuñanakampi, balanzanakampix Tatitunkiwa, chiqapar uñjañapataki; taqi tupuñanakasti jupan uchatawa." 
Proverbs16:12 Reyinakax jan wali luräwinakarux uñisiwa, reyi qunuñan aski chiqa kankañar utt'ayatätap layku." 
Proverbs16:13 Axsartañ chuymampi, qhana arumpi parlir jaqirux, reyinakax munasipxiwa, kusisiñampiw uñjapxaraki." 
Proverbs16:14 Reyin q'apisitapax jiwañ apani, yatiñ kankañan jaqix uka q'apisiñap sumaptayiwa." 
Proverbs16:15 Reyin kusisitapax suma jakañ utjayi; suma kankañapasti jallumpi phuqhantat qinayar uñtatawa. 
Proverbs16:16 Qurit sipansa yatiñ kankañ jikxatañaw juk'amp askixa; qullqit sipansa amuyt'a kankañanïñaw askixa. 
Proverbs16:17 Aski jaqinakan saräwipax jan walinakat jithiqtañawa; sarnaqäwip imiristi, jupa pachpaw jakañap imasiski." 
Proverbs16:18 Jach'a jach'a tukuñanxa aynacht'añaw utji; p'iqi waytat sarnaqañansti tinkuñaw utjaraki. 
Proverbs16:19 Jan yäqat jaqinakamp jisk'ar tukuñax juk'amp askiwa, jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakamp qamirkipstañat sipana." 
Proverbs16:20 Diosan arunakapar taqi chuymamp ist'irix, kusisiñ jikxatani; ¡Tatitur alkatir jaqix kusisiñaniwa!" 
Proverbs16:21 Yatiñ kankañampi amuyt'ir jaqix, ch'ikhi jaqit uñt'atawa; suma arumpi parlañasti sum amuyt'ayi." 
Proverbs16:22 Suma amuyunïñax jakañ jikxatañawa; pisi amuyt'an jaqir yatichañasti luqhi kankañawa. 
Proverbs16:23 Yatiñ chuymamp amuyt'irix, yatiñampiw parli; arunakapasti sum amuyt'ayi." 
Proverbs16:24 Muxsa arunakax suma misk'jamawa, jaqin chuymap muxsachi, janchirux ch'amañcharakiwa." 
Proverbs16:25 Sarnaqäwix jaqin amuyupat walikjamakiwa, ukampis tukuyapax jiwañar puriyiriwa." 
Proverbs16:26 Irnaqir jaqin manq'a munatapaw irnaqañar jariyi; manq'at awtjayasiñaw irnaqañar nukt'i. 
Proverbs16:27 Ñanqha lurir jaqix jan wali lurañanakak lup'iski; ¡arunakapas nina lawrar uñtatawa! 
Proverbs16:28 Jan ist'asir saxra jaqix ch'axwañanak sartayi; arunak apnaqir jaqisti uñisisiñ utjayi.
