Proverbs16:29 Ñanqha lurir jaqix masiparuw sallqanti; jan wali thakhiruw saranukuyaraki. 
Proverbs16:30 Ñanqha lurañ amtir jaqix, nayrapampiw ch'irmt'i; jan walinak lurasasti, laka ispillupsa achurasiwa." 
Proverbs16:31 Janq'u ñik'utanïxañax suma pillur uñtatawa, ukasti axsartañ chuymamp sarnaqatata jikxatatawa." 
Proverbs16:32 Llamp'u chuymanïñaw juk'amp askixa, jan axsarir ch'amani jaqïñat sipana; jiwas pachpa apnaqasiñaw juk'amp askixa, markanaka apnaqañat sipana." 
Proverbs16:33 Amtäwinak lurañax jaqinkiwa, ukampis Tatituw munañani uka amtäwinakan phuqhasiñapatakisa, jan phuqhasiñapatakisa." 
Proverbs17:1 Sumankas jakasin qhulu t'ant'a manq'asiñax juk'amp askiwa, jach'a manq'äwinakan nuwasis jakañat sipana." 
Proverbs17:2 Ch'ikhi uywatax jan ist'asir yuqan uywiriparuw tuku; jupasti mayni jilanakampiw tuti katuqarakini. 
Proverbs17:3 Qurisa, qullqisa ninamp yant'atawa; jaqin chuymanakapsti Tatituw yant'i." 
Proverbs17:4 Ñanqha lurir jaqix, ñanqhachir jaqiruw ist'i, k'ari jaqisti, k'ari jaqiruw ist'araki." 
Proverbs17:5 Jan kunan jaqit sawkasirix, jupan Irnuqirip Tatituruw ñanqhachaski; aynacht'añan jikxatasitapat larusirix, mutuyataw uñjasini." 
Proverbs17:6 Ch'ama qarit awkinakan pillupax, allchhinakapawa; wawanakasti awkina, taykana aytat kankañapawa." 
Proverbs17:7 Jan amuyt'an jaqitakix janiw suma arunak parlañapax sumäkaspati, janirakiw mä jilïr jaqitakisa k'ari arunak parlañapax sumäkaspati." 
Proverbs17:8 Yaqhanakar qullqi chilltas sarnaqir jaqix, taqi kunatakis ch'amanïkaspa ukham amuyasi; amuyatapatxa, kuna lurañanakansa walt'askakiwa." 
Proverbs17:9 Jan wali luratat pampachir jaqix, suma munasiñ utjayi; jan wali luratata jan pampachir jaqixa, jaqi masiparux juk'amp jayarst'ayi." 
Proverbs17:10 Amuyt'asir jaqix jupan askipatak tuqitäki ukxa, sum katuqasi; jan amuyt'asir jaqisti, patak kuti jawq'jatäkaspa ukas janiw amuyaskaspati." 
Proverbs17:11 Jan ist'asir pitthapir jaqix nuwasiñanakak thaqhi, ukampis mä urux wali qhuru uñisirimpiw jikintasini." 
Proverbs17:12 Jan amuyt'ani ñanqha amtäwini jaqimp jikthaptañat sipansa, qallunakap aparat qhuru osamp jikthaptañaw juk'amp walïspa." 
Proverbs17:13 Aski luratat ñanqhampi phuqhir jaqin utapatxa, janipuniw jan walinakax saraqtkaniti." 
Proverbs17:14 Ch'axwañ qalltañax, jawir umas jilarkaspa ukhamawa; uka ch'axwañar janïr mantkasin jithiqtxañax juk'amp askiwa." 
Proverbs17:15 Juchan jaqir juchap jan uñt'ayañampi, aski jaqir ina ch'usat juchañchañampi, uka pä luräwinakaruw Tatitux uñisi." 
Proverbs17:16 Inamayakiw jan amuyt'asir jaqix, yatiñ kankañ qullqimpis alasiñ munaskaspa." 
Proverbs17:17 Mä jilat masix, taqi pachan munasiripuniwa; llakisiñansti, jilamäkaspa ukham chuymachasi." 
Proverbs17:18 Jaqi masipan manusitapat sayt'añax, jan amuyt'asirïñawa; ukatsti jupaw phuqhañapäni." 
Proverbs17:19 Tuqisiñ munir jaqitakix, nuwasiñax jupatak sumarakiwa; khititix sinti parlki ukaxa, aynacht'añap thaqhaski." 
Proverbs17:20 Janipuniw ñanqha amtan jaqix aski jikxatkaniti; k'ari arunak parliristi jan walt'añaruw purini. 
Proverbs17:21 Jan amuyt'asir wawan awkipäñax llakisiñak apani; pisi chuyma wawan awkipäñax janiw kuna kusisiñäkisa. 
Proverbs17:22 Kusisit chuymax jaqin jakañap sumaptayi, llakisit chuymasti jan ch'aman tukuyi." 
Proverbs17:23 Ñanqha lurir jaqix jamasat qullq chilltayasi, chiqapar taripañäki uk maysar q'iwt'añataki." 
Proverbs17:24 Yatiñan jaqix juk'amp yatiñanïñ muni, jan amuyt'an jaqisti janiw kun munatapsa yatiskiti." 
Proverbs17:25 Jan amuyt'asir wawax awkipataki, taykapatakix jachañak utjayi." 
Proverbs17:26 Jan juchan jaqir mutuyañax janiw walïkiti, janirakiw aski jaqir jawq'añas walïkiti." 
Proverbs17:27 Yatiñan jaqinakax juk'ak parlapxi, ch'ikhi kankañasti amukt'añawa." 
Proverbs17:28 Jan amuyt'asir jaqis amukïskani ukaxa, yatiñan jaqit uñt'atäniwa." 
Proverbs18:1 Jupatakik kuns munir jaqix, munañaparukiw sarnaqi, suma iwxt'anaksa janiw katuqaskiti." 
Proverbs18:2 Jan amuyt'an jaqix janiw yatiqañ amtanïkiti; jupan amuyupak parlañ muni. 
Proverbs18:3 Ñanqha lurañanxa, p'inqachäwikiw utji; jach'a jach'a tukuñansti, jisk'achayasiñakiw utji." 
Proverbs18:4 Yatiñan jaqin arunakapax uma jalsunakar uñtatawa, jalir jawirar uñtat jakañ phuch'urakiwa." 
Proverbs18:5 Taripirinakan juchan jaqit arxatañapax janiw askïkiti; jan juchan jaqin arsusitanakapar janiw sañas janirakiw askïkiti. 
Proverbs18:6 Jan amuyt'an jaqin parlatanakapax ch'axwañanak utjayi, jan wali arupasti tuqisiñanak utjayaraki." 
Proverbs18:7 Jan amuyt'asir jaqin parlatapax jupa pachparuw aynacht'ayi; arunakapasti jakañapatakix sipitar uñtatawa. 
Proverbs18:8 Arunak apnaqir jaqin parlatanakapax suma muxsjamawa, ukampis chuyma manqhir mantasin jan walt'ayi." 
Proverbs18:9 Jayrasir jaqimpi, tukjir jaqimpix, ¡niyas jilapurjamawa!" 
Proverbs18:10 Tatitun sutipax jach'a pukarar uñtatawa, uka tuqiruw aski jaqinakax qhispiyasiñatak jalapxi." 
Proverbs18:11 Qamiritakix qamir yänakapax pirqanakampi muyuntat markäkaspas ukhamawa. 
Proverbs18:12 Jach'a jach'a tukuñax, aynacht'añawa; llamp'u chuyma tukuñasti, jach'ar aptatäñawa." 
Proverbs18:13 Janïr sum ist'kasin arsuñax, jan amuyt'asirïña, mä p'inqarakiwa." 
Proverbs18:14 Usutarux ch'am katxatatapaw wayxäsi, ch'ama thayjtatarusti, ¿khitirak waytaspasti?" 
Proverbs18:15 Yatiñan jaqinakampi, ch'ikhi jaqinakampiw thaqhapki uka yatiñ kankañ jikxatapxi." 
Proverbs18:16 Mä suma churäwimpix kawkhakamas mantañakiwa, wali aytat jaqin nayraqatapkamaw puriyi." 
Proverbs18:17 Nayraqat arsusirix, jani juchanïkaspa ukhamaw arsusi; jupampi juchikiristi purinisin qhanstayi." 
Proverbs18:18 Tatitun taripäwipaw ch'axwañanakar tukuyi, yaqha yaqharak ch'axwirinakar jaljtayi." 
Proverbs18:19 Mä jach'a pirqa tinkuyañax juk'amp jasakiwa, chuyma usuchjat jila masir chuymachañat sipana." 
Proverbs18:20 Sapa mayniw parlatapatjam katuqi, churäwipsa, jan ukax mutuyäwipsa." 
Proverbs18:21 Jakañampi, jiwañampix parlatatjam wakisi; sinti parlirinakax jan walt'añanakampiw t'aqhisini." 
Proverbs18:22 Mä suma warmi jikxatañax suma aski jikxatañawa; Diosan khuyapayasiñap katuqañawa. 
Proverbs18:23 Jan kunan jaqix achikt'asisaw arsu; qamir jaqisti jach'a jach'a tukusaw parli. 
Proverbs18:24 Yaqhip masinakax jank'akiw apanukusi, ukampis mayni masinakax jilasat sipan juk'ampiwa." 
Proverbs19:1 Jan kunani, chiqa kankañan jaqïñax juk'amp askiwa, jan yatiñan k'arintasir jaqïñat sipana." 
Proverbs19:2 Jan sum amuyt'as lurañax janiw walïkiti; mäki lurañanakanxa, pantjasiñaw utji." 
Proverbs19:3 Jaqix jan amuyt'asirïtap laykuw aynacht'i, ukatsti jaqix Tatiturukiw juchañchi." 
Proverbs19:4 Qamir yänakax walja masinak utjayi, jan kunan jaqirusti masinakapax apanukuwa." 
Proverbs19:5 K'arisis irkatir jaqix, mutuyatapuniw uñjasini; k'ari jaqisti janiw kunjämatsa jaltkaniti." 
Proverbs19:6 Waxt'asir jaqirux, taqi jaqinakaw thaqhapxi, masiparus tukupxaraki." 
Proverbs19:7 Jan kunan jaqirux pachpa jilanakapas jisk'achiwa, masinakapasti ukat juk'amp jupar apanukuni." 
Proverbs19:8 Yatiñ kankañ jikxatirixa, jupa pachpaw munasi; ch'ikhi kankañ jikxatiristi, kusisiñ jikxati." 
Proverbs19:9 K'arisis irkatir jaqix, mutuyatapunïniwa; k'ari jaqirusti jiwaw suyt'aski." 
Proverbs19:10 Jan amuyt'an jaqin qamirinakjam jakañapax janiw wakt'kiti, mä uywatan jach'a jilïrinakar apnaqañapas janiw wakt'karakiti." 
Proverbs19:11 Yatiñ kankañan jaqix janiw mäk mayjt'askiti, chuyma usuchjatas janis kunäkaspa ukhamak uñji, uka luratapasti jach'a kankañawa." 
Proverbs19:12 Reyin q'apisitapax leonan wararitapjamawa; khuyapayasiñapasti, alinakar purxatir sulljamawa." 
Proverbs19:13 Jan amuyt'an wawax awkipar t'aqhisiyiwa. Tuqisir warmisti jan sayt'as ch'aqir umjamawa. 
Proverbs19:14 Utampi, yänakampix, awkimpita, taykampit katuqasi, ch'ikhi warmisti Tatitun churäwipawa." 
Proverbs19:15 Jayrasiñax ikïk ikiyaski, jayra jaqisti manq'atjam t'aqhisini." 
Proverbs19:16 Kamachi arunak phuqhirix jakañap imasiski, Tatitun yatichäwi arunakap jisk'achiristi jiwaniwa." 
Proverbs19:17 Jan kunan jaqir mayt'irix Tatituruw mayt'aski, Tatit pachpaw uka manu phuqxani." 
Proverbs19:18 Wawamarux chiqachañjamäkipan chiqacham, ukampis janiw jiwayañkam jawq'jätati." 
Proverbs19:19 Sinti q'apisir jaqix mutuñ katuqani; jupar jan mutuyañasti, juk'amp jan waliruw puriyi." 
Proverbs19:20 Iwxa arunakar ist'am, chiqachäwi arunaksa katuqasirakim; ukhamat amuyt'asir jaqir tukuñamataki." 
Proverbs19:21 Jaqin amuyupan walja amtäwinakaw utji, ukampis Tatitun amuyt'äwipakiw phuqhasi." 
Proverbs19:22 Mä jaqin suma chuymanïñapaw munasi; apjasir jaqïñat sipansa, jan kunan jaqïskañax juk'amp askiwa." 
Proverbs19:23 Tatitur axsartañax jakañaruw irpi; kusisitakiw maynix jakasi, kuna jan walt'añansa jan t'aqhisisa." 
Proverbs19:24 Jayra jaqix amparapamp chuwar luqantkasasa, lakapar manq'a apkatasiñsa jayrasiwa." 
Proverbs19:25 Jan amuyt'asir jaqix mutuyat uñjasisakiw yatiqi; yatiñan jaqisti mä sapa chiqachatakiw yatiqi. 
Proverbs19:26 Awkir ñanqhachañasa, taykar utat apanukuñasa, uka luräwinakax, mä wawatakix jach'a p'inqawa, jan arxatkayarakiwa." 
Proverbs19:27 Munat wawaxay, chiqachäwi arunakarutix jan ist'kätaxa, yatiñ kankañan suma iwxa arunakapat saraqtasma." 
Proverbs19:28 K'arisis irkatir jaqix chiqa kankañat sawkasi; ñanqha lurir jaqin lakapasti jan walinak parli. 
Proverbs19:29 Jan ist'asir jaqitakix, mutuyäwix wakichatawa; jan amuyt'asir jaqitakix, jawq'jañax wakichatawa." 
Proverbs20:1 Vinox jaqirux jan amuyun tukuyi, machjayir umañanakasti jan walinak parlayaraki; machjasisin janiw khitis kuns yatiñ kankañamp lurkiti." 
Proverbs20:2 Reyin q'apisitapax wararir leonar uñtatawa; jupar q'apisiyirix, jakañap jan walt'añaruw puriyaski." 
Proverbs20:3 Ch'axwañanakar jan mantañ munir jaqitakix, mä suma jach'añchäwiwa; jan amuyt'asir jaqisti uka ch'axwañanakar mantakiwa." 
Proverbs20:4 Jayra jaqix qhulliñ pachanxa janiw qhullkiti, yapu apthapi pachansti thaqtaniwa, janiw jikxatkaniti." 
Proverbs20:5 Jaqin amtäwinakapax chuymapan, qutar uñtat wali manqhawa, ch'ikhi jaqisti, ukanak kunjäm jikxatañsa yatiwa." 
Proverbs20:6 Waljaniw suma aski jaqit uñt'ayasiñ munapxi, ukampis janiw khitis aski jaqix utjkiti." 
Proverbs20:7 Taqi kunansa askin sarnaqawayir jaqin wawanakapax, jupat yatiqasis sarnaqapkani ukapachaxa, kusisiñanïpxaniwa." 
Proverbs20:8 Reyix juchanir taripañatak qunt'aski ukapachaxa, uñkatasakiw ñanqha lurir jaqir tukji." 
Proverbs20:9 ¿Khitirak saspa: “Chuymaxax q'umawa, juchatsa q'umachatätwa” sasati?" 
Proverbs20:10 Tatitux pä jan wali lurañaruw ñanqhachi: k'ari tupuñanakampiru, wayuqat tupuñanakampiru." 
Proverbs20:11 Mä waynan chiqa sarnaqatapax, luratanakapat uñt'asi." 
Proverbs20:12 Jinchux ist'añataki, nayrax uñjañataki, ukanakax Tatitun uchatawa." 
Proverbs20:13 Jan anch ikimti, jan ukasti jan kunaniw uñjasïta; irnaqañ lup'im, manq'añasti jilarkiriw utjarapïtam." 
Proverbs20:14 Alasir jaqix, ¡janiw sumäkiti! siwa, alasxasinxa, jupa pachpaw alasitapat jach'achasi." 
Proverbs20:15 Akapachan qurinakat sipansa, k'ajkir qalanakat sipansa, yatiñ kankañamp arsur jaqiw juk'amp askixa." 
Proverbs20:16 Jumatix jan uñt'at jaqin manunakap phuqhañatak sayt'ätaxa, jumaruw mä kuns mayipxätam isimamppach apt'asirakïta." 
Proverbs20:17 Sallqjañampi jikxatat t'ant'ax jaqitakix sumawa, qhiparusti, laq'sa manq'kaspa ukhamaw tukxi." 
Proverbs20:18 Amtäwinakax suma iwxa arunakampiw wakt'ayasi; nuwasïwir sarañatakis wali yatiñampi wakt'ayañawa. 
Proverbs20:19 Arunak apnaqir jaqix janiw mä kuns imt'añ yatkiti, arunak apnaqir jaqinakampix jan chikachasimti." 
Proverbs20:20 Awkiparu, taykapar ñanqhachir jaqix, wali axsarkañ ch'amakan jiwani." 
Proverbs20:21 Kunatix qalltan jasak jikxatatäki ukax, tukuyarux janiw kusisiñ churkaniti." 
Proverbs20:22 Janiy samti: “Ukhamat, ukham lurarakï” sasaxa. Tatitur alkatasim, jupaw atipt'ayaskätam." 
Proverbs20:23 Tatitux jan phuqhat tupuñanak uñisiwa, wayuqat tupuñanakax ñanqhachkayawa." 
Proverbs20:24 Tatituw jaqin sarnaqäwip sarayaski; janiw khitis yatiskiti jupa pachpan tukuyäwipxa. 
Proverbs20:25 Diosar mä kun churañataki arsuñaxa, wali amuyasiñawa, uka qhipat arsutap phuqhañ jan munaskañataki." 
Proverbs20:26 Yatiñan reyix jan ist'asiri ñanqha jaqinakarux, jupa nayraqatat jaqunukuwa, ukatsti jupanakarux jan mayan tukji." 
Proverbs20:27 Jaqin ajayupax Diosan qhanapawa; jaqin chuyma manqhip qhant'iri qhanawa. 
Proverbs20:28 Reyix jaya maranakaw reyi qunuñapanki, munasiñampi, chiqa kankañamp apnaqki ukapacha." 
Proverbs20:29 Waynanakan jach'achasiñapax ch'amanakapankiwa; ch'ama qarit awkinakan jach'achasiñapasti, janq'u ñik'utapankiwa." 
Proverbs20:30 Nuwjañanakampi, chhuxriñchjañanakampiw jaqin ñanqha luratanakap qullart'i; uka nuwjañanakaw chuymap waliptayi." 
Proverbs21:1 Reyin amtatanakapax Tatitun amparapan jawirar uñtatawa; kawkharutix jupax munki ukaruw irpi. 
Proverbs21:2 Jaqitakix taqi luratanakapax walikjamakiwa, ukampis Tatituw chuymanakan amtäwinakap yati." 
Proverbs21:3 Wilañchanaka, waxt'äwinak katuqañat sipana, Tatitutakix chiqa kankañamp uñjaña, axsartañ chuymamp sarnaqañaw juk'amp askixa." 
Proverbs21:4 Jach'a jach'a tukuñasa, wali yatiñan tukuñasa, jan walinak lup'iñas juchawa." 
Proverbs21:5 Suma amuyt'ampi lurat amtäwinakax sumakiw phuqhasi, mäki wakichat amtäwinakasti aynacht'añaruw puriyi." 
Proverbs21:6 K'arimpi jikxatat yänakax, jiwq'ir uñtataw chhaqtawayxi; jiwar puriyir sipitarakiwa." 
Proverbs21:7 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakarux pachpa ñanqha luratapaw tukjani, chiqa kankañan jan sarnaqañ munirïtap layku." 
Proverbs21:8 Jan wali lurir jaqin sarnaqäwipax q'iwinukuta jan waliwa, aski jaqin luratanakapasti q'umawa." 
Proverbs21:9 Uta anqa k'uchun jakasiskañax juk'amp askiwa, suma jach'a utan ch'axwir warmimp jakañat sipana." 
Proverbs21:10 Jan wali lurir jaqix ñanqha lurañak lup'iski; janipuniw jaqi masiparux khuyapayasiñ chuymamp uñjañ munkiti. 
Proverbs21:11 Ñanqha lurir jaqin mututap uñjasaw, jan amuyt'an jaqix yatiqi; yatiñan jaqisti mä kuti yatichatakiw yatiqi." 
Proverbs21:12 Chiqapar uñjir Diosax, ñanqha jaqin utap uñch'uki; ñanqha lurir jaqinakarusti, tukjatäñatakiw katuyi." 
Proverbs21:13 Jan kunan jaqin achikt'asitapar jan ist'ir jaqixa, jupax yanap maykani ukkhax, janirakiw ist'atäkaniti." 
Proverbs21:14 Q'apisit jaqir mä suma churäwi waxt'añaxa, q'apisiñapsa sumaptayiwa." 
Proverbs21:15 Aski jaqix chiqa kankañamp uñjat taripäwitxa, kusisiwa, jan wali lurir jaqinakatakisti tukjatäñapaw purini." 
Proverbs21:16 Ch'ikhi kankañamp jan sarnaqir jaqixa, jiwatanak taypiruw purini." 
Proverbs21:17 Kusist'äwinakar munir jaqix, jan kunaniruw tukuni, machañanakampiru, suma q'apkir qullanak uchasiñanakampir munir jaqix, jan kunaniw tukusini." 
Proverbs21:18 K'ari ñanqha lurir jaqix, aski jaqin t'aqhisiñap t'aqhisini." 
Proverbs21:19 Sapak jakaskañaw juk'amp askixa, ch'axwiri, tuqisiri thithi warmimp jakañat sipana." 
Proverbs21:20 Yatiñan jaqin utapanxa qamir yänakampi, suma q'apkir qullanakampiw utji, jan amuyt'asir jaqin utapansti t'unanakakiw utji." 
Proverbs21:21 Chiqana, askin sarnaqañ thaqhir jaqixa, jakañampi, jach'ar aytatäñamp jikxati." 
Proverbs21:22 Yatiñan mä sapa jaqikiw munasi, mä jach'a marka katuntañataki." 
Proverbs21:23 Suma amuyt'amp kunsa parlir jaqix, janipuniw jan walt'añanakar mantkiti." 
Proverbs21:24 Jach'achasiñampi lurir jaqix, jan watxtasiri, jach'a jach'a tukuri, jan amuyt'asiri sutiniwa." 
Proverbs21:25 Jayra jaqix taqi kunsa wal muni, irnaqañsti janiw munkiti;" 
Proverbs21:26 willjtat jayp'ukamaw taqi kuns munapayaski. Aski jaqisti, jan mich'asisaw churañ yati." 
Proverbs21:27 Tatitux ñanqha jaqinakan waxt'äwinakap uñisi, jan wali amtäwinakamp luqtapxatap layku." 
Proverbs21:28 K'arisis irkatir jaqix tukjatäniwa, ist'asir jaqisti, kunjäm arsuñsa yatipuniniwa." 
Proverbs21:29 Ñanqha lurir jaqix janis axsarayaskaspa ukhamaw tuku, aski jaqisti jakäwip chiqachasi." 
Proverbs21:30 Tatit nayraqatanxa janiw yatiñ kankañax kunäkxiti, janirakiw ch'ikhi kankañasa, suma amuyt'asiñas kunäkxiti." 
Proverbs21:31 Jaqix nuwasïwir sarantañatakiw caballo wakichasi, ukampis atipjäwix Tatitunkiwa." 
Proverbs22:1 Walja qurinïñat sipana, walja qullqinïñat sipana, suma jaqit uñt'atäñaw juk'amp askixa." 
Proverbs22:2 Qamir jaqisa, jan kunan jaqis khuskhakiwa; panpachaniruw Tatitux irnuqi." 
Proverbs22:3 Ch'ikhi jaqix jan walt'añ uñjasinxa, jaltxiwa, jan amuyt'asir jaqisti, saraskakiwa, ukat t'aqhisiraki." 
Proverbs22:4 Llamp'u chuymamp Tatitur axsartas sarnaqañaxa, qamir kankañampi, jach'ar aptatäñampi, jakañamp katuqañawa." 
Proverbs22:5 Ñanqha lurir jaqin sarnaqäwipax sipitanakamp phuqhantatawa, suman sarnaqañ munir jaqisti, ukanakat jithiqtiwa." 
Proverbs22:6 Wawarux jisk'atpach sarnaqäwipan sum yaticham, awkïxani ukkhasti janiw uka yatichäwinakat armaskaniti." 
Proverbs22:7 Qamir jaqix pist'añan jakasir jaqinak taypinxa, reyiwa; qullqi mayt'iristi, manusir jaqinak taypinxa reyirakiwa." 
Proverbs22:8 Jan walinak yapuchir jaqix, jan walinak apthapirakini; ¡Tatituw jupar tukjani q'apisiñ jach'a kankañapampi!" 
Proverbs22:9 Khuyapayasiñampi mayninakar uñjir jaqix askinak katuqani, t'ant'ap jan kunan jaqinakamp jaljt'asitap layku." 
Proverbs22:10 Pitusir jaqir jaqunukum, jachjayasiñanakasti tukusxaniwa, ch'axwañanakasa, chuym ust'ayasiñanakas sayt'xaniwa." 
Proverbs22:11 Reyix qhana chuyman jaqiruw muni, quña arumpi parlir jaqimpiw suman sarnaqasiraki." 
Proverbs22:12 Tatitux yatiñan jaqiruw sum imaski, k'ari jaqirusti p'inqachayiwa." 
Proverbs22:13 Jayra jaqix jan irnaqañ munasin siwa: “Mä leonaw anqan utji, thakhinpach jisk'a jisk'a tukjitaspa” sasa." 
Proverbs22:14 Jan wali sarnaqir warmin lakapax wali manqha phuch'ur uñtatawa; Tatitur q'apisiyir jaqinakasti ukaruw jalanti. 
Proverbs22:15 Pisi amuyt'amp lurañax waynanakan amuyupawa; ukampis ukax jawq'ampi chiqachatawa. 
Proverbs22:16 Qamiriptañ munasin jan kunaninakar lunthatirixa, jan kunaniw tukusini." 
Proverbs22:17 Yatiñan jaqinakan säwinakapar taqi chuymamp ist'am, yatichksma ukanak amuyt'arakim." 
Proverbs22:18 Chuymaman imxäsiñax kusisiyätamwa, ukhamat taqpachan mayaki arsuñataki." 
Proverbs22:19 Jichhüruw nayax jumar yatiysma, Tatitur taqi iyawsañ chuymamp alkatañamataki." 
Proverbs22:20 Nayax kimsa tunka säwi arunak qillqarapsma, ukanakasti suma iwxa arunakawa, yatiñ arunakarakiwa," 
Proverbs22:21 chiqa kankañ uñt'añam yatichañataki, ukhamat jumar jiskt'asirinakar sum arusxatañ yatiñamataki." 
Proverbs22:22 Jan kunan jaqitxa jan kuns aparamti jan kunanïtap layku, janirak taripirinak nayraqatansa jupar t'aqhisiyamti," 
Proverbs22:23 Tatituw jupan arxatiripaxa, jupar t'aqhisiyirinakarusti t'aqhisiyaniwa." 
Proverbs22:24 Qhuru jaqinakampix jan chikachasimti, janirak tuqisiñ chuyman jaqinakamp sarnaqamti," 
Proverbs22:25 jupanakan jan wali luräwinakap jan yatiqasiñamataki, jakañamar sipit jan uchasiñamataki." 
Proverbs22:26 Janipun yaqha jaqinakan manunakap phuqhañatak arsumti," 
Proverbs22:27 jan kunampi phuqhirjamäkätaxa, ikiñamamppach aparapxätam." 
Proverbs22:28 Nayra awkinakaman uchat qurpanakxa, jan jithinaqayamti." 
Proverbs22:29 Lurañap sum lurir jaqix, reyinakan luqtiripäniwa, janiw jan yäqat jaqinakan luqtiripäkaniti." 
Proverbs23:1 Mä aytat jilïritix manq'añatak jawsaykätam ukkhaxa, sum amuyt'asim khitis juman nayraqatamanki uka." 
Proverbs23:2 Jumax wali manq'at awtjatäskamsaya, juk'ak manq'asim;" 
Proverbs23:3 uka suma manq'anakap jan munaraqamti, jumarux sallqjaskiristamwa." 
Proverbs23:4 Qamiriptañatak jan ch'amachasimti; jan ukxat llakisimti. 
Proverbs23:5 Qamir kankañax mä juk'atakikiwa; pakanakar uñtataw akatjamat chhaqtawayxi, chhiqhanakapas tukuskaspa ukhama." 
Proverbs23:6 Mich'a jaqimp manq'añatak jan qunt'asimti, janirak suma manq'anakapsa munapayamti," 
Proverbs23:7 uka manq'anakax mallq'aman mä t'awrar uñtatäniwa. Uka jaqix manq'añampitaki, umt'añampitakiw jawsätam, ukampis janiw taqi chuyma siskätamti;" 
Proverbs23:8 ukatsti kuntix manq'kta uk waq'aqsütawa, suma arunakamasti inamayakïniwa." 
Proverbs23:9 Jan amuyt'an jaqirux janiy jinchu jak'at parlxayamti, jupax yatiñ kankañan arunakamat sawkasïtamwa." 
Proverbs23:10 Nayra pacha uchat qurpanak jan jithiyamti, janirak wajchanakan uraqip katuntasimti;" 
Proverbs23:11 jupanakan qhispiyiripax wali ch'amaniwa; jupaw jupanakat arxatasisin jumatak sayt'ani. 
Proverbs23:12 Yatichäwi arunak sum chuymamar katuqam, suma iwxa arunakarjam jaysas sarnaqam." 
Proverbs23:13 Wawanakar chiqachañ wakischi ukaxa, wakisiw jawq'antañaxa, mä qawqha jawq'antax janiw jiwaykaniti;" 
Proverbs23:14 wawarutix ukham chiqachäta ukax, jiwañat qhispiyäta." 
Proverbs23:15 Munat wawaxay, jumatix yatiñ kankañ jikxatät ukaxa, chuymaxax wal kusisini;" 
Proverbs23:16 jumatix chiqap parläta ukaxa, nayax walipuniw kusisï." 
Proverbs23:17 Jucharar jaqinakat jan munapayasimti, ukat sipana, axsartañ chuymamax Tatitutakïpan;" 
Proverbs23:18 tukuy urunakamasti sumäniwa, suyt'äwimas janiw t'unatäkaniti." 
Proverbs23:19 Wawaxay, sum ist'am, yatiqarakim; suma thakhinjampun saram." 
Proverbs23:20 Machir jaqinakampix jan mayachasimti, janirak sinti manq'ir jaqinakampisa." 
Proverbs23:21 Machirinakasa, sinti manq'irinakas aynacht'añaruw puri, jayra jaqinakasti isitsa jalstataw sarnaqapxi." 
Proverbs23:22 Jumar jathasir awkimar ist'am; taykamax ch'ama qaritäxani ukkhax jan jisk'achamti. 
Proverbs23:23 Chiqa kankañampi, yatiñ kankañamp jikxatam, yatichäwimpi, amuyt'a kankañampi, ¡ukanaksti jan chhaqhayasimti!" 
Proverbs23:24 Awkix wal kusisi, jach'achasirakiwa, wawapan yatiñ kankañanïtapata, suma jaqïtapata." 
Proverbs23:25 ¡Jumasti awkimarusa, taykamarus kusisiyamaya, jach'ar aptayarakim!" 
Proverbs23:26 Munat wawaxay, taqi chuymamamp nayar ist'ita, iwxa arunakaxarjam sarnaqarakim." 
Proverbs23:27 Jan uñt'at jan wali sarnaqir warmix, wali manqhi k'ullk'u phuch'ur uñtatawa;" 
Proverbs23:28 uka warmix lunthatjamaw katuntañatak suyxati, walja chachanakaruw chhaqhañar puriyi." 
Proverbs23:29 ¿Khitisa t'aqhisixa? ¿Khitisa ayquxa? ¿Khitis ch'axwañana, jachañansa sarnaqixa? ¿Khitis jan juchat chhuxriñchjat uñjasixa? ¿Khitis nayras ch'uxñantat sarnaqixa?" 
Proverbs23:30 Machañanakan sarnaqir jaqiw ukham t'aqhisiski, yaqha machjasiñ umañanak uñstayir jaqiw t'aqhisiskaraki." 
Proverbs23:31 Machjayasir umañanak jan uñtamti, ¡suma llijkirik jupuqtaskatapsa, suma quñak umt'añjamätapsa!" 
Proverbs23:32 Tukuyarux katarir uñtatawa, achjasaw mich'intasi." 
Proverbs23:33 Jan uñjañanak uñjayätam, jan amuyt'amp parlañanak parlayarakïtam." 
Proverbs23:34 Jach'a quta taypinkkasmas ukham amuyasïta, jach'a lawxan jipt'atäkasmas ukham amuyasïta," 
Proverbs23:35 ukatsti sätawa: “Nuwapxituwa, janiw uskituti; jawq'japxituwa, janiw amuyaskti, ikit sartasinsti, umañ thaqhiriw wasitat sarä” sasa." 
Proverbs24:1 Ñanqha jaqinakar jan uñch'ukimti, jupanakamp chika sarnaqañsa janirak munamti," 
Proverbs24:2 jupanakax ch'axwañanakatak lup'isipki, jan wali lurañanakatak parlasipkaraki." 
Proverbs24:3 Utax yatiñ kankañampi luratawa, qallta qalapas ch'ikhi kankañampi uchatawa;" 
Proverbs24:4 uta manqhinakaparux aski kankañampi phuqhantatawa, jila alan munkañ yänakampi." 
Proverbs24:5 Yatiñan jaqix ch'aman jaqit sipan, askiwa; ch'amanïñat sipansa, yatiñ kankañanïñaw juk'amp askixa," 
Proverbs24:6 nuwasïwix suma amuyt'ampi nuwasiñaw wakisi, atipjañatakisti walja iwxirinakar ist'añaw wakisi." 
Proverbs24:7 Jan amuyt'asir jaqix taripirinak nayraqatanxa, janiw kun arsuñsa yatkiti, yatiñ kankañax jupatakix janiw jikxatañjamäkiti." 
Proverbs24:8 Jan walinak lup'ir jaqix “Jan wali amtir jaqit” uñt'atawa. 
Proverbs24:9 Jan amuyt'asir jaqin amuyupax jucha lurañakiwa; ¡jan yäqasir jaqix, taqinin uñisitawa!" 
Proverbs24:10 Jan walt'añan uñjasisatix mayjt'asïta ukapachaxa, jan ch'amanïtam uñacht'aytaxa." 
Proverbs24:11 Jiwañatak juchañchata jaqinakar qhispiyam; jiwañ chijin uñjasirinakar qhispiyam. 
Proverbs24:12 “Janiw kuns yatkäyätti” siskäta ukasa, Tatitux chuymam uñt'iwa, jupasti sapa mayniruw lurataparjam churani." 
Proverbs24:13 Munat wawaxay, misk'i manq'asim; mallt'am misk'ix lakatak muxsawa." 
Proverbs24:14 Jumatakix yatiñ kankañasa, uñt'añ kankañasa, ukham misk'ïniwa; jumatix ukanak jikxatätaxa, qhipa urunakamax sumäniwa, amtäwinakamasti phuqhasiniwa." 
Proverbs24:15 Aski jaqitakix sipitanak jan wakicharapimti, janirak jakasiñ utaparus jan walinak luraraqamti," 
Proverbs24:16 aski jaqix paqallq kutis aynacht'kanixa, kutjtaskakiniwa, ñanqha lurir jaqisti jan walt'añapan aynacht'ani." 
Proverbs24:17 Uñisiriman aynacht'atapat, jan kusisimti, chijir puritapatsa janirak chuymamax k'uchispati," 
Proverbs24:18 ukham luratamax janiw Tatitutak sumäkaniti, q'apisiñapasti jumxaruw purini." 
Proverbs24:19 Ñanqha lurir jaqinak laykux jan mayjt'asimti, janirak qhuru jaqinakar uñch'ukimti," 
Proverbs24:20 ñanqha lurir jaqix janiw suma tukuyäwi jikxatkaniti; ¡ñanqha lurir jaqix micha qhanar uñtataw jiwt'awayxani! 
Proverbs24:21 Munat wawaxay, Diosampitaki, reyimpitakix axsartañ chuymanïma; uñisirinakamampix jan mayachasimti," 
Proverbs24:22 jupanakan tukusiñapax akatjamat purinini, janiw khitis yatkiti kuna mutuyäwtix Diosampi, reyimpi churkaspa ukxa." 
Proverbs24:23 Aka arunakax yatiñan jaqinakan säwi arunakaparakiwa: Taripirinakax taqinirus chiqapar uñjapxañapawa, janiw maynitak arxatasipxañapax walikäniti" 
Proverbs24:24 Taripiritix juchan jaqir sani: “Janiw juchanïktati” sasaxa, jupax jaqinakan ñanqhachataw uñjasini, markanakas uñisirakiniwa." 
Proverbs24:25 Ukampis juchanir juchap uñt'asiyirinakax, kusisitaw jakapxani." 
Proverbs24:26 Chiqap arunakamp arusxatir jaqix, lakatsa suma jamp'atkaspa ukhamawa." 
Proverbs24:27 Anqan lurañanakamäk ukxa tukuyam, pampan lurañanakamäki uksti luram, ukat utam utachasiskäta." 
Proverbs24:28 Jan amanut masimar k'arintañatak sayt'amti, janirak k'ari arunak qhanañchamti." 
Proverbs24:29 Janipun kunapachas phuqsusiñ lup'imti, ukhamat ukham maynir lurasa." 
Proverbs24:30 Jayra jaqin yapup jak'a sarakipawayta, pisi amuyt'a jaqin uva yapup jak'a sarta," 
Proverbs24:31 yapupax ch'aphinakampi chhaqhantayatawa, qala uyupas liju lluxinuqatawa." 
Proverbs24:32 Ukham uñjasaw chuymaxan lup'ista; uk uñjasinsti aka yatichäwi yatiqta: 
Proverbs24:33 jumax ikt'asiskätawa, iki ch'awaskarakïta, amparanakamsa sum ikt'añatak qhumxarusiskäta," 
Proverbs24:34 ukchañkamasti jan kunan uñjasiñax akatjamat purinini, mä muyuyku jaqir uñtataw katuntätam." 
Proverbs25:1 Aka arunakax Salomonan säwi arunakaparakiwa, ukanakasti Judá uraqi apnaqir Ezequías reyin uywat jaqinakapan qillqatänwa." 
Proverbs25:2 Chuymar imxäsiñax Diosan jach'a kankañapawa, uka imantat yatxatañasti reyinakan jach'a kankañaparakiwa." 
Proverbs25:3 Ukampis janiw amuyt'añjamäkiti, alaxpach amstata, uraq manqhita, reyinakan amtäwinakapatsa." 
Proverbs25:4 Qullqin q'añup apaqam, qullqi yänak luriristi ukat mä chuwa lursuni;" 
Proverbs25:5 reyir luqtir jucharar jaqirux apanukum, ukat reyi qunuñapax chiqa kankañxar sayt'ayatäni." 
Proverbs25:6 Reyin nayraqatapan jach'a jach'a jan tukumti, aytat jaqinakan qunuñaparus janirak qunt'asimti:" 
Proverbs25:7 “Akkhar qunt'asim” satäñax juk'amp askiwa, aytat jaqinak nayräxan p'inqachat uñjasiñat sipana. Kuntix nayramamp uñjkäta ukxa," 
Proverbs25:8 jan mäki taripañ utar yatiyir jalamti, yaqha jaqiw jutasin may qhanañcharakispa, jumasti p'inqa tukusma." 
Proverbs25:9 Jumar juchañchir jaqitakix arsusim, kuntix yaqhanakax yatiyapktam uksti, jan khitirus arsumti;" 
Proverbs25:10 yaqha jaqix jumar ist'asin p'inqachayiristamwa, jan wali jaqit uñt'ayasitamasti jan askichkayäspawa." 
Proverbs25:11 Wakisitapar arsut arunakax, qullqimp k'iñintat quri manzanar uñtatawa." 
Proverbs25:12 Yatiñan jaqin chiqachäwi arunakap katuqasir jaqitakix suma quri sortijampiru, suma quri wallqampir uñtatawa," 
Proverbs25:13 Kunjämtix junt'u urun khunu thayax thayart'ayki, ukar uñtataw yatiyir aski jaqixa, uywiripan chuymapsa juyart'ayiwa." 
Proverbs25:14 Jan kuna churkasa: “Nayax churtwa” sasa jach'achasiri jaqix; mä thayjamaw thayi, jan uman qinayar uñtatarakiwa." 
Proverbs25:15 Llamp'u chuymax q'apisit chuymarux sumaptayiwa; suma arunakasti q'apisiñampi arsut arunakarux quñaptayiwa. 
Proverbs25:16 Misk'i jikxatät ukaxa, jan jilañchjas manq'amti, jilañchjas manq'asma ukasti waq'aqjasïtawa." 
Proverbs25:17 Jilat masiman utaparux jan sapa kuti saramti, jumampi amjayasxasinxa, uñisxakiristamwa." 
Proverbs25:18 Jilat masipat jan walinak parlir jaqix, mä espadat sipansa juk'amp usuchji." 
Proverbs25:19 Llakisiñan ch'uxña lurasir jaqir alkatañaxa, kayu p'akjatas sarnaqañäkaspa ukhamawa, jan ukax, laka k'amanpach manq'añäkaspa ukhamawa." 
Proverbs25:20 Llakit jaqitak jayllirapiñax, iñawtatat janchir vinagremp warxatatäkaspa ukhamawa, jan ukax, wali thayansa isi apsusitäkaspa ukhamawa." 
Proverbs25:21 Uñisirimatix manq'at awtjayaschixa, manq'a churam; umat pharjayaschisti, uma churarakim;" 
Proverbs25:22 ukham lurasax, juparux llakthapisiyätawa, Tatitusti jumarux kutiyxätamwa." 
Proverbs25:23 Amsta tuqit thayt'anir thayax jallu purxatayi, jan wali arunakasti q'apisiñ utjayi." 
Proverbs25:24 Uta anqa k'uchun jakasiñax juk'amp askiwa, suma jach'a utan tuqisir warmimp jakañat sipana." 
Proverbs25:25 Umat pharjat jaqitakix thaya uma umt'añax sumawa, ukhamarakiw jayat jutir suma yatiyäwinakax kusist'ayi." 
Proverbs25:26 Aski jaqin ñanqha lurir jaqir jaysatapax, qunchu umani jawirampi q'añuchaskaspa ukhamawa." 
Proverbs25:27 Walja misk'i manq'añax janiw walïkiti, walja jach'añchäwinak katuqañas walïkarakiti." 
Proverbs25:28 Jalta chuymap jan apnaqañ yatir jaqix, jan pirqani, chijitak jan wakichat markar uñtatawa." 
Proverbs26:1 Junt'u pachan khunuñapax janiw askïkiti, yapu apthapi pachan jalluñapas janiw walïkiti, janirakiw jan amuyt'an jaqir jach'achañas askïkiti." 
Proverbs26:2 Ina ch'usat ñanqhachäwix janiw khitirus wakt'kiti; chhaqhat jamach'ir uñtata, jan tapani golondrina sat jamach'ir uñtatakiwa." 
Proverbs26:3 Caballorux axaptayañawa, asnorux jakimampiw irpnaqaña, jan amuyt'an jaqirusti jawq'jasarakiw chiqachaña." 
Proverbs26:4 Jan amuyt'an jaqirux jan arxayamti, jupjam jan tukuskañamataki." 
Proverbs26:5 Jan amuyt'an jaqirux jupatakjam arunakampi arusxatam, jan jupan amuyuparjama yatir tukuñapataki." 
Proverbs26:6 Jan amuyt'an jaqir iwxa arunak apayañax, janis khitir khitksna ukhamawa." 
Proverbs26:7 Kamisatix suchu jaqix jan jayar sarirjamäkixa, ukhamarakiw jan amuyt'asir jaqin säwi arunakapaxa." 
Proverbs26:8 Kamisatix maynix q'urawar qala chinkatki, ukhamarakiw jan amuyt'asir jaqir jach'ar aptañaxa." 
Proverbs26:9 Kamisatix machat jaqix ch'aphin ch'aphintatax jan usuyaskixa, ukhamarakiw jan amuyt'asir jaqix säwi arunak jan amuyt'kiti." 
Proverbs26:10 Kamisatix alayar qalanak jaqt'añax jan walïkixa, ukhamarakiw jan amuyt'an jaqir utaman lurañanak churañaxa." 
Proverbs26:11 Kamisatix mä anux waq'aqsutapar kuttasixa, ukhamarakiw jan amuyt'an jaqix jan wali luräwinakapar kuttasi." 
Proverbs26:12 Yaqhip jaqix wali yatiñanïkaspas ukhamaw tuku, ukampis jan amuyt'asir jaqiw jupat sipan chiqachasispa." 
Proverbs26:13 Jayra jaqix jan irnaqañ munasax siwa: “Anqan mä leonaw utji, manq'antitaspawa” sasa." 
Proverbs26:14 Punkux bisagrapan uksar aksar muytaskixa, ukhamaw jayra jaqix ikiñapan uksar aksar qurumnaqaski." 
Proverbs26:15 Jayra jaqix amparapamp chuwar luqantkasinsa, lakapar manq'a apkatasiñsa jayrasiwa." 
Proverbs26:16 Jayra jaqix wali yatiñan jaqjamaw tuku jupjamax janis khitis utjkaspa ukham amuyasi. 
Proverbs26:17 Mayninakan ch'axwañanakapar mantañaxa, qhuru anur jinchupat katthapksna ukhamawa." 
Proverbs26:18 Jilat masipar sallqjir jaqix," 
Proverbs26:19 ina ch'usar qalanak jaqtir luqhi jaqir uñtatawa, ukatsti siwa: “Aliqakiw sawkt'asisksma” sasa." 
Proverbs26:20 Lawanak jan uchatax, ninax jiwarxakiwa; arunaka apnaqiritix jan utjki ukkhaxa ch'axwanakax tukusxiwa." 
Proverbs26:21 K'illimix nina sank'ayañatakiwa; lawax nina aqtayañatakiwa; ch'axwanak utjañapatakisti, arunak apnaqir jaqiw munasi." 
Proverbs26:22 Arunak apnaqañax jaqitakix muxsanakjamawa, ukampis chuyma manqhakamaw purt'i." 
Proverbs26:23 Kamisatix ñiq'i phukhur qullqimp jawikipaskixa, ukhamaw ñanqha amtañampi arsuta quña arunakaxa." 
Proverbs26:24 Uñisir jaqix, parlaski ukkhax imt'iwa, chuymap manqhinsti jan wali lurañanak amtaski." 
Proverbs26:25 Suma quña arunakamp parlätam ukkhasti, jan iyawsamti, chuymapax jan wali lurañanakamp phuqt'atawa;" 
Proverbs26:26 uñisiñap imt'añ munkani ukasa, ñanqha amtäwipax taqininsa uñjkañaw qhanstani." 
Proverbs26:27 Mä p'iya allirixa, uka pachparuw jalantani; mä jach'a qala qurumt'ayirirux, uka pachpa qalaw jupar jalxattani." 
Proverbs26:28 K'ari jaqix chiqa kankañar uñisiwa; quña aruni sallqa jaqisti jan walt'añanak sartayi. 
Proverbs27:1 Qharürutxa jan jach'a jach'a tukkamti; janiw khitis yatkiti kuntix jutir urunakax apankani ukxa. 
Proverbs27:2 Janiw walïkiti juma pachpa jach'achasiñamaxa, mayninakäpan jumar jach'achirinakaxa." 
Proverbs27:3 Qalanakampi, ch'allampix jathiwa, jan amuyt'asir jaqin q'apisitapasti juk'amp jathiwa." 
Proverbs27:4 Q'apisiñax chuyma ch'amakt'ayasiñ apani, munapayañax ukat sipan juk'amp jan waliwa." 
Proverbs27:5 Qhana chuymamp maynir chiqachañax juk'amp askiwa, jamasataki munañat sipana." 
Proverbs27:6 Chuyma usuchjasir jilat masir alkatañax juk'amp askiwa uñisirin jamp'atip katuqañat sipana. 
Proverbs27:7 Manq'amp sist'at jaqitakix, misk'is janiw sumäkxiti, manq'at awtjat jaqitakisti, k'allk'u manq'as muxsakiwa." 
Proverbs27:8 Yurïwipat jayan sarnaqir jaqix, tapapat jayan sarnaqir jamach'ir uñtatawa." 
Proverbs27:9 Q'apkir qullanakax chuymaruw kusisiyi; jilat masinakan iwxa arupax, jakäwiruw kusisiyi." 
Proverbs27:10 Janipun jilat masinakamarux apanukumti, janirak awkiman jilat masinakaparusa apanukumti. Janipuniw jilaman utaparux jan walt'añanakamat parlir sarätati. Uta jak'ankir jaqi masiw juk'amp askixa jayankir jilatat sipana." 
Proverbs27:11 Munat wawaxay, yatiñanïmaya, nayarux kusisiyitätawa; ukhamat nayar jisk'achir jaqinakatak arsusï." 
Proverbs27:12 Ch'ikhi jaqix jan walt'añ uñjasinxa jaltxiwa; jan amuyt'asir jaqisti saraskakiwa, ukat t'aqhisiñan uñjasi." 
Proverbs27:13 Jan uñt'at jaqin manup phuqhañatak sayt'ir jaqirux, isipa apaqam, phuqhañapkam uka isip katxäsim." 
Proverbs27:14 Jilat masir willjtat jach'at aruntañax, jupatakix tuqinuqatäkaspas ukamp sasiwa." 
Proverbs27:15 Ch'axwañak munir warmixa, jallu pachan jan sayt'as ch'aqir umar uñtatawa." 
Proverbs27:16 Ukham warmir jark'añ munañasti thayar jark'añ munksna ukamp sasiwa, jan ukax, amparar aceite katxäsiñ munksna ukhamawa." 
Proverbs27:17 Hierrox yaqha hierromp liq'jas ariptayatawa, aski jaqïñatakisti, jilat masimp amuyt'ayatäñawa." 
Proverbs27:18 Higo yapu sum uñjir jaqix, achupat manq'asini; uywiripar sum uñjir jaqisti, jach'añchäwinak katuqani." 
Proverbs27:19 Kamisatix umar uñxatasin ajanup uñjaskixa, ukhamarakiw jaqix chuymap uñantasi." 
Proverbs27:20 Jiwampi, amay imäwimpi, jaqin yänakap munapayañ chuymampix janipuniw kunapachas sisthapipkiti." 
Proverbs27:21 Qurirusa, qullqirus ninaw yant'i; jaqirusti jach'añchäwinakaw yant'araki." 
Proverbs27:22 Jan amuyt'asir jaqirux walja kutis nuwjaskam, janipuniw jan amuyt'asir chuymap apaqkasmati." 
Proverbs27:23 Uywanakam sum uñjasim, ovej tamanakamat llakisipunim," 
Proverbs27:24 qamir kankañasa, reyïñasa janiw wiñayäkiti." 
Proverbs27:25 Kunapachatix quranakax ch'uxñatatkani, alinakax qullut apthapiskani ukapachasti," 
Proverbs27:26 ovejanakamat t'awra yawisïta, isi lurasiñamataki, cabritonakamatsti qullq katuqarakïta, uraqinak alasiñamataki," 
Proverbs27:27 cabranakamax manq'añamatakiw jilarkir leche churätam, utamankirinakar manq'ayañataki, uywatanakamas taqpachan manq'asipxañapataki." 
Proverbs28:1 Ñanqha lurir jaqix jan khitin arknaqkataw jaltxi, aski jaqisti leonar uñtataw jan kunar axsaras jaki." 
Proverbs28:2 Markax jan wal sarnaqki ukapachaxa, walja apnaqirinakaw sarti, suma yatiñamp apnaqiristi, markarux sum irpxaruñ yati." 
Proverbs28:3 Jan kunaninakar t'aqhisiyir jaqix yapunak tukjir jach'a jallur uñtatawa. 
Proverbs28:4 Kamachi arunak apanukurinakax, ñanqha lurir jaqiruw jach'achapxi; kamachi arunakarjam phuqhirinakasti, ñanqha lurir jaqitakiw sayt'asipxi." 
Proverbs28:5 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax chiqa kankañat janiw amuyt'apkiti, Tatitur thaqhirinakasti, taqi kun amuyt'apxi." 
Proverbs28:6 Sallqjasir qamir jaqïñat sipansa, jan kunanïskaña, chiqa lurirïskañaw juk'amp askixa." 
Proverbs28:7 Diosan kamachip phuqhirix, ch'ikhi wawawa, taqi kun tukuntir wawasti, awkiparux p'inqachayiwa." 
Proverbs28:8 Jila jalaqtampi qullqi mayt'as qamir yänak waljaptayir jaqix, jan kunan jaqinakat khuyapayasir jaqitakiw waljaptayaski." 
Proverbs28:9 Diosan kamachipar jan ist'añ munir jaqirux, janiw jupan mayisitap Diosax ist'kaniti." 
Proverbs28:10 Aski jaqinakaru jan wali thakhinjam irpir jaqirux, jupan wakichat pachpa sipitaruw jalantaskani, aski chiqa jaqinakasti, askinak katuqapxani." 
Proverbs28:11 Qamir jaqix wali yatiñaniw tuku; jan kunan jaqisti ch'ikhi kankañapampiw qamirin jan amuyt'asirïtap yati. 
Proverbs28:12 Aski jaqinakax atipjapki ukapachax, kusist'apxiwa; jan wali jaqinakax atipjapki ukkhasti, jaqinakax imantasxapxiwa." 
Proverbs28:13 Juchap imt'asir jaqix, janiw nayrar sarkaniti, juchap arsusisin jaytanukxani ukasti, pampachatäxaniwa." 
Proverbs28:14 Tatiturupun axsartir jaqix, kusisiñaniwa, chuyma qalarayasir jaqisti, jan walt'añaruw purini." 
Proverbs28:15 Jan wal apnaqir mä qhuru jilïrix, wararir leonar uñtatawa, pist'añan sarnaqir markar t'aqhisiyas apnaqi." 
Proverbs28:16 Jan amuyt'ani mark apnaqirix, t'aqhisiyaña, lunthatasiñak lup'iski, ukanak jan luriristi, jaya maranakaw jakani." 
Proverbs28:17 Jaqi jiwayatapat arknaqat jaqix, jiwañkamaw imantasiñatak jalnaqaskani, ¡janiw khitis jupar arxatkaniti!" 
Proverbs28:18 Chiqa aski jaqix qhispitaw uñjasini, jan wali jaqisti aynacht'añaruw purini." 
Proverbs28:19 Uraqipana yapuchasir jaqin manq'añapax jilarkiriwa; jayra jaqinakamp sarnaqir jaqisti, jan kunaniw uñjasini." 
Proverbs28:20 Chiqa aski jaqix jach'añchataw uñjasini; jank'aki qamiriptañ munir jaqisti, juchap uñt'asini." 
Proverbs28:21 Janiw jaqi masi ajlliñax walïkiti; ukhamat mä jisk'a t'ant'a laykus juchar puriñax utji. 
Proverbs28:22 Juk'ampst'ir jaqix mäkiw qamiriptañ muni, jan kunan uñjasiñ uru puriniñap janiw amuykiti." 
Proverbs28:23 Jach'añchiri jaqit sipana, k'umisir jaqiw qhipxarux munatäni." 
Proverbs28:24 Awkipar taykapar lunthatir jaqix; jan wali jaqinakan masipawa, jupasti siwa: “janiw ukax juchäkiti” sasa." 
Proverbs28:25 Juk'ampst'añ munir jaqix, nuwasiñanak utjayi, Tatitur alkatir jaqisti nayraqataruw sum sarxaru." 
Proverbs28:26 Jupa pachpan amuyt'äwipar alkatasir jaqixa; jan amuyt'asir jaqiwa, yatiñ kankañamp sarnaqir jaqisti qhispitaw uñjasini." 
Proverbs28:27 Jan kunan jaqir yanapt'irix, janiw kuns pist'ayaskaniti, yanapt'añ jan muniristi, wali ñanqhachataw uñjasini." 
Proverbs28:28 Ñanqha lurir jaqinakax atipjapki ukapachaxa, jaqinakax imantasxapxiwa; uka ñanqha lurir jaqinakax tukusipki ukkhasti, aski jaqinakax juk'ampiw utji." 
Proverbs29:1 Chiqachäwi jan katuqañ munir jaqix, jan mayampitakiw tukjat uñjasini." 
Proverbs29:2 Aski jaqinakan apnaqatax, markax kusisiwa; ñanqha lurir jaqinakan apnaqat markasti, t'aqhisiwa." 
Proverbs29:3 Yatiñ kankañan wawax awkipar kusisiyiwa; jan wali sarnaqir warminakamp sarnaqiristi, qullqi tukunti." 
Proverbs29:4 Chiqa kankañampi apnaqir reyix, markarux thuruñchiwa, qullqik mayir reyisti aynacht'añaruw marka puriyi." 
Proverbs29:5 Masipar sinti jach'achir jaqix, chiqpachansa jan walt'añapatakiw sipita uchaski." 
Proverbs29:6 Ñanqha lurir jaqin sipitapax, jupan pachpa juchanakapawa, axsartir jaqisti kusisitaw jakasi." 
Proverbs29:7 Aski jaqix jan utjirin jaqin sarnaqäwipat llakisi, ñanqha lurir jaqitakisti janiw ukax kunäkisa." 
Proverbs29:8 Ch'axwanak utjayir jaqinakax, markaruw uxtayi; yatiñan jaqinakasti sumankañ utjayi." 
Proverbs29:9 Yatiñan jaqin mä jan amuyt'an jaqimpi ch'axwañapax janiw walïkiti; q'apisiskpasa, sawkasiskpasa, janiw kuns askichkaniti." 
Proverbs29:10 Jaqi jiwayir jaqinakax, chiqa aski jaqinakan jiwañap munapxi." 
Proverbs29:11 Jan amuyt'an jaqix mäkiw kunatsa q'apisi, yatiñan jaqisti q'apisiñap mäkiw apanuku." 
Proverbs29:12 K'ari arunakar ist'ir marka apnaqirix, ñanqha lurir luqtirinakan muyuntataw jakani." 
Proverbs29:13 T'aqhisiyat jaqirusa, t'aqhisiyir jaqirusa, Tatitux panpachaniruw nayranak churi." 
Proverbs29:14 Jan kunan jaqinakaru, chiqa kankañamp apnaqir reyix, wiñayatakiw reyi qunuñap thuruñchi." 
Proverbs29:15 Jawq'ampi tuqimpiw yatiqañax utji, munañan wawasti taykaparux p'inqachayiwa." 
Proverbs29:16 Kawkhantix ñanqha lurir jaqinakax mirantki ukkhanxa, walja jucha lurañanakaw utjaraki, chiqa aski jaqinakasti uka jaqinakan aynacht'äwip uñjani." 
Proverbs29:17 Wawamar chiqacham, jupasti samarataw jakayätam, walirak kusisiyätam." 
Proverbs29:18 Kawkhantix Diosan arunakapax jan yatichaski ukkhanxa, jaqinakax munañaparuw sarnaqi; ¡Diosan kamachip phuqhir markax kusisiñaniwa!" 
Proverbs29:19 Uywat jaqirux janiw arumpik chiqachañäkiti, jupax amuyaskiwa, ukampis janiw ist'askiti." 
Proverbs29:20 Jan amuyt'asir jaqiw walïskaspa, jan amuyt'asis mäki parlir jaqit sipana." 
Proverbs29:21 Uywataparu wawatpach sinti q'ayachir jaqix, qhiparuw amtasini." 
Proverbs29:22 Mäki kunatsa mayjt'asir jaqix, nuwasiñanak utjayi, walja kutiw pantjasiraki." 
Proverbs29:23 Jach'a jach'a tukurix jisk'achataw uñjasini, llamp'u chuymanisti jach'ar aptatäniwa." 
Proverbs29:24 Lunthatar yanapirix jupa pachpaw uñisisi; ñanqhachäwinak ist'kasinsa jupax janiw arskiti. 
Proverbs29:25 Jaqinakar axsarañax sipitar uñtatawa, ukampis Tatitur iyawsir jaqiw imatäni." 
Proverbs29:26 Waljaniw jilïr apnaqirin khuyapayasiñap thaqhapxi, ukampis Tatitukiw chiqapar uñjirixa." 
Proverbs29:27 Aski jaqinakax, jan wali jaqinakarux uñisiwa; ñanqha lurir jaqinakasti, aski jaqinakarux uñisirakiwa." 
Proverbs30:1 Agur chachan säwi arunakapa, Masa chiqankir Jaqué sat chachan yuqapa. Agur chachax Itiel chachampiru, Ucal chachampiruw akham parläna:" 
Proverbs30:2 Jaqinak taypin jan yatiñan jaqïtwa, janiw nayan jaqjam amuyt'asiñaxax utjkiti." 
Proverbs30:3 Janiw nayax yatiñ kankañ jikxatkti; janirakiw qullan Diosan yatiñapatsa yatkti. 
Proverbs30:4 ¿Khitirak alaxpachar makhatasin saraqanisti? ¿Khitirak thayar amparapar q'apxäsispasti? ¿Khitirak lamar qutar isipampi llawuntaspasti? ¿Khitirak uraqin qurpanakap utt'ayisti? ¿Jumax sutip yattati, wawapan sutipsa yatiraktati?" 
Proverbs30:5 Tatitux jupar iyawsirinakarux imiwa; jupan arsutanakapasti chiqapawa. 
Proverbs30:6 Jupan arunakapar jan kunsa yapxatamti, jan ukasti jumarux tuqiristamwa, k'arit uñt'ayarakiristam." 
Proverbs30:7 Dios Tatay, pä mayiñaxaw jumar utjitu; naya janïr jiwkipan ist'ita:" 
Proverbs30:8 K'arisiñampita, ch'uxña lurañampit jithiqtayita janiy jan kunan sarnaqañsa, qamir kankañsa churistati, kunatix jakañaxataki manq'añax wakiski ukak churita." 
Proverbs30:9 Nayax qamirïxirista ukaxa, inas jumat armasxirisma: “¿Khitirak Diosasti?” sasa; jan kunanïrista ukasti, inas lunthatasxirista, ukhamat qullan sutim nayax p'inqachayirista." 
Proverbs30:10 Janipun uywat jaqitxa, uywirip nayraqatan jan walinak parlamti, jupax ñanqhachiristamwa, jumasti mutuñ katuqasma." 
Proverbs30:11 Yaqhip jaqinakax awkiparux ñanqhachapxiwa; janirakiw taykaparus waqaychapkiti. 
Proverbs30:12 Yaqhip jaqinakax wali q'umäpkaspas ukham amuyasipxi, ukampis juchanakan phuqhantatäsipkiwa." 
Proverbs30:13 Yaqhip jaqinakax jach'a jach'aw tukupxi, mayninakarusti jisk'achañampiw uñjapxi." 
Proverbs30:14 Yaqhip jaqinakax qhurüpxiwa, laka ch'akhanak lantix espadanïpxiwa, markankir jan kunan jaqinakar tukjañataki." 
Proverbs30:15 Sanguijuela sat animalax pä qalluniwa, uka qallunakasti mayiñak yatipxi. Jan sisthapirinakax kimsaw utji, ukhamarus pusiw utjaraki, ukanakax janipuniw sisthapipkiti:" 
Proverbs30:16 amay imäwi, jan wawachasir warmi, jan uman uraqi, jan sisthapir nina." 
Proverbs30:17 Awkipar jisk'achir jaqiru, ch'ama qarit taykapar jan jaysir jaqirux, nayranakap allqamarinakan apsupxañapax wakisiwa, siwiq'aranakan jakkirpach manq'antapxañapax wakisiwa." 
Proverbs30:18 Kimsaw nayatakix wali muspharkaña, pusïristi nayatakix jan amuyt'kayawa:" 
Proverbs30:19 alay chiqanjam pakan thakhipa, qarqa patanakanjam jiskhanaqtir asirun thakhipa, jach'a quta taypinjam sarir barcon thakhipa, warmin jakäwipan chachan thakhipa." 
Proverbs30:20 Yaqha chachamp jan wali sarnaqir warmin luratapax akhamawa: Jupax jucha luratapxa imt'asiwa, ukatsti “Janiw kuna ñanqhsa lurkti” sarakiwa." 
Proverbs30:21 Kimsa tama jaqinakaw utji, ukhamarus pusiw utjaraki, uka jaqinakasti jan walinak lurapxi mä markarus khathatiyapxiwa:" 
Proverbs30:22 mä uywatan reyïñar puritapa, jan yatiñan jaqin sinti qamirkipstatapa," 
Proverbs30:23 jisk'achat warmin jaqichasitapa, uywat warmin jupar uywir warmi lanti tukxatapa." 
Proverbs30:24 Aka uraqin pusi jisk'a animalanakaw utji, ukanakasti yatiñan jaqinakat sipan juk'amp yatiñanïpxiwa:" 
Proverbs30:25 k'isimiranaka, ukanakasti jan ch'amani waljäpxiwa, yapu apthapi pachansti manq'añ apkatasipxi;" 
Proverbs30:26 wank'unaka, ukanakasti janiw waljäpkiti, qarqa taypinakan jakapxaraki;" 
Proverbs30:27 t'iju t'ijunaka, ukanakasti jan reyinïkasinsa, tam tamaw sarantañ yatipxi;" 
Proverbs30:28 jararankhunaka, ukarusti amparampi katthapiñjamakiwa, reyin jach'a utaparus puripxakiwa." 
Proverbs30:29 Kimsa jan axsaririnakaw utji, ukhamarus pusiw utjaraki, munañan kankañamp sartirinaka:" 
Proverbs30:30 wali axsarkañ león, ukasti janiw khititsa, kunäkipansa jaltañ yatkiti;" 
Proverbs30:31 jach'a jach'a tukur gallo, urqu cabrito, ejercitopan nayräxap sarantir reyi." 
Proverbs30:32 Jan sum amuyt'asisatix jach'a jach'a jumax tuksta ukaxa, jan walinak lurañtix amtsta ukaxa, akanak lup'im:" 
Proverbs30:33 Leche jirüta ukaxa, mantequillaw misturapïtam; nasamat wali ch'amamp qhixsüta ukaxa, wilakiw mistxani; maynirutix q'apisiyäta ukaxa, nuwasiñakiw utjxani." 
Proverbs31:1 Masá chiqankir Lemuel reyin säwi arunakapa; uka arunakampiw taykapax jupar yatichawayäna: 
Proverbs31:2 Purakaxat yurir munat wawaxay, mayisitaxar Diosan churat wawaxay, ¿kamsarakïmasti?" 
Proverbs31:3 Ch'amamxa warminakar jan tukjasimti; warminakampi sarnaqañaw reyinakar aynacht'ayi. 
Proverbs31:4 Lemuel, janiw walïkiti reyinakan vino umañapaxa janirakiw walïkiti jilïr irpirinakan machjasiñ umañanakampi machañtasiñapaxa," 
Proverbs31:5 machantasisinsti, kamachi arunak armasipxaspa, jan kunan jaqinakar chiqapar uñjañat armasipxaspa." 
Proverbs31:6 Machañanakxa, aynacht'atanakataki, llakitanakatak apanukum;" 
Proverbs31:7 machantasipxpan, aynacht'at kankañapat armasipxpan, t'aqhisiñanakapatsa jan amtasipxpati." 
Proverbs31:8 Jan arsusirjamäpki uka jaqinakat jach'at arsum; ¡jan arxatasirjamäpki uka jaqinakat arxatasim! 
Proverbs31:9 Arxatam, jupanakar chiqapar uñjam; ¡pist'añan sarnaqir jaqinakampiru, llamp'u chuyman jaqinakampir arxatam!" 
Proverbs31:10 Yatiqaskay suma warmix janiw jikxatañjamäkiti; ¡jupax suma k'ajkir qalanakat sipan juk'amp jilawa! 
Proverbs31:11 Chachapax taqpach chuymampiw jupar alkati; janipuniw kunapachas pist'añanakan sarnaqkiti. 
Proverbs31:12 Jupasti chachaparux suma askinak lurasaw sarnaqäwipan yanapi. 
Proverbs31:13 Jupax t'awrampi, linompi thaqhiriw sari, kusisiñampiw amparamp taqi kun luri." 
Proverbs31:14 Aljañanaka apanir barcor uñtatawa; jaya chiqanakat manq'añanak utapar apani. 
Proverbs31:15 Wali willjtat sartasin wawanakapar manq'ayi, uywatanakaparus manq'ayarakiwa." 
Proverbs31:16 Mä uraqi jikxati, ukatsti sum uñjasin alasi, jikxatatapampiw uva alinak ayrusiraki." 
Proverbs31:17 Jupax ch'amañchasiwa, taqi chuymampiw irnaqañatak wakichasi." 
Proverbs31:18 Aljasiñanakap jupax sumaruw sarayi, arumkamaw irnaqi, janiw ch'am jiwt'ayaskiti." 
Proverbs31:19 Pachpa amparapampiw t'awra qapu, ukat sawuraki." 
Proverbs31:20 Jan kuna utjirin jaqinakarusa, pist'ayasiñan jikxatasirinakarus khuyapt'ayapuniwa." 
Proverbs31:21 Janiw khunu thayar axsarkiti utapankirinakax taqpachaniw suma thuru isinak uchasipxi. 
Proverbs31:22 Jupa pachpaw ikiñanak sawst'asi, suma telat lurat isinakampiw isisiraki." 
Proverbs31:23 Chachapasti markan suma uñt'atawa, wali aytat jilïr chachanak taypin qunt'asi." 
Proverbs31:24 Jupax isinaka, wak'anak lurasinxa, alakip luririnakaruw alji." 
Proverbs31:25 Jupax askin sarnaqañampiw ch'amañchasi, jutir urunakatsti janiw axsarayaskiti." 
Proverbs31:26 Jupax yatiñ kankañampipuniw parli, munasiñampiw wawanakapar yaticharaki." 
Proverbs31:27 Jupax utap sum uñjasi, janipuniw ina ch'usat jikxatat manq'a manq'kiti." 
Proverbs31:28 Wawanakapasa, chachapasa juparux jach'añchiwa, sapxarakiwa:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Aski lurir warminakax waljaniw utji, ukampis jumax taqi uka warminakat sipan juk'ampïtawa” sasa." 
Proverbs31:30 Suma uñnaqan warmix k'arikiwa, jiwakïñas inamayakiwa, Tatitur axsartir warmiw jach'ar aptkañaxa." 
Proverbs31:31 ¡Taqi jaqinak nayraqatan jupar jach'añchapxam! ¡Taqi luratanakapar jach'añchapxarakim! 
Ecclesiastes1:1 David chachan Arunak Yatiyir yuqapan arsutanakapax akanakawa, jupasti Jerusalén markan reyipänwa: ¡Inamayakiwa, inamayakiwa! ¡Taqi kunas inamayakiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes1:2  
Ecclesiastes1:3 ¿Jaqisti kuna askirak jikxati, akapachan sapür irnaqasasti?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Mayninakax yuripxiwa, mayninakasti jiwapxarakiwa, ukampis uraqix pachpakïskiwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Intix jalsuniwa, intix jalantarakiwa, wasitat jalsuniñatakisti jank'akiw pachpar kutt'i." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Thayax aynach tuqiruw thayt'i, ukatsti amsta tuqiruw muyti. ¡Thayax muytas muytasaw sari! ¡Muytanisax pachpar muyjtaskakiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Jawiranakax lamar qutarkamaw sarapxi, lamar qutasti janiw phuqhantaskiti; jawiranakax kawkhattix sarki ukkharuw kuttani, ukat wasitat jawirnam jalañataki." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Taqi kunaw qarjayasi uk qhanañchirix janiw khitis utjkiti; janiw uñjkasasa, ist'kasas ukanakamp sisthapkiti, ukhamat kusisiñapataki." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Kunjamäkäntix nayra pachax ukhamakïskiwa; kunatix nayrax luraskän ukax pachpakiw lurasiski. ¡Janiw kunas akapachan machaqat luraskiti! 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Akham sirix utjapuniniwa: “¡Akapï machaqat lurataxa!” sasa. Ukampis ukax jiwasanakat patak maranak nayrax utjapunïnwa. 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Kunatix mäkipawayki ukax armatawa, kunatix jutkani ukanakas jutirimp chik armatäxaniwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Naya, Arunak Yatiyirix Jerusalén markan Israelan reyipäyätwa," 
Ecclesiastes1:13 ukatsti nayax yatxatañaruw uchasta, kunatix aka uraqin luraski ukanak ch'ikhi kankañamp yatxatasa. ¡Tatitux ch'ama tukuyañampiw jaqinakarux jisk'ar tukuyi!" 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ukat nayax amuyta, akapachan kunanakatix lurañäki ukanakax inamayakïtapa, thayarus katthapiñ munksna ukhama." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 ¡K'umuptatarux janiw chiqaptayksnati, jan utjki ukatsa janiw jakhthapksnati!" 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ukhamasti naya pachpaw chuymaxan sista: “Akax uñjapxita, wali jach'a jaqir tukt'atätwa, nayat nayra Jerusalenan apnaqapkän ukanakat sipan wali yatiñanïtwa; yatxatañampiru, yatiñ kankañampirus wali katuyatätwa, ukhamarakiw jan amuyt'asirïñaru, pisi chuymanïñarus katuyasta, ukampis taqi ukax thayarus katthapiñ munksna ukhamakïtap amuyta” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes1:17  
Ecclesiastes1:18 Chiqpachansa juk'amp yatiñansti juk'amp jan walt'añaw utji; juk'amp yatxatirix juk'amp llakisi. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ukat naya pachpaw chuymaxan sarakta: “Jichhax nayax kusisiñan yant'ä; kunatix sumäki ukampiw jakäwixan kusisi” sasa. ¡Ukampis ukax inamayarukiw tukuwayi! 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ukat sista: “Larusiñax luqhi kankañawa, kusist'añas janiw kunatakis askïkiti” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Amuyuxampi, yatiñ kankañampi apnaqatax vino mallt'añ munasaw machañar katuyasta, jaqix akapachan jakht'at urunakapan kuna asksa jikxataspa, uk yatiñataki." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Jach'a lurañanak lurta; reyi utanak utachasta; uva yapunakaw utjitäna. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Nayaw yapunakaxa, panqar yapunakax yapuchasta, uka yapunakarux muxsa achur alinak ayrusta." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Uma qutacht'añanak lurta, ayrut alinakar umamp qarpañataki;" 
Ecclesiastes2:7 chachatsa warmitsa uywatanak alasta, ukhamarus utaxan yuripki uka uywatanakaxaw utjitäna; vacanakasa, ovejanakas nayat juk'amp nayra Jerusalenankapkän ukanakat sipansa, waljapuniw utjitäna." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Qursa, qullqsa waljpun apthapta, ukanakax yaqha suyun reyinakan yänakapänwa. Q'uchur chachanaka, q'uchur warminakaw utjitäna, jaqinakan kusisiñapan wal kusisiyäta, warminakas waljaw utjitäna." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Nayax wali aytat jaqïyätwa, nayat nayra Jerusalenan jakapkän ukanakat sipan juk'amp yänakaw utjitäna. Ukhamarus yatiñ kankañaxax janiw nayat saraqkitänti." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Kuntix munkäyät uk luräyäta; kunampitix kusisiñ munkäyät ukampiw kusisïyäta. Taqi chuymaxampiw luratanakaxat kusisïyäta, ukatsti uka kusisiñaw nayan churäwixäna." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ukatsti nayax kuntix lurkäyäta, qawqha ch'amtix irnaqañatak apskäyät uk uñakipta, ukat taqi kunas inamayakïtap amuyarakta, thayarus katthapiñ munksna ukhamakiwa, janiw kuna askis akapachan utjkiti." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Uka qhipatsti yatiñ kankañata, pisi amuyt'anïñata, jan amuyt'asirïñat lup'irakta: ¿Kunat juk'ampsa nayan qhipaxat jutir reyix luraspa kunatix luratäxi ukatxa?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ukat nayax amuyta, yatiñ kankañax pisi amuyt'anïñat sipansa juk'amp askïtapa, kunjämatix qhanax ch'amakat sipan juk'amp askïki ukhama." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Yatiñan jaqix sum uñjañaruw uchasi, ukampis pisi amuyt'anix ch'amakanjam sarnaqi. Ukatsipana, taqinirus pachpak suyt'atap amuyta," 
Ecclesiastes2:15 ukat sista: “Kunatix pisi amuyt'anirux suyt'ki ukax nayaruw suyt'arakitu, ukhamasti nayatakix wali yatiñanïñax janiw askïkiti. ¡Ukas inamayakiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Yatiñan jaqitsa, pisi amuyt'an jaqitsa janipuniw khitis amtaskaniti; pachanak mäki sarakipatapatsti taqiw armatäxi, yatiñan jaqisa, pisi amuyt'an jaqis kipkakiw jiwapxi” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Nayax jakañar uñisiñaruw purta, kunatix aka uraqin luraski ukax nayatakiw sayt'i. Chiqpachansa, taqi ukas inamayakiwa, ¡thayarus katthapiñ munksna ukhamakiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Nayax akapachan kuntix lurkäyät ukanak uñisiñaruw purta, ukampis taqi ukanak naya qhipat jutir jaqir jaytañaxäniwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ukatsti, ¿khitirak naya qhipat jutir jaqin ch'ikhïtapsa, pisi amuyt'anïtapsa yatispasti? Ukatsipana nayax kunanaktix ch'ama tukuñampi, yatiñ kankañamp jikxatkta uk katusini. ¡Ukas inamayarakikiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Akapachan kuntix nayax lurkäyät uk uñjasinxa, jan inakt'as irnaqataxat wal amtasta," 
Ecclesiastes2:21 maynix yatiñampi, uñt'añampi, suma luraña yatitampi luratapaxa jaytxañatakikiwa, khititix jan lurkäna taqi ukanaka jupan katuntasiñapataki ¡Ukasti inamayakiwa, jan chiqapar uñjañarakiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ukhamasti, ¿kuns jaqix akapachan jan inakt'as irnaqasa, llakisisax jikxati?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Taqi jakäwipas llakisiña, ch'ama tukuñakiwa; janiw amuyupas arumax samart'kiti. ¡Ukax inamayarakikiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Mä jaqitakix manq'asiña, umaña, irnaqäwipat kusisiña ukakiw juk'amp askixa, ukampis taqi ukas Tatitut jutatap amuyarakta." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Jan jupäspa ukasti, ¿khitirak manq'aspa, kusisirakispasti?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Chiqpachansa Tatituw khitirutix munki ukarux yatiñ kankañsa, yatxatañ chuymsa, jan ukax kusisiñsa churi; ukatsipana jucha lurir jaqirux yänak jikxatañapatakiw irnaqayi, ukat khitirutix munki ukar churxañataki. ¡Ukasti inamayarakikiwa, thayarus katthapiñ munksna ukhamakiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Aka uraqin taqi kunas pachanikiwa; mä pachakiw taqi kunatakis utji: 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Yuriñ pacha, jiwxañ pacha. Ayrunak ayruñ pacha, ayrutanak jik'thapiñ pacha." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Jiwayañ pacha, qullt'añ pacha. Tukjañ pacha, utacht'añ pacha." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Jachañ pacha, larusiñ pacha. Llakisiñankañ pacha, kusisiñankañ pacha." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Qalanak willtañ pacha, qalanak apthapiñ pacha. Qhumantasiñ pacha, jaljtañ pacha." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Thaqhañ pacha, chhaqhayañ pacha. Imañ pacha, jaqtañ pacha." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Ch'iyanuqañ pacha, ch'ukthapiñ pacha. Amukt'añ pacha, parlañ pacha." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Munasiñ pacha, uñisiñ pacha. Ch'axwañ pacha, sumankañ pacha." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 ¿Ukataq irnaqir jaqisti, kuna askirak jikxatisti?" 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Diosax jaqir ch'ama tukuñanak katuyatap amuyta, ukat ukanakampix jisk'ar tukuyañataki." 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Diosax pachaparuw taqi kuns munkañ luri; ukhamarus jaqin amuyuparux kunatix wiñayäki uk uchi, janisay jaqix kuntix Diosax lurki, kuntix lurkani uk amuykpan." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ukat nayax amuyta, jaqin askipax kusist'aña, k'uchik sarnaqt'aña ukakiwa," 
Ecclesiastes3:13 ukampis jiwasatix manqt'asiñäni, umt'asiñäni, irnaqäwisat kusist'añäni ukaxa, Diosaw ukham jiwasar churistu." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Kuntix Diosax lurki ukan wiñayatakïtap amuyarakta. Janiw ukar yapt'añas apaqañas wakiskiti; Diosaw ukham luri, jupa nayraqatan axsart'añax utjañapataki." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Kunatix utjki ukax nayrax utjapunïnwa, ukatsti kunatix utjkani ukanakas niy utjxiwa. Diosaw wasitat utjayaski." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Akapachan ñanqha lurañanaka, jan walinak utjatap uñjarakta, ukanak lantix aski luraña, chiqapar uñjañaw utjañapäspa." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ukat sarakta, Diosaw aski jaqirus ñanqha jaqirus chiqapar uñjaskani, ukampis taqi kun lurañatakix mä pachakiw utji." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Jaqin sarnaqäwipatsti saraktwa, Tatituw jaqinakarux yant'aski, jupanakan uywanakjamätap amuyasipxañapataki." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Chiqpachansa jaqinakampi uywanakampix mä sapa tukuyanikiwa: maynis maynisa kipkak jiwapxani, jakayir samanas jupanakatakix janiw yaqha yaqhäkiti. Jaqix janiw uywat sipan jilankkiti; taqi kunas inamayakiwa," 
Ecclesiastes3:20 taqinis mä chiqarukiw puripxani; laq'at luratäpxiwa, pachpa laq'aruw taqinis tukupxani." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 ¿Khitis jaqin ajayupan amstar makhatatapa, uywan ajayupas uraq manqhar saraqatap yatisti?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ukat nayax amuyta, jaqin askipax luräwipat kusist'añakiwa, ukampis juparux ukhamaw wakt'i, jupan jiwxatapatsti janiw khitis kunatix luraskän uk uñacht'aykaniti." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ukatsti aka uraqin kunjämtix t'aqhisiyapki ukanak uñjta. Ukat t'aqhisiyatanakan jachatanakap uñjarakta, ukampis janiw khiti chuymacht'iripas utjkiti; t'aqhisiyirinakapax ch'amampiw apnaqapxi, ukampis janiw jupanakar khiti chuymachirix utjkiti." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ukat nayax jiwirinakan kusisiñanïtap amuyta, jakasipki ukanakat sipansa;" 
Ecclesiastes4:3 ukampis uka panit sipansa khitinakatix janïr yuripki ukanakaw wali kusisitäpxi, jupanakax janïraw aka uraqin jan wali luratanakap uñjapkiti." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Jan inakt'as irnaqaña, nayraqatar sartañax maynit maynikam jilankañ thaqhatapak uñjarakta, ukasti inamayarakikiwa, thayarus katthapiñ munksna ukhamakiwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Jaqix siwa: “Jan amuyt'asir jaqix janiw irnaqañ munkiti, ukat manq'atjam jiwaski” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Ukampis nayax sistwa: “Mä juk'a samart'añax askiwa jan samart'as irnaqañat sipana, ukampis jan inakt'as irnaqañax inamayakiwa” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Maysa tuqitsti akapachan kunatix inamayäki uk uñjarakta: 
Ecclesiastes4:8 mä sapa chachax jan jila masinakani, jan wawanakani, jan jilanakaniwa, ukat janiw kunapachas samart'kiti, janipuniw qamir yänakap uñjkasas kusisitäkiti, janirakiw jiskt'askarakisa: “¿Khititakis taqi akanak jikxattxa? ¿Kunatsa jakäwixan jan k'uchirtaspachätxa?” sasa. Ukampis taqi akanakax inamayakiwa, mä jathi q'ipïkaspas ukhama." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Mayni sapat sipansa panïñaw juk'amp askixa, ukhamat irnaqatapas juk'amp uñstaraki." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Maynitix jupanakat liwischi ukaxa, mayniw juparux wayti. ¡Ukampis kunakïkan sapak liwiski ukatakixa, janiw khiti waytiripas utjkaniti!" 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ukampis panitix ikipxani ukaxa, purapat junt'uchasipxani; ukampis mayni sapaxa, ¿kunjämarak junt'thapispasti?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Mayni sapax atipjatäspawa, ukampis panix atipjapxaspawa, ukhamarus kimsat k'anat wiskax janiw mäki t'aqaskaspati." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Mä tuqitxa, pisi amuyt'an iwxanak jan ist'asir reyit sipansa, mä jan kunan ch'ikhi waynaw askixa." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Uka waynax carcelat mistunisin reyit qunt'askchi ukasa, jan ukax jan kunanïkas reyïñar purkchi ukasa, nayax akapachan jakir jaqinakarux jupar yanapt'ir uñjta." 
Ecclesiastes4:15  
Ecclesiastes4:16 Jupax walja markarus apnaqkchini ukasa, qhiparux janiw uka jaqinakarusa, wawanakaparus kusisiykanit. Ukhamasti ukax inamayarakikiwa, thayarus katthapiñ munksna ukhamakiwa." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Kunapachatix Diosan utapar sarkät ukkhaxa, sarnaqäwim uñakipasim, ñanqha lurir jaqinakan wilañchap luqtañat sipansa, ist'añatak jupar jak'achasim." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Diosatak mä kun lurañatakis jan mäki arsumti, Diosax alaxpachankiwa, jumasti akapachankaraktawa. Ukat juk'ak parlañamax wakisi," 
Ecclesiastes5:3 sinti lup'isax samktatapxiwa, sinti parlasasti jan wali arunak arsupxi." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Kunapachatix kun lurañatakis Diosar arsüta ukkhaxa, jank'ak uk phuqham, jupax janiw pisi amuyt'anirux munkiti. Kuntix lurañatak arskta uk phuqham," 
Ecclesiastes5:5 arsutar jan phuqhañat sipansa, jan kuns arsuñaw askixa." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Arsutamampix jan juchachasimti, janirak Diosan khithataparus “Pantjastwa” samti. ¿Kunatsa parlatamampix Diosar phiñasiyäta, ukat luratanakam t'unjañapatakisti?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Uka layku, walja lup'iñanak taypina, kunayman arunak taypina, jan amuyt'asin lurañanak taypinsa, jumax Diosar axsartañamawa." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Mä markantix jan kunanir t'aqhisiyiri, chiqa aski lurañar mayjt'ayir uñjsta ukaxa, jan muspharamti, mä jilïrin yaqha jilïripaw utji, ukat juk'amp jilïriw jupanak paninxarux utjaraki." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 ¡Ukarux markax nayraqataruw sarti satawa, reyis mayninakar luqtiritaki satarakiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Khititix qullqi munki ukax juk'amp muni; khititix qamirïki ukax, jan utjirinjamakiwa amuyasi. Ukasti inamayarakikiwa," 
Ecclesiastes5:11 ukampis, yänakax juk'ampi utjki ukkhaxa, mäkiw tukusxi. ¿Kuna askirak apsusti nayra mayamp uñxatasasti?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Irnaqir jaqix juk'sa, jan ukax waljsa manq'askpan, sumpun ikt'asi; ukampis qamirirux yänakapax janiw ikthapiykiti." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Akapachan sinti llakiskay uñjta: qamir yänak juk'uchañax uywiriparuw jan walt'aykiti; 
Ecclesiastes5:14 ukampis jan suma alakip lurasax uka yänakax q'alaw tukusispa, ukatsti jupatix mä wawanïspa ukaxa, janiw ukat qhiparux kuna jaytañapas utjkaspati." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Kunjämatix taykapan purakapat q'alalak yuri, ukhamakiw sarxani, irnaqatapatsti janiw kuns apaskaniti." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Akaw sinti llakiskayaxa: kunjämatix aka uraqir jutki ukhamakiw sarxani. ¿Kuna askirak apsusti jan inakt'as irnaqatapatsti? 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Ukhamarus taqi jakäwipansti ch'amakanjam sarnaqawayi, jan walt'añana, t'aqhisiñana, chuyma usuyasiñanakana." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Nayax akhamak amuyta: jakäwin askipax manqt'asiña, umt'asiña, aka uraqin mä juk'a urunak Diosax churkistu ukan jan inakt'as irnaqatasat kusist'aña ukakiwa, ukampis ukaw jiwasanakar wakt'istu." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Mä tuqitsti, Diosax khitirutix wali qamir yänak churki ukarux ukanakat manqt'asiña, ukanakat kusist'añ churaraki, ukampis jan inakt'as irnaqatasat kusist'añax Diosat juti." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Diosax kusisiñampi chuymar phuqht'asaxa, janiw jakañapat sinti llakiskiti." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Aka uraqin jaqinak taypin mä jan walt'añ uñjta: 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Diosax yaqhipanakarux jilarkir suma yänak churi, kuntix munapki ukanakax janiw jupanakatak pist'kiti; ukampis janiw taqi ukanakat kusisipkiti, jan ukasti yaqhanakakiw kusisipxi. ¡Akasti chiqpachan inamayawa, llakkañarakiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Mä chachax patak wawanakanïskaspawa, ukat walja maranakas jakaskarakispawa; ukampis ukham jakkasax janitix yänakapampi kusiskani, janirak amayapas imt'atäkan ukaxa, nayatakix uka jaqit sipansa mä sullsut wawaw askixa." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ukampis uka wawax ina ch'usarus ch'amakan chhaqkchini, sutipas armatäniwa," 
Ecclesiastes6:5 ukatsti intsa janisay uñjkchini, janisay kunsa yatkchini, ukampis uka chachat sipansa juk'amp samarañanïniwa." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Jupax pä waranqa maras jakchisapän ukas janiw yänakapat kusiskasapänti. Chiqpachansa, ¡taqiniw uka pachpar sarapxi!" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Jaqix manq'añatakix jan inakt'asaw irnaqi, ukampis janiw sisthapkiti." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 ¿Kuna tuqinsa mä yatiñan jaqix pisi amuyt'an jaqit sipan jilanki? ¿Kunsa mä pisi amuyt'an jaqix askin sarnaqasax jikxati? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Aliq amuyañat sipansa uñjañaw askixa. Ukampis ukax inamayawa, thayarus katthapiñ munksna ukhamakiwa." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Kunatix jichhax utjki ukax sutiniwa, ukasti yatisirakiwa, janiw khitis jupat sipan juk'amp ch'amanimpix nuwaskaspati." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Mayakiw chiqaxa: walja arunak parlañanxa, axtañ arunakaw utji; ukampix janiw kuna asksa jikxatksnati." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Niy yatitawa, janiw khitis yatkiti kunatix jaqitakix aka jakht'at inamay urunakapan askïki ukxa. Urunakapax ch'iwir uñtataw sarakipani, ¿khitirak jupar yatiyaspa kunatix akapachan jiwatap qhipat luraskani uksti?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Suma q'apkir qullanakat sipansa, aski jaqit uñt'atäñaw askixa. Yuriñ urut sipansa, jiwañ uruw juk'amp askixa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kusist'ir sarañat sipansa, jiwirin ukar sarañaw askixa. Jiwax taqi jaqinakan tukuyäwipawa, jakirinakasti uk amtañapäspawa." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Larusiñat sipansa jachañaw juk'amp askixa, ajanurux janis wal lurkchini, ukampis chuymarux ask luri." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Yatiñan jaqix jiwañat lup'i, ukampis pisi amuyt'an jaqix kusist'ir sarañat lup'i." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Pisi amuyt'an jaqin jach'ar aptatäñat sipansa, yatiñan jaqinanakan iwxt'atapar ist'añaw askixa." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Pisi amuyt'an jaqin larusitapax kunjämatix ch'aphinakax ninan t'aqarki ukhamawa, ukasti inamayakirakiwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Jan wali lurañanakax yatiñan jaqirux janiw walt'aykiti, qullqimpi chilltañax chuymap mayjt'ayi." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Mä kuna luräwi qalltañat sipansa tukuyañaw juk'amp askixa. Jach'a jach'a tukuñat sipansa, llamp'u chuymanïñaw juk'amp askixa." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Thithiñampix jan atipjayasimti, thithiñax pisi amuyt'an jaqinkiwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Janipun jiskt'asimti, “¿Kunatsa nayra maranakax ancha sumänxa?” sasa, uka jiskt'asti janiw ch'ikhin jiskt'apäkiti." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Akapachan jakiritakix yatiñanïñaw askixa, ukampis yatiñanïñampi, kamirïñampiw juk'amp askixa." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Yatiñasa, qullqisa jaqirux arxatiwa, ukampis yatiñ kankañax yatiñan jaqirux jakañ churi." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Diosan luräwinakapat sum amuyt'am: ¿khitirak jupan k'umuptayatapar chiqachaspasti? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Sumankaña jutipanxa kusisim; jan walt'añ jutipansti amuyt'asirakim, mayasa, mayasa Diosankiwa, ukatsti jaqix janipuniw yatkiti kunatï jutir urunakana jutkani ukatxa." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Taqi akanak uñjawayta aka juk'a inamay jakañaxanxa: aski jaqinakax askinak lurkasaw jiwapxi, ñanqha jaqinakasti jan walinak lurkasas walja maranakaw jakapxi." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Jan sinti askix tukumti, janirak sinti yatiñanis tukumti. ¿Kunatarak jumapach aynacht'añ muntasti?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Jan sinti jan walinak luramti, janirak sinti pisi amuyt'anis tukumti. ¿Kunatarak janïr jiwañäkipan jiwätasti?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Uk katthapiñax askiwa, amparat jan antutjasa. Khititix Tatitur axsarki ukaxa, taqi kunansa askiruw mistsuni." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Mä markan tunka jilïrinakat sipansa, yatiñ kankañaw yatiñan jaqirux juk'amp ch'am churi." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ukatsipana, akapachan janiw khitis jan juch luras aski jaqix utjkiti." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Kunanaktix sapki ukanakar jan yäqamti, ukhamat luqtirimar jumxat jan walinak parlatap ist'kätati." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Jumas sum yatiraktaxa, walja kutiw mayninakat jan walinak parltaxa." 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Taqi akanak wali amuyt'ampiw uñakipta, ukhamasti yatiñ kankañanïñ munäyäta, ukampis janiw jikxatañjamäkänti." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 ¡Taqi kunatix utjki ukax janiw jikxatañjamäkiti! ¡Sinti ch'amawa, jan khitinsa amuyt'kayarakiwa!" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Nayax yatxatañanak jikxatañaruw uchasta, ukat yatxatxasin mä suma amuyt'ar puriñataki. Ukhamasti nayax amuytwa, pisi amuyt'anïñan jan walïtapa, pisi chuymäñas luqhi kankañätapa." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Jiwañat sipansa kunatix juk'amp jan walïki uk jikxatta: warmix chuymampi sallqxasax amparapampiw qhumanti. Diosar munirix ukham warmit jaltxaniwa, ukampis jucharar jaqix sipitanakaparuw jalt'ani." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Naya, Arunak Yatiyirix kunäkataynatix uk thaqkasax akanak jikxatta:" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 ¡kuntix chiqpachan thaqkta uk janiw jikxatkti! Waranqa chachanakatxa maynik aski jaqi jikxatta, ukampis janiw mä aski warmsa jikxatkti." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Nayax akhamak jikxatta: Diosax jaqirux chiqap luräna, ukampis pachpa jaqiw jakañap jan walt'añar puriyi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 ¿Khitis yatiñan jaqimpix kikipasispa? ¿Khitirak kunäkitix ukanak uñt'aspa? Yatiñ kankañax jaqin ajanup qhanartayi, qhuru uñnaqapsa quñaptayarakiwa." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Reyin arsutanakapar phuqhapxam, ukham Dios nayraqatan juramentompi arstaxa." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Jupan nayraqatapat jan mäki mistumti. Jan wali lurañanakampix jan chikachasimti, ukampis jupax kunjämtix munki ukham luraspa." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Reyin arupax jach'a munañan aruwa, janiw khitis siskaspati: ¿Kunarak lurtasti? sasa." 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Arsutarjam phuqhirix janiw kuna jan walirus purkaniti, ukatsti khititix yatiñanïki ukax yatiw kunapacha, kunjäm phuqhañsa." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Chiqpachansa, taqi kun lurañatakis mä pachampi, amuyumpiw utji, ukampis jaqitakix" 
Ecclesiastes8:7 akat qhipar kunatix luraskani uk jan yatitapaw jupan jach'a llakipaxa, janirakiw jupar khiti amuyt'ayiris utjkiti." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Jaqin jakañap ch'amampi katxäsirix janiw khitis utjkiti, janirakiw jiwar ch'amampi katxäsiris utjkiti. Aka nuwasïwit janiw khitis jaltkaspati. Jan wali lurir jaqirux janiw ñanqha luratapax jiwañat qhispiykaspati." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Akapachan kunanakatix luraski ukanak yatxatañar uchasitax laykuxa, kunjämatix jaqix masinakapar jan walinak lurañatakix ch'amanïki uk uñjarakta." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Uka kipkarak ñanqha jaqirux imäwip urun wali jach'achañampi imapxatap uñjta; aski jaqitsti janiw pachpa markapas amtaskiti. Akasti inamayakiwa," 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Juchan jaqirux jan mäki juchap uñt'ayasaxa, juk'amp jucha lurañaruw puriyi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Ukhamasti jucharar jaqix walja kuti juchanak lurkasas walja maranakaw jakaski. (Nayax khitinakatix Tatitur jach'añchapki, axsarapki ukanakan sumak jakasipxatap yatiyäta;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 ukampis jucharar jaqinakatakix janiw kunas sumäkiti, jakäwipas Diosar jan axsaratap laykux mä ch'iwjamakiw sarawayxi.)" 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Ukhamaw akapachan aski jaqinakax inamay t'aqhisipxi jan wali jaqinakäkaspas ukhama, jucharar jaqinakasti aski jaqinakäkaspas ukhamaw kusisipxi. Nayax sistwa: “Akax inamayakiwa” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ukat nayax kusisiñxat sista: “Kusisiñax utjpan” sasa. Jaqitakix akapachan janiw yaqha suma luräwipax utjkiti, jan ukasti manq'aña, umaña, kusist'aña ukakiw utji, jaqitakix ukakiw irnaqatapat utji, Diosax akapachan jakañ churki uka urunakapana." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Nayax juk'amp yatiqañaru, yatxatañaru, akapachan kuntix lurapki uk uñakipañaruw uchasta, ukampis jaqix uruy arumaw jan ikthapkiti," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ukatsti juk'amp amuyta, jaqix kuntix Diosax lurki ukanaka, akapachan kunatix luraski ukanak janiw amuykiti. Qawqsay munasax thaqhaskpan, ukampis janiw jikxatkaniti; yatiñan jaqix “yattwa” saskaspawa, chiqpachansa janiw jikxatkiti." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Taqi chuymaw taqi akanak yatxatañar uchasta, aski jaqinakana, yatiñ kankañan jaqinakan luratanakapan Diosan amparapankatap yatiñataki. Jaqix munasiñxatsa, uñisisiñxatsa, ukanakan uñjkasas janiw kuns yatkiti." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Ukhamasti taqinirus pachpakiw suyt'aski: aski jaqirusa, jucharar jaqirusa, suma jaqirusa jan wali jaqirusa, q'uma jaqirusa, jan q'uma jaqirusa, wilañchanak luqtir jaqirusa, jan luqtir jaqirusa; uka pachparak suma jaqirusa, jucharar jaqirusa, juramento lurir jaqirusa, jan lurir jaqirusa." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Akapachan taqi kunatix luraski ukanakat akaw jan walïkiti: taqinirus pachpakiw suyt'aski. Mä tuqitxa, jaqin amuyupax ñanqha lurañampi phuqt'atawa; taqi jakäwipansti luqhi kankañaw amuyuparux apnaqi; ukatsti tukuyarux jiwañarukiw purxi." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ukampis khitirutix jakañax churatäki ukatakix juk'amp suyt'äwipaw utji. Jiwat leonat sipansa jakaskir anuw askixa. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Ukhamarus khitinakatix jakasipki ukanakax jiwañap sum yatisipxi, ukampis jiwatanakax janiw kuns yatipkiti, janirakiw kuns katuqapkiti, jupanakax armatäxapxiwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Munasiñapasa, uñisisiñapasa, munapayasiñapas ukan tukusxi, janipuniw jupanakax akapach luräwinak mayampsa lurkxapxaniti." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 T'ant'amsti kusisiñamp manq'asim, vinomsa kusisiñampirak umt'asim, juman luratanakamax Tatiturux kusisiyiwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Janq'u isimpipun isthapisim; p'iqimarus q'apkir qullanakampipun uchasim. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Munasit warmimampix kusisit jakasim, Tatitux akapachan juk'a urunak churktam ukana; akapachan jan inakt'as irnaqatamat ukakiw wakt'tam." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kuna lurañatix jumatak utjkani ukan kusisiñampi luram, amay imäwir sarkät ukansti janiw kuna lurañas utjkiti, janirakiw lup'iñasa, yatxatañasa, yatiñ kankañas utjkiti." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Akapachan yaqhanakamp kun uñjta: janiw suma jalirinakax t'ijuñan atipt'apkiti, janirakiw ch'amaninakas nuwasïwin atipjapkiti; janiw yatiñan jaqikis t'ant'anïkiti, janiw ch'ikhinakakis qamirïpkiti, janirakiw suma yatiqatanakakis suma katuqatäpkiti; chiqpachansa, taqi jupanakarux ukhamaw wakt'i." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Mä tuqitxa, jaqix janiw jan walt'añan uñjasiñap yatiskiti: kunjämatix chawllanakax qänan katuntatäpki, jamach'inakas sipitar jalt'apki, ukhamarakiw jaqix jan amuyaski ukkhax jan walt'añampi katuntat uñjasi." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Akapachan yaqha uñjarakta, ukasti nayatakix mä suma yatichäwiwa:" 
Ecclesiastes9:14 juk'a jaqin mä jisk'a markaw utji, ukatsti mä wali munañan reyin katuntataw uñjasi. Uka reyix markarux nuwasiñ jach'a yänakampi muyuntasaw katuntañatak wakicht'asi." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Uka markansti yatiñani mä jan kunan jaqiw jaki, yatiñapampix uka markarux qhispiyasapänwa, ¡ukampis janiw khitis jupat amtaskiti!" 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ukat nayax sista, wali ch'amanïñat sipansa yatiñanïñaw askixa, jan kunan jaqin yatiñapax janisay yäqatäkpan, parlatapas janisay ist'atäkpan." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Pisi amuyt'an jaqinakan reyipan arnaqasitapat sipansa, yatiñan jaqinakan quña arunakapaw juk'amp sum ist'asi." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Nuwasiñ yänakat sipansa, yatiñ kankañaw askixa. Mä sapa pantjasiñakiw jach'a t'unjasiñarux puriyi." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Jiwat chhichhillankhan thujsatapaxa, suma q'apkir qullarux janiw walt'aykiti. Ukham pisi amuyt'anïñax yatiñ kankañampiru, jach'ar aptatäñampirux aynacht'ayiwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Yatiñan jaqin amuyupax aski lurañaruw wayusi; pisi amuyt'an amuyupasti jan wali lurañaruw wayusiraki. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Pisi amuyt'an jaqix taqi luratanakapanxa, jan suma amuyt'anïtap uñacht'ayi, qawqhasay saskpan pisi amuyt'aninakax “jupanakäpxiwa” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Mä marka apnaqiritix jumatak thitchini ukaxa, jan mayjt'asimti; llamp'u chuymampiw jach'a pantjasïwirux atipjäta." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Akapachan mä pantjasiñ utjatap uñjta, uksti pachpa marka apnaqirinakaw lurañ qallti." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Pisi amuyt'an jaqinakarux jach'a lurañanak churapxi, yatiñan jaqinakasti jisk'a lurañanakak katupxi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 T'aqhisiyat jaqinakarux caballot sarnaqaskir uñjta, jilïrinakarusti t'aqhisiyat jaqïkaspas ukham kayuk sarnaqaskir uñjarakta." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 P'iya allirixa, pachpa p'iyaruw liwirantti. Pirqa tinkuyirirusti, katariw achji." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Qala k'uthir jaqixa, pachpa qalampiw usuchjasi. Lawa ch'ixtir jaqixa, pachpa lawampiw usuchjasi." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Hachatix muthuptaspa ukat janirak ariptayksna ukaxa, ch'amamp phat'antañaw wakisispa. Yatiñ kankañampi lurañaw taqi kunat sipan askixa." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 ¿Kuna askirakïspa mä katari axachirix nayraqat katarimpi achjayasispa ukasti? 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Yatiñan jaqin arunakapax taqinin chuymaparuw purt'i, pisi amuyt'irin arunakapasti jupa pachparuw aynacht'ayi:" 
Ecclesiastes10:13 jupax jan wali arunak parlañampiw qallti, ukatsti juk'ampi ñanqha arunak parlasaw tukt'ayi." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 ¡Pisi amuyt'an jaqix kuns parlakiwa! ¿Khitis saspa kunatix luraskani ukxa? ¡Janiw khitis jutir urunakat kuns yatkiti! 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Pisi amuyt'an jaqix irnaqkäwiw qarjti, janiw kawki chiqa markar sarañsa yatkiti." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 ¡Ay kunakïkani, kawkïr markatix reyipas mä jisk'a wawakïki, jilïr jaqinakapas jach'a manq'äwinakan qhantatisipki ukanakatakixa!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 ¡Kusisiñaniw kawkïr markatix askit uñt'at reyinïki ukaxa, jilïr jaqinakapas pachaparuw manq'asipxi, ukhamat ch'amañchasiñataki, janiw machjasiñataki!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Jayratakix uta utacht'atax jalaqtiwa; jan kun luriritakisti utpachaw tinku. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Kusisit jakañatakisti, t'ant'aw munasi, k'uchikïñatakisti, vinow munasi, taqi ukanakamp kusisiñatakisti, qullqiw munasi." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Reyitxa janipun jan wal parlamti, munañan jaqinakatsa janirak jan wal parlamti, janis khitis ist'kiristam ukhamxa. Ukham parlatanakax jank'akiw yatisi, jamach'inakjamaw arunakax sari, ukatsti, taqi kunaw yatisi." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 T'ant'am umar jaquntam; ukat mä qawqha pachat jikxatäta. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Qawqhatix utjktam ukanak mayninakamp jaljasim, ukampis jumax janiw yatktati, markarux kuna jan walitix jutkani uka." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Qinayanakatix uman qinayächi ukaxa, jallux uraqxaruw purxatani. Mä quqax amstarusa, jan ukax aynacharus liwisiskpan, kawkharutix liwnuqtki ukkhankapuniniwa." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Yapuchañ munasax jan thayak uñch'ukkamti, achunak apthapiñ munasas jan qinayanakak uñch'ukkamti." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Janiw jumax thayan kawksar saratapsa yatktati, janiw kunjämsa wawax taykapan purakapan jilki uksa yatktati, janirakiw Diosan kunjäm luratanakapsa yatktati." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Jumax willjtasa, jan ukax jayp'us yapuchaskam, ukampis janiw jumax kawkïr yapun sumäñapsa, jan ukax paypach yapun sumäñapsa yatktati." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Lupi qhana uñjañax wali askiwa; 
Ecclesiastes11:8 ukampis maynix walja maranak jakkasax taqi kunampisay kusisiskpan, janiw armasiñapäkiti utjkani uka jan walt'añ walja urunakata, ukatsti taqi kunatix jutañampïski ukax inamayakiwa." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Waynäkas k'uchirtasim; kunatix askïki ukat kusisim. Chuymamax kunjämarutix munki, nayramas kuntix uñjki ukhamar luram; ukampis taqi ukanakat Diosaw taripätam." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Chuymaman llakisiñanakapa, jan walt'añanaksa apanukum, waynanakan suma urunakapax inamayakïtap layku." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Waynäkasin irnuqir Diosamat amtasim, jan walt'añ urunak janïr purinkipana, kunapachatix siskäta: “Janiw kuna kusisiñsa sarnaqäwixan jikxatkti” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Irnuqt'ir Diosamat amtasim, intisa, phaxsisa, warawaranakas janïr ch'amakt'kipana, qinayanakas jallu qhipat utjkipana." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Mä uruw purinini, ukansti reyi uta uñjirinakas khathatipxaniwa, jan axsarir jaqinakas apnaqatäpxaniwa; molinonakas juk'akïxatap laykux janiw irnaqkaniti, ventananakat uñch'ukirinakas juykt'apxaniwa." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Kunapachatix uka urux purinkan ukkhaxa, anqar mistuñ punkunakax jist'antasxaniwa; molinon ruxuqitanakapas juk'at juk'at amukt'ani; jamach'inakan q'uchutapas amukt'aniwa;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 amsta chiqanakax axsarañ churani, thakhinsti chijinakaw utjani. Almendro alix panqarañ qalltani, t'iju t'ijusti jan walt'añ utjayani, alcaparra alix janiw kunatakis askïkxaniti. Ukampis jaqix wiñay utjasïwiparuw sarxani, jiwatat jachirinakax niyaw marka thakhinakan ist'asi." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Juman irnuqir Diosamat amtasim qullqit lurat wiskan janïr t'aqaskipana, quri phukhus jisk'a jisk'a janïr tukuskipana; wakullas uma phuju lakan janïr p'akiskipana, janïr uma phujun jiskhañ wiskapas jisk'a jisk'a tukuskipana." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Uka qhipatsti laq'ax uraq laq'aruw kuttxani, kunjämäkäntix nayrax ukhama, ajayusti khititix churkän uka Diosaruw kutkatxani." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Naya, Arunak Yatiyiriw wasitat sista: “¡Inamayakiwa, inamayakiwa! ¡Taqi kunas inamayakiwa!” sasa." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Arunak Yatiyirix juk'amp yatiñanïsax juk'amp yatiñanakxat jaqinakar yatichäna. Ukhamarak walja säwi arunak yatiqañaruw uchasïna, ukat sapa maya chiqaparuw uskurakïna." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Taqi tuqit suma arunak jikxatañatakiw thaqhäna, chiqpach säwi arunak wakisitarjam qillqañataki."
