Ecclesiastes12:11 Yatiñ kankañan jaqin säwi arunakapax mich'inakar uñtatawa, mayar apthapitasti ch'akt'ata ch'akurunakäkaspas ukhamawa, mä awatirin uskt'ata." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Kuntix maynix ukanakat apski ukax suma iwxa arunakawa. Walja qillqatanak qillqañax janipuniw tukuskiti, ukanakat yatxatañax qarjayiwa." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Parlañax tukusxiwa. Taqi kunaw satäxi. Diosar yupaycham, kamachi arunakapar phuqham, taqi ukanakan jaqitakïtap layku." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Diosax taqi luratanakasat wayt'istani, walitsa, jan walitsa, jamas chiqan luratanakasatsa." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Salomonan wali suma q'uchunakapa: 
SongOfSongs1:2 ¡Laka ispillunakamamp jamp'att'ita! Munart'asiñamax vinot sipansa juk'amp sumawa," 
SongOfSongs1:3 q'apkir qullaman q'aphipas mukt'atax wali sum q'apkatitu, sutimasti suma q'apkir qulla wartatjamaw q'aphiraki. ¡Ukat tawaqunakax wal munasipxtam!" 
SongOfSongs1:4 ¡Jank'akiy jumamp chik irpita! ¡Reyixay, utamar irpita! Jumampix wali k'uchikïñäniwa; munart'asiñamatsti vinot sipansa juk'amp amtasiñäni. ¡Ukat warminakax wal munasipxtam!" 
SongOfSongs1:5 Jerusalenankir warminaka, nayax ch'iyär janchinïtwa, ukampis munkañätwa; Quedar chiqankir chhujllanakjam ch'iyärätwa, Salomonan uta cortinanakapjam jiwakirarakïtwa." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Janiy ch'iyär janchinïtaxa uñch'ukipxamti, lupiw janchixar ukham naksutu. Jilanakaxax nayatakix thithitäpxiwa, uva yapunak uñjayapxitu, ¡uva yapuxasti apanukutaw uñjasi!" 
SongOfSongs1:7 Munasitaxay sitaya, ¿kawkharurak jumasti uywanakam awatistasti?, ¿kawkharurak chika urusti samart'ayir anaktasti? ¿Kunatarak masinakaman uywanakap chik muyuykur uñtat sarnaqästi?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Munkañ warminak taypinsa munkaya, janitix yatksta ukkhax uywanakan saräwip arktam; cabritonakamarusti, awatirinakan chhujllanakap jak'an awatim." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Munasitaxay, jumax nayatakix faraonan carrop jiyt'ir suma caballopjamätawa." 
SongOfSongs1:10 ¡Ajanumax aretenak taypin wali jiwakiwa! ¡Kunkamas perlanakat lurat wallqa taypin wali jiwakiwa! 
SongOfSongs1:11 ¡Qullqimp k'achacht'at quri aretenak lurarapipxäma! 
SongOfSongs1:12 Reyin mesan qunt'añapkamasti, q'apkir qullaxax suma q'aphitati." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Munasitaxasti nayatakix mirra wayaqar uñtatawa, ukasti nayan ñuñunakax taypinkapuniwa." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Munasitaxasti nayatakix En-gadi chiqan uva yapunak taypin utjir alheña sat alin panqarapjamawa. 
SongOfSongs1:15 ¡Munasitaxay, kunja munkañätasa! ¡Sinti jiwitakïtawa! ¡Nayranakamax pä palomaru uñtatawa!" 
SongOfSongs1:16 ¡Munasitaxay, kunja munkañätasa, sinti munkañätawa! ¡Ch'uxña ch'ijinakaw jiwasan ikiñasaxa!" 
SongOfSongs1:17 utasan lawanakapas cedro lawanakawa, ciprés alinakampi utacht'atawa." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Nayax Sarón pampanakankir panqarätwa, qhirwanakankir lirio panqarätwa." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Nayan munasitaxax warminak taypin, ch'aphinak taypinkir rosa panqarjamawa." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Nayan munasitaxax chachanak taypin ch'uminkir quqanak taypin manzano quqar uñtatawa. ¡Kunja sumas nayatakix ch'iwipar qunt'asiñaxa! ¡Achupasti lakaxatakix sinti muxsarakiwa! 
SongOfSongs2:4 Manq'añ utaparuw nayarux irpitu, munasiñap nayarux uñacht'ayitu." 
SongOfSongs2:5 ¡Pasasat lurat tortanakamp churapxita, manzananak manqt'ayapxita, nayax munasiñat jiwt'irpachätwa!" 
SongOfSongs2:6 ¡Jupax ch'iqa amparapampi p'iqit katt'akitaspa, kupi amparapampisti qhumantt'arakitaspa!" 
SongOfSongs2:7 Jerusalenankir warminaka, nayaw achikt'asipxsma: ch'uminkir tarujanak layku, cabritonak layku, munasitaxar jan ikit sartayapxamti, ¡kunapachkamatix munki ukkhakam ikt'asiskpan!" 
SongOfSongs2:8 ¡Munasitaxax niyaw purisinki! ¡Arupxa niyaw ist'xarakta! Qullunak patanjam thuqtas thuqtasaw juti, jisk'a qullunak patanjam t'isktas t'isktasaw juti." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Nayan munasitaxax mä tarujar uñtatawa, mä jisk'a taruja qallur uñtatawa. ¡Akaxay punku qhipäxankxiwa, ventanaruw makhatani, reja qhipäxat uñch'ukisisinki!" 
SongOfSongs2:10 Munasitaxasti situwa: “Munasitaxay sartasxam; jinay sarañäni” sasa. 
SongOfSongs2:11 ¡Uñjam! Juyphipachax sarxiwa, jallunakas juyphimp chikaw sarawayxi." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Pampanakan panqaranakas niyaw misturxi, q'uchusiñ pachas purinxarakiwa, qhurukutunakan uxutapas uraqisan niyaw ist'asxi." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Higo quqanakas achunakanïxiwa, uva yapunakan panqaranakapas sumaw q'aphiraki. Munasitaxay, sartasxam; munasitaxay, jinay sarañäni." 
SongOfSongs2:14 “Qarqanakar imantasiri palomaxay, jaqhi jamas manqhanakan imantasiri palomaxay, ajanum uñkatt'ayita, arsutam ist'ayarakita. ¡Jumar uñjañax munkayawa! ¡Parlatam ist'añas wali muxsawa!” sasa." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Tiwulanakar katurapxam, nanakan uva yapunakax tukjir tiwul qallunakar katuranipxam, uva yapunakasan panqaraskatap layku." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Munasitaxax nayankiwa, nayasti jupankaraktwa. Jupax rosa panqaranak taypin uywanakap awatisi." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Nayan munasitaxay, uru janïr tukuskipana, janïr chhapthapkipan kutt'anxam; tarujar uñtata, taruj qallur uñtatay, quntu patanakanjam t'iskunxam." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Arumanakax ikiñaxan nayan munasitaxaruw thaqtasta. Jupar thaqhasax janiw jikxatkti. 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ukat sartasin markpach muytanta, thakhinakana, plazanakan munasitaxar thaqhasa." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Marka uñjirinakaruw jiskt'asta: “¿Janit jumanakax nayan munasitaxar uñjapkta?” sasa. 
SongOfSongs3:4 Jupanakampi jikisiwayasin mä juk'ampjarusti munasitaxampix jikisxaktwa. Amparapat wayxarusinsti jan antutjasaw taykaxan utjäwipar irpawayta. 
SongOfSongs3:5 Jerusalenankir warminaka, nayaw achikt'asipxsma; ch'uminkir tarujanak layku, cabritonak layku, munasitaxarux jan ikit sartayapxamti, ¡Kunapachkamatix munki ukkhakam ikt'asiskpan!" 
SongOfSongs3:6 ¿Kunarak wasar tuqit jutki ukasti? Mä jach'a jiwq'ir uñtatawa, panqar q'aphinak taypinjama, incienso q'aphichata taypinjama, ukhamarak suma q'apkir qullanakan q'aphip taypinjam jutanti." 
SongOfSongs3:7 ¡Ukax Salomonarakisä, reyi carropat jutaski! Juparusti Israel markankir jan axsariri suxta tunka soldadonakampi muyuntataw juti;" 
SongOfSongs3:8 taqpachaniw jupanakax espada apnaqañ yatipxi, nuwasiñatakix suma yatsutäpxiwa; axsarkañ ch'amak arumanakatakisti sapa mayniw espadanakap wak'apar apapxi." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Salomón reyix, Líbano chiqankir suma lawanakat reyi carrop lurasi." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Sayirinakapax qullqit luratawa; jikhani qimkatañapasti qurit luratawa; qunuñapasti wila isimpi luratarakiwa; manqhïxapasti, Jerusalenankir warminakan munasiñapampi k'achachatarakiwa." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Jerusalenankir warminaka, ¡Salomón reyir uñjir mistunipxam! Pillumpi ucht'atawa, taykapax jaqichasiñ urupataki lurkatayna, taqi jakäwipan kusiskañ urupataki lurkatayna uka pillumpi ucht'atawa." 
SongOfSongs4:1 ¡Munasitaxay, jiwitakïtawa! ¡Kunja munkañätasa! Nayranakamax pä palomar uñtatawa, ajanu imxatat qhipäxar imantata; ñik'utamasti Galaad qullunakan ananaqtir cabritonakar uñtatawa." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Laka ch'akhanakamax sumakamakiwa, t'awra yawiratäñatak jichha jariqat ovejanakar uñtata." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Laka ispillumax wila juch'usa ch'ankhar uñtatawa, parlatamasti wali munkañarakiwa. Ajanumasti velom qhipäxanxa, payar jaljata granada achur uñtatawa." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Kunkamasti Davidan torreparuw amtayitu, k'uthat qalanakat lurata; waranqa escudonakampi k'achachata, jan axsarir jaqinakan escudonakapa." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Ñuñunakamax pä tarujanakar uñtatawa, ispa taruja qallunakar uñtataw lirio panqaranak taypin manq'aski." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Janïr urun qhanjtankipana, ch'amakanakas janïr chhaqtkipana, mirrax utjki uka ch'umir sarxä, inciensox utjki uka qullur sarxä." 
SongOfSongs4:7 ¡Munasitaxay, jumax jiwakipunïtawa; kayut p'iqikama munkañätawa! ¡Janiw juman kuna jan walis utjkiti!" 
SongOfSongs4:8 Munasitaxay, Líbano qullut nayamp chik saraqanim; nayamp chik Líbano qullut saraqanim. Amaná qullutpach qhirwanak uñatatam, Senir, Hermón qullunakatpach uñatatam; leonanakan putunakapatpacha, leopardonakan qullunakapatpacha uñatatarakim." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Kullakitay, nayan munasitaxa, chuymax lunthatista; mä kuti uñtatamampikiw chuymax lunthatista; kunkaman warkuntat wallqamampikiw chuymax lunthatista." 
SongOfSongs4:10 ¡Kullakitay, nayan munasitaxay, kunja sumas juman munart'asiñamaxa! ¡Munart'asiñamax vinot sipan juk'amp muxsawa, q'aphir qullanakamas yaqha suma q'apkir qullanakat sipan juk'amp sumarakiwa!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Munasitaxay, laka ispillumat misk'iw ch'umasinki. ¡Laxram manqhansti misk'impi, lechempiw utji! ¡Isinakaman q'aphipax Líbano qullun suma q'aphipjamawa!" 
SongOfSongs4:12 Jumax kullakitay, nayan munasitaxay, suma uyuchrantat panqar yapütawa, chimpuntat uma jalsütawa;" 
SongOfSongs4:13 granadonak achki uka panqar yapur uñtatätawa; alheña panqaranakax utjki," 
SongOfSongs4:14 nardo, azahar, suma q'apkir caña, canela, kunayman incienso quqanaka, mirra, áloe quqanaka utjir panqar yapur uñtatätawa; ¡Ukanxa taqi suma q'apkir qullanakaw utji!" 
SongOfSongs4:15 Panqar yapunkir jalsu umätawa. Líbano qullutpach saraqanir jakkir umätawa. 
SongOfSongs4:16 Amsta thaya, ¡sartasim! Aynach thaya, ¡aksar thayt'anim! ¡Panqar yapuxar thayt'anipxam, suma q'aphinakap taqi tuqir phusanukupxam! Munasitaxay, panqar yapumar jutam, suma muxsa achunakap manq'asim." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Kullakitay, nayan munasitaxay, panqar yapuxarux mantxtwa. Mirraxampi, q'apkir qullanakaxamp apthapisxtwa, misk'xa tapatpach manq'antta, vinoxsa, lechexsa umt'araktwa. Munat jila masinaka, manq'apxam, umapxarakim, ¡qawqhtix munapkta uk umantapxam!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Nayax ikiskäyätwa, ukampis chuymaxan janiw ikkäyätti. Ukatsti munasitaxan punkut jawsasinitap ist'ta: “Kullakita, nayan jan llamkt'at palomitaxay, jist'arita! ¡P'iqixax sullamp sullantatawa! ¡Arum sullaw ñik'utaxan jalaski!” sasa." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Isirasxtwa, ¿kamisarak wasitat isthapisïsti? Kayunakaxsa jariqasxtwa, ¿kamisarak wasitat q'añuchasïsti?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Nayan munasitaxax punku p'iyat amparap luqantani. ¡Ukaw nayarux walpun chuym ch'allxtayitu! 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ukatsti munasitaxar punku jist'aririw sartawayta. Amparanakaxatsa, luk'ananakaxatsa mirra q'apkir qullaw punku katuñxar ch'aqaritu. ¡Jupar parlir ist'asax jiwt'irpachayätwa! Munasitaxarusti punku jist'aqta, ukampis jupax sarxataynawa. Jupar thaqhañaruw uchasta, ukampis janiw jikxatkti, jawsaraktwa, jupasti janiw jayskituti." 
SongOfSongs5:6  
SongOfSongs5:7 Marka uñjirinakaw jikxatitu; jupanakasti nuwjapxituwa, chhuxriñchjapxarakituwa; ¡markar mantañ punku uñjirinakax ch'amampikiw velo isixsa aparapxitu!" 
SongOfSongs5:8 Jerusalenankir warminaka, achikt'asipxsmawa, munasitaxar uñjapxät ukkhax jupar sapxam: —Munasiñat jiwirjamäskiwa —sasa." 
SongOfSongs5:9 ¡Taqi warminakat sipansa wali munkaña! ¿Kunarak munataman utji mayninakat sipansti? ¿Kunarak munataman utji nanakar ukham mayiñamatakisti? 
SongOfSongs5:10 Nayan munasitaxax janq'ullt'asitawa, walja jaqinak taypinsa uñt'kayawa." 
SongOfSongs5:11 P'iqipasti suma qurir uñtatawa; ñik'utapax chhiriwa, cuervo jamach'jam ch'iyärarakiwa;" 
SongOfSongs5:12 nayranakapasti lecher sunt'suta pä palomar uñtatawa, jalir uma thiyan sayt'atäsipki;" 
SongOfSongs5:13 ajanupax suma q'apkir panqaranakani jach'a yapur uñtatawa. Laka ispillupasti rosa panqarar uñtatawa, ukat misk'ix jalaraski;" 
SongOfSongs5:14 amparanakapax qurikamakiwa topacio qalanakamp muyukipata; janchipasti suma llust'achsut marfilar uñtatawa, zafiro qalanakamp k'achachatawa;" 
SongOfSongs5:15 kayunakapax mármol qalat lurat sayirinakar uñtatawa, suma quri patxar utt'ayata; sayt'asitapasti wali sumawa, Libanonkir cedro quqar uñtata;" 
SongOfSongs5:16 parlatapax wali muxsawa. ¡Jupax sinti munkayawa! Jerusalenankir warminaka, ukhamaw nayan munasitaxaxa, ukhamaw nayar munasirixaxa." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Munkañ warminak taypin munkañ warmi, ¿kawkirurak munasitamasti sarxisti? ¿Kawksa tuqirus sarawayi? ¡Jumamp chik thaqhir sarañäni!" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Munasitaxax panqar yapuparuw sari, suma q'apkir panqar yapuparu, uywa tamap awatiri, rosa panqaranak apthapiri." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Nayax munasitaxanktwa, jupasti nayankarakiwa. Jupax uywa tamanakap rosa panqaranak taypin awatisi." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Jumasti munasitaxay, wali munkañätawa; Tirsá markar uñtat wali sumätawa, Jerusalén markar uñtat jiwakïtawa, warawaranakar uñtat wali munkayätawa." 
SongOfSongs6:5 ¡Janiy juk'ampi uñch'ukxistati, uñch'ukitamax nayarux chuymax lunthatitu! Ñik'utamax Galaad qullunakan ananaqtir cabritonakar uñtatawa." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Laka ch'akhanakamax sumakamakiwa, t'awra yawiratäñatak jichha jariqat ovejanakaru uñtatawa." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Ajanumasti velom qhipäxanxa, payar jaljata granada achur uñtatawa." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Reinanakax paqallq tunkanïskaspawa, tawaqunakas kimsaqallq tunkat jiläskaspawa;" 
SongOfSongs6:9 ukampis palomaxax jan llamkt'ata mayni sapakiwa; taykapan wali munat phuchhapawa. Jupar uñjasasti, tawaqunakax jallallt'apxiwa; reina warminakasa, tawaqu reynanakasa, juparux jach'aruw aptapxi." 
SongOfSongs6:10 ¿Khitirak akasti willjta qhanjam uñstanisti? Phaxsir uñtat wali jiwakiwa, intir uñtat sum k'ajkiriwa, ¡warawaranakar uñtat sumapuniwa!" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Nogal sat quqanak taypiruw saraqawayta, uma jalsu ch'uxñanak uñatatasiri; uva alinakan alsutap uñxatt'iri, granado alinakan panqaratap uñxatt'iri." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Nayasti jan amuykatakiw, mä carro patxan uñjasta munasitaxan jak'apana." 
SongOfSongs6:13 ¡Kutt'anxam, Sulamita, kutt'anxam! ¡Kutt'anxam, uñjañ munapxsma! ¿Kunatakirak Sulamitar uñjañ munapxtasti? ¡Campamentonjam thuqt'asir uñjañ munapxsma!" 
SongOfSongs7:1 ¡Reyin phuchhapa, kayunakamax wiskhumpi uchatax wali jiwakiwa! Thixniman muytapas, suma qurit lurat k'achachañanakar uñtatawa amparampi lurañ yatirin lurt'atjama." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Kururumasti muruq'u qirur uñtatawa, suma vinox janiw ukan pist'kiti; purakamax trigo phinar uñtatawa, rosa panqaranakamp muyukipata." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Ñuñunakamax taruja ispa qallunakar uñtatawa. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Kunkamax marfilat lurat torrer uñtatawa; nayranakamax Hesbón markankir uma jalsur uñtataw paqi; nasamasti Líbano qullunkir torrer uñtatawa, Damasco marka tuqir uñxatata." 
SongOfSongs7:5 P'iqimax Carmelo qullur uñtatawa; ñik'utamasti chupik juch'usa ch'ankhar uñtatawa: ¡chhiri ñik'utamaw reyin chuymap luqhiptayi! 
SongOfSongs7:6 Munasitaxay, munkañ warmi, ¡sinti jiwakipunïtawa!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Sayt'asitamax palmera quqar uñtatawa; ñuñunakamasti palmeran achunakapar uñtataw warkusi. 
SongOfSongs7:8 Nayax uka palmera quqar makhatañ munta, achunakap katuntasiri. Ñuñunakamax nayatakix uva wayunakjamäniwa; samanamasti, manzananakan suma q'aphipjamäniwa;" 
SongOfSongs7:9 lakamax suma vinor uñtatawa, suma quñaki laka ispillunakaxana, laka ch'akhanakaxan muyti." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Nayax munasitaxanktwa: jupan chuymapax naya tuqir uñtatawa. 
SongOfSongs7:11 ¡Nayan munasitaxay, jutam, pampar sarañäni! Alheña panqaranak taypin qhantatiñäni." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Willjtarusti uva yapunakaruw sarañäni, inach ch'uxñatatxpacha, panqaranakapas amuchrantxpacha, granado alinakas panqarxpacha. ¡Nayax ukawjan jumar munart'asïma!" 
SongOfSongs7:13 Mandrágora alinakax niyaw q'aphinakap q'aphitatayi; punkusansti kunayman muxsa achunakaw utji: waña muxsa achunaka, jichha apaqat muxsa achunaka, munasitaxay, jumatakiw taqi ukanak imta." 
SongOfSongs8:1 ¡Jumax nayan jilaxäsamäna, taykaxan ñuñupamp uywatäsamäna! Ukhamat nayax thakhin jikxatasin jumar jamp'att'añataki, jan khitis nayat sawkasiñapataki;" 
SongOfSongs8:2 amparat wayxarusawa, taykaxan utapar irpantirisma, ukan munasiñ tuqit nayar yatichañamataki. Nayasti jumarux mä suma vino umt'ayirisma, granada achunakaxat ch'iwrsut umap umt'ayarakirisma." 
SongOfSongs8:3 ¡Jupax ch'iqa amparapampi p'iqit katt'akitaspa, kupi amparapampisti qhumantt'arakitaspa!" 
SongOfSongs8:4 Jerusalenankir warminaka, nayaw achikt'asipxsma: munataxar jan sartayapxamti, ¡kunapachkamatix munki ukkhakam ikt'asiskpan!" 
SongOfSongs8:5 ¿Khitirak wasarat jutaski, munasitapan kallachipxar alxatatasti? Manzano ali jak'an jumarux ikit sartaysma; ukanwa taykamax wawachasiñ usupa sartayasi; ukanarak taykamax jumarux wawachastam." 
SongOfSongs8:6 ¡Chuymamar nay chimpuntasita, amparamar nay chimpuntasita! Munasiñax jiwañar uñtat jan t'unjkayawa; jumar munañasti amay imäwir uñtat jan kamachkayawa. ¡Munasiñasti ninar uñtataw aqaraki, ukasti qullan ninawa!" 
SongOfSongs8:7 Taqi qutanakan umapasa janiw uka munasiñ jiwt'aykaspati; janirakiw jawiranakas jiwaykaspati. Maynitix qamir yänakapa churañ munaspa uka munasiñ laykuxa, jisk'achatakiw uñjasxaspa." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Kullakitasax wali jisk'äskiwa janïraw ñuñupas jilaqkiti. ¿Kuns jupampix lurañäni, kunapachatix jupar sart'iri jutapkani ukkhaxa?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Jupatix mä pirqäspa ukaxa, jupxarux qullqit lurat jark'aqasiñanak aptaysna; jupatix mä punküspa ukaxa, cedro lawanakampiw liq'ikipsna." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Nayax mä pirqar uñtatätwa, ñuñunakaxasti torrenakar uñtatarakiwa. Ukat nayax munasitaxan nayraqatapan kusisiñ jikxatta." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Salomonax Baal-hamón chiqan uva yapunïnwa. Uka yapsti uñjirinakaruw uñjañapatak jaytäna, jupanakax yapu apthapiñ tukuyasasti, sapa mayniw waranqa qullqi churäna." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Salomón, waranqa qullqix jumatakiwa, pä patak qullqisti uñjirinakatakiwa; ¡uva yapuxax nayankakituwa!" 
SongOfSongs8:13 ¡Panqar yapunakan reinapa, arsutam ist'ayita! ¡Jilat masinakasax arsutam ist'añ munapxi!" 
SongOfSongs8:14 ¡Munasitaxay, jank'akiy jalanim, mä tarujar uñtat jaltanim, taruj qallur uñtat t'ijtanim! Qullu patanakax suma q'apkir alinakampi phuqhantatäxiwa." 
Isaiah1:1 Tatitux Isaías profetaruw parlxayäna, jupasti Amós chachan yuqapänwa, israelitanakax Judá uraqin jakapkäna ukanakar yatiyañapatakiw walja yatiyäwinak churäna. Kunapachatix Uzías, Jotam, Ahaz, Ezequías uka reyinakax Judá marka apnaqapkäna uka maranakan Isaías profetax aka arunak Tatitut katuqäna." 
Isaiah1:2 Alaxpachampi, akapachampi, ist'apxam kuntix Tatitux siski uka: “Wawanak jilarañapkamaw uywasta, ukampis jupanakax nayatakikiw sayt'asxapxi." 
Isaiah1:3 Urqu vacax jaqiparux sum uñt'asi, asnosti jaqipan uywa uyupxa uñt'asirakiwa; ukampis Israel, nayan markaxaxa, janiw uñt'askiti, amuyt'askxarakisa.”" 
Isaiah1:4 ¡Ay, jucharar jaqinaka, ñanqhampi phuqhantat marka, ñanqhanak lurir jaqinakat saraqirinaka, jan ist'asiri ñanqha wawanaka! Tatitut jayarst'atäpxtawa, Israelan Qullan Diosaparux apanukuwayapxtawa, qhiparuw kutt'awayxapxta." 
Isaiah1:5 Jumanakax Tatitur saykatañakpin munasipktaxa, janchinakaman janiw kawkhat jawq'antañas utjkxiti. P'iqimax q'ala chhuxriñchjatawa, ch'amamas janirakiw utjkxiti." 
Isaiah1:6 Kayumat qalltasin p'iqikamax janiw kawkhas k'umaräkxiti; taqpach janchimax q'ala chhuxriñchjatawa, p'usuntata, llixtjtatarakiwa; jan khitinsa qullxatt'ata, janirak ch'uqxatt'ata, usuyasitanakamsa janirakiw khitis aceitempi qullxatt'as samart'aykiti." 
Isaiah1:7 Israel uraqix q'ala tukjatawa, markanakapas ninan nakhantatawa. Jumanakan uñjkataw uñisirinakamas yapuchatanakam manq'antapxi. Taqi uraqpachaw wasarar tukuyata, mä uñisir markan ejercitopaw ukham tukjawayi." 
Isaiah1:8 Jerusalén markakiw uka t'unjatäñat qhispiwayi, ukampis apanukut markaw uñjasiwayi, melón yapunak uñjañ mä chhujllar sapak apanukutjama, uñisirinakapan muyuntat markjama." 
Isaiah1:9 Naya, taqi ch'aman Tatitutix jan mä qawqhansa qhispiykiriskäyätxa, Jerusalén markax q'ala tukjatäsapänwa, Sodoma, Gomorra uka markanakjam t'unjatäsapänwa." 
Isaiah1:10 Sodoma markan jilïrinakapa, Tatitun arunakap ist'apxam. Gomorra markachirinaka, Tatituxan yatichäwinakap ist'apxam." 
Isaiah1:11 Tatitux siwa: “¿Kunatakis ukataq wilañchanak apanipxta? Jumanakan urqu ovejanakampi wilañcha luqtapxatamampix qaritäxtwa, lik'i vaca qallu luqtatanakamampis qaritäxaraktwa; urqu vacanakana, urqu ovejanakana, cabritonakan wilanakapax axtasiyituwa." 
Isaiah1:12 Nayar yupaychiriw jutapxtaxa, ukampis janiw uka uywanak apanipxañamatak mayipksmati, jumanakax utax q'añuchirikiw jutapxtaxa, nayatsa phiskasipxarakistawa. ¡Utaxat sarapxam!" 
Isaiah1:13 ¡Nayatakix uka luqtanakamax jan kunatak askiwa! ¡Janiw apanipxañam munkxti! Inciensonaksa janirak q'aphicharapipxistati, uka q'aphinakax nayatakix janiw askïkxiti. Machaq phaxsi, samarañ uru phunchhäwinakamsa, janiw munkti, Jan wali jaqinakan tantachasitapsa janirakiw munkti. Uka luratanakam nayax wal uñista, janipuniw jumanakat kuns yatiñ munkti." 
Isaiah1:14  
Isaiah1:15 Jumanakax wal mayisipxtaxa, amparanakam luqtasaw mayisipxtaxa, ukampis nayax janiw uñjapksmasa, ist'apkaraksmasa. ¡Jaqinak jiwayapxatamatxa, luqtapkta uka amparanakamaxa, wilampi q'añuchjatawa!" 
Isaiah1:16 “¡Jariqasipxam, q'umachasipxarakim! ¡Uka ñanqha lurañanakamsti nayraqataxat jayar apapxam! ¡Ñanqha lurañanaksti apanukupxarakim!" 
Isaiah1:17 ¡Aski lurañanak yatiqapxam, kunatix chiqapäki uka lurañatak ch'amachasipxam, t'aqhisiyatanakarus yanapt'apxam, wajchanakarus chiqapar uñjapxam, ijma warminakarus arxatapxarakim!”" 
Isaiah1:18 Tatitusti siwa: “Jutapxam, uka jan wali luratanakamat parlapxañäni. Juchanakamax wila samir uñtatäkchinisa, nayax khunjam janq'uruw tukuyä; ch'iyar wila isir uñtatäkchinisa, nayax janq'u t'arwar uñtat tukuyä." 
Isaiah1:19 Jumanakatix jaysapxitäta ukaxa, kuntix uraqin sum achki ukanakat manq'asipxäta," 
Isaiah1:20 nayatak sayt'asisipkakïta ukasti, mä nuwasïwin jiwarapxäta.” Pachpa Tatituw uk arsu." 
Isaiah1:21 ¡Chiqa lurir Jerusalén marka, kunjämatarak yaqha chachanakampi sarnaqir warmjam tuktasti! Nayrax taqi jaqinakamax aski lurirkamakïnwa, chiqapan sarnaqirkamakïnwa, jichhasti taqinis jaqi jiwayirkamakiwa." 
Isaiah1:22 Nayrax mä suma qullqjamäyätawa, jichhasti q'añu t'unar tukutätawa, suma vinor uñtatäyätawa, jichhasti k'allk'u umar tukutakïxtawa." 
Isaiah1:23 Jilïr apnaqirinakamas nayatak sayt'asirkamakiwa, lunthatanakampis suman jakasipxi. Taqinis qullqi chilltayasirkamakiwa, waxt'äwinak katuqañak munasipki. Wajcharux janiw chiqapar uñjapkiti, ijma warminakarus janirakiw chiqapar uñjapkiti." 
Isaiah1:24 Ukatpï taqi ch'aman Tatituxa, Israel markan taqi ch'aman Tatitupax sixa: “¡Ukkhakamaki! Nayaw uñisirinakaxarux juchañchä, jupanakarusti ukhamat ukham lurjä." 
Isaiah1:25 Wasitat jumatakix amparax aytä, q'añu luratanakamsti ninampiw nakhantayä, q'añuchasitamat q'uma tukuyäma." 
Isaiah1:26 Kunjamäkäntix nayra taripirinakax uk kuttayxarakïma, amuyt'ayirinakamasti qalltan kunjamäpkäntix ukhamäxapxaniwa. Taqi ukanak lurkä uka qhipatsti sapxarakïtamwa: ‘Aski lurir marka’ ‘Chiqpach marka’ sasa." 
Isaiah1:27 Jerusalén markan utjasirinakatix wasitat jaysxapxitanixa, naya pachpaw jach'a ch'amaxampi uka jach'a t'aqhisiñat qhispiyä;" 
Isaiah1:28 ukampis nayar saykatirinakampiru, juchararanakampirux akch'a akch'a tukjä, nayar apanukurinakasti jiwarapxaniwa." 
Isaiah1:29 Jumanakasti uka quqanakatxa, panqar yapunakamatsa, wal kusisipxäyätaxa, jichhasti, ukanakat p'inqasipxätawa, uka chiqanakan yaqha diosanakarux yupaychapxäyätaxa." 
Isaiah1:30 Jumanakax ankuntat laphinakan quqar uñtataw tukupxäta, jan umani panqar yapur uñtatarakiw tukupxäta." 
Isaiah1:31 Jumanakat ch'aman jaqisti, wichhjamaw ninan nakhantani, jupan luräwinakapatsti, jupa pachpatsa, janiw kunat amtasiñas utjkxaniti.”" 
Isaiah2:1 Aka arunakasti Isaías profetar unañchäwi tuqi churat Tatitun arunakapawa, jupasti Amós chachan yuqapänwa, uka arunakasti, Judá markampita, Jerusalén markampitawa:" 
Isaiah2:2 Qhipa urunakan kawkhankkitix Tatitun utapax uka qullux suma sayt'ayatäniwa. Uka qullusti alayarux wali jach'äniwa, taqi qullunakat sipansa wali jach'arakïniwa. Ukarux taqi markanakaw jutapxani;" 
Isaiah2:3 walja markanakaw purintanipxani, akham sasa: “Jutapxam, Tatitun qullupar makhatapxañäni, Jacobun Diosapan utaparu, jupaw jiwasarux thakhip uñacht'ayistani, ukhamat thakhipanjam sarnaqañasataki” sasa. Sión qullutpach Tatitun yatichäwinakapax mistuni, Jerusalenat arunakapas misturakini." 
Isaiah2:4 Tatit pachpaw taqi markanakarus chiqapar uñjani, juparakiw walja markanakaru, wali jayankir markanakarus ch'axwatanakap taripani. Espadanakapxa qhulliñatak armanakaruw tukuyxapxani, lanzanakapsti yawthapiñatak jusinakaruw tukuyxarakini. Janiw kawkïr markas yaqha markamp nuwantasiñatakix wakichaskxaniti, janirakiw nuwasiñatak yatichäwinaksa katuqxapxaniti." 
Isaiah2:5 ¡Jacobun markapa, jin sarantañäni, Tatitun qhanapan irpat sarañäni!" 
Isaiah2:6 Tatay, wawanakamarux apanuktawa, Jacobun markaparus apanuktawa; markasti inti jalsu tuqit jutapki uka yatir jaqinakan phuqhantatawa, filisteo yatir jaqinakan phuqhantatawa, jaya markankir jaqinakampiw jan walitak arust'äwinak lurapxi." 
Isaiah2:7 Markax qullqinsa, qurinsa phuqhantatawa, qamir yänakapas waljapuniwa; markasti caballonakan phuqhantatawa, carronakapas waljarakiwa." 
Isaiah2:8 ¡Israel markax yaqha diosanakampi phuqhantatawa! Jaqinakasti jupanakan lurat diosanakaruw yupaychapxi, pachpa amparanakapamp lurat diosanakaruw yupaychapxi." 
Isaiah2:9 Uka luratanakapax mä p'inqawa, taqinitakis jan walipuniwa, ¡Tatitu, jupanakarux jan pampachamti!" 
Isaiah2:10 Tatitun axsarkañ nayraqatapatsti imantasxapxaniwa, qarqanak taypiruw imantasxapxani, jach'a kankañapan wal qhanatapatsa, uraq manqharuw imantasxapxani." 
Isaiah2:11 Jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakasti alt'atäpxaniwa, p'iqi waytat jaqinakas jisk'achjatäpxaniwa, uka urux Tatitukiw jach'ar aptatäni." 
Isaiah2:12 Kunürutix taqi ch'aman Tatitux sartkani uka urux jak'achasisinkiwa, uka urun jach'a jach'a tukurinakasa, p'iqi waytat jaqinakasa jisk'achjatäpxaniwa," 
Isaiah2:13 taqi khitinakatix Libanonkir cedro quqanakar uñtat jach'anakjam amuyasipki ukanaka, khitinakatix Basán chiqan roble quqanakar uñtatjam amuyasipki ukanaka;" 
Isaiah2:14 taqi khitinakatix jach'a qullunakar uñtatäpkaspas ukham amuyasipki ukanaka," 
Isaiah2:15 taqi khitinakatix mä jach'a torrëpkaspas ukham amuyasipki ukanaka, jan ukax mä jach'a pirqäpkaspa ukham amuyasipki ukanaka," 
Isaiah2:16 taqi khitinakatix Tarsis markan utjkis uka jach'a barconakjam amuyasipki ukanaka. 
Isaiah2:17 Jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakaxa, p'iqi waytat jaqinakasa, q'ala aynacht'ayatäpxaniwa. Uka urusti Tatitukiw jach'ar aptatäni," 
Isaiah2:18 taqi yaqha diosanakas q'ala tukjatäniwa. 
Isaiah2:19 Kunapachatix Tatitux sartaskani, aka uraqirux axsarañapampi phuqhantkani uka uruxa, jaqinakax qarqa p'iyanakaruw imantasxapxani, uraq manqhanakaruw imantasxapxani; Tatitun axsarkañ nayraqatapatsti, jach'a kankañapan wal qhanatapatsa, taqiniw imantasxapxani." 
Isaiah2:20 Uka urunsti jaqinakax diosanakapxa, apanukxapxaniwa, qurita, qullqit jupa pachpan lurasit diosanakxa, yupaychañatak lurasipkäna uka diosanakapxa, achakunakaru, chiñinakaruw churxapxani," 
Isaiah2:21 Tatitux sartkani, aka uraqir axsarañampi phuqhantkani uka uruxa, qarqa p'iyanakaru, jach'a qarqa manqhanakaruw imantasiñatak mantxapxani, Tatitun axsarkañ nayraqatapata, jach'a kankañapan wal qhanatapat imantasxapxani." 
Isaiah2:22 Ukhamasti, jaqinakarux jan alkatasipxamti, uka jaqinakax mä juk'atakikiwa, taqiniw jiwarapxani." 
Isaiah3:1 ¡Jichhax wal amuyasipxam! Taqi ch'amani Tatitusti, Judá markatxa, Jerusalén markatsa, taqi yänakap apaqxani, manq'añanaksa, umañanaksa q'al apaqxani." 
Isaiah3:2 Wali chacha tukurirusa, ch'axwäwin nuwasirirusa, taripirirusa, profetarusa, yatirirusa, chuymani jaqirusa," 
Isaiah3:3 capitanarusa, jach'a qamir jaqirusa, amuyt'ayirirusa, layqa jaqirus q'al chhaqtayani," 
Isaiah3:4 jupanakxarusti wawanakaruw jilïrit uchani, mä jisk'a yuqall wawanakakiw jupanakarux apnaqxani." 
Isaiah3:5 Jupanak taypinsti jan walt'añax walipunïniwa, jupanakkamaw nuwjasipxani, masinakkamas nuwjasxapxakiniwa. Waynanakasti chuyman jaqinakaruw saykatapxani, jisk'achat jaqinakasti, jach'a jilïri jaqinakaruw saykatapxani." 
Isaiah3:6 Uka pachaw mä jilax awkin utapan mayni jilaparux sani: “Juman isimax isthapt'asiñamatak utjaskiwa, jichhax jumay nanak apnaqapxita, aka t'unjat marksa jumarakiy apnaqam” sasa." 
Isaiah3:7 Jilapasti ukxarux sarakiniwa: “Janiw nayax uka ñanqhachatanak askichkiristti, janirakiw manq'as, isis utaxan utjkituti, ukhamasti markan jilïripat jan utt'ayapxistati” sasa." 
Isaiah3:8 Chiqpachapuniw Jerusalén markax q'al aynacht'xi, Judá markas q'ala tukjatarakiw qhiparxi, uka markanakansti taqiniw Tatiturux chuym ust'ayapxi." 
Isaiah3:9 Juparusti pachpa uñnaqapaw juchanïtap qhanañchaski, juchanakapsti janirakiw imt'asipkiti, Sodoma markankirinakjamaw jan walinak luratapat taqinir yatiyapxi. ¡Ay, kunakïkani, jupanakpachaw mutuyäwip wakichasisipki!" 
Isaiah3:10 Ukampis aski jaqinakax kusisiñanïniwa, jupatakisti taqi kunas walikïskaniwa. Aski luratanakapatsti kusisirakiniwa." 
Isaiah3:11 ¡Ay, kunakïkan ñanqha jaqitakixa, taqi kunas jupatakix janipuniw walt'kaniti! Tatitusti luratanakapatjam churarakini." 
Isaiah3:12 Mä jisk'a yuqallakiw markaxar t'aqhisiyirixa, marka apnaqäwix warminakan amparapankiwa. Markaxay, irpirinakamax k'arintapxtamwa, pantat thakhinakanjam irptamxa." 
Isaiah3:13 Tatitux taripañatakiw jichhax wakichasiski, markapar juchañchañatakis jank'akirakiwa." 
Isaiah3:14 Tatitusti taripäwiruw jawsani, jilïr awkinakaru, markan jilïrinakaparuw akham sani: “Jumanakax uva yapux q'al tukjapxtaxa, juk'a yäninakatsa lunthatjapxtawa, lunthatatanakamsti utanakamaruw imasipxarakta." 
Isaiah3:15 ¿Kuna munañampirak markaxarusti uñisipxta, juk'a yäninakarus t'aqhisiyapxtasti?” Taqi ch'amani Tatitux ukham siwa." 
Isaiah3:16 Tatitusti Jerusalenankir warminakarux sarakiwa: “Jerusalén markankir warminaka, jumanakax jach'a jach'a tukur warminakäpxtawa, p'iqsa alayar waytataw sarnaqapxtaxa, jisk'achañampiw mayninakarus uñch'ukipxtaxa, thuqtas thuqtasaw sarnaqapxtaxa, kunanakampi k'achachatäkitix kayunakamax ukanak chhulluqiyasa." 
Isaiah3:17 Jichhax jumanakarux q'alalsuyapxämawa, p'iqis q'ararata, q'ala llixtjtata tukuyapxäma.”" 
Isaiah3:18 “Jerusalén markankir warminaka, Uka urux purininiwa, kuna k'achachasiñanakamatix utjki, amparanakamansa, kayunakamansa, ajanumansa, kunkamansa, ñik'utamansa, jinchunakamansa, luk'ananakamansa, wak'antasiñanakamansa, naya Tatitux ukanak q'al aparapxäma. Ukhamarakiw suma q'apkir qullanakamsa, uñkatasiñatak qhispill lirphunakamsa, isinakamsa, wayaqanakamsa, wiskhunakamsa, suma isinakamsa, taqi ukanak q'al aparapxäma.”" 
Isaiah3:19 “Jerusalén markankir warminaka, jichhürux suma q'apkir qullampi q'aphichatäpxtawa, qharürusti axtañ q'aphinakjamaw q'apipxäta; jichhürux suma wak'anakampi wak't'atäpxtawa, qharürusti wiskanakampi wak't'atakïpxätawa; jichhürux suma isinakampi isthapitäpxtawa, qharürusti thantha isinakamp isthapitakïxapxätawa; jichhürux jiwa uñnaqt'anïpxtawa, qharürusti ajanumax t'irikamakïniwa; jichhürux ñik'utamas ukkha sum k'anthapt'asitäpxtawa, qharürusti jan ñik'utaniw uñjasipxätaxa.”" 
Isaiah3:20 Tatitusti saskakiwa: Jerusalén markankir nuwasirinakaxa, ch'axwañan nuwaskasin jiwarapxani." 
Isaiah3:21 Jaqinakasti llakisiñat wal jachapxani, llakisiñ ch'iyar isinakampiw isthapisipxani, markasti q'ala apanukutarakïniwa." 
Isaiah4:1 Uka urunsti mä juk'a chachanakakiw qhiparxani, mä chachatsa paqallqu warminakaw waykasipxani, warminakasti uka chachanakarux sapxaniwa: “Nanakasti janiw juman uywatäñ munapkäti, nanakpachaw qullqinakaxampi isinak alasisax isisisipkä, jan p'inqachatäñatakikiwa, jumampi jaqichasiñ munapxta” sasa." 
Isaiah4:2 Uka urux purinkani ukapachasti, jupanakax taqi kunan phuqt'ataw suman jakasxapxani. Markaxasti wali jach'ar tukt'asaw jakxani, kuna achunaktix uraqipax churkani taqi ukanakata. Khitinakatix Jerusalén markan qhiparapkani ukanakarusti, janiw taqinir mutuykäti, pachpa markan jakapxañapatakiw wakichä, ukatsti “Tatitun ajllit markapa” sas sutichatäpxaniwa." 
Isaiah4:3  
Isaiah4:4 Kunapachatix nayax taripäwi arunakap arskä, markaxarus mutuykarakï, Jerusalén markan utjasirinakarux jaqinak jiwarayapxatapatxa pampacharakïwa." 
Isaiah4:5 Ukat Sión qullun tantacht'at markaxarux imasï, urux mä qinayaw jupanakxarux imxattani, arumasti mä nina aqtatarakiw jupanakar imani. Taqi ukanakxarusti Tatitun qhanapakiw imxattani, ukhamat urunxa lupi qhanan jan qhathintatäpxañapataki, jallutsa, jach'a thayanakatsa jark'aqatäpxañapataki." 
Isaiah4:6  
Isaiah5:1 Munat masixan sutipxaruw q'ucht'asï, uva yapupatakiw mä q'uchu q'ucht'arakï. Jupax mä suma achur uraqinïnwa, uka uraqin mä uva yapunïnwa." 
Isaiah5:2 Uka uraq unxtayi, qalanaksa sum pallsu, suma ajllit alinak ayrunti. Uka yapu taypirusti mä torre sayt'ayi, uvanak ch'irwsuñatakiw mä chiq wakichi. Jupasti muxsa uvanak suyt'äna, ukampis k'allk'u uvanakakiw achxäna." 
Isaiah5:3 Jerusalén markan utjir jaqinaka, Judá markankirinaka, jichhax sapxitaya, ukhamäñapatakix ¿khitis juchani, jumanakati jan ukax nayacha?" 
Isaiah5:4 ¿Kunampich uva yapuxar lurañax wakisïnxa? ¿Kuncha jan lurkpachätxa? Nayax suma muxsa uvanakan achuñap suyaskäyätxa, ¿kunatarak ukhamasti k'allk'u uvanakak achusti?" 
Isaiah5:5 Walikiwa, jumanakaw nayan uva yapuxäpxtaxa, jichhax kuntix jumanakampi lurañ amtkta uk sapxäma: tukjatäpxañamatakix janiw arxatxapxämati, markaman pirqapsti aptxarakïwa ukhamat taksutäpxañamataki;" 
Isaiah5:6 jan khiti tumpirin apanukurakïxa. Janiw khuchhurt'apkanisa, janirakiw qursupkanisa, quranakampi, ch'aphinakampiw chhaqtayani. Qinayanakarusti “jan uka yapunakxar jallumti” sarakïwa." 
Isaiah5:7 Taqi ch'amani Tatitun uva yapupaxa, uka suma munat yapupasa, Israel markawa, Judá markarakiwa. Tatitusti jupanakatxa, kamachipar yäqatäñap munänxa, ukampis jaqi jiwayañanakak jikxatixa; chiqa luräwinak suyt'änxa, ukampisa t'aqhisiñat warariñanakak jikxatarakixa." 
Isaiah5:8 ¡Ay, kunakïkan jumanakatakixa, utanaksa ukkhar akkharuw alapxtaxa, uraqinaksa ukkhar akkharuw katuntapxtaxa, janiw khitirus jalt'asiyapktati, uka uraqinakxarux jumanakakïpkasmas ukham utjantasipxtaxa!" 
Isaiah5:9 Taqi ch'amani Tatitusti juramentompiw nayar situ: “Walja utanakaw t'unjatäni, jach'anakäskpasa, qawqha sumäskpasa, janiw khitis uka utanakan jakkaniti." 
Isaiah5:10 Jach'a uraqir yapuchat uvasa, mä jisk'a turril vinok churani. Tunka khumu jathampi yapuchat yapusti, mä khumu trigok achuni.”" 
Isaiah5:11 ¡Ay, kunakïkan jumanakatakixa, khitinakatix qhantatitpach machañatak sartapxta, arumkamas machasipkaktawa!" 
Isaiah5:12 Jumanakan phunchhäwinakamansti, arpa, cítara, tambor, pinkillo ukanakan toct'asitapakiw ist'asiski, jach'a manq'äwinakamansa vino umañakiw utjaski; ukampis kuntix Tatitux lurki ukanakat janiw amuyapktati, janirakiw jupan luratanakapsa yäqapktati." 
Isaiah5:13 Ukatpï jichhax markpacharu, jilïrinakapampirux, jaya markar apanukutäpxanixa, khayanarak manq'atjamasa, umatjamas jiwarapxani." 
Isaiah5:14 Jiwañasti mä axsarkañ laq'ur uñtatawa, markpacharu, jilïrinakapar manq'antañatak lakapsa jist'ari, kusist'añanakana, thuqt'añanakan sarnaqasipki ukanakaru." 
Isaiah5:15 Uka markan jakirinakasti q'ala jisk'achjataw uñjasipxani, jach'a jach'a tukur jaqisa p'iqip alt'asax llamp'usiñapaw wakisini." 
Isaiah5:16 Taqi ch'amani Tatitusti taripäwi lurañapanxa jach'a kankañap uñacht'ayani, Qullana Tatitux chiqapar uñjasax q'uma kankañap uñacht'ayani." 
Isaiah5:17 Markanakasti q'ala t'unjatäniwa, uka tinkut pirqanak taypinsti ovejanakampi cabritonakampikiw manq'xapxani." 
Isaiah5:18 ¡Ay, kunakïkan jumanakatakixa, k'arisiñampi ñanqhanakampik lurasipktaxa, jucha lurañsti mä carror uñtat qatatipxtaxa!" 
Isaiah5:19 Jumanakasti sapxaraktawa: “Diosax jank'akiy uñjañasatak lurañanakap lurpan; Israelan Qullan Tatitupasti jank'akiraki amtäwinakap phuqpan, ukhamat uka amtäwinakap yatiñasataki” sasa." 
Isaiah5:20 ¡Ay, kunakïkan jumanakatakixa, kunanakatix jan walïki ukarux “Waliw” sapxtawa, walïki ukarusti “Janiw walïkiti” sapxaraktawa, qhansti ch'amakaruw tukuyapxtaxa, ch'amaksti qhanaruw tukuyapxaraktaxa, k'allk'üki uksti muxsaruw tukuyapxtaxa, muxsäki uksti k'allk'uruw tukuyapxaraktaxa!" 
Isaiah5:21 ¡Ay, kunakïkan jumanakatakixa, khitinakatix taqi kuns yatir yatiri tukupkta, wali ch'ikhïpkasmas ukham amuyasipkta ukanakatakixa!" 
Isaiah5:22 ¡Ay, kunakïkan jumanakatakixa, khitinakatix vino umantasas wali chachak tukupkta, machañatak umañanak wakichañsa sum yatipkta ukanakatakixa!" 
Isaiah5:23 Jumanakasti juchan jaqirux qullqi laykux jan juchan mistuyapxtaxa, jan juchanïki ukanakarusti juchañchapxaraktawa." 
Isaiah5:24 Israelan Qullan Diosapan yatichäwinakapxa, janiw katuqapktati; chiqpach mä sapa Tatitun kamachinakapsa jisk'achapxtawa. Ukatpï jichhax, kunjamtix ninax wichhurux q'al nakhantkixa, ukhamarakiw jumanakax q'ala tukjatäpxäta, kunjämatix alinakax saphitpach ñusjkix ukhama, panqaranakapas laq'ar tukuwaykix ukhama." 
Isaiah5:25 Ukat Tatitux markapatak wal q'apisïna, amparapsa mutuyañatakiw aytarakïna. Qullunakax khathatipxänwa, jaqi jiwatanakasti saräwinakan t'unar uñtat jaqtatäpxänwa. Ukampis Tatitux phiñasitakïskiwa, amparapas mutuyañatakix wakicht'atakïskiwa." 
Isaiah5:26 Tatitusti mä wiphal apti, jayankir markarusti khuyt'asaw jawsi; wali jayatpach jutayaraki. Markasti ukspachaw juti, mäkiw purini;" 
Isaiah5:27 jupanak taypinsti janiw pisi ch'amasa, qaritas utjkiti, janiw iki machatas utjkiti, janiw khitis wak'ampi jan suma wak't'asitax utjkiti, janirakiw wiskhunakapan t'isnunakapas t'aqaratäkiti." 
Isaiah5:28 Mich'inak antutt'añanakapasti suma jiyintt'atawa, mich'inakapasti wali arinakawa. Caballonakapan casconakapas qaljam ch'ullqhiwa, carronakapan muyurinakapas tutuka thayar uñtatawa." 
Isaiah5:29 Soldadonakasti nuwasiñatakiw art'asipxi; leonanakjamaw wararipxi, mä kunsa katjasin manq'antañatak jayar qatatipki ukhama, janirakiw khitis uka katutap aparkaspati." 
Isaiah5:30 Kunapachatix chimpt'at urux purinkan uka uruxa, uka markax jach'a qutar uñtataw Israel markatakix qhuthutini, aka uraqisti q'ala ch'amakt'ayatäniwa, ch'iyara ch'amak qinayanakamp chhaqtayatäniwa." 
Isaiah6:1 Rey Oziasax jiwkän uka maraxa, Tatituruw uñjta, mä jach'a qunuñan qunt'ata; isipas jupan utapar phuqhantatänwa." 
Isaiah6:2 Ninjam k'ajkir serafines satanakaw jupa patxankapxäna. Sapa mayniw suxta chhiqhankamäpxäna. Pä chhiqhampix ajanup imantasipxäna, payampisti, jikhanit aynacharuw imt'asipxäna; payampisti jalnaqapxarakïnwa." 
Isaiah6:3 Maynit maynikamaw jach'at arsupxäna: “Qullana, Qullana, Qullanawa taqi ch'amani Tatituxa; taqi aka uraqisti jupan jach'a kankañapampi phuqhantatawa” sasa." 
Isaiah6:4 Uka arunak ist'asasti, Tatitun utapan punkunakapax khathatïnwa, jiwq'irakiw phuqharanttäna." 
Isaiah6:5 Nayasti sarakïyätwa: “¡Ay, kunakïkan nayatakixa, jichhax jiwapunïwa! Nayraxampiw taqi ch'amani Tatitu Reyirux uñjta, nayasti jucharar jaqïtwa, jucharar jaqinak taypin jakarakta” sasa." 
Isaiah6:6 Ukapachaw ninjam k'ajkir serafinanakat maynix nayan ukar jalanïna. Altarat aptanit mä nina sank'a tenazanakar achxaruyat apxäsiskäna," 
Isaiah6:7 uka nina sank'ampi lakaxar apxatasasti akham sarakitu: “Aka nina sank'aw laka ispillumar puri. Ukampisti, Tatitux ñanqha luratanakam jichhax apaqxtam, jucha luratanakamas pampachatäxiwa” sasa." 
Isaiah6:8 Ukatsti Tatitun arup ist'ta akham siri: “¿Khitirus khithäxa? ¿Khitis nayat parlir sarani?” sasa. Nayasti saraktwa: “Nayar khithita, nayaw jumxat parlanï” sasa." 
Isaiah6:9 Tatitusti sarakituwa: “Saram, aka markarux akham sarakim: ‘Ist'kasinsa, janiw amuyt'apkaniti, uñjkasinsa, janiw amuyapkaniti’ sasa." 
Isaiah6:10 Aka markan amuyupsa q'al pixtuntam, ukhamat jan amuyt'asipxañapataki, jinchunakapsti llupantam, ukhamat jan ist'apxañapataki, nayranakapsa juykhu tukuyam, ukhamat jan uñjapxañapataki, ukhamat nayan ukar jan kuttanisipkañapataki, nayan jupanakar jan qullaskañaxataki” sasa." 
Isaiah6:11 Nayasti jiskt'araktwa: “Tatay, ¿kunapachkamarakïni ukasti?” sasa. Jupasti sarakituwa: “Kunapachatix taqpach markanakax q'ala t'unjatäkani, uka markanakas jan jaqin jikxatasipkani; utanakas jan mä jaqin uñjaskani, pampanakas ch'usa wasarar tukuyatäkani," 
Isaiah6:12 Tatitusti jaqinakarux yaqha markar katuntat apaykani, aka markas jan mä jaqin uñjaskani, ukkhakamäniwa." 
Isaiah6:13 Inas patak jaqitxa tunkan jilt'chini, uka tunkanimppachaw jiwarayatäni, kunjämatix mä quqax khuchhunukutaxa, k'ullu tunu sapak qhiparki ukhamäniwa.” Ukampis mä qawqha israelitanakax janiw jiwarayatäpkaniti, jupanakat mä jaysasir chiqap markaw jutirin sayt'ani." 
Isaiah7:1 Resín sata Siria markan reyipampi, Pécah sata Israelan reyipampi, jupasti Remaliasan yuqapänwa; uka pani reyinakax Jerusalén markar nuwantasaw atipjañ munapxäna, ukampis katuntañatakix janiw ch'amanïpkänti. Ukasti Ahaz reyix Judá marka apnaqkäna ukapachaw lurasïna. Jupasti Jotam chachan yuqapänwa Oziasan allchhiparaki." 
Isaiah7:2 Ukapachaw Ahaz reyiru, utapankirinakaparux aka yatiyäwi yatiyapxäna: “Siria jaqinakax alayankkis uka israelitanakampiw mayacht'asxi” sasa. Uk ist'asasti, reyisa, taqi jaqinakasa, axsarañat wal khathatipxäna, kunjämatix quqanakan laphinakapax thayan thayt'anitax wal khathatkix ukhama." 
Isaiah7:3 Tatitusti Isaías profetarux sänwa: “Sear-iasub sat wawamar irpxarusim, ukatsti Ahaz reyimpi jikisir saram. Amsta tuqinkir uma qutaña larqa tukuyan jupampix jikisïta, ukasti Isinak T'axsurin uraqipar sarkis uka thakhinkiwa," 
Isaiah7:4 reyirusti akham sarakim: ‘Wal amuyasim, janirak mulljasimti, Resín sat reyimpi, Sirio jaqinakapampi, Pécah sat reyimpix, wali phiñasitäpxiwa, ukampis jan axsaramti, janirak llaythasimsa, jupanakax mä jisk'a ninar uñtatakïpxiwa, mä juk'a jiwq'i mistuyasasti, jank'akiw jiwt'xi." 
Isaiah7:5 Jupanakax jumar jan wal lurañ amtapxi; Judá uraqiruw mantantaniñ munapxi, uka uraqsa katuntasiñ munapxi, jaqinakaparus axsarañampi phuqhantañ munapxi. Tabeel sat chachan yuqaparuw reyit utt'ayañ munapxi”" 
Isaiah7:6  
Isaiah7:7 Ukampis Tatitux siwa: ¡Ukax janiw kunapachas ukham luraskaniti! 
Isaiah7:8 Damasco markasti Siria markan qamäwi markapawa, Resín sat chachasti uka Damasco markan reyiparakiwa. Samariasti Israel markan qamäwi markapawa, Pécah sat Remaliasan yuqapasti Samarian reyiparakiwa. Akat paqallq tunka phisqani mararuxa, Israel markax q'ala chhaqtayatäniwa; jumanakatix jan suma iyawsañanipkäta ukapachaxa, janiw suma ch'amani sayt'ayatäpkätati’ ” sasa." 
Isaiah7:9  
Isaiah7:10 Tatitusti Ahaz reyirux sarakïnwa: 
Isaiah7:11 “Tatitu Diosamar mayim mä muspharkañ lurañapataki, jumatakix ukax mä chimpükaspas ukhamäniwa, inas aka uraqit juk'amp manqhansa, jan ukax kawki wali alay pachansa kunas luraschispa” sasa." 
Isaiah7:12 Ahaz reyisti sarakïnwa: “Janiwa, janiw nayax Tatitur mä chimpu mayisax yant'käti” sasa." 
Isaiah7:13 Isaías profetasti sarakïnwa: “David reyin utapankirinaka, ist'apxam. ¿Jumanakatakix janit kunäkisa jaqinakar majañaxa, Tatiturus ukham majañ munapxarakta ukasti?" 
Isaiah7:14 Tatitu kipkaw jumanakarux mä chimpu churasipkätam: Tawaqux usur jaqiptatawa, mä yuqall wawa wawachasini, Emanuel sasarakiw sutichani, ukasti “Tatitusti jiwasampïskiwa” sañ muni." 
Isaiah7:15 Uka wawasti qallta maranakapanxa, lechempi, misk'impik manq'ani." 
Isaiah7:16 Ukampis uka wawaxa, janïra kunatix askïki, ukhamaraki jan walïki ukanakat amuykani ukapachaw uka pani reyinakan markanakapax apanukutäni, kawkïri markanakatix jumarux axsarayktam uka markanaka." 
Isaiah7:17 “Isaías profetax saskakïnwa: “Tatitux Judá markar nuwantañatakix Asiria markankir reyiruw khithanini. Reyin utapankirinakaru, taqi markpacharuw jupax nuwantani. Kunayman jan walt'añanakaw sartani. Janipuniw jichhakamax ukanakax uñjañäkiti. Israel markan Judá markat t'aqaqtatapat taqi akanakax ukham lurasini.”" 
Isaiah7:18 Uka uru purinxan ukkhasti, Tatitux Egiptonkir ejercitoruw jawsani, jupanakasti chhichhillankhanakar uñtataw jutantapxani; Asirian ejercitoparusti wayrunqunakar uñtat jutayarakini." 
Isaiah7:19 Taqi jupanakasti jach'a q'awa manqhanakana, jach'a qarqa p'iyanakan utjantasipxani, Ch'umi ch'aphinak taypina, uywa umt'aña chiqanakan utjantasipxani." 
Isaiah7:20 Uka uru purinkani ukkhasti, Asiriankir reyix Judá markaruw mutuyani, uka luräwimpisti q'al jisk'achjani." 
Isaiah7:21 Uka urunakansti khititix mä vaca, pä oveja uywaskani ukanakan" 
Isaiah7:22 walja lechew utjani, ukatsti queso manq'apxani. Taqi khitinakatix markan t'unjatäñapat qhispipkani ukanakasti, quesompi misk'imp manq'apxani." 
Isaiah7:23 Uka urunakansti kunatix nayrax waranqa uva alinak yapuchatäkäna, uka uva alinakan alapas waranqa qullqïkän ukaxa, jichhax ch'aphi alirukiw tukxani." 
Isaiah7:24 Taqi markpachan ch'aphi alinakar tukutapatxa, ukarux kun katuñatakikiw mich'inak apt'at mantapxani." 
Isaiah7:25 Nayrax phat'añampi yapuchapkän uka qullunakanxa, jichhax ch'aphi alinakaw jilantani, uka taypir mantañsa wal axsarayasipxani. Vacanakana, ovejanakan manq'apxañapatakikiw askïni." 
Isaiah8:1 Tatitusti sarakituwa: “Isaías, wakisiw Urías profetampiru, ukhamaraki Zacarías khititix Jeberequiasan yuqapäki ukampir jawsaniñamaxa, jupanakasti kuntix lurkäta ukanak uñjapxani. Jupanak nayraqatan ñiq'it lurat mä jach'a pallallxar jach'a qillqampi akïr suti suma qhan qillqantäta: ‘Maher-salal-hasbaz’ sasa, ukasti sañ muni: ‘T'unjatäñax niyaw jutaski, lunthatanakas niyaw akankxi.’ ”" 
Isaiah8:2  
Isaiah8:3 Ukat qhiparusti warmixampi nayampix mä yuqall wawanïxapxtwa. Tatitusti sarakituwa: “Uka wawarux Maher-salal-hasbaz sas suticham. 
Isaiah8:4 Janïra uka wawax: ‘Tata, mama’ sañ yatkani ukapachaw Asiriankir reyix Damasco, Samaria markanakarux q'al tukjani, jupasti uka markanakan qamir yänakapampiw qhiparxani.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Tatitusti wasitat saskakituwa: 
Isaiah8:6 “Niyakixay aka jaqinakax Resín reyiru, Pécah reyir axsarasax Siloé chiqan suma jalir umarux jisk'achapxchixa." 
Isaiah8:7 Ukat jichhax Asiria markankir ejercitoruxa, Judá markar jan walt'ayañapatakiw khithanï. Kunjämtix Éufrates sat jawiran umanakapaxa may jilarasax q'al uka thakhinakap jist'antixa, ukhamaw asirionakax Judá markar nuwantasax q'al tukjapxani." 
Isaiah8:8 Uka uñisir asirionakax Judá uraqkamaw puripxani, uka umax q'al chhaqtayani, mä pakar uñtataw thuqxatani, chhiqhanakap ayatatasaw uka uraqir jalxatani, Emanuel sat suma uraqirux q'al chhaqtayani.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Markanaka, tantacht'asipxam, mulljatäñamp phuqhantasipxam; taqi jayankir markanaka, aka arunak ist'apxam: Nuwasiñatakis wali wakicht'atäsipkäta ukasa, tukjatakipunïsipkätawa; jïsa, nuwasiñatakis wali wakicht'atäsipkäta ukasa, t'unjatakipunïsipkätawa." 
Isaiah8:10 Tatitux jiwasampïskatapatxa, inamayäniw uka amtäwinakapaxa, Tatitux janiw munkaniti uk phuqhapxañanakamxa, inamayaw nuwantañatakis amtasipkäta, janiw khitis nuwantañar uskuskaniti." 
Isaiah8:11 Tatitusti taqi ch'amampiw katuntitu, ukatsti aka jaqinakan sarnaqäwinakapan jan sarnaqañaxatakiw iwxt'itu, ukatsti jupanakatakiw mä yatiyäwi churarakitu akham sasa:" 
Isaiah8:12 “Jan jumanakax sayt'asiña amtäwinakaw sapxamti, kunjämtix aka markax taqi kunarus sayt'asiña amtäwiwa sapki ukanakaruxa. Jaqinakax wal mulljasipxi kunapachatix reyinakax nuwasiñatak amtapki ukapachaxa. Jumanakasti jan mulljasipxamti, janirak axsarapxamsa." 
Isaiah8:13 Taqi ch'amani Tatit saparukiw Qullan Diosarjam uñjañasaxa, jupa saparukiw jach'achañasaxa, jupan nayraqatapan axsarañasaxa." 
Isaiah8:14 Jan ukhamäkanisti, jupaw jumanakatakix mä sipitar uñtat ch'anqtasiñ qaljamänixa, uka qalasti paypach Israelan markanakaparuw tinkuyani, Jerusalén markan utjirinakarus mä sipitjamarakiw liwisiyani." 
Isaiah8:15 Waljaniw liwisipxani, tinkupxani, jiwarapxarakini, waljaniw uka sipitarux jalt'apxani, uka sipitan katuntataw uñjasipxani.”" 
Isaiah8:16 Aka arunaksti sum imapxam; aka yatichäwinakaxa, iwxanakaxsa, jan khitinsa uñjkañar imasipxam." 
Isaiah8:17 Tatitux Jacobun markapatak phiñasitäkchi ukasa, nayax khuyapayasiñaparux iyawsaskakipuntwa, jupakiw nayan suyt'añaxasa." 
Isaiah8:18 Nayampi, Tatitux churkitu uka wawanakaxampix, Israel markatak mä muspharkañ chimpüpxtwa, taqi ch'amani Tatitun uskt'atäpxtwa, Sión qullun jakir Tatituna." 
Isaiah8:19 Jaqinakasti sapxarakïtamwa: “Jiwatanakan ajayunakapar jiskt'asipxam, jisk'at chhiphisisipkir layqa jaqinakar jiskt'asipxam. ¿Janit mä markasti diosanakapar jiskt'askisti, janirakit jiwatanakarusa, jakirinakxat suma amuyt'äwi arunak mayiskisti," 
Isaiah8:20 ukhamat mä kuna yatiyäwsa katuqañatakisti?” sasa. Ukhampun arsupxanixa, uka arsutanakapax mä luqhi jaqin arsutanakapjamawa." 
Isaiah8:21 Jaqisti uksa aksa sararakini, t'aqhisiyata, manq'atsa awtjataraki, manq'atjamasti wali phiñasitäpxaniwa. Reyiparusa, diosanakaparus wal ñanqhachapxani. Taqi tuqi uñtapxani," 
Isaiah8:22 ukampis aynacht'añampi, t'aqhisiñampik uñjapxani. Laxa ch'amak taypin jakapxani." 
Isaiah9:1 “Ukampis uka jan walt'añanakax janiw wiñayatakïkaniti”. Zabulón, Neftalí ukanakan uraqinakapax Galilea chiqankänwa, uka jak'anarak Tatitur jan uñt'ir markanakax jakapxäna. Uka uraqinakasti Jordán jawirat qalltasina jach'a qutakamaw purïna. Nayra urunakansti Tatitux Galilearux wal jisk'achjäna, ukatsti jach'aruw aptxarakïna, ukat Isaías profetax akham sas yatiyäna:" 
Isaiah9:2 Ch'amakan jakir markax mä jach'a qhan uñjani; ch'amakan jakir jaqinakatakix mä suma qhanaw qhantani. 
Isaiah9:3 Tatitu, jumaw mä jach'a kusiskañ apantaxa, uka kusisiñasti wali jach'apuniwa. Taqiniw juman nayraqataman kusisipxta, kunjämtix yapu apthapiñanakan nanakax kusisipkta ukhama, kunjämatix jaqinakax qamir kankañ jaljasisax kusisipki ukhama." 
Isaiah9:4 Jumaw tukjtax markamar t'aqhisiykän ukanakxa, kawkïri t'aqhisiñatix llakisiykän ukanaka, munañan jaqinakampi apnaqatäkän ukanaka. Kunjämtix Madián uraqir t'unjktax ukhama." 
Isaiah9:5 Soldadonakan botasanakapasa, wilarar isinakapasa, ninampi phichhantatäniwa." 
Isaiah9:6 Mä wawawa jiwasatak yuri, Tatituw mä yuqall wawa churistu, uka wawawa jichhax ch'amampi apnaqani. Akham sasaw sutichapxani: Amtäwinakapanxa Muspharkaña, jan atipjkay Tatitu, wiñay Awki, sumankañan Jilïripa, sasa." 
Isaiah9:7 Davidan qunuñapan qunt'asini; aka uraqpach apnaqani, samarañapasti jan tukuskayäniwa. Jupan apnaqäwipax suma utjnuqatäniwa, kunatix chiqapar uñjañäki, askïkaraki ukanakxar utt'ayatäniwa, jichhürut qalltasina wiñaykama. Taqi akanaksti Tatitun jach'a munasiñapaw lurani." 
Isaiah9:8 Tatitux mä yatiyäwi Israel markarux apayani; Israel markarux mutuyäwa sasaw yatiyi. 
Isaiah9:9 Taqi markpachaw katuqi, Samaria markan jakirinakas taqpachaniw uka yatiyäwi katuqapxi. Jupanakasti wali jach'achasiñampiw sapxi:" 
Isaiah9:10 “Ladrillonakat lurat utanaksa liwinukusipkpan; jiwasanakax qalat yaqha utanak sayt'ayasiñani. Uta q'irunaksa khuchhurasipkpan, jichhax cedro suma ch'ullqhi lawat uskusxañäni” sasa." 
Isaiah9:11 Tatituw axsarkañ uñisirinak khithani, jupa pachpaw jiwasar nuwantañapatak arsuraki." 
Isaiah9:12 Inti jalsu tuqitxa, sirio jaqinakaw nuwantapxi, inti jalanta tuqitsti filisteo jaqinakarakiw nuwantapxi. Israel markarux maypach uquntapxi. Ukampisa Tatitun phiñasiñapax janiw apaqtkiti, jichhas jupax mayamp ukham lurañ amtaskakiwa." 
Isaiah9:13 Ukampis jupanakar mutuyir Tatiturux janiw makhatapkiti; janirakiw taqi ch'amani Tatiturus thaqapkiti. 
Isaiah9:14 Ukat Tatitux mä urunak Israel markan jilïrinakaparux jiwarayi, kunjämtix mä laq'ur jiwayañatakix wich'inkhapsa, p'iqipsa khuchhurapki ukhama, kunjämtix maynix palmeranaksa, suqusanaksa khuchhurkix ukhama." 
Isaiah9:15 P'iqix jilïri irpir jaqinakaruw uñtasi, wich'inkhasti k'ari yatichir profetanakaruw uñtasiraki." 
Isaiah9:16 Jilïrinakasti aka markarux maysaruw irpanukupxi, irpiri thaqhirinakasti maysar saranukusaw chhaqhapxi." 
Isaiah9:17 Ukat Tatitux waynanakat jan khuyapt'ayaskiti, wajchanakatsa, ijma warminakatsa janirakiw khuyapt'ayaskiti. Taqi markpachasti jach'a juchanak lurir ñanqhakamakiwa, taqinis ñanqha arunakak parlasipki. Ukampisa Tatitun phiñasiñapax janiw apaqtkiti, jichhas jupax mayamp ukham lurañ amtaskakiwa." 
Isaiah9:18 Ñanqha lurañasti jupanakarux jisk'a jisk'a tukji, kunjämatix mä ninax t'unanaksa, ch'aphinaksa nakhantki ukhama, quqanaksa, ch'uminaksa q'al nakhantki ukhama, ukatsti tutukjamaw jiwq'ipax alayar makhati." 
Isaiah9:19 Taqi ch'amani Tatitun phiñasiñap laykuw aka markax q'ala nakhantayat uñjasi, ninasti markarux q'al nakhantasin tukji; pachpa wawanakapan aychanakap manq'apxi, jilanakapatsa janiw khuyapt'ayasipkiti. Akan mayniw uquntirix utji, ukampis manq'at awtjayasiskakiwa, khayansti maynirakiw manq'irix utji, janiw sist'askiti." 
Isaiah9:20  
Isaiah9:21 Manasesampi, Efrainampix, jupanakkamaw q'al tukjasipxi, panpachanisti Judá markaruw nuwantapxi. Ukampis Tatitun phiñasiñapax janiw apaqtkiti, jichhas jupax mayamp ukham lurañ amtaskakiwa." 
Isaiah10:1 ¡Ay, kunakïkan jumanakatxa, jan chiqa kamachinak apsurinaka, jan phuqhañjam kamachinak mistuyirinaka," 
Isaiah10:2 pisi ch'aman jaqinakarux janiw askirjam uñjapktati, markaxan utjir juk'a yäninakan arsutanakapsa janiw yäqapktati, ijma warminakarux inakiw ch'am apsupxta, wajchanakatsti lunthatjapxaraktawa!" 
Isaiah10:3 Tatitux luratanakamat wayt'apkätam ukapachax kunak lurapkäta. Tatitux mutuyäwi apayanipkätam ukapachax kamachapkakïta. ¿Khitirus yanapt'a mayipxäta? ¿Kawkharus qamir yänakam imantapxäta? 
Isaiah10:4 Jumanakax jisk'achjatäpxätawa, katuntat apatäpxätawa, jiwayatäpxarakïtawa. Tatitun phiñasiñapasti janiw apaqtkaniti, jichhas jupax mayamp ukham lurañ amtaskakiwa." 
Isaiah10:5 “Tatitux siwa: Nayax wali q'apisitätwa; ukat Asiriankir reyimpiru, ñanqhachapkitu ukanakampirux mutuyä." 
Isaiah10:6 Jichhax aka ñanqha markar nuwantañapatakiw khithä, uka markar q'al lunthatjañapataki, qamir yänakapsa q'al aparañapataki, marka thakhinkir ñiq'ir uñtat taksuñapataki." 
Isaiah10:7 Ukampis Asiriankir reyix janiw ukham lup'kiti, janirakiw ukham lurañsa amtkiti. Jupax t'unjañakpun amtaski, walja markanakar chhaqtayañak lup'iski." 
Isaiah10:8 Ukatsti sarakiwa: ‘Taqi reyinakax nayan apnaqatkamakiwa. 
Isaiah10:9 Nayatakix Calnó, Carquemis uka markanakax kipkakiwa, Hamat markas Arpad markampix kipkakiwa, Samaria markas Damasco markampix kipkakirakiwa." 
Isaiah10:10 Walja diosanakan markanakaruw atipjta, Jerusalenankirinakatsa, Samariankirinakat sipansa walja diosanakan markanakaru." 
Isaiah10:11 Ukat Jerusalén markarux t'unjarakï, Samaria markar t'unjkta ukhama’ ” sasa." 
Isaiah10:12 Tatitux kuntix Sión qullun lurañ amtki, Jerusalén markansa lurañ amtki, ukanak phuqhapuniniwa. Ukham phuqhasasti, Asiriankir reyiruw mutuyani, jach'a jach'a chuymanïtapata, qhurütapat mutuyani." 
Isaiah10:13 Asiriankir reyisti sarakiwa: “Nayaw taqi ukanak ch'amaxamp lurjta, wali ch'ikhïtaxät suma luräwinak amtarakta. Nayaw markanakan qurpanakapsa mayjt'ayta, qamir kankañanakapsa katuntasirakta, wali ch'aman chachjamax reyinakarus atipjaraktwa." 
Isaiah10:14 Markanakan qamir yänakapsti katuntastwa, taqi uraqpach katuntasirakta, kunjämatix maynix apanukut tapat k'awnanak lunthatki ukhama, ¡janiw khititsa kuns kamskiti, janirakiw khitis arsuskiti!”" 
Isaiah10:15 Tatitux siwa: Asiriankir reyix pantjasitawa, hachasa, lawa khuchhuñasa janiw apnaqiripat juk'amp askïkiti. ¡Kawkhansa utjatäna mä thujruxa, khititix apnaqki ukar apnaqatapaxa!" 
Isaiah10:16 Ukatpï jichhax taqi ch'aman Tatituxa, uka lunqhu jaqinakxarux mä usu apayaninixa, reyirusa, reyin ejercitoparusa, uka usux jan ch'aman tukuyani." 
Isaiah10:17 Qullan mä sapa Tatitux jiwasan qhanasawa, jupasti mä aqkiri ninaruw tukuni; mä sapa urunak Asirian ejercitoparux nakhantani, kuna ch'aphi ch'uminakäkaspas ukhama." 
Isaiah10:18 Suma ch'uminakäpasa, suma achunak yapuchatanakäpasa, q'ala tukjatäniwa. Mä usuta jan ch'aman jaqjam lurjatarakïniwa." 
Isaiah10:19 Mä juk'a quqanakakiw uka ch'umin qhiparxani, mä jisk'a wawansa jakt'kañjamakïpxaniwa." 
Isaiah10:20 Uka uru purinkan ukkhaxa, mä juk'a israelitanakax qhispiyasipkatayna ukanakaxa, janiw Asiriankirinakar juk'amp alkatkxapxaniti; jan ukasti Israelan Qullan Diosaparuw katuyasxapxani." 
Isaiah10:21 Mä qawqha israelitanakakiwa, taqi ch'aman Diosarux kuttanxapxani." 
Isaiah10:22 Israel markamax waljanïskpasa, quta iramankir ch'allar uñtatäskpasa, ukampis mä qawqhanikiw kuttanxapxani. T'unjañax niya amtatawa, Diosan aski luräwipasti phuqhasipuniniwa." 
Isaiah10:23 Taqi ch'aman Tatitusti t'unjañ amtapuniwa, uksti aka markpachan phuqhani." 
Isaiah10:24 Taqi ch'amani Tatitusti siwa: “Sión chiqan jakir markaxay, asirionakarux jan axsaramti, jupanakax jawq'japkchïtamsa, chhuxriñchjapkchïtamsa, kunjämtix egipcio jaqinakax lurapkän ukhama." 
Isaiah10:25 Mä juk'a pachatxa jumatakix janiw phiñasitäkxäti, uka phiñasiñaxampix asiriankirinakaruw q'al tukjä." 
Isaiah10:26 Naya, Taqi ch'amani Tatituw jupanakarux mutuyä, kunjämtix Madianitanakarux Oreb qarqa jak'an tukjkta ukhama, Asiriatakisti ch'amax uñacht'ayarakï, kunjämtix Egiptotakix uñacht'aykta ukhama." 
Isaiah10:27 Naya, Israelan Diosapasti asirionakat qhispiyapxäma, uka jach'a t'aqhisiñanakam apaqapxarakïma.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Uñisiristi Rimón tuqit juti, Aiat siski uka chiqaruw puri, Migrón siski uka chiq sarakipi, q'ipipsti Micmás siski uka chiqaruw jayti," 
Isaiah10:29 k'ullk'u thakhi chiq sarakipanipxi, Gueba siski uka chiqaruw qurpachasipxi, Ramá markankirinakasti mulljasipxiwa, Saúl chachan Guibeá markapan jakirinakasti jaltxapxarakiwa." 
Isaiah10:30 Bat-Galim markata, Laisa sat markata, Anatot markatsa, arnaqasitanakapaw ist'asi." 
Isaiah10:31 Madmená markankirinakasti jaltxapxiwa, Guebim markan utjirinakasti imantasxapxarakiwa." 
Isaiah10:32 Uñisir asirionakasti jichhürpachaw Nob siski uka chiqar sayt'apxi; Sión qullur nuwantañatakiw wakicht'asipxi, kawkïritix Jerusalén markäki ukaru." 
Isaiah10:33 Uñtapxam, taqi ch'amani Tatitux axsarkañ ch'amapampiw asirionakarux quqanakarjam tinkurpayi; juk'ampi jach'a quqanakarusti khuchhurpayiwa, uka jach'a quqanakarusti uraqirkamaw liwirtayi." 
Isaiah10:34 Tatitusti may ch'amt'asakiwa uka Libanonkir suma quqanakarux tinkurayi. 
Isaiah11:1 Mä jaya maran k'ullu tunuttix mä jisk'a alix külltanchixa, ukhamarakiw Davidan wila masipatxa mä machaq reyix uñstani." 
Isaiah11:2 Tatitun ajayupaw jupxankani, yatiñampi, ch'ikhi kankañampi, suma amuyt'a chuymamp churani, mä jach'a ch'aman reyïniwa, Tatitur uñt'asax suma ist'asirïniwa." 
Isaiah11:3 Jupax janiw aliq uñkatasak khitirus taripkaniti, janirakiw aliqa parlanak ist'asakis juchañchkaniti." 
Isaiah11:4 Aynacht'atanakarux chiqa luräwimpiw uñjani, t'aqhin jakirinakarux arxatarakiniwa. Qhuru jaqinakarux mutuyaniwa, jan wali jaqinakarux jiwarayaniwa. Arunakapax mä kamachïkaspas ukhamäniwa." 
Isaiah11:5 Chiqapar uñjañampi, chiqa kankañampi isthapitäniwa." 
Isaiah11:6 Ukapachaw qamaqimpi ovejampix suman jakasipxani, tigrempi, cabritompix mayakiw samart'apxani, vaca qallumpi leonampix jak'apuran jilasipxani, mä jisk'a yuqall wawarakiw jupanakarux awatini." 
Isaiah11:7 Vacampi, osampix wali suman utjasipxani, qallunakapax mayakiw winkurt'asipxani, leonax mä vacjamaw chhuxllanak manq'ani." 
Isaiah11:8 Wawax asirumpiw anatasini, uka asirun tapaparuw amparapsa luqantani." 
Isaiah11:9 Nayan qullan qulluxansti janiw khitis ñanqha luririx utjkaniti, kunjämatix umax q'al phuqhantixa, ukhamarakiw Tatitun yatiñapax taqi markpachar phuqhantani." 
Isaiah11:10 Uka uru purinkan ukkhasti, Davidat mayni saraqiripaw uka marka apnaqañatak qunt'asini, taqi markanakaruw mayawjar tantacht'ani. Markapasti jach'ar aptatäña, ch'amanirakiw tukuni." 
Isaiah11:11 Uka urunakanxa, Tatitux wasitat ch'amap uñacht'ayani, markapat jilt'irinakarusti akïr markanakat kuttayanxani: Asiria, Egipto, Patros, Etiopía, Elam, Sinar, Hamat, ukhamarak quta tuqinkir markanakatsa." 
Isaiah11:12 Taqi markanakaruw tantacht'ani, jaya markar apayat israelitanakaru, jaya markar apayatat Judá markankirinakaruw tantachthapini, aynachata, alayata, inti jalsuta, inti jalanta tuqinakat mayawjaruw tantacht'xani." 
Isaiah11:13 Israel uraqin jakirinakampi, Judá uraqin jakirinakampix janiw uñisisiñan jakxapxaniti." 
Isaiah11:14 Uka markanakan jakirinakax inti jalanta tuqinkir filisteonakaruw nuwantapxani, qhipäxat nuwantasaw liwinukupxani; inti jalsu tuqinkir markanakarux qamir yänakap aparapxani, Edom markankirinakasa, Moab markankirinakasa, jupanakaruw jaysapxani, Amón markankirinakarusa jupanakaw apnaqapxani." 
Isaiah11:15 Tatitusti jupanakatakix Mar Rojo siski uka chiqa thakhi jist'arani; Éufrates jach'a jawirxaruw ch'amapampix luqxatani, mä jach'a thaya thayt'ayanini, uka thayaw paqallqu jisk'a jawiranakar jaljani, wiskhunakap jan apsusisakiw makhatapxani." 
Isaiah11:16 Kunapachatix Tatitun markapat jilt'irinakaxa Asiria markat kuttanipkan ukkhaxa, mä jach'a thakhi jikxatapxani, kunjämtix Israel markax Egipto markat mistunkän ukhama." 
Isaiah12:1 Uka urunsti sarakïtawa: “Tatay, yuspagarsmawa, nayatakix phiñasitäkchiyäta ukasa, jichhax uka phiñasiñamax tukusxiwa, jichhax sumankañ churxarakista." 
Isaiah12:2 Tatit Diosaw nayar qhispiyitu, juparuw iyawsta, janiw kunsa axsarkti. Tatituw nayan arxatirixaxa, nayar ch'amañchirixasa, jupaw qhispiyirixaxa.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Jumanakas kusisipxarakïtawa, jupan qhispiyasiñapat kusisipxäta," 
Isaiah12:4 ukat sapxarakïta: “Tatitur yuspagarapxam, jupar art'asipxam, markanakarusti kuntix jupax lurki ukanak yatiyapxam, jupan aka uraqpachan jilïrïtap amtayapxam." 
Isaiah12:5 Tatitur q'uchupxam, luratanakapasti wali jach'awa, taqi jaqinakaw uk yatipxañapa." 
Isaiah12:6 Jerusalén markan utjasirinaka, kusisiñat arnaqasipxam, Israelan Qullan Diosapax taqi jach'a ch'amapampiw jumanak taypinki.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Babiloniataki profecía arunakxa, Amós chachan Isaías yuqapaw unañchäwi tuqi katuqäna:" 
Isaiah13:2 “¡Mä jach'a qullu patxar mä wiphal sayt'ayapxam! ¡Soldadonakarusti nuwantapxañapatak art'apxam! ¡Sarantapxañapatak ampar aytapxam! ¡Punkunakap chiq jilïrinakan mantapxañapataki! 
Isaiah13:3 Jan axsarir jaqinakaxarux niyaw jawsayta, ch'axwan nuwasirinakaxarusti arux churarakta, khitinakatix atipjataxat kusisipki ukanakar mutuyapxañapataki.”" 
Isaiah13:4 Qullunakansti walja jaqinakan arnaqasitanakapaw ist'asi. Markanakan uxutanakapaw ist'asi, kawkïr markanakatix tantacht'aski ukanakata. Taqi ch'aman Tatitusti soldadonakaparux uñakipiwa, nuwantañatakix wakicht'atäpxiwa." 
Isaiah13:5 Wali jaya markat jutapxi, jaqin jan uñjkat jaya markata. Tatitu pachpaw q'apisiñapan yänakamp phuqt'at juti, markpachar t'unjañatakiw juti." 
Isaiah13:6 Babiloniankirinaka, wararipxam, Tatitun taripañ urupax jak'ankiwa, taqi ch'aman Tatitux mä t'aqhisiyañampiw purini." 
Isaiah13:7 Ukapachasti taqi jaqinakaw ch'am jiwt'ayasipxani, janiw kunatakis ch'amanakapax utjkxaniti," 
Isaiah13:8 wali mulljataw qhiparapxani. Mä jach'a t'aqhisiñampi, llakisiñampiw jupanakxarux jutani, wawachasir warmjamaw ayquñamp q'iwisipxani. Jupanakkamaw mulljat uñkatasipxani, p'inqasiñatsa ajanunakapax ninjamaw nakhani." 
Isaiah13:9 Tatitun urupax purinxiwa, axsarkañ urupuniwa, q'apisiñapas ninjamaw nakhi, aka uraqirusti ch'usa wasararuw tukuyani, jucharar jaqinakarus tukjarakiniwa." 
Isaiah13:10 Uka urux intis ch'amaktxaniwa, phaxsis janiw qhantkxaniti, warawaranakas janirakiw juk'amp qhankxaniti." 
Isaiah13:11 Tatitusti siwa: “Akapachan jakirinakan ñanqha luratapat mutuyäwa, jaqi jiwayatanakapatsa mutuyarakïwa. Jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakarusti jach'a jach'a tukuñanakap tukjä, ñanqha qhuru jaqinakarusti jisk'achjarakiwa." 
Isaiah13:12 Jaqinakasti q'alaw tukusini, Ofir sat chiqankir suma qurit sipansa juk'anikïxapxaniwa." 
Isaiah13:13 Uka urun nayan phiñasitaxan jach'ätapatxa, alaxpachax khathatiniwa, aka uraqis yaqha chiqaruw jittarakini." 
Isaiah13:14 “Uka uruntix yaqha markanakankir jaqinakax Babilonia markankasipkchini ukaxa, mulljat tarujar uñtataw jaltxapxani; jan awatirin mulljat ovejanakjamaw tutuktxapxani." 
Isaiah13:15 Khititix jikxatayaskani ukasti cuchillumpi chhuqhuntataw uñjasini, khititix katjayaskani ukasti jiwayataw uñjasini." 
Isaiah13:16 Jupanakan uñjkataw jisk'a wawanakaparux uraqir jisktas jiwarayapxani; utanakapatsa yänakap q'al apsupxani, warminakapas munkir jan munkir warmisitäpxaniwa." 
Isaiah13:17 Jupanakatakisti Medo markankir jaqinak sartayä, uka jaqinakax janiw qullqitjam llakisipkiti, janirakiw qurirus munapayapkiti." 
Isaiah13:18 Waynanakarux mich'inakapampiw jiwarayani. Asu wawanakatsa janiw khuyapt'ayasipkaniti, jisk'a wawanakatsa janirakiw khuyapt'ayasipkaniti." 
Isaiah13:19 Jichhax Babilonia marka, sum ist'ita: yaqha markanakatakix mä k'ajkir qaljamätawa, caldeonakatakisti mä jach'a kankañan markjamarakïtawa, ukampis naya ch'aman Tatituw q'al tukjäma kunjämtix Sodoma, Gomorra markanakar t'unjtxa ukhama." 
Isaiah13:20 Babilonia markan janipuniw jaqix juk'ampi utjkxaniti, Árabe jaqinakas janiw mayampsa ukar utjantaskxapxaniti, awatirinakas janirakiw uywanakaparux ukan manq'ayaskxapxaniti." 
Isaiah13:21 Ukansti monte phisinakakiw utjxani, utanakansti jukunakakiw phuqhäxani, kunayman suri jamach'inakakiw ukan jakxapxani, cabritonakakiw uksar aksar jalanaqxapxani." 
Isaiah13:22 Reyinakan utjañ utanakapansti pampa anunakakiw wararxani, suma k'ajkiri utanakapansti qamaqinakakiw utjxani. Babilonia, mutuñ urumax niyaw purinxi.”" 
Isaiah14:1 Israel markat khuyapt'ayasitapatxa, Tatitux wasitat jupan ajllisit markapat uñt'asxistani. Tatitux uraqisaruw kuttayanxistani. Yaqha markan utjir jaqinakasti markas taypin jawsayasiñatakiw jutapxani, ukatsti markasampiw mayachasxapxani." 
Isaiah14:2 Kawkharutix Tatitux mä uraq churkistu ukar kuttaniñatakix walja markanakaw yanapistani. Ukatsti jupanakarux katuntañäniwa, nayrax jupanakax jiwasanakaruw t'aqhisiyas apnaqistäna, jichhasti jiwasanakaw jupanakarux t'aqhisiyañäni." 
Isaiah14:3 Israel marka, kunapachatix Tatitux t'aqhisiñanakamata, llakisitanakamata, jachkaña yaqha jaqir katuyat tukutamat samarañ churkätam ukkhaxa," 
Isaiah14:4 Babilonia reyit phiskasisax akham sasaw jayllintäta: “¡Uñtapxam! ¿Kunarus jichhax t'aqhisiyirisax purt'asi? jach'a jach'a tukuris ¿kunarus puri? 
Isaiah14:5 Tatituw uka ñanqha luririn ch'amap tukji, uka qhuru jaqin thujrupsa p'akinuqi," 
Isaiah14:6 markanakarux phiñasiñampiw t'aqhisiyäna, jan inakt'asaw mutuyarakïna, markanakarusti wali phiñasitaw tukjäna, jan khuyapt'ayasisaw arknaqäna." 
Isaiah14:7 Jichhax taqi akapachaw samart'at jikxatasxi, kusisiñatsa wal arnaqasxi." 
Isaiah14:8 Libanonkir pinonakasa, cedro quqanakasa, juman aynacht'atamat kusisipxiwa, sapxarakiwa: ‘Juman aynacht'atamat aksaruxa, janiw khitis nanakarux tinkuraykxapxituti’ sasa." 
Isaiah14:9 Manqhapachansti, jiwatanak taypin wali uxuñaw utji, jumar katuqiriw mistunipxi. Jiwatanakan ch'iwinakapas sarthapiwa, akapachan jilïrinakapas jumar jikxatiriw mistunipxi; taqi markanakan reyinakapasti qunuñanakapat sartapxarakiwa." 
Isaiah14:10 Taqiniw jupanakax arsupxi, akham sasa: ‘Jumas ch'amam pist'ayasxaraktawa, nanakjamaw jichhax tukxtaxa." 
Isaiah14:11 Akkharuw jach'a jach'a tukuñamax tukusxi, arpaman suma toct'asitanakapas tukusxi. Ikiñamax q'ala ñusantatawa, janxatanakamas laqatunakawa’ sasa." 
Isaiah14:12 “¡Qhantati warawara, kunjämarak uka alayat jalaqtantasti! Markanakar atipjirïstaxaya, jichhax pampar jaquqatätawa." 
Isaiah14:13 Chuymamansti amtäyätawa: ‘Jichhax alaxpachkamaw makhatä; qunuñaxsti Diosan warawaranakapxaruw uskt'asï, khaya jaya alayan qunt'asï, kawkïri qulluntix diosanakax tantachasipki ukkhana." 
Isaiah14:14 Qinayanakatsa juk'ampi alayaruw makhatä, jach'a Diosjamarakiw tukü’ sasa." 
Isaiah14:15 ¡Ukampis jichhax jiwatanakan manqha pachapkamaw jalanttaxa, ch'amaka mik'ay manqharuw purtaxa!" 
Isaiah14:16 Jumar ukham uñjasinsti, jumar uñch'ukiriw pachpar qhiparapxani, ukatsti sapxarakiniwa: ‘¡Aka jaqix taqi uraqpach khathatiykän ukarakisä! Markanakarus jupaxay tukjchïnxa," 
Isaiah14:17 aka uraqirus ch'usa wasararuw tukuyänxa, markanaksa tukjarakïnwa, katuntat jaqinakarus janixay antutkchïntixa!’ sasa." 
Isaiah14:18 Kunapachatix markanakan reyinakapax jiwxapxi ukkhaxa, suma amay imañanakar imt'atäxapxiwa;" 
Isaiah14:19 ukampis jumarux amay imañ chiqatxa jayaruw liwtapxtam, mä axtaskañ t'unäkasmas ukhama, jaqin takisit amayarjamaw liwtapxtam, jaqin jiwarayatanak taypina, p'iqi apaqat jaqinak taypina, qalarar ch'amak manqhar jaquntataraki." 
Isaiah14:20 Markamar tukjatamatsti, markaman utjir jaqinakar jiwarayatamatsa, janiw jichhax mayni reyinakarjam imapkätamti. Ukham ñanqha lurir jaqin wawanakapasti, janiw wiñay jakapkaniti." 
Isaiah14:21 Jichhax wakichasipxam uka wawanakar jiwarayañataki, kawkïr awkinakapatix jaqinakar jiwaraykän ukan wawanakaparu, ukhamata aka uraqi jan juk'amp apnaqxapxañapataki, aka uraqirus janirak markanakamp phuqhantañapataki”." 
Isaiah14:22 Taqi ch'amani Tatitux siwa: “Jupanakampiw jichhax nuwasï, Babilonia sutsti chhaqtayäwa, ukan utjirinaksa, wawanakapamppacha, allchhinakapamppach chhaqtayä." 
Isaiah14:23 Mä ñiq'i mik'ayaruw tukuyä, ukansti jukunakakiw utjapxani. Tukjañ pichañampjamaw pichanukü.” Ukham siw taqi ch'aman Tatituxa." 
Isaiah14:24 Taqi ch'amani Tatitux juramentompiw arsu: “Janiw qhipar kuttañax utjkiti, kuntix amtkta ukax phuqhasipuniniwa, kunjämarutix amtkta ukax lurasipuniniwa." 
Isaiah14:25 Nayan markax taypinkki uka Asiria markarux t'unjäwa, qullunakaxan q'al juparux tukjä. Jupan t'aqhisiñapasti markaxarux janiw juk'ampi t'aqhisiyxaniti, qhuru kankañapas janiw juk'ampi markaxar jan walt'aykxaniti." 
Isaiah14:26 Kawkïr amtäwtix wakichkta ukax akawa, taqi markanakaruw tukjä.”" 
Isaiah14:27 Taqi ch'amani Tatituw ukham amti, janiw khitis jark'kaspati. Jupax jichhas axsarayaskakiwa, janirakiw khitis uka amtäwip mayjt'aykaspati." 
Isaiah14:28 Ahaz sat reyix jiwkäna uka maraw Isaías profetax aka profecía arunak arsüna: 
Isaiah14:29 Filisteo marka, Asiria marka apnaqir reyix jiwxiwa, ukataq t'aqhisiykäyätam uka. Ukampis jumax jan kusiskamti, Asiria markax juk'amp jach'a uñisirimaw tukuni; jiwayir asirut sipansa juk'ampiw tukuni." 
Isaiah14:30 Naya kipkaw mä juk'a jilt'ir jaqinakamarux jiwarayä; manq'atjamaw uka jaqinakamax jiwarapxani. Ukampisa, juk'a yänakani israelitanakakixa, chhuxllanakax uywanakapatak utjapuniniwa, sumakirakiw samart'asipxani." 
Isaiah14:31 ¡Filisteo markanaka, wararipxam, ayquñat wararipxam, mulljasiñatsa khathatipxam! Jichhasti alay tuqit mä ejercitow jutanti jiwq'i qinayar uñtata; soldadonakapasti nuwantañatakix wakicht'atäpxiwa." 
Isaiah14:32 Uka markan khithanitanakaparusti akham sasaw yatiyatäni: Tatituw Jerusalén marka utt'ayi, markapan llakitanakasti uka markan samarañ jikxatapxani." 
Isaiah15:1 Moab markataki profecía arunaka: Ar sata markax t'unjatäkän uka arumaxa, Moab markax t'unjatarakïnwa; Quir sat markax t'unjatäkän uka arumasti, Moab markax t'unjatarakïnwa." 
Isaiah15:2 Dibon markan utjir jaqinakasti, qullu patankki uka templor jachiriw makhatapxi, Moab markasti, Nebo markampina, Medebá markampin t'unjatätapat chuyma wal usuyasi. Ñik'utanakapasa, sunkhanakapas taqinin mururatkamäpxi." 
Isaiah15:3 Uta patxanakansa, plazanakansa, taqiniw chuyma usuyasipxi, jach'at wararipxaraki; markan k'ullk'u thakhinakapansa jaqinakax chhankha isimpi isthapitkamaw sarnaqapxi, jachkäwis niya tukusirpachäpxiwa." 
Isaiah15:4 Hesbón, Elalé sat markanakan jakirinakaxa, jach'at arnaqasisaw yanap mayipxi; Jahas sat markakamaw arnaqasitanakapax ist'asi. Ukat Moab markan nuwasir jaqinakapax axsarayasipxi, axsarañatsa wal khathatipxi." 
Isaiah15:5 Isaías profetax siwa: Moab markar ukham uñjasax chuymaxax walpin usutu; moabitanakasti axsarañampi phuqhantatäpxiwa, Zoar, Eglat-selisiya uka markanakaruw jaltxapxi, Luhit siski uka qhathanjam jacht'asis makhatapxi, Horonaim uka thakhinjam t'unjat uñjasitapat jacht'asis sarxapxi." 
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim uka chiqan utjir uma phuch'unakas wañt'xiwa, ch'uxña quranakas ankuntawayxiwa, taqi chhuxllanakas jiwsuwayxiwa, janirakiw mä ch'uxña laphis utjkxiti." 
Isaiah15:7 Ukat jaqix jichhax taqi yänakap apthapisxi, ukatsti Sauce jawir khurkataruw apasxapxi." 
Isaiah15:8 Yanap mayisa arnaqasitanakapasti Moab uraqpachan ist'asi, wararitanakapasti Eglaim siski uka chiqkamaw ist'asi, Beer-elim siski uka chiqkamaw ist'asi." 
Isaiah15:9 Dimón siski uka chiqan utjir phuch'unakax wilampi phuqhantatäkchisa, jichhax juk'ampi jan walt'añanak apayasinkakiwa; Moab markat qhispirinakarusti, leonanakaw jupanakar manq'antani." 
Isaiah16:1 Wasarankki uka Selá markatpachwa, Moab markan jilïrinakapax ovejanak apayanipxi, Jerusalén Diosan utapan Tatitur waxt'äwinak churañataki." 
Isaiah16:2 Moab markan jakirinakaxa, Arnón jawir chiqnäma makhatasasti, tapat jaltiri mulljat jamach'inakjamäpxiwa." 
Isaiah16:3 Jerusalén markankirinakarux sapxarakiwa: “Arxatt'atäñ thaqhapxta, jumay nanakarux arxatt'apxita. Chika urus ch'iwimampiy ch'iwt'ayapxita, arumäkaspas ukhamay ch'iwxatt'ayapxita; jayar ananukutanakarusti jumay katuqt'am, janirakiy uñisirinakaxarux katuyapxistati." 
Isaiah16:4 Moab markat jaltanirinakarux jumay katuqt'am. T'unjirinakatsa jumay imantt'asim.” Kunapachatix t'aqhisiñax tukusxani, t'unjatäñas jan utjkxarakini, marka t'unjiris sarxani ukapachaxa," 
Isaiah16:5 Davidan wawanakapat mayniw Israel markan reyipat utt'asini, jupan apnaqäwipasti chiqapa, askïniwa; jupax taqiniruw munasiñampi irpani, jank'akiw chiqaparus uñjani." 
Isaiah16:6 Moab markankirinakasti jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakäpxiwa: taqinitsa juk'amp jach'anakäpkaspas ukham amuyasipxi, mayninakarus jisk'achasiñampiw uñkatapxi. ¡Ukampis pantjatäpxiwa!" 
Isaiah16:7 Ukat jichhax Moab markankirinakax markapat jachapxani; Quir-haréset chiqan jakir jaqinakatsa, chuymanakapxa wal usuyasipxani." 
Isaiah16:8 Hesbón, Sibmá siski uka chiqanakan utjir uva yapunakax q'ala ankuntatawa, asirionakaw uka uva yapunak q'al tukjawayi. Uka uva yapunakasti Jazer chiqkamänwa, wasarkamarakiw purïna, jach'a qutat khursakamaw purirakïna." 
Isaiah16:9 Ukat Sibmá siski uka chiqan uva yapunakat jachta, Jazer chiqankir uva yapunakatsa jacharakta, Hesbón, Elalé siski uka uraqinakatsa walpun jachta, jaqir kusisiyañatakix janiw kuna yapunakas utjkxiti." 
Isaiah16:10 Uva yapunak taypinakanxa, kusisiñat arnaqasiñax tukusxaniwa; janiw uva apthapirinakan kusisiñat arnaqasiñanakapax utjkxaniti, janirakiw uvat vino ch'irwirinakas kusiskxapxaniti. Kusisiñat arnaqasiñanakax tukusxiwa." 
Isaiah16:11 Moab, Quir-haréset markanakan jan walt'atapatxa, chuymaxax mä arpjamaw llakisiñat wal khathati." 
Isaiah16:12 Moab markax qullunakarus saraskpan, qarjtañkamas arnaqasiskpan, diosanakapar mayisiris sarasipkpan, janiw kuna yanapsa jikxatapkaniti." 
Isaiah16:13 Aka arunak Tatitux Moab markatak nayra maranakan arsüna. 
Isaiah16:14 Jichhasti Tatitux siwa: “Mä irnaqirin luräwipax kimsa maratakikiwa. Ukat sapxsma, akat kimsa mararusti, Moab markan jach'a kankañapax q'ala tukjatäniwa. Jaqinakapax q'ala jiwarayatäniwa; mä qawqhanikiw jan jiwayat qhiparapxani, uka qhiparirinakasti pisi ch'aman jaqinakkamakïniwa.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Damasco markataki profecía arunaka: Damascox janiw juk'ampi markäkxaniti, mä t'unjat marka mayjar allthapitakïxaniwa." 
Isaiah17:2 Wiñayatak apanukutaw uñjasini, chhuxllanakakiw ukan jilxani; uywanakasti jan khitin kamsataw uka chhuxllanak manq'arapxani." 
Isaiah17:3 Efrainax Israelan jach'achasiñap markawa, jichhax pirqamp jan muyuntataw uñjasini; Siria markat qhiparir Damasco markas q'ala chhaqtayatäniwa. Ukham siw taqi ch'aman Tatituxa." 
Isaiah17:4 Uka urunxa Jacobun jach'achasiñap Samaria markax jan ch'amaniw uñjasini, qamir kankañapas chhaqtayatäniwa." 
Isaiah17:5 Israel markachirinakax q'ala tukjatäpxaniwa; kunjämatix trigo apthapitat mä trigo yapux q'alaki uñjasixa ukhamäpxaniwa. Mä juk'a jilt'irinakasa trigo puyanakar uñtataw uka yapun jaqtat uñjasipxani," 
Isaiah17:6 jan ukax kunjämtix olivo quqax thalsutaxa, mä qawqha achunakapak pachpa quqan jilt'kixa, ukhamäpxaniwa. Ukham siw Israelan Tatitu Diosapaxa." 
Isaiah17:7 Uka urunxa, israelit jaqinakax jupar uskt'ir Tatituruw kuttanxapxani, Israelan Qullan Diosapäki ukaru." 
Isaiah17:8 Janiw mayampis Baal diosarux luqtäwinak churaskxapxaniti, janirakiw Astarté sat diosarus yupaychkxapxaniti, uka diosanakax jupanakan luratätap layku." 
Isaiah17:9 Uka urunxa, ch'aman markanakamax apanukutäniwa, kunjämtix heveonakana, amorreonakan markanakapax israelitanakar axsaratapat apanukutäkänxa ukhama. Ch'usa wasarar tukuyatäpxaniwa," 
Isaiah17:10 qhispiyktam uka Diosar armatamata, jupax juman arxatirimätamxa, janiw amtasktati. Jumax suma panqar yapunak yapuchtaxa, jan uñt'at diosatakiw uka panqaranak ayrustaxa," 
Isaiah17:11 uka yapunak sum uñjañaruw uchastaxa, qhipürpachaw uka alinakax panqarsu. Ukampis jan qullkañ usu jutkani ukkhaxa, janiw kuna achunaksa apthapkätati." 
Isaiah17:12 ¡Ist'apxam, walja jaqinakan ch'axwatapax jach'a qutan qhuthutitapjamawa! Markanakax jach'at uxupxi jach'a jawiran qhuthutitapjama." 
Isaiah17:13 Ukampis Tatitux jupanakar tuqintki ukkhax jayaruw jaltxapxi, kunjämtix thayax wichhunakar apaskix ukhama, jan ukax kunjämtix tutuka thayax ch'aphinak apaskix ukhama." 
Isaiah17:14 Jayp'u tuqirusti axsarkañjamäpxiwa, ukampis qhantatirux janiw kunas utjkxiti. Ukhamaw jiwasar lunthatjirinakax tukusipxi, jiwasar jan walt'ayirinakas ukham tukusipxi." 
Isaiah18:1 ¡Ay, kunakïkan chhichhillankhanakamp phuqhantat markatakixa, Etiopía jawiranakat khursankkis uka markanakatakixa," 
Isaiah18:2 khithanakapsa Nilo jawiranjam khithanki uka markatakixa, junco sat alinakat lurat botenakat jutapki ukanakatakixa! Khithanaka, jalakamak jalapxam, uka jach'a tansa, janq'ull jaqinakan markaru, taqi chiqan wali axsarat markaru, wali ch'amani jach'a jach'a tukur markaru, jawiranakan muyuntat markaru." 
Isaiah18:3 Taqi jumanaka, akapachan jakir jaqinaka, kunapachatix qullun mä chimpu aptapkan uk uñjapxäta, kunapachatix trompetax phust'askani uk ist'apxarakïta." 
Isaiah18:4 Tatitusti sarakituwa: “Utjäwixatpach nayax k'uchikiw uñch'ukiskta, junt'u pachan mä qhanäkaspas ukhama, achunak apthapiñ junt'u urunakan mä jallu sullan qinayäkaspas ukhama." 
Isaiah18:5 Kunapachatix uva yapunakan panqarax pasakipxani ukapacha, uka panqaras suma puqt'ata uvar tukxarakini ukapacha, ukampis uva apthapiñ nayräxaxa, cuchillonakampiw layminakap khuchhurapxani, khuchhurasinsti apanukupxaniwa." 
Isaiah18:6 Taqi ukanakaw apanukut uñjasini, qullunakan utjir jach'a jamach'inakataki, kunayman utjir laq'unakataki. Uka jamach'inakasti junt'u pachax ukan jakapxani, kunayman laq'unakas thaya pachax ukanarak jakapxani.”" 
Isaiah18:7 Uka pachaxa, taqi ch'amani Tatitutakiw churäwinak apanipxani, kawkïr markatix jach'a tansa janq'ull jaqinakanïki uka marka, wali axsarat markäki uka, ch'amani, jach'a jach'a tukur markäki uka, jawir umanakan suma qarpat markäki uka. Sión qullurkamaw luqtäwinakap apanipxani, ukan taqi ch'aman Tatiturux yupaychapxani." 
Isaiah19:1 Egipto markataki profecía arunaka: Tatitur uñtapxam, Egiptoruw jutaski mä jaliri qinayar lat'xatata. Jupa nayraqatansti Egipton diosanakapax khathatipxiwa, Egiptonkir jaqinakasti wal axsarapxi." 
Isaiah19:2 Tatitux siwa: “Egiptonkir jaqinakarux jupanakkam nuwasiyä, masix mayni masipampi, mä markasti yaqha markampi, mä reinox yaqha reinompiw nuwasini." 
Isaiah19:3 Amuyunakap mayjt'ayä, amtatanakapsti t'unjarakïwa. Ukapachaw jiskt'asipxani: yaqha diosanakaru, layqanakaru, jiwatanakan ajayunakaparu, yatiri jaqinakaru." 
Isaiah19:4 Ukampis nayax Egiptorux mä qhuru reyiruw jupanakar apnaqañapat katuyä.” Ukham siwa taqi ch'aman Tatituxa. 
Isaiah19:5 Nilo jawiran umanakapax wañt'xaniwa, q'ala wañaw tukuwayxani," 
Isaiah19:6 uma sarañawjanakapas walipuniw thujsani. Egipton jalir umanakasti juk'at juk'at wañt'awayxani, uka jak'an utjir alinakas wañsuwayxaniwa;" 
Isaiah19:7 Nilo jawira lakan utjir alinakasa, uka jak'an taqi yapunakasa, jan mayampitakiw wañsuwayxani." 
Isaiah19:8 Nilo jawiran chawlla katurinakasa, llakisiñat wal jachapxani." 
Isaiah19:9 Linot telanak luririnakas mayjt'ataw jikxatasipxani; sawurinakas llakisipxaniwa. 
Isaiah19:10 Telanak sawurinakas chuyma kawkst'ataw uñjasipxani, taqi ukanak luririnakas wali mayjt'ataw uñjasipxani." 
Isaiah19:11 ¡Soan markan jilïrinakapa, jumanakax kunja luqhïpxtasa, Egipton suma amuyt'ayirinakapa, jumanakax luqhi amuyt'irinakäpxtawa! ¿Kunjämrak faraonarusti sapxtasti: “Nanakax wali yatiñan jaqinakan wawanakapäpxtwa, nayra reyinakan wawanakapäpxtwa” sasasti?" 
Isaiah19:12 Faraón, ¿kawkinkarak yatiñan jaqinakamasti, kuntix taqi ch'amani Tatitux Egiptotaki amtki ukanak jumar yatiyañatakisti?" 
Isaiah19:13 Soan markan jilïrinakapax wali luqhinakawa, Menfis markan jilïrinakapas sallqjayasipxarakiwa, suyunakan jilïrinakapasti Egiptorux pantat thakhinjam irpapxi." 
Isaiah19:14 Tatituw jupanakxaru pantjayir ajay churi; jupanakasti Egiptorux pantat thakhinjam irpapxi, taqi kuna luratanakapasa, kunjämatix mä machat jaqix waq'aqjasi, ukat uksar aksar aytilkaraki ukhama." 
Isaiah19:15 P'iqïpasa, jan ukax wich'inkhäpasa, palmeräpasa jan ukax suqusa alïpasa, janipuniw Egiptotakix khitis kuns lurirjamäkaniti." 
Isaiah19:16 Uka urunxa, kunapachatix taqi ch'aman Tatitux Egipcio jaqinakar mutuyañatak wakicht'askani ukkhaxa, jupanakax wal axsarayasipxani."
