Isaiah19:17 Egipcio jaqinakax Judá markankirinakarux wal axsarapxani; taqi ch'aman Tatitun amtäwinakapax Egipto markatakix sinti axsarkayätapatxa, sutip amtasakiw khathatxapxani." 
Isaiah19:18 Uka urunakasti Egipton phisqa markanakaw hebreo aru parlirinakax utjani, jupanakasti taqi ch'amani Tatitunkañwa chiqpach chuymamp arsupxani. Uka markanakat maynïristi Inti Marka satäniwa." 
Isaiah19:19 Egiptonsti uka urunxa Tatitur luqtat mä altaraw utjani, qurpanakap jak'ansti Tatitutakix mä qalarakiw sayt'ayatäni." 
Isaiah19:20 Uka qalasti Egipto markankir jaqinakan taqi ch'amani Tatitut amtasipxañapatak uskutäniwa. Kunapachatix jupanakar uñisirinakat arxatañapatak Tatitut yanapa mayisipkani ukkhaxa, Tatitux jupanakatakix mä qhispiyir khithanini, uka qhispiyiriw arxatani, qhispiyarakini." 
Isaiah19:21 Tatitux egipcio jaqinakampiw uñt'ayasxani, jupanakasti Tatiturux katuqapxaniwa, sutipxarux wilañchanaka, luqtäwinak churasipxani. Tatiturusti arsüwinak arsupxani, uka arsutanakaparusti phuqhapxarakiniwa." 
Isaiah19:22 Tatitux Egipto markarux chhuxrinchjaniwa, ukatsti qullxatt'arakiniwa. Jupanakasti Tatituruw makhatxapxani, Tatitusti jupanakat khuyapt'ayasisin qullxatarakini." 
Isaiah19:23 Uka urunsti mä jach'a thakhiw Egiptot Asiria markakam utjani. Asirio jaqinakasti Egiptoruw sarapxani, Egipcio jaqinakasti Asiriaruw sarapxarakini, asiriankirinakasa, egiptonkirinakasa mayakiw Tatiturux yupaychapxani." 
Isaiah19:24 Uka urunsti Israel markampi, Egipto markampi, Asiria markampix suman jakasxapxani, Israel markasti taqi markanakatakix mä suma markäxaniwa." 
Isaiah19:25 Taqi ch'aman Tatitusti jupanakarux mä aski waxt'äwi churani akham sasa: “Nayaw aski waxt'äwinak Egipto markaxarux churta, Asiria markasti nayan uskutawa, Israelasti nayan ajllit markaxawa, jupanakarus nayaw uka kipka waxt'äwinak churarakta” sasa." 
Isaiah20:1 Mä kutixa, Asiriankir Sargón reyix mä jach'a jilïriruw Asdod markar sarañapatak khithäna, ukatsti uka markar nuwantasaw atipjäna." 
Isaiah20:2 Ukapachaw Tatitux Amós chachan Isaías yuqaparux parläna, akham sasa: “Uka chhankha isim apsusim, wiskhunakamsa apsusirakim” sasa. Isaías profetasti ukham luräna, jan wiskhuni, niya q'alalpachaw jikxatasïna." 
Isaiah20:3 Ukapachaw Tatitux sarakïna: “Isaías uywataxax q'ara kayuki, niya q'alalpacha, ukhamaw kimsa mara sarnaqi, ukasti Egipto markatakixa, Etiopía markatakisa mä unañchäwiwa." 
Isaiah20:4 Ukham Asiriankir reyix egipcionakaru, etiopenakarus katuntat apani, awkinakäskpasa, waynanakäskpasa, jupanakarux q'alalpacha, q'ara kayuki, ch'inas q'arpach mä p'inqa aparakini." 
Isaiah20:5 Yaqha markanakax Etiopía markaruw alkatasipxäna, Egipto markatsa jach'a jach'aw tukupxäna, uka urusti, ukham lurapxatapat p'inqasxapxaniwa, walrak axsarapxani." 
Isaiah20:6 Uka urunakansti taqi quta iraman jakirinakax sapxarakiniwa: ‘Uñtapxam, Egipto markasa, Etiopía markas jan walt'añarurakis purxapxixä, jupanakay Asiria markankir reyit arxatchistani sayätanwa. ¿Jichhasti khitirak arxatt'istanisti?’ ” sasa." 
Isaiah21:1 Babilonia markatak profecía arunaka: Tutuka thayjamaw aynachat jutantapxi, wasarat jutapxi, axsarkañ chiqata." 
Isaiah21:2 Tatitux kuntix uñacht'aykitu ukax wali axsarkañawa: sallqjirix sallqjiwa, t'unjiristi t'unjarakiwa. ¡Elam markankirinaka, sartasipxam! ¡Medo markankirinaka, Babiloniar nuwantapxam! ¡Janiw juk'ampi ayquñanak ist'kxäti!" 
Isaiah21:3 Janchixas chhijthaptituwa, wawachasir warmin janchipjamaw usurakitu, chuyma kawkst'añasti janiw ist'aykituti, axsarañas janirakiw kunsa uñjaykituti." 
Isaiah21:4 Amuyuxas mayjt'atawa, axsarañatsa khathatiraktwa. Inti jalanta pachanakax wali sumänwa, jichhasti ukax nayatakix axsarkañakiw tukxi." 
Isaiah21:5 Manq'añawjax niya wakicht'atäxiwa, jant'akunakas jant'akt'atarakiwa, jach'a manq'äwix niya qalltxarakiwa. ¡Soldadonakan jilïripa, sayt'asipxam, jark'aqasiñanakam sum llijtayapxam!" 
Isaiah21:6 Tatitusti situwa: “Saram, ukatsti mä uñch'ukiri uskum, kunanaktix jupax uñjkani ukanak yatiypan." 
Isaiah21:7 Pä caballon qatatita carronaksa, asnoru, jan ukax, camellonakar lat'xatat jaqinak uñjchini ukaxa, ukanak tuqit jank'ak yatiypan.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Khititix uñch'ukkän ukax akham sasaw art'asi: “Tata, nayax uñch'ukiñawjan uñch'ukiskta, sapürurakiw uñch'ukiskta, arumanakas paqar paqaraw uñch'ukiskta." 
Isaiah21:9 Mä carro pä caballon qatatit jutaskir uñjta” sasa. Ukatsti mayniw saraki: “¡Aynacht'xiwa, aynacht'xiw Babiloniaxa! diosanakapasti uraqirkamaw liwirtxapxi, jisk'a jisk'a t'unjataw uñjasipxi” sasa." 
Isaiah21:10 Isaías profetax sarakiwa: Nayan markaxay, walpin t'aqhisiwaytaxa, kuntix taqi ch'aman Tatituxa, Israelan Diosapäki ukax uñacht'aykitu uk yatiysma." 
Isaiah21:11 Tatitux Isaías profetaruw uñacht'ayäna kuntix Edom markar lurkani ukxata, uka uñacht'äwi tuqiw uka markatpach maynir arnaqasinir ist'äna: “Isaías, ¿Kuna pachas nanakan t'aqhisiñanakaxax tukusxani?” sasa." 
Isaiah21:12 Marka uñjiristi sarakiwa: “Jank'akiw samarañ urunakax purinxani, ukampis mutuyäwix kutt'aniniwa. Juk'amp yatiñ munapxsta ukapachaxa, wakisiw jiskt'asipkañamaki” sasa." 
Isaiah21:13 Tatitux Isaías profetaruw uñacht'ayäna kuntix Arabia markar lurkani ukxata, arumanakax uka jaqinakax wasar ch'uminak taypin utjapxirïna: Dedán chiqan utjir árabe jaqinaka," 
Isaiah21:14 umat pharjatar jikxatir mistunipxam, ukatsti um churapxam. Temá markan utjirinaka, jaltxirinakar jikxatir mistunipxam, ukatsti manq'añ churapxam." 
Isaiah21:15 Jupanakasti jiwayatäñat jaltasipki, wali ari espadampi jiwayatäñata, mich'inakan jiwayatäñata, uka nuwasïwin jiwayatäñat jaltasipki." 
Isaiah21:16 Tatitusti sarakituwa: “Akat mä mararuxa, kunjämtix mä irnaqirix luräwip tukusitapat llakiskixa, ukhamaw Quedar markan jach'a kankañapax tukusxani." 
Isaiah21:17 Quedar markan jach'a nuwasirinakapan janiw kunampi tuwaqasiñapas utjkxaniti.” Israelan Tatit Diosapaw ukham arsu. 
Isaiah22:1 Unañchäwinak uñjañ qhirwataki profecía arunaka: ¿Kunas kamachi, taqinis uta patarkamakis mistupxixa?" 
Isaiah22:2 Markasti ch'axwañampi, uxuñanakampi phuqhantatawa, aka markax kusist'añak munaski. Juman jiwirinakamax janiw espadampi jiwayatäpkiti, janirakiw nuwasïwinsa jiwapkiti;" 
Isaiah22:3 jilïrinakamax taqiniw jaltxapxi, mich'inakat jaltapxatapatsti taqiniw katuntatäpxi. Wali ch'aman jaqinakamasti jayaruw jaltxapxi, uka kipka katuntatäpxarakiwa." 
Isaiah22:4 Ukat sistxa: Nayat jithiqtapxam, chuymas kawkst'ataw jachañ munta; markaxan aynacht'atapatsti jan chuymachapxistati." 
Isaiah22:5 Taqi ch'amani Tatituw uka axsarkañ mutuyäwinak jiwasxar apayani. Unañchanak uñjañ qhirwanxa, t'unjatäñampi, mulljasiñampik uñjta. Uñisirinakaw jach'a pirqanakas tinkuräwayi, qullunakansti arnaqasitanakapaw ist'asi." 
Isaiah22:6 Elam, Quir markanakankir soldadonakaxa, nuwasiñatakix carronakapxat purintanipxi, jark'aqasiñanakampi, mich'inakamp nuwantañat wakicht'ata." 
Isaiah22:7 Jerusalén markan suma qhirwanakapasti nuwasiñ carronakamp phuqhantatawa. Soldadonakas markaruw muyuntapxi. 
Isaiah22:8 Judá markax jan jark'aqasiñaniw jikxatasi. Uka urux jumanakax amuyapxtawa, cedro quqanakat lurat utanxa, nuwasiñatak yänakan walja utjatapa," 
Isaiah22:9 Jerusalenan pirqanakapas k'ak'atätap uñjapxaraktawa, aynachankki uka qutañarusti umampiw phuqhantapxarakta." 
Isaiah22:10 Jerusalén markankir utanaksa uñakipapxtawa, yaqhip utanaksti pirqanak sum sayt'ayañatakiw liwinukupxta." 
Isaiah22:11 Uka pä pirqa taypirusti, mirq'i qutañan umapatakiw uma qutañ lurapxaraktaxa. Ukampisa janiw jumanakax amuyasipktati khititix taqi ukanak lurki ukxa, jupax nayra maranakatpach taqi ukanak wakichäna." 
Isaiah22:12 Uka urusti taqi ch'aman Tatitux jachapxañamataki, wararipxañamatakiw jawsapxtam, p'iqinakamsa q'ararasipxañamataki, ayquñ uñacht'ayañatakisti chhankha isinakamp isthapisipxañamataki." 
Isaiah22:13 Ukampis jumanakax kusiskañ phunchhäwi lurapxtaxa; vacanaka, ovejanaka jiwarayapxtaxa, aycha manq'apxtaxa, vino umapxaraktaxa. Ukatsti, “manq'asiñäni, umt'asiñäni, qharürux jiwxchiñänixaya” sapxaraktawa." 
Isaiah22:14 Ukampisa taqi ch'aman Tatitux nayaruw uñstitu, ukatsti sarakituwa: “Janipuniw uka jucha luratanakap pampachkäti; jan ukasti jumanakax jiwarapxätawa” sasa. Aka arunakax taqi ch'aman Tatitun arunakapawa." 
Isaiah22:15 Taqi ch'amani Tatitusti sarakituwa: “Saram, ukatsti reyin utap uñjir Sená sat chachar uñjanim, juparusti sarakim:" 
Isaiah22:16 ‘¿Kuns jumax akan lurta, khitis jumar reyinakan amay imaña chiqana amay imaña lurañatak churtam?" 
Isaiah22:17 Tatitux uka luräwimat jayaruw liwinukütam, kunjämtix mä ch'amani jaqix liwtki ukhama. Ch'amampiw jumarux katuntätam," 
Isaiah22:18 mä muruq'ur uñtat qurumiyätam, ukatsti jaya pamparuw liwtätam. Ukan jiwarakïta, uka nuwasiñ carronakamas janiw kunatakïkanisa, reyi utankir jilïrimatakis mä p'inqaw liwisïta." 
Isaiah22:19 Nayaw jichhax irnaqäwimat jaqunuküma, luräwinakamatsti apanukurakïmawa." 
Isaiah22:20 “ ‘Uka urunsti nayan luqtirixaruw jawsä, Hilquías chachan Eliaquim yuqaparu;" 
Isaiah22:21 juman isimampiw jupar isthapiyä, jach'a kankañ churktam uka wak'ampiw wak'antayä, jilïr kankañamsti juparuw churxä. Jerusalén markankirinakatakisa, Judá markatakisa mä awkjamäniwa." 
Isaiah22:22 Tatituw Davidan jilïr kankañap jupar churxani. Kuntix Eliaquim chachax siskani uka arsutapaw phuqhasini, janipuniw khitis arsutaparux “janiw walïkiti” siskaniti." 
Isaiah22:23 Wila masinakapatakix jupax jach'ar aptatäniwa, Tatiturakiw taqi uñisirinakapat imani." 
Isaiah22:24 Jupatxa taqi wila masinakapaw jach'a jach'a tukupxani, yanapapsa katuqapxarakiniwa." 
Isaiah22:25 “ ‘Ukampis Eliaquim, khititix reyin utap apnaqirïkana, wila masinakapa, jupar jaqkattat jakapkäna ukanakas taqpachaniw juchar mantapxani.’ ” Ukham siw taqi ch'aman Tatituxa." 
Isaiah23:1 Tiro markataki profecía arunaka: Tarsisankir barco apnaqirinaka, ayqupxam, barco mistuniñ chiqax q'ala t'unjatawa. Chipre tuqit puriniña uka barco mistuñasti q'ala t'unjatarakiwa." 
Isaiah23:2 Tiro markankir jaqinakasa, Sidón markankir alakip jaqinakasa, jan kun kamsasakiw qhiparapxi. Jupanakan barconakapasa nayrax suma aljañanak apanipxirïna." 
Isaiah23:3 Egiptot apanit trigo markanakar aljapxirïna, walja qullqirak uñxatapxirïna." 
Isaiah23:4 Jichhasti Sidón markankirinaka, p'inqachjatäñampiw phuqhantasipxäta; jumanakax quta taypinjam sum sarnaqañ yatipxtaxa, ukampis lamar qutax janiw qamir yänak churxapxätamti, wawanakamas janirakiw suma yänak jikxatxapxaniti." 
Isaiah23:5 Kunapachatix egipcionakar uka yatiyäwix purkani ukkhaxa, Tiro markan ukhamar puritapat taqiniw jachapxani." 
Isaiah23:6 Sapxarakiniwa: “Tarsis markar sarxapxam, quta iraman utjirinaka, uka markar purisin jachapxam” sasa." 
Isaiah23:7 Tiro markax wali jaya maran markänwa, kusisiñansa phuqt'at markänwa. Jaqinakapax jayanakar sarirïpxänwa, uka chiqanarak jakasipxirïna." 
Isaiah23:8 Alakip luririnakapax wali aytat jaqinakäpxänwa; taqi chiqansa wali sum katuqatäpxänwa. Jichhasti, ¿khitirak uka marka t'unjañ amtisti?" 
Isaiah23:9 Taqi ch'amani Tatituw ukham lurañ amti, jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakarus jisk'achjañataki jach'a ch'amaninakarus atipjañataki." 
Isaiah23:10 Tiro markankirinaka, jichhax yapuchañar uskusxapxam, barconak puriñäwjanakapax q'ala tukjatawa, Tarsis markat jutir barconakas janiw jutkxapxaniti." 
Isaiah23:11 Tatituw jach'a qutxar amparap luqxati, markanakarus khathatiyaraki, Tatituw Canaán chiqan utjir jach'a ch'aman markanakarus tukjatäñapatak khitharaki." 
Isaiah23:12 Sidón markarusti sarakiwa: “Kusisiñamax tukusxiwa; markaman qamañapas q'ala tukjatawa. Chipre sat wat'arus jaltaskam, ukansa janirakikiw samarañ jikxatkätati.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Tiro, Sidón markankirinaka, kunarutix Babilonia markax purt'aski uk uñtapxam. Uka markax janiw utjkxiti, Asiria markan ejercitopaw tukjawayxi. Soldadonakax nuwantañatak torrenak lurasipxi, Reyi utanakap q'al tukjawayapxi. Jichhasti wasarankir laq'unakakiw uka taypin jakasxapxi." 
Isaiah23:14 Tarsisankir barconak apnaqirinakax llakt'atäpxiwa, barconakan puriñäwjapan tukjatätap layku." 
Isaiah23:15 Uka urunakanxa, Tiro markax paqallq tunka maraw apanukutäni, mä reyin jakañapäkis ukkha maranaka. Uka paqallq tunka mara sarakipatatsti Tiro markarux kuna jaylliñatix jan wali sarnaqir warmit utjki uka jaylliñarjamaw purini:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Yaqha chachanakampi sarnaqir armanukut warmi, arpam apxarusim ukatsti, markpacha muytanim; suma q'uchunak toct'am, walja q'uchunak jayllt'arakim, inach jumat amtasipxani.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Paqallq tunka mara tukusxani ukapachasti, Tatitux Tiro markan wasitat alakip lurañapatakiw jaysani, ukatsti, aka uraqin taqi markanakampiw alakip lurarakini." 
Isaiah23:18 Ukampis Tiro markax janiw uka jikxatatanakapat kusiskaniti, jan ukasti, Tatituruw luqtani, ukampisti khitinakatix Tatitur yupaychapki ukanakatakiw walja manq'añanaka, suma isinak alapxani." 
Isaiah24:1 Uñtapxam, Tatitux aka uraq tukjaniwa, q'al allthapini, mayjt'ayaniwa, jaqinakarusti uksar aksaruw ananukuni." 
Isaiah24:2 Taqiniruw uka kipka lurani: Sacerdoterusa, markachirinakarusa, uywirinakarusa, uywatanakarusa, alasirinakarusa, aljirinakarusa, mayt'irinakarusa, mayt'asirinakarusa, qamirirusa, jan kunanirusa." 
Isaiah24:3 Uraqix q'ala tukjatäniwa, q'ala lunthatjatäniwa. Tatituw ukham lurañatak arsu." 
Isaiah24:4 Uraqix q'alaw wañsuwayxi, taqi akapachaw ankuntatjam tukuwayxi, alaxpachas, akapachas wali llakitawa." 
Isaiah24:5 Uraqisti jaqinakapan takisitawa, kamachinak jan phuqhatap layku, arsutanakaparus janiw jaysapkiti, Tatitun wiñayatak arust'äwipsa p'akintapxarakiwa." 
Isaiah24:6 Taqiniw juchañjasipxi; ukat aka uraqix ñanqhachat uñjasi. Juk'anikiw jakañan qhiparapxi, markasti mä ch'usa wasarar tukutawa." 
Isaiah24:7 Uva yapunakax q'ala wañsutawa, ukat vinox jan utjkxiti. Khitinakatix kusisiñat q'uchupxirïn ukanakax, jichhax llakisiñatsa jiwirpachäpxiwa." 
Isaiah24:8 Tamboranakampi, arpanakampi kusisiñas tukusxiwa, kusisiñat uxuñanakasa tukusxarakiwa." 
Isaiah24:9 Janiw jichhax q'uchuñanakamp chika vino umañax utjkxaniti; umañanakas umirinakatakix k'allk'uw tukxani. 
Isaiah24:10 Jan wali sarnaqir markax q'ala aynacht'atawa, janiw mä utarus mantañjamäkiti." 
Isaiah24:11 Jaqinakasti marka thakhinakan vinon pist'atapat jachapxi; taqi kusisiñas tukusiwayxiwa, aka uraqitsti apanukutäxarakiwa." 
Isaiah24:12 Markasti q'ala tukjatapuniwa, punkupas jisk'a jisk'a t'unjatawa." 
Isaiah24:13 Aka uraqin utjir taqi markanakanxa ukhamarakïniwa, kunjämatix aceitunanakax thalsutax willirtanix ukhama, jan ukax uva apthapiñ tukutatxa, pallsuñsa munasipkaki ukhama." 
Isaiah24:14 Tatitun jach'a kankañap uñjasaxa, qhiparirinakax kusisiñat arnaqasipxani, inti jalanta tuqitpach wararinipxani." 
Isaiah24:15 Ukhamarakiw inti jalsu tuqinsa, jach'a quta taypin utjir markanakansa, Tatitu, Israelan Diosaparuw jach'achapxani." 
Isaiah24:16 Uraqi tukuyapatpach q'uchutanakapax ist'asi: “Aski jaqix jach'ar aptatäpan” sasa. Ukampis nayax saraktwa: ¡Ay kunas akaxa, kunas akaxa! ¡Ch'uxña lurir jaqinakax jach'a ch'uxñpin lurapxi!" 
Isaiah24:17 Aka uraqin jakir jaqinakasti jiwayañ animalanakjam arknaqatäpxaniwa, mä jach'a p'iyaru, jan ukax mä sipitar jalt'irjamäpxaniwa." 
Isaiah24:18 Jiwayirinakat jaltirixa, p'iyaruw jalantani, uka p'iyat misturisti sipitaruw jalt'ani. Alaxpachatsti jallux walipuniw purxatanini, aka uraqin qalltanakapas khathatirakiniwa." 
Isaiah24:19 Aka uraqisti axsarkañaw khathatini, khathatisinsti jisk'a jisk'aw tukusini." 
Isaiah24:20 Mä machat jaqjamaw aytinkini, mä thantha chhujllar uñtataw khathatini. Juchanakapasti jupxarux walpun jatxattani, liwisiniwa, ukatsti janirakiw mayampsa sartkxaniti." 
Isaiah24:21 Uka urunsti, alaxpachan utjir ch'amaninakaru, aka uraqinkir reyinakarusa, Tatitux mutuyaniwa," 
Isaiah24:22 mayjaruw tantachthapini, ukatsti mä mutuñäwjaruw jaquntani, ukan katuntat uñjasipxani, ukatsti jaya urunakat mutuyaskarakini." 
Isaiah24:23 Kunapachatix taqi ch'aman Tatitux reyjama taqi kunsa lurkan ukkhaxa, Sión qullunsa, Jerusalén markansa, intis phaxsis ch'amakt'aniwa, markapankir jilïrinakasti, Tatitun qhapaq kankañap uñjapxani." 
Isaiah25:1 Tatay, jumätaw nayan Diosaxaxa; nayax jumaruw yupaychsma, muspharkañ amtatanakam phuqhatamata, nayra pachatpach ukanakan chiqätapata, sutimsa jach'aruw aptarakta." 
Isaiah25:2 Markanaksti qala chhaxwanak tukuytaxa, suma pirqantat markanaksti q'al t'unthaptaxa; uñisirinakan reyi utanakapsa q'al allthaptaxa, janirakiw mayampis utachatäkxaniti." 
Isaiah25:3 Jichhax qhuru jaqinakax jach'añchäwi churaraktamxa. 
Isaiah25:4 Jumax jan kunaninakaruw arxattaxa, khititix aynacht'atäki ukarus arxataraktawa, jan walt'añan jumaw arxattaxa lupinsa jumaw ch'iwiñcht'araktaxa. Qhuru jaqinakan samanapasti thaya pachan jach'a thayar uñtatawa," 
Isaiah25:5 jan ukax waña uraqin wali lupir uñtatawa. Uñisirinakan ch'amampi sartatapsti jumax t'unjtawa kunjämtix lupin junt'uparux mä ch'iwimpi samaraykta ukhama. Qhuru jaqinakarusti amukt'ayaraktawa. 
Isaiah25:6 Taqi ch'aman Tatitusti, taqi markanakatakiw Jerusalén markan mä suma manq'äwi wakichani, suma manq'anakampi, suma vinonakampi." 
Isaiah25:7 Uka markan Tatitux taqi markanakan llakisiñanakap apaqxani. 
Isaiah25:8 Tatitux wiñayatakiw jiwañarux t'unjani, taqi jaqinakan jachanakapsa picharaniwa, markapan aynacht'atapsti taqi aka uraqpachat chhaqtayxani. Tatituw ukham arsu." 
Isaiah25:9 Uka urunsti satarakïniwa: “Akapï jiwasan Tatitusaxa, juparuw iyawstan, juparakiw qhispiyistu, kusisipxañäni, k'uchirt'asipxañäni, jupaw qhispiyistu.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Tatituw Jerusalén markarux imaskani, Moab markarusti takisiniwa, kunjämtix t'unanakax takisitäki ukhama." 
Isaiah25:11 Moab markasti wasitat sartasiñ munani, ukampis inakiw ch'amachasiskani, Tatitux pachpak jach'a jach'a tukuñap aynacht'ayani." 
Isaiah25:12 Tatitusti uka jach'a alay thuru pirqanakap liwisiyaniwa; uraqir tinkurayat apanukuwayani. 
Isaiah26:1 Uka urunsti Judá uraqin aka q'uchuw q'uchusini: “Mä jach'a ch'amani markaw utjistu; jiwasar qhispiyañataki, Tatituw uka markan jach'a pirqanak sayt'ayi." 
Isaiah26:2 Jerusalén markan punkunakap jist'arapxam, chiqpacha aski markaxa uka punkunjam mantani." 
Isaiah26:3 Tatituw samarañan jakayani khitinakatix jupatakjam tukupkani, ukhamarak jupar iyawsapkani ukanakaru." 
Isaiah26:4 Tatiturupun katuyasipxam, jupaw jiwasan wiñay arxatirisaxa." 
Isaiah26:5 Jupaw jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakarux liwisiyi, uraqkam liwinukusaw jach'a jach'a tukur markarux jisk'achji," 
Isaiah26:6 ukhamat aynacht'at jaqinakasa, jan kunaninakas jupanakar takichasipxañapataki.”" 
Isaiah26:7 Aski jaqinakan sarnaqäwinakapax chiqapawa; Tatay, jupanakan thakhipsa jumaw khuskhachtaxa." 
Isaiah26:8 Tatay, juman kamachinakarjam sarnaqasaxa, nanakax askin jikxatasipxta. Chuymanakaxasti jumatak lup'iñ munaski." 
Isaiah26:9 Arumanakas taqi chuymaxampiw jumat llakista; taqi chuymaxampiw thaqsma; kunapachatix jumax taqi aka uraqpachar uñjkäta ukkhaxa, jaqinakax kunatix chiqapäki uk yatipxani." 
Isaiah26:10 Ñanqha jaqinakat khuyapayaskäta ukasa, jupanakax janipuniw chiqapäñ yatiqapkaniti; aski jaqinakan uraqipansti sinti qhurunakaw tukupxi, janirakiw Tatitun jach'a kankañapsa yäqapkiti." 
Isaiah26:11 Tatay, jupanakatakix mutuyäwimax wakichatawa, ukampis jupanakax janiw amuyasiñ munapkiti; kunapachatix juman markamar wali munasitam uñjapkan ukkhaxa, jupanakax mä p'inqaw uñjasipxani. ¡Phiñasiñamampiy jupanakar tukjam!" 
Isaiah26:12 Tatay, jumaw nanakar aski kankañ churapxista; chiqpachansa juma sapakiw taqi lurañanakax lurtaxa." 
Isaiah26:13 Nanakan Tatit Diosaxa, yaqha diosanakaw nanakarux apnaqapxitäna, ukampisa jichhax jumakïtaw nanakan Diosaxaxa." 
Isaiah26:14 Uka yaqha diosanakax janiw jakañanïpkiti; jiwarat diosapxiwa, janirakiw unxtapkisa, jumaw jupanakarux mutuytaxa, tukjaraktasa, jan mayampi amtaskañatakiw tukjtaxa." 
Isaiah26:15 Tatay, jumaw markamarux jiltaytaxa; juman askimatakiw jiltaytaxa, taqi qurpanakapsa jithitatayaraktawa." 
Isaiah26:16 Tatay, kunapachatix mutuyapkista ukkhaxa, usuchapkchista ukkhasa, jumarukiw makhatanipxsma." 
Isaiah26:17 Tatay, juman mutuyäwimax walpin t'aqhisiyapxitu; nanakan ayquñanakaxax wali jach'apunïnwa." 
Isaiah26:18 Ukampis uka t'aqhisiñax janiw kuna askinaksa apankiti. Markaxan atipt'atapatsa janiw kusisiñ churapktti, janirakiw walja wawanakanïpxataxatsa kusisiñ churapktti." 
Isaiah26:19 Ukampisa juman markamäpxtwa, t'unjat uñjasitäpkta ukasa, wasitat jakatatasipkakïwa. Jumaw jakañampi, kusisiñampi aka jiwat markarux phuqhantäta." 
Isaiah26:20 Nayan markaxa, utamar mantam, utaman punkupsa jist'katasinim. Tatitun phiñasiñap mäqipañapkamax imantasim." 
Isaiah26:21 Tatitusti jach'a utapat mistunini, aka uraqin jakir jaqinakaruw juchanakapat mutuyani. Qhurumpi jaqinakar jiwayirinakasti mutuyataw uñjasipxani." 
Isaiah27:1 Israel markan uñisirinakapax lamar qutan axsarkañ laq'ur uñtatäpxiwa, katarinakjamaw uksar aksar q'iwinaqtapxi, ukampis Tatituw jach'a ch'aman espadap ayxarusini, ukampiw q'al jiwarayani." 
Isaiah27:2 Uka urunsti Tatitux sarakiniwa: “Israel markatak q'uchupxam. 
Isaiah27:3 Naya Tatituw uka markarux uñjaskta, uruy arumaw imaskta, ukhamat jan khitis ñanqhachañapataki." 
Isaiah27:4 Janiw jupatakix phiñasitäkxti; ukampis jan ist'asirinakax utjaskakiwa, ukatsti, nayaw uka markat jupanakarux apsü." 
Isaiah27:5 Israel markatix nayan jupar imañax munchixa, nayampix sumar mantañapawa; jïsa, nayampix sumankthapiñapawa.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Akat qhiparux Israel markax jach'aruw tukxani, aka uraqpacharuw jaqinakamp phuqhantani." 
Isaiah27:7 Tatitux Israel markarux janiw mutuykiti, kunjämtix jupar uñisirinakar mutuyki ukhama, janirakiw Israel markarux t'unjkiti kunjämtix uñisirinakapar t'unjki ukhama." 
Isaiah27:8 Tatitux jaya markar apayasaw markapar mutuyi, mä jach'a thayjam phust'asaw apanuku, kunjämtix inti jalsu thayax phust'anki ukhama." 
Isaiah27:9 Israelitanakatix uka yaqha diosanakan altaranakapa, kawkhantix yupaychapxirïkäna ukanak q'al t'unthapipxan ukkhaxa, Tatitux jupanakan juchanakap pampachaniwa." 
Isaiah27:10 Wali suma pirqantat markasti q'ala tukjataw uñjasi, mä apanukut utjama, mä ch'usa wasara jan jaqinjama. Jichhax uywa awatisiñ chiqakïxiwa, uywanakax layminak manq'apxi, ukanarak jipirt'xapxi." 
Isaiah27:11 Mä quqan layminakapax wañsxi ukkhax p'akirtxiwa; warminakasti uka layminak apthapisaw phayasipxi. Mä jan amuyt'asir markawa. Ukatpï jupanakar irnuqir Tatitux jan khuyapt'ayaskanitixa. 
Isaiah27:12 Kunapachatix Tatitux Israelan juchap pampachkani ukkhaxa, Tatitux Éufrates jawirata Egipto jawirkamaw uraq khathatiyani; jumanak israelitanakarusti, mayat mayat apthapipxätam, kunjämtix yapu luririx cebadap apthapki ukhama." 
Isaiah27:13 Uka urunsti mä jach'a trompetaw phust'asini, khitinakatix Asiria markan katuntatäpkän ukanakaxa, Egiptor apayatäpkäna ukanakasa, Tatitur yupaychiriw Jerusalén qullana markar jutapxani." 
Isaiah28:1 ¡Ay Samaria marka, Israel markan jach'a jach'a tukuñapa, machantat marka; ankuntat panqaranakampiw k'achachasta, uka suma qhirwan utjasiri marka, jaqinakapas vino umañamp atipjatanaka!" 
Isaiah28:2 Tatitux Asiria ch'aman marka jumanakatakix wakichaski, wali ch'aman chhijchhir uñtata, taqi kun tukjir thayjama, wali umani jallükaspas ukhama, uraq chhaqtayir umjama. Asiria markax munañapampi, ch'amapampiw" 
Isaiah28:3 Samaria markarux q'al tukjani, uka machir markarux jach'a jach'a tukuñapsa kayupampiw takxatani." 
Isaiah28:4 Uka ankuntat panqaranakampi k'achachasitamxa, kawkïritix uka suma qhirwa patan sartki ukaxa, nayraqat achuqiri higonakar uñtatäniwa; maynitix uka achu uñjkani ukkhaxa, mäkiw iraqas manq'antani ukhama." 
Isaiah28:5 Uka urunxa taqi ch'amani Tatitux mä k'ajkiri muspharkañ pillüniwa, markapan qhiparirinakatakisti, mä suma k'achachäniwa," 
Isaiah28:6 jucha t'aqañ utansti taripirinakarux chiqap amuyu churani, markar arxatir soldadonakarusti ch'am churarakini." 
Isaiah28:7 Profetanakasa, sacerdotenakasa, vino umantasaw uksar aksar liwinaqtas sarnaqapxi. Tatitun unañchäwi arunakap katuqañatakix vinompi q'ala machjatäpxiwa, jan walt'añanak taripañatakis machantatäpxiwa." 
Isaiah28:8 Mesa patanakapas waq'aqjasitanakapamp phuqhantatawa, janipuniw kawkhas q'umax utjkiti." 
Isaiah28:9 Ukatsti, nayxat akham sasaw parlapxi: “¿Kunjämarak Tatitun arunakapat jiwasar yatichir jutapxanisti? ¿Jiwasanakax jisk'a wawanakäksnas ukhamasti?" 
Isaiah28:10 ¿Jichhas ullañ qillqañ yatiqasksna ukhamasti?” sasa. 
Isaiah28:11 Walikiwa, jumanakatix jan ist'asipkätaxa, pachpa Tatituw parlapxätam, ukampis yaqha arunakat parlapxätam, janirakiw uka arunakan kuna satapsa amuyt'apkätati." 
Isaiah28:12 Jupasti jumanakarux sapxäyätamwa: “Akax t'akuräwixa, akax samarañasa; qarit jaqix samart'aspan” sasa. Ukampis janiw ist'añ munapktati." 
Isaiah28:13 Ukatpï Tatitux jisk'a wawanakarjam parlxayapxätamxa, jichhas ullañ qillqañ yatiqasipkasma ukhama. Wawanakjamaw sarnaqañ yatiqapxäta, jikhanïxat liwisisaw usuchjasipxäta, janirakiw ukat sarthapirjamäpkätati." 
Isaiah28:14 Jerusalén marka apnaqirinaka, ñanqha lurir jaqinaka: Tatitun arunakap ist'apxam." 
Isaiah28:15 Jumanakax sapxtawa: “Jiwañampix arust'astanwa, jiwatanakan utjäwipampis arust'asiraktanwa, kunapachatix uka jach'a jan walt'añax jutkani ukkhaxa jiwasanakarux janiw katuntkistaniti; k'arisiñanakxaruw imantastanxa, sallqjasiñanakxaruw imantasiraktanxa” sasa." 
Isaiah28:16 Ukat Tatitux saraki: “Nayawa Jerusalén markatakix mä suma ajllit jila alan qala tukurakï, jach'a wakiskir qaläyäwa, uta qalltan mä wakiskir qalapjamäyäwa. Khititix nayar katuyasis jakanixa, jakäwipax sumakipunïniwa." 
Isaiah28:17 Uka utachäwinsti plomada lantix chiqapar uñjañäniwa, nivel lantisti kunatix chiqapäki ukarakïniwa” sasa. Jumanakax Egipto markaruw arxatayasiñatak katuyasipxtaxa, ukampis wali ch'aman Asiria ejercitow uka arxatirirux q'al tukjawayani." 
Isaiah28:18 Jiwañampi arust'asitapasti ina ch'usar tukuyatäniwa, jiwatanakan utjawipampi arust'asitapasti ina ch'usaruw tukuni. Uka axsarkañ jach'a jan walt'añaw jutani, ukasti jumanakarux q'al tukjapxätam." 
Isaiah28:19 Sapa kuti jutkan ukkhasti q'al tukjapxarakïtam. Sapa qhantati, sapüru, sapa jayp'urakiw jutani, jutañap yatisakiw jumanakax khathatxapxäta." 
Isaiah28:20 Mä jisk'a ikiñarus ikintapkasma ukhamäniwa, mä jisk'a janxatampis janxatasipkasma ukhamaraki." 
Isaiah28:21 Tatitusti Perasim qullun lurkän ukham lurani, Gabaón qhirwan lurkän ukham phiñasiñap uñacht'ayani. Tatitux jank'akiw amtatap phuqhani, jan khitir yatiyasaw lurarakini." 
Isaiah28:22 Ukatpï, ¡Tatitumpix jan juk'amp phiskaskxapxamti, ukatarak juk'amp jan walinakar mantasipkasma! Taqi ch'amani Tatitun taqi markpachar t'unjañ amtatap ist'arakta." 
Isaiah28:23 Ist'apxam kuntix sapkäm uka, wal wal ist'apxam nayan arunakaxa:" 
Isaiah28:24 Mä yapu lurir jaqix yapuchiriw sari, jupax janiw sapürus qhullik qhullkiti, janirakiw uka qhullit k'uphañaruk uskuskiti." 
Isaiah28:25 Nayraqatax uka qhullit sum khuskhachi, ukatsti eneldo jan ukax comino uka jathanak phawanti, trigo jathanaksa phawantaraki, uka yapu thiyanakar muyuntayañatakisti, cebada, centeno ukanak phawanti." 
Isaiah28:26 Tatituw juparux yatichi kunjäma lurañapäkitix ukxa. 
Isaiah28:27 Eneldo achux janiw jawq'suskiti, comino achurus janirakiw carretampix qatatkipañäkiti; jan ukasti eneldox mä lawampi thalsuñakiwa, cominosti uka kipka thalsuñakirakiwa." 
Isaiah28:28 Trigox janiw jan samart'as jawq'suñäkiti; jan ukasti, carretampi qatatkipañakiwa, jan ñut'uchjasaw granox yaqhachaña." 
Isaiah28:29 Taqi ukham lurañanak yatxatañax taqi ch'aman Tatitut juti. Jupax muspharkañ amtäwinakaniwa, wali amuyt'ampirakiw uka amtäwinakap phuqhi." 
Isaiah29:1 ¡Ay Jerusalén, Davidan markapa! Phunchhäwinakam lurasipkakim sapa maras lurasipkakim," 
Isaiah29:2 nayaw Jerusalenarux jan walt'añar uchaskä, warariñanakampi, ayquñanakampiw utjani. Markasti ninampi nakhantayatäniwa, kunjämtix uywa waxt'anakax altaran nakt'ayatax ukhama." 
Isaiah29:3 Jumar muyuntañapatakix ejercitox khithanïma, jumarusti mä pirqampjamaw muyuntayäma, nuwantañ chiqanak jumatakix wakicharakï." 
Isaiah29:4 Jisk'achataw uñjasïta, uraqir liwinukutaw uñjasïta; arsutamasti mä ñanqha ajayun arupjamäniwa; parlatanakamasti jinchu jak'atjamak ist'asini." 
Isaiah29:5 Ukampisa, akatjamatak taqi ch'aman Tatitux uñisirinakamar mutuyani, q'ixu q'ixunakampi, uraq khathatiñanakampi, jach'a ch'axwañanakampi, jach'a t'aqhisiñanakampi, jach'a thayampi, ninampi nakhantayañanakampiw mutuyani. Uka walja uñisirinakamasti q'ala tukjataw uñjasipxani, jichhu t'unar uñtat apatäpxaniwa." 
Isaiah29:6  
Isaiah29:7 Jerusalén markar nuwantir ejercitonakasti, khitinakatix sayt'asiñanakapsa t'unjapki ukanakaxa, jan mayampitak chhaqtayatäpxaniwa, kunjämtix urpux inti jalsunitapat chhaqtxix ukhama." 
Isaiah29:8 Jerusalén markar nuwantir jach'a ejercitonakasti, manq'at awtjata, umat pharjataw jiwarapxani. Manq'apkaspasa, umapkaspasa ukham samkasipxani, ikïwipat p'arxtapkan ukkhasti, purakapas ch'usakiw jikxatasini, mallq'as q'ala wañantataw uñjasipxani." 
Isaiah29:9 ¡Jumanakasti, profetanaka, luqhikïsipkam! ¡Jan kuns uñjas juykhukïsipkam! ¡Machantatanakjam liwinaqtasipkakim, janisay vino umapksta ukasa!" 
Isaiah29:10 Tatituw jumanakxarux mä jach'a iki apayani. Jumanak profetanakax markan nayranakapäpkasmas ukhamäpxañamänwa, ukampis janiw kuns uñjapktati." 
Isaiah29:11 Kuna unañchäwinaktix Tatitut katuqapkta ukanakxa, janiw amuyt'irjamäpktati; mä jist'thapit qillqatan kunatix qillqatäki uksa ullarañ munapkasma ukhamawa. Maynitix ullañ yatirir churaspaxa, ukatsti sarakispa: “Aka qillqat ullart'am” sasa, jupasti sarakiniwa: “Janiw ullart'kiristti, uka qillqatax jist'antatawa” sasa." 
Isaiah29:12 Ukampisa mayninakax sapxarakiwa: “Janiw ullarapkiristti, janixay ullañsa, qillqañsa yatipkstixa” sasa." 
Isaiah29:13 Tatitusti sarakituwa: “Aka markax pata chuymakiw arkitu, lakanakapampikiw nayarux jach'añchitu, ukampisa chuymapax nayat jayankaskiwa, nayar yupaychapkitu ukaxa, jaqin amtataparjamakiwa." 
Isaiah29:14 Ukatpï jichhax muspharkañanaka aka markarux uñacht'ayäxa, ukatsti, aka markax muspharataw uñjasini. Yatiñani jaqinakapan yatiñanakapsa, ch'ikhi jaqinakapan amuyt'añanakapsa, q'al chhaqtayäxa.”" 
Isaiah29:15 ¡Ay, kunakïkan khitinakatix Tatitut imantasipki ukanakatakixa, jupanakax amtäwinakap Tatitut imantapxi, aruma ch'amakanakan ñanqhanak lurapxi, sapxarakiwa: “Janiw khitisa uñjkistuti, janiw khitis amuykiti!” sasa." 
Isaiah29:16 ¡Kunjämsa taqi kuns jan walir tukuyapxi! Sañu lurir jaqimpi, ñiq'impix kipkakïkaspas ukhama. Mä kuna luratas janiw luririparux: “Janiw jumax lurkistati” siskaspati, janirakiw mä kuna ñiq'it luratas luririparux: “Jumax janiw kuna luratamsa yatktati” siskaspati." 
Isaiah29:17 Mä qawqha pachatxa ch'umix yapuchañ uraqiruw tukxani, yapuchañ uraqinakasti ch'umirurakiw tukxani." 
Isaiah29:18 Uka urun uqaranakax kuntix jupanakatak maynix ullarkani uk ist'apxani, juykhunakas uñjxapxarakini, jupanakatakix janiw laxa ch'amakas utjkxaniti." 
Isaiah29:19 Llamp'u chuymani jaqinakasti, jan kunani jaqinakasa, Qullan Tatitun kusisipxani." 
Isaiah29:20 Ñanqha jaqinakasti tukusxapxaniwa, jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakas jiwarapxaniwa, ñanqha lurañ amtir jaqinakas tukusxapxaniwa," 
Isaiah29:21 k'ari jaqinakasti tukusxapxaniwa, ina ch'usat tumpantirinakas tukusipxaniwa. Khitinakatix jucha taripirinakar sipitanak uchapki, jan juchanirus k'arimpi juchañchapki ukanakas tukusxaniwa." 
Isaiah29:22 Ukatpï Israelan Tatitu Diosapaxa, Abrahamar qhispïykän ukax sixa: “Akat uksarux Jacobux janiw kunatsa p'inqaskxaniti, janirakiw ajanupas wilaptkxaniti," 
Isaiah29:23 kunapachatix Jacobun wawanakapax markap taypin kuntix lurkta uk uñjapkani ukkhaxa, nayan qullana Diosätax yatipxani, nayar aski uñjañ uñacht'ayapxitani." 
Isaiah29:24 Khitinakatix pantjat sarnaqapkän ukanakasti, amuyt'asiñ yatiqxapxani, mayninakxat parlirinakasti, yatichäwinakaparuw jaysxapxani.”" 
Isaiah30:1 Tatitusti siwa: “¡Ay, kunakïkan kutkatasir israelit jaqinakatakixa, jan nayar jiskt'asisaw kuns amtapxi, nayan jan amuyt'ayat amtäwinak wakichapxi, juchsa mayampi mayamp lurapxi!" 
Isaiah30:2 Mäkiw Egiptonkir reyirux yanap mayipxi, nayar jan jiskt'asaw ukham lurapxi; uka reyin ch'amaparuw katuyasipxi." 
Isaiah30:3 Ukampis faraón reyix janiw arxatapkätamti, Egipto markas janirakiw katuqapkätamti." 
Isaiah30:4 Jumanakax Soan, Hanés uka markanakarusa khithanak khithasipksta ukasa," 
Isaiah30:5 taqiniw uka jan kunatak inamay markampix sallqjat uñjasipxäta, janirakiw jumanakatakix kuna askinaksa apankaniti, jan ukasti q'inasiñampi, jan walt'añampik apanini” sasa." 
Isaiah30:6 Profecía arunaka Néguev chiqankir animalanakxata: Uka axsarkay uraqinakanxa, axsarkay leonanakaw jakapxi, katarinakasa, chhiqhan katarinakas ukan thuqhunaqapxi, uka chiqanjam qamir kankañanakap asnoru, camellor khumuntat apapxi, Egipto markaruw jan kunatak inamay apapxi," 
Isaiah30:7 uka jan ch'aman markasti, janiw yanapt'kaniti. Ukatpï uka markat akham sistxa: “Jan kun luriri wararir jach'a axsarkañ animala” sasa." 
Isaiah30:8 Tatitusti Isaías profetarux siwa: Jichhax jutam, kuntix uñjkta uk qillqam, mä qillqañar taqi ukanak qillqantam, ukasti qhipa urunakatak qhiparpan, taqininsa amtaskañapataki." 
Isaiah30:9 Aka markax Tatitur saykatir markawa, janiw taqi chuymäkiti, Tatitun yatichäwinakapsa janiw ist'añ munkiti." 
Isaiah30:10 Unañchäwi uñjirinakarusti sapxiwa: “Uka unañchäwinak jan uñjapxamti”, profetanakarusti sapxarakiwa: “Chiqa yatiyäwinak katuqapktas ukanak jan yatiyapxistati, jan ukasti suma quña arunakak parlt'apxita; janirak kusisiñanakaxsa apaqapxistati." 
Isaiah30:11 Tatiturux jan ist'apxamti, chiqa thakhitsti maysar saranukupxam, janirak Israelan Qullan Diosapatsa parlapxamti” sasa." 
Isaiah30:12 Ukatpï Tatitux sixa: “Jumanakax aka arunak janiw katuqañ munapktati, ñanqha lurañanakaru nuwasiñanakaruw alkatapxtaxa, ukanakarurakiw yanap mayipxtaxa;" 
Isaiah30:13 ukatpï, jumanakax juchanïpxtaxa. K'ak'at jach'a pirqar uñtatäpxtawa, uka pirqasti akatjamat liwisini;" 
Isaiah30:14 ñiq'it lurat chatjam q'ala t'unjatäpxätawa, uka jik'illitanakax jan kunatak wakiskiriwa, qhirit nina sank'a apsuñatakisa, jan ukax phuch'ut uma qichsuñatakisa” sasa." 
Isaiah30:15 Israelan Tatit Diosapasti siwa: “Nayar wasitat ist'xapxita, ukatsti nayaw samarañ churapxäma. Nayarutix chiqpach katuyasipxitäta ukaxa, samarañan jikxatapxäta, ukatsti qhispitäsipkätawa” sasa. Ukampis jumanakax janiw munapktati," 
Isaiah30:16 caballxat jaltxañatakiw wakichasipxtaxa, wali jalir carronakat sarxañatakiw wakichasipxtaxa. “Ukhamächi ukaxa, walikiwa, caballonakxat jaltxapxakchïtaya; ¡ukampis jumanakar arknaqirinakax juk'amp jaltirinakäniwa!”" 
Isaiah30:17 Mä sapa jaqin axsarayatakiw waranqanakax jaltxapxani; ¡taqi jumanakasti phisqanin axsarayatakiw jaltxapxäta! Taqi ukanak ukham lurasitapatxa, jumanakat juk'anikiw ukan qhiparxapxäta, kunjämatix mä lawax qullu patan jikxataski ukhama, jan ukax qullu patan mä chimpükaspas ukhama." 
Isaiah30:18 Ukampis Tatitux jumanakat khuyapayasiñatakiw suyasipktam, jupax walipuniw munasiñap uñacht'ayañ munapxtam, Tatitusti khuyapayasiri chiqap Diosarakiwa. ¡Jupar suyt'irinakax kusisiñanïpxiwa!" 
Isaiah30:19 Jerusalenan jakir israelitanaka, janiw juk'ampi jachkxapxätati. Yanap mayisisa arnaqasitamatxa, Tatituw khuyapt'ayasïtam, arnaqasitam ist'asinsti jaysarakïtamwa." 
Isaiah30:20 Tatitux kuna t'aqhisiñanaksa churkchïtam ukasa, jupax janiw imantaskxaniti. Tatituw yatichirimaxa, jumax pachpa nayranakamampiw uñjarakïta." 
Isaiah30:21 Kupi tuqiru, jan ukax ch'iqa tuqirus saranukütaxa, qhipäxamatsti mä aru ist'äta, sarakïtamwa: “Aka chiqaw thakhixa, sarasipkakim” sasa." 
Isaiah30:22 Ukatsti uka qullqit lurat diosamxa, qurimpi jawikipat diosamsa, jan wali yänakäkaspas ukhama, jan ukax t'unäkaspas ukham apanuküta." 
Isaiah30:23 Yapuchasitamar purxatañapatakisti, Tatitux jallu apayanïtam, ukhamat uraqix walja jilarkiri trigo achuntani. Uka urun uywanakamax walja manq'añanïpxaniwa." 
Isaiah30:24 Kawkïr vacanakamatixa, asnonakamas uka yapunakan irnaqapki ukanakax suma chhuxllanak manq'asipxarakini." 
Isaiah30:25 Kunürutix Tatitux uñisirinakamar jiwaraykani, jach'a pirqanakapsa liwirtaykani uka uruxa, uka jach'a qullunakat walja jawiranakaw umampi phuqhantat saraqanini." 
Isaiah30:26 Uka urunxa, Tatituw markapan chhuxrinakap qullart'ani. Ukapachaw phaxsix intjam qhantani, intisti qhanapat sipansa juk'amp qhant'ani, paqallqu intin qhanapäkaspas ukhama." 
Isaiah30:27 Uñtapxam, Tatitux jupa kipkaw jayatpach jutaski, phiñasiñapasti mä jach'a ninjamaw nakhaski, lakanakapasa, laxranakapasa, q'apisiñapamp phuqt'atawa, tukjir ninjamarakiwa," 
Isaiah30:28 samanapasti mä jach'a jawirat jilarkir umjamawa, taqi kunsa q'al chhaqtayaraki. Tatitux uka markanakar aynacht'ayiriw juti, q'al atipjiriw jutaraki, ukhamat maysar saranukupxañapataki." 
Isaiah30:29 Ukampis jumanakax q'uchunak ist'apxäta, qullana phunchhäwi arumanjama; chuymamasti wali kusisitäniwa, pinkillun phust'asitaparjam sarnaqkis ukhama, ukhamat Tatitun qullupar sarañataki, Israelan imantasiñ markapar sarañataki." 
Isaiah30:30 Tatitusti jach'a arupa ist'ayani, jach'a ch'amapsti uñacht'ayarakiniwa, axsarkañ phiñasiñampiw ukanak lurani, q'ixu q'ixunakampi, jallumpi, chhijchhimpi taqi ukanakax mä aqkir ninjam tukjiriwa." 
Isaiah30:31 Kunapachatix Asiria markax Tatitun arunakap ist'kani ukkhasti, kuna mutuyäwitix jupatak suyt'aski uk yatini, ukatsti axsarañampiw phuqhantasini." 
Isaiah30:32 Tatitux sapa kuti jawq'antkan ukkhasti, tamboranaka, arpanakaw toct'asini. Tatitusti jupanakarux walpun nuwjani." 
Isaiah30:33 Asiria markataki, reyipatakisa, t'aqhisiyañ chiqax nayratpach wakichatawa, uka chiqan ansapasti wali jach'awa, manqharakiwa, ninasti walja lawanak taypin wal nakharaki. Tatitun phust'atapaw aqtayarakini, jach'a azufre jallükaspas ukhama." 
Isaiah31:1 ¡Ay, kunakïkani, khitinakatix Egiptor yanap mayir sarapki ukanakatakixa, uka walja carronakaparu, caballerianakaparu alkatasipki ukanakatakixa, jupanakax janiw Israelan Qullan Diosapar uñtapkiti, janirakiw thaqhapkisa!" 
Isaiah31:2 Tatitumpix janiw khitis phiskaskaspati, jupax khitir jan walt'ayañsa yatiwa, kunapachatix kunsa arsu ukkhaxa, phuqhapuniwa. Tatitux qhuru jaqinakarux t'unjaniwa, ñanqha luririnakar yanapapki ukanakarus tukusiyaniwa." 
Isaiah31:3 Egipcionakax aliq jaqinakakïpxiwa, janiw jupanakax diosanakäpkiti, caballonakapax janchikiwa, janiw wiñay jakirinakäpkiti. Tatitux egipcionakarux mutuyaniwa, khitinakarutix yanap mayipkani ukanakarus mutuyarakiniwa, taqiniw tukusipxani." 
Isaiah31:4 Tatitusti sarakituwa: “Kunjämtix mä leonax mä oveja jiwayixa, ukatsti janiw awatirinakapax axsartaykiti, taqpachanisay tantacht'asiskpan, arnaqatanakapampis axsartayañ munasipkpan, ukhamarakiw taqi ch'amani Tatitux jutani Jerusalén markan jakirinakar arxatiri." 
Isaiah31:5 Kunjämatix mä jamach'ix tapapat jark'aski ukhamarakiw taqi ch'aman Tatitux Jerusalenarux arxatani; markarusti imaniwa, arxataniwa, qhispiyarakiniwa.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Israelan wawanakapa, khitirutix chuymap wal ust'ayapkta ukar kuttxapxam." 
Isaiah31:7 Kunürutix jumanakax qurit qullqit lurat diosanakam apanukupkäta, jumanak pachpa lurat diosanakaruxa," 
Isaiah31:8 uküruw Asiria markax atipjat uñjasini, janiw jaqin ch'amap laykuti. Uka nuwasïwix jaqinakaparuw jaltayani, nuwasir waynanakarusti katuntapxaniwa," 
Isaiah31:9 axsarañatsa reyipax jaltxaniwa, jilïrinakapasti wiphalap apanukusaw jaltxapxani. Tatitun mutuyäwipasti niya wakicht'atawa, Jerusalén markan uka uñisirinakapar mutuyañataki." 
Isaiah32:1 Mä reyiw utjani, jupasti chiqaparuw apnaqani, marka apnaqirinakasti chiqa uñjäwimpiw apnaqapxarakini." 
Isaiah32:2 Uñisirinakapar arxatañatakiw sayt'asipxani, jan wali urunakat imañataki, ñanqha luräwinakat imañataki." 
Isaiah32:3 Nayranakapampisti walpun uñatatasipxani, taqi kunsa suma amuyumpiw ist'apxani;" 
Isaiah32:4 taqi kunsa wal amuyt'asisaw lurapxani, parlatanakapasa chiqaparakïniwa." 
Isaiah32:5 Jan wali jaqinakaxa, sallqjirinakasa, jisk'achjataw uñjasipxani." 
Isaiah32:6 Mä jaqix arsutapampiw maynirux chuymap ust'ayi, chuymapansti jan wali amtäwinakak amtaski, jaqi jiwayañak munaski, manq'at awtjat jaqirux jan kunan khithanuku, umat pharjatarus janiw um waxt'kiti. Tatiturus k'arintarakiwa." 
Isaiah32:7 Sallqa jaqix k'arikamak kuns parli, jan walinak lurañatakiw amtaraki; k'arintasaw jan kunaninakar aynacht'ayi, khitinakatix chiqapar uñjäwi mayipki ukanakaruxa." 
Isaiah32:8 Aski jaqisti, askinak lurañ amti, uka aski amtatanakapan sayt'asiraki." 
Isaiah32:9 Jan kunat llakt'asir warminaka, kuntix sapkäma uk ist'apxam. Jan yäqasir warminaka, arunakax ist'apxam." 
Isaiah32:10 Amuyatax jichhax taqi kunas walikjamakïskiwa, akat mä mararusti, t'ant'ana, vinon jan utjkxatapatxa, axsarañat wal khathatipxäta." 
Isaiah32:11 Jumanaka, jan yäqasir warminaka, jan kunat llakt'asir warminaka, jichhax khathatiñ qalltapxam. Uka isinakam apsusipxam, chhankha isinakamp isthapisipxam, ukhamat t'aqhisipxatanakam uñacht'ayapxäta." 
Isaiah32:12 Ayqt'asis sarnaqapxam, ukkha suma uraqinakata, suma achur uva yapunakatsa." 
Isaiah32:13 Markaxansti ch'aphinakampi quranakampikiw jilxani, taqi kusisiñ utanak taypin uka ch'aphinakax jilantxani." 
Isaiah32:14 Reyin utapax apanukutäxaniwa; walja jaqin markasti jan jaqiniw tukuni; uka suma thuru pirqanakasti wiñayatak apanukutäniwa; ukansti monte asnonakax k'uchikiw jakasipxani, uywanakas ukan manq'asipxarakini." 
Isaiah32:15 Ukampisa Tatitun ch'amapax wasitat jiwasxar jutani, ch'usa wasar uraqisti suma yapuchasiñ uraqiruw tukxani, yapuchasiñ uraqisti juk'ampi suma achuri yapuruw tukxani." 
Isaiah32:16 Chiqa kankañampi, chiqa uñjäwimpiw taqi aka markan utjarakini." 
Isaiah32:17 Chiqa uñjäwisti sumankañ utjayani, wiñayatakiw suman sarnaqasiña, jan axsarañ utjayani." 
Isaiah32:18 Markaxasti mä suma samarañ chiqan jakani, suma utanakana, samarañas utjki uka utanakana," 
Isaiah32:19 chhijchhisay ch'umirux q'al tukjaskpan, markaxasay jisk'achjat uñjasiskpan." 
Isaiah32:20 Jumanakax k'uchikiw jakasxapxäta, yapunakamatakis uma qarpax waljaw utjani, asnotakisa, vacatakis chhuxllax jilarkirïniwa." 
Isaiah33:1 ¡Ay, kunakïkan juma Asiria markatakixa! ¡Jumax markaxar t'unjir markätawa! T'unjañ tukt'aykäta ukkhaxa, jumax kipka t'unjataw uñjasïta; ch'uxña lurañ tukt'aykäta ukkhasti, uka kipka ch'uxña lurataw uñjasirakïta." 
Isaiah33:2 Tatay, nanakat khuyapt'ayasipxita, jumarukiw suyt'apxsma. Sapa qhantatiy ch'ama churapxita, jan walt'añansti yanapt'apxitaya." 
Isaiah33:3 Juman axsarayañ arunakam ist'asax markanakax jaltxapxiwa, juman ch'amam uñjasasti markanakax aywitatawayxapxiwa;" 
Isaiah33:4 uñisirinakapasti t'iju t'iju tamjamaw jupanakxar chhukxatapxi, qamir kankañanakapsa aparapxaraki." 
Isaiah33:5 Tatitux jach'a munañaniwa, alaxpachan jakirirakiwa; jupaw Jerusalenarux chiqa kankañampi chiqa uñjäwimpi phuqhanti," 
Isaiah33:6 Jerusalenarusti imapuniniwa. Yatiñ kankañamampi yatxatañamampix mä suma qamir yänakjam qhispiyiriwa; Tatitur axsartañasti qamir kankañat sipansa juk'amp sumawa. 
Isaiah33:7 ¡Ist'am, kunjämsa wali ch'amaninakax anqan arnaqasipxi, kunjämsa sumankañ thaqhiri khithatanakas jachapxaraki!" 
Isaiah33:8 Thakhinakax ch'usa wasarar tukutawa, janirakiw khitis uka chiqa sarnaqkiti. Arust'äwinakasa, amtäwinakas t'unasiwa, janirakiw khititakis yäqañax utjkxiti." 
Isaiah33:9 Taqiniw aka markan wali llakt'at jikxatasipxi, Líbano qullunkir ch'uminakas q'alaw wañsuwayxi, Sarón qhirwasti ch'usa wasarar tukutawa, Basán chiqasa, Carmelo qullusa q'ara qullukïxiwa." 
Isaiah33:10 Tatitux siwa: “Jichhakuchapï sartasïxa; jach'a kankañax uñacht'ayarakïxa. 
Isaiah33:11 Juma, Asirian amtatanakamasa, luratanakamas t'unampi sasiwa; phust'ataxasti mä ninjamaw jupanakarux nakhantani." 
Isaiah33:12 Markanakasti qhillar tukuyatäniwa; ch'aphinakar uñtataw ninampi nakharakini. 
Isaiah33:13 Khitinakatix jayankapkta ukanaka, kuntix nayax lurkta uk uñjapxam, khitinakatix jak'ankapkta ukanaka, ch'amaxsa uñjapxarakim.”" 
Isaiah33:14 Juchararanakax Jerusalén markan khathatipxiwa, ñanqha jaqinakasti axsarañampi phuqhantatäpxiwa, ukatsti sapxarakiwa: “¿Khitirak jiwasanakat nakhantir nina taypin jakaspasti? ¿Khitirak wiñay nina sank'an jakaspasti?” sasa." 
Isaiah33:15 Khititix chiqaparu kuns lurki, chiqa parlkaraki, khititix ch'amampi aparas jan qamiriptkiti, waxt'äwinak laykuki jan kuns lurkiti; jaqi jiwayirinakan arunakapsa janirak ist'kiti, nayranakapsa jan ñanqhanak uñjañatak ch'irmthapkaraki," 
Isaiah33:16 ukakiw chiqpachansa taqi kunat imat jakani, qarqat lurat mä suma utan samart'ani, manq'añapas jan tukuskirïniwa, umas janirakiw jupatak pist'kaniti." 
Isaiah33:17 Reyirux wasitat jach'a kankañapan uñjäta, markan qurpanakapasti jayakamaw purirakini." 
Isaiah33:18 Kuna axsarañantix jakkäyät uk amtasisax sarakïtawa: “¿Kawkinkarak qullqi lluch'sur jaqisti? ¿Kawkinkarak jathinak waytir jaqisti? ¿Kawkinkarak torrenak jakhur jaqisti?” sasa. 
Isaiah33:19 Janiw ñanqha jaqinak taypin juk'amp jakxätati, parlanakapas jan amuyt'kay jaqinak taypina." 
Isaiah33:20 Nayan qullan utax uñtapxam, Jerusalenarus uñtapxarakim: ¡ukan suma phunchhäwinak lurapxañäni! Ukäwjax mä samart'añ chiqäniwa, mä suma sayt'ayat carpar uñtata, ch'akurunakapas suma ch'akuntata, phalanakapas jan t'aqartkayaraki." 
Isaiah33:21 Tatitux ukan jach'a ch'amap uñacht'ayani. Jerusalén markax jach'a jawiranakanïniwa, ukampis uñisirinakan barconakapax janiw uka jawiranakanjam mantanipkaniti." 
Isaiah33:22 Asiria barcon phalanakapasti janiw suma jiyantatäkiti, velop uskuñ lawapasti uksar aksaruw liwinki. Uka qamir kankañanakap q'al aparañäni, juykhus kunatix jupar wakt'ki uk katuqani, suchunakasti aparañaruw uskusipxani. Tatituw chiqapar uñjirisaxa, jiwasan reyisasa, jupaw qhispiyistani." 
Isaiah33:23  
Isaiah33:24 Janiw khitis: “Usutätwa” siskaspati. Tatitusti Jerusalenan jakir jaqinakan juchanakap pampacharakini. 
Isaiah34:1 Markanaka, ist'añatak jak'achasinipxam; jach'a markanaka, wal wal ist'apxam. Taqi akapachan utjirinak ist'pan, kunanakatix achki ukanakamppach ist'arakpan." 
Isaiah34:2 Tatitusti markanakatakixa, taqi ejercitonakapatakis phiñasitawa, q'al t'unjatäpxañapatak juchañchatäpxiwa." 
Isaiah34:3 Jiwatanakax apanukutäpxaniwa, uka jiwatanakan janchinakapasti walpun thujsani, qullunakansa wilax jawirjamaw jalarakini." 
Isaiah34:4 Alaxpachankir warawaranakax t'unthaptaniwa, alaxpachasti mä papeläkaspas ukhamaw llawthaptani, taqi warawaranakas janiw qhankxaniti, kunjämtix uva alina, higo alin laphinakapax wañsusin willirtki ukhama." 
Isaiah34:5 Jïsa, Tatitun espadapax alaxpachan uñsti, Edom markxaruw purini, uka markasti jiwañar katuyatawa." 
Isaiah34:6 Edom markan Bosrá sat markan qamapanxa, mä jach'a jiwarayäwiw utjani, wilas umjamaw jalarakini. Tatitun espadapasti wilampi, lik'impi jawikipatäniwa, kunjämatix ovejanakasa, cabritonakas waxt'äwitak kharsutax ukhama." 
Isaiah34:7 Jaqinakasti, walipuniw jiwarapxani, kunjämtix urqu vacanakax jiwarayatax ukhama. Uraqipasti wilampi ch'ach'antatäniwa, laq'as lik'impi phuqhantatäniwa." 
Isaiah34:8 Jïsa, Tatitux uka uruw phuqsusini; Jerusalén markatakix phuqsusiñ mara satäniwa." 
Isaiah34:9 Edom markankir jisk'a jawiranakapanxa, alquitranaw uma lanti jalani, uraqin laq'apasti azufreruw tukuni, junt'uptayat alquitranjamaw nakhani." 
Isaiah34:10 Janirakiw ukax urus arumas jiwt'kaniti, jiwq'ipas walipuniw sartani. Wiñayatak apanukutaw uñjasini, janirakiw khitis uka chiq wasitat mäkipkxaniti." 
Isaiah34:11 Tatitusti uka markxa ch'usa wasararuw tukuyani. Ukan jukunakasa, allqamarinakasa, ch'usiqanakasa tapanakap tapachasipxani." 
Isaiah34:12 Jan reyiniw jupanakax uñjasxapxani, taqi jach'a jilïrinakapasti janiw utjkxaniti." 
Isaiah34:13 Reyi utanakapansti, jach'a pirqanakapansa, itapallunakampi, kunayman ch'aphi quranakampiw jilantxani. Qullu anunakan utjäwipaw tukxani, suri jamach'inakan utjäwiparuw tukxani." 
Isaiah34:14 Monte phisinakasti qullu anunakampiw mayachasipxani, cabritonakas jupanakkamaw jawsasipxani, aruma mulljir ch'usiqanakas ukan jakapxani, ukanarak ikirapxani." 
Isaiah34:15 Jukux ukan tapap lurasini, ukan k'awnani, chhiwchhinakapsa ukan ansuni, mayar anthapisaw sum uywarakini. Pakalinakas ukan tantachasipxani, urquni qachuniw ukan jakapxani." 
Isaiah34:16 Tatitun qillqatap uñxatapxam, ullart'apxarakim: janipuniw mayas uka animalanakat chhaqhatäkaniti, urquni qachuniw ukankapxani, Tatitu kipkaw ukham amti, samanapampi phust'asaw tantachthapini." 
Isaiah34:17 Sapaqat mayniruw utjäwip uñacht'ayi, amparapampiw utjäwip uñacht'ayi, wiñayatakiw ukan jakapxarakini." 
Isaiah35:1 Wasar uraqix panqarkamakïniwa, waña uraqis achunak churani." 
Isaiah35:2 Taqiniw Tatitun jach'a kankañap uñjasax kusisipxani, Tatitux uka ch'usa wasar uraqirux Líbano qullur uñtat jiwak tukuyani, wali sum achuri Carmelo qullur uñtata, jan ukax Sarón siski ukkha suma qhirwar uñtata." 
Isaiah35:3 Pisi ch'ama jaqinakarusti ch'amañcht'apxam, qaritanakarus ch'amacht'apxarakim," 
Isaiah35:4 axsaririnakarusti sapxarakim: “Ch'amacht'asipxam, jan axsarapxamti” sasa. “¡Tatituw jumanakar qhispiyir jutani, uñisirinakamarusti mutuyarakiniwa!”" 
Isaiah35:5 Ukapachaw juykhunakax uñjapxani, uqaranakas ist'apxarakini;" 
Isaiah35:6 suchunakasti tarujanakjamaw sink'usipxani, amutunakasti arnaqasipxarakiniwa. Wasara waña uraqitsti, umax walipuniw jalsuni." 
Isaiah35:7 Uka wasar uraqix mä qutaw tukuni, waña uraqisti uma phuch'unakampi phuqhantatäniwa. Kawkhantix jichhax qullu anunakax jakapki ukkhasti, suqusanakampi, totoranakampiw jilantani." 
Isaiah35:8 Ukansti mä thakhiw utjani, ukasti “Qullana Thakhi” satäniwa; khitinakatix jan q'umachatäpki, pisi amuyunïpkaraki ukanakax janiw uka thakhinjam sarnaqapkaniti." 
Isaiah35:9 Ukan janiw leonanakax utjkaniti, janirakiw yaqha monte animalanakas jak'achasinkaniti. Qhispiyatanakaw uka thakhinjam kuttanxapxani," 
Isaiah35:10 khitinakarutix Tatitux qhispiyki ukanaka; Jerusalén markarusti kusiskañ q'uchunak jayllisaw mantapxani, wiñayatakiw kusisit jakapxani. Jachañasa, t'aqhisiñas tukusxaniwa, kusisiñampi, sumankañampikiw utjxani." 
Isaiah36:1 Ezequías reyix tunka pusin mara apnaqkän ukkhaxa, Senaquerib reyiw nuwantir jutäna, jupasti Asiria markan reyipänwa, Judá uraqin ch'amani markanakarusti q'al nuwjäna, atipjasinsti katuntasirakïnwa." 
Isaiah36:2 Laquis siski uka chiqatpach jilïri comandanteparux Ezequías reyin ukar khithanïna, jupasti Jerusalenankänwa. Asirionakan ejercitopax wali ch'amanïnwa, ukatsti Siloé sata uma puña jak'aruw purintapxäna, Isinak T'axsurin thakhipäkis uka chiqaru." 
Isaiah36:3 Ukkharuw Hilquías chachan Eliaquim yuqapax mistsunïna, jupasti Ezequías reyin utap uñjirïnwa, Sebná qillqiri, Asaf chachan Joah yuqapa, khititix reyin qillqiripäki ukanakaw katuqañatak mistunipxäna." 
Isaiah36:4 Asirio oficialasti sänwa: —Aka arunak Ezequías reyir yatiyapxam, uka arunakax Asiria markankir jach'a reyin yatiyäwipawa, sapxarakim: ‘¿Kunatsa jumax jan unxtasta?" 
Isaiah36:5 Nuwasïwin atipjañatakix janiw arunakampik atipjkasmati, jan ukasti, mä jach'a ejercitonïñamawa, nuwantañatakis suma wakicht'ataraki. ¿Khitirus alkatasta nayar saykataskañamatakisti?" 
Isaiah36:6 Amuyatax Egiptoruw alkatastaxa. Walikiwa. Egiptox nayatakix mä jisk'a p'akit suqusampi sasikiwa, maynitix uka p'akit suqusaru katt'aschixa, uka p'akit suqusax amparaparuw junuranttani. Khitinakatix uka reyir alkatasipki ukanakatakixa, Egiptonkir faraón reyix uka p'akit suqusampi sasikiwa." 
Isaiah36:7 Ukampis jumatix sitasmaxa: Nanakax Tatitu Diosaxaruw katuyasipxta sasaxa, ¿janit Ezequías reyisti uka Diosan altaranakapa, Tatitur yupaychañ chiqanaksa q'al t'unthapiykisti, ukatsti Jerusalenankirinakaru, Judänkirinakarusa, mä altaranak yupaychapxam siskisti?" 
Isaiah36:8 Jichhax mä arust'äwir Asiriankir reyimpi mantam, jupax nayan jilïrixawa; nayax pä waranqa caballonak churäma, inach ukanakataki jaqinak jikxatäta." 
Isaiah36:9 Jumatix Egipton yanapap suyasksta ukaxa, may säma: Egipton caballonakapasa, nuwasiñ carronakapas janiw mä juk'a ch'aman soldadoxarus khathatiyañatak ch'amanïkiti." 
Isaiah36:10 Ukhamarus aka marka t'unjiriw nanakax jutapxta, Tatitu Diosaw ukham lurañatak mayipxitu’ —sasa." 
Isaiah36:11 Eliaquim, Sebná, Joah ukanakax asirio oficialarux sapxarakïnwa: —Achikt'asipxsmawa, arameo arut parlt'apxita, nanakax uka arxa yatipxtwa. Hebreo arut jan parlxayapxistati, taqi khitinakatix pirqa patankapki ukanakax parlatas ist'apxiwa —sasa." 
Isaiah36:12 Ukampisa asirio oficialax sänwa: —Asiriankir reyix janiw jumanakan jilïrimar sañatak khithankituti, janirakiw uka arunak jumanakar sañatakis khithankituti, jan ukasti khitinakatix uka pirqa patankasipki uka jaqinakar sañatakiw khithanitu, jupanakax jan manq'añani, jan umañaniw jikxatasipxani. Ukhamïpansti, manq'at awtjayasiñasa, umat pharjayasiñas walipunïniwa, pachpa jamanakap manq'apxani, pachpa chhuxup umapxarakini —sasa." 
Isaiah36:13 Ukatsti uka oficialax sayt'asisin hebreo aruta wali jach'at art'äna: —Kuntix Asiriankir jach'a reyix sapktam uka arunak ist'apxam: 
Isaiah36:14 ‘Ezequiasampix jan k'arintayasipxamti, jupax janiw qhispiyapkätamti.’" 
Isaiah36:15 Ezequiasatix ‘Diosar jaysañäni, jupaw qhispiyistani’ sapxätamxa," 
Isaiah36:16 juparux jan ist'apxamti. Asiriankir reyix jumanakampi sumar mantiriw khithanitu, ukatsti atipjayasxapxam, ukhamat sapa maynis uva yapunakamata, higo quqanakamatsa manq'asisipkäta, ukhamarak pachpa uma phuch'umatsa umasisipkäta." 
Isaiah36:17 Ukatsti mä markaruw apapxätam, uka markasti jumanakan markamjamarakiwa, trigos uvas wal achuraki, ukan t'ant'a lurapxäta, ukhamarak vino apsupxarakïta." 
Isaiah36:18 Ezequiasatix ‘Tatituw qhispiyistani’ sapxätamxa, jupampix jan k'arintayasipxamti. ¿Yaqha markanakarusti diosanakapax Asiriankir reyin amparapat qhispiyiti?" 
Isaiah36:19 Hamat, Arpad, Sefarvaim siski ukanakan diosanakapas janiw Samaria markarux Asiria reyin amparapat qhispiykiti." 
Isaiah36:20 Taqi uka markanakatxa, ¿kawkïri markan diosanakapas Asiriankir reyin amparapat qhispiyixa? ¿Kunjämatarak jumanakan Diosamasti Jerusalenar qhispiyaspasti? —sasa." 
Isaiah36:21 Jupanakasti amukiw qhiparapxäna, janiw mä arsa arsupkänti, reyiw jupanakarux jan kunsa sapxañapatak arsutayna." 
Isaiah36:22 Ukat Eliaquim chachax, khititix reyin utapan uñjirïkäna, Sebná qillqirisa, Joah reyin qillqiripäkäna ukasa, jupanakax llakisiñat isinakap ch'iyanuqasipxäna, ukatsti Ezequías reyir uñstiriw sarapxäna, kuntix asirio oficialax siskatayna ukanak yatiyiri." 
Isaiah37:1 Kunapachatix Ezequías reyix uka arunak ist'kän ukkhaxa, isinakap ch'iyanuqasïna, chhankha isimpi isintasisaw llakisitap uñacht'ayäna, ukat Tatitun utapar saräna." 
Isaiah37:2 Ukatsti Eliaquim chacharu, khititix reyin utap uñjirïkäna, Sebná qillqiriru, ukhamaraki jilïri sacerdotenakampiruw khithäna, jupanakax chhankha isinakampi isthapita, ukhamat llakisiñanakap uñacht'ayasaw Amós chachan yuqapa, Isaías profetar jikxatir sarapxäna." 
Isaiah37:3 Ukatsti profetarux Ezequías reyin yatiyäwip sapxäna: “Jichhürux mä jach'a llakin jikxatastanxa, mutuyäwiw jiwasxaru jutani, jisk'achjatarakïtanwa, mä wawachasir warmjama, jan ch'amaniw uñjastan." 
Isaiah37:4 Añchakit Tatitu Diosax ist'ki kuna jan wali arunaktix uka asirio oficialax siski Dios tuqitxa, ukham jan wali arunak parlatapat Tatitun jupar mutuyañapax walïspawa. Jichhax khitinakatix qhiparasipki ukanakatakix Tatitu Diosatay jupanakar yanapt'añapatak mayim” sasa." 
Isaiah37:5 Ezequías reyin yanapirinakapasti Isaías profetar uñjiriw sarapxäna. 
Isaiah37:6 Isaías profetasti akham sasaw Ezequiasarux iwxa arunak apayäna: “Tatitux siwa: ‘Kuntix asirionakax nayataki jan wali arunak arski uka arunakat jan axsaramti. 
Isaiah37:7 Akax nayaw sarä, ukatsti mä jan wali yatiyäwi ist'ayarakï. Uka arunak ist'asinsti jupax markaparuw kuttxani, markapansti jaqin jiwayataw jupax uñjasini, uksti nayaw ukham lurayä’ ” sasa." 
Isaiah37:8 Asirio oficialasti yatxatarakïnwa Senaquerib reyipax Laquis siski uka chiqat sarxatapa. Ukat Jerusalenat sarxäna; reyirusti Libná markar nuwantaskir jikxatarakïna. 
Isaiah37:9 Ukan Senaquerib sata Asiriankir reyix mä aru ist'atayna, ukasti Tirhaca siski ukan Etiopía reyipaxa, Asiriankir reyimpi nuwantasiñatakiw mä jach'a ejército wakichaskäna. Ukat Asiriankir reyix Judá uraqinkir Ezequías reyin ukarux khithanak mayamp khitharakïna, akham sasa:" 
Isaiah37:10 “Kawkïri Diosamarutix jumax katuyaskta uka Diosamax janiw Jerusalén markax nayan amparaxar purkaniti sistamwa, ukampis jumax jan uka Diosamampix k'arintayasimti." 
Isaiah37:11 Kuntix taqi markanakampi Asiriankir reyix lurki uk jumax sum yattaxa. ¿Ukatti jumas qhispismasti? 
Isaiah37:12 ¿Nayra awkinakaxax aka markanakar t'unjkäna: Gozán, Harán, Résef, ukhamarak Bet-edén markankir jaqinakas Telasar chiqan jakapkäna ukanakarux diosanakapax qhispiyiti?" 
Isaiah37:13 ¿Kawkinkaraki Hamat, Arpad, Sefarvaim, Hená, Ivá siski uka markanakan reyinakapasti?” sasa." 
Isaiah37:14 Ezequiasasti kuntix khithanakax mä qillqata luqtapkatayna uka ullart'äna. Ukspacharakiw Tatitun utapar sarawayäna, ukatsti uka qillqata Tatitun nayraqatapar jant'akt'asawa," 
Isaiah37:15 akham sas Diosat mayisïna: 
Isaiah37:16 “Taqi ch'amani, Israelan Diosapa, juman qunuñamax querubines sat chhiqhaninak patxankiwa, akapachan taqi reyinakxarus juma sapakïtawa, jumaw alaxpachsa akapachsa irnuqtaxa." 
Isaiah37:17 Tatay, jichhax ist'apxitaya, uñtanipxitaya. Kuntix Senaquerib reyix siski uka arunak ist'am, ukampix jakkiri juma Tatituruw jisk'acharaktamxa." 
Isaiah37:18 Chiqpachansa Tatay, Asiriankir reyinakax yaqha markanakarux q'al t'unjapxi," 
Isaiah37:19 diosanakapsa ninampiw nakhantayapxi, ukanakax janiw chiqpach diosäpkänti, jan ukasti lawata, qalata jaqin lurat diosanakakïnwa. Ukat t'unjapxixa." 
Isaiah37:20 Nanakan Dios Tatituxay, munañan asirionakat qhispiyapxita, ukhamat taqi markanakax juman sapa Diosakïtam yatipxani” sasa." 
Isaiah37:21 Ukapachaw Isaías profetax Ezequías reyirux aka yatiyäwi apayarakïna: “Israelan Tatitu Diosapax akham siwa: ‘Nayax mayisitam ist'twa, kuntix Senaquerib reyit siskista ukxa’ ” sasa." 
Isaiah37:22 Tatitusti Asiriankir reyitxa akham sarakiwa: “Senaquerib, Jerusalén markax mä tawaqjamaw jumat larusi. Israelitanakax juman sarxatamatxa p'iqi khiwisisaw larusi." 
Isaiah37:23 ¿Khitirus arunakamampix ñanqhachtaxa? ¿Khititakis ukataq arustaxa, jach'a jach'a tukusas uñatatastaxa? ¡Israelan Qullan Diosapatakiw ukham lurtaxa!" 
Isaiah37:24 Juman yanapirinakam tuqiw Tatiturux jisk'achtaxa. Saraktawa: ‘Nuwasir sarir walja carronakaxampiw wali alay Líbano qullunakar makhatta. Jach'a cedro quqanakapa, suma pinonakapsa, q'al khuchhurarakta. Wali alay qullunakapkamapuniw purta, panqar yapur uñtat ch'uminakapkamaw purta." 
Isaiah37:25 Jaya uraqinakan uma phuch'unak allsusta, uka uma umarakta, kayunakaxampiw Egipton jawiranakapsa q'al wañsuyarakta’ sasa." 
Isaiah37:26 Ukampisa, ¿janit jumasti nayan Tatitütax yatkäyätasti? ¿Janit nayan taqi ukanak ukham lurayatax yatkäyätasti? Nayra urunakatpach ukham lurañanak amtayäta, jichhasti ukanak phuqhaskarakta; ukatpï jumax suma pirqantat markanak t'unjtaxa, t'unanakäkaspas ukham mayjar qullucharaktaxa." 
Isaiah37:27 Ukatpï uka markan jakir jaqinakarux jan ch'amani tukuytaxa, axsarañampi, pantjasiñampiw phuqhanttaxa. Ukat qurar uñtatakïxapxi, ch'uxña chhuxllanakar uñtata, uta patanakan jilir qurar uñtata, janïra sum jiltkasas wañsuwayxaki ukhama." 
Isaiah37:28 Nayax taqi sarnaqatamxa, taqi luräwinakamsa yattwa; nayatak wal phiñasitamsa yatiraktwa." 
Isaiah37:29 Wali q'apisitamsa, jach'a jach'a tukutamsa yattwa, ukat jichhax nasamarux mä gancho uchantäma, kunjämtix vacanakar uchantatäki ukhama, lakamarusti jakimu ucharakï, kunjämatix caballonakar apnaqañatak uchatäki ukhama, jichhasti kawki chiqtix sarktas uka pachpa thakhinjam kuttayanirakïma.”" 
Isaiah37:30 Ukapachaw Isaías profetax Ezequías reyir saraki: “Kunäkanitix ukat akäniw mä chimpuxa: Jichha maraxa, jutir maransa jumanakax jupapacha achuri trigo manq'apxäta, ukampis kimsïri maranxa yapuchasxapxätawa, uvanaksa ayrusxapxätawa, uka achunakat manq'asipxarakïta." 
Isaiah37:31 Judá markan jilt'ir jaqinakasti suma saphintat quqanakar uñtatäniwa, suma achunak churapxarakini." 
Isaiah37:32 Jerusalén markanxa janiw taqinis manq'atjam jiwarapkaniti, jan ukasti mä qawqhanix jakasipkaniwa. Taqi akanaksti taqi ch'amani Tatitun jach'a munasiñapaw ukham lurani." 
Isaiah37:33 “Asiria reyi tuqitsti Tatitux siwa: ‘Janiw jupax Jerusalenar mantankaniti, janiw mä sapa mich'ipsa antutt'kaniti, janiw nuwantañatakis jutkaniti, janirakiw marka anqäxanakarus pirqanak sayt'aykaniti." 
Isaiah37:34 Kawki thakhinjamtix jutki uka pachpa thakhinjam kutt'awayxani; janiw aka markarux mantankaniti. Naya Tatituw uka arunak arsta. 
Isaiah37:35 Nayaw aka markarux arxatä, nayarakiw qhispiyä, David luqtirixar munatax layku, ukhamarak naya kipkar munasitaxatsa’ ” sasa." 
Isaiah37:36 Uka arumasti Tatitun angelapax sarasin pataka kimsaqallq tunka phisqani waranqa jaqinaka asirionakan campamentopan jiwarayäna, qhipärmanthisti taqiniw jiwarat uñjasipxäna." 
Isaiah37:37 Ukat Asiriankir Senaquerib reyix campamentop apthapisiwayasin Nínive markar kuttxäna. 
Isaiah37:38 Mä urusti, kunapachatix Nisroc sata diosan utapan yupaychaskäna ukañkamaw Adramélec, Sarézer sat yuqanakapax Senaquerib awkipar jiwayapxatayna, jiwayasasti Ararat tuqiruw jaltxapxatayna. Ukatsti Esarhadón sata yuqapaw Senaquerib reyi lantix uka marka apnaqxäna." 
Isaiah38:1 Uka urunakansti Ezequías reyix walpun usuntäna, ukat Amós chachan yuqapa Isaías profetax uñjir saräna, juparusti sarakïnwa: —Tatitux akham siwa: ‘Kuna iwxanaksa wila masinakamarux iwxt'asiwayxam, janiw qullaskätati, jan ukasti, jiwxätawa’ —sasa." 
Isaiah38:2 Ukatsti Ezequiasax pirqa tuqir uñkatasaw Tatitur akham sasa mayisïna: 
Isaiah38:3 “Tatay, nayax achikt'assmawa, kunjämtix taqi chuymaxampi jumar arksma uk amtasimaya, kunjämarutix jumax munkta ukhamarjam lurkta uksa amtasirakimaya” sasa. Ukatsti Ezequiasax walpun jachäna." 
Isaiah38:4 Tatitusti Isaías profetan 
Isaiah38:5 Ezequiasan ukar sarañapatakiw mayïna akham yatiyiri: “David awkiman Tatitu Diosapax siwa: ‘Nayax mayisitam ist'twa, jachatamsa uñjaraktwa. Ukat tunka phisqan marampi jakañamar yapxatäma." 
Isaiah38:6 Jumarusa, Jerusalén markarusa asirionakan amparapat qhispiyäxa. Nayaw aka markarux arxataskäxa’ ” sasa." 
Isaiah38:7 Isaías profetasti sarakïnwa: —Tatitun chimpupax akäniwa, kuntix jumar arsktam uk phuqhañapataki:" 
Isaiah38:8 Ahaz reyin intimpi sarir relojupanxa, ch'iwix tunka chillqinak qhipar jitt'ani. Ukatsti kunjämtix Tatitux siskatayna ukhamapuniw lurasitayna." 
Isaiah38:9 Kunapachatix Ezequías reyix k'umaraptxän ukkhasti aka q'uchu q'ucht'asïna: 
Isaiah38:10 Nayax saskäyätwa: Waynpachakiy jiwawayxchï, jiwatanakax kawkhankapkitï ukkharukiy sarxchï, ukanakxay wiñay jakxchï sasa." 
Isaiah38:11 Sarakïyätwa: Janikiy Tatitur aka uraqin mayampsa uñjkchïti, janirakiy aka uraqin jakirinakarus uñjkchïti." 
Isaiah38:12 Utaxsa t'unthapipxiwa, aparapxarakituwa, awatirinakan chhujllanakapäkaspas ukhama. Jakañaxax mä sawurin sawupäkaspas ukhamänwa, telarat khuchhuqki ukar uñtata. Uruy arumaw t'aqhisiyista." 
Isaiah38:13 Usuñaxansti paqaraw wararta, mä leonas ch'akhanakax t'unarkaspa ukhama. Uruy arumaw t'aqhisiyista." 
Isaiah38:14 Jamach'inakjamaw chhiwiqta, palomanakjamaw ayqt'askta. Nayranakaxas alaxpach uñch'ukkäwix qaritäxiwa. Tatay, t'aqhisiñanakaxatay arxatt'ita." 
Isaiah38:15 ¿Ukampis, kamsarakïsti? Jupaxay ukham lurchixa. Nayan t'aqhisitax laykusti, ikis janiw purkxituti." 
Isaiah38:16 Khitinakarutix Tatitux arxatki ukanakax jakapxaniwa, taqi jupanakampiw nayax jakarakï. Jumaw nayarux qullt'asista, jakañsa kutt'ayxarakista." 
Isaiah38:17 Uñtapxam, t'aqhisiñat sipansa, jichhax samarañaw utjitu. Aynacht'añanakatxa, jumarakiw imista, taqi juchanakaxsa pampacharakistawa." 
Isaiah38:18 Sepulturan imantatanakax janiw yupaychapkiristamti, jiwatanakas janiw jach'achapkiristamti, kawki manqhar mantirinakasti janirakiw juman chiqa kankañamarux suyapkaspati." 
Isaiah38:19 Jakirinakakiw yupaychapxiristamxa, kunjämtix jichhürux jumar yupaychksma ukhama. Awkinakax wawanakaparux juman chiqapätam parlapxi." 
Isaiah38:20 Tatituw nayar qhispiyañatakix akankaski. Arpanakas toct'asipxañäni, sapüru sarnaqäwinakasan q'uchusipxañäni. Tatitun utapansa q'uchusipxarakiñäni." 
Isaiah38:21 Isaías profetasti higot mä masa lurt'ayäna, ukampiw reyirux kawkhatix uski ukkhar jawintayäna, reyisti k'umaraptxänwa." 
Isaiah38:22 Ukat Ezequías reyix Isaías profetarux jiskt'asïna: —¿Kuna chimpu tuqis amuyasiristxa Tatitun utaparu nayan sarañaxatakixa? —sasa. 
Isaiah39:1 Ukapachasti, Baladán sat jaqin Merodac-baladán yuqapax Babilonia markan reyipänwa, Ezequías reyin usupat k'umaraptxatapat yatisinxa, qillqatanakampi waxt'äwinakampi uka khithanakaparux apayanïna." 
Isaiah39:2 Ezequiasax jupanakar uñjasax kusisïnwa, ukatsti qamir kankañapa uñacht'ayäna, qullqi, quri, q'apkiri qullanaka, suma aceite, ukxarusti nuwasiñ yänakan utanakap uñacht'ayäna, kunanakampitix yänak imañ utanakapana, reyin utapana, ukhamarak taqi uka markpachan utjkäna taqi ukanak uñacht'ayäna." 
Isaiah39:3 Ukat Isaías profetax Ezequías reyin ukar uñjiriw saräna, juparusti jiskt'arakïnwa: —¿Kawkitsa uka jaqinakax jutapxatayna, kamsapxaraktamsti? —sasa. Ezequiasasti sarakïnwa: —Babilonia uka jaya markat jutapxatayna —sasa." 
Isaiah39:4 Isaías profetasti jiskt'askakïnwa: —¿Kunarak reyi utaman uñjapxisti? —sasa. Ezequiasasti sarakïnwa: —Taqi kun uñjapxi, kunanakatix reyi utaxana, yänak imañ utanakaxansa utjki taqi ukanak uñacht'ayta —sasa." 
Isaiah39:5 Isaías profetasti Ezequías reyirux sarakïnwa: —Taqi ch'amani Tatitun arunakap ist'am: 
Isaiah39:6 ‘Mä uruw purinini, kunatix reyi utaman utjki, kunanaktix nayra awkinakamas imapkän ukanakax Babiloniar apatäniwa. Janirakiw akarux kunas qhiparkxaniti." 
Isaiah39:7 Yaqhipanakat pachpa wawanakamaruw Babiloniar apapxani, kapsusinsti, reyin utapan luqtirïpxañapatakiw uskupxani.’" 
Isaiah39:8 Ezequiasasti jakañapkamaxa, sumankañampi, jan llakisiñampi utjaskañap amuyäna, ukat Isaías profetarux säna: —Tatitutix ukhamäñap munchixa, walikiwa —sasa." 
Isaiah40:1 Jumanakan Diosamax akham siwa: “Markaxarux chuymachapxam; 
Isaiah40:2 Jerusalén markankirinakarux munasiñampi parlxayapxam, T'aqhisiyat sarnaqañapax tukusxiwa, jucha luratanakapatsa phuqxapxiwa, kuna mutuyäwtix katuqapki ukampix phuqhatakïxiwa.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Mä aruw art'asiraki: “Wasaran Tatitutakix mä thakhi wakichapxam, wasaran mä chiqa thakhi jist'arapxam." 
Isaiah40:4 Taqi p'iyanaksti phuqhantapxam, jach'a qullunaksa, jisk'a qullunaksa khuskhachapxam, taqi qhathanaksa, qullunaksa sum pampachjapxam." 
Isaiah40:5 Ukapachaw Tatitux jach'a ch'amap uñacht'ayani, taqi jaqinakarakiw uñjapxani. Pachpa Tatituw ukham arsu.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Mä aruw arsu: “Art'am” sasa. Nayasti saraktwa: “¿Kunarak art'ästi?” sasa. Ukat ist'ta akham siri: “Taqi jaqix qurar uñtatakiwa, ¡mä panqarar uñtata juk'a urunakatakikiwa!" 
Isaiah40:7 Qurax wañsuwayxakiwa, panqaras ankuntawayxakiwa, kunapachatix Tatitun phust'atapax uka chiqar purki ukkhaxa. Chiqpachansa jaqix mä quraru uñtatakiwa." 
Isaiah40:8 Qurax wañsuwayxakiwa, panqaras ankuntawayxakiwa; ukampis Diosan arunakapax wiñayatakipunïniwa.”" 
Isaiah40:9 Jerusalén markan yatiyiripa, mä qullu patar makhatam, wali ch'amampirak art'asim, mä suma yatiyäwi yatiyañataki. Jerusalén marka, jan axsaras art'askakim, Judá uraqinkir markanakarusti yatiyarakim: “¡Jumanakan Diosamax akankiwa!” sasa." 
Isaiah40:10 Tatitux ch'amampiw purini, taqi kunsa ch'amapampiw apnaqi. Markaparusti, qhispiyasin irpanxaraki." 
Isaiah40:11 Kunjämatix mä awatirix ovejanakap sum uñjasixa, ukhamarakiw jupax amparapar ovejanak ichxart'asi, jichha wawachat ovej qallunakarus sum uñjaraki." 
Isaiah40:12 ¿Khitis jach'a lamar quta amparapampi tupt'ixa; jan ukax luk'anapampi alaxpachan qawqch'ätapsa tupt'ixa? ¿Khitirakis mä sapa tupuru taqi aka uraqin laq'anakapsa apthapixa? ¿Jan ukax taqi qullunaksa mä balanzar apxatasin waytixa? 
Isaiah40:13 ¿Khitirak Tatiturusti janiw walïktati saspasti? ¿Jan ukax khitich juparux yatichaspaxa? 
Isaiah40:14 ¿Khitis juparux iwxanaka jan ukax, amuyt'äwi arunaksa churaspa? ¿Khitich juparux chiqa kankañampi taripäwi uñjañ yatichaspa? ¿Khitis juparux yatiñ kankañsa yatichaspa? ¿Khitich juparux yatiñ kankañ churaspa?" 
Isaiah40:15 Jupatakix taqi markanakax mä uma ch'aqar uñtatakiwa, balanzar apxatata mä juk'a laq'ar uñtatakiwa, qutankir markanakasti mä sapa ch'allampi sasikiwa." 
Isaiah40:16 Taqi Líbano qullunsti janiw uywanakax waxt'äwinak luqtañatakix utjkiti. Lawas janirakiw nina nakhayañat utjkiti. 
Isaiah40:17 Tatitutakisti taqi markanakax janiw kunatakis askïpkiti. 
Isaiah40:18 ¿Khitimpirak Tatiturusti kikipayapxasmasti? ¿Kuna k'ari diosampirak jupar uñtasiyapxasmasti? 
Isaiah40:19 Luririnakax metalanak umatatayasaw uka diosanak lurapxi, ukarusti qurimpiw jawikipi, qullqi wallqanak lurarapi." 
Isaiah40:20 Mä dios luririx jan ñusantir lawa ajlli, uka jaqin lurat diosan jan liwisiñapatakix mä suma lurir thaqharaki." 
Isaiah40:21 ¿Janit jumanakasti yatipkäyätasti? ¿Janit ukham siri ist'apxirïktasti? ¿Janit nayratpach ist'apxirïktasti? ¿Janit aka uraqi qalltäwitpach amuyt'apktasti? 
Isaiah40:22 Tatitun utjäwipax alaxpachatsa juk'amp khurinkiwa, ukkhatpach jaqinakarux t'iju t'ijunakäkaspas ukham uñjaraki. Jupasti alaxpachxa utacht'añatakjamaw janatati, mä carpäkaspas ukhamarak janatati." 
Isaiah40:23 Jupasti munañani jaqinakarux janis kunäkaspa ukham tukuyi, aka uraqin jach'a jilïrinakarus chhaqtayarakiwa." 
Isaiah40:24 Jichha ayruntata chhuyu alinakampi sasiwa, jichhakis saphintasipkaspa ukhama. Tatitutix jupanakxar phust'aninixa, ankuntxapxakiwa, tutuka thayasti jupanakarux mä t'unäkaspas ukham apasxaraki." 
Isaiah40:25 Qullana Tatitusti jiskt'iwa: “¿Khitimpis jumanakax uñtasiyapxitäta? ¿Khitirak naya kipkarakïspasti?” 
Isaiah40:26 Alaxpach uñtapxam: ¿Khitis taqi ukanak luristi? Khititix jupanakar mayat mayat jalanuqki uka, taqinirus sutipatkam jawski uka. Ch'amapax wali jach'awa, janirakiw mä warawaras chhaqhatäkiti." 
Isaiah40:27 Israel, Jacobun markapa, ¿Kunatsa jumax jaychasta? ¿Kunatsa ukham parlta, “Tatitux janiw nayan kunankataxsa amuykiti, janiw nayat llakiskiti sas parltasti”? sasa." 
Isaiah40:28 ¿Janit yatipktasti, janit ist'kta? Tatituw, wiñay Diosaxa, aka uraqpacha luririxa, janiw jupax ch'amtaykiti, janirakiw qarjaskisa, yatiñ kankañapasti jan tukuskiriwa." 
Isaiah40:29 Jupaw qaritarux ch'am churi, pisi ch'ama jaqirusti ch'am yapt'araki." 
Isaiah40:30 Waynanakas qarjtakispawa, ch'amtayapxakispawa, wali ch'amaninakas aynacht'akirakispawa," 
Isaiah40:31 ukampisa khitinakatix Tatitur katuyasipki ukanakax machaq ch'amanïpxaniwa; pakalinakar uñtataw alayan tuyupxani, jan qarjasisaw jalanaqapxani, sarnaqasas janirakiw ch'amtayapkaniti." 
Isaiah41:1 “Quta tuqinkir markanaka, nayan nayraqataxan amukt'apxam; markanaka, wal ch'am katxatapxam. Kunatix jichhax parlañasäki uka tuqit parlir jutapxam, uka tuqit parlir tantacht'asipxañani." 
Isaiah41:2 Nayaw Israelan Diosapätxa; nayarakiw inti jalsu tuqita atipt'ir Ciro reyirux jutayarakta. Uka reyin ejercitopax niyaw jutanti, ukkañkamax reyinakarux niyaw jisk'achjta, markanakapsa katuntayaraktwa. Ciro reyix espadapampiw q'al tukji, mä wichhu t'unar uñtata willitati." 
Isaiah41:3 Uka markanak katurañatakis jank'akiw jali kayupampix janis uraqir takt'kaspa ukhama. 
Isaiah41:4 ¿Khitis taqi ukanak ukham luri? ¿Khitis qalltatpach taqi kunsa ukham sarayi, kunjämarutix sarañapäki ukhamaru? Naya sapa Tatitu Diosakiw ukham lurta, nayarakïtwa qalltasa, tukuyasa." 
Isaiah41:5 Quta tuqinkir markanakax axsarayasipxänwa, kunapachatix Ciro reyirux ejercitopampi jutaskir uñjapkäna ukkhaxa; uraqis maysat maysakamaw khathatirakïna." 
Isaiah41:6 Sapa mayni irnaqiriw yanapasi, masiparus ch'amañcht'araki." 
Isaiah41:7 Yaqha diosanak luriristi qurita, qullqit lurir jaqiruw ch'amañchi, martillompi liq'iristi yunquer liq'iriruw ch'amañchi, luratapas walikïskiw sarakiwa, ukatsti uka dios luratapxa jan liwisiñapatakix clavonakampiw sum sayt'ayi." 
Isaiah41:8 “Israel, Jacobun markapa, nayan munata Abrahaman wawanakapat saraqir marka, sum ist'ita:" 
Isaiah41:9 Nayaw jumarux uraqi tukuyapatpach irpsunsma, wali jaya uraqitpach jawsansma, saraksmawa: ‘Jumaw nayan luqtirixätaxa.’ Nayaw jumarux ajllissma, janiw jisk'achkaraksmati." 
Isaiah41:10 Jan axsaramti, nayaw jumampïskta, jan axsaramti, juman Diosamax nayäsktwa. Nayaw ch'amañchaskäma, nayarakiw yanapaskäma, atipjiri amparaxampiw uywaskäma." 
Isaiah41:11 Taqi khitinakatix uñisipktam ukanakaxa, p'inqachata, jisk'achjataw uñjasipxani; jumampi nuwasirinakasti q'ala tukjataw uñjasipxani." 
Isaiah41:12 Uñisirinakamarux thaqaskätawa, ukampis janiw jikxatkätati; jumampi nuwasirinakasa, janis utjapkaspa ukhamaw tukusipxani." 
Isaiah41:13 Naya, juman Tatitu Diosamaw jumarux amparat wayxarus irpsma; saraksmawa: ‘Jan axsaramti, nayaw yanapaskäma’ ” sasa." 
Isaiah41:14 Tatitusti sarakiwa: “Israel, Jacobun markapa, jisk'äskamsa, pisi ch'amäskamsa, jan axsaramti, nayaw yanapaskäma. Naya, Israelan Qullan Diosapa, nayaw qhispiyirimätxa." 
Isaiah41:15 Nayaw jumarux trigo jawq'añar uñtat tukuyaskäma, machaqa, suma ari lakanakani kuna; qullunak jawq'thapïta, laq'aruw tukuyäta, jisk'a qullunaksti jipiruw tukuyäta." 
Isaiah41:16 Ukatsti thayan apasxañapatakiw khuyt'äta, tutuka thayaw apasxani. Ukapachaw jumax Tatitunkasax kusisïta, Israelan Qullan Diosapatsti kusisirakïtawa." 
Isaiah41:17 “Jan yänakani jaqinakax uma thaqapxi, janiw jikxatapkiti. Laxranakapas umatjamaxa, q'ala wañantataw uñjasi; ukampis naya Tatituw jupanakarux uñjaskä, naya, Israelan Diosapasti janiw jupanakarux antutkäti." 
Isaiah41:18 Nayaw wasara qullunakana jawir umanak sartayä, qhirwanakansti uma jalsunak utjayä; wasara uraqinakasti wali umani uraqinakaruw tukuyä, waña uraqinakatsti uma jalsuyarakï." 
Isaiah41:19 Wasaransti cedro quqanaka ayruntä, acacianaka, arrayanes, ukhamaraki olivos quqanaka; waña uraqinsti pinonaka, cipreses sata quqanak jilayarakï." 
Isaiah41:20 Ukhamat taqinis uñjapxani, yatipxarakini, taqi ch'amaxampi taqi ukanak lurataxata. Ukapachaw yatipxarakini nayax Israelan Qullan Diosapätaxa.”" 
Isaiah41:21 Jacobun Tatitu reyipasti siwa: “Jaqin lurat k'ari diosanaka, jutapxam, jumanakat arsusipxam." 
Isaiah41:22 Kunatix akat qhiparux luraskani ukanak yatiyapxita, kunatix luraskäna ukanaksa amuyt'ayapxita." 
Isaiah41:23 Kunatix niya lurasiñapäki uksa yatiyapxam; jumanakan diosäpxatamsti uñacht'ayapxam. Walïpasa jan walïpasa, kunsa lurasipkakim, kunatix axsarayapkitaspa, khathatiyapkitaspa ukanaksa uñacht'ayapxita." 
Isaiah41:24 ¡Ukampis jumanakax janiw kunäpktasa, janirakiw kun lurañsa yatipktati! Jumanakar yaqhachirix mä jisk'achkañawa." 
Isaiah41:25 Tatitux saskakiwa: “Persia markat mä reyiw juti, nayax sutipat jawsarakta, jupax marka apnaqirinakaruw takxatani. Amsta tuqit purintanini, sañu lurir jaqix ñiq'i taksux ukham taksuni." 
Isaiah41:26 ¿Khitis taqi akanak qalltatpach yatiyixa, ukhamat yatiñasatakixa? ¿Khitis nayratpach yatiyixa, ukhamat jiwasan chiqätap yatiñasatakixa? Janiw khitis jumanakat yatiykiti, janiw khitis mä arsa ist'kiti." 
Isaiah41:27 Nayaw qalltatpach Jerusalén markarux yatiyta, uka markarux mä khitha khithaniraktxa, jaqinakapan mäki kuttanxañapat yatiyañataki." 
Isaiah41:28 Uñatatastwa, ukatsti janiw yaqha diosanakax utjkiti, janiw khitis iwxa arunak churirjamäkiti, janirakiw maynis jiskt'anakaxarux arusxatañatak ch'amanïkiti." 
Isaiah41:29 ¡Taqi jupanakasti janiw kunäpkisa! Janiw kun lurañsa yatipkiti; jan ukasti, ina ch'usa k'ari diosanakakiwa." 
Isaiah42:1 “Akaxay, luqtirixaxa, khitirutix nayax uywaskta ukaxa, ajllisitaxawa, jupanarak kusistxa. Ajayuxsa jupxaruw uchta, ukhamat kunatix chiqapäki ukanak taqi markanakar apaniñapataki." 
Isaiah42:2 Janiw arnaqaskaniti, janiw arskanisa, jupan arupax janirakiw thakhinakansa ist'askaniti," 
Isaiah42:3 usuchjatanakarusti janiw juk'amp usuchjkaniti, niya jiwirpacharus janirakiw jiwaykaniti. Jan ukasti, juk'a ch'amaninakarux ch'amañcht'aniwa, chiqa kankañ utjayarakini." 
Isaiah42:4 Janiw samarkaniti, ch'amsa jiwt'ayaskaniti, aka uraqin chiqa kankaña utt'ayañapkama. Quta tuqinkir markanakasti, yatichäwinakap sum ist'apxani.”" 
Isaiah42:5 Dios Tatitu, khititix alaxpachsa lurki, janatatkaraki, uraqsa, ukhamaraki ukan achurinakarus lurki, jakañsa jaqinakarus churki, uka Diosaw luqtiriparux saraki:" 
Isaiah42:6 “Naya Tatituw jumarux jawssma, amparatarak wayxarsma, ukhamat jumax qhispiyasiñ apañamataki; nayaw jumarux sayt'aysma, markaxampi arust'äwiru mantataxatxa, juman mä chimpüñam munarakta, markanakatakis mä qhanäñamarak munta." 
Isaiah42:7 Juykhunakarusti uñjayañam munta, katuntatanakarus carcelat irpsuñamataki, kawki ch'amaka manqhanakantix jakapki ukata." 
Isaiah42:8 Nayätwa Tatituxa, ukaw sutixaxa, janiw nayar jach'achañapäki uk yaqhar churaykäti, janirakiw naya lantxa yaqha diosanakarus yupaychaykäti." 
Isaiah42:9 Kuntix nayratpach yatiykta ukax phuqhasiwayxiwa, jichhasti machaq yatiyäwinak yatiyapxäma, ukanakas akat qhiparux phuqhasirakiniwa.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Tatitur mä machaq q'uchu q'uchupxam, jayan utjapki uka markanakas juparux yupaychapxam, jach'a lamar qutasa, kunanakatix ukan utjki ukanakas yupaychapxam, quta iraman utjki uka markanakasa, uka markanakan jakirinakas yupaychapxam." 
Isaiah42:11 ¡Wasaran utjir markanakas kusisipxpan! ¡Quedar ayllun utjirinakas kusisipxpan! ¡Selá tuqin utjirinakasti kusisiñat q'uchupxpan! ¡Q'uchutanakapsa qullu patatpach ist'ayapxpan! 
Isaiah42:12 ¡Tatiturusti jach'ar aptapxpan, taqi chiqan juparux yupaychapxpan!" 
Isaiah42:13 Tatitusti mä atipirjamaw mistunini, taqi ch'amampiw nuwasir jaqjam nuwasini; nuwantañatakiw art'ani, uñisirinakaparusti atipjaniwa." 
Isaiah42:14 Tatitusti siwa: “Walja urunakaw amukïskta, janiw kunsa arskaraktti; ukampis jichhax jach'at wararï, wawachisir warmjamaw jakhusï." 
Isaiah42:15 Jach'a qullüpasa, jisk'a qullüpasa, q'al t'unjä, taqi ch'uxña alinakapsa q'al wañsuyä. Jawiranaksti wasararuw tukuyä, jisk'a qutanaksa wañt'ayarakïwa." 
Isaiah42:16 Juykhunakarusti jan uñt'at thakhinakanjam irpä. Jupanakan nayraqatapansti ch'amakxa qhanaruw tukuyä, qullunaksti pampa uraqiruw tukuyä. Taqi ukanaksti lurapunïwa." 
Isaiah42:17 K'ari diosanakar alkatasirinakasti, uka diosanakar yupaychirinakasa, p'inqachjataw jayar sarxapxani." 
Isaiah42:18 “¡Uqaranaka, ist'apxam! ¡Juykhunaka, amuyt'asis uñtapxam!" 
Isaiah42:19 Israelax Tatitur luqtiritakiwa; Tatituw jupan khithapäñapatak ajllisiwayi; ukampis janiw yaqha markax Israel markjam sinti juykhu, sinti uqarax utjkiti." 
Isaiah42:20 Taqi kun uñji, ukampis janiw kuns amuykiti; jinchunakapas jist'aratäskiwa, ukampis janiw kuns ist'kiti." 
Isaiah42:21 Tatitusti, mä qhispiyiri Diosätapatxa, yatichäwipxa muspharkañ tukuyañ munäna;" 
Isaiah42:22 ukampis Israel markax q'al apt'asiwayi; uñisirinakapaw yänakapsa q'al aparawayxi; mayninakax uraq p'iyanakaruw imantasipxi, yaqhipanakasti katuntataw uñjasipxi, ¡janiw khitis jupanakar arxatirix utjkiti!”" 
Isaiah42:23 Taqi ukanakan ukham lurasitapatxa, Israelax janipuniw ist'asiñ munkiti." 
Isaiah42:24 ¿Khitis Israel, Jacobun markaparux, atipjatäpan, katuntatarakïpan sixa? Pachpa Tatituw ukham luratäñap amti. Jupanakasti Tatitu nayraqatan juch lurapxi, janiw kuna thaktix Tatitux uñacht'ayki ukanjam sarañ munapkiti, janirakiw yatichäwinakaparus jaysapkiti." 
Isaiah42:25 Ukatpï jupanakatakix phiñasïnxa, mä jach'a nuwasïwimpiw mutuyäna, ninampiw mutuyarakïna, ukham katuqkasas janiw jupanakax ist'asiñ munapkänti." 
Isaiah43:1 Jichhasti Israel, Jacobun markapa, jumar uywiri Tatitux sistamwa: “Jan axsaramti, nayaw qhispiysma, nayaw sutimat jawssma, jumax nayanktawa." 
Isaiah43:2 Taqi jan walt'añanakamanxa, nayaw jumampiskä; jawiranaksa makhatawayaskätawa, janiw umampi axskatas jiwkätati; ninanjam sarakipañamächixa, janiw nakhantat uñjaskätati," 
Isaiah43:3 Nayätwa juman Tatitumaxa, qhispiyirimasa, Israelan Qullan Diosapätwa. Nayaw jumarux alasinsma. Egipto, Etiopía, Sabá uka markanakata." 
Isaiah43:4 Israel, nayax jumarux wal munssma, jumax nayatakix wali jila alanïtawa. Jumar qhispiyañataki, nayan markaxäñamatakixa, jaqinakampi, markanakamp katuyta." 
Isaiah43:5 Jan axsaramti, nayaw jumampïskta. Inti jalsu tuqitsa, inti jalanta tuqitsa, nayaw jaqinakam anthapinxä." 
Isaiah43:6 Amstankir markanakaru, aynachankir markanakarus sarakïwa: ‘Markax kutt'ayxapxita, jupanakampix jan qhiparapxamti. Wawanakaxarux kuttayanirapxita jayatpacha, aka uraqi tukuyatpacha." 
Isaiah43:7 Nayaw jupanakarux lurt'asta, nayar jach'añchañapatakiw irnuqt'asta, nayar yupaychañapatakiw lurt'asta’ sasa." 
Isaiah43:8 “Markaxarux jutayxapxam, nayranïkchisa, juykhuw tuku, jinchunïkchisa, janiw ist'kiti."
