Daniel11:1 “Darío reyin Media sat uraqi mä mara marka apnaqkän ukapachax, nayarakiw jupar ch'amañcht'äyäta, yanapt'arakïyäta." 
Daniel11:2 Jichhasti kunatix chiqäki uk yatiyarakïma: “ ‘Kimsa reyiw Persia marka apnaqaskakini, ukanak qhipatsti pusïri yaqha reyiw sartani, jupasti mayni kimsa reyit sipansa sinti qamirïniwa. Kunapachatix ukhama qamiri kankañapampi wali munañanipuni tukxani ukapachasti, taqi qamir kankañapampiwa Grecia markatakix sayt'ani." 
Daniel11:3 Uka qhipatsti yaqha reyirakiw apnaqani, jupasti wali nuwasirïniwa, jupax mä jach'a marka apnaqani, ukatsti kuntix munkani uk lurarakini." 
Daniel11:4 Ukampis kunapachatix jach'a markapax suma utjnuqatäxani ukapachasti, uka jach'a markapax t'unjata, pusir t'aqxtataw uñjasini. Uka reyin munañanïñapasti janiw wawanakapar churatäkaniti, janirakiw jach'a markapas nayrjam wali ch'amanïkxaniti, niyakixay t'aqanuqata uñjaschinixa, yaqhanakarakiw jupa lanti apnaqxapxani." 
Daniel11:5 “ ‘Aynach tuqinkir reyisti wali ch'amanïniwa, ukampis ejercitopan utjir mä jilïripaw jupat sipansa juk'amp ch'amanïni, ukatsti munañanïñ kankañapampix walja jach'a markanakaru, ukhamaraki jisk'a markanakaruw apnaqani." 
Daniel11:6 Mä qawqha maranakatsti, amsta tuqinkir reyimpi, aynach tuqinkir reyimpix mä arust'äwiruw mantapxani; aynach tuqinkir reyix phuchhap churani amsta tuqinkir reyin warmipäñapataki, ukhamat uka pä markanakan sumankañax wiñay utjañapataki. Ukampis uka amtäwix aynacht'aniwa, uka warmisa, wawapasa, chachapasa, uywatanakapasa jiwarayataw uñjasipxani." 
Daniel11:7 Ukampis aynach tuqinkir reyin mayni wila masipaw, amsta tuqinkir reyin ejercitopar nuwantasin atipjarakini; ukatsti reyin jach'a utap katuntasini, ukatsti soldadonakapaw atipjasin taqi apnaqapxarakini." 
Daniel11:8 Ukhamarusa, metalat lurat diosanakaparux Egipto markaruw apasxani, qurita, qullqita, wali jila alani yaqha yänakamp chika. Uka pä markax mä qawqha maranakaw jan nuwasisa sarnaqani," 
Daniel11:9 amsta tuqinkir reyisti aynach tuqinkir markaruw mantantañ yant'ani, ukampis kuttawayxakiniwa." 
Daniel11:10 “ ‘Ukat amsta tuqinkir reyin yuqanakapax nuwasiñatak wakichasipxani, mä jach'a ch'amani ejército sartayapxarakini. Uka yuqanakapat maynïrix aynach tuqinkir markar katuntañatakiw sarantani, kunjämatix jawiran umax wal mantantki ukhamaw soldadonakapax mantantani, taqi kun t'unjasa; ukatsti wasitat nuwantani, aynach tuqinkir reyin uyuchrantat markapkam purisa." 
Daniel11:11 Amsta tuqinkir reyin ejercitopan nuwantatapasti, aynach tuqinkir reyirux walpun phiñasiyani, ukat jupax uka reyin jach'a ejercitopamp nuwasir mistuni, ukatsti q'alpun atipjarakini." 
Daniel11:12 Ukham atipjatapatsa, uñisirinakapan waljani jiwarapxatapatsa, uka reyix wal jach'achasini, ukampis jupan ch'amapax mä juk'a urutakikïniwa." 
Daniel11:13 Amsta tuqinkir reyix nayrïri ejercitot sipansa yaqha juk'amp ch'aman ejército wasitat sartayarakini, mä qawqha maranakatsti, walja nuwasirinakani, suma wakicht'at ejercitompiw wasitat aynach tuqinkir reyirux nuwantarakini." 
Daniel11:14 “ ‘Ukanakax utjkani ukapachasti, waljanirakiw aynach tuqinkir reyir saykatañatak mayachasipxani. Ukanak taypinsti Israelankir jaqinakat mä qawqha ñanqha jaqinakax utjarakiniwa, unañchäwin uñacht'ayatäkän ukarjama, ukampis aynacht'apxaniwa." 
Daniel11:15 Amsta tuqinkir reyisti, jutasin mä jach'a pirqa lurani; uyuchrantat ch'aman markarux ukanjam makhatasaw katuntani. Aynach tuqinkir reyin wali ch'amani soldadonakapasti, janiw uñisirin soldadonakaparux jark'irjamäpkaniti." 
Daniel11:16 Atipir reyisti, atipjayasirinakampix kuntix munkani uk lurani, janiw khitis jupar saykatirix utjkaniti, kunanaktix thakhin jikxatkani taqi ukanaksa t'unjaskakiniwa, ukatsti Suma Uraqi satäki ukan qhiparxani." 
Daniel11:17 Ukat juk'ampsti, aynach tuqinkir taqpach uraqinak katuntasiñatakiw wakichasirakini; ukatakisti aynach tuqinkir reyimpix mä arust'äwi lurani, uka reyirux phuchhap warmipäñapatak churani, ukampis amtäwinakapax aynacht'aniwa." 
Daniel11:18 Uka qhipatsti quta thiyankir markanakaruw nuwantani, uka markanakatsti waljaniw amparapar jalt'apxani; ukampis ejerciton mä jilïripaw taqi ukanakan jan utjañapatak sayt'ani, amsta tuqinkir reyirusti mä p'inqa tukjani." 
Daniel11:19 Uka qhipatsti, amsta tuqinkir reyix uraqipan utjir uyuchrantata markanakaparuw kuttawayxani; ukampis mä chijir purisaw jiwani, janiw kunas uka reyit juk'ampi yatiskxaniti." 
Daniel11:20 “ ‘Qunuñapansti yaqha reyiw qunt'asini, uka reyisti qullqinak apthapiyiriw mayni uywatapar khithani, marka apnaqäwipa qamiriptayañataki; ukampis mä qawqha urunakat jupar jiwayapxaniwa, ukasti janiw nuwasïwi laykükaniti." 
Daniel11:21 “ ‘Uka rey qhipatsti mä jan wali jaqiw marka apnaqani, uka jaqin reyïñapax janiw wakiskasapänti, jupax jan wali amtäwinakap imantasaw sallqjañanakamp reyit utt'asini." 
Daniel11:22 Khitinakatix jupatak sayt'apkani ukanakarusti q'al t'unjani, arust'äwiru mantatäkän ukan jilïriparus jiwayarakiniwa." 
Daniel11:23 Jupampi suma arust'äwi lurapkani uka masinakaparus sallqjarakiniwa, ejercitopax juk'a jaqinïkchini ukasa, atipjaniwa." 
Daniel11:24 Jan khitin amuykataw suyunakan utjir suma uraqinakap katuntasini, ukatsti kuntix nayra awkinakapax jan lurapkäna ukanak lurarakini: nuwasïwin jikxatat qamir yänak soldadonakaparuw lakintani. Suma uyuchrantat markanakar nuwantañatakiw amtarakini, ukampis ukax mä juk'a urunakatakikïniwa." 
Daniel11:25 “ ‘Ch'aman amuyasisasti, jach'achasisaw aynach tuqinkir reyir nuwantani, wali jach'a ejerciton yanapapampi. Aynach tuqinkir reyisti jan axsarasaw jach'a ch'aman ejercitompi nuwantarakini; ukampis jupax sallqjataw uñjasini, ukatsti janiw uñisiripan ejercitopar saykatirjamäkaniti." 
Daniel11:26 Jupax manq'añatak utapar jawsirïkän uka pachpa masinakapaw jupan aynacht'añapatak wakichapxani, ejercitopax atipjataw uñjasini, soldadonakapat waljaniw jiwarapxani." 
Daniel11:27 Ukatsti, uka pä reyinakax purapat ñanqha lurasiñ amtäwimpikiw mayawjan manq'añatak qunt'asipxani, ukatsti jupanakkamaw k'arinak sasipxani, ukampis janiw maynis amtatanakap phuqhapkaniti, pachax janïra purinitap layku." 
Daniel11:28 Amtäwinakap phuqhasaxa, amsta tuqinkir reyix nuwasïwin katuntat yänak apt'ataw markapar kutt'xani. Mä qawqha pachatsti, uka reyix sumankañatak arust'äwi luratarux janiw phuqkaniti." 
Daniel11:29 Jan ukasti, niya pacha phuqhasitarjamaw wasitat aynach tuqinkir reyirux nuwantani; ukampis janiw nayrïr kutinjam atipjkaniti." 
Daniel11:30 Ejercitopar nuwantañatakix inti jalanta tuqit soldadonakax barconakat purintanipxani, uk uñjasasti axsarañat jaltxakiniwa. Amsta tuqinkir reyix khitinakatix uka sumankañatak arust'äwiru jan phuqhapki ukanakaruw jaysani. Ukapachasti, amstankir reyix uka qullan arust'äwitakiw taqi phiñasiñap samarasini, ukatsti uka arust'äwi apanukurinakampiw arust'asini." 
Daniel11:31 “ ‘Soldadonakapasti Tatitun utap ñanqhachapxaniwa, suma uyuchrantat markanaksa janiw yäqapkaniti. Sapüru wilañchanak luqtasiñanaksti jark'xaniwa, uka lantix axtaskañanak luqtapxani Tatitun yänakap takisisa." 
Daniel11:32 Reyisti quña arunakapampiw sumankañatak arust'äwi jan phuqhirinakarux jupar jaqkattayasiñ munani, ukampis Diosapar munir markax, thurt'ataw uka jan walt'añanak jutipanxa sayt'asini." 
Daniel11:33 Markankir jach'a yatiñan jaqinakasti walja jaqinakaruw yatichapxani, ukampis jank'akiw jupanakarux jiwarayapxani, ninaruw nakhantayapxani, utjir yänakapsa lunthatjapxarakiniwa, jupanakat waljaniruw jaya markanakar uywat jaqir tukuyañatak apapxani. Ukasti mä qawqha urunakakïniwa." 
Daniel11:34 Kunapachatix arknaqat uñjasiñ urunakax purinkani ukapachasti, mä juk'a yanap katuqapxani, waljanirakiw jan uñisiyasiñ laykux jupanakar jaqkattapxani." 
Daniel11:35 Khitinakatix markankir jaqinakar yatichapkäna ukanakasti, chimpt'at tukuy urun puriniñapkamax arknaqatäpxaniwa, jupanakax uka yant'anak katuqasaxa, q'umachatäpxaniwa, chiqapar tukuyatäpxarakiniwa." 
Daniel11:36 “ ‘Amsta tuqinkir reyisti kuntix jupax munkani uk lurani. Jach'a jach'a tukutapatxa, jupax taqi diosanakatsa juk'amp ch'amanïtap amuyasini, chiqpach Diosatakisti kunayman ñanqha arunak arsuni; taqi kunas jupatakix wakiskiriw mistuni; Diosax jupatak mutuyäwipa apayankani ukapachkama, kuntix Diosax lurañapäki ukxa, luraniwa." 
Daniel11:37 Aka reyisti janiw nayra awkinakapan diosanakaparux yäqkaniti, janirakiw warminakan yupaychata diosanakarusa, kawkïr diosarus yäqkaniti, jupax taqi uka diosanakatsa jilt'atätap amuyasini." 
Daniel11:38 Ukampisa, uyuchrantat markanakan diosaparuw yupaychani; janiw nayra awkinakapas uka diosaru yupaychapkänti, uka diosarusti quri, qullqi, suma k'ajkir qalanaka, jila alan yänakamp luqtarakini." 
Daniel11:39 Atipjat markanakar arxatañatakisti, yaqha diosanakar yupaychir jaqinakampiw yanapt'ayasini; khitinakatix uka reyir jach'añchapkani ukanakarusti, marka apnaqäwin jach'a jilïrit utt'ayani, jach'a uraqinak churarakini." 
Daniel11:40 “ ‘Tukuy pacha purinkani ukkhasti, aynach tuqinkir reyix amsta tuqinkir reyiruw nuwantani; ukampis amsta tuqinkir reyix jupamp nuwantasiñatakiw mistuni, ukatsti mä jach'a thayäkaspa ukhamaw aynach tuqitak sartani, nuwasiñ carronakampi, caballeriampi, walja soldadonakampi, walja barconakampi mantantasa." 
Daniel11:41 Ukatsti Suma Uraqi satäki ukaruw mantarakini, ukansti walja jaqinakaruw jiwarayani; ukampis Edom markana, Moab markan utjasirinakasa, Amón uraqin utjasirinakasa qhispipxaniwa." 
Daniel11:42 Ejercitopasti yaqha jach'a markanakar kunaw atipjasin katuntasini, janiw Egipto markas ukat qhispkaniti." 
Daniel11:43 Egipton utjir qurita, qullqit lurat yänakap apasxani, taqi qamir yänakap apasxarakini; uka qhipatsti Libia, Etiopía markanak katuntasirakini." 
Daniel11:44 Ukampis inti jalsu tuqimpita, amsta tuqimpit yatiyäwinak katuqani, uka yatiyäwinakasti juparux wal thuqtasiyani; ukat jupax sinti phiñasitapuniw mistuwayani, walja jaqinak jiwarayañ chuymampi." 
Daniel11:45 Ukatsti utjäwipxa, jach'a qutampi, Suma uraqin qullan qullupäki uka taypiruw utt'ayasini. Ukampis ukawjan jiwañapax purinini, janiw khitis jupar yanapt'irix utjkaniti." 
Daniel12:1 “ ‘Ukapachaw Israel markan arxatiripa Miguel jilïr angelax uñstanini. “ ‘Ukasti llakisiñ urunakäniwa, uka urunakjamasti janipuniw kunapachas utjkänti, markanakan utjatapat aksaru. Uka urux purinkani ukapachasti, markamankirinakat qillqatan qillqantatäpki ukanakax, taqiniw qhispipxani." 
Daniel12:2 Amay imäwin ikiskirinakat, waljaniw sartapxani: mayninakax wiñay jakañataki, mayninakasti wiñay p'inqachatäñataki, t'aqhisiyatäñatakiraki." 
Daniel12:3 Yatiñani jaqinakasti, waljaniru chiqa thakhinjam irpirinakasti, alaxpach qhanjamaw k'ajapxani; ¡warawaranakjamaw wiñayatak k'ajapxarakini!" 
Daniel12:4 “ ‘Jumasti Daniel, taqi akanakatxa, jan khitirus arsumti; uka qillqat jan jist'aramti, tukuy uru puriniñapkama. Walja jaqinakaw juk'amp yatxatañ munasax uksa aksa sarnaqapxani’ sasa." 
Daniel12:5 “Naya, Danielax, pani yaqha jaqinakaruw uñjarakta, ukanakat maynix jawir akkatana, maynisti jawir khurkatan sayaskiri." 
Daniel12:6 Jupanakat mayniw, lino isimp isthapit chacharu, uma patxan sayt'atäkän ukar jiskt'arakïna: ‘¿Kunapacharak aka jan amuyt'kaya luräwinakasti tukusxanisti?’ sasa." 
Daniel12:7 Lino isimp isthapit chachasti, alaxpachar amparap luqtasaw, jakkir Diosan sutipxar juramentompi arsüna akham sasa: ‘Kimsa mara chikatanita, kunapachatix Diosan markapax jan juk'amp t'aqhisiyat uñjaskxani ukapachaw taqi akanakax tukusxani’ sasa." 
Daniel12:8 “Nayasti kuntix siskäna uk ist'ayätwa, ukampis janiw kuns amuyt'käyätti. Ukat jiskt'asta: ‘Tata, ¿taqi ukanak qhipatsti kunarak utjanisti?’ sasa." 
Daniel12:9 Jupasti sarakituwa: ‘Daniel, jumax sarnaqañ sarnaqaskam, janiw khitis taqi akanakat yatiñapäkiti, tukuya pachan puriniñapkama." 
Daniel12:10 Waljaniw taqi kunanaktix yatiyksma ukanak t'aqhisipxani, ukampis uka t'aqhisïwi qhipat aski jaqinakäpxaniwa. Ñanqha jaqinakasti ñanqhanakap lurasipkakiniwa, kunatix utjki ukanakat jan amuyt'asa, ukampis yatiñan jaqinakax taqi akanak amuyt'apxani." 
Daniel12:11 Waranqa pä patakani llätunk tunkani urunakaw sarakipani, sapür luqta katuyañ sayt'atap qhipata, Tatitun qullan utap ñanqhachañ utjkani uka qhipata." 
Daniel12:12 Kusisiñaniwa khititix taqi iyawsañampi, waranqa kimsa patakan kimsa tunka phisqani urunak sarakipañapkam suyt'kani ukaxa." 
Daniel12:13 Jumasti Daniel, jan kuna llakin jakasim jiwañam urukama. Tukuy pachax purinkani ukkhaxa, jiwatanak taypit sartxäta, churäwim katuqasiñataki’ ” sasa." 
Hosea1:1 Tatitux aka arunak Beerí sat chachan Oseas yuqaparuw parläna, Ozías, Jotam, Ahaz, Ezequías reyinakan urunakapana; jupanakasti Judá markan reyinakapänwa; Joás chachan Jeroboam yuqapasti Israel markan reyiparakïnwa." 
Hosea1:2 Kuntix Tatitux Oseas tuqi sañ munkän uka arunakxa, akham sasaw qalltäna: “Israel markax nayar apanukusax yaqhampiw sarnaqxi. Jichhasti jumax saram, ukatsti uka kipkarak yaqha chachanakampi sarnaqir warmimpi jaqichasim, jupampisti wawanakanïma; ukhamat uka wawanakax yaqha chachanakampi sarnaqir warmin wawanakapäpxani”." 
Hosea1:3 Oseas profetasti sarasinxa, Gómer sat warmimpiw jaqichasïna, jupasti Diblaim chachan phuchhapänwa. Usur jaqiptasinsti mä yuqall wawa wawachasïna." 
Hosea1:4 Ukatsti Tatitux Oseas profetarux sänwa: “Uka yuqall wawarux Jezreel sas suticham, nayasti akat mä juk'a urunakatxa, Jehú reyin wawanakaparux mutuyäwa, Jezreel chiqan jaqinakar jiwarayapxatapata, Israel markansti janiw reyinakax juk'ampi utjkxaniti." 
Hosea1:5 Uka uruw nayax Jezreel qhirwan, Israelan ejercitopan ch'amap q'al t'unjä.”" 
Hosea1:6 Gómer warmisti wasitat usur jaqiptarakiki, ukatsti mä imill wawa wawachasïna. Tatitux Oseas profetarux sänwa: “Jichhax uka imill wawarux Lo-ruhama sas suticham, ukasti ‘jan khuyapt'ayata’ sañ muni, nayasti Israel markarux janiw juk'ampi khuyapt'aykxäti, janirakiw juchanakapsa pampachkxäti." 
Hosea1:7 Ukampisa, Judá markatxa khuyapt'ayasïwa, naya kipka Diosaparakiw qhispiyä. Ukatakisti janiw nuwantañax wakiskaniti, janirakiw kuna espadanakasa, caballerianakasa munaskaniti.”" 
Hosea1:8 Lo-ruhamaru ñuñut t'aqaqxasinsti, Gómer warmix wasitat usur jaqiptarakikïnwa, ukatsti mä yuqall wawa wawachasirakïna." 
Hosea1:9 Tatitux Oseas profetarux sänwa: “Uka yuqall wawarux Lo-amí sas suticham, ukax ‘janiw markaxäkxiti’ sañ muni. Jumanakax jichhax janiw nayan markaxäxapxtati, janirakiw nayas jumanakan Diosamäkxti.”" 
Hosea1:10 Mä urux israelita jaqinakax jach'a quta iramankir ch'alljamäpxaniwa, jan jakt'kayäpxarakiniwa: “Jumanakax janiw nayan markaxäxapxtati” sapxäyätamwa, jichhasti Tatitux jupanakarux saniwa: “Jumanakax jakkir Diosan wawanakapäpxtawa” sasa." 
Hosea1:11 Ukapachaw Israel markankir jaqinakampi, Judá markankir jaqinakampix mayacht'asxapxani, mä sapa jilïr irpirik utt'ayasxapxani, taqi tuqitsa Jerusalén markarkamaw kuttanxapxani. ¡Uka urusti wali jach'a urupunïniwa!" 
Hosea2:1 Ukapachaw jumanakax jilanakamar sapxäta: “Tatitun markapa” sasa, kullakanakamarusti: “Khuyapt'ayata” sasaraki." 
Hosea2:2 Tatitux siwa: “¡Taykamar juchañchapxam, juchañchapxapunim, jichhax jupax janiw warmixäkxiti, janirakiw nayas chachapäkxti! ¡Yaqha chachanakampi sarnaqañap apanukxpan! ¡Jan wali warminakjam sarnaqañsa apanukxpan!" 
Hosea2:3 Janitix uka jan wali sarnaqañanakap apanukkanixa, q'alalsuyäwa: kunjämtix taykapan purakapat yurkän ukhama, ch'usa wasararuw tukuyarakï, waña uraqiruw kipstayä, ukatsti umat pharjayasin jiwayarakï." 
Hosea2:4 Wawanakapatsa janiw khuyapt'ayaskäti, jan wal sarnaqäwin jikxatat wawanakätap layku." 
Hosea2:5 Taykapax yaqha chachanakampi sarnaqiriwa; sum uñt'atäñsa q'al apt'asiraki akham sasa: ‘Munirinakaxar thaqhir sarä, jupanakaw churapxitu, manq'añsa, isinaksa, suma q'apkir qullanaksa, kusist'añanaksa’ sasa." 
Hosea2:6 “Ukat nayax ch'aphinakampi thakhip jist'antä, thakhinakap jan jikxatañapatakisti, uyumpiw muyuntayä." 
Hosea2:7 Munirinakaparux arkaskaniwa, ukampis janiw jikxatkaniti; thaqhaskaniwa, janiw jikxatkaniti. Ukapachaw sani: ‘Nayra chachaxampik kuttasxä, walik jupampix sarnaqaskäyäta’ sasa." 
Hosea2:8 “Ukampis jupax janiw amuyaskänti nayan juparu trigo, vino, aceite, ukanak churataxsa, nayarakiw qullqsa, qursa yapt'äyäta, ukanakampisti yaqha diosanak lurasi." 
Hosea2:9 Ukat jichhax taqi kunanaktix nayax churkta ukanak q'al aparasxä. 
Hosea2:10 Munirinakapan uñjkañ q'alalsuyä. ¡Janiw khitis amparaxat qhispiykaniti! 
Hosea2:11 Kusisiñanakapas tukusiniwa, phunchhäwinakapsa, machaq phaxsi uruyañanakapsa, samarañ urunakapsa, q'al tukjarakï." 
Hosea2:12 Uva yapunakapsa, higo yapunakapsa q'al tukjarakï, uka yapunakatsti, akham sänwa: ‘Munirinakaxaw aka yapunak kunatix wakt'kitu ukat churapxitu’ sasa. Nayasti uka yapunakap qurampiw qurantayä, pampankir animalanakaw ukanak manq'antapxani." 
Hosea2:13 Juparusti, yaqha diosanakar incienso luqtatapat mutuyä, nayar armanukusaxa, munirinakapar arkañatak surtijanakampi, wallqanakampi k'achachaskäna, taqi ukanakat mutuyarakï. Naya Tatituw uk arsta." 
Hosea2:14 “Ukham luratapatsa, wasitat nayar munañapatakiw wasarar irpasin chuymapar parlxayä." 
Hosea2:15 Ukatsti uva yapunakap kuttayxäwa, jan walt'añanakapsti sumaruw tukuyarakï. Nayarux tawaqükäna uka urunakapanjam parlxayxitani, Egiptot mistunkän uka urunjama." 
Hosea2:16 Ukapachaw nayarux sitani: ‘Nayan chachaxay’ sasa, ‘Baal diosaxay’ siskamayxa. Naya Tatituw uk arsta." 
Hosea2:17 Lakapatsti Baal diosanakan sutinakap apaqä, janipuniw mayampsa ukanakax aytatäkxaniti." 
Hosea2:18 “Khä urunsti, Israel markatakix, pampankir laq'unakampi, jamach'inakampi, katarinakampix mä suma arust'äwiruw mantä, aka markatsti, nuwasiñ yänakap aparasin q'al t'unthapï, ukhamat markaxax samart'at sarnaqasxani." 
Hosea2:19 Israel marka, taqi chuymaxampi jumar munatax laykusti, wiñayatakiw warmixar tukuyäma, kamachirjamax chiqpach warmixa." 
Hosea2:20 Warmixaruw tukuyasïma, jumarukiw munasïma, ukapachaw jumax Tatiturjam uñt'asitäta." 
Hosea2:21 Naya, Tatituw ak arsta: Nayaw khä urunakan alaxpachat aka uraqirux jallu puriyanï;" 
Hosea2:22 uraqinsti trigox achuntaniwa, vinosa, aceitesa, jilarkirïniwa, ukhamat Jezreel qhirwax sumar tukuni." 
Hosea2:23 Markaxarusti nayatakikipuniw uraqir uskusï, Lo-ruhamatsti khuyapt'ayasïwa, Lo-amirusti ‘Markaxätawa’ sarakïwa, jupasti: ‘¡Diosaxätawa!’ sarakitaniwa.”" 
Hosea3:1 Tatitux wasitat sarakitu: “Oseas, warmimax janiw jumatakjamäkiti, jupan mayni munatapaw utji. Uka kipkarakiw israelitanakax jan nayatakjamäpkiti, k'ari diosanakaruw yupaychapxi, luqtäwi churatanakat manq'apxi. Ukampis saram, warmimarux munasim, kunjämtï nayax israelitanakar munastxa ukhama.”" 
Hosea3:2 Ukatsti uka warmirux tunka phisqan qullqimpi, mä khumu chikatani cebadampiw alasta." 
Hosea3:3 Ukatsti juparux saraktwa: “Jichhax walja maranakaw nayampi jakasïta; janiw yaqha chachanakampi sarnaqxätati, nayasti jumatakikiw jakarakï” sasa." 
Hosea3:4 Walja maranakaw israelitanakax jan reyini, jan jilïr irpirini sarnaqapxani, wilañchanak jan luqtasa, jan altaranakani, jan sacerdotenakani, jan yaqha diosanakani." 
Hosea3:5 Uka qhipatsti israelitanakax kuttanxapxaniwa, Tatit Diosaparuw thaqhapxani, David reyiparuw thaqhapxarakini. Uka qhipa urunakansti, askinak katuqapxatapatxa, alt'at chuymampiw Tatitur jak'achasipxani." 
Hosea4:1 Israel jaqinaka, Tatitun arunakap ist'apxam. Jupax jichhax aka markan jakirinakampiw ch'axwar manti, jupanak pura jan sum sarnaqapxatapata, jan chiqa chuymanïpxatapata, Tatitur jan uñt'apxatapata." 
Hosea4:2 Ukampis k'ari juramentompi, k'arisiñampikiw utjaski, jaqi jiwayañampi, lunthatasiñampi, wachuq jucha lurañampi, nuwasiñampi; jaqinak pura jiwarayasiñampi." 
Hosea4:3 Ukat aka markax jacht'asis sarnaqaski; aka markan jakirinakasti jan ch'amanikïxapxiwa; pampankir animalanakasa, jamach'inakasa, jach'a qutankir chawllanakas jiwarxapxarakiwa." 
Hosea4:4 Tatitux siwa: “¡Jan khitis maynirux juchañchkpati, janirak tuqkpasa! Sacerdote, jumampi ch'axwañaxaw utji." 
Hosea4:5 Jumax urpachaw aynacht'äta, arumarusti, jumamp chikaw profetax aynacht'ani; taykamarus t'unjarakïwa." 
Hosea4:6 Markaxasti janiw amuyunïkxiti, ukat t'unjat uñjasi. Jumasti, sacerdote, yatiñsa apanuktawa, ukat jichhax nayax jumar apanukuraksma. Niyakixay jumax Tatitun yatichäwinakapsa armanukstaxa, nayax wawanakamat armasirakïwa." 
Hosea4:7 “Sacerdotenakan waljanïpxatapatsti, juk'ampikiw naya tuqix jucha lurapxi; ukat nayax jach'añchäwipsa p'inqar tukuyä." 
Hosea4:8 Markaxax jucha luratanakapat luqtañatak apanipki ukanak manq'apxi; ukat jupanakax jaqinakaxan jucha lurapxañap juk'ampi munapxi. 
Hosea4:9 Aka markarux jan wali sarnaqäwinakapatxa, sacerdotenakarjamaw mutuyarakï." 
Hosea4:10 Niyakixay Tatitur yupaychañ apanukupxchixa, manq'asipkanisa, janiw sist'asipkaniti, yaqhanakampis wawanïñatak sarnaqasipkaniwa, ukampis janiw wawanïpkaniti." 
Hosea4:11 “Wachuqa juchanakan sarnaqañampi, vino machañanakampixa, jaqirux jan amuyun tukuyi." 
Hosea4:12 Markaxax k'ullut khitsut diosanakaparuw jiskt'asi, thujrunak tuqirakiw yatiñanaksa thaqhi. Wachuqa juchampi apnaqataxa, markaxax pantjat thakhinakan sarnaqaski; Diosap apanukusaw yaqhanakampi juchanakan sarnaqi." 
Hosea4:13 Uka alay qullunakan incienso q'aphinakampi luqtäwinak churasi; roble, álamo, encina sat quqanakan ch'iwinakapan luqtasiraki. Phuchhanakamax wachuqa jucha lurapxi, yuxch'anakamas yaqha chachanakampiw sarnaqapxi." 
Hosea4:14 Ukampis janiw phuchhanakamarusa, yuxch'anakamarus wachuqa juchanak luratanakapat mutuykäti, jumanakpachaw jan wali warminakampix wachuqa juchanak lurapxtaxa; wilañchanak luqtañatakis jan wali warminakampiw mayachasipxtaxa, uka warminakan ukham luratanakapax diosanakapar yupaychäwïkaspas ukhamawa. ¡Ukatpï mä markax jan amuyt'asitapat aynacht'awayixa!" 
Hosea4:15 “Israel marka, jumax wachuqa jucha lurañan sarnaqtaxa, Judá markakisay uka juchxa jan lurkpati. ¡Jan jumanakax Guilgal chiqarux sarapxamti, janirak Bet-avén qullurus makhatapxamti, Tatit laykus janipun juramento lurapxamti!" 
Hosea4:16 Israelitanakax uri vaca qallur uñtataw nayat jayarst'itu; ukhamasti, ¿Tatitux suma chhuxllanakaru, oveja qallunakäpkaspas ukham awatiskakispati?" 
Hosea4:17 Israelitanakax yaqha diosanakar yupaychañaruw katuyasxi. ¡Taqiniw machantat jaqinakäpkaspas ukham liwirtawayapxi! Mayampi mayampwa wachuqa jucha lurapxi, suma jach'añchäwit sipansa p'inqachatäñak munapxi." 
Hosea4:18  
Hosea4:19 Yaqha diosanakar yupaychapxatapatsti, p'inqachjatäpxaniwa, jan mayan tukjatäpxaniwa." 
Hosea5:1 “Sacerdotenaka, aka arunak ist'apxam; Israel marka apnaqirinaka, ist'asipxam, reyin utapan utjirinaka, ist'apxarakim: Nayan markaxar sallqjapxatamatsti, taripasin mutuyapxäma. Israel markaxarux juk'amp kutkatasir tukuyapxtaxa. Mispá, Tabor uka qullan utanakan munkir jan munkir yaqha diosanakar yupaychayapxtaxa." 
Hosea5:2  
Hosea5:3 Israelitanaka, Nayax jumanakan sarnaqatanakam yattwa; wachuqa jucha lurir warmjamaw sarnaqapxtaxa.”" 
Hosea5:4 Yaqha diosanakaruw yupaychapxtaxa, janiw nayarux jumanakan Diosamat katuqapkistati, janirakiw jucha luratanakamatsa kutikipstanipktati." 
Hosea5:5 Jumanakax jach'a jach'a tukur jaqinakäpxtawa, ukat q'al t'unjatäpxäta; ¡Judá markankirinakas ukham t'unjatäpxarakiniwa!" 
Hosea5:6 Ovejanakapampi, vacanakapampi kunaw nayarux luqtäwi churañatak thaqhir jutapxäta, ukampis janiw jikxatapkitätati. ¡Nayax jaytanukuwayapxämawa!" 
Hosea5:7 Wachuqa jucha lurir warmjamaw sarnaqapxtaxa: yaqha diosanakar yupaychasaw nayar sallqjapxistaxa, jichhax wawanakamax janiw nayan markaxäkxaniti. Ukatpï jumanakasa, uraqinakamas q'ala tukjatänixa." 
Hosea5:8 ¡Guibeá chiqan nuwasiñatak putut phust'apxam, Ramá chiqansti trompet phust'apxarakim! ¡Bet-avén chiqansti p'arxtayapxam! ¡Benjamín ayllunkirinakarusti, amuyasipxpan sapxarakim!" 
Hosea5:9 Mutuyäwi urupanxa israelitanakax tukjatäniwa: Nayaw akxa Israel markankirinakarux yatiyta, kunatix luraskani ukanakata." 
Hosea5:10 Tatitux siwa: “Judá markankir jilïrinakapaxa, khitinakatix uraqinakan qurpanakap mayjt'ayapki ukhamäpxiwa. ¡Jupanakxarusti phiñasiñaxampiw umjam warxatanï!" 
Hosea5:11 Israelitanakax t'aqhisiyatawa, k'ari diosanakar arkatapatsti, kuna askinakatix jupanakar wakt'ki ukanakax q'ala aparatarakiwa." 
Hosea5:12 Ukat nayax uka Israel markaru, Judá markarus q'al tukjä, kunjämatix kharusa, thuthasa q'al tukjki ukhama." 
Hosea5:13 “Kunapachatix Israel markaxa, Judá markasa jan walt'añan jikxatasipkani ukkhaxa, jupanakax Asiria apnaqir reyiruw yanap mayirix sarapxani, ukampis uka reyix janiw yanapt'kaniti." 
Hosea5:14 Kunjämatix mä leonax wal qhurutasixa, ukhamaw nayax Israel markampiru, Judá markampirux qhuruchasis katjarakï; naya pachpaw jisk'a jisk'a tukjä, janirakiw khiti arxatt'iris utjkaniti." 
Hosea5:15 “Juchanakapat kutikipstañapkamasti, utjäwixaruw kuttä, kunapachatix juchanakap uñt'asxapxani ukkhasti, llakisiñanakampiw phuqhantasipxani, ukhamat nayar thaqhapxitani”." 
Hosea6:1 Taqin jutapxam, Tatitun ukar kutkatxañäni. Jupaw usuchjistu, juparakiw k'umarachxistani; chhuxriñchjistuwa, juparakiw qullt'xistani." 
Hosea6:2 Jank'akiw k'umar sarnaqasiñ churxistani, jupa nayraqatan jakañasatakiw sayt'ayxarakistani." 
Hosea6:3 ¡Tatitur uñt'añatak ch'amacht'asipxañäni! Jupaw jiwasanakan ukar jutani, kunjämtix intix jalsunki ukhama, kunjämtix nayraqat jallunakax uraqir purxatki ukhama." 
Hosea6:4 Tatitux siwa: “Israelita jaqinaka, ¿kunsa jumanakampix luräxa? Judá uranqir jaqinaka, ¿kunsa jumanakampix luräxa? Jumanakan munasiñamax nayatakix qhantati urpur uñtatakiwa, qhantati sullar uñtatakiwa, mäkirakiw chhaqtawayxi." 
Hosea6:5 Ukat nayax profetanak tuqi t'unjapxsmaxa, arunakax tuqiraki jiwayapxsmaxa. Nayan chiqa kankañaxasti mä qhanjamaw qhant'ani." 
Hosea6:6 Jumanakax nayar munapxitasma uk munta, janiw jumanakan wilañchanakam munkti; nayarux Diosarjam uñjapxitasma uk munta, janiw jumanakan nakt'at luqtäwinakam munkti." 
Hosea6:7 “Ukampis markaxaxa, Adanjamarakiw arust'äwixarux jan phuqkiti, janirakiw nayatak chiqa chuymanïpkiti." 
Hosea6:8 Galaad markax ñanqha lurir jaqinakan markapawa, jaqinakapax jaqi jiwayirinakäpxiwa." 
Hosea6:9 Sacerdotenakax lunthatkamakïpxiwa, jaqit lunthatañak uñch'ukisipki; Siquem thakhin jaqinak jiwarayapxi, kunayman jan walinak lurapxaraki." 
Hosea6:10 Israel markan jakirinak taypinsti, sinti jan walinakpun nayax uñjta: Israelitanakasti wachuq juchanakan sarnaqapxi, q'añuchjasipxarakiwa." 
Hosea6:11 Jumatakisti Judá, kunürükanitï mutuyäwimax uksa chimpt'xaraktwa. “Uka qhipatxa, Israel markaxarux uraqiparuw kuttayanxä." 
Hosea7:1 Nayax markaxaruw qhispiyañ munta, ukampis jupanakax walja juchanak lurapxi. Taqinis k'arikamakiwa; utanakar mantasin lunthatsupxi, marka thakhinakan jaqinakat lluch'supxi." 
Hosea7:2 Nayax jupanakarux sum uñt'ta: Ñanqha lurañanakampi phuqhantatäpxiwa, ukampis janiw ukhamäpxatap amuyasipkiti." 
Hosea7:3 “Markaxax ñanqha luräwinakapampi, k'arisiñanakapampix, reyirus, jilïrinakaparus wal kusisiyi." 
Hosea7:4 Taqi jupanakasti wachuqa jucha lurirkamakïpxiwa; junt'uptayat hornor uñtatäpxiwa, janiw juk'amp junt'uptayañax wakiskxiti, t'ant'a luririx t'ant'a masan puqtañapak suyxañapa." 
Hosea7:5 Reyisan jach'a phunchhäwi urupanxa, jilïrinakax vino umantayasaw usjayapxi. ¡Jupasti khitinakatix jupat larusipkäna ukanakampiw wali sum jikintasi!" 
Hosea7:6 Chuymanakapansti reyir jan walinak lurañ amtapxi, arum paqaraw jan samart'as uka jan walinak lup'ipxi, ukhamata willjta tuqiru q'al tukjañataki." 
Hosea7:7 Taqi jupanakax mä hornjamaw nakhapxi, marka apnaqirinakaparus nakhantasa. Reyinakapas aynacht'awayxapxiwa, janirakiw maynis nayar art'asinirix utjkiti." 
Hosea7:8 “Israel markax yaqha markanakampiw mayachasxi. Jan suma qhatit t'ant'jamaw tukuwayxi, maysäxax suma qhatita, maysäxasti ch'uqïskaraki ukhama." 
Hosea7:9 Jaya markankir jaqinakaw ch'amapsa tuksuwayxi, jupasti uk janiw amuyaskiti. ¡Ñik'utanakapas qaqakamakïxiwa, ukatsa janikiw amuyaskiti!" 
Hosea7:10 Jach'a jach'a tukutapaw Israelarux aynacht'ayaski, ukhamäkipansa, janiw Tatit Diosapar kuttanipkiti, janirakiw thaqtapkisa." 
Hosea7:11 Israelax jan amuyuni ipirat palomjamaw jikxatasi. Egipto markaruw yanap mayi, Asiria markaruw yanap mayirix sari." 
Hosea7:12 Kunapachatix uka markanakar sarapkani ukkhaxa, qänaxampi jaqxatasaw jupanakarux jamach'inakarjam jalt'ayä; ñanqha lurapxatapat jupanakarux mutuyaskä." 
Hosea7:13 “¡Kunakïkan nayar apanukupxatapatxa! Nayar saykatatapatxa, q'ala tukjatäpxaniwa. Nayax jupanakar qhispiyañ munta, ukampis jupanakax k'arintapxituwa." 
Hosea7:14 Ikiñanakapansa usuchjataw jachasipki, janchinakapsa mä amtañampiw chhuxrinuqasipxi, ukampis janiw taqi chuyma nayar mayisipkituti; suma achunak katuqañatakikiw ukham lurasipxi, ¡ukampis nayar saykatasipkakituwa!" 
Hosea7:15 Nayaw jupanakarux yatichta, ch'amsa churarakta, ukampis jupanakax nayatakix jan walinakak amtasipki." 
Hosea7:16 Yaqha diosanakar yupaychiriw sarxapxi; wixru mich'inak antutt'añar uñtatäpxiwa, mich'inakapasti janirakiw kawkharutix puriñapäki ukkhar purkiti. Jan walinak parlapxatapatsti, jilïrinakapax espadampi jiwarayatäpxaniwa, Egiptonsti jupanakat larusipxaniwa." 
Hosea8:1 “¡Uñch'ukiri, Tatitun markapxarux trompetam phust'am! Markaxar t'unjirix mä pakar uñtataw jutaski. Markaxax jan ist'asiriwa; janiw arust'äwixarus phuqhkiti, janirakiw kamachinakaxarjamas arkkituti." 
Hosea8:2 Nayan ukarusti arnaqt'asisax jutasipkarakiwa: ‘Jumarux Israelan Diosapat uñt'asipxsma’ sasa. 
Hosea8:3 Ukampis Israel markankirinakax janiw kunatix askïki uk lurapkiti, ukat uñisirinakapax jupanakarux arknaqani." 
Hosea8:4 “Nayar jan yäqasaw reyinak utt'ayasipxi, jilïrinakapsti nayar jan yatiyasaw chhijllasipxi. Jupanakpachaw qullqipata, quripata yaqha diosanak lurasisax jan walt'añanakaru, tukjatäñanakar purisipki." 
Hosea8:5 ¡Samaria, uka vaca qallur yupaychatamax axtasiyituwa! Phiñasiñaxasti uka diosatakiw sarti. Israelitanaka, ¿kunapacharak wasitat q'umäxapxätasti? Samariankir uka vaca qallux janiw chiqpach Diosäkiti, jaqin luratakiwa, ukat jichhax t'unjatarakïni." 
Hosea8:6  
Hosea8:7 Jupanakax thaysa yapuchapkaspa ukhamawa, jach'a tutukanaksa apthapipkaspa ukhamawa; janiw kuna yapunakapas yawthapiñatakix utjkaniti, janirakiw trigo puyanakat jak'ux apsutäkaniti; apsupkan ukasa, yaqha markankir jaqinakakiw manq'apxani." 
Hosea8:8 ¡Israelasti jichhax manq'antatawa! Yaqha markanakasti jan kunatak askïkaspas ukham uñjapxi," 
Hosea8:9 jan amuyun uri asnökaspas ukhamaw Asiria markarux yanap mayirix sarapxi. Israelasti munirinakap alasiñatakix waxt'äwinak churi. 
Hosea8:10 Ukampis qawqha churäwinaksay uka markanakar churaskpan, naya kipkaw yaqha markanakar ananukü, ukatsti mä qawqha pachanakax janiw reyinakasa, kuna jilïrinakas utjkaniti." 
Hosea8:11 “Israelitanakax walja altaranak lurarasiraki, uka altaranakasti jucha lurañatakikiwa." 
Hosea8:12 Nayax jupatak walja yatichäwinak qillqsurapkta ukasa, ukanak jan yatiriw tuku." 
Hosea8:13 Jupanakatakisti wilañchanak luqtañaw askixa, ukatsti, uka luqtat aychanak manq'apxaraki; ukampis naya Tatitux janiw ukanakampix kusisitäkti, kuna jan walinaktix lurapki ukanak amtaskakipunïwa, uka juchanakapatsti, Egipto markar kuttayasaw mutuyarakï." 
Hosea8:14 Israelita jaqinakasti reyin jach'a utanakap utachapxi, ukampis jupanakar irnuqirit armasipxiwa. Judá markax walja jach'a markanakwa pirqanakampi muyuntayas sum sayt'ayi, ukampis nayax ukanak ninampiw nakhantayä, reyin jach'a utanakapas q'alaw nakhantani.”" 
Hosea9:1 Israel marka, jan kusiskamti; janirak yaqha markanakjamas kusisiñat thuqunaqkamti, Diosamar apanukusaxa, yaqhanakampiw wachuqa juchanak lurtaxa. Grano jawq'añ chiqanakan yaqhampi jan wal sarnaqatamatxa, paylla katuqañ muntaxa." 
Hosea9:2 Israel markax janiw trigsa, vinsa uñjkaniti; machaq vinopasti janiw kunatakïkanisa." 
Hosea9:3 Israelax Egipto markaruw kuttxani, Asiria markansti q'añu manq'anak manq'arakini. Janiw jichhax juk'ampi Tatitun markapan jakxapxaniti:" 
Hosea9:4 Janiw Tatitur jach'añchas juk'ampi vino umkxapxaniti, janirakiw ukan wilañchanak jupar luqtapkaniti. T'ant'a manq'atanakapas llaki t'ant'jamäniwa, khitinakatix manq'apkani ukanakax q'añur tukutäniwa. Uka t'ant'anakax jupanakatakikïniwa, ukampis janiw Tatitun utapar apapkaniti." 
Hosea9:5 ¿Kunsa jumanakax jach'a phunchhäwi urun lurapxäta, Tatitun uka jach'a phunchhäwi urupanxa?" 
Hosea9:6 Jumanakax t'unjatäñat jaltxapxäta ukaxa; Egiptonkirinakaw katurapxätam, ukatsti Menfis chiqar allintatäpxätawa. Qullqit lurat yänakamasti itapallumpi phuqhantatäniwa, utjäwinakamansti ch'aphinakaw jilantarakini." 
Hosea9:7 ¡Mutuyäwi urunakax purinxiwa! ¡Luratanakamat katuqañ urux purinxiwa! ¡Israel markax ukanakan puritap yatirakiniwa! Jumanakasti sapxtawa: “Profetax pisi amuyt'an jaqiwa, suma amuyt'ayat jaqisti luqhirakiwa” sasa. Ñanqha lurañanakampi phuqhantatäpxatamata, uñisiñanakaman jach'ätapat ukham sapxtaxa." 
Hosea9:8 Tatitusti profetaparux Israel markar uñjañapatakiw uskusi, ukampis jumanakax sarnaqäwinakaparux sipitanak uskupxtaxa; Tatitun utapansa uñisisipkaktawa." 
Hosea9:9 Guibeá markan urunakapanjam ñanqha lurañanakapampix q'al aynacht'xapxi. Ukampis Tatitux ñanqha luratanakapat amtasiniwa, juchanakapatsti mutuyarakiniwa." 
Hosea9:10 Tatitux siwa: “Kunapachatix Israel markar jikxatkäyät ukapachax kusisiyätwa, kunjämatix wasaran uva jikxatirix kusiski ukhama. Nayra awkinakamax nayatakix, nayrawir achuqir higonakjamänwa. Ukampis kunapachatix Baal-peor chiqar puripki ukkhaxa, k'ari diosanakaruw yupaychapxi, ukatsti wali jisk'achkañaw tukupxi, jupanakax munapkänsa uka yaqha diosanakjama." 
Hosea9:11 Israelan jach'a kankañapasti, jamach'ir uñtataw sarawayxani. Janiw juk'ampi wawanakas yurkxaniti, janiw usur warminakas utjkxaniti, janirakiw warminakas usur jaqiptkxapxaniti." 
Hosea9:12 Wawanakapar uywasipkchini ukasa, uka wawanakap jan mayan aparäxa. ¡Jupanakar apanukkä ukapachaxa, kunakïkani aka jaqinakatxa!" 
Hosea9:13 Israel markasa, Tiro markasa amuyatax kipkakïpxiwa, paypach markanakaw suma uraqinakanïpxi, ukampis Israelax jiwañ thakhiruw wawanakaparux irpaski.”" 
Hosea9:14 ¡Tatay, kunatix churañamäki uk churam! ¡Jan wawachasiri, phara ñuñuni warminak churarakim!" 
Hosea9:15 Tatitux siwa: “Guilgal chiqan taqi jan walinak lurapxäna, ukkhanrak jupanakar uñisiñ nayax qalltta. Jan wali luräwinak lurapxatapatxa; utaxat ananuküwa, janirakiw juk'amp munkxäti, taqi jilïrinakapasti nayatak sayt'asirkamakiwa." 
Hosea9:16 Israelax chhuxriñchjatawa; saphi wañsuta jan achur quqar uñtatawa. Wawanakanïkchinisa, uka wawanakaparux nayaw jiwarayä.”" 
Hosea9:17 Aka markax janiw Tatituxarux ist'añ munkiti; ukat Tatituxax jupanakar apanukuni, ukatsti markat marka muyupxarakini." 
Hosea10:1 Israelax walja achuni uva alir uñtat wali qamiriwa; ukampis ukham tukutapatxa, juk'ampikiw altaranak yaqha diosanakatak lurarasipxäna; uraqipan juk'amp sumätapatsa, juk'ampikiw yaqha diosanakatak qala chutanakapsa lurasipxäna." 
Hosea10:2 Israelan chuymapax payar jaljtatawa, jichhasti juchanakapat mutuyatarakïniwa. Tatitux uka altaranakap t'unthapiniwa, qullana qalanakapsa q'al tukjarakini." 
Hosea10:3 Jichhax aka markax saniwa: “Tatitur jan axsartatasatxa, jichhax janiw reyinïkxtanti. Ukampis ¿kunarak mä reyisti jiwasatak luraspasti?" 
Hosea10:4 Parlak parlaspaxa, inamayakiw kunsa parlaskaspaxa, arust'äwinaksa sutipampix qillqxataskaspawa; ukampis chiqa kankañapax jiwayir alir uñtatakïspawa kunjämatix uka alix yapu taypin jilki ukhama”." 
Hosea10:5 Samariankir jaqinakax khathatipxiwa; Bet-avén chiqankir vaca qallu diosap chhaqhayasitapat jachapxi. Uka vaca qallutjamaw jaqinakasa, sacerdotenakas wararisipki, jach'a kankañapan chhaqtatapata." 
Hosea10:6 Uka pachpa vaca qallux Asiria markar jach'a reyir churañatak apatarakïniwa. Israelasti ukham p'inqachjataw uñjasini; uka yaqha diosapat p'inqasirakiniwa. 
Hosea10:7 Samaria markankir reyix kunjämatix mä jisk'a lawax uman apatax uñjaski ukham chhaqtayatäniwa. 
Hosea10:8 Yaqha diosanakar yupaychañ utanakapas t'unjatawa, Israel markasti uka chiqanakan jucha luränxa. Altaranakapansti ch'aphinakakiw jilantxani, jaqinakasti qullunakarux: “¡Imantapxita!” sapxaniwa, jisk'a qullunakarusti: “¡Nanakxar allxattapxita!” sapxarakiniwa." 
Hosea10:9 Tatitux siwa: “Israelax Guibeá chiqan jucha lurañ qalltkän ukkhatxa, janiw jucha lurañap apanukkiti. ¡Pachpa juchanakapan sarnaqasipki! Ukat jichhax jupanakan jan walïpxatapatxa nuwasïwix pachpa Guibeá chiqan tukjani." 
Hosea10:10 Kunapachatix nayax munkä ukkhaw aka markarux mutuyä, jan wali luratapat mutuykä ukkhaxa, yaqha markanakasti jupatakiw sayt'asipxani." 
Hosea10:11 “Israelax mä suma yatichsut vaca qalljamänwa, jupatakix trigo taksuñax sumapunïnwa. Jichhasti nayax suma kunkapxarux mä yuku ayxatarakta, ukhamat qhulliñatak arma qatatiñapataki, Judästi qhulliñ arma jiyt'ani, Jacobusti uka qhullit k'upjarakini." 
Hosea10:12 Jupanakarusti saraktwa: ¡Tatitur thaqtañatak wakicht'asipxam! Jumanakax mä machaq uraqjamäpxtawa; uka uraqirux kunatix chiqäki uk yapuchapxam, ukatsti munasiñarak apthapipxam. Ukat Tatitux jumanakan ukar jutasin qhispiyapxätam; kunjämatix jallux waña uraqir purxatasax ch'arant'ki ukhamäniwa." 
Hosea10:13 Ukampis jumanakax ñanqhak yapuchapxtaxa, kunatix jan chiqäki ukakarak apthapipxtaxa, k'ari achunakak manq'apxtaxa. “Jumanakax nuwasiñar sarir carronakamaru, walja soldadonakamar alkatapxatamatxa," 
Hosea10:14 jan walt'añanakakiw jumanak taypin utjani, ukatsti taqi sayt'asiña pirqanakamasa tukjatäniwa, kunjämatix Salmán reyix Bet-arbel markaru uka nuwasiñ urun tukjkäna, warminakarus wawanakapamppach jiwaraykarakïn ukhama." 
Hosea10:15 Betel markan utjasir jaqinaka, jach'a ñanqhanak lurapxatamatxa, uka pachparakiw jumanakampix lurasini. ¡Israel markan reyipasti, qhantatirux jiwatarakïniwa!" 
Hosea11:1 “Israel markax wawäkän ukkhax, nayax munasiyätwa; juparusti wawaxätapat Egipto markatsa irpsunirakta." 
Hosea11:2 Kunapachatix nayax juk'ampi jupar jawskäyät ukkhaxa, juk'ampikiw jupax nayat jayarst'awayi. Markaxasti k'ari diosanakaruw wilañchanak luqtasïna, yaqha diosanakarukiw incienso q'aphichäna." 
Hosea11:3 Ukampis nayaw Israel markarux irpnaqäyäta, sarnaqañsa yaticharakïyäta; ukampis jupanakax janiw amuyasipkänti nayan jupanakar uñjaskataxa." 
Hosea11:4 Suma quña chuymampi, munasiñampiw naya jak'ar irpkatasta; ñuñuyañ wawanakäkaspas ukham ajanuxarux apkatt'asta; jupanakar manq'ayañatakis wakicht'asiraktwa," 
Hosea11:5 ukampis jupanakax janiw nayan ukar kuttaniñ munapkiti. Ukatpï jichhax wasitat Egipto markar kuttapxañapänixa, Asiria markarakiw jupanakarux apnaqani." 
Hosea11:6 Markanakapasti espadan tukjatäniwa, jupanakan pachpa amtatanakapatxa, sayt'asiñ pirqanakapas tukjatarakïniwa." 
Hosea11:7 Ukhampachas markaxax nayat jayankañ munaskakiwa; diosanakarus art'asisipkakiwa, ukampis janiw khitis jupanakar yanapt'irix utjkiti." 
Hosea11:8 “Israel, ¿kunjämarak apanukt'asïmasti? ¿Kunjämarak jaytanukt'asïmasti? ¿Admá marka tukjkta ukhamti tukjirisma, jan ukax, Seboím markarux kuntix lurkta ukhamarakcha luririsma? ¡Chuymaxaw ch'allxtitu, jumatakisti khuyapayasiñan phuqt'atarakïtwa!" 
Hosea11:9 Janiw phiñasiñaxampix atipayaskäti, mä jaqit sipansa, nayax Diosätwa, ukat Israelarux jan tukjkäti. Nayax jumanak taypin utjasir Qullan Tatitütwa, janirakiw jumar tukjir jutkti.”" 
Hosea11:10 Jupanakasti Tatituruw arkapxani, jupasti mä leonjamaw wararini. Wararitapatsti, jupankirinakax khathatt'asisaw inti jalanta tuqit jutxapxani." 
Hosea11:11 “Egiptotsti jamach'inakjamaw khathatt'asis jutxapxani; Asiriatsti palomanakjamarakiw jutxapxani; wasitat utanakapan utjasiyxä. Uksti, naya Tatituw arsta." 
Hosea11:12 “Israel markankirinakax taqi pachan k'arintapxitu; sallqjapxarakitu. Judá markankirinakasti Tatitut jithiqtxapxiwa, jichhasti yaqha diosanakaruw taqi chuyma arkapxaraki." 
Hosea12:1 Israelax thayapitakis sarnaqkaspa ukhamawa; sapürus inti jalsu tuqit jutir thayarukiw arkaski. K'arisiñanakapampi, nuwasiñanakapampisti waliw jilxatti, Asiria markampis arust'asiwa, Egipto markarusti aceitenak apayi.”" 
Hosea12:2 Tatitux Israelampix ch'axwankiwa. Jacobun markaparusti sarnaqäwipatjam mutuyani; luräwinakapatjam kunatix katuqañapäki uk katuqapxarakini. 
Hosea12:3 Jacobux, janïra yurkasapuniw jilaparux sallqjäna, jach'äxän ukkhasti Tatituw jupar Betel chiqan uñstäna. Ukansti mä angelampiw nuwasïna, ¡juparusti atipjänwa! Ukatsti jacht'asisaw juchapat pampachayasiñatak Tatitur mayisïna, Tatitusti pampachänwa." 
Hosea12:4  
Hosea12:5 Tatitu, taqi ch'aman Dios; ¡Tatitu sataw sutipaxa!" 
Hosea12:6 Ukhamasti, israelitanaka, juchanakamat pampachayasiñatak Tatitur mayisipxam; chiqpach chuymamampi, askimpirak sarnaqapxam, ukatsti Tatitumarupun alkatasipxarakim." 
Hosea12:7 Tatitux siwa: “Canaán jaqinakax k'ari tupuñanak apnaqañ yatipxi, sallqjañ munapxapuniwa." 
Hosea12:8 Israelitanakasti sarakiwa: ‘¡Jïsa, qamiriw tukta, taqi kun jikxatt'asirakta; ukampis janiw khitis jalaqtanak uñjataxat juchañchkitaspati, lunthatasiñampi jikxatatäkchi ukasa!’" 
Hosea12:9 Egipton jakkäyätas ukkhatpachaw nayax Diosamätxa, jichhax wasitat chhujllunakan jakayarakïma, kunjämatix wasaran sarnaqapkäyätax ukhama." 
Hosea12:10 “Nayaw profetanakarux parlta, unañchäwinakapsa yapxataraktwa, jupanak tuqirakiw uñtasïwinak parlarakta." 
Hosea12:11 Galaad chiqan yaqha diosanakaw utji, k'ari diosanakkamakiwa. Guilgal chiqansti urqu vacanakrak wilañcha luqtapxi; altaranakapasti q'ala tukjatawa, qala qutunakjam yapunak taypin willtatarakiwa.”" 
Hosea12:12 Jacob chachasti Aram tuqiruw jaltxäna, ukansti warmi jikxatañatakix ovejanak awatïna." 
Hosea12:13 Tatitux mä profeta tuqiw Egiptot Israel markarux irpsunïna. ¡Mä profeta tuqirakiw juparux sum uñjarakïna! 
Hosea12:14 Israelita jaqinakax Tatitur wal phiñasiyapxäna, chuymapsti walpun ust'ayapxäna. Ukat Tatitux jaqi jiwayatanakapat juchañchasin t'aqhisiyani, jupanakpacharuw ñanqha luratanakapax kutxatarakini." 
Hosea13:1 Kunapachatix Efrainankir jaqinakax arsupkän ukkhaxa, Israelan maynïr ayllunakapax axsartañampiw isch'ukipxäna; ukampis Efrainax Baal diosar yupaychasa jucha luratapat jiwarakïna." 
Hosea13:2 ¡Jichhas juchxa lurasipkakiwa! Qullqinakap umatatayasinsti yaqha diosanak lursusipxi, kunjämarutix munapki ukhamarjama. Ukatsti sapxarakiwa: “¡Wilañchanak luqtapxam!” sasa. Jaqinakasti uka vaca qallur uñtat diosanakaruw jamp'atipxi." 
Hosea13:3 Ukat jichhax qhantati urpur uñtata, willjta sullar uñtat chhaqtapxani, thayan apat waña laphir uñtata, phayañ utat mistur jiwq'ir uñtat chhaqtapxani." 
Hosea13:4 Tatitux Israel markaparux siwa: “Naya Tatituw juman Diosamätxa, Egiptonkkäyätas ukkhatpacha; naya sapakiw juman qhispiyir Diosamätxa." 
Hosea13:5 Nayaw uka waña parintat wasar uraqin imäyäsma. 
Hosea13:6 “Kunapachatix jumanakan manq'añanakamax jilarxän ukkhaxa, jach'achasiñampiw phuqhantasipxtaxa, nayatsti armasxapxaraktawa." 
Hosea13:7 Ukat jichhax jupanakatakix mä leonar uñtatäyäxa, kunjämtix mä leopardox manq'antañatak thakhin suyxatkix ukhama." 
Hosea13:8 Qallunakap chhaqhayasir jukumarir uñtataw jupanakarux jikxatä, ukatsti chuymapsa jisk'a jisk'a tukjä. Mä leonar uñtataw jupanakarux pachpan manq'antä; ch'uminkir laq'ur uñtataw jupanakarux tukjarakï." 
Hosea13:9 Israel, ukham jichhax tukjäma, janirakiw khitis jark'aqkätamti." 
Hosea13:10 Jichhasti, ¿kawkinkarak reyimasti, uka markanakaman jumar qhispiyañatakisti? ¿Kawkinkarak jilïrinakamasti, khitinakarutix reyinaksa maykäyäta ukanakasti?" 
Hosea13:11 Jumampi phiñasitäsin reyinak churäyäsma, jumampi phiñasitäsin uka reyinak apaqxaraksma." 
Hosea13:12 “Israelan ñanqha luratanakapax qillqatawa; jucha luratanakapasti suma qillqantatawa. 
Hosea13:13 Israelan yuriñap pachax purinxiwa, ukampis janiw suma wawäkiti, yuriñatakis janirakiw sum wakicht'atäkiti." 
Hosea13:14 ¿Ukatti jichhasti jiwañat qhispiyapxämasti? ¡Ukampis janiw khuyapayasiñ uñacht'aykxämati! Jiwa, ¡Jach'a ch'amamampi aka markar t'unjir jutam!”" 
Hosea13:15 Israel, inas wasitat qamiriptchisma, ukampis nayax q'al t'unjäma, kunjämtix wasarat sartankis uka thayax uma jalsu phuch'unaksa q'al wañt'ayki ukhama. Ukatsti uñisirinakamax suma imasitanakam q'al katuntasxapxani." 
Hosea13:16 Samaria markasti, Tatitur saykatasitapat mutuyäwi katuqani. Espadampi jiwarayatäpxaniwa, wawanakapas uraqir jisktaskam jiwarayatäniwa, usur warminakas payar kharjatäpxarakiniwa." 
Hosea14:1 ¡Israel, Tatit Diosaman ukar kuttanxam, jucha luratamat aynacht'taxa!" 
Hosea14:2 Tatitur kuttanxapxam, akham mayt'asisa: “Taqi ñanqha luratanakaxat pampacht'apxita, nanakan jumar yupaychatanakaxsa, suma chuymampirak katuqt'apxita." 
Hosea14:3 Asiria markax janiw qhispiyapkitaspati, janiw caballonakapar lat'xatasas jaltapkiristti. Amparaxampi lurasipkta ukanakarux, janirakiw ‘Nanakan Diosaxa’ sapkäti. Tatay, wajchax juma sapanak khuyapayasiñ jikxati.”" 
Hosea14:4 Tatitux israelitanakarux siwa: “Phiñasiñaxax t'akurxiwa. Jichhasti kunja jach'äkitix munasiñaxax uk uñacht'ayarakï, janiw saykatasir markäkxapxaniti." 
Hosea14:5 Israel markatakix sullar uñtatäyäwa, jupasti lirio panqarjamaw panqart'ani. Saphinakapasti uraqirux suma saphintatäniwa;" 
Hosea14:6 alinakapasti olivo quqan alinakapjamaw jach'ar saratatani, q'aphipasti Libanonkir pinonakan q'aphipjamäniwa." 
Hosea14:7 Israelax wasitat nayan arxatat jakxani; ukatsti trigor uñtataw jilani, uva alir uñtataw panqart'ani, Libanonkir vinjam wali aytatarakïniwa." 
Hosea14:8 Israelitanakasti sarakiniwa: ‘Kunäskpas jichhax yaqha diosanakaxa’ sasa. ¡Nayaw uñjasta, markaxarus imasirakta! Nayax pino quqjam ch'uxñakipunïsktwa, markaxax nayanwa achup jikxatarakini.”" 
Hosea14:9 Yatiñani, ch'ikhi jaqinakas aka arunak amuyt'apxpan: Tatitun thakhipax chiqapawa, chiqa jaqinakakiw ukanjam sarapxi; ukampis ñanqha jaqinakax uka thakhin liwisipxiwa." 
Joel1:1 Tatitux aka arunak Petuel chachan Joel yuqaparux säna: 
Joel1:2 Jilïr jaqinaka, aka arunak sum ist'apxam, taqi jumanaka, aka markan utjir jaqinaka. ¿Kuntix jichhax uñjapkta ukanak jumanakax uñjapxirïtati? ¿Janit taqi akanakax awkinakaman urunakapan uñjasirïkänxa?" 
Joel1:3 Jichhax wawanakamar akanak yatiyapxam, wawanakamas wawanakapar yatiyapxpan, jupanakasti wawanakapar yatiyapxarakpan." 
Joel1:4 T'iju t'ijunakax q'al manq'suwayapxi, kuntix mayninakax jilt'ayapkän uksa yaqhanakaw jutasin q'al manq'suwayapxi." 
Joel1:5 ¡Umatanaka sartapxam! ¡Vino umirinaka, jachapxam, jichhax janiw jumanakatak vinox utjkxaniti!" 
Joel1:6 T'iju t'ijunakasti ch'aman ejercitor uñtata, ari lakan leonanakjamaw markaxar t'unjañatakix muyunti." 
Joel1:7 Uva yapunaksti q'al tukjawayapxi, higo yapunaksa q'al tukjawayapxi; q'ara lawa tukuyañkamaw q'al sillp'suwayapxi." 
Joel1:8 Kunjämatix mä jaqichasir tawaqux parlatapan jiwatapat lutt'asisin jachkixa," 
Joel1:9 ukhamaw sacerdotenakax jachapxi, Diosan utapanxa janiw vinos, trigos Tatitur luqtañatakix utjkxiti." 
Joel1:10 Yapunakax llakkañ tukjatawa, uraqix lutt'atäkaspas ukhamawa. Trigos pist'awayxiwa, uva yapunakas q'al pharsuwayxi, olivo quqanakasti q'ala wañsutawa." 
Joel1:11 Jumanakasti yapuchirinaka, uva yapu uñjirinaka, jichhax llakisiñat jachapxam, yapunakaman tukusitapata, trigosa, cebadasa jan achxatapata." 
Joel1:12 Uva yapunakas wañsuwayxiwa higo yapunakas tukusiwayxiwa. Granado quqanakasa, palmeranakasa, manzanonakasa, taqpach quqanakas q'alaw wañsuwayxi. ¡Jaqinakan kusisiñapas chhaqtawayxarakiwa!" 
Joel1:13 Sacerdotenaka, Tatitun altarapan irnaqirinaka, chhankha isinakampi isthapisipxam, llakisiñat jachapxarakim, Tatitun utapanxa trigosa, vinosa waxt'äwi churañatakix janiw utjkxiti." 
Joel1:14 Markarusti tantacht'apxam, ayuno lurapxam; jilïr jaqinakaru, aka markan jakir taqi jaqinakarusa, Tatit Diosapan utapar tantachapxam, Tatitut mayisipxarakim." 
Joel1:15 ¡Ay kunakïkani, Tatitun urupaw jak'achasisinki! ¡Axsarkañ uruw jutaski, taqi ch'aman Tatitusti t'unjañanak apaniraki!" 
Joel1:16 Jiwasan uñjkataw manq'añsa apaqapxistu, Tatitun utapansti kusisiñax tukusxiwa." 
Joel1:17 Trigo jathasti pachpa sukan jiwsuwayi, ukat pirwanakasax ch'usak jikxatasxi." 
Joel1:18 ¡Uywanakasti wal wararipxi! Vacanakas inamayakiw chhuxllanak thaqhasipki; oveja tamanakas tampacharakiw jiwaraski. 
Joel1:19 ¡Dios Tatay, jumaruw art'asinsma, wasarankir quqanaksa, pampankir chhuxllanaksa ninaw q'al nakhantawayxi!" 
Joel1:20 ¡Pampankir animalanakas jumaruw art'asinipxtam, jawir umanakan wañsxatap layku, chhuxllanakas ninan q'al naksxatap layku!" 
Joel2:1 Jerusalén markan trompet phust'apxam; Tatitun utapan jach'at phust'apxam. Judá markan utjirinakas taqin khathatipxpan, Tatitun urupaw jak'achasisinki:" 
Joel2:2 ch'amaka laxa uruwa, qinaya ch'iwi ururakiwa. Wali ch'amani walja soldadonakan ejercitow qullunakan aywtani, willjta qhanar uñtataw uraqxar purintani. Janipuniw kunapachas ukax uñjasirïkänti, kunatix jichhax uñstki ukaxa, jutir urunakansa janirakiw uñjaskaniti." 
Joel2:3 Taqi kun nakhantir ninjamawa, janïr purinkasas niy nakhantxiwa, qhipatsa nakhantaskakiwa. Aka uraqix, janïra t'iju t'ijunak aywintanipkän ukkhaxa, mä suma panqarkir uraqïnwa, sarxapxatapatsti ch'usa wasar uraqikïxiwa. ¡Janirakiw khitis jupanakat qhispkiti!" 
Joel2:4 T'iju t'ijunakax caballot jalir jaqinakjamaw jalapxi," 
Joel2:5 qullunakan jalnaqatapaxa, ch'axwar sarantir carronakjamaw ist'asi, waña laphinakax ninan nakhantatax t'aqarki ukhamäpxiwa. Mä ch'aman ejercitjamawa, nuwt'asiñatak wakicht'atäpkaspas ukhama." 
Joel2:6 Jaqinakasti ukanakar uñjasax khathatipxiwa, ajanunakapas q'illuruw tukuwayxi." 
Joel2:7 Ch'axwanakan nuwasiri jan axsarir jaqinakjamaw jalapxi, pirqanaksa thuqhukipawäpxakiwa, nayraqataruw sarantapxi, jan maynis thakhi pantjasa." 
Joel2:8 Janirakiw jupanakkamax takxatasipkiti, sapa maynis thakhip saraskaraki, mich'inak antutt'at taypinjamas sarantasipkakiwa wali suma siqicht'ataw sarantapxi." 
Joel2:9 Markarus nuwantañatakjamaw muyuntapxi, pirqa patanak jalanaqapxi, uta patanakaruw mistupxi, lunthatanakjamaw ventananakat mantaranttapxi." 
Joel2:10 Aka uraqisti jupanak uñjasax khathatiwa, alaxpachas axsarañat chhijthaptiwa, intisa, phaxsis ch'amakt'xiwa, warawaranakas janirakiw sum k'ajtkxiti." 
Joel2:11 Tatitusti, ejercitop nayraqatanxa, jach'a arup ist'asiyi. Ejercitopax waljanipuniwa, jupan arsutap phuqhirinakax jan jakt'kayawa. ¡Kunja jach'a axsarkañas Tatitun urupaxa! Janiw khitis juparux saykatkaspati." 
Joel2:12 “Tatitux akham siwa: —Taqi chuymampi nayan ukar kuttanxapxam. ¡Ayunapxam, Tatitur art'asipxam, jachapxarakim!” —sasa." 
Joel2:13 ¡Juchanakamat amthapisisax Tatitumar makhatxapxam, isinakam ch'iyanuqkamayaxa, chuymanakamay ch'allxtayasipxam! Tatitux khuyapayasiriwa, llamp'u chuymaniwa, munasiñapas jach'arakiwa; juchanak luratat mutuyañäki uksa, jiwasat apaqirirakiwa." 
Joel2:14 Tatitux inas juchanakamat mutuyañ jan amtaskxchiniti, inas suma waxt'äwinak apayanchini: trigompi, vinompi jupar luqtäwinak churañataki." 
Joel2:15 ¡Jerusalén markan trompet phust'apxam! Tatitun markaparusti ayuno lurañatak jawsthapipxam; 
Joel2:16 Tatitun markapar tantacht'apxam, ukatsti q'umachapxarakim; chuyman jaqinakaru, wawanakaru, ñuñuskir wawanakamppachar tantacht'apxam. ¡Jichha jaqichasirinakas jaqichasiñ utapat mistunipxpan!" 
Joel2:17 Sacerdotenakasti jachapxpan, Tatitur luqtirinakas altarap nayräxan mayipxarakpan: “Dios Tata, markamarux juchanakapat pampacham; janikiy markamat khitin larusiñapsa munamti, yaqha markanakan markamar apnaqañapsa janirak munamti, Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakan jan saskañapataki: ‘¿Kawkinkarak Diosamasti?’ ” sasa." 
Joel2:18 Ukatsti Tatitux munasiñap markaparux uñacht'ayi; markapat khuyapt'ayasisasti," 
Joel2:19 sarakiwa: “Jichhax trigo, vino, aceite apayanipxäma, ukanakampi sist'asipxañamkama, Diosar jan uñt'ir jaqinakan jumanakat larusipxañap janiw munkäti." 
Joel2:20 Amsta tuqit jutir t'iju t'ijunaksa jumanakat wasararuw apanukü. Nayraqat saririnakapsti Mar Muerto sat qutan axskatayä, qhipa saririnakapsti Mediterráneo sat jach'a qutan axskatayarakï, janchinakapas ñusantasax jan wal q'aphini. ¡Nayax jach'a luräwinak lurä!”" 
Joel2:21 Munat markaxa, walpun kusisim, janirak axsaramti, Tatitusti jach'a muspharkañ luräwinak lurani." 
Joel2:22 Pampankir animalanaka, jan axsarapxamti, chhuxllanakax ch'uxñatatxaniwa, quqanakas achunak churxani, higosa, uvasa jilarkirirakiw utjani." 
Joel2:23 ¡Sionan utjir jaqinaka, kusisipxam, Tatitu Diosamampi kusisipxam! Jupaw wakisit urun jallu apayanipxtam, nayra jallsa, qhipa jallsa puriyaraki, kunjämtix nayra pachax apayankän ukhama." 
Joel2:24 Trigox walpun achuntani, aceitesa, vinosa jilarkiriw utjani." 
Joel2:25 “Jumanakar tukjañatak t'iju t'ijunak khithankta uka maranakatxa, nayaw kuttayxapxäma." 
Joel2:26 Jumanakasti sist'asiñkamaw manq'apxäta, Tatitu Diosamarurakiw yupaychapxäta, nayasti jumanakatakix jach'a muspharkañanak lurta. Markaxasti janipuniw mayampis p'inqachatäkxaniti," 
Joel2:27 Israelita jaqinaka, ukkhaw jumanakax naya Tatitun jumanakampïskatax yatipxäta, nayätwa Diosamaxa, janirakiw yaqhax utjkiti. ¡Markaxasti janipuniw mayampis p'inqachatäkxaniti!”" 
Joel2:28 “Taqi akanak qhipatsti, nayax jaqinakxaruw ajayux khithanï; yuqanakamasa, phuchhanakamasa, nayat parlapxani, chuyman jaqinakasti samkanak samkasipxani, waynanakasti jutir urut unañchäwinak uñjapxarakini." 
Joel2:29 Khaya urunakanxa, luqtirinakamxaruw ajayux khithanï;" 
Joel2:30 alaxpachansti jach'a muspharkañanak uñacht'ayä, aka uraqinsti wilampi, ninampi, jiwq'i qinayanakamp uñacht'ayarakï." 
Joel2:31 Intix ch'amakt'aniwa, phaxsis wilaruw tukuni, Tatitun axsarkay jach'a urupa janïra purinkipana.”" 
Joel2:32 Khitinakatix Tatitun sutipar art'askani ukanakaw jiwañat qhispipxani, Sión qulluna, Jerusalén markana qhispiyasiñax utjani, Tatitun arsutaparjamaw phuqhasini. Khitinakarutix Tatitux ajlliskatayna ukanakax jakasipkaniwa." 
Joel3:1 Tatitusti siwa: “Kunapachatix uka urux purinkani ukkhaxa, Judá markampiru, Jerusalén markampirux kuttayanxäwa." 
Joel3:2 Markanakaxar katuntir markanakaruw tantacht'ä, Josafat qhirwa aynacharuw irpä, ukan jupanakarux uñt'asiyä kuntix Israel markaxampix lurapki ukanaka. Jupanakaw israelitanakarux taqi tuqir ananukupxäna, markaxan uraqipsti jalanuqasipxänwa.”" 
Joel3:3 Suertet jaqtasin nayan markax jaljasipxäna, imill wawanaksa, yuqall wawanaksa aljantapxänwa, uka qullqsti machañanakampi, jan wali warminakampi sarnaqañanakan tukjapxäna." 
Joel3:4 “Tiro, Sidón, Filistea markanaka, ¿kunsa nayampix lurañ munapxta? ¿Phuqsusiñti munapxista? ¿Kunanak mayisxañcha munapxtaxa? ¡Kunatix wakiski uk jank'akiw churapxäma!" 
Joel3:5 Jumanakax qullqixsa, qurixsa, lunthatawayapxistawa, suma imasit yänakaxsti yaqha diosanakar yupaychañ utanakamaruw apasxapxtaxa." 
Joel3:6 Jumanakax Judá markankiri, Jerusalén markankir jaqinakarux jayaruw apapxtaxa, jupanakarusti t'aqhisiyañ luqtiritwa griego jaqinakar aljantapxtaxa." 
Joel3:7 Ukampis nayaw jupanakarux kawkirutix aljantatäpki ukkhatxa kuttayanï, ukatsti jumanakarux uka pachparak t'aqhisiyapxäma." 
Joel3:8 Yuqall wawanakamsa, imill wawanakamsa judionakaruw aljarakï, jupanakasti sabeo sat jaqinakaruw aljapxani, uka jaqinakasti wali jayankirinakawa. Naya, Dios Tatituw arsta.”" 
Joel3:9 Markanakarusti akanak yatiyapxam: ¡Ch'axwañatak wakicht'asipxam! ¡Wali ch'aman jaqinakar jawsapxam! ¡Ch'axwanakan nuwasir jaqinakasti jutapxpan, jupanakaw nuwasir sarapxani!" 
Joel3:10 Azadonanakapatsti espadanak lurasipxpan, jusinakapatsti lanzanak lurasipxpan, pisi ch'aman jaqisti sispan: “¡Nayax ch'amanïtwa!” sasa." 
Joel3:11 Taqi jak'ankir markanaka, ¡jank'ak jutapxam, tantacht'asipxam! ¡Jan nuwasir jaqisa jichhax nuwasir tukpan!" 
Joel3:12 Taqi markanaka, wakichasipxam, Josafat qhirwarkam sarapxam, ukan Tatitux uka markanakar taripani." 
Joel3:13 Jupanakasti wali qhurunakäpxiwa, q'illurat trigor uñtat yawthapipxam, yapu apthapiñ pachax purinxiwa; uvax vino lurañatak puqt'atäxiwa, uka uvarjam ch'irwsupxam." 
Joel3:14 Tatitun urupan jak'ankxatapatxa, walja jaqinakaw Taripäwi sat qhirwan tantacht'atäpxi." 
Joel3:15 Tatitux purinkani uka uruxa, intisa, phaxsis ch'amakt'aniwa, warawaranakas janiw k'ajtkxaniti." 
Joel3:16 Uka urun Tatitux Sión qulluta, Jerusalenatpach art'atap ist'asiyani, ukkhasti, alaxpachas, akapachas khathatiniwa. Ukampis israelitanakarux Tatitun markapätapatxa, arxataniwa." 
Joel3:17 “Jumanakax yatipxätawa, naya, Tatitu Diosamaxa Sión qullana qulluxan jakasktxa. Jerusalén markasti qullan markäxaniwa; janipuniw jayat jutir jaqinakax marka apnaqirix mantankxapxaniti." 
Joel3:18 Uka urusti, jach'a qullunakana, jisk'a qullunakansa vinompi, lechempix umjamaw jalani, Judá jawiranakansti walipuniw umax jalani. Qullan utaxatsti mä jalsur umaw mistuni, uka umasti Sitim qhirwa qarparakini." 
Joel3:19 Judá markankir jaqinakar nuwapxatapata, markapan jan juchan jaqinakar jiwayapxatapatxa, Egipto markax ch'usa laqayanakar tukuyatäniwa, Edom uraqisti ch'usa wasarar tukuyatarakïniwa." 
Joel3:20 Nayaw jaqinakar jiwayatanakapat phuqsusiskä, juchanirux janiw pampachkäti. Ukampis Judá uraqimpi, Jerusalén markampin jaqix utjaskapuniniwa, naya Tatitusti Sión qullun jakasirakï.”" 
Joel3:21  
Amos1:1 Amós Profetax Judá uraqin, Tecoa sat mä jisk'a markankirïnwa, jupasti ovej awatirïnwa, ukhamaruw Tatitux jupan yatiyäwi arunakap Israel markar parlir sarañapatak jawsäna, Tatitusti uka arunakxa pä mara janïr uraqi khathati purinkipan parläna, uka pachasti Judá markanxa Oziasaw reyïskäna, Israel markansti Jeroboam sat Joás chachan yuqapaw reyïskarakïna." 
Amos1:2 Amós profetax sänwa: Tatitux Jerusalén markana, Sión qullutpacha wali jach'a arumpi art'ki ukapachaxa, uywa manq'añ chhuxllanakas q'alaw pharsxi, Carmelo sat qullus wañsxarakiwa." 
Amos1:3 Tatitux akham siwa: “Damasco markankirinakax wali ñanqhanakpun lurapxi, ukat jupanakax mutuyatäpxani, Galaad markankirinakarux trigo jawq'añampiw jawq'supxi." 
Amos1:4 Ukat Hazael reyin utaparux ninampi phichkatäxa, uka ninasti Ben-hadad yuqapan jach'a utapsa q'al nakhantani." 
Amos1:5 Damasco markan punkunakap munkir jan munkir jist'arä; Bicat-avén chiqan jakirinakaruw tukjä, Bet-edén marka apnaqirirus t'unjarakïwa, Sirio jaqinakasti, Quir markar katuntata apatäpxaniwa.” Ukham siw Tatituxa." 
Amos1:6 Tatitux akham sarakiwa: “Gaza markankir jaqinakax wali ñanqhanak lurawayapxi, ukat jupanakarux mutuyarakï, mä markpachar katuntasaw apasxapxi, Edom markanxa, yaqhanakar luqtapxañapatakiw aljantapxi." 
Amos1:7 Ukat Gaza markan uyunakap ninampi phichkatä, uka ninasti reyi utanakapsa q'al nakhantarakini." 
Amos1:8 Asdod markan utjasirinakarux tukjäwa, Ascalón marka apnaqirirus q'al tukjrakï. ¡Taqi ch'amaxampiw Ecrón markatakix sartä, jan mayanipuniw filisteonakax jiwarapxani! Ukham siw Tatituxa.”" 
Amos1:9 Tatitux akham siwa: “Tiro markankir jaqinakax wali ñanqhanakpun lurawayapxi, ukat jupanakarux mutuyarakï; mä markpachar t'aqhisiyat luqtiritak Edom markar aljantapxatapata, kawkïr markanakampitix jilapurjam jakasiñatak arust'äwix utjkäna ukar jan phuqhapxatapata." 
Amos1:10 Ukat Tiro markan uyunakapsa ninampi phichkatä, ninasti reyin jach'a utanakapsa q'al nakhantarakini.”" 
Amos1:11 Tatitux akham siwa: “Edom markankir jaqinakax wali ñanqhanakpun lurawayapxi, ukat jupanakarux mutuyarakï; israelita jilanakaparu jan khuyapt'ayasis espada ayt'at arknaqapxatapata. Jach'a phiñasiñapasa, uñisiñapas jilanakapatakix jan tukuskirïnwa." 
Amos1:12 Ukat Temán markarux ninampi phichkatä, uka ninaw Bosrá markan reyi utanakapsa nakhantani.”" 
Amos1:13 Tatitux akham siwa: “Amón markankir jaqinakax wali ñanqhanakpun lurawayapxi, ukat jupanakarux mutuyarakï, uraqip jach'aptayasiñatakix Galaad markankir usur warminakan purakanakap kharitatapxäna." 
Amos1:14 Ukat Rabá markan uyunakap ninampi phichkatä, jach'a utanakapasa qhillar tukuñkamaw nakhantani, ukasti nuwasiñ uruna, arnaqasiñanak taypin jach'a thaya urun lurasini." 
Amos1:15 Reyipasti, jaya markar apayataw uñjasini, jupampi chikasti taqpach jilïr jaqinakapaw sarani.” Ukham siw Tatituxa." 
Amos2:1 Tatitux akham siwa: “Moab markankir jaqinakax walja ñanqhanakpun lurapxi, ukat jupanakarux mutuyarakï; Edom markan reyipan ch'akhanakap qhillar tukuyañkam phichhantapxatapata." 
Amos2:2 Ukat Moab uraqirux ninampi phichhantä, uka ninax Queriot markan reyi utanakap nakhantani; moabitanakax wali ch'axwañ taypina, warariñ taypina, trompet phust'asiñanak taypin jiwarapxani." 
Amos2:3 ¡Nayaw reyiparux markap taypit alisnukü; reyimp chiksti taqi jilïr jaqinakaparuw jiwarayarakï!” Ukham siw Tatituxa. 
Amos2:4 Tatitux akham siwa: “Judá markankir jaqinakax walja ñanqhanak lurapxi, ukat jupanakarux mutuyarakï; Tatitun yatichäwinakap janiw katuqapkiti, janirakiw kamachinakaparus phuqhapkiti, jan ukasti kawkïr yaqha diosanakarutix awkinakapax yupaychapkän ukanakaruw yupaychapxi." 
Amos2:5 Ukat Judá markarux ninampi phichhantä, uka ninaw Jerusalén markan jach'a utanakapsa q'al nakhantani.”" 
Amos2:6 Tatitux akham siwa: “Israel markankir jaqinakax walja ñanqhanak lurapxi, ukat jupanakarux mutuyä; jan juchan jaqirux qullqiruw aljantapxi, jan kunan wajcha jaqirusti mä paris wiskhuruw aljantapxi." 
Amos2:7 Jan kunan jaqinakarusti wali t'aqhisiyañampiw jisk'achapxi, llamp'u chuyman jaqinakarux janiw chiqapar uñjapkiti. Awkis, yuqas, pachpa warmimpiw ikintasipxi, ukhamat nayan Qullan sutix takichasipxi." 
Amos2:8 Manut jaytat isinakxar winkxatasaw yaqha diosanakar yupaychasax altaran manq'apxi; qullqinak apsusasti, diosanakapan utaparuw vino umirix sarapxi." 
Amos2:9 Nayasti, jumanak laykuw amorreonakarux q'alpun tukjta; cedro quqanakjam jach'anakäpkchïnsa, roble quqanakjam ch'ullqhïpkchïn ukasa." 
Amos2:10 Nayaw jumanakarux Egipto markat irpsunipxsma, pusi tunka maraw wasaran irpnaqapxsma amorreonakan uraqipsa jumanakaruw churapxsma." 
Amos2:11 Israelitanaka, janiw jan yatirix tukupkasmati, jumanak taypit yaqhipanakarux profetanak tukuyta, mayninakarusti nazireonak tukuyarakta.” Ukham siw Tatituxa." 
Amos2:12 “Jumanakax nazireonakar munkir jan munkir vino umayapxtaxa, profetanakarusti nayxat parlir jark'apxaraktaxa." 
Amos2:13 Ukat jichhax, israelitanaka, kunjämtix mä carretax trigo khumuntatax uraqir wal jatxattixa, ukhamaw jumanakarux jatxattapxäma." 
Amos2:14 Qawqhsa jaltasipkätawa, janiw atipapkätati; wali ch'aman jaqirusa ch'amax pist'aniwa, ch'amamp atipt'irïki uka jaqis qhispkaniti." 
Amos2:15 Mich'inak antutt'añ apnaqiris janiw sayt'askaniti, jank'aki t'ijtirinakasa, caballxat jaltirinakas qhispipkaniti." 
Amos2:16 Uka urunxa, wali ch'amamp nuwt'asir jaqisa, nuwasiñ yänakap apanukusaw jaltxani.” Tatituw uk arsuwayi." 
Amos3:1 Israelitanaka, Tatitun arunakap ist'apxam, Egipto uraqit irpsunki uka markar arsut arunaka:" 
Amos3:2 “Taqi markanak taypitxa, jumanak saparukiw ajllisipxsma. Ukat taqi jan wali ñanqhanak lurapxatanakamat taripapxäma”." 
Amos3:3 Mä amtakïsipki ukkhaw jaqix panini suma sarnaqapxixa; 
Amos3:4 kunsa katjki ukkhaw leonax ch'umin jach'at warari; manq'añax utjki ukkhaw león qallunakax putupan uxupxi; 
Amos3:5 kuna sipitarus jalt'ki ukkhaw jamach'ix uraqir jalaqtani; kunsa katthapki ukkhaw sipitax uraqin unxti; 
Amos3:6 trompetan phust'asitap markan ist'aski ukkhaw jaqix wal sustjasi; Tatitux kuns apayanki ukkhaw jan walinakax markan utji. 
Amos3:7 Tatitux janipuniw kunsa lurkaspati profeta luqtirinakapar jan yatiykasaxa. 
Amos3:8 ¿Khitirak jan sustjaskaspa leonan wararitap ist'asasti? Tatitutix parlam saspaxa, ¿khitirak jutir urunakat jan yatiykaspasti?" 
Amos3:9 Asdod markankir reyi utanakapan yatiyapxam, Egipto markankir reyi utanakapan yatiyapxarakim: “Samaria uraqin qullunakapar jutapxam; uka markan utjir jan walt'añanakampi, t'aqhisiyañanakampi uñjapxam.”" 
Amos3:10 Tatitux akham siwa: “Janiw jupanakax chiqa lurañ yatipkiti, reyi utanakapan ch'amamp lunthatat yänak imapxi.”" 
Amos3:11 Ukat Tatitux akham arsu: “Mä uñisir markaw uraqimarux taqi tuqit muyuntani, jach'a uyunakam t'unthapini, reyi utanakamatsa yänakam q'alak apsusiwäpxani.”" 
Amos3:12 Tatitux akham siwa: “Kunjämatix awatirix leonan lakapat pä chhuchhulliksa, jan ukax mä chikat jinchuksa aparasixa, ukhamaw Samaria markan jakir israelitanakat juk'aniki qhispipxani, Damasco markat apanit suma qunuñan qunt'asipki ukanakaxa.”" 
Amos3:13 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux siwa: “Ist'apxam, Jacobun markapar qhanañchapxam," 
Amos3:14 Israel markaru jucha luratanakapat wayt'kä uka uruxa, Betel markan utjir yaqha diosanakar yupaychañ altaranakapsa t'unthapïwa; altaran uchat waxranakapsa, uraqirkamaw willthapirakï." 
Amos3:15 Thaya pachan qamañ utanaka, jallu pachan qamañ utanaksa t'unthapïwa, marfilat lurat utanaksa ch'usaruw tukuyä, reyi utanakapsa q'al tukjarakï.” Ukham siw Tatituxa." 
Amos4:1 Samariankir qamir warminaka, aka arunak ist'apxam, jumanakax wajchanakaruw jachayapxtaxa, jan kunaniruw t'aqhisiyapxtaxa, chachanakamarusti, machañatak vino mayipxtaxa." 
Amos4:2 Tatitux qullan kankañapan juramentompiw arsu: “Chinuñanakampi chinuntat apapkätam uka urux jutaskiwa; wawanakamas chawlla katuñampi katuntat apatäpxaniwa. 
Amos4:3 Pirqa p'iysutanak tuqi siqikiw mistuwayapxäta, ukatsti Hermón qullu tuqir aparpayatäpxätawa.” Tatitux ukham siwa." 
Amos4:4 “Betel markampiru, Guilgal markampir sarapxam, ¡ukansti juk'amp juchanak lurapxam! Qhantatitpach luqtäwinakam apapxam, sapa kimsa ururak tunkat maya churañäki uksa churapxam." 
Amos4:5 Jan levaduran t'ant'a nakt'ayas yuspagarasin waxt'äwi luqtasipxam, waxt'a churapkäta ukanaksa taqi chiqan yatiyapxarakim, ukham lurañaw jumanakatakix askixa.” Tatitux ukham siwa." 
Amos4:6 “Nayaw jumanakar taqi markanakaman manq'at awtjayapxsma; nayaw taqi chiqanakan jaqinakatak manq'añ pist'ayta, ¡ukampis jumanakax janiw nayan ukarux kuttanipktati!” Tatitux ukham siwa." 
Amos4:7 “Yapu apthapitak kimsa phaxsïkipan jallxa jan apayanipksmati. Mä markan nayax jallu puriyta, yaqha markansti janiw puriykti; mä chiqan jallux puriwa, mä chiqansti umatjamax uraqix wañsuwa." 
Amos4:8 Jaqinakax markat marka uma thaqhasax sarapxäna, umat pharjayasitanakapax janipuniw apaqtkänti; ¡ukampis jumanakax janiw nayan ukarux kuttanipktati!” Tatitux ukham siwa." 
Amos4:9 “Junt'u thayanakampiw mutuyapxsma, kunayman usunakampiw t'aqhisiyapxsma; panqar yapunakamsa, uva yapunakamsa pharsuyaraktwa; higo quqanakamsa, aceituna quqanakamsa t'iju t'ijunakaw manq'suwayxi; ¡ukampis jumanakax janiw nayan ukarux kuttanipktati!” Tatitux ukham siwa." 
Amos4:10 “Egipto markar apaykäyäta uka pachpa t'aqhisiñ jumanakarux apayanipxsma, waynanakarusti nuwasïwinakan jiwarayta, caballonakapsti uñisirinakaruw katxaruyta; nuwasïwin jiwaratanakan q'aphinakapsa mukhirayaraktwa, ¡ukampis jumanakax janiw nayan ukarux kuttanipktati!” Tatitux ukham siwa." 
Amos4:11 “Kamisatix Sodoma markampiru, Gomorra markampir nayax tukjkta, ukham jumanakarux tukjapxaraksma; ninat apsut sank'ar uñtatäpxayätawa, ¡ukampis jumanakax janiw nayan ukarux kuttanipktati!” Tatitux ukham siwa." 
Amos4:12 “Ukhamïpan, Israel marka, jumarux ukhamarak mutuyäma; uksti nayax lurapunïwa, ¡Diosamampi jikisiñatak wakicht'asim!”" 
Amos4:13 Khititix qullunaksa sayt'ayki, thaysa lurki, jaqirus amtäwinakap yatiyki, qhansa ch'amakt'ayki, jach'a qullunak patanakansa sarnaqkaraki, ukan sutipax Taqi ch'aman Tatituwa." 
Amos5:1 Israelitanaka, arunakax ist'apxitaya; jumanak tuqi arsuta llakisiñ arunaka:" 
Amos5:2 Suma q'uma Israel markax tinkxiwa; jan mayampi sartkiriw liwisxi. Pachpa uraqipxar liwitattataw qhipari, janiw khiti waytiris utjkiti." 
Amos5:3 Tatit Diosax israelitanakar akham siwa: “Mä markatix waranqa chachanaka nuwasiñar khithanixa, patakanikiw kutt'anxani; mä markatix patak chachanaka khithanixa, tunkanikiw kutt'anxarakini.”" 
Amos5:4 Tatitux israelitanakar akham siwa: “Nayar thaqhapxita, ukatsti jakasipkätawa." 
Amos5:5 Betel markar jan thaqhapxamti, Guilgal markarus jan sarapxamti, janirak Beerseba marka chiqsa sarakipapxamti, Guilgal markasti katuntat apatäniwa, Betel markasti q'ala t'unjatarakïniwa”." 
Amos5:6 Tatitur thaqhapxam, ukatsti jakasipkätawa; jan ukham lurapkäta ukasti, jupax Israel markarux nina apayanini, janirakiw uk jiwayirix khitis Betel markan utjkaniti." 
Amos5:7 ¡Ay kunakïkan jumanakatakixa, chiqa kankañsa k'allk'uruw tukuyapxtaxa, aski kankañarusa takichasipxaraktawa!" 
Amos5:8 Tatituw jan jakt'kay warawaranak luri, jupaw ch'amak arumar qhanjtayi, uru qhansti ch'amak arumar tukuyaraki; qutankir umanaksa qinayanak tuqiw waña uraqir warxati; jupaw ch'aman jaqinakarux atipji, markan jach'a pirqanakapsa allinuku. Sutipasti, Tatitu Diosawa." 
Amos5:9  
Amos5:10 ¡Ay kunakïkan jumanakatakixa, chiqap uñjirirux uñisipxtawa, chiq qhanañchañatak sayt'irirus ñanqhachapxtawa!" 
Amos5:11 Janiw qalat lurasipkta uka suma utanakan jakapkätati, janirakiw uka suma uva yapunak yapuchasipkta ukatsa vino umapkätati, wajchanakar jisk'achapxatamata, trigotsa impuestonak apsupxatamata." 
Amos5:12 Nayax ñanqha luratanakam yattwa, walja juchanakamsa uñt'araktwa: aski jaqirux qullqi chilltayasisaw t'aqhisiyapxtaxa, taripañ utanakansti wajchanakan aynacht'añap thaqhapxtaxa." 
Amos5:13 Urunakan jan walïxatapatxa, yatiñan jaqinakax janiw parlañ munkxapxiti." 
Amos5:14 Kunatix askïki uk thaqhapxam, jan walïki uksti apanukupxam, ukhamat jakapxañamataki. “Taqi ch'aman Tatitux jiwasampïskiwa” sasa parlapxatamas ukhamat chiqarakïni." 
Amos5:15 ¡Jan walïki uk uñisipxam! ¡Sumäki uksti munapxam! Taripañ utanakan chiqapar uñjañax utjpan; inach taqi ch'amani Tatitux Israel markat jilt'irinakarux khuyapt'ayasispa. 
Amos5:16 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux akham siwa: “Taqi plazanakan jachañax utjani, marka thakhinakansti warariñanakaw utjani, pampan utjasirinakarusti llakisiñat jachiritakiw jawsapxani, jachañatak jawsatanakasti juk'ampiw jachapxani." 
Amos5:17 Kunapachatix nayax mutuyir jutkä ukkhaxa, taqi uva yapunakan jachapxani.” Ukham siw Tatituxa." 
Amos5:18 ¡Ay kunakïkan Tatitun urup puriniñap munirinakatakixa! ¿Kunjämäkanitix jumanakatak uka urux uk yatipxtati? Uka urux ch'amakäniwa, janiw qhanäkaniti." 
Amos5:19 Kunjämatix mä jaqix leonan nayraqatapat jaltkasax mä osompirak jalthapki ukhamäniwa, jan ukax, maynix utapar mantasin amparap pirqar aykatasa katarimpi mich'intayaski ukhamäniwa." 
Amos5:20 Jïsa, Tatitun urupax ch'amakäniwa; janiw qhanäkaniti; laxa ch'amakaruw tukuni, janiw akch'a qhanas utjkaniti." 
Amos5:21 “Nayax jumanakan uruyañ urunakam uñistwa, janiw yäqkaraktsa, jach'a tantachasïwinakamas janiw kusisiykituti." 
Amos5:22 Nayar jach'añchasa wilañchanak luqtäwinakam janiw munkti, janirakiw granonakat waxt'anak luqtapkista ukanak munkti; janiw katuqkäti lik'i vaca qallunak sumankthapiñ wilañcha luqtatanakamsa." 
Amos5:23 ¡Q'uchutanakaman uxutap nayat jithiqayapxita! ¡Janiw arpa jat'itanakamsa ist'añ munkti! 
Amos5:24 Ukat sipana, chiqapar uñjäwix walja umanakjam jalpan, askin sarnaqañasti jalsur umjam jan tukuskirïpan." 
Amos5:25 “Israelitanaka, jumanakax pusi tunka mara wasaran sarnaqkasaxa, janipuniw waxt'äwinaksa, wilañchanaksa luqtapkistati." 
Amos5:26 Ukampis jichhax Sicut, Quiiún, jumanakan lurat uka diosanakam apasxapxañamäniwa." 
Amos5:27 Jumanakarux Damasco markatsa juk'amp jayaruw jaqunukupxäma.” Taqi ch'aman Tatitux ukham siwa. Ukarakiw sutipaxa. 
Amos6:1 “¡Ay kunakïkan Jerusalén markan samarat jakirinakatakixa! ¡Ay kunakïkan Samaria markar katuyasit jakirinakatakixa, wali aytat markan jach'a jilïrinakaparu khitinakarutix israelitanakax yanap mayipki ukanakataki!" 
Amos6:2 Calné markar sarasin uñjapxam; uka chiqat Hamat jach'a markar sarapxam, ukatsti filisteonakan Gat markapar saraqapxarakim. ¿Jumanakasti uka markanakat sipan juk'ampi sumäpxtati? ¿Jumanakan uraqinakamax, uraqinakapat sipan juk'ampi sumacha?" 
Amos6:3 Jumanakax uka jan wali urutxa janiw amuyt'añ munapktati, jumanakpachaw jach'a t'aqhisiñanak mayisisipktaxa." 
Amos6:4 Jumanakax marfilat k'achachat suma ikiñanakan winkurapxtaxa, jach'a manq'äwinakansa suma qunuñanakxaru qunurata; ovej qallunakampi, lik'i vaca qallunakampi kharsuyasin manq'asa;" 
Amos6:5 pinkill phust'asax kunayman jayllipxtaxa; Davidjamaw yaqha phust'añanak lurasipxtaxa; 
Amos6:6 jach'a tilinkinakat vino umapxtaxa, suma q'apkir qullanakampiw jawsusipxtaxa, ¡ukampis markan t'unjäwipat janiw akch'sa llakt'asipktati!" 
Amos6:7 Jumanakaw katuntatanakat nayraqata, jayar apayata uñjasipxäta jach'a manq'äwinakaman uxuñanakasti tukusxarakiniwa.”" 
Amos6:8 Taqi ch'amani Tatit Diosaw qhanpach arsu akham sasa: “Jacobun markapan jach'a jach'a tukutap uñistwa, reyi utanakapsa uñistwa; marksti uñisirinakaparuw katxaruyä, kunatix ukan utjki ukanakamppach katxaruyäxa.”" 
Amos6:9 Ukapachasti, tunka chachatix mä utan qhiparanixa, tunkanpachaw jiwarani." 
Amos6:10 Axsarañasti wali jach'apunïniwa, maynitix wila masipan jiwat janchipa waytas utat anqar apsuni ukkhaxa, utankiriruw jiskt'ani: “¿Khitimpich utjaski?” sasa. Utankiristi: “Janiw utjkiti” saniwa. Maynïristi sarakiniwa: “¡Amukt'am, Tatitun sutipraki akatjamat arsuskasma!” sasa." 
Amos6:11 Tatitun mutuyäwipax jach'a utanakxarusa, jisk'a utanakxarus purininiwa, ukanakasti q'ala tukjatarakïniwa." 
Amos6:12 ¿Caballonakax qarqanak patanjam jalapxaspati? ¿Quta taypin qhulliñax wakisispati? ¡Jumanakax chiqa kankañxa jiwayir qullaruw tukuyapxtaxa, aski luräwin achupsti k'allk'uruw tukuyapxaraktaxa!" 
Amos6:13 Jumanakax jan kunatak kusisipxtaxa, sapxaraktawa: “Munañanïñxa kipka ch'amasampiw jikxatastanxa” sasa." 
Amos6:14 Israelitanaka, sum amuyt'asipxam; Taqi ch'amani Tatitux siwa: “Nayax jumanakar jan walt'ayir yaqha marka sartayä, uka markaw jumanakarux t'aqhisiyapxätam, amsta tuqit qalltasa, aynach tuqir tukuyasa.”" 
Amos7:1 Tatitux aka uñjäwi uñacht'ayitu: Tatituruw uñjta t'iju t'ijunak luraskiri, kunapachatix qhipa sata yapux alinuqaskäna ukkha, ukasti reyin yapup apthapitat qhiparuw lurasïna." 
Amos7:2 Kunapachatix t'iju t'ijunakax qhipa ch'uxñanakamppacha manq'antkäna ukkhaw sista: —¡Tatay, pampacht'apxita! ¿Kamisarak taqi akanak mutupxästi? Nanakax mä jisk'a markakïpxstxaya —sasa." 
Amos7:3 Ukatsti Tatitux uka amtäwip phuqhañ suyt'xiwa, ukat saraki: —¡Janiw kuna mutuyañsa apayankxäti! —sasa." 
Amos7:4 Tatitux aka uñjäwi uñachayarakitu: Jiwasar mutuyañatak mä nina sank'a apayanir uñjta, uka ninasti jach'a qutxa manqhatpach q'al wañsuyäna, yapunaksa q'al nakhantäna." 
Amos7:5 Ukat Tatitur mayta: —Tatay, suyt'akim, ¿kamisarak Jacob jisk'a markamasti uka taripäwim mutunisti? —sasa." 
Amos7:6 Tatitusti uka amtäwip phuqhañ suyt'xiwa, ukatsti sarakiwa: —¡Janirakiw uka ninsa apayanipkämati! —sasa." 
Amos7:7 Tatitux ak uñacht'ayarakitu: Jupasti mä uyu pirqa jak'ankaskänwa, uta luririn plomadap apt'ata." 
Amos7:8 Ukatsti jiskt'ituwa: —¿Amós, kuns uñjta? —sasa. Nayasti jupar sistwa: —Uta luririn plomadap uñjta —sasa. Ukatsti sarakituwa: —Uñtam, nayax uta luririn plomadapampiw Israel markaxan sarnaqäwip uñjä. Janipuniw mayampsa juchanakap pampachkäti." 
Amos7:9 Isaacan utjir yaqha diosanakapar yupaychañ altaranakapas tukjatäniwa, Israel markan yupaychañ utanakapas laqayar tukuyatarakïniwa. ¡Nayasti Jeroboaman utapar tukjañatakiw sartä!" 
Amos7:10 Betel markan Amasías sacerdotepaxa, Israel markan Jeroboam reyipar yatiyiriw khiti: “Amós chachax israelita jaqinakaruw jumar ñanqhachañatak amtayaski. Markasti janiw juk'ampi ukham parlaykaspati." 
Amos7:11 Amós chachax akham sasaw sarnaqaraki: ‘Jeroboam reyix ch'axwäwin jiwayatäniwa, israelitanakasti jaya markar apanukutäniwa’ ” sasa." 
Amos7:12 Ukatsti Amasías sacerdotex Amós profetarux sarakïnwa: —¡Profeta, akat jayar sarxam! Jumatix jutir urunakat parlas sarnaqañ munsta ukaxa, Judá markar sarxam;" 
Amos7:13 ukampis Betel markan jan juk'amp parlkxamti, akax reyin qullan utapawa, markpachan waqaychañ jach'a utaparakiwa —sasa." 
Amos7:14 Amós profetasti akham sasaw aruskati: —Janiw nayax profetäkti, janiw profetan wawapäkaraktsa. Nayax ovej awatirikïtwa, pampa higonak apthapisis jakasirikïtwa," 
Amos7:15 ukampis Tatituw ovej awatiskirit nayar jawsitu, ukat sarakitu: ‘Saram, Israel markar nayan sutixampi parlanim’ sasa." 
Amos7:16 Ukhamasti jichhax Tatitun arup ist'am. Jumax akham sistawa: ‘Jan kunsa Tatitun sutipxar Israel markatak parlamti, janirak Isaacat saraqir wawanakapatakis parlamti’ sasa." 
Amos7:17 Ukat Tatitux akham sixa: ‘Warmimasti markan uñjkataw yaqha chachanakampi sarnaqani, yuqanakamas phuchhanakamas espadampi jiwarayatäpxaniwa; uraqinakamsa yaqhanakaw katuntasipxani, jumasti Tatitur jan uñt'ir jaqinakan uraqipan jiwarakïta, israelitanakasti katuntata, uraqipat jayar apatäpxarakiniwa’ sasa." 
Amos8:1 Tatitux akham uñacht'ayitu: Puqurat achunakaw mä walayan utjäna," 
Amos8:2 jupasti jiskt'arakituwa: —¿Amós, kuns uñjtaxa? —sasa. Nayasti jupar sistwa: —Mä walayan puqurat achunak uñjta —sasa. Tatitusti sarakituwa: —Israel markax uka achunakjam puquratäxiwa; janipuniw mayampsa juchanakap pampachkxäti." 
Amos8:3 Uka urux reyin jach'a utapan q'uchutanakax llakisiñaruw tukuni. Walja jaqinakaw jiwarapxani, jiwat janchinakapasti anqar jaqtatarakïniwa. Tatituw ukham arsu." 
Amos8:4 Ist'apxam, llamp'u chuyman jaqinakar t'aqhisiyirinaka, markankir jan kunaninakar tukjirinaka;" 
Amos8:5 jumanakax sapxtawa: “¿Kunapacharak wawa phaxsi phunchhäwi urusti tukusxani trigo aljasiñasatakisti? ¿Kunapacharak samarañ urusti tukusxani, balanza tupunak jisk'aptayas jilar aljañatakisti?" 
Amos8:6 ¡Jan kunaninakarux aynacht'ayapuniñäni, jupanakpacha jiwasar luqtirit aljasiñapkama, ukhamat manunakap phuqhañataki, mä paris wiskhuksa manüsipkpan ukasa! ¡Trigo achunaksti jipimppach aljañäni!” sasa." 
Amos8:7 Tatitusti, Israel markan jach'a kankañap laykuw juramento luri: “Janipuniw markaxan jan wali luratanakap armkäti” sasa." 
Amos8:8 Ukhamïpansti, ¿janit uraqisti khathatkanisti? ¿Janit jaqinakasti jachapkanisti? ¡Kunjämtix Nilo jawiran umax jilxataraki wañaqaraki, ukhamaw uraqix uñstani, chhaqtarakini!" 
Amos8:9 Tatitux siwa: “Uka urunsti, chika uruw intirux ch'amakt'ayä, qhanaskir urunpach uraqir ch'amakt'ayä." 
Amos8:10 Phunchhäwi urunakamxa jiwatanakat jachañaruw kipstayä, q'uchutanakamasti, amaya imäwi llakinakaruw tukuyarakï; llaki isimpirakiw isthapisiyapxäma, llakisiñat p'iqinakam q'ararasipxäta. Sapa yuqall wawap jiwayasir jaqir uñtataw jachapxäta, taqi kunaw jachañar tukuni." 
Amos8:11 Urunakasti jutaskiwa siw Tatituxa. Uka urunakaw uraqirux mach'a apayanï; janiw manq'añ mach'äkaniti, umat pharjayasiñ mach'äkanisa, jan ukasti Tatitun arupat ist'añ mach'äniwa." 
Amos8:12 Tatitun arup thaqhasaw jaqinakax, inaki maysat maysa sarnaqani, mä qutat mä qutakamaw sarapxani, inti jalsu tuqit qalltasa, inti jalanta tuqikama, amstat aynachkamaw thaqhapxani, ukampis janiw jikxatapkaniti." 
Amos8:13 Uka urux, suma tawaqunakampi, ch'aman waynanakampix, umat pharjayasis jan ch'amaniw thayjtawayapxani." 
Amos8:14 Samaria markankir k'ari diosanakan sutipxar juramento luririnaka; khitinakatix sapki: ‘Dan markan diosap layku’, ‘Beerseba markan diosanakap layku’ sasa, ukanakax jan mayampi sartañatakiw jiwarapxani.”" 
Amos9:1 Tatiturux altar jak'ankaskir uñjta, jupasti situwa: “Uta pirqar k'uphantam piläranakap unxtayañkama; ¡ukhamat jaqinakxar allxattasin jiwaraypan! Qhiparapkani ukanakarusti espadampiw jiwarayä: inakiw jaltañsa munasipkani, janipuniw maynis qhispkaniti;" 
Amos9:2 inakiw manqhapachkam saraqasin imantasisipkani, ukawjatsa waysusinkakïwa; inakiw alaxpachkamas makhatasipkani, ukawjatsa wayuqasinkakïwa." 
Amos9:3 Carmelo qullu patarus imantasisipkpan, ukakamas thaqhirix saraskakïwa; quta manqharus nayat imantasisipkpan, quta manqhankir laq'ur khithasaw nayax tukjayä;" 
Amos9:4 uñisirinakapas yaqha markar katuntat apasipkpan, ukansa espadampi jiwarayatäpxañapatakiw mayirakïxa. ¡Jupanakarux uñch'ukiskakïwa, nayranakaxax jan walitakiw jupanak uñch'ukini, janiw askitak uñch'ukkaniti!”" 
Amos9:5 Taqi ch'aman Tatit Diosax uraqiruw takt'i, uraqisti umatatiwa, jaqinakapax uk uñjasax taqiniw jachapxi. Kunjämatix Nilo jawiran umax jilxatti, wañaqaraki, ukhamaw uraqix uñstani, chhaqtarakini." 
Amos9:6 Tatitux alaxpacharuw utap sayt'ayi, qalltapsti uraqxaruw utt'ayi, juparakiw qutat umanak jutayi, uka umanakampiw uraqirux warxati. Sutipasti Tatituwa." 
Amos9:7 Tatitusti israelitanakarux akham siwa: “Nayatakix jumanakasa, etiope jaqinakas mayakïpxtawa. Kunjämtix jumanakar Egipto markat irpsunipksma, ukhamarakiw filisteonakarux Creta wat'at irpsunta, arameonakarusti Quir sat markat irpsunirakta.”" 
Amos9:8 Tatitux aka jucharar markarux wal uñch'ukiski, ukatsti sarakiwa: “Aka uraqit jupanakarux q'al chhaqtayä, ukampis Jacobun utapankirinakak jilt'ayä. Uksti, naya, Tatituw arsta." 
Amos9:9 Israel markan jawq'sutäñapatakix nayaw arsü, susuñampi susurpayañataki, kamisatix mä susuñat sususax, mä trigosa uraqir jan jalaqtayaski ukhama." 
Amos9:10 Markaxan taqi jucharar jaqinakax espadampi jiwarayatäpxaniwa; khitinakatix sapki: ‘Janiw ukanakax ukham luraskaniti, janirakiw kuna jan walis katjkistaniti’ sasa."
