Zechariah7:6 jan ukasti jumanakan askinakamatakikiw manq'apxtaxa umapxaraktasa’ ” sasa. 
Zechariah7:7 Kuntix jichhax sapksma ukxa, khä urunakaw profetanak tuqi sapxayäsma, kunapachatix Jerusalén markaxa, ukhamaraki uka thiya markanakasa, jaqin phuqt'atäskäna ukapacha, kunapachatix Néguev sat chiqana, ukhamaraki pampanakan suman jakasiñax utjkarakïna ukapacha." 
Zechariah7:8 Tatitux Zacarías profetaruw parläna, juparusti sarakïnwa:" 
Zechariah7:9 “Aksti nayaw arsta: Jumanakasti taripañanakamanxa chiqäpxapunim, maynit maynikam munasirïpxam, khuyapayasirïpxarakim." 
Zechariah7:10 Ijma warminakarusa, wajchanakarusa, yaqha markat jutirinakarusa, jan kunaninakarusa, jan t'aqhisiyapxamti. Janirak maynit maynikam ñanqhachasiñsa lup'ipxamti” sasa." 
Zechariah7:11 Ukampis markax janiw kun ist'añsa munkiti. Taqiniw kutiqtawayxapxi, uqaraw tukupxaraki." 
Zechariah7:12 Chuymanakapsa ch'ullqhi diamante qalar uñtat qalarayasipxi, taqi ch'aman Tatitun ajayupampi nayra profetanakap tuqi parlawayki, uka yatichäwinakaru, kamachi arunakaru jan ist'añataki. Ukat Tatitux wali q'apisïna," 
Zechariah7:13 sarakïnwa: “Kunjämtix jupanakax nayan jawsatax jan ist'añ munapkitänxa, ukhamarakiw nayax jan ist'käti kunapachatix jupanakax art'asipkitani ukkhaxa." 
Zechariah7:14 Ukatpï nayax mä jach'a tutuka thayampjam jupanakar uksar aksar apanuktxa, jan uñt'apkäna uka markanak taypiru, uka qhipatsti uraqipax mä ch'usa wasarar tukutaw qhiparxäna, ukansti janiw khitis jakirjamäkxänti. ¡Jupanakan juchanakap laykuw ukkha suma markax q'ala tukjata, laqayaki qhiparäna!”" 
Zechariah8:1 Taqi ch'amani Tatituw nayar yatiyitu, akham sasa:" 
Zechariah8:2 “Naya, taqi ch'aman Tatitux ak arsta: Jach'aw munasiñaxax Jerusalén marka laykuxa; ukham sinti jach'arakiw q'apisiñaxax jupar uñisirinakataki." 
Zechariah8:3 Jerusalén markar jakiriw kutt'anï. Ukapachasti Jerusalenax Chiqa Marka satäniwa; taqi ch'amani Tatitun qullupasa Qullan Qullu satarakïniwa. 
Zechariah8:4 Awkinakasa taykanakasa wasitat Jerusalén plazanakanxa qunurt'asipxani, sapaqat maynis thujrunakapar thujrt'asitkama walja maranïxatanakap layku." 
Zechariah8:5 Yuqall wawanaka, imill wawanakaw markan plazanakap phuqt'apxani, uka plazanakan anatasipxarakini." 
Zechariah8:6 Khä urun taqi ukanakax markaxankirinakat qhiparapki ukanakatakix jan amuykayäniwa; ukampis nayatakix janiw ukhamäkaniti. Naya, taqi ch'aman Tatituw arsta." 
Zechariah8:7 Nayaw markaxarux inti jalsu tuqinkir ch'amani markata, inti jalanta tuqinkir markatsa qhispiyä," 
Zechariah8:8 ukatsti Jerusalén markan jakasxapxañapatakiw apanxarakï. Jupanakasti ukkhax nayan markaxäniwa, nayasti aski chuymampi, chiqa kankañamp uñjir Diosapäyäwa.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Taqi ch'amani Tatitux siwa: “Jumanaka, aka urunakan profetanakan arunakap ist'irinaka, ch'amañcht'asipxam, taqi ch'amani Tatitun utap wasitat sayt'ayañatak qallta qala uchantapkäna uka urutpach ist'irinaka." 
Zechariah8:10 Uta wasitat sayt'ayañ nayräxaxa, janiw irnaqirinakar qullqi churañax utjkänti, uywanakar manq'ayañatakis utjkänti; uñisirinak utjatap laykusti janiw jaqinakatakix sumankañax utjkarakïnti; nayaw jaqinakarux jaqi masipatak sartañap utjayta." 
Zechariah8:11 Ukampis jichhaxa, aka markankirinakat qhipariritakixa, janiw nayax nayra urunakanjamäkxäti. Naya, taqi ch'aman Tatituw arsta." 
Zechariah8:12 Sumankañaw jupanak taypin satatäxani. Uva yapunakax achu churani; uraqix suma achunak achuyani, alaxpachasti jallunakap apayanini. Nayasti taqi ukanak aka markankirinakat qhiparirinakarux churä." 
Zechariah8:13 Judá markankirinaka, Israel markankirinaka, jumanakax yaqha markanak taypinxa taqinin ñanqhachat markäpxäyätawa, jichhax nayaw qhispiyapxäma, askiruw tukuyapxäma. ¡Jan axsarapxamti! ¡Ch'amañchasipxam!”" 
Zechariah8:14 Taqi ch'amani Tatitux siwa: “Nayax jumanakan nayra awkinakamarux mutuyañ amtäyäta, nayar q'apisiyapkitän ukkhaxa, uka amtäwixasti amtatapunïnwa." 
Zechariah8:15 Jichhasti, Jerusalén markampiru, Judá markampirux aski lurañ amtta. Ukhamasti, jan axsarapxamti." 
Zechariah8:16 Akaw nayan kamachi arunakaxaxa: Maynit maynikamax chiqa arunakpun parlapxam, chiqaparurak uñjapxam, taripäwinakansti sumankañ utjayapxam;" 
Zechariah8:17 janiy maynit maynikamax ñanqha lurasipxamti, janirak k'ari juramentsa lurapxamti. Nayax taqi ukanak uñistwa. Naya, Tatituw arsta.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux nayaruw sarakitu: 
Zechariah8:19 “Pusïri phaxsina, phisqïri, paqallqüri, tunkïri phaxsin ayuno lurañaxa, kusisiñaruw kipstani, Judá wila masit saraqirinakatakix kusisiñ phunchhäwinakaruw tukuni. ¡Jumanakax chiqa arsuñampiru sumankañampir munapxam!”" 
Zechariah8:20 Taqi ch'amani Tatitux siwa: “Yaqha markankir jaqinakasa, jach'a markanakan utjiri jaqinakas jutasipkakiniwa." 
Zechariah8:21 Ukatsti mä markan jakir jaqinakax yaqha markan jakirinakaruw sapxani: ‘¡Taqi ch'amani Tatitur thaqhir sarapxañäni, suma waxt'äwip jiwasatak mayisiri!’ sasa. Mayninakasti ukxarux sapxarakiniwa: ‘¡Nanakax ukhamax sarapxarakïwa!’ sasa." 
Zechariah8:22 Jerusalén markarusti walja jaqinaka, ch'amani markanakaw jutapxani, taqi ch'amani Tatitur thaqhiri, jupanakatak aski waxt'äwip mayiri." 
Zechariah8:23 Khä urunxa, tunka yaqha markankir jan uñt'at jaqinakaw mä judío jaqirux isipat katuntasipxani, ukat sapxarakini: ‘¡Nanakax jumanakamp chikaw sarañ munapxta, Tatitun jumanakampïtap ist'apxta!’ ” sasa." 
Zechariah9:1 Tatitux taqi akapachan jakir jaqinakaruw uñch'ukiski. Ukat aka yatiyäwi arunak Hadrac, Damasco markanakatak arsu, uka kipkaraki Israelan ayllunakapatakisa," 
Zechariah9:2 Hamat sata uka jak'a markatakisa Tiro, Sidón uka qamir markanakatakis arsuraki." 
Zechariah9:3 Tiro markax jark'aqasiñatakix jach'a uyu pirqanak lurasïna, uka markax qurimpi, qullqimp ñiq'ir uñtat qullucht'äna." 
Zechariah9:4 Ukampis Tatitux taqpach aparani, qamir yänakapsa qutaruw warantani, marksti q'ala nakhantayarakini." 
Zechariah9:5 “Uk uñjasasti, Ascalón markax walpun mulljasini. Gaza markasti ukhamarakiw t'aqhisini, Ecrón markan suyt'äwipax jan kunatakïniwa. ¡Gaza markax jan reyiniw qhiparani, Ascalón markasti jan jaqinakanirakiw uñjasini!" 
Zechariah9:6 Asdod markansti kunayman jaqinakaw jakani, ukhamat filisteonakan jach'a jach'a tukutapxa jisk'achjä." 
Zechariah9:7 Lakanakapatsti manq'apki uka wilararpach aychsa apaqäwa, laka ch'akhanakapatsa jan manq'añ manq'anak apaqarakïwa. Ukampis uka jaqinakatxa yaqhipanakax nayatak qhipaririw utjani; Judá markankiriw tukupxani, Ecrón markasti jebuseo jaqinakjamäpxarakiniwa." 
Zechariah9:8 Nayasti wakicht'atakïskäwa, nayankirinakar arxatañataki, khitisay aka chiqa jutaskpan ukanakata. T'aqhisiyirix janiw wasitat t'aqhisiykxaniti, jichhasti naya pachpaw markaxar uñjaskta.”" 
Zechariah9:9 ¡Sión marka, walpun kusisim! ¡Jerusalén marka, kusisiñat q'uchum! Reyimaw juman ukar jutaski, chiqa kankañani, taqi atipt'añ churiri, mä jisk'a asno qallur qunxatata." 
Zechariah9:10 Jupaw Israelan nuwasiñ carronakap t'unjani, Jerusalenan caballonakapsa tukjani, nuwasïwin mich'inak antutt'añanaksa p'akirani. Markanak taypin sumañkañ yatiyani, maysa qutata, maysa qutakamaw apnaqani, Éufrates jawirat qalltasina uraq tukuykamaw marka sarayani." 
Zechariah9:11 Tatitux akham siwa: “Jerusalén, nayaw jumampi mä arust'äwi lurta, ukasti wila tuqi luratawa; ukat jumanakan katuntat jaqinakamxa, kawkïri jan umani phuch'unkapkitï jichhax ukat apsü," 
Zechariah9:12 ukatsti suyt'äwi chuyman phuqt'ataw kutt'anxapxani, suma uyuchrantat markanakaru. Sapxsmawa, nayasti taqi t'aqhisitanakamatxa aski waxt'äwinakampi phuqt'apxäma, kusisiñanakxa pä ukkhampi katuqapxarakïta." 
Zechariah9:13 Judá markankirinakampi, Israel markankirinakampiw Grecia markankirinakarux tukjä.”" 
Zechariah9:14 Tatituw markapxarux uñacht'ayasini; mich'inakap lliju llijunakjam antutt'ani. Dios Tatituw trompet phust'ani, aynach jach'a thayamp chikaw sarantarakini." 
Zechariah9:15 Taqi ch'amani Tatituw jupankirinakarux imani, jupanakasti q'urawt'anita qalanaksa takichasipxaniwa, uñisirinakaparusti jiwarayapxaniwa; atipjäwipat kusisiñatakisti mä jach'a manq'äwi lurapxani. Umjasiñkamaw umapxani; qirunakap vinompi phuqharapxani, kunjämtix altarar warxatañatak wilax qirunakar phuqharatäki ukhama." 
Zechariah9:16 Khä urunwa, Tatitu Diosapax markaparu qhispiyani, mä oveja tamarjama, jupankirinakasti kipka markapan k'ajapxani, pillun uchat suma qalanakapar uñtata." 
Zechariah9:17 ¡Kunja sumakïkani uka markaxa! Trigopasa, vinopas walja utjatap laykusti, yuqall wawanakasasa, imill wawanakasas sumapuniw jilarapxani." 
Zechariah10:1 Tatitur jallupach jallunak mayipxam, lliju llijunak utjayir Tatituw walja jallunak apayanini, taqiniruw pampankir ch'uxñanak churarakini." 
Zechariah10:2 Yaqha diosanakan arupax k'ariwa, yatirinakax k'ari uñjäwinak katuqapxi. Arsutanakapax inamay samkanakakiwa, chuymachasiñ arunakapasti ina ch'usakiwa. Ukat markax uywa tamar uñtat inak aywinaqxi, awatirin jan utjatapat t'aqhisiskaraki." 
Zechariah10:3 Ukat Tatitux saraki: “Q'apisiñaxax awatirinakatakiw nakti, markaxar irpirinakarux mutuyarakïwa.” Naya pachpaw markaxar uñjasiskä. Judá markax jichhax mä oveja tamawa, ukampis jupanakarux nuwasïwinkir ch'amani caballonakjam tukuyarakï." 
Zechariah10:4 Jupanak taypit Wakiskir Qalax mistuni, chhujllu Ch'akurusa, nuwasïwin Mich'i antutt'añasa. Jupanak taypit irpirinakax misturakini." 
Zechariah10:5 Jan axsarir soldadonakjamäpxaniwa ñiq'i taypin nuwasir soldadonakjama; caballxat sarir soldadonakaruw nuwantapxani jupanakarusti mä p'inq uñjasiyapxarakini, nayaw nuwasïwin jupanakampiskä." 
Zechariah10:6 Tatitux siwa: “Nayätwa Israelan Tatitupaxa, markaxan mayisitanakap ist'araktwa. Nayaw Judá wila masit saraqirinakarux ch'am churä, José wila masit saraqirinakarusti nayaw qhispiyarakï. Wasitat uraqiparux irpxä, jupanakat khuyapayasitax layku. Janis jupanakar apanukkiriskäyäta ukham jichhax amuyasxapxani, jupanakar khuyapayasiñax uñacht'ayä." 
Zechariah10:7 Israelitanakax wal kusisipxani kunjämtix soldadonakax vino umantasax wal kusisipki ukhama; uk uñjasax wawanakapax kusisirakiniwa nayan taqi ukanak lurataxata. 
Zechariah10:8 “Nayaw jupanakar jawsasin, tantacht'arakï, jupanakaru qhispiyatax layku. Waljani markaruw tukupxani kunjämäpkäntix nayra pachax ukhama." 
Zechariah10:9 Nayaw yaqha markanak taypir ananukta, ukampisa, jayankkasinsa nayat amtasipxitani, mä urusti wawanakapampiw uraqipar kutt'anxapxani." 
Zechariah10:10 Jupanakarux Egipto markat kutt'ayanxä, Asiria markat apanxarakï, Galaad uraqimpina, Líbano qullunakampin jakayarakï; waljanipunïpxaniwa uraqis jupanakatakix pist'aniwa." 
Zechariah10:11 Llakt'ataw Egipto quta makhatapxani, nayaw uka qutan mathapinakap t'akuyä. Nilo jawiran umapsa q'al wañt'ayä; nayaw Asiria markan jach'a jach'a tukutapsa tukjä, Egipto markan jach'a munañanïñapsa nayaw apaqarakï." 
Zechariah10:12 Nayaw markaxarux ch'am churä, jan axsarasaw sutixar sarantapxarakini. Naya, Tatituw uk arsta.”" 
Zechariah11:1 ¡Líbano qullunaka, punkunakam jist'arasim, cedro quqanakamxa nina nakhantpan!" 
Zechariah11:2 ¡Pino quqa, jachamaya, cedro quqan liwisitapata, khä suma quqanakan q'ala tukjatätapata! ¡Jumanaka, Basán uraqinkir roble quqanaka, jachapxam uka jach'a ch'uminakan tukjatätapata!" 
Zechariah11:3 Awatirinakax jach'at wararipxi ukkha suma ch'uxña chhuxllanakan q'ala tukjatätapata. Leonanakan wararitapas ist'asiwa, Jordán jawir thiyan suma ch'uxña pampanakan tukjat uñjasitapata." 
Zechariah11:4 Aksti Tatitu Diosaxaw sarakitu: “Khariñatak yaqhachatäki uka ovejanak uñjam. 
Zechariah11:5 Alasirinakax jan khuyapt'ayasisaw kharirapxi, aljirinakasti sapxiwa: ‘¡Tatitux yuspagaratäpan, nayax qamirïxtwa!’ sasa. Pachpa awatirinakapas janikiw ovejanakapat khuyapt'ayasipkiti." 
Zechariah11:6 Nayax ukhamarak lurä: ¡Aka markankir jaqinakat janiw khuyapayaskäti! Jan ukasti, aka jak'an utjir markanakan amparaparuw katxaruyä, reyipan apnaqatarakïniwa. Markapas q'ala tukjatäskani ukkhasa, janiw jupanakar yanapt'ir sarkäti. Naya, taqi ch'aman Tatituw uk arsta.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Nayasti khariñatak yaqhachatäki uka ovejanak uñjañaruw uchasta, sinti t'ukha ovejanakaruw jilpach uñjarakta. Ukatsti pä thujrunak aytasta: mayarux “Walikïskaña” sasaw sutichta, mayarusti “Mayakïña” sasaw suticharakta." 
Zechariah11:8 Mä phaxsinak kimsa awatirinakar alisnukta, jupanakatak munasiñaxan pist'atapata, ukhamarak nayar uñisipxatapata." 
Zechariah11:9 Ovejanakarusti saraktwa: “¡Janiw mayampsa jumanakan awatirimäkxiristti! ¡Yaqhipatix jiwanixa, jiwaskpan! ¡Yaqhiparutix jiwayapxanixa, jiwayasipkakpan! ¡Jilt'irinakasti jupanak pura manq'antasisipkpan!” sasa." 
Zechariah11:10 Ukatsti “Walikïskaña” satäkis uka thujru katusasti p'akjaraktwa, Diosax taqi markanakampi mä arust'äwi lurkatayna ukax ukkhar tukusxatap uñacht'ayañataki." 
Zechariah11:11 Ukürpachaw uka arust'äwix t'unjat uñjasïna, uñch'ukisipkitäna uka oveja alakipanakasti, kuntix nayax lurkäyäta uka tuqi Tatitun parlaskatap amuyapxäna." 
Zechariah11:12 Ukatsti jupanakarux saraktwa: “Walïchi ukax oveja awatitaxat qullqimp phuqxapxita; jan munapksta ukax, ukhamäskpan” sasa. Ukatsti jupanakax kimsa tunka qullqimpiw phuqhapxitu." 
Zechariah11:13 Tatitusti situwa: “¡Uka qullqinak katum, ukatsti Tatitun utapan qullqi uchañaru uchanim, ukkha sum nayar chaniñchapxitu!” sasa. Nayasti uka kimsa tunka qullqi katusaxa, Tatitun utapan qullqi uchañaruw uchanta." 
Zechariah11:14 Ukatsti “Mayakïña” satäki uka payïri thujru p'akjarakta, ukhamaw Judá markampi Israel markampi mä jilakïñax t'unjat uñjasiraki." 
Zechariah11:15 Tatitux sarakituwa: “Jichhasti jan amuyt'asir awatirir tukum. 
Zechariah11:16 Nayasti aka markatakix mä awatir uchä, uka awatiristi jalanukuta ovejanakat jan yäqasirïniwa, chhaqhat ovejanak jan thaqhiri, chhuxriñchjatanak jan qullt'iri, t'ukhanakar jan manq'ayiri, jan ukasti suma lik'i ovejanakan aychapak chhuchhullinakamppach jan jilt'ayas manq'antani." 
Zechariah11:17 ¡Ay, kunakïkani oveja tama ananukuri jan wali awatiritxa! ¡Walïspaw mä espadampi amparap khuchhuqañaxa, mä cuchillompi kupi nayrap k'ilsuñaxa! ¡Amparapax taqpach pharspan, nayrapasti q'ala juykhuptarakpan!”" 
Zechariah12:1 Tatituw Israel markatak ak yatiyitu: Alaxpach jach'ar tukuyiri, akapach uraqsa utt'ayiri, jaqirus jakañ churiri Tatitux siwa:" 
Zechariah12:2 “Kunapachatix aka jak'ankir markanakax Jerusalén markaru, uka kipkaraki Judá uraqinkir markanakarus katuntañatak muyuntapkani ukapachaxa, nayaw jupanakarux aynacht'ayä. Jerusalenarux machantayir vinoruw tukuyä, ukaw taqi jak'ankir markanakar machjayani." 
Zechariah12:3 “Khä urux taqpach markanakatakiw Jerusalenax mä jathi qalar uñtat tukuni. Uka jathi qala unxtayañ munirinakarux tukjaniwa. Taqi markanakaw Jerusalén marka tukjañatak tantacht'asipxani," 
Zechariah12:4 ukampis ukkhax nayaw caballonakap chhuktayä, caballxata saririnakaparusti luqhiptayäwa. Judá markankir wila masinakaparux imäwa, markanakan taqi caballonakaparusti juykhukamak tukuyarakï." 
Zechariah12:5 Ukham uñjasasti, Judá markankir jilïrinakax amuyt'asisaw sapxani: ‘Taqi ch'aman Tatitux Jerusalén markan jakirinakan Tatitupawa, jupaw jupanakarux ch'amsa churaraki’ sasa." 
Zechariah12:6 “Khä urun Judá markan jilïrinakaparux lawanak taypin nakhaskir mä nina sank'jam tukuyä, mä ninjama trigo puyanak marqthapita taypina. Kupïxankiri, ch'iqäxankiri taqi jak'ankir markanakaruw uka ninax tukjani, ukampis Jerusalén markarux janiw kunas kamachkaniti." 
Zechariah12:7 Nayraqatxa naya, Tatitux, Judá wila masinakaruw qhispiyä, nayatakix Davidan wila masipat saraqirinakasa, Jerusalén markan jakirinakas wali yäqatawa. Jan khitis may amuypati." 
Zechariah12:8 Naya, Tatituw Jerusalén markan jakirinakarux imarakï. Jupanakat wali t'ukhäpkis ukanakax David reyjamaw wali ch'aman tukupxani, Davidat saraqirinakasti Diosar uñtatäniwa, jupanakan nayraqatap sarantir Tatitun angelapjama." 
Zechariah12:9 “Khä urusti nayax Jerusalenar nuwantañ muniri markarux tukjäwa. 
Zechariah12:10 Davidat saraqiri wila masinakapampiru, Jerusalén markan jakirinakampirux, khuyapayasiñampi mayisiñ ajayumpiw phuqt'ä. Ukkhaw khitirutï chhuxriñchapki ukarux uñkatapxani, ukatsti jupat llakisipxaniwa, jachapxarakiniwa, sapa yuqall wawa jiwayasiri jaqjama, jan ukax jilïr wawan jiwatapatjama." 
Zechariah12:11 Jerusalenanxa jach'a jachañaw utjani, kamisatix Meguido uraqina Hadad-rimón sat diosapat jachañax utjki ukhama." 
Zechariah12:12 Uka markpachan sapa mayni wila masinakaw yaqha yaqha tantacht'asis llakisiñat jachapxani: Davidat saraqir wila masinakapa, warminakapamppacha; Natán chachat saraqir wila masinakapa, warminakapamppacha;" 
Zechariah12:13 Leví chachat saraqiri wila masinakapa, warminakapamppacha; Simí chachat saraqir wila masinakapa, warminakapamppacha;" 
Zechariah12:14 ukhamarak taqi maynïr wila masinakasa, yaqha yaqha, warminakapamppacha." 
Zechariah13:1 “Khä urun mä uma jalsuw jist'artani, ukan Davidat saraqir wila masinakapasa, Jerusalén markan jakirinakasa juchanakapa, q'añu luratanakap jariqasipxañapataki." 
Zechariah13:2 Taqi aka markansti nayax yaqha diosanakan sutinakapsa jan mayampi amtasiñatakiw t'unjä. Uka pachparakiw profetanaksa, taqi ñanqha ajayunaksa q'alpun tukjarakï. Naya, Tatituw uk arsta." 
Zechariah13:3 Ukhamasti, kunapachatix maynix jutir urunakat arsuñ munkani ukkhaxa, awkinakap kipkaw sapxani: ‘¡Jumax jiwätawa, k'ari arunakam Tatitun arupawa sas parlañ munatamata!’ sasa. ¡Khitinakatix profetätwa sasa sarnaqkani ukanakarusa, awkinakap pachpaw cuchillompi chhuqhuntas jiwayapxani!" 
Zechariah13:4 “Khä urunsti, profetanakax k'ari unañchäwinak parlapxatapat p'inqasipxani. Janiw khitis profetanakan lip'ichit lurat isinakampi uchasisax sallqjkaniti," 
Zechariah13:5 jan ukasti sapa mayniw sani: ‘Nayax janiw profetäkti, yapu luririkïtwa. Wawatpach yapun irnaqañ yatta’ sasa." 
Zechariah13:6 Jupar khitis jiskt'aspa: ‘¿Kunatsa janchiman uka chhuxriñchatanakax utji?’ sasaxa, jupasti sarakiniwa: ‘Masinakaxan utapan ukham lurapxitu’ ” sasa." 
Zechariah13:7 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux siwa: “¡Sartasim espada, ajllit reyixaru jiwayam! ¡Munat awatirixar jiwayam, ukhamat markaxax ovejanakar uñtat aywitatani, nayasti saraqirinakaparux q'ala tukjarakï!" 
Zechariah13:8 Aka markankir jaqinakatxa, sapa kimsat paniniw jiwarani, ukat jilt'irikiw jakani. Uka jilt'irirusti ninampjamaw q'umachä, kunjämatix qullqix q'umachañäki ukhama, kunjämatix qurix q'uma tukuyañäki ukhama. Ukkhaw jupanakax nayar art'asipxitani, nayasti jaysäwa. Sarakïwa: ‘Nayan markaxa’ sasa. Jupanakasti sapxarakiniwa: ‘Tatituw jiwasan Diosasaxa’ sasa. Naya, Tatituw uk arsta.”" 
Zechariah13:9  
Zechariah14:1 Jerusalén marka, Tatitun urupax jutaskiwa, kunapachatix juma taypina, yänakam aparasax lakirpayatäkani uka uru." 
Zechariah14:2 Uka uruw Tatitux taqi markanakar tantachthapini, Jerusalenampi nuwasipxañapataki. Markaru katuntasasti, utanakapat yänakap lunthatsupxani, warminakaparus warmisipxaniwa, chikatpach jaqinakaparux katuntat apapxarakini. Jilt'irinakakiw ukan qhiparani." 
Zechariah14:3 Ukatsti Tatituw uka markanakamp nuwasir misturakini, kunjämatix nuwasïwi urun nuwaski ukhama." 
Zechariah14:4 Uka urusti Tatitux Olivos qullu patxaruw utjnuqasini, Jerusalén marka uñkatasina, inti jalsu tuqina. Olivos qullurux payaruw jaljtayani, mä chikat qullux amsta tuqiruw jitt'ani, mä chikatasti aynach tuqiruw jitt'arakini, uka taypix mä jach'a qhirwaruw tukuni inti jalsuta inti jalantkama," 
Zechariah14:5 jumanakasti uka pä qullu taypin utjkani uka qhirwanjam jaltxapxäta, uka qhirwasti maysäxankir Asal uraqkamaw purini. Jumanakax jaltxapxätawa kunjämatix Ozías reyin Judá marka apnaqäwipan nayra awkinakamax, uraqi khathati sartipan jaltxapxänxa ukhama. Tatitu Diosaxasti taqpach aski jaqinakapampiw jutani." 
Zechariah14:6 Uka urux janiw thayasa juyphisa utjkaniti. 
Zechariah14:7 Uka mä sapa urutsti Tatitu sapakiw yati. Uka urunsti janiw amuyaskaniti urütapasa arumätapasa, arumäkanisa qhanakïskaniwa." 
Zechariah14:8 Ukkhasti Jerusalén uraqitxa suma q'uma umaw jalsuni, uka umax juyphi pachasa junt'u pachasa jalaskakiniwa, mä chikat umax Mar Muerto sat qutakamaw jalani, mä chikatasti Mediterráneo sat jach'a qutakamaw jalarakini." 
Zechariah14:9 Uka uruw Tatitux taqi akapach apnaqani. Jupa sapakiw Tatitünixa, sutipasti mä sapakirakïniwa." 
Zechariah14:10 Taqpach markax pamparuw tukuni, Jerusalén markat aynach tuqinkir Gueba chiqat qalltasa, Rimón chiqakama. Jerusalén markasti alay qullupankaniwa, ukanarak suman jakasipxani. Benjaminan Punkupata, Ángulo sat Punkukama, ukhamaraki Hananelan pukarapata reyin aceitep ch'irwañäki ukkhakama." 
Zechariah14:11 Jïsa, Jerusalén markanxa walja jaqinakaw utjantani, janiw mayampis t'unjatäkxaniti. Jaqinakapax jan kunan kamachkañaw jakasipxarakini." 
Zechariah14:12 Ukampis Jerusalenampi nuwasiri markanakarux, Tatitux walpun mutuyani: jaqinakapan janchipas jakkirpacharuw ñusantani, nayranakapasa, laxranakapas pachparuw wañsurakini." 
Zechariah14:13 Uka urun Tatitux jupanakar axsarañ phuqhantani. Sapa mayniw jak'apankiriru amparat katuntani, ukatsti jupanakkamaw nuwantasipxani." 
Zechariah14:14 Judá markankirinakasti Jerusalenaruw jutapxani, uka markanakamp nuwasiri, jupanakarusti waljpun yänakapsa, qullqipsa, quripsa, isinakapsa aparapxani." 
Zechariah14:15 Kuna mutuyäwitix jaqinakxar purkani, uka mutuyäwirakiw uñisirinakan utjäwipan utjir caballonakxaru, mulanakxaru, camellonakxaru, asnonakxaru, taqi uywanakxarus purirakini." 
Zechariah14:16 Uka qhipatsti, Jerusalenampi nuwasipkän uka markanakat jilt'iri jaqinakaxa, sapa maraw Reyiru, taqi ch'amani Tatitur yupaychir sarapxani, ukhamaraki Chhujllanak lurañ phunchhäwi uruyañataki." 
Zechariah14:17 Ukampisa, aka uraqinkir kawkïr markanakatix Jerusalén markar taqi ch'aman Tatit Reyiru yupaychiri jan sarkani ukaxa, ukanakan uraqinakapxarux janiw jallux purxatkaniti." 
Zechariah14:18 Egiptonkir jaqinakatix jan sarapkani ukaxa, Tatitux jupanakar mutuyaniwa, uka kipkaraki kawkïr markatix Chhujllanak lurañ phunchhäwi uruyir jan sarkani ukanakarusa." 
Zechariah14:19 Ukäniw Egipto markataki, taqi markanakataki, Chhujllanak lurañ phunchhäwi uruyiri jan saririnakan mutuyäwipaxa." 
Zechariah14:20 Uka uruxa, caballonakan chhullu chhullunakapasa “Tatitur Luqtata” sas qillqatkamakïniwa. Tatitun utapan utjir phukhunakasa, altar nayraqatankir jach'a qirunakasa, qullanäniwa." 
Zechariah14:21 Jerusalén markampina, Judá markampin utjir taqpach phukhunakasa taqi ch'amani Tatitur luqtatäniwa. Khitinakatix Tatitun utapar wilañcha luqtasir sarapkani ukanakasti, uka phukhunakaruw luqtat uywanakan aychap qhatiyapxani. Uka urux taqi ch'amani Tatitun utapan janiw alakip lurir jaqinakax utjkxaniti." 
Malachi1:1 Tatitux Malaquías profeta tuqiw Israel markar aka arunak yatiyäna: 
Malachi1:2 Tatitux siwa: “Nayax jumanakar munasipxsmawa” sasa. Jumanakasti sapxtawa: “¿Kunjämatsa yatipxirista juman nanakar munatamxa?” sasa. ¿Janit Esaú chachasti Jacob chachan jilapäkänsti? Ukampisa, nayax Jacoburuw munasïyäta," 
Malachi1:3 Esaú chacharusti uñisiyätwa, qullunakap ch'usa wasar tukuyäyäta, uraqinakapsti wasarankir qamaqinakaruw utjasiñapatak katuyäyäta” sasa." 
Malachi1:4 Esaú chachan saraqirinakapäki uka Edomitanakatix sapxaspa: “Markasax t'unjatawa, ukampis wasitat sayt'ayañäni” sasaxa, taqi ch'aman Tatitux akham sarakispawa: “Jupanakax markanakap wasitat sayt'ayasipkan ukasa, nayax wasitat t'unjarakï. Markapax ‘Juchan phuqt'at marka’ satäniwa; uraqinakapasti ‘Tatitun wiñay q'apisiñ uraqi’ sasa sutichatarakïniwa.”" 
Malachi1:5 Jumanakax pachpa nayranakamampiw uñjapxarakïta, ukatsti sapxarakïtawa: “¡Tatitux jach'a ch'amaniwa, Israelan qurpapat jayansa jilarkir ch'amaniwa!” sasa." 
Malachi1:6 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux sacerdotenakar akham siwa: “Wawanakax awkinakapar waqaychapxiwa, uywatanakas uywirinakaparux yäqapxarakiwa. Nayatix jumanakan awkimästa ukasti ¿kunatarak nayar jan waqaychapxistasti? Nayatix jumanakan uywirimästa ukasti, ¿kunatarak nayar jan yäqapxistasti? Jumanakax nayar jisk'achapxistawa, yatkasas sasipkakistawa: ‘¿Kun lurasarak nanakasti jumar jisk'achapxsmasti?’ sasa." 
Malachi1:7 Jumanakax altaraxar q'añu t'ant'anak apanipxtaxa, ukampis jiskhisipkakistawa: ‘¿Kun lurasarak jumar ñaqhachapxsmasti?’ sasa. Altaraxax jumanakan ñanqhachañatakïkaspas ukham amuyapxtaxa," 
Malachi1:8 nayax janis kuna yäqañäkiristsa ukham nayar luqtañatak apanipxtaxa: juykhu uywanaka, kayu p'akit uywanaka, usut uywanaka; ukax ¿jumanakatak walikïskiti? ¡Sarapxam, mark apnaqirinakaman jilïrinakapar ukanak churanipxam, inach jupanakax ‘Walikiw’ sas katuqapxätam!” sasa." 
Malachi1:9 Jumanakasti jichhax Diosaruy mayisipxam, jiwasat khuyapt'ayasiñapataki. Ukampis jumanakatix ukhama jan wali waxt'äwinak churasipkäta ukkhaxa, jan amuyapxamti Tatitun uka waxt'äwinaka suma chuymampi jumanakat katuqasitapa." 
Malachi1:10 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux siwa: “¡Walïspaw jumanakat kawkïrisa utaxan punkunakap jist'antaspa ukaxa, ukhamat jan inamayataki altaraxan ninapa aqtayasipkañamataki. Janiw jumanakatak chuymaxax utjkituti, janiw waxt'äwinakam katuqkarakïti." 
Malachi1:11 Taqi akapach uraqin nayarux jach'añchapxitu, taqi chiqanakan nayar jach'añchasax incienso q'aphiyapxi, ukatsti q'uma waxt'äwinakarak luqtapxitu." 
Malachi1:12 Ukampis jumanakax ñanqhachapxistawa. Altaraxax jisk'achañäkaspas ukham amuyapxtaxa, ‘uchatäki uka manq'anakax axtqañawa’ sasaw jisk'achapxaraktaxa." 
Malachi1:13 Jumanakax sapxtawa: ‘¡Taqi akanak lurkäwix qaritäxapxtwa!’ sasa. Ukatsti jisk'achapxistawa. Nayax uka lunthatata, usuta, kayu p'akit uywanak luqtanipkista ukanakxa kusisiñampis katuqapkirisma ukham amuyapxaraktaxa." 
Malachi1:14 Kawkïr jaqitix suma k'umar uywa nayar luqtañatak yaqhachkasina, mä usut uywaki luqtxitaspa ukax ñanqhachatäpan. Nayax ch'aman Reyïtwa, taqi markanakaw axsarapxitu.” Ukham siw taqi ch'aman Tatituxa." 
Malachi2:1 “Sacerdotenaka, aka arunakax jumanakatakiwa:" 
Malachi2:2 Jumanakasti nayarux jaysañanakamawa, sutixsa taqi chuymampiw jach'añchapxañama. Janitix ukham lurapkäta ukaxa nayax ñanqhachapxämawa. Taqi chuymampi jan jach'añchapxatamatxa, jumanakatak aski waxt'äwinakaxsa, ñanqhachañaruw tukuyä, sacerdote kankañ katuqapkta ukanaksa apaqapxämawa” siwa, taqi ch'aman Tatituxa." 
Malachi2:3 “Taqi ch'amanïñamsa nayax apaqapxämawa, ukatsti kawkïr uywanaktix luqtañatak apanipkäta uka uywanakan wanupampiw ajanut qhallkatapxäma, uka wanump chikarakiw pichanukut uñjasipxäta." 
Malachi2:4 Ukhamat yatipxäta, nayan aka kamachi arunak jumanakaru churataxa, Leví ayllumpi suma arust'äwir mantataxan jan tukusiñapataki” siwa, taqi ch'aman Tatituxa." 
Malachi2:5 “Nayan arust'äwixax Leví ayllutakix jakañänwa, samarañarakïnwa. Uka arust'äwsti jupan nayaru waqaychañapataki, axsarañapatakiw churarakïyäta, jupasti alt'at chuyma, axsartañ chuyma uñacht'ayitu." 
Malachi2:6 Leví sacerdotex kunatix chiqapäki uk yatichäna, janirakiw lakapan ñanqha parlañax utjkänti. Nayampisti sumana, aski samarañan jakarakïna, waljanirurakiw jucha lurañat jithiqtayäna." 
Malachi2:7 Sacerdotenakan lurañanakapasti, jaqinakaru nayar uñt'aña yatichapxañapawa, ukatsti taqinirakiw jupanakan ukaru sarapxañapa suma yatichäwinak katuqiri, jupanakax taqi ch'aman Tatitun suma arunakap qhanañchiri khithanita jaqinakäpxatap layku." 
Malachi2:8 “Ukampis juma sacerdotenakax suma chiqa thakhit saranukupxtawa, waljaniruw yatichäwinakamampix lanktasiyapxtaxa. Leví chachampi lurat suma arust'äwi ñanqhar tukuyapxtaxa." 
Malachi2:9 Ukat nayax jumanakar taqi jaqinakamp uñisiyapxäma, jan wali jaqinakat uñt'ayapxarakïma, jumanakan nayar jan ist'apxatamata, jaqinakar yatichapkta ukkhasa, mä khuskhak taqpachanir jan uñjapxatamata” siwa, taqi ch'aman Tatituxa." 
Malachi2:10 ¿Janit jiwasasti mä sapa awkinikïktansti? ¿Janit mä sapa Diosan uskutäktansti? ¿Kunatarak jiwasasti maynit maynikam sallqjasis sarnaqasktansti, kawkïr suma arust'äwirutix Tatitumpi awkinakasampix mantawayapki uka arunak p'akintasasti?" 
Malachi2:11 Judá markax Tatitumpi arust'äwir mantatapxa janiw phuqkiti, Jerusalén markansa, Israel uraqinsa wali axtaskay juchanak lurapxi. Judá markasti jan wali sarnaqañanakampiw Tatitun munat qullan utap q'añuchi, Judá markankir jaqinakax k'ari diosanakar yupaychir warminakampiw jaqichasipxi." 
Malachi2:12 ¡Walïspawa, Tatitux ukham q'añu sarnaqir jaqinakaru aka markat jaqunukuñapaxa, kawkïrïskpasa, khitïskpasa, taqi ch'aman Tatitur waxt'äwinak luqtirïskpasa!" 
Malachi2:13 Ukhamarus jumanakax janiw ukanakak lurapktati, jan ukasti jumanakan waxt'äwinakam Tatitux taqi chuymamp jan katuqxatap laykusti, jachañanakamampi, warariñanakamampiw Tatitun altarap phuqhantayapxtaxa." 
Malachi2:14 Ukatsti jiskt'asisipkaktawa: “¿Kunatsa ukhamäpacha?” sasa. Tatituw uñjaraktam, kuna arunaktix jumax waynäkasin, jaqichaskta uka warmir arsutam jan phuqhatama. ¡Warmimax jumamp chika sarnaqirïnwa, jumasti jupa sapampik jakañatakiw arsuraktaxa!" 
Malachi2:15 Diosax jiwasar mä janchiki, mä sapa ajayukïñasatakiw uskusistu. Jupar luqtat mä suma markäñasatakiw irnuqarakistu." 
Malachi2:16 Israel markan taqi ch'aman Tatitupax siwa: “¡Jumanakpachat amuyasipxam, jan warminakamarux sallqjapxamti. Nayasti uñistwa kawkïri jaqitix warmipampi jaljtki ukaruxa, uka jach'a jucha lurasin jakäwipa q'añuchasi!”" 
Malachi2:17 Tatitux jumanakan arunakam isch'ukkäwix qaritäxiwa; jumanakasti jiskhisisipkaktawa: “¿Kunarak jiwasasti parltan jiwasar isch'ukkäwi qarjasiñapatakisti?” sasa. Jumanakasti sapxtawa: “Jan wali lurir jaqinakax Tatitutakix walikïskiwa, ukanakampix kusisikiwa” sasa; ukatsti arusipxaraktawa: “¿kawkinkarak chiqapar uñjir Diosasti?” sasa." 
Malachi3:1 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux siwa: “Nayaw yatiyirixa khitanï, jupaw nayatak thakhi wakichani. Jumanakax thaqhapkta uka Tatitux, akatjamat utaparux mantanini. ¡Arust'äwir mantat yatiyirix niyaw purisinki!”" 
Malachi3:2 Ukampis, ¿khitirak jutañap urumpi q'iwtasispasti? ¿Khitirak jupa nayraqatan sayt'asispasti? Ninar uñtataw jupax purinini, jiwasar q'umachañataki, jabonar uñtataw q'añunak jiwasan chuymasat apaqani." 
Malachi3:3 Tatitux sacerdotenakar q'umachañatakiw qunt'asini, Leví ayllut saraqir sacerdotenakaru, kunjämtix maynix qullqsa, qursa ninampi q'umachki ukhama. Ukat jupanakax waxt'äwinakapxa Tatitur luqtapxani, kunjämtix jupanakax luqtapxirïki ukhama." 
Malachi3:4 Tatitusti kusisiñampiw Judá, Jerusalén markanakan waxt'äwinakap katuqani, kunjämtix khä urunakan katuqasirïkän ukhama." 
Malachi3:5 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux siwa: “Nayaw jumanakar taripir jutä. Ukhamarus nayax uñjkta ukanak arsü khitinakatix layqasipki, yaqha warminakamp sarnaqapki, k'ari juramento lurapki, irnaqirinakarus sallqjapki, ijmanakarusa, wajchanakarus jachayapki, yaqha markat jutir jaqinakarus jan wal uñjapki, nayarus jan axsarapkituti ukanakatakiw arsurakï." 
Malachi3:6 “Nayätwa Tatit Diosaxa, nayax pachpakïsktwa. Ukat jumanakax Jacobun wawanakapa, jan tukjatäpktati." 
Malachi3:7 Jumanakax awkinakamjamarakiw nayan kamachi arunakaxat saranukupxtaxa, janiw kamachinak phuqhañ munapkaraktati. Naya, taqi ch'aman Tatituw sapxsma: ¡Nayar kuttanxapxam, nayasti jumanakar kuttanxarakïwa! Ukampis jumanakax sapxtawa: ‘¿Kunatsa nanakasti jumar kuttanipxäma?’ sasa." 
Malachi3:8 Nayasti jumanakarux jiskt'apxsmawa: ¿Jaqix Diosat lunthataspati? sasa. ¡Jumanakax lunthatapxistawa! ‘¿Kunanarak nanakasti jumar lunthatapxsmasti?’ sasas jiskt'asipkakistawa. ¡Jumanakax sapa tunkat maya churañanaka, waxt'äwinaka nayat lunthatapxista!" 
Malachi3:9 Jïsa, taqi markpacha, taqi jumanakaw nayat lunthatasipkistaxa, ukat nayax jumanakar ñanqhachapxsma. Naya, taqi ch'aman Tatituw sapxsma:" 
Malachi3:10 Sapa tunkat maya churañamäki uksti nayan utaxar apanipxam, ukhamat manq'añax utaxan utjañapataki. Jichhax yant'apxita, nayaw jumanakaru alaxpach ventananak jist'arasin jilarkir suma waxt'äwinak apayanipxäma." 
Malachi3:11 Janirakiw kuna laq'unakas yapunakamarux tukjkaniti, uva yapunakamas wañskarakiniti." 
Malachi3:12 Ukatsti taqpach markanakaw jumanakar wali kusisiñan markat uñt'apxätam, munkaya uraqinïpxatam layku. Naya, taqi ch'aman Tatituw arsta”." 
Malachi3:13 Tatitusti siwa: “Jumanakax jan wali arunakampiw nayat parlapxtaxa. Ukatsa jiskhisipkaktawa: ‘¿Kunarak nanakasti jumat parlapxtsti?’ sasa. 
Malachi3:14 Jumanakax akanak sapxtaxa: ‘Diosar arkañax inamayakiwa. ¿Kunaraki jiwasasti apsuñäni jupan arunakaparjam sarnaqasasti, taqi ch'aman Tatit nayraqatan llakt'at sarnaqasasa?" 
Malachi3:15 Jiwasax uñjtanwa, jach'a jach'a tukurinakax kusisitäpxiwa, qhuru jaqinakatakisti jan walinak lurkasas taqi kunas jupanakatakix sumakipuniwa, Tatiturus yant'apxarakiwa, ukampis janiw kuna mutuñsa Tatitut katuqapkiti’ ” sasa." 
Malachi3:16 (Tatitur axsartas sarnaqirinakasti jupanakkamaw parlasipxäna, Tatitusti jupanakar ist'änwa. Ukatsti, jupan nayraqatapan qillqasïna, Tatitur axsartañampi yäqirinakataki, sutip waqaychirinakataki)." 
Malachi3:17 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux siwa: “Niyaw urux purisinki, jupanakax wasitat nayankxani uka uruxa. Jupanakax nayatakix mä suma imat qurïkaspas ukhamäniwa, janiw kunampis jupanakar ñanqhachkäti; kunjämtix mä awkix wawapat khuyapayaski ukhamaw jupanakat khuyapayasirakï." 
Malachi3:18 Ukapachaw jumanakax amuyasipxäta kunatix askïki, kunatix jan askïki uka, ukhamaraki, khititix Diosar yupaychki, khititix jan yupaychki ukanaka” sasa." 
Malachi4:1 Taqi ch'aman Tatitux siwa: “Urux jak'achasisinkiwa, hornor uñtat parintata, uka urusti taqi jach'a jach'a tukurinakampi, ñanqha luririnakampix jichhur uñtataw nakhantani. Uka uru purinkani ukapachaw jupanakar saphitpach nakhantani, janirakiw kunas jupanakat jilt'kaniti." 
Malachi4:2 Ukampisa, khitinakatix nayar axsartas sarnaqapkta ukanakatakixa, chiqapar uñjañaxax intir uñtataw k'ajani, qhanapasti jaqinakatakix qhispiyasiñ apanini. Jumanakasti kusisiñata jalnaqapxäta kunjämtix vaca qallunakax uyut mistusax jalnaqapki ukhama." 
Malachi4:3 Nayax wakichaskta uka urunxa, jumanakax uka ñanqha lurir jaqinakarux laq'arjamaw takichasipxäta." 
Malachi4:4 “Horeb qullun Moisés luqtirixar churkta uka kamachinakat amtasipxam. ¡Ukanakasti iwxa arunakampi, kamachi arsutanakampiwa taqpach Israel markan phuqhañapataki!" 
Malachi4:5 “Kunürutix nayax mutuyapkäma uka uru janïra purinkipanxa, nayax Elías profetaruw khithanipxäma." 
Malachi4:6 Jupaw awkinakampi wawanakampi sumankthapiyxani. Janitix ukhamäkani ukapachasti, nayaw jutasin aka uraqi q'ala t'unjä.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Daniel profetax kuna jan wali luräwitix Tatitun utapan luraskani uka tuqit qillqäna. Kunapachatix jumanakax Daniel profetan qillqataparjam Qullan Chiqana ñanqha luririn utjantasir uñjapkäta ukkhaxa, ullart'irix sum amuypan," 
Luke3:25 Joseasti Matatiasan yuqapänwa, Matatiasasti Amosan yuqapänwa, Amosasti Nahuman yuqapänwa, Nahumasti Eslin yuqapänwa, Eslisti Nagain yuqapänwa, Nagaiasti Mahatan yuqapänwa." 
Luke3:25 Joseasti Matatiasan yuqapänwa, Matatiasasti Amosan yuqapänwa, Amosasti Nahuman yuqapänwa, Nahumasti Eslin yuqapänwa, Eslisti Nagain yuqapänwa, Nagaiasti Mahatan yuqapänwa." 
Acts2:16 Chiqpachansa jichhaw phuqhasiski kuntix Diosax Joel profetap tuqi arsuwaykän ukhamarjama: 
James5:11 Jiwasasti khitinakatix t'aqhisipki jupanakarux “kusisiñaniwa” sistanwa. Jumanakax kunjämtix Job chachax t'aqhiskän uk ist'apxtawa, ukatsti kunjämtix Tatitux tukuyar jupampi lurkän uk yatipxaraktawa. Tatitux wali munasiri, khuyapayasiriwa."
